  188 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 | //| Initialize - Enhanced with v14's Critical Initialization Order  |
  190 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 | bool CCore::Initialize(const EAInputParams& inputParams) {
  192 |     Print("=== APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL Initialization Starting ===");
  193 |     
  194 |     if(m_bInitialized) {
  195 |         Print("WARNING: Core already initialized");
  196 |         return true;
  197 |     }
  198 |     
  199 |     // Copy input parameters to context
  200 |     m_Context.InputParams = inputParams;
  201 |     m_Context.Params.SetDefaults();
  202 |     m_Context.StatusMessage = "Initializing Core Infrastructure...";
  203 |     
  204 |     // === STAGE 1: CORE INFRASTRUCTURE (CRITICAL ORDER) ===
  205 |     if(!InitializeCoreInfrastructure(inputParams)) {
  206 |         Print("CRITICAL FAILURE: Core infrastructure initialization failed");
  207 |         m_bCriticalError = true;
  208 |         return false;
  209 |     }
  210 |     
  211 |     // === STAGE 2: FRAMEWORK LAYER ===
  212 |     if(!InitializeFrameworkLayer()) {
  213 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Framework layer initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  214 |         return false;
  215 |     }
  216 |     
  217 |     // === STAGE 3: DATA PROVIDERS ===
  218 |     if(!InitializeDataProviders()) {
  219 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Data providers initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  220 |         return false;
  221 |     }
  222 |     
  223 |     // === STAGE 4: MARKET ANALYSIS ===
  224 |     if(!InitializeMarketAnalysis()) {
  225 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Market analysis initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  226 |         return false;
  227 |     }
  228 |     
  229 |     // === STAGE 5: SIGNAL GENERATION ===
  230 |     if(!InitializeSignalGeneration()) {
  231 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Signal generation initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  232 |         return false;
  233 |     }
  234 |     
  235 |     // === STAGE 6: RISK MANAGEMENT ===
  236 |     if(!InitializeRiskManagement()) {
  237 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Risk management initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  238 |         return false;
  239 |     }
  240 |     
  241 |     // === STAGE 7: TRADE MANAGEMENT ===
  242 |     if(!InitializeTradeManagement()) {
  243 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Trade management initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  244 |         return false;
  245 |     }
  246 |     
  247 |     // === STAGE 8: OPTIMIZATION ===
  248 |     if(!InitializeOptimization()) {
  249 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Optimization initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  250 |         return false;
  251 |     }
  252 |     
  253 |     // === STAGE 9: ANALYTICS ===
  254 |     if(!InitializeAnalytics()) {
  255 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("Analytics initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  256 |         return false;
  257 |     }
  258 |     
  259 |     // === STAGE 10: USER INTERFACE ===
  260 |     if(!InitializeUserInterface()) {
  261 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("User interface initialization failed", __FUNCTION__);
  262 |         return false;
  263 |     }
  264 |     
  265 |     // === FINAL VALIDATION ===
  266 |     if(!ValidateInitialization()) {
  267 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError("System validation failed", __FUNCTION__);
  268 |         return false;
  269 |     }
  270 |     
  271 |     // Mark as initialized
  272 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  273 |     m_Context.Params.IsInitialized = true;
  274 |     m_Context.Params.CurrentState = STATE_READY;
  275 |     m_Context.StatusMessage = "System Ready";
  276 |     
  277 |     if(m_pLogger) {
  278 |         m_pLogger->LogInfo("=== APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL Successfully Initialized ===", __FUNCTION__);
  279 |         m_pLogger->LogInfo("Version: " + GetEAVersion(), __FUNCTION__);
  280 |         m_pLogger->LogInfo("Build Date: " + GetEABuildDate(), __FUNCTION__);
  281 |     }
  282 |     
  283 |     Print("=== APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL Ready for Trading ===");
  284 |     return true;
  285 | }
  286 | 
  287 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  288 | //| Initialize Core Infrastructure - Stage 1 (CRITICAL)             |
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | bool CCore::InitializeCoreInfrastructure(const EAInputParams& inputParams) {
  291 |     // ERROR HANDLER FIRST - No dependencies
  292 |     m_pErrorHandler = new CErrorHandler();
  293 |     if(!m_pErrorHandler) {
  294 |         Print("PANIC: Failed to create ErrorHandler - System cannot continue");
  295 |         return false;
  296 |     }
  297 |     
  298 |     if(!m_pErrorHandler->Initialize(&m_Context)) {
  299 |         Print("PANIC: Failed to initialize ErrorHandler - System cannot continue");
  300 |         delete m_pErrorHandler;
  301 |         m_pErrorHandler = NULL;
  302 |         return false;
  303 |     }
  304 |     m_Context.pErrorHandler = m_pErrorHandler;
  305 |     
  306 |     // LOGGER SECOND - Depends on ErrorHandler
  307 |     m_pLogger = new CLogger();
  308 |     if(!m_pLogger) {
  309 |         if(m_pErrorHandler) m_pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_MEMORY, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to create Logger");
  310 |         return false;
  311 |     }
  312 |     
  313 |     m_Context.pLogger = m_pLogger; // Assign before initializing
  314 |     if(!m_pLogger->Initialize(&m_Context)) {
  315 |         if(m_pErrorHandler) m_pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_FAILED, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to initialize Logger");
  316 |         return false;
  317 |     }
  318 |     
  319 |     // PARAMETER STORE THIRD
  320 |     m_pParameterStore = new CParameterStore();
  321 |     if(!m_pParameterStore || !m_pParameterStore->Initialize(&m_Context)) {
  322 |         LogInitializationStatus("ParameterStore", false);
  323 |         return false;
  324 |     }
  325 |     m_Context.pParamStore = m_pParameterStore;
  326 |     
  327 |     // STATE MANAGER FOURTH
  328 |     m_pStateManager = new CStateManager();
  329 |     if(!m_pStateManager || !m_pStateManager->Initialize(&m_Context)) {
  330 |         LogInitializationStatus("StateManager", false);
  331 |         return false;
  332 |     }
  333 |     m_Context.pStateManager = m_pStateManager;
  334 |     
  335 |     LogInitializationStatus("Core Infrastructure", true);
  336 |     return true;
  337 | }
  338 | 
  339 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  340 | //| OnTick - Enhanced with v14's Sophisticated Event Handling       |
  341 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  342 | void CCore::OnTick() {
  343 |     if(!m_bInitialized || m_bCriticalError) return;
  344 |     
  345 |     // Update last tick information
  346 |     m_Context.LastTickTime = TimeCurrent();
  347 |     SymbolInfoTick(_Symbol, m_Context.LastTick);
  348 |     
  349 |     // === STAGE 1: TIME-CRITICAL UPDATES ===
  350 |     if(m_pTimeManager) {
  351 |         m_pTimeManager->OnTick();
  352 |         // Check for new bar event
  353 |         if(m_Context.IsNewBarEvent) {
  354 |             if(m_pLogger && m_Context.InputParams.EnableMethodLogging) {
  355 |                 m_pLogger->LogDebug("New bar detected - triggering analysis cycle", __FUNCTION__);
  356 |             }
  357 |         }
  358 |     }
  359 |     
  360 |     // === STAGE 2: MARKET DATA UPDATES ===
  361 |     if(m_pSymbolManager) m_pSymbolManager->Update();
  362 |     if(m_pIndicatorManager) m_pIndicatorManager->Update();
  363 |     
  364 |     // === STAGE 3: BROKER HEALTH MONITORING ===
  365 |     if(m_pBrokerHealthMonitor) m_pBrokerHealthMonitor->AnalyzeBrokerHealth();
  366 |     
  367 |     // === STAGE 4: POSITION MANAGEMENT ===
  368 |     if(m_pTradeManager) m_pTradeManager->Update();
  369 |     
  370 |     // === STAGE 5: NEW BAR ANALYSIS (IF TRIGGERED) ===
  371 |     if(m_Context.IsNewBarEvent) {
  372 |         // Reset flag immediately
  373 |         m_Context.IsNewBarEvent = false;
  374 |         
  375 |         // Run comprehensive analysis
  376 |         if(m_pAssetDNA) m_pAssetDNA->FullAnalysis();
  377 |         if(m_pTechnicalAnalyzer) m_pTechnicalAnalyzer->Analyze();
  378 |         if(m_pSignalManager) m_pSignalManager->ProcessSignals();
  379 |     }
  380 |     
  381 |     // === STAGE 6: RISK MANAGEMENT ===
  382 |     if(m_pRiskManager) m_pRiskManager->Update();
  383 |     
  384 |     // === STAGE 7: UI UPDATES ===
  385 |     if(m_pUIManager) m_pUIManager->Update();
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  389 | //| System Health Check                                              |
  390 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  391 | bool CCore::IsHealthy() const {
  392 |     if(!m_bInitialized || m_bCriticalError) return false;
  393 |     
  394 |     // Check critical components
  395 |     if(!m_pLogger || !m_pErrorHandler) return false;
  396 |     if(!m_pRiskManager || !m_pTradeManager) return false;
  397 |     
  398 |     // Check system health score
  399 |     double healthScore = GetSystemHealthScore();
  400 |     return healthScore > 50.0; // Minimum acceptable health
  401 | }
  402 | 
  403 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  404 | //| Get System Health Score                                          |
  405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 | double CCore::GetSystemHealthScore() const {
  407 |     if(!m_bInitialized) return 0.0;
  408 |     
  409 |     double totalScore = 0.0;
  410 |     int componentCount = 0;
  411 |     
  412 |     // Broker health component
  413 |     if(m_pBrokerHealthMonitor) {
  414 |         totalScore += m_pBrokerHealthMonitor->GetHealthScore();
  415 |         componentCount++;
  416 |     }
  417 |     
  418 |     // Analytics health component
  419 |     if(m_pAnalyticsManager) {
  420 |         totalScore += 85.0; // Placeholder - analytics health
  421 |         componentCount++;
  422 |     }
  423 |     
  424 |     // Risk management health
  425 |     if(m_pRiskManager) {
  426 |         totalScore += 90.0; // Placeholder - risk health
  427 |         componentCount++;
  428 |     }
  429 |     
  430 |     return (componentCount > 0) ? totalScore / componentCount : 0.0;
  431 | }
  432 | 
  433 | } // namespace ApexPullback
  434 | 
  435 | #endif // APEX_CORE_V5_FINAL_MQH
  436 | 
  437 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  438 | //| ARCHITECTURE DOCUMENTATION                                      |

  441 |  * APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL - Enhanced Core Architecture
  442 |  * 
  443 |  * This ApexCore.mqh represents the enhanced central nervous system
  444 |  * incorporating v14's sophisticated patterns with v5's modularity:
  445 |  * 
  446 |  * KEY ENHANCEMENTS FROM V14:
  447 |  * 
  448 |  * 1. CRITICAL INITIALIZATION ORDER
  449 |  *    - ErrorHandler -> Logger -> ParameterStore -> StateManager
  450 |  *    - Proper dependency chain management
  451 |  *    - Fail-safe initialization with rollback capability
  452 |  * 
  453 |  * 2. SOPHISTICATED EVENT HANDLING
  454 |  *    - New bar detection with comprehensive analysis cycle
  455 |  *    - Time-critical vs analysis-critical task separation
  456 |  *    - Efficient resource utilization
  457 |  *

  459 |  *    - Multi-layer error handling with proper propagation
  460 |  *    - System health monitoring and emergency stops
  461 |  *    - Graceful degradation capabilities
  462 |  *

  464 |  *    - Clean separation of concerns across 10 layers

  758 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  759 | //| CENTRAL EA CONTEXT - THE HEART OF THE SYSTEM                    |

  761 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  762 | struct EAContext {
  763 |     // === ENHANCED CORE STATE ===
  764 |     EAInputParams InputParams;              // All input parameters
  765 |     EAParams Params;                        // EA operational parameters
  766 |     MarketState MarketState;                // Current market state
  767 |     SSignalContext LastSignal;              // Last signal context
  768 |     SPerformanceMetrics Performance;        // Performance metrics
  769 |     SAssetProfile AssetProfile;             // Asset characteristics
  770 |     SRiskMetrics RiskMetrics;               // Risk metrics
  771 |     
  772 |     // === SYSTEM STATE ===
  773 |     bool IsNewBarEvent;                     // New bar flag
  774 |     datetime LastTickTime;                  // Last tick timestamp
  775 |     MqlTick LastTick;                       // Last tick data
  776 |     bool IsEmergencyStop;                   // Emergency stop flag
  777 |     string StatusMessage;                   // Current status message
  778 |     
  779 |     // === CORE INFRASTRUCTURE POINTERS ===

  796 |

  846 |     // === CONSTRUCTOR - INITIALIZE ALL TO NULL ===
  847 |     EAContext() {
  848 |         // Initialize structures
  849 |         InputParams.SetDefaults();
  850 |         Params.SetDefaults();
  851 |         MarketState.Reset();
  852 |         LastSignal.Reset();
  853 |         Performance.Reset();
  854 |         AssetProfile.Reset();
  855 |         RiskMetrics.Reset();
  856 |         
  857 |         // Initialize system state
  858 |         IsNewBarEvent = false;
  859 |         LastTickTime = 0;
  860 |         ZeroMemory(LastTick);
  861 |         IsEmergencyStop = false;
  862 |         StatusMessage = "Initializing...";
  863 |         
  864 |         // Initialize all pointers to NULL
  865 |         pLogger = NULL;
  866 |         pErrorHandler = NULL;
  867 |         pFuncStack = NULL;
  868 |         pParamStore = NULL;
  869 |         pStateManager = NULL;

  881 |         pSlippageMonitor = NULL;
  882 |         pMarketProfile = NULL;
  883 |         pSignalManager = NULL;
  884 |         pSignalEngine = NULL;

  886 |         pRiskManager = NULL;

  934 | //| ARCHITECTURE DOCUMENTATION                                      |
  935 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  936 | /*
  937 |  * APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL - Enhanced Architecture Documentation
  938 |  * 
  939 |  * This CommonStructs.mqh represents the enhanced core of the EA system,
  940 |  * incorporating the best practices and sophisticated patterns from v14:
  941 |  * 
  942 |  * KEY ENHANCEMENTS FROM V14:
  943 |  * 
  944 |  * 1. NAMESPACE MANAGEMENT
  945 |  *    - Clean ApexPullback namespace encapsulation
  946 |  *    - Proper scope isolation and naming conventions
  947 |  * 
  948 |  * 2. FORWARD DECLARATIONS
  949 |  *    - Complete forward declaration pattern to prevent circular dependencies
  950 |  *    - Organized by functional layers for clear architecture
  951 |  * 
  952 |  * 3. ENHANCED STRUCTURES
  953 |  *    - More sophisticated EAInputParams with v14 advanced features
  954 |  *    - Comprehensive MarketState with real-time analysis
  955 |  *    - Professional-grade performance metrics
  956 |  *    - Asset profiling capabilities from v14's AssetDNA
  957 |  * 
  958 |  * 4. CENTRAL EACONTEXT
  959 |  *    - Single source of truth for all EA state
  960 |  *    - Organized pointer management for all system components
  961 |  *    - Proper initialization and cleanup patterns
  962 |  * 
  963 |  * 5. PROFESSIONAL STANDARDS
  964 |  *    - Enterprise-level documentation
  965 |  *    - Consistent coding standards and naming conventions
  966 |  *    - Robust error handling preparation
  967 |  * 
  968 |  * This enhanced architecture provides the foundation for a world-class
  969 |  * trading system that combines the modularity of v5 with the sophistication
  970 |  * and battle-tested patterns of v14.
  971 |  */

   28 |     LOG_LEVEL_INFO,             // Informational messages
   29 |     LOG_LEVEL_WARNING,          // Warnings that don't stop execution
   30 |     LOG_LEVEL_ERROR,            // Errors that may halt some functionality
   31 |     LOG_LEVEL_CRITICAL          // Critical errors, system halt likely
   32 | };

   77 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 | //| CBrokerInterface - Comprehensive Broker Management              |
   79 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   80 | class CBrokerInterface {
   81 | private:
   82 |     EAContext*            m_pContext;           // Reference to EA context
   83 |     bool                  m_bInitialized;      // Initialization status
   84 |     
   85 |     // Broker information and statistics
   86 |     SBrokerInfo           m_BrokerInfo;         // Broker information
   87 |     SBrokerConnectionStats m_ConnectionStats;  // Connection statistics
   88 |     SExecutionQuality     m_ExecutionStats;    // Execution quality stats
   89 |     SSpreadStats          m_SpreadStats;       // Spread statistics
   90 |     
   91 |     // Monitoring settings
   92 |     datetime              m_LastHealthCheck;   // Last health check time
   93 |     datetime              m_LastSpreadCheck;   // Last spread check time
   94 |     int                   m_HealthCheckInterval; // Health check interval in seconds
   95 |     
   96 |     // Quality thresholds
   97 |     static const double   MAX_ACCEPTABLE_SLIPPAGE;
   98 |     static const double   MIN_SUCCESS_RATE;
   99 |     static const int      MAX_LATENCY_MS;
  100 |     static const double   MAX_SPREAD_MULTIPLIER;
  101 |

  172 | // Static constants definition
  173 | const double CBrokerInterface::MAX_ACCEPTABLE_SLIPPAGE = 5.0;  // 5 points
  174 | const double CBrokerInterface::MIN_SUCCESS_RATE = 95.0;        // 95%
  175 | const int CBrokerInterface::MAX_LATENCY_MS = 1000;             // 1 second
  176 | const double CBrokerInterface::MAX_SPREAD_MULTIPLIER = 3.0;    // 3x normal spread
  177 | 
  178 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  179 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  180 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  181 | CBrokerInterface::CBrokerInterface(EAContext* context) {
  182 |     m_pContext = context;
  183 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  184 |     m_LastHealthCheck = 0;
  185 |     m_LastSpreadCheck = 0;
  186 |     m_HealthCheckInterval = 60; // 1 minute
  187 |     
  188 |     // Initialize statistics
  189 |     ZeroMemory(m_ConnectionStats);
  190 |     ZeroMemory(m_ExecutionStats);
  191 |     ZeroMemory(m_SpreadStats);
  192 |     ZeroMemory(m_BrokerInfo);
  193 | }
  194 | 
  195 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  196 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  197 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  198 | CBrokerInterface::~CBrokerInterface() {
  199 |     Deinitialize();
  200 | }
  201 | 
  202 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  203 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  204 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  205 | bool CBrokerInterface::Initialize() {
  206 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  207 |         return true;
  208 |     }
  209 |     
  210 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  211 |         Print("[BROKER_INTERFACE] Context is NULL");
  212 |         return false;
  213 |     }
  214 |     
  215 |     // Load broker information
  216 |     LoadBrokerInfo();
  217 |     
  218 |     // Validate broker settings
  219 |     if (!ValidateBrokerSettings()) {
  220 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  221 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("Broker settings validation failed", __FUNCTION__);
  222 |         }
  223 |         return false;
  224 |     }
  225 |     
  226 |     // Initialize spread statistics
  227 |     m_SpreadStats.SpreadThreshold = 3.0; // Default threshold
  228 |     UpdateSpreadStats();
  229 |     
  230 |     // Perform initial health check
  231 |     if (!PerformHealthCheck()) {
  232 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  233 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning("Initial broker health check failed", __FUNCTION__);
  234 |         }
  235 |     }
  236 |     
  237 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  238 |     
  239 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  240 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("BrokerInterface initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  241 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetConnectionSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  242 |     }
  243 |     
  244 |     return true;
  245 | }
  246 | 
  247 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  248 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  250 | void CBrokerInterface::Deinitialize() {
  251 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  252 |         return;
  253 |     }
  254 |     
  255 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  256 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetExecutionSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  257 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("BrokerInterface shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
  258 |     }
  259 |     
  260 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  261 | }
  262 | 
  263 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  264 | //| Update                                                           |
  265 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  266 | void CBrokerInterface::Update() {
  267 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  268 |         return;
  269 |     }
  270 |     
  271 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  272 |     
  273 |     // Perform health check
  274 |     if (current_time - m_LastHealthCheck >= m_HealthCheckInterval) {
  275 |         PerformHealthCheck();
  276 |         m_LastHealthCheck = current_time;
  277 |     }
  278 |     
  279 |     // Update spread statistics
  280 |     if (current_time - m_LastSpreadCheck >= 10) { // Every 10 seconds
  281 |         UpdateSpreadStats();
  282 |         m_LastSpreadCheck = current_time;
  283 |     }
  284 |     
  285 |     // Update connection statistics
  286 |     UpdateConnectionStats();
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | //| Is Connected                                                     |
  291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  292 | bool CBrokerInterface::IsConnected() {
  293 |     return TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  294 | }
  295 | 
  296 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  297 | //| Check Connection                                                 |
  298 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  299 | bool CBrokerInterface::CheckConnection() {
  300 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  301 |         return false;
  302 |     }
  303 |     
  304 |     bool connected = IsConnected();
  305 |     
  306 |     if (connected) {
  307 |         m_ConnectionStats.SuccessfulConnections++;
  308 |     } else {
  309 |         m_ConnectionStats.FailedConnections++;
  310 |         m_ConnectionStats.LastDisconnection = TimeCurrent();
  311 |         m_ConnectionStats.DisconnectionCount++;
  312 |         
  313 |         LogBrokerEvent("Connection lost", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  314 |     }
  315 |     
  316 |     m_ConnectionStats.LastConnectionCheck = TimeCurrent();
  317 |     return connected;
  318 | }
  319 | 
  320 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  321 | //| Test Connection                                                  |
  322 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 | bool CBrokerInterface::TestConnection() {
  324 |     if (!IsConnected()) {
  325 |         return false;
  326 |     }
  327 |     
  328 |     // Test by requesting account information
  329 |     double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  330 |     if (balance <= 0) {
  331 |         return false;
  332 |     }
  333 |     
  334 |     // Test by requesting symbol information
  335 |     double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  336 |     double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  337 |     
  338 |     return (bid > 0 && ask > 0 && ask > bid);
  339 | }
  340 | 
  341 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  342 | //| Get Latency                                                      |
  343 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  344 | double CBrokerInterface::GetLatency() {
  345 |     return CalculateLatency();
  346 | }
  347 | 
  348 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  349 | //| Get Connection Health                                             |
  350 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  351 | ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH CBrokerInterface::GetConnectionHealth() {
  352 |     if (!IsConnected()) {
  353 |         return BROKER_HEALTH_POOR;
  354 |     }
  355 |     
  356 |     double latency = GetLatency();
  357 |     bool stable = IsConnectionStable();
  358 |     
  359 |     if (latency > MAX_LATENCY_MS || !stable) {
  360 |         return BROKER_HEALTH_POOR;
  361 |     } else if (latency > MAX_LATENCY_MS / 2) {
  362 |         return BROKER_HEALTH_FAIR;
  363 |     } else {
  364 |         return BROKER_HEALTH_GOOD;
  365 |     }
  366 | }
  367 | 
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | //| Get Broker Name                                                  |
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | string CBrokerInterface::GetBrokerName() {
  372 |     return m_BrokerInfo.BrokerName;
  373 | }
  374 | 
  375 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  376 | //| Get Server Name                                                  |
  377 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  378 | string CBrokerInterface::GetServerName() {
  379 |     return m_BrokerInfo.ServerName;
  380 | }
  381 | 
  382 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  383 | //| Record Order Execution                                           |
  384 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 | bool CBrokerInterface::RecordOrderExecution(const bool success, const double slippage, const int execution_time) {
  386 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  387 |         return false;
  388 |     }
  389 |     
  390 |     m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders++;
  391 |     
  392 |     if (success) {
  393 |         m_ExecutionStats.SuccessfulOrders++;
  394 |     } else {
  395 |         m_ExecutionStats.RejectedOrders++;
  396 |     }
  397 |     
  398 |     // Update slippage statistics
  399 |     if (slippage >= 0) {
  400 |         m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage = 
  401 |             (m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage * (m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders - 1) + slippage) / m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders;
  402 |         
  403 |         if (slippage > m_ExecutionStats.MaxSlippage) {
  404 |             m_ExecutionStats.MaxSlippage = slippage;
  405 |         }
  406 |     }
  407 |     
  408 |     // Update execution time
  409 |     if (execution_time > 0) {
  410 |         m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime = 
  411 |             (m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime * (m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders - 1) + execution_time) / m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders;
  412 |     }
  413 |     
  414 |     // Calculate success rate
  415 |     m_ExecutionStats.SuccessRate = 
  416 |         (m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders > 0) ? 
  417 |         (double)m_ExecutionStats.SuccessfulOrders / m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders * 100.0 : 0.0;
  418 |     
  419 |     m_ExecutionStats.LastOrderTime = TimeCurrent();
  420 |     
  421 |     return true;
  422 | }
  423 | 
  424 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  425 | //| Get Current Spread                                               |
  426 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  427 | double CBrokerInterface::GetCurrentSpread(const string& symbol = "") {
  428 |     string sym = (symbol == "") ? _Symbol : symbol;
  429 |     
  430 |     double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(sym, SYMBOL_BID);
  431 |     double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(sym, SYMBOL_ASK);
  432 |     
  433 |     if (bid <= 0 || ask <= 0) {
  434 |         return -1; // Invalid data
  435 |     }
  436 |     
  437 |     int digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(sym, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
  438 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(sym, SYMBOL_POINT);
  439 |     
  440 |     return (ask - bid) / point;
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  444 | //| Is Spread Acceptable                                             |
  445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  446 | bool CBrokerInterface::IsSpreadAcceptable(const string& symbol = "") {
  447 |     double current_spread = GetCurrentSpread(symbol);
  448 |     
  449 |     if (current_spread < 0) {
  450 |         return false; // Invalid spread data
  451 |     }
  452 |     
  453 |     return current_spread <= m_SpreadStats.SpreadThreshold;
  454 | }
  455 | 
  456 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 | //| Is Trading Allowed                                               |
  458 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  459 | bool CBrokerInterface::IsTradingAllowed() {
  460 |     if (!IsConnected()) {
  461 |         return false;
  462 |     }
  463 |     
  464 |     // Check if trading is allowed for the account
  465 |     if (!AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_ALLOWED)) {
  466 |         return false;
  467 |     }
  468 |     
  469 |     // Check if trading is allowed for the symbol
  470 |     if (!SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE)) {
  471 |         return false;
  472 |     }
  473 |     
  474 |     // Check market status
  475 |     if (!SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_CALC_MODE)) {
  476 |         return false;
  477 |     }
  478 |     
  479 |     return true;
  480 | }
  481 | 
  482 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  483 | //| Can Open Position                                                |
  484 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  485 | bool CBrokerInterface::CanOpenPosition(const string& symbol, const double lot_size) {
  486 |     if (!IsTradingAllowed()) {
  487 |         return false;
  488 |     }
  489 |     
  490 |     // Check lot size
  491 |     double min_lot = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  492 |     double max_lot = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  493 |     
  494 |     if (lot_size < min_lot || lot_size > max_lot) {
  495 |         return false;
  496 |     }
  497 |     
  498 |     // Check free margin
  499 |     double required_margin = 0;
  500 |     if (!OrderCalcMargin(ORDER_TYPE_BUY, symbol, lot_size, SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_ASK), required_margin)) {
  501 |         return false;
  502 |     }
  503 |     
  504 |     double free_margin = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE);
  505 |     return free_margin >= required_margin;
  506 | }
  507 | 
  508 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  509 | //| Normalize Lot Size                                               |
  510 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  511 | double CBrokerInterface::NormalizeLotSize(const double lot_size) {
  512 |     double min_lot = m_BrokerInfo.MinLot;
  513 |     double max_lot = m_BrokerInfo.MaxLot;
  514 |     double lot_step = m_BrokerInfo.LotStep;
  515 |     
  516 |     double normalized = lot_size;
  517 |     
  518 |     // Ensure within bounds
  519 |     if (normalized < min_lot) {
  520 |         normalized = min_lot;
  521 |     } else if (normalized > max_lot) {
  522 |         normalized = max_lot;
  523 |     }
  524 |     
  525 |     // Round to lot step
  526 |     if (lot_step > 0) {
  527 |         normalized = MathRound(normalized / lot_step) * lot_step;
  528 |     }
  529 |     
  530 |     return normalized;
  531 | }
  532 | 
  533 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  534 | //| Get Overall Health                                               |
  535 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  536 | ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH CBrokerInterface::GetOverallHealth() {
  537 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH connection_health = GetConnectionHealth();
  538 |     bool execution_good = IsExecutionQualityGood();
  539 |     bool spread_ok = IsSpreadAcceptable();
  540 |     
  541 |     if (connection_health == BROKER_HEALTH_POOR || !execution_good || !spread_ok) {
  542 |         return BROKER_HEALTH_POOR;
  543 |     } else if (connection_health == BROKER_HEALTH_FAIR) {
  544 |         return BROKER_HEALTH_FAIR;
  545 |     } else {
  546 |         return BROKER_HEALTH_GOOD;
  547 |     }
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | //| Perform Health Check                                             |
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | bool CBrokerInterface::PerformHealthCheck() {
  554 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  555 |         return false;
  556 |     }
  557 |     
  558 |     bool overall_health = true;
  559 |     
  560 |     // Check connection
  561 |     if (!CheckConnection()) {
  562 |         LogBrokerEvent("Health check: Connection failed", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  563 |         overall_health = false;
  564 |     }
  565 |     
  566 |     // Test connection quality
  567 |     if (!TestConnection()) {
  568 |         LogBrokerEvent("Health check: Connection test failed", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  569 |         overall_health = false;
  570 |     }
  571 |     
  572 |     // Check execution quality
  573 |     if (!IsExecutionQualityGood()) {
  574 |         LogBrokerEvent("Health check: Poor execution quality", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  575 |         overall_health = false;
  576 |     }
  577 |     
  578 |     // Check spread
  579 |     if (!IsSpreadAcceptable()) {
  580 |         LogBrokerEvent(StringFormat("Health check: High spread %.1f", GetCurrentSpread()), LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  581 |         overall_health = false;
  582 |     }
  583 |     
  584 |     // Update context
  585 |     if (m_pContext != NULL) {
  586 |         m_pContext.MarketState.BrokerHealth = GetOverallHealth();
  587 |     }
  588 |     
  589 |     return overall_health;
  590 | }
  591 | 
  592 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  593 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
  594 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  595 | void CBrokerInterface::LoadBrokerInfo() {
  596 |     m_BrokerInfo.BrokerName = AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_COMPANY);
  597 |     m_BrokerInfo.ServerName = AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_SERVER);
  598 |     m_BrokerInfo.Leverage = (int)AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_LEVERAGE);
  599 |     m_BrokerInfo.TradeMode = (ENUM_ACCOUNT_TRADE_MODE)AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_MODE);
  600 |     
  601 |     // Symbol-specific information
  602 |     m_BrokerInfo.StopLevel = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL);
  603 |     m_BrokerInfo.FreezeLevel = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_FREEZE_LEVEL);
  604 |     m_BrokerInfo.MinLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  605 |     m_BrokerInfo.MaxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  606 |     m_BrokerInfo.LotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  607 |     
  608 |     // Determine broker type
  609 |     m_BrokerInfo.IsECN = (m_BrokerInfo.TradeMode == ACCOUNT_TRADE_MODE_DEMO || 
  610 |                           m_BrokerInfo.TradeMode == ACCOUNT_TRADE_MODE_REAL);
  611 |     m_BrokerInfo.AllowsHedging = AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_SO_MODE) != ACCOUNT_STOPOUT_MODE_PERCENT;
  612 |     m_BrokerInfo.AllowsScalping = true; // Assume true unless proven otherwise
  613 | }
  614 | 
  615 | void CBrokerInterface::UpdateConnectionStats() {
  616 |     m_ConnectionStats.IsStable = IsConnectionStable();
  617 |     m_ConnectionStats.AverageLatency = CalculateLatency();
  618 | }
  619 | 
  620 | bool CBrokerInterface::IsConnectionStable() {
  621 |     // Consider connection stable if no disconnections in last 5 minutes
  622 |     return (TimeCurrent() - m_ConnectionStats.LastDisconnection) > 300;
  623 | }
  624 | 
  625 | double CBrokerInterface::CalculateLatency() {
  626 |     // Simple latency estimation based on tick reception
  627 |     static datetime last_tick_time = 0;
  628 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  629 |     
  630 |     if (last_tick_time > 0) {
  631 |         double latency = (current_time - last_tick_time) * 1000.0; // Convert to milliseconds
  632 |         last_tick_time = current_time;
  633 |         return MathMin(latency, 5000.0); // Cap at 5 seconds
  634 |     }
  635 |     
  636 |     last_tick_time = current_time;
  637 |     return 100.0; // Default latency
  638 | }
  639 | 
  640 | void CBrokerInterface::UpdateSpreadStats() {
  641 |     double current_spread = GetCurrentSpread();
  642 |     
  643 |     if (current_spread > 0) {
  644 |         m_SpreadStats.CurrentSpread = current_spread;
  645 |         
  646 |         // Update average
  647 |         static int spread_count = 0;
  648 |         spread_count++;
  649 |         m_SpreadStats.AverageSpread = 
  650 |             (m_SpreadStats.AverageSpread * (spread_count - 1) + current_spread) / spread_count;
  651 |         
  652 |         // Update min/max
  653 |         if (m_SpreadStats.MinSpread == 0 || current_spread < m_SpreadStats.MinSpread) {
  654 |             m_SpreadStats.MinSpread = current_spread;
  655 |         }
  656 |         
  657 |         if (current_spread > m_SpreadStats.MaxSpread) {
  658 |             m_SpreadStats.MaxSpread = current_spread;
  659 |         }
  660 |         
  661 |         m_SpreadStats.LastSpreadUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  662 |         m_SpreadStats.IsSpreadNormal = (current_spread <= m_SpreadStats.SpreadThreshold);
  663 |     }
  664 | }
  665 | 
  666 | bool CBrokerInterface::IsExecutionQualityGood() {
  667 |     if (m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders < 10) {
  668 |         return true; // Not enough data
  669 |     }
  670 |     
  671 |     return (m_ExecutionStats.SuccessRate >= MIN_SUCCESS_RATE) &&
  672 |            (m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage <= MAX_ACCEPTABLE_SLIPPAGE);
  673 | }
  674 | 
  675 | string CBrokerInterface::GetConnectionSummary() {
  676 |     return StringFormat("Broker: %s | Server: %s | Connected: %s | Health: %s | Latency: %.0fms",
  677 |                         m_BrokerInfo.BrokerName,
  678 |                         m_BrokerInfo.ServerName,
  679 |                         IsConnected() ? "Yes" : "No",
  680 |                         EnumToString(GetOverallHealth()),
  681 |                         GetLatency());
  682 | }
  683 | 
  684 | string CBrokerInterface::GetExecutionSummary() {
  685 |     return StringFormat("Execution Stats - Orders: %d | Success: %.1f%% | Avg Slippage: %.1f | Max Slippage: %.1f",
  686 |                         m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders,
  687 |                         m_ExecutionStats.SuccessRate,
  688 |                         m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage,
  689 |                         m_ExecutionStats.MaxSlippage);
  690 | }
  691 | 
  692 | void CBrokerInterface::LogBrokerEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  693 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  694 |         switch(level) {
  695 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  696 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  697 |                 break;
  698 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  699 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  700 |                 break;
  701 |             default:
  702 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  703 |         }
  704 |     }
  705 | }
  706 | 
  707 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5
  708 | 
  709 | #endif // BROKER_INTERFACE_MQH_

  114 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  115 | //| LoadFromInputs                                                   |
  116 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  117 | void CConfigManager::LoadFromInputs() {
  118 |     // In MQL5, input variables are global. This function's purpose is to centralize
  119 |     // the *reading* of those global inputs into this class's members.
  120 |     // This decouples the rest of the system from global variables.
  121 | 
  122 |     // Example of reading from global input variables (these must be defined in the main .mq5 file)
  123 |     // extern string InpMagicNumber;
  124 |     // extern double InpLotSize;
  125 |     
  126 |     // s_MagicNumber = InpMagicNumber;
  127 |     // d_LotSize = InpLotSize;
  128 | 
  129 |     // For now, we use default values as the inputs aren't defined yet.
  130 |     if (m_logger) m_logger->LogDebug("Loading parameters from EA inputs (currently using defaults).", __FUNCTION__);
  131 | }
  132 | 
  133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 | //| LogConfiguration                                                 |
  135 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  136 | void CConfigManager::LogConfiguration() {
  137 |     if (!m_logger) return;
  138 | 
  139 |     m_logger->LogInfo("--- EA Configuration ---", __FUNCTION__);
  140 |     m_logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Magic Number: %s", s_MagicNumber), __FUNCTION__);
  141 |     m_logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Lot Size: %.2f", d_LotSize), __FUNCTION__);
  142 |     m_logger->LogInfo("------------------------", __FUNCTION__);
  143 | }
  144 | 
  145 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  146 | //| GetLogger                                                        |
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | void CConfigManager::GetLogger() {
  149 |     if (m_context != NULL && m_context->pLogger != NULL) {
  150 |         m_logger = m_context->pLogger;
  151 |     }
  152 | }

  132 | CConfigManager::CConfigManager() {
  133 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  134 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  135 |     m_iBackupIndex = 0;
  136 |     m_LastValidationTime = 0;
  137 |     
  138 |     // Initialize backup array
  139 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_ConfigBackups); i++) {
  140 |         m_ConfigBackups[i].IsValid = false;
  141 |         m_ConfigBackups[i].BackupTime = 0;
  142 |         m_ConfigBackups[i].BackupReason = "";
  143 |     }

  155 | }
  156 | 
  157 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  158 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  159 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  160 | bool CConfigManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  161 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  162 |         return true;
  163 |     }
  164 |     
  165 |     m_pContext = context;
  166 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  167 |         Print("[CONFIG] Context is NULL");
  168 |         return false;
  169 |     }
  170 |     
  171 |     // Create configuration directories
  172 |     if (!CreateConfigDirectories()) {
  173 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  174 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create configuration directories", __FUNCTION__);
  175 |         }
  176 |         return false;
  177 |     }
  178 |     
  179 |     // Generate configuration file path
  180 |     m_sConfigFile = GenerateConfigFileName();
  181 |     
  182 |     // Set default parameters first
  183 |     SetDefaultParameters();
  184 |     
  185 |     // Try to load existing configuration
  186 |     if (!LoadConfiguration()) {
  187 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  188 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning("Could not load existing configuration, using defaults", __FUNCTION__);
  189 |         }
  190 |     }
  191 |     
  192 |     // Validate configuration
  193 |     SConfigValidationResult validation = ValidateConfiguration();
  194 |     if (!validation.IsValid) {
  195 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  196 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Configuration validation failed: %s", validation.ErrorMessage), __FUNCTION__);
  197 |         }
  198 |         
  199 |         // Try to reset to defaults
  200 |         ResetToDefaults();
  201 |         validation = ValidateConfiguration();
  202 |         
  203 |         if (!validation.IsValid) {
  204 |             return false;
  205 |         }
  206 |     }
  207 |     
  208 |     // Create initial backup
  209 |     CreateBackup("Initial configuration");
  210 |     
  211 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  212 |     
  213 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  214 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Configuration system initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  215 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetConfigurationSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  216 |     }
  217 |     
  218 |     return true;
  219 | }
  220 | 
  221 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  222 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  223 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  224 | void CConfigManager::Deinitialize() {
  225 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  226 |         return;
  227 |     }
  228 |     
  229 |     // Save current configuration
  230 |     SaveConfiguration();
  231 |     
  232 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  233 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Configuration system shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
  234 |     }
  235 |     
  236 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  237 | }
  238 | 
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | //| Load Configuration                                               |
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | bool CConfigManager::LoadConfiguration() {
  243 |     if (m_sConfigFile == "") {
  244 |         return false;
  245 |     }
  246 |     
  247 |     return LoadFromFile(m_sConfigFile);
  248 | }
  249 | 
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | //| Save Configuration                                               |
  252 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  253 | bool CConfigManager::SaveConfiguration() {
  254 |     if (m_sConfigFile == "") {
  255 |         return false;
  256 |     }
  257 |     
  258 |     return SaveToFile(m_sConfigFile);
  259 | }
  260 | 
  261 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  262 | //| Load From File                                                   |
  263 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  264 | bool CConfigManager::LoadFromFile(const string& file_path) {
  265 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) {
  266 |         return false;
  267 |     }
  268 |     
  269 |     EAInput temp_params;
  270 |     if (!ReadConfigFromFile(file_path, temp_params)) {
  271 |         return false;
  272 |     }
  273 |     
  274 |     // Backup current configuration before loading new one
  275 |     CreateBackup("Before loading from file");
  276 |     
  277 |     // Apply loaded parameters
  278 |     m_pContext->Inputs = temp_params;
  279 |     
  280 |     // Validate loaded configuration
  281 |     SConfigValidationResult validation = ValidateConfiguration();
  282 |     if (!validation.IsValid) {
  283 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  284 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Loaded configuration is invalid: %s", validation.ErrorMessage), __FUNCTION__);
  285 |         }
  286 |         
  287 |         // Restore from backup
  288 |         RestoreFromBackup(0);
  289 |         return false;
  290 |     }
  291 |     
  292 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  293 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Configuration loaded from: %s", file_path), __FUNCTION__);
  294 |     }
  295 |     
  296 |     return true;
  297 | }
  298 | 
  299 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  300 | //| Save To File                                                     |
  301 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  302 | bool CConfigManager::SaveToFile(const string& file_path) {
  303 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) {
  304 |         return false;
  305 |     }
  306 |     
  307 |     if (!WriteConfigToFile(file_path, m_pContext->Inputs)) {
  308 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  309 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to save configuration to: %s", file_path), __FUNCTION__);
  310 |         }
  311 |         return false;
  312 |     }
  313 |     
  314 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  315 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Configuration saved to: %s", file_path), __FUNCTION__);
  316 |     }
  317 |     
  318 |     return true;
  319 | }
  320 | 
  321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 | //| Validate Configuration                                           |
  323 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  324 | SConfigValidationResult CConfigManager::ValidateConfiguration() {
  325 |     SConfigValidationResult result;
  326 |     result.IsValid = true;
  327 |     result.ErrorMessage = "";
  328 |     result.WarningMessage = "";
  329 |     result.ErrorCount = 0;
  330 |     result.WarningCount = 0;
  331 |     
  332 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) {
  333 |         result.IsValid = false;
  334 |         result.ErrorMessage = "Configuration not initialized";
  335 |         result.ErrorCount = 1;
  336 |         return result;
  337 |     }
  338 |     
  339 |     // Validate different sections
  340 |     SConfigValidationResult general = ValidateGeneralSettings();
  341 |     SConfigValidationResult strategy = ValidateStrategySettings();
  342 |     SConfigValidationResult risk = ValidateRiskSettings();
  343 |     SConfigValidationResult advanced = ValidateAdvancedSettings();
  344 |     
  345 |     // Combine results
  346 |     result.ErrorCount = general.ErrorCount + strategy.ErrorCount + risk.ErrorCount + advanced.ErrorCount;
  347 |     result.WarningCount = general.WarningCount + strategy.WarningCount + risk.WarningCount + advanced.WarningCount;
  348 |     
  349 |     if (result.ErrorCount > 0) {
  350 |         result.IsValid = false;
  351 |         result.ErrorMessage = StringFormat("Configuration has %d errors", result.ErrorCount);
  352 |     }
  353 |     
  354 |     if (result.WarningCount > 0) {
  355 |         result.WarningMessage = StringFormat("Configuration has %d warnings", result.WarningCount);
  356 |     }
  357 |     
  358 |     m_LastValidationTime = TimeCurrent();
  359 |     
  360 |     return result;
  361 | }
  362 | 
  363 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  364 | //| Validate General Settings                                        |
  365 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  366 | SConfigValidationResult CConfigManager::ValidateGeneralSettings() {
  367 |     SConfigValidationResult result;
  368 |     result.IsValid = true;
  369 |     result.ErrorCount = 0;
  370 |     result.WarningCount = 0;
  371 |     
  372 |     // Validate lot size
  373 |     if (!ValidateNumericRange(m_pContext->Inputs.LotSize, MIN_LOT_SIZE, MAX_LOT_SIZE, "LotSize")) {
  374 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  375 |         result.IsValid = false;
  376 |     }
  377 |     
  378 |     // Validate stop loss
  379 |     if (!ValidateIntegerRange(m_pContext->Inputs.StopLoss, MIN_STOP_LOSS, MAX_STOP_LOSS, "StopLoss")) {
  380 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  381 |         result.IsValid = false;
  382 |     }
  383 |     
  384 |     // Validate take profit
  385 |     if (!ValidateIntegerRange(m_pContext->Inputs.TakeProfit, MIN_TAKE_PROFIT, MAX_TAKE_PROFIT, "TakeProfit")) {
  386 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  387 |         result.IsValid = false;
  388 |     }
  389 |     
  390 |     // Validate magic number
  391 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.MagicNumber <= 0) {
  392 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  393 |         result.IsValid = false;
  394 |     }
  395 |     
  396 |     return result;
  397 | }
  398 | 
  399 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  400 | //| Validate Strategy Settings                                       |
  401 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  402 | SConfigValidationResult CConfigManager::ValidateStrategySettings() {
  403 |     SConfigValidationResult result;
  404 |     result.IsValid = true;
  405 |     result.ErrorCount = 0;
  406 |     result.WarningCount = 0;
  407 |     
  408 |     // Validate pullback percentage
  409 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.PullbackPercentage <= 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.PullbackPercentage > 100) {
  410 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  411 |         result.IsValid = false;
  412 |     }
  413 |     
  414 |     // Validate trend strength threshold
  415 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.TrendStrengthThreshold <= 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.TrendStrengthThreshold > 100) {
  416 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  417 |         result.IsValid = false;
  418 |     }
  419 |     
  420 |     // Validate timeframe consistency
  421 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.AnalysisTimeframe == PERIOD_CURRENT) {
  422 |         result.WarningCount++;
  423 |     }
  424 |     
  425 |     return result;
  426 | }
  427 | 
  428 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  429 | //| Validate Risk Settings                                           |
  430 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  431 | SConfigValidationResult CConfigManager::ValidateRiskSettings() {
  432 |     SConfigValidationResult result;
  433 |     result.IsValid = true;
  434 |     result.ErrorCount = 0;
  435 |     result.WarningCount = 0;
  436 |     
  437 |     // Validate risk percentage
  438 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.RiskPercentage <= 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.RiskPercentage > 10) {
  439 |         if (m_pContext->Inputs.RiskPercentage > 5) {
  440 |             result.WarningCount++; // High risk warning
  441 |         }
  442 |         if (m_pContext->Inputs.RiskPercentage <= 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.RiskPercentage > 10) {
  443 |             result.ErrorCount++;
  444 |             result.IsValid = false;
  445 |         }
  446 |     }
  447 |     
  448 |     // Validate max daily loss
  449 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.MaxDailyLoss <= 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.MaxDailyLoss > 50) {
  450 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  451 |         result.IsValid = false;
  452 |     }
  453 |     
  454 |     // Validate max positions
  455 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.MaxPositions <= 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.MaxPositions > 20) {
  456 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  457 |         result.IsValid = false;
  458 |     }
  459 |     
  460 |     return result;
  461 | }
  462 | 
  463 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  464 | //| Validate Advanced Settings                                       |
  465 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  466 | SConfigValidationResult CConfigManager::ValidateAdvancedSettings() {
  467 |     SConfigValidationResult result;
  468 |     result.IsValid = true;
  469 |     result.ErrorCount = 0;
  470 |     result.WarningCount = 0;
  471 |     
  472 |     // Validate slippage
  473 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.MaxSlippage < 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.MaxSlippage > 100) {
  474 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  475 |         result.IsValid = false;
  476 |     }
  477 |     
  478 |     // Validate news filter minutes
  479 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.NewsFilterMinutes < 0 || m_pContext->Inputs.NewsFilterMinutes > 1440) {
  480 |         result.ErrorCount++;
  481 |         result.IsValid = false;
  482 |     }
  483 |     
  484 |     return result;
  485 | }
  486 | 
  487 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 | //| Create Backup                                                    |
  489 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 | bool CConfigManager::CreateBackup(const string& reason = "Manual backup") {
  491 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) {
  492 |         return false;
  493 |     }
  494 |     
  495 |     // Store backup
  496 |     m_ConfigBackups[m_iBackupIndex].BackupTime = TimeCurrent();
  497 |     m_ConfigBackups[m_iBackupIndex].Parameters = m_pContext->Inputs;
  498 |     m_ConfigBackups[m_iBackupIndex].BackupReason = reason;
  499 |     m_ConfigBackups[m_iBackupIndex].IsValid = true;
  500 |     
  501 |     // Move to next backup slot
  502 |     m_iBackupIndex = (m_iBackupIndex + 1) % ArraySize(m_ConfigBackups);
  503 |     
  504 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  505 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Configuration backup created: %s", reason), __FUNCTION__);
  506 |     }
  507 |     
  508 |     return true;
  509 | }
  510 | 
  511 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  512 | //| Restore From Backup                                              |
  513 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  514 | bool CConfigManager::RestoreFromBackup(const int backup_index = 0) {
  515 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) {
  516 |         return false;
  517 |     }
  518 |     
  519 |     if (backup_index < 0 || backup_index >= ArraySize(m_ConfigBackups)) {
  520 |         return false;
  521 |     }
  522 |     
  523 |     if (!m_ConfigBackups[backup_index].IsValid) {
  524 |         return false;
  525 |     }
  526 |     
  527 |     // Restore parameters
  528 |     m_pContext->Inputs = m_ConfigBackups[backup_index].Parameters;
  529 |     
  530 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  531 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Configuration restored from backup: %s", 
  532 |                                                m_ConfigBackups[backup_index].BackupReason), __FUNCTION__);
  533 |     }
  534 |     
  535 |     return true;
  536 | }
  537 | 
  538 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 | //| Reset To Defaults                                                |
  540 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  541 | bool CConfigManager::ResetToDefaults() {
  542 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) {
  543 |         return false;
  544 |     }
  545 |     
  546 |     // Create backup before reset
  547 |     CreateBackup("Before reset to defaults");
  548 |     
  549 |     // Set default parameters
  550 |     SetDefaultParameters();
  551 |     
  552 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  553 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Configuration reset to defaults", __FUNCTION__);
  554 |     }
  555 |     
  556 |     return true;
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | bool CConfigManager::ValidateNumericRange(const double value, const double min_val, const double max_val, const string& param_name) {
  563 |     if (value < min_val || value > max_val) {
  564 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  565 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("%s value %.2f is out of range [%.2f, %.2f]", 
  566 |                                                     param_name, value, min_val, max_val), __FUNCTION__);
  567 |         }
  568 |         return false;
  569 |     }
  570 |     return true;
  571 | }
  572 | 
  573 | bool CConfigManager::ValidateIntegerRange(const int value, const int min_val, const int max_val, const string& param_name) {
  574 |     if (value < min_val || value > max_val) {
  575 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  576 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("%s value %d is out of range [%d, %d]", 
  577 |                                                     param_name, value, min_val, max_val), __FUNCTION__);
  578 |         }
  579 |         return false;
  580 |     }
  581 |     return true;
  582 | }
  583 | 
  584 | bool CConfigManager::CreateConfigDirectories() {
  585 |     string terminal_path = TerminalInfoString(TERMINAL_DATA_PATH);
  586 |     m_sBackupPath = terminal_path + "\\MQL5\\Files\\APEX_Config\\";
  587 |     
  588 |     // Create directory if it doesn't exist
  589 |     if (!FolderCreate("APEX_Config", FILE_COMMON)) {
  590 |         // Directory might already exist, which is fine
  591 |     }
  592 |     
  593 |     return true;
  594 | }
  595 | 
  596 | string CConfigManager::GenerateConfigFileName() {
  597 |     return "APEX_Config\\apex_pullback_v5.cfg";
  598 | }
  599 | 
  600 | void CConfigManager::SetDefaultParameters() {
  601 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) return;
  602 |     
  603 |     // Set safe default values
  604 |     m_pContext->Inputs.LotSize = 0.1;
  605 |     m_pContext->Inputs.StopLoss = 50;
  606 |     m_pContext->Inputs.TakeProfit = 100;
  607 |     m_pContext->Inputs.MagicNumber = 12345;
  608 |     m_pContext->Inputs.RiskPercentage = 2.0;
  609 |     m_pContext->Inputs.MaxDailyLoss = 5.0;
  610 |     m_pContext->Inputs.MaxPositions = 3;
  611 |     m_pContext->Inputs.PullbackPercentage = 38.2;
  612 |     m_pContext->Inputs.TrendStrengthThreshold = 70.0;
  613 |     m_pContext->Inputs.MaxSlippage = 3;
  614 |     m_pContext->Inputs.NewsFilterMinutes = 30;
  615 |     m_pContext->Inputs.AnalysisTimeframe = PERIOD_H1;
  616 |     m_pContext->Inputs.TradingEnabled = true;
  617 |     m_pContext->Inputs.UseNewsFilter = true;
  618 |     m_pContext->Inputs.UseTrailingStop = true;
  619 | }
  620 | 
  621 | string CConfigManager::GetConfigurationSummary() {
  622 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) return "Configuration not available";
  623 |     
  624 |     return StringFormat("Config Summary - Lot: %.2f | SL: %d | TP: %d | Risk: %.1f%% | MaxPos: %d | Pullback: %.1f%%",
  625 |                         m_pContext->Inputs.LotSize,
  626 |                         m_pContext->Inputs.StopLoss,
  627 |                         m_pContext->Inputs.TakeProfit,
  628 |                         m_pContext->Inputs.RiskPercentage,
  629 |                         m_pContext->Inputs.MaxPositions,
  630 |                         m_pContext->Inputs.PullbackPercentage);

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                               ErrorHandler.mqh |
    3 | //|                   ErrorHandler.mqh - APEX Pullback EA v14.0 |
    4 | //|   Description: Centralized error handling and reporting system.  |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | 
    7 | #ifndef ERRORHANDLER_MQH_
    8 | #define ERRORHANDLER_MQH_
    9 | 
   10 | #include "../../00_Core/Common/CommonStructs.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| CErrorHandler - Centralized Error Handling System              |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | class CErrorHandler {
   16 | private:
   17 |     EAContext*    m_pContext;           // Reference to EA context
   18 |     bool          m_bInitialized;       // Initialization status
   19 |     int           m_iLastError;         // Last MQL5 error code
   20 |     int           m_iErrorCount;        // Total errors recorded
   21 |     datetime      m_dtLastErrorTime;    // Timestamp of the last error
   22 | 
   23 | public:
   24 |     //--- Constructor/Destructor ---
   25 |     CErrorHandler();
   26 |     ~CErrorHandler();
   27 | 
   28 |     //--- Core Methods ---
   29 |     bool          Initialize(EAContext* context);
   30 |     void          Deinitialize();
   31 |     bool          IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
   32 | 
   33 |     //--- Error Handling ---
   34 |     void          HandleError(const string& function, const string& message, const int error_code = 0);
   35 |     void          HandleCriticalError(const string& function, const string& message);
   36 |     void          CheckMqlError(const string& function, const string& operation_desc);
   37 | 
   38 |     //--- Getters ---
   39 |     int           GetLastError() const { return m_iLastError; }
   40 |     int           GetErrorCount() const { return m_iErrorCount; }
   41 |     string        GetErrorStats() const;
   42 | 
   43 | private:
   44 |     //--- Internal Methods ---
   45 |     void          RecordError(const int error_code, const string& message);
   46 | };
   47 | 
   48 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   49 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   50 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   51 | CErrorHandler::CErrorHandler() {
   52 |     m_pContext = NULL;
   53 |     m_bInitialized = false;
   54 |     m_iLastError = 0;
   55 |     m_iErrorCount = 0;
   56 |     m_dtLastErrorTime = 0;
   57 | }
   58 | 
   59 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   60 | //| Destructor                                                       |
   61 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   62 | CErrorHandler::~CErrorHandler() {
   63 |     Deinitialize();
   64 | }
   65 | 
   66 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   67 | //| Initialize                                                       |
   68 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   69 | bool CErrorHandler::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
   70 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
   71 |         return true;
   72 |     }
   73 |     m_pContext = context;
   74 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
   75 |         Print("[ERROR HANDLER] Context is NULL on initialization.");
   76 |         return false;
   77 |     }
   78 |     m_bInitialized = true;
   79 |     // Log initialization via the Logger if available
   80 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
   81 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Error Handler initialized.", __FUNCTION__);
   82 |     }
   83 |     return true;
   84 | }
   85 | 
   86 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   87 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
   88 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   89 | void CErrorHandler::Deinitialize() {
   90 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
   91 |         return;
   92 |     }
   93 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
   94 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Error Handler shutting down. Total errors: %d", m_iErrorCount), __FUNCTION__);
   95 |     }
   96 |     m_bInitialized = false;
   97 | }
   98 | 
   99 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  100 | //| Handle a generic error                                           |
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | void CErrorHandler::HandleError(const string& function, const string& message, const int error_code = 0) {
  103 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  104 | 
  105 |     int code_to_log = (error_code != 0) ? error_code : GetLastError();
  106 |     string full_message = StringFormat("%s | MQL5 Error: %d (%s)", message, code_to_log, ErrorDescription(code_to_log));
  107 | 
  108 |     RecordError(code_to_log, full_message);
  109 | 
  110 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  111 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(full_message, function);
  112 |     }
  113 | }
  114 | 
  115 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  116 | //| Handle a critical error that might stop the EA                   |
  117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 | void CErrorHandler::HandleCriticalError(const string& function, const string& message) {
  119 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  120 | 
  121 |     int code_to_log = GetLastError();
  122 |     string full_message = StringFormat("CRITICAL: %s | MQL5 Error: %d (%s)", message, code_to_log, ErrorDescription(code_to_log));
  123 | 
  124 |     RecordError(code_to_log, full_message);
  125 | 
  126 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  127 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(full_message, function); // Use LogError for critical issues
  128 |     }
  129 | 
  130 |     // Potentially trigger a safe shutdown of the EA
  131 |     // m_pContext->pSystemManager->InitiateSafeShutdown("Critical Error");
  132 | }
  133 | 
  134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  135 | //| Check the last MQL5 error code after an operation                |
  136 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  137 | void CErrorHandler::CheckMqlError(const string& function, const string& operation_desc) {
  138 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  139 | 
  140 |     int error_code = GetLastError();
  141 |     if (error_code != ERR_SUCCESS) {
  142 |         string message = StringFormat("Error after operation: %s", operation_desc);
  143 |         HandleError(function, message, error_code);
  144 |     }
  145 | }
  146 | 
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | //| Get error statistics                                             |
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | string CErrorHandler::GetErrorStats() const {
  151 |     return StringFormat("Total Errors: %d, Last Error Code: %d at %s",
  152 |                         m_iErrorCount,
  153 |                         m_iLastError,
  154 |                         TimeToString(m_dtLastErrorTime, TIME_DATE | TIME_SECONDS));
  155 | }
  156 | 
  157 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  158 | //| Record an error internally                                       |
  159 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  160 | void CErrorHandler::RecordError(const int error_code, const string& message) {
  161 |     m_iLastError = error_code;
  162 |     m_iErrorCount++;
  163 |     m_dtLastErrorTime = TimeCurrent();
  164 |     // Potentially store more detailed error info in a collection if needed
  165 | }
  166 | 
  167 | #endif // ERRORHANDLER_MQH_

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                          IntegrationManager.mqh |
    3 | //|                 IntegrationManager - APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL  |
    4 | //|      Description: High-level integration management layer       |
    5 | //|                   that coordinates module integration,          |
    6 | //|                   dependency resolution, and system health      |
    7 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

    9 | #ifndef INTEGRATION_MANAGER_MQH_
   10 | #define INTEGRATION_MANAGER_MQH_
   11 | 
   12 | #include "ModuleIntegrator.mqh"
   13 | #include "..\..\00_Core\CommonStructs.mqh"
