   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | //| Integration Events                                               |
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | enum ENUM_INTEGRATION_EVENT {
   19 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_STARTED,
   20 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_CONNECTED,
   21 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_DISCONNECTED,
   22 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_DEPENDENCY_RESOLVED,
   23 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_DEPENDENCY_FAILED,
   24 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_HEALTH_CHECK,
   25 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_ERROR_DETECTED,
   26 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_RECOVERY_STARTED,
   27 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_RECOVERY_COMPLETED,
   28 |     INTEGRATION_EVENT_COMPLETE
   29 | };
   30 | 
   31 | struct SIntegrationEvent {
   32 |     ENUM_INTEGRATION_EVENT eventType;      // Event type
   33 |     string                module;          // Module name
   34 |     string                message;         // Event message
   35 |     datetime              timestamp;       // Event timestamp
   36 |     ENUM_LOG_LEVEL        severity;        // Event severity
   37 |     
   38 |     void Clear() {
   39 |         eventType = INTEGRATION_EVENT_STARTED;
   40 |         module = "";
   41 |         message = "";
   42 |         timestamp = 0;
   43 |         severity = LOG_LEVEL_INFO;
   44 |     }
   45 | };
   46 | 
   47 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   48 | //| Integration Configuration                                        |
   49 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   50 | struct SIntegrationConfig {
   51 |     bool                  autoRecovery;         // Enable automatic recovery
   52 |     int                   healthCheckInterval;  // Health check interval (seconds)
   53 |     int                   maxRetries;           // Maximum retry attempts
   54 |     int                   retryDelay;           // Delay between retries (seconds)
   55 |     bool                  strictMode;           // Strict dependency checking
   56 |     bool                  enableLogging;        // Enable detailed logging
   57 |     bool                  enableDashboard;      // Enable integration dashboard
   58 |     
   59 |     void SetDefaults() {
   60 |         autoRecovery = true;
   61 |         healthCheckInterval = 30;
   62 |         maxRetries = 3;
   63 |         retryDelay = 5;
   64 |         strictMode = true;
   65 |         enableLogging = true;
   66 |         enableDashboard = true;
   67 |     }
   68 | };
   69 | 
   70 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   71 | //| CIntegrationManager - High-Level Integration Controller         |
   72 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   73 | class CIntegrationManager {
   74 | private:
   75 |     EAContext*            m_pContext;        // Reference to EA context
   76 |     CModuleIntegrator*    m_pIntegrator;     // Module integrator instance
   77 |     bool                  m_bInitialized;   // Initialization status
   78 |     
   79 |     // Configuration
   80 |     SIntegrationConfig    m_Config;          // Integration configuration
   81 |     
   82 |     // Event tracking
   83 |     SIntegrationEvent     m_EventHistory[];  // Event history
   84 |     int                   m_EventCount;      // Number of events
   85 |     
   86 |     // Status tracking
   87 |     bool                  m_SystemReady;     // System ready status
   88 |     bool                  m_TradingEnabled;  // Trading enabled status
   89 |     datetime              m_LastHealthCheck; // Last health check time
   90 |     datetime              m_IntegrationStartTime; // Integration start time
   91 |     
   92 |     // Constants
   93 |     static const int      MAX_EVENTS = 100;
   94 |     
   95 | public:
   96 |     //--- Constructor/Destructor ---
   97 |     CIntegrationManager();
   98 |     ~CIntegrationManager();
   99 |     
  100 |     //--- Initialization ---
  101 |     bool                  Initialize(EAContext* pContext, const SIntegrationConfig& config);
  102 |     void                  Deinitialize();
  103 |     bool                  IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  104 |     
  105 |     //--- Integration Control ---
  106 |     bool                  StartIntegration();
  107 |     bool                  StopIntegration();
  108 |     bool                  RestartIntegration();
  109 |     bool                  ValidateSystem();
  110 |     
  111 |     //--- System Status ---
  112 |     bool                  IsSystemReady() const { return m_SystemReady; }
  113 |     bool                  IsTradingEnabled() const { return m_TradingEnabled; }
  114 |     bool                  CanExecuteTrades();
  115 |     SIntegrationHealth    GetSystemHealth();
  116 |     
  117 |     //--- Module Management ---
  118 |     bool                  IsModuleConnected(const string& moduleName);
  119 |     ENUM_MODULE_STATUS    GetModuleStatus(const string& moduleName);
  120 |     bool                  ReconnectModule(const string& moduleName);
  121 |     bool                  DisableModule(const string& moduleName);
  122 |     
  123 |     //--- Health Monitoring ---
  124 |     void                  UpdateSystemHealth();
  125 |     bool                  PerformSystemCheck();
  126 |     void                  HandleSystemError(const string& error);
  127 |     bool                  AttemptSystemRecovery();
  128 |     
  129 |     //--- Event Management ---
  130 |     void                  LogIntegrationEvent(ENUM_INTEGRATION_EVENT eventType, 
  131 |                                             const string& module, 
  132 |                                             const string& message, 
  133 |                                             ENUM_LOG_LEVEL severity = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  134 |     SIntegrationEvent     GetLastEvent();
  135 |     int                   GetEventCount() const { return m_EventCount; }
  136 |     
  137 |     //--- Configuration ---
  138 |     void                  SetConfiguration(const SIntegrationConfig& config) { m_Config = config; }
  139 |     SIntegrationConfig    GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  140 |     void                  EnableAutoRecovery(bool enable) { m_Config.autoRecovery = enable; }
  141 |     void                  SetHealthCheckInterval(int seconds) { m_Config.healthCheckInterval = seconds; }
  142 |     
  143 |     //--- Status Information ---
  144 |     string                GetSystemSummary();
  145 |     string                GetIntegrationReport();
  146 |     void                  PrintSystemDashboard();
  147 |     
  148 |     //--- Core Interface Methods ---
  149 |     bool                  OnTick();           // Called from Core::OnTick()
  150 |     bool                  OnTimer();          // Called from Core::OnTimer()
  151 |     void                  OnNewBar();         // Called when new bar detected
  152 |     
  153 | private:
  154 |     //--- Internal Methods ---
  155 |     void                  InitializeEventHistory();
  156 |     void                  AddEvent(const SIntegrationEvent& event);
  157 |     void                  PerformPeriodicChecks();
  158 |     void                  UpdateTradingStatus();
  159 |     
  160 |     //--- Recovery Methods ---
  161 |     bool                  DiagnoseSystemIssues();
  162 |     bool                  RecoverCriticalModules();
  163 |     bool                  RestoreConnections();
  164 |     
  165 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
  166 |     string                EventTypeToString(ENUM_INTEGRATION_EVENT eventType);
  167 |     bool                  IsTimeForHealthCheck();
  168 |     void                  NotifySystemEvent(const string& message, ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level);
  169 | };
  170 | 
  171 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  172 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  173 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  174 | CIntegrationManager::CIntegrationManager() {
  175 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  176 |     m_pIntegrator = NULL;
  177 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  178 |     m_SystemReady = false;
  179 |     m_TradingEnabled = false;
  180 |     m_EventCount = 0;
  181 |     m_LastHealthCheck = 0;
  182 |     m_IntegrationStartTime = 0;
  183 |     
  184 |     // Set default configuration
  185 |     m_Config.SetDefaults();
  186 |     
  187 |     // Initialize event history
  188 |     ArrayResize(m_EventHistory, MAX_EVENTS);
  189 |     InitializeEventHistory();
  190 | }
  191 | 
  192 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  193 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  194 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  195 | CIntegrationManager::~CIntegrationManager() {
  196 |     Deinitialize();
  197 | }
  198 | 
  199 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  200 | //| Initialize Integration Manager                                   |
  201 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  202 | bool CIntegrationManager::Initialize(EAContext* pContext, const SIntegrationConfig& config) {
  203 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  204 |         return true;
  205 |     }
  206 |     
  207 |     if (pContext == NULL) {
  208 |         Print("[IntegrationManager] ERROR: Context is NULL");
  209 |         return false;
  210 |     }
  211 |     
  212 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  213 |     m_Config = config;
  214 |     
  215 |     // Create module integrator
  216 |     m_pIntegrator = new CModuleIntegrator();
  217 |     if (m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  218 |         NotifySystemEvent("Failed to create ModuleIntegrator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  219 |         return false;
  220 |     }
  221 |     
  222 |     // Initialize module integrator
  223 |     if (!m_pIntegrator.Initialize(pContext)) {
  224 |         NotifySystemEvent("Failed to initialize ModuleIntegrator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  225 |         delete m_pIntegrator;
  226 |         m_pIntegrator = NULL;
  227 |         return false;
  228 |     }
  229 |     
  230 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  231 |     m_IntegrationStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  232 |     
  233 |     LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_STARTED, "System", 
  234 |         "Integration Manager initialized", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  235 |     
  236 |     NotifySystemEvent("Integration Manager initialized successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  237 |     
  238 |     return true;
  239 | }
  240 | 
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | //| Deinitialize Integration Manager                                 |
  243 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  244 | void CIntegrationManager::Deinitialize() {
  245 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  246 |         return;
  247 |     }
  248 |     
  249 |     NotifySystemEvent("Shutting down Integration Manager", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  250 |     
  251 |     // Stop integration
  252 |     StopIntegration();
  253 |     
  254 |     // Clean up integrator
  255 |     if (m_pIntegrator != NULL) {
  256 |         m_pIntegrator.Deinitialize();
  257 |         delete m_pIntegrator;
  258 |         m_pIntegrator = NULL;
  259 |     }
  260 |     
  261 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  262 |     m_SystemReady = false;
  263 |     m_TradingEnabled = false;
  264 |     
  265 |     NotifySystemEvent("Integration Manager shutdown complete", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  266 | }
  267 | 
  268 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  269 | //| Start Integration Process                                        |
  270 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  271 | bool CIntegrationManager::StartIntegration() {
  272 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  273 |         return false;
  274 |     }
  275 |     
  276 |     LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_STARTED, "System", 
  277 |         "Starting system integration", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  278 |     
  279 |     NotifySystemEvent("Starting system integration...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  280 |     
  281 |     // Start module integration
  282 |     bool success = m_pIntegrator.IntegrateAllModules();
  283 |     
  284 |     if (success) {
  285 |         m_SystemReady = true;
  286 |         LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_COMPLETE, "System", 
  287 |             "System integration completed successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  288 |         NotifySystemEvent("System integration completed successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  289 |     } else {
  290 |         LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_ERROR_DETECTED, "System", 
  291 |             "System integration completed with errors", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  292 |         NotifySystemEvent("System integration completed with errors", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  293 |     }
  294 |     
  295 |     // Update trading status
  296 |     UpdateTradingStatus();
  297 |     
  298 |     // Perform initial health check
  299 |     PerformSystemCheck();
  300 |     
  301 |     return success;
  302 | }
  303 | 
  304 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 | //| Stop Integration                                                 |
  306 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  307 | bool CIntegrationManager::StopIntegration() {
  308 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  309 |         return false;
  310 |     }
  311 |     
  312 |     NotifySystemEvent("Stopping system integration", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  313 |     
  314 |     m_SystemReady = false;
  315 |     m_TradingEnabled = false;
  316 |     
  317 |     LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_COMPLETE, "System", 
  318 |         "System integration stopped", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  319 |     
  320 |     return true;
  321 | }
  322 | 
  323 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  324 | //| Restart Integration                                              |
  325 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  326 | bool CIntegrationManager::RestartIntegration() {
  327 |     NotifySystemEvent("Restarting system integration", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  328 |     
  329 |     StopIntegration();
  330 |     Sleep(m_Config.retryDelay * 1000); // Wait before restart
  331 |     
  332 |     return StartIntegration();
  333 | }
  334 | 
  335 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  336 | //| Validate System                                                  |
  337 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  338 | bool CIntegrationManager::ValidateSystem() {
  339 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  340 |         return false;
  341 |     }
  342 |     
  343 |     return m_pIntegrator.ValidateIntegration();
  344 | }
  345 | 
  346 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  347 | //| Can Execute Trades                                               |
  348 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  349 | bool CIntegrationManager::CanExecuteTrades() {
  350 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  351 |         return false;
  352 |     }
  353 |     
  354 |     return m_SystemReady && m_TradingEnabled && m_pIntegrator.CanExecuteTrades();
  355 | }
  356 | 
  357 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  358 | //| Get System Health                                                |
  359 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  360 | SIntegrationHealth CIntegrationManager::GetSystemHealth() {
  361 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  362 |         SIntegrationHealth health;
  363 |         health.Clear();
  364 |         return health;
  365 |     }
  366 |     
  367 |     return m_pIntegrator.GetIntegrationHealth();
  368 | }
  369 | 
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | //| Update System Health                                             |
  372 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  373 | void CIntegrationManager::UpdateSystemHealth() {
  374 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  375 |         return;
  376 |     }
  377 |     
  378 |     // Perform health check if needed
  379 |     if (IsTimeForHealthCheck()) {
  380 |         PerformSystemCheck();
  381 |     }
  382 |     
  383 |     // Update trading status
  384 |     UpdateTradingStatus();
  385 | }
  386 | 
  387 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  388 | //| Perform System Check                                             |
  389 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  390 | bool CIntegrationManager::PerformSystemCheck() {
  391 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  392 |         return false;
  393 |     }
  394 |     
  395 |     bool healthy = m_pIntegrator.PerformHealthCheck();
  396 |     m_LastHealthCheck = TimeCurrent();
  397 |     
  398 |     LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_HEALTH_CHECK, "System", 
  399 |         StringFormat("Health check completed - Status: %s", healthy ? "Healthy" : "Issues detected"), 
  400 |         healthy ? LOG_LEVEL_INFO : LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  401 |     
  402 |     // Attempt recovery if needed
  403 |     if (!healthy && m_Config.autoRecovery) {
  404 |         AttemptSystemRecovery();
  405 |     }
  406 |     
  407 |     return healthy;
  408 | }
  409 | 
  410 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  411 | //| Update Trading Status                                            |
  412 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  413 | void CIntegrationManager::UpdateTradingStatus() {
  414 |     bool previousStatus = m_TradingEnabled;
  415 |     
  416 |     m_TradingEnabled = m_SystemReady && CanExecuteTrades();
  417 |     
  418 |     // Log status change
  419 |     if (previousStatus != m_TradingEnabled) {
  420 |         string message = m_TradingEnabled ? "Trading enabled" : "Trading disabled";
  421 |         LogIntegrationEvent(m_TradingEnabled ? INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_CONNECTED : INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_DISCONNECTED,
  422 |             "Trading", message, LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  423 |     }
  424 | }
  425 | 
  426 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  427 | //| Attempt System Recovery                                          |
  428 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  429 | bool CIntegrationManager::AttemptSystemRecovery() {
  430 |     LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_RECOVERY_STARTED, "System", 
  431 |         "Starting system recovery", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  432 |     
  433 |     NotifySystemEvent("Attempting system recovery...", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  434 |     
  435 |     bool recovered = false;
  436 |     
  437 |     // Step 1: Diagnose issues
  438 |     if (DiagnoseSystemIssues()) {
  439 |         // Step 2: Recover critical modules
  440 |         if (RecoverCriticalModules()) {
  441 |             // Step 3: Restore connections
  442 |             if (RestoreConnections()) {
  443 |                 recovered = true;
  444 |             }
  445 |         }
  446 |     }
  447 |     
  448 |     if (recovered) {
  449 |         LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_RECOVERY_COMPLETED, "System", 
  450 |             "System recovery completed successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  451 |         NotifySystemEvent("System recovery completed successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  452 |     } else {
  453 |         LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_ERROR_DETECTED, "System", 
  454 |             "System recovery failed", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  455 |         NotifySystemEvent("System recovery failed", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  456 |     }
  457 |     
  458 |     return recovered;
  459 | }
  460 | 
  461 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  462 | //| Diagnose System Issues                                           |
  463 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  464 | bool CIntegrationManager::DiagnoseSystemIssues() {
  465 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  466 |         return false;
  467 |     }
  468 |     
  469 |     NotifySystemEvent("Diagnosing system issues...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  470 |     
  471 |     SIntegrationHealth health = GetSystemHealth();
  472 |     
  473 |     if (health.errorModules > 0) {
  474 |         NotifySystemEvent(StringFormat("Detected %d module errors", health.errorModules), LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  475 |         return true;
  476 |     }
  477 |     
  478 |     if (health.healthScore < 0.8) {
  479 |         NotifySystemEvent(StringFormat("System health below threshold: %.1f%%", health.healthScore * 100), LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  480 |         return true;
  481 |     }
  482 |     
  483 |     return false;
  484 | }
  485 | 
  486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  487 | //| Recover Critical Modules                                         |
  488 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  489 | bool CIntegrationManager::RecoverCriticalModules() {
  490 |     NotifySystemEvent("Recovering critical modules...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  491 |     
  492 |     // List of critical modules
  493 |     string criticalModules[] = {"Logger", "ErrorHandler", "SymbolManager", "TimeManager", "SignalEngine", "RiskManager", "TradeManager"};
  494 |     
  495 |     bool allRecovered = true;
  496 |     
  497 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(criticalModules); i++) {
  498 |         if (!IsModuleConnected(criticalModules[i])) {
  499 |             if (!ReconnectModule(criticalModules[i])) {
  500 |                 allRecovered = false;
  501 |                 NotifySystemEvent(StringFormat("Failed to recover critical module: %s", criticalModules[i]), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  502 |             }
  503 |         }
  504 |     }
  505 |     
  506 |     return allRecovered;
  507 | }
  508 | 
  509 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  510 | //| Restore Connections                                              |
  511 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  512 | bool CIntegrationManager::RestoreConnections() {
  513 |     NotifySystemEvent("Restoring module connections...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  514 |     
  515 |     if (m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  516 |         return false;
  517 |     }
  518 |     
  519 |     return m_pIntegrator.RepairBrokenConnections();
  520 | }
  521 | 
  522 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  523 | //| On Tick Event                                                    |
  524 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  525 | bool CIntegrationManager::OnTick() {
  526 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  527 |         return false;
  528 |     }
  529 |     
  530 |     // Perform periodic checks
  531 |     PerformPeriodicChecks();
  532 |     
  533 |     return true;
  534 | }
  535 | 
  536 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  537 | //| On Timer Event                                                   |
  538 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 | bool CIntegrationManager::OnTimer() {
  540 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  541 |         return false;
  542 |     }
  543 |     
  544 |     // Update system health
  545 |     UpdateSystemHealth();
  546 |     
  547 |     return true;
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | //| Perform Periodic Checks                                          |
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | void CIntegrationManager::PerformPeriodicChecks() {
  554 |     // Check if health check is needed
  555 |     if (IsTimeForHealthCheck()) {
  556 |         PerformSystemCheck();
  557 |     }
  558 | }
  559 | 
  560 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  561 | //| Is Time for Health Check                                         |
  562 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  563 | bool CIntegrationManager::IsTimeForHealthCheck() {
  564 |     return (TimeCurrent() - m_LastHealthCheck >= m_Config.healthCheckInterval);
  565 | }
  566 | 
  567 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  568 | //| Is Module Connected                                              |
  569 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  570 | bool CIntegrationManager::IsModuleConnected(const string& moduleName) {
  571 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  572 |         return false;
  573 |     }
  574 |     
  575 |     return m_pIntegrator.IsModuleReady(moduleName);
  576 | }
  577 | 
  578 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  579 | //| Get Module Status                                                |
  580 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  581 | ENUM_MODULE_STATUS CIntegrationManager::GetModuleStatus(const string& moduleName) {
  582 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  583 |         return MODULE_ERROR;
  584 |     }
  585 |     
  586 |     return m_pIntegrator.GetModuleStatus(moduleName);
  587 | }
  588 | 
  589 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  590 | //| Reconnect Module                                                 |
  591 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  592 | bool CIntegrationManager::ReconnectModule(const string& moduleName) {
  593 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pIntegrator == NULL) {
  594 |         return false;
  595 |     }
  596 |     
  597 |     LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_CONNECTED, moduleName, 
  598 |         "Attempting to reconnect module", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  599 |     
  600 |     bool success = m_pIntegrator.ConnectModule(moduleName);
  601 |     
  602 |     if (success) {
  603 |         LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_CONNECTED, moduleName, 
  604 |             "Module reconnected successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  605 |     } else {
  606 |         LogIntegrationEvent(INTEGRATION_EVENT_ERROR_DETECTED, moduleName, 
  607 |             "Module reconnection failed", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  608 |     }
  609 |     
  610 |     return success;
  611 | }
  612 | 
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | //| Log Integration Event                                            |
  615 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  616 | void CIntegrationManager::LogIntegrationEvent(ENUM_INTEGRATION_EVENT eventType, 
  617 |                                              const string& module, 
  618 |                                              const string& message, 
  619 |                                              ENUM_LOG_LEVEL severity = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  620 |     SIntegrationEvent event;
  621 |     event.eventType = eventType;
  622 |     event.module = module;
  623 |     event.message = message;
  624 |     event.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  625 |     event.severity = severity;
  626 |     
  627 |     AddEvent(event);
  628 |     
  629 |     // Log to system logger
  630 |     NotifySystemEvent(StringFormat("[%s] %s: %s", module, EventTypeToString(eventType), message), severity);
  631 | }
  632 | 
  633 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  634 | //| Add Event to History                                             |
  635 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  636 | void CIntegrationManager::AddEvent(const SIntegrationEvent& event) {
  637 |     if (m_EventCount >= MAX_EVENTS) {
  638 |         // Shift array to make room for new event
  639 |         for (int i = 0; i < MAX_EVENTS - 1; i++) {
  640 |             m_EventHistory[i] = m_EventHistory[i + 1];
  641 |         }
  642 |         m_EventCount = MAX_EVENTS - 1;
  643 |     }
  644 |     
  645 |     m_EventHistory[m_EventCount] = event;
  646 |     m_EventCount++;
  647 | }
  648 | 
  649 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  650 | //| Initialize Event History                                         |
  651 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  652 | void CIntegrationManager::InitializeEventHistory() {
  653 |     for (int i = 0; i < MAX_EVENTS; i++) {
  654 |         m_EventHistory[i].Clear();
  655 |     }
  656 |     m_EventCount = 0;
  657 | }
  658 | 
  659 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 | //| Get System Summary                                               |
  661 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  662 | string CIntegrationManager::GetSystemSummary() {
  663 |     string summary = "=== SYSTEM INTEGRATION STATUS ===\n";
  664 |     summary += StringFormat("System Ready: %s\n", m_SystemReady ? "Yes" : "No");
  665 |     summary += StringFormat("Trading Enabled: %s\n", m_TradingEnabled ? "Yes" : "No");
  666 |     summary += StringFormat("Can Execute Trades: %s\n", CanExecuteTrades() ? "Yes" : "No");
  667 |     
  668 |     if (m_pIntegrator != NULL) {
  669 |         SIntegrationHealth health = GetSystemHealth();
  670 |         summary += StringFormat("Health Score: %.1f%%\n", health.healthScore * 100);
  671 |         summary += StringFormat("Modules Ready: %d/%d\n", health.readyModules, health.totalModules);
  672 |         summary += StringFormat("Integration Status: %s\n", health.statusMessage);
  673 |     }
  674 |     
  675 |     summary += "==============================\n";
  676 |     
  677 |     return summary;
  678 | }
  679 | 
  680 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  681 | //| Event Type to String                                             |
  682 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  683 | string CIntegrationManager::EventTypeToString(ENUM_INTEGRATION_EVENT eventType) {
  684 |     switch (eventType) {
  685 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_STARTED: return "STARTED";
  686 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_CONNECTED: return "MODULE_CONNECTED";
  687 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_MODULE_DISCONNECTED: return "MODULE_DISCONNECTED";
  688 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_DEPENDENCY_RESOLVED: return "DEPENDENCY_RESOLVED";
  689 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_DEPENDENCY_FAILED: return "DEPENDENCY_FAILED";
  690 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_HEALTH_CHECK: return "HEALTH_CHECK";
  691 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_ERROR_DETECTED: return "ERROR_DETECTED";
  692 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_RECOVERY_STARTED: return "RECOVERY_STARTED";
  693 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_RECOVERY_COMPLETED: return "RECOVERY_COMPLETED";
  694 |         case INTEGRATION_EVENT_COMPLETE: return "COMPLETE";
  695 |         default: return "UNKNOWN";
  696 |     }
  697 | }
  698 | 
  699 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  700 | //| Notify System Event                                              |
  701 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  702 | void CIntegrationManager::NotifySystemEvent(const string& message, ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  703 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  704 |         switch(level) {
  705 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  706 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(message, __FUNCTION__);
  707 |                 break;
  708 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  709 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(message, __FUNCTION__);
  710 |                 break;
  711 |             default:
  712 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(message, __FUNCTION__);
  713 |         }
  714 |     } else {
  715 |         Print("[IntegrationManager] " + message);
  716 |     }
  717 | }
  718 | 
  719 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5
  720 | 
  721 | #endif // INTEGRATION_MANAGER_MQH_

   29 |     MODULE_UNINITIALIZED,
   30 |     MODULE_INITIALIZING,
   31 |     MODULE_READY,
   32 |     MODULE_ERROR,
   33 |     MODULE_DISABLED

   36 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   37 | //| Module Connection Status                                         |
   38 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   39 | struct SModuleStatus {
   40 |     string                moduleName;        // Module name
   41 |     ENUM_MODULE_STATUS    status;            // Current status
   42 |     bool                  isRequired;        // Is required for operation
   43 |     bool                  isConnected;       // Connection status
   44 |     datetime              lastUpdate;        // Last status update
   45 |     string                errorMessage;      // Error message if any
   46 |     int                   retryCount;        // Retry attempts
   47 |     
   48 |     void Clear() {
   49 |         moduleName = "";
   50 |         status = MODULE_UNINITIALIZED;
   51 |         isRequired = false;
   52 |         isConnected = false;
   53 |         lastUpdate = 0;
   54 |         errorMessage = "";
   55 |         retryCount = 0;
   56 |     }
   57 | };
   58 | 
   59 | struct SIntegrationHealth {
   60 |     ENUM_INTEGRATION_STATUS overallStatus;   // Overall integration status
   61 |     int                   totalModules;      // Total number of modules
   62 |     int                   readyModules;      // Ready modules count
   63 |     int                   errorModules;      // Error modules count
   64 |     double                healthScore;       // Health score (0-1)
   65 |     datetime              lastHealthCheck;   // Last health check time
   66 |     bool                  canTrade;          // Can execute trades
   67 |     string                statusMessage;     // Status message
   68 |     
   69 |     void Clear() {
   70 |         overallStatus = INTEGRATION_UNINITIALIZED;
   71 |         totalModules = 0;
   72 |         readyModules = 0;
   73 |         errorModules = 0;
   74 |         healthScore = 0.0;
   75 |         lastHealthCheck = 0;
   76 |         canTrade = false;
   77 |         statusMessage = "";
   78 |     }
   79 | };

   81 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   82 | //| CModuleIntegrator - Central Integration Manager                 |

   84 | class CModuleIntegrator {
   85 | private:
   86 |     EAContext*            m_pContext;        // Reference to EA context
   87 |     bool                  m_bInitialized;   // Initialization status
   88 |     
   89 |     // Module tracking

   91 |     SIntegrationHealth    m_Health;         // Integration health
   92 |     int                   m_ModuleCount;    // Number of modules
   93 |

   97 |     int                   m_IntegrationRetries;
   98 |     
   99 |     // Module dependencies map
  100 |     string                m_Dependencies[][2]; // [module][dependency]
  101 |     int                   m_DependencyCount;
  102 |

  105 |     static const int      MAX_DEPENDENCIES = 50;

  195 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  196 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  197 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  198 | CModuleIntegrator::CModuleIntegrator() {
  199 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  200 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  201 |     m_ModuleCount = 0;
  202 |     m_DependencyCount = 0;
  203 |     m_LastIntegrationCheck = 0;
  204 |     m_LastHealthCheck = 0;
  205 |     m_IntegrationRetries = 0;
  206 |     
  207 |     // Initialize arrays
  208 |     ArrayResize(m_ModuleStatus, MAX_MODULES);
  209 |     ArrayResize(m_Dependencies, MAX_DEPENDENCIES);
  210 |     
  211 |     // Clear health status
  212 |     m_Health.Clear();
  213 | }
  214 | 
  215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  217 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  218 | CModuleIntegrator::~CModuleIntegrator() {
  219 |     Deinitialize();
  220 | }
  221 | 
  222 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  223 | //| Initialize Integration Layer                                     |
  224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 | bool CModuleIntegrator::Initialize(EAContext* pContext) {
  226 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  227 |         return true;
  228 |     }
  229 |     
  230 |     if (pContext == NULL) {
  231 |         Print("[ModuleIntegrator] ERROR: Context is NULL");
  232 |         return false;
  233 |     }
  234 |     
  235 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  236 |     
  237 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Initializing Module Integration Layer...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  238 |     
  239 |     // Initialize module registry
  240 |     InitializeModuleRegistry();
  241 |     
  242 |     // Setup dependency map
  243 |     SetupDependencyMap();
  244 |     
  245 |     // Reset integration state
  246 |     ResetIntegrationState();
  247 |     
  248 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  249 |     
  250 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Module Integration Layer initialized successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  251 |     
  252 |     return true;
  253 | }
  254 | 
  255 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  256 | //| Deinitialize Integration Layer                                   |
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | void CModuleIntegrator::Deinitialize() {
  259 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  260 |         return;
  261 |     }
  262 |     
  263 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Deinitializing Module Integration Layer...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  264 |     
  265 |     // Disconnect all modules gracefully
  266 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ModuleCount; i++) {
  267 |         if (m_ModuleStatus[i].isConnected) {
  268 |             DisconnectModule(m_ModuleStatus[i].moduleName);
  269 |         }
  270 |     }
  271 |     
  272 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  273 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  274 |     
  275 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Module Integration Layer deinitialized", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  276 | }
  277 | 
  278 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  279 | //| Integrate All Modules                                           |
  280 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  281 | bool CModuleIntegrator::IntegrateAllModules() {
  282 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  283 |         return false;
  284 |     }
  285 |     
  286 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Starting full module integration...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  287 |     
  288 |     m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_INITIALIZING;
  289 |     
  290 |     // Step 1: Connect core modules first
  291 |     if (!ConnectCoreModules()) {
  292 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Failed to connect core modules", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  293 |         m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_ERROR;
  294 |         return false;
  295 |     }
  296 |     
  297 |     // Step 2: Resolve all dependencies
  298 |     if (!ResolveDependencies()) {
  299 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Failed to resolve module dependencies", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  300 |         m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_PARTIAL;
  301 |     }
  302 |     
  303 |     // Step 3: Connect remaining modules in dependency order
  304 |     bool allConnected = true;
  305 |     allConnected &= ConnectMarketAnalysis();
  306 |     allConnected &= ConnectSignalGeneration();
  307 |     allConnected &= ConnectRiskManagement();
  308 |     allConnected &= ConnectTradeManagement();
  309 |     allConnected &= ConnectAnalytics();
  310 |     allConnected &= ConnectUI();
  311 |     
  312 |     // Step 4: Validate integration
  313 |     if (!ValidateIntegration()) {
  314 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Integration validation failed", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  315 |         m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_PARTIAL;
  316 |         allConnected = false;
  317 |     }
  318 |     
  319 |     // Update final status
  320 |     if (allConnected) {
  321 |         m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_COMPLETE;
  322 |         LogIntegrationEvent("All modules integrated successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  323 |     } else {
  324 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Partial integration completed with some errors", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  325 |     }
  326 |     
  327 |     // Perform initial health check
  328 |     PerformHealthCheck();
  329 |     
  330 |     return allConnected;
  331 | }
  332 | 
  333 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  334 | //| Initialize Module Registry                                       |
  335 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  336 | void CModuleIntegrator::InitializeModuleRegistry() {
  337 |     // Register all modules in dependency order
  338 |     
  339 |     // Core Infrastructure (Level 0)
  340 |     RegisterModule("Logger", true);
  341 |     RegisterModule("ErrorHandler", true);
  342 |     RegisterModule("ParameterStore", true);
  343 |     RegisterModule("StateManager", false);
  344 |     
  345 |     // Framework (Level 1)
  346 |     RegisterModule("SymbolManager", true);
  347 |     RegisterModule("TimeManager", true);
  348 |     RegisterModule("BrokerHealth", false);
  349 |     
  350 |     // Market Analysis (Level 2)
  351 |     RegisterModule("MarketProfile", false);
  352 |     RegisterModule("AssetDNA", false);
  353 |     RegisterModule("NewsAnalysis", false);
  354 |     RegisterModule("Patterns", false);
  355 |     
  356 |     // Signal Generation (Level 3)
  357 |     RegisterModule("SignalEngine", true);
  358 |     
  359 |     // Risk & Trade Management (Level 4)
  360 |     RegisterModule("RiskManager", true);
  361 |     RegisterModule("TradeManager", true);
  362 |     RegisterModule("PositionManager", false);
  363 |     
  364 |     // Analytics (Level 5)
  365 |     RegisterModule("PerformanceTracker", false);
  366 |     
  367 |     // UI (Level 6)
  368 |     RegisterModule("Dashboard", false);
  369 |     
  370 |     LogIntegrationEvent(StringFormat("Registered %d modules", m_ModuleCount), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  371 | }
  372 | 
  373 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  374 | //| Setup Dependency Map                                             |
  375 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  376 | void CModuleIntegrator::SetupDependencyMap() {
  377 |     // Define module dependencies
  378 |     
  379 |     // Core dependencies
  380 |     AddDependency("ErrorHandler", "Logger");
  381 |     AddDependency("ParameterStore", "Logger");
  382 |     AddDependency("StateManager", "Logger");
  383 |     
  384 |     // Framework dependencies
  385 |     AddDependency("SymbolManager", "Logger");
  386 |     AddDependency("SymbolManager", "ErrorHandler");
  387 |     AddDependency("TimeManager", "Logger");
  388 |     AddDependency("TimeManager", "SymbolManager");
  389 |     AddDependency("BrokerHealth", "Logger");
  390 |     AddDependency("BrokerHealth", "SymbolManager");
  391 |     
  392 |     // Market Analysis dependencies
  393 |     AddDependency("MarketProfile", "Logger");
  394 |     AddDependency("MarketProfile", "SymbolManager");
  395 |     AddDependency("MarketProfile", "TimeManager");
  396 |     AddDependency("AssetDNA", "Logger");
  397 |     AddDependency("AssetDNA", "SymbolManager");
  398 |     AddDependency("AssetDNA", "MarketProfile");
  399 |     AddDependency("NewsAnalysis", "Logger");
  400 |     AddDependency("NewsAnalysis", "TimeManager");
  401 |     AddDependency("Patterns", "Logger");
  402 |     AddDependency("Patterns", "SymbolManager");
  403 |     
  404 |     // Signal Generation dependencies
  405 |     AddDependency("SignalEngine", "Logger");
  406 |     AddDependency("SignalEngine", "SymbolManager");
  407 |     AddDependency("SignalEngine", "TimeManager");
  408 |     AddDependency("SignalEngine", "AssetDNA");
  409 |     
  410 |     // Risk Management dependencies
  411 |     AddDependency("RiskManager", "Logger");
  412 |     AddDependency("RiskManager", "SymbolManager");
  413 |     AddDependency("RiskManager", "PerformanceTracker");
  414 |     
  415 |     // Trade Management dependencies
  416 |     AddDependency("TradeManager", "Logger");
  417 |     AddDependency("TradeManager", "SymbolManager");
  418 |     AddDependency("TradeManager", "RiskManager");
  419 |     AddDependency("TradeManager", "SignalEngine");
  420 |     AddDependency("PositionManager", "Logger");
  421 |     AddDependency("PositionManager", "SymbolManager");
  422 |     AddDependency("PositionManager", "TradeManager");
  423 |     
  424 |     // Analytics dependencies
  425 |     AddDependency("PerformanceTracker", "Logger");
  426 |     AddDependency("PerformanceTracker", "TradeManager");
  427 |     
  428 |     // UI dependencies
  429 |     AddDependency("Dashboard", "Logger");
  430 |     AddDependency("Dashboard", "PerformanceTracker");
  431 |     AddDependency("Dashboard", "TradeManager");
  432 |     AddDependency("Dashboard", "RiskManager");
  433 |     
  434 |     LogIntegrationEvent(StringFormat("Setup %d dependencies", m_DependencyCount), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  435 | }
  436 | 
  437 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  438 | //| Register Module                                                  |
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | bool CModuleIntegrator::RegisterModule(const string& moduleName, bool isRequired = true) {
  441 |     if (m_ModuleCount >= MAX_MODULES) {
  442 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Maximum modules limit reached", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  443 |         return false;
  444 |     }
  445 |     
  446 |     m_ModuleStatus[m_ModuleCount].Clear();
  447 |     m_ModuleStatus[m_ModuleCount].moduleName = moduleName;
  448 |     m_ModuleStatus[m_ModuleCount].isRequired = isRequired;
  449 |     m_ModuleStatus[m_ModuleCount].status = MODULE_UNINITIALIZED;
  450 |     m_ModuleStatus[m_ModuleCount].lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  451 |     
  452 |     m_ModuleCount++;
  453 |     
  454 |     return true;
  455 | }
  456 | 
  457 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  458 | //| Connect Core Modules                                             |
  459 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  460 | bool CModuleIntegrator::ConnectCoreModules() {
  461 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Connecting core modules...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  462 |     
  463 |     bool success = true;
  464 |     
  465 |     // Connect in dependency order
  466 |     success &= ValidateLogger();
  467 |     success &= ValidateErrorHandler();
  468 |     success &= ValidateSymbolManager();
  469 |     success &= ValidateTimeManager();
  470 |     
  471 |     if (success) {
  472 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Core modules connected successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  473 |     } else {
  474 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Failed to connect some core modules", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  475 |     }
  476 |     
  477 |     return success;
  478 | }
  479 | 
  480 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  481 | //| Validate Logger                                                  |
  482 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  483 | bool CModuleIntegrator::ValidateLogger() {
  484 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger == NULL) {
  485 |         UpdateModuleStatus("Logger", MODULE_ERROR, "Logger is NULL");
  486 |         return false;
  487 |     }
  488 |     
  489 |     UpdateModuleStatus("Logger", MODULE_READY, "Logger connected");
  490 |     return true;
  491 | }
  492 | 
  493 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  494 | //| Validate Error Handler                                           |
  495 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  496 | bool CModuleIntegrator::ValidateErrorHandler() {
  497 |     if (m_pContext->pErrorHandler == NULL) {
  498 |         UpdateModuleStatus("ErrorHandler", MODULE_ERROR, "ErrorHandler is NULL");
  499 |         return false;
  500 |     }
  501 |     
  502 |     UpdateModuleStatus("ErrorHandler", MODULE_READY, "ErrorHandler connected");
  503 |     return true;
  504 | }
  505 | 
  506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 | //| Validate Symbol Manager                                          |
  508 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  509 | bool CModuleIntegrator::ValidateSymbolManager() {
  510 |     if (m_pContext->pSymbolManager == NULL) {
  511 |         UpdateModuleStatus("SymbolManager", MODULE_ERROR, "SymbolManager is NULL");
  512 |         return false;
  513 |     }
  514 |     
  515 |     UpdateModuleStatus("SymbolManager", MODULE_READY, "SymbolManager connected");
  516 |     return true;
  517 | }
  518 | 
  519 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  520 | //| Validate Time Manager                                            |
  521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  522 | bool CModuleIntegrator::ValidateTimeManager() {
  523 |     if (m_pContext->pTimeManager == NULL) {
  524 |         UpdateModuleStatus("TimeManager", MODULE_ERROR, "TimeManager is NULL");
  525 |         return false;
  526 |     }
  527 |     
  528 |     UpdateModuleStatus("TimeManager", MODULE_READY, "TimeManager connected");
  529 |     return true;
  530 | }
  531 |

  541 |     success &= ValidateAssetDNA();

  682 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  683 | //| Validate Integration                                             |
  684 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  685 | bool CModuleIntegrator::ValidateIntegration() {
  686 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Validating integration...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  687 |     
  688 |     bool isValid = true;
  689 |     int requiredModules = 0;
  690 |     int readyRequired = 0;
  691 |     
  692 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ModuleCount; i++) {
  693 |         if (m_ModuleStatus[i].isRequired) {
  694 |             requiredModules++;
  695 |             if (m_ModuleStatus[i].status == MODULE_READY) {
  696 |                 readyRequired++;
  697 |             }
  698 |         }
  699 |     }
  700 |     
  701 |     isValid = (readyRequired == requiredModules);
  702 |     
  703 |     LogIntegrationEvent(StringFormat("Integration validation: %d/%d required modules ready", 
  704 |         readyRequired, requiredModules), isValid ? LOG_LEVEL_INFO : LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  705 |     
  706 |     return isValid;
  707 | }
  708 | 
  709 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  710 | //| Perform Health Check                                             |
  711 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  712 | bool CModuleIntegrator::PerformHealthCheck() {
  713 |     m_Health.Clear();
  714 |     m_Health.lastHealthCheck = TimeCurrent();
  715 |     
  716 |     // Count module status
  717 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ModuleCount; i++) {
  718 |         m_Health.totalModules++;
  719 |         
  720 |         switch (m_ModuleStatus[i].status) {
  721 |             case MODULE_READY:
  722 |                 m_Health.readyModules++;
  723 |                 break;
  724 |             case MODULE_ERROR:
  725 |                 m_Health.errorModules++;
  726 |                 break;
  727 |         }
  728 |     }
  729 |     
  730 |     // Calculate health score
  731 |     m_Health.healthScore = CalculateHealthScore();
  732 |     
  733 |     // Determine overall status
  734 |     if (m_Health.errorModules == 0 && m_Health.readyModules == m_Health.totalModules) {
  735 |         m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_COMPLETE;
  736 |         m_Health.canTrade = true;
  737 |         m_Health.statusMessage = "All systems operational";
  738 |     } else if (m_Health.readyModules >= m_Health.totalModules * 0.8) {
  739 |         m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_PARTIAL;
  740 |         m_Health.canTrade = ValidateIntegration(); // Check if required modules are ready
  741 |         m_Health.statusMessage = "Partial integration - some optional modules offline";
  742 |     } else {
  743 |         m_Health.overallStatus = INTEGRATION_ERROR;
  744 |         m_Health.canTrade = false;
  745 |         m_Health.statusMessage = "Critical integration errors detected";
  746 |     }
  747 |     
  748 |     return m_Health.canTrade;
  749 | }
  750 | 
  751 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  752 | //| Calculate Health Score                                           |
  753 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  754 | double CModuleIntegrator::CalculateHealthScore() {
  755 |     if (m_Health.totalModules == 0) {
  756 |         return 0.0;
  757 |     }
  758 |     
  759 |     double score = 0.0;
  760 |     
  761 |     // Ready modules weight
  762 |     score += ((double)m_Health.readyModules / m_Health.totalModules) * 0.7;
  763 |     
  764 |     // Error penalty
  765 |     if (m_Health.errorModules > 0) {
  766 |         score -= ((double)m_Health.errorModules / m_Health.totalModules) * 0.3;
  767 |     }
  768 |     
  769 |     // Required modules bonus
  770 |     int requiredReady = 0;
  771 |     int totalRequired = 0;
  772 |     
  773 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ModuleCount; i++) {
  774 |         if (m_ModuleStatus[i].isRequired) {
  775 |             totalRequired++;
  776 |             if (m_ModuleStatus[i].status == MODULE_READY) {
  777 |                 requiredReady++;
  778 |             }
  779 |         }
  780 |     }
  781 |     
  782 |     if (totalRequired > 0 && requiredReady == totalRequired) {
  783 |         score += 0.3; // Bonus for all required modules ready
  784 |     }
  785 |     
  786 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, score));
  787 | }
  788 | 
  789 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  790 | //| Update Module Status                                             |
  791 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  792 | void CModuleIntegrator::UpdateModuleStatus(const string& moduleName, ENUM_MODULE_STATUS status, const string& message = "") {
  793 |     int index = FindModuleIndex(moduleName);
  794 |     if (index >= 0) {
  795 |         m_ModuleStatus[index].status = status;
  796 |         m_ModuleStatus[index].isConnected = (status == MODULE_READY);
  797 |         m_ModuleStatus[index].lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  798 |         m_ModuleStatus[index].errorMessage = message;
  799 |         
  800 |         LogIntegrationEvent(StringFormat("Module %s: %s - %s", 
  801 |             moduleName, StatusToString(status), message), 
  802 |             (status == MODULE_ERROR) ? LOG_LEVEL_ERROR : LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  803 |     }
  804 | }
  805 | 
  806 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  807 | //| Find Module Index                                                |
  808 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  809 | int CModuleIntegrator::FindModuleIndex(const string& moduleName) {
  810 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ModuleCount; i++) {
  811 |         if (m_ModuleStatus[i].moduleName == moduleName) {
  812 |             return i;
  813 |         }
  814 |     }
  815 |     return -1;
  816 | }
  817 | 
  818 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  819 | //| Get Integration Health                                           |
  820 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  821 | SIntegrationHealth CModuleIntegrator::GetIntegrationHealth() {
  822 |     // Update health if needed
  823 |     if (TimeCurrent() - m_Health.lastHealthCheck > HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL) {
  824 |         PerformHealthCheck();
  825 |     }
  826 |     
  827 |     return m_Health;
  828 | }
  829 | 
  830 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  831 | //| Get Integration Summary                                          |
  832 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  833 | string CModuleIntegrator::GetIntegrationSummary() {
  834 |     SIntegrationHealth health = GetIntegrationHealth();
  835 |     
  836 |     string summary = "=== INTEGRATION SUMMARY ===\n";
  837 |     summary += StringFormat("Status: %s\n", IntegrationStatusToString(health.overallStatus));
  838 |     summary += StringFormat("Health Score: %.1f%%\n", health.healthScore * 100);
  839 |     summary += StringFormat("Modules: %d/%d Ready, %d Errors\n", 
  840 |         health.readyModules, health.totalModules, health.errorModules);
  841 |     summary += StringFormat("Can Trade: %s\n", health.canTrade ? "Yes" : "No");
  842 |     summary += StringFormat("Message: %s\n", health.statusMessage);
  843 |     summary += "========================\n";
  844 |     
  845 |     return summary;
  846 | }
  847 | 
  848 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  849 | //| Status to String                                                 |
  850 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  851 | string CModuleIntegrator::StatusToString(ENUM_MODULE_STATUS status) {
  852 |     switch (status) {
  853 |         case MODULE_UNINITIALIZED: return "UNINITIALIZED";
  854 |         case MODULE_INITIALIZING: return "INITIALIZING";
  855 |         case MODULE_READY: return "READY";
  856 |         case MODULE_ERROR: return "ERROR";
  857 |         case MODULE_DISABLED: return "DISABLED";
  858 |         default: return "UNKNOWN";
  859 |     }
  860 | }
  861 | 
  862 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  863 | //| Integration Status to String                                     |
  864 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  865 | string CModuleIntegrator::IntegrationStatusToString(ENUM_INTEGRATION_STATUS status) {
  866 |     switch (status) {
  867 |         case INTEGRATION_UNINITIALIZED: return "UNINITIALIZED";
  868 |         case INTEGRATION_INITIALIZING: return "INITIALIZING";
  869 |         case INTEGRATION_PARTIAL: return "PARTIAL";
  870 |         case INTEGRATION_COMPLETE: return "COMPLETE";
  871 |         case INTEGRATION_ERROR: return "ERROR";
  872 |         case INTEGRATION_DISCONNECTED: return "DISCONNECTED";
  873 |         default: return "UNKNOWN";
  874 |     }
  875 | }
  876 | 
  877 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  878 | //| Log Integration Event                                            |
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | void CModuleIntegrator::LogIntegrationEvent(const string& event, ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  881 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  882 |         switch(level) {
  883 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  884 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  885 |                 break;
  886 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  887 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  888 |                 break;
  889 |             default:
  890 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  891 |         }
  892 |     } else {
  893 |         Print("[ModuleIntegrator] " + event);
  894 |     }
  895 | }
  896 | 
  897 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  898 | //| Reset Integration State                                          |
  899 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  900 | void CModuleIntegrator::ResetIntegrationState() {
  901 |     m_Health.Clear();
  902 |     m_IntegrationRetries = 0;
  903 |     
  904 |     // Reset all module status
  905 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ModuleCount; i++) {
  906 |         m_ModuleStatus[i].status = MODULE_UNINITIALIZED;
  907 |         m_ModuleStatus[i].isConnected = false;
  908 |         m_ModuleStatus[i].errorMessage = "";
  909 |         m_ModuleStatus[i].retryCount = 0;
  910 |     }
  911 | }
  912 | 
  913 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  914 | //| Add Dependency                                                   |
  915 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  916 | bool CModuleIntegrator::AddDependency(const string& module, const string& dependency) {
  917 |     if (m_DependencyCount >= MAX_DEPENDENCIES) {
  918 |         return false;
  919 |     }
  920 |     
  921 |     ArrayResize(m_Dependencies[m_DependencyCount], 2);
  922 |     m_Dependencies[m_DependencyCount][0] = module;
  923 |     m_Dependencies[m_DependencyCount][1] = dependency;
  924 |     m_DependencyCount++;
  925 |     
  926 |     return true;
  927 | }
  928 | 
  929 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  930 | //| Resolve Dependencies                                             |
  931 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  932 | bool CModuleIntegrator::ResolveDependencies() {
  933 |     LogIntegrationEvent("Resolving module dependencies...", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  934 |     
  935 |     bool allResolved = true;
  936 |     
  937 |     // Check each module's dependencies
  938 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ModuleCount; i++) {
  939 |         string moduleName = m_ModuleStatus[i].moduleName;
  940 |         
  941 |         // Check all dependencies for this module
  942 |         for (int j = 0; j < m_DependencyCount; j++) {
  943 |             if (m_Dependencies[j][0] == moduleName) {
  944 |                 string dependency = m_Dependencies[j][1];
  945 |                 
  946 |                 if (!IsModuleReady(dependency)) {
  947 |                     LogIntegrationEvent(StringFormat("Dependency not met: %s requires %s", 
  948 |                         moduleName, dependency), LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  949 |                     allResolved = false;
  950 |                 }
  951 |             }
  952 |         }
  953 |     }
  954 |     
  955 |     if (allResolved) {
  956 |         LogIntegrationEvent("All dependencies resolved", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  957 |     } else {
  958 |         LogIntegrationEvent("Some dependencies not resolved", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  959 |     }
  960 |     
  961 |     return allResolved;
  962 | }
  963 | 
  964 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  965 | //| Is Module Ready                                                  |
  966 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  967 | bool CModuleIntegrator::IsModuleReady(const string& moduleName) {
  968 |     int index = FindModuleIndex(moduleName);
  969 |     if (index >= 0) {
  970 |         return (m_ModuleStatus[index].status == MODULE_READY);
  971 |     }
  972 |     return false;
  973 | }
  974 | 
  975 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  976 | //| Can Execute Trades                                               |
  977 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  978 | bool CModuleIntegrator::CanExecuteTrades() {
  979 |     SIntegrationHealth health = GetIntegrationHealth();
  980 |     return health.canTrade;
  981 | }
  982 |

  985 | #endif // MODULE_INTEGRATOR_MQH_

   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| CLogger - Advanced Logging System                               |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | class CLogger {
   17 | private:
   18 |     EAContext*            m_pContext;           // Reference to EA context
   19 |     bool                  m_bInitialized;      // Initialization status
   20 |     int                   m_iLogFileHandle;    // CSV log file handle
   21 |     string                m_sLogFileName;      // Current log file name
   22 |     datetime              m_dtLastLogTime;     // Last log timestamp
   23 |     int                   m_iLogCount;         // Number of logs written
   24 |     
   25 |     // Performance optimization
   26 |     string                m_sLogBuffer;        // Buffer for batch writing
   27 |     int                   m_iBufferSize;       // Current buffer size
   28 |     static const int      MAX_BUFFER_SIZE = 1024; // Max buffer size
   29 |     
   30 | public:
   31 |     //--- Constructor/Destructor ---
   32 |     CLogger();
   33 |     ~CLogger();
   34 |     
   35 |     //--- Core Methods ---
   36 |     bool                  Initialize(EAContext* context);
   37 |     void                  Deinitialize();
   38 |     bool                  IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
   39 |     
   40 |     //--- Logging Methods ---
   41 |     void                  LogInfo(const string& message, const string& function = "");
   42 |     void                  LogWarning(const string& message, const string& function = "");
   43 |     void                  LogError(const string& message, const string& function = "");
   44 |     void                  LogDebug(const string& message, const string& function = "");
   45 |     void                  LogTrade(const string& message, const string& function = "");
   46 |     
   47 |     //--- Specialized Logging ---
   48 |     void                  LogTradeOpen(const string& symbol, const int ticket, const double volume, const double price, const string& comment = "");
   49 |     void                  LogTradeClose(const string& symbol, const int ticket, const double volume, const double price, const double profit, const string& comment = "");
   50 |     void                  LogSignal(const string& signal_type, const string& symbol, const double confidence, const string& details = "");
   51 |     void                  LogRiskEvent(const string& event_type, const string& details, const double risk_level = 0.0);
   52 |     void                  LogPerformance(const string& metric, const double value, const string& details = "");
   53 |     void                  OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans, const MqlTradeRequest& request, const MqlTradeResult& result);
   54 | 
   55 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
   56 |     void                  FlushBuffer();       // Force write buffer to file
   57 |     void                  RotateLogFile();     // Create new log file
   58 |     string                GetLogStats();       // Get logging statistics
   59 |     
   60 | private:
   61 |     //--- Internal Methods ---
   62 |     void                  WriteLog(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string& message, const string& function);
   63 |     string                FormatLogEntry(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string& message, const string& function);
   64 |     string                GetLogLevelString(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level);
   65 |     bool                  ShouldLog(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level);
   66 |     void                  WriteToTerminal(const string& formatted_message, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level);
   67 |     void                  WriteToFile(const string& formatted_message);
   68 |     void                  WriteToBuffer(const string& formatted_message);
   69 |     string                GenerateLogFileName();
   70 |     bool                  OpenLogFile();
   71 |     void                  CloseLogFile();
   72 | };

   74 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   75 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   76 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   77 | CLogger::CLogger() {
   78 |     m_pContext = NULL;
   79 |     m_bInitialized = false;
   80 |     m_iLogFileHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   81 |     m_sLogFileName = "";
   82 |     m_dtLastLogTime = 0;
   83 |     m_iLogCount = 0;
   84 |     m_sLogBuffer = "";
   85 |     m_iBufferSize = 0;
   86 | }
   87 | 
   88 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   89 | //| Destructor                                                       |
   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | CLogger::~CLogger() {
   92 |     Deinitialize();
   93 | }
   94 | 
   95 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   96 | //| Initialize                                                       |
   97 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   98 | bool CLogger::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
   99 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  100 |         return true;
  101 |     }
  102 |     
  103 |     m_pContext = context;
  104 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  105 |         Print("[LOGGER ERROR] Context is NULL");
  106 |         return false;
  107 |     }
  108 |     
  109 |     // Generate log file name
  110 |     m_sLogFileName = GenerateLogFileName();
  111 |     
  112 |     // Open log file if CSV output is enabled
  113 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.LogOutput == LOG_OUTPUT_CSV || m_pContext->Inputs.LogOutput == LOG_OUTPUT_BOTH) {
  114 |         if (!OpenLogFile()) {
  115 |             Print("[LOGGER ERROR] Failed to open log file: ", m_sLogFileName);
  116 |             return false;
  117 |         }
  118 |     }
  119 |     
  120 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  121 |     
  122 |     // Log initialization
  123 |     LogInfo("Logger initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  124 |     LogInfo(StringFormat("Log Level: %s", GetLogLevelString(m_pContext->Inputs.LogLevel)), __FUNCTION__);
  125 |         LogInfo(StringFormat("Log Output: %d", (int)m_pContext->Inputs.LogOutput), __FUNCTION__);
  126 |     
  127 |     return true;
  128 | }
  129 | 
  130 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  131 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  132 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  133 | void CLogger::Deinitialize() {
  134 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  135 |         return;
  136 |     }
  137 |     
  138 |     LogInfo(StringFormat("Logger shutting down. Total logs written: %d", m_iLogCount), __FUNCTION__);
  139 |     
  140 |     // Flush any remaining buffer
  141 |     FlushBuffer();
  142 |     
  143 |     // Close log file
  144 |     CloseLogFile();
  145 |     
  146 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  147 | }
  148 | 
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | //| Log Methods                                                      |
  151 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  152 | void CLogger::LogInfo(const string& message, const string& function = "") {
  153 |     WriteLog(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, message, function);
  154 | }
  155 | 
  156 | void CLogger::LogWarning(const string& message, const string& function = "") {
  157 |     WriteLog(LOG_LEVEL_WARNING, message, function);
  158 | }
  159 | 
  160 | void CLogger::LogError(const string& message, const string& function = "") {
  161 |     WriteLog(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, message, function);
  162 | }
  163 | 
  164 | void CLogger::LogDebug(const string& message, const string& function = "") {
  165 |     WriteLog(LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG, message, function);
  166 | }
  167 | 
  168 | void CLogger::LogTrade(const string& message, const string& function = "") {
  169 |     WriteLog(LOG_LEVEL_TRADE, message, function);
  170 | }
  171 | 
  172 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  173 | //| Specialized Logging Methods                                      |
  174 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  175 | void CLogger::LogTradeOpen(const string& symbol, const int ticket, const double volume, const double price, const string& comment = "") {
  176 |     string message = StringFormat("TRADE OPEN: %s | Ticket: %d | Volume: %.2f | Price: %.5f | Comment: %s", 
  177 |                                   symbol, ticket, volume, price, comment);
  178 |     LogTrade(message, __FUNCTION__);
  179 | }
  180 |

  182 |     string message = StringFormat("TRADE CLOSE: %s | Ticket: %d | Volume: %.2f | Price: %.5f | Profit: %.2f | Comment: %s", 
  183 |                                   symbol, ticket, volume, price, profit, comment);
  184 |     LogTrade(message, __FUNCTION__);

  189 |                                   signal_type, symbol, confidence * 100, details);

  195 |                                   event_type, risk_level * 100, details);
  196 |     LogWarning(message, __FUNCTION__);
