  201 |     LogInfo(message, __FUNCTION__);
  202 | }
  203 | 
  204 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  205 | //| Core Logging Method                                              |
  206 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  207 | void CLogger::WriteLog(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string& message, const string& function) {
  208 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !ShouldLog(level)) {
  209 |         return;
  210 |     }
  211 |     
  212 |     string formatted_message = FormatLogEntry(level, message, function);
  213 |     
  214 |     // Write to terminal if enabled
  215 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.LogOutput == LOG_OUTPUT_TERMINAL || m_pContext->Inputs.LogOutput == LOG_OUTPUT_BOTH) {
  216 |         WriteToTerminal(formatted_message, level);
  217 |     }
  218 |     
  219 |     // Write to file if enabled
  220 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.LogOutput == LOG_OUTPUT_CSV || m_pContext->Inputs.LogOutput == LOG_OUTPUT_BOTH) {
  221 |         WriteToFile(formatted_message);
  222 |     }
  223 |     
  224 |     m_iLogCount++;
  225 |     m_dtLastLogTime = TimeCurrent();
  226 | }
  227 | 
  228 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  229 | //| Format Log Entry                                                 |
  230 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  231 | string CLogger::FormatLogEntry(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string& message, const string& function) {
  232 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  233 |     string time_str = TimeToString(current_time, TIME_DATE | TIME_SECONDS);
  234 |     string level_str = GetLogLevelString(level);
  235 |     string func_str = (function != "") ? StringFormat(" [%s]", function) : "";
  236 |     
  237 |     return StringFormat("%s | %s%s | %s", time_str, level_str, func_str, message);
  238 | }
  239 | 
  240 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  241 | //| Get Log Level String                                             |
  242 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  243 | string CLogger::GetLogLevelString(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  244 |     switch(level) {
  245 |         case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:   return "ERROR";
  246 |         case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING: return "WARN ";
  247 |         case LOG_LEVEL_INFO:    return "INFO ";
  248 |         case LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG:   return "DEBUG";
  249 |         case LOG_LEVEL_TRADE:   return "TRADE";
  250 |         default:                return "UNKN ";
  251 |     }
  252 | }
  253 | 
  254 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  255 | //| Should Log                                                       |
  256 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  257 | bool CLogger::ShouldLog(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  258 |     return (level <= m_pContext->Inputs.LogLevel);
  259 | }
  260 | 
  261 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  262 | //| Write to Terminal                                                |
  263 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  264 | void CLogger::WriteToTerminal(const string& formatted_message, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  265 |     // Use different Print functions based on log level
  266 |     switch(level) {
  267 |         case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  268 |             Print("❌ ", formatted_message);
  269 |             break;
  270 |         case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  271 |             Print("⚠️ ", formatted_message);
  272 |             break;
  273 |         case LOG_LEVEL_TRADE:
  274 |             Print("💰 ", formatted_message);
  275 |             break;
  276 |         default:
  277 |             Print(formatted_message);
  278 |             break;
  279 |     }
  280 | }
  281 | 
  282 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  283 | //| Write to File                                                    |
  284 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  285 | void CLogger::WriteToFile(const string& formatted_message) {
  286 |     if (m_iLogFileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  287 |         return;
  288 |     }
  289 |     
  290 |     // Use buffering for better performance
  291 |     WriteToBuffer(formatted_message + "\n");
  292 |     
  293 |     // Flush buffer if it's getting full or on important messages
  294 |     if (m_iBufferSize >= MAX_BUFFER_SIZE) {
  295 |         FlushBuffer();
  296 |     }
  297 | }
  298 | 
  299 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  300 | //| Write to Buffer                                                  |
  301 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  302 | void CLogger::WriteToBuffer(const string& message) {
  303 |     m_sLogBuffer += message;
  304 |     m_iBufferSize += StringLen(message);
  305 | }
  306 | 
  307 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  308 | //| Flush Buffer                                                     |
  309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 | void CLogger::FlushBuffer() {
  311 |     if (m_iLogFileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || m_sLogBuffer == "") {
  312 |         return;
  313 |     }
  314 |     
  315 |     FileWriteString(m_iLogFileHandle, m_sLogBuffer);
  316 |     FileFlush(m_iLogFileHandle);
  317 |     
  318 |     m_sLogBuffer = "";
  319 |     m_iBufferSize = 0;
  320 | }
  321 | 
  322 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 | //| Generate Log File Name                                           |
  324 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  325 | string CLogger::GenerateLogFileName() {
  326 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  327 |     string date_str = TimeToString(current_time, TIME_DATE);
  328 |     StringReplace(date_str, ".", "-");
  329 |     
  330 |     string filename = m_pContext->Inputs.CsvLogFilename;
  331 |     if (filename == "") {
  332 |         filename = StringFormat("APEX_Pullback_EA_v5_%s.csv", date_str);
  333 |     }
  334 |     
  335 |     return filename;
  336 | }
  337 | 
  338 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | //| Open Log File                                                    |
  340 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  341 | bool CLogger::OpenLogFile() {
  342 |     m_iLogFileHandle = FileOpen(m_sLogFileName, FILE_WRITE | FILE_CSV | FILE_ANSI);
  343 |     
  344 |     if (m_iLogFileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  345 |         return false;
  346 |     }
  347 |     
  348 |     // Write CSV header
  349 |     string header = "Timestamp,Level,Function,Message";
  350 |     FileWriteString(m_iLogFileHandle, header + "\n");
  351 |     FileFlush(m_iLogFileHandle);
  352 |     
  353 |     return true;
  354 | }
  355 | 
  356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 | //| Close Log File                                                   |
  358 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  359 | void CLogger::CloseLogFile() {
  360 |     if (m_iLogFileHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  361 |         FileClose(m_iLogFileHandle);
  362 |         m_iLogFileHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  363 |     }
  364 | }
  365 | 
  366 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 | //| Get Log Stats                                                    |
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | string CLogger::GetLogStats() {
  370 |     return StringFormat("Logs: %d | Last: %s | File: %s", 
  371 |                         m_iLogCount, 
  372 |                         TimeToString(m_dtLastLogTime, TIME_SECONDS),
  373 |                         m_sLogFileName);
  374 | }
  375 | 
  376 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  377 | //| OnTradeTransaction                                               |
  378 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  379 | void CLogger::OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans, const MqlTradeRequest& request, const MqlTradeResult& result) {
  380 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !ShouldLog(LOG_LEVEL_TRADE)) {
  381 |         return;
  382 |     }
  383 | 
  384 |     string msg = StringFormat("TRADE_TRANSACTION: Type=%s, Order=%d, Position=%d, Symbol=%s, Price=%.5f, Volume=%.2f, Result=%d (%s)",
  385 |                               EnumToString(trans.type),
  386 |                               trans.order,
  387 |                               trans.position,
  388 |                               trans.symbol,
  389 |                               trans.price,
  390 |                               trans.volume,
  391 |                               result.retcode,
  392 |                               result.comment);
  393 |     LogTrade(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  394 | }
  395 | 
  396 | #endif // LOGGER_MQH_

   24 | //| handling, and server time synchronization.                       |
   25 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   26 | class CTimeManager {
   27 | private:
   28 |     EAContext* m_context;           // Pointer to the global EA context
   29 |     CLogger*   m_logger;            // Pointer to the logger
   30 |     bool       m_initialized;       // Initialization status
   31 | 
   32 |     // --- Time Settings ---
   33 |     datetime   m_server_time_utc;   // Last known server time in UTC
   34 |     long       m_server_utc_offset; // Server UTC offset in seconds
   35 |     datetime   m_last_tick_time;    // Time of the last received tick
   36 | 
   37 |     // --- Session Management ---
   38 |     bool       m_trading_allowed;   // Is trading currently allowed by time settings
   39 |     // ... more session parameters like StartHour, EndHour etc. can be added
   40 | 
   41 |     // Internal helper to get the logger from the context
   42 |     void GetLogger();

   44 | public:
   45 |     // --- Constructor / Destructor ---
   46 |     CTimeManager();
   47 |     ~CTimeManager();
   48 |

   50 |     bool Initialize(EAContext &context);
   51 |     void Deinitialize();
   52 | 
   53 |     // --- Core Methods ---
   54 |     void Update(); // Called on each tick or timer event to update time state
   55 |     bool IsTradingAllowed() const; // Checks if current time is within allowed trading hours
   56 |     bool IsWeekend(datetime time) const; // Checks if the given time is a weekend
   57 | 
   58 |     // --- Time Getters ---
   59 |     datetime GetServerTime() const; // Gets the current server time
   60 |     datetime GetUTCTime() const;    // Gets the current UTC time
   61 |     long     GetServerUTCOffset() const { return m_server_utc_offset; }

   85 | }

   87 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   88 | //| Initialize                                                       |
   89 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   90 | bool CTimeManager::Initialize(EAContext &context) {
   91 |     m_context = &context;
   92 |     GetLogger();
   93 | 
   94 |     if (m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo("Initializing TimeManager...", __FUNCTION__);
   95 | 
   96 |     m_server_utc_offset = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TIME_GMT_OFFSET);
   97 |     Update();
   98 | 
   99 |     m_initialized = true;
  100 |     if (m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("TimeManager Initialized. Server UTC Offset: %d hours.", (int)(m_server_utc_offset / 3600)), __FUNCTION__);
  101 |     return true;
  102 | }

  104 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  107 | void CTimeManager::Deinitialize() {

  109 | 
  110 |     if (m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo("Deinitializing TimeManager...", __FUNCTION__);
  111 |

  113 |     m_logger = NULL;
  114 |     m_initialized = false;
  115 | }
  116 | 
  117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 | //| Update                                                           |
  119 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  120 | void CTimeManager::Update() {
  121 |     if (!m_initialized || m_context == NULL) return;
  122 | 
  123 |     m_server_time_utc = m_context->MarketState.ServerTime;
  124 |     m_last_tick_time = m_server_time_utc;
  125 | 
  126 |     // Basic check to disallow trading on weekends
  127 |     if (IsWeekend(m_server_time_utc)) {
  128 |         if (m_trading_allowed) {
  129 |             if (m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo("Weekend detected. Trading disabled.", __FUNCTION__);
  130 |             m_trading_allowed = false;
  131 |         }
  132 |     } else {
  133 |         // Potentially re-enable trading if it was disabled for the weekend
  134 |         if (!m_trading_allowed) {
  135 |              if (m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo("Trading week started. Trading enabled.", __FUNCTION__);
  136 |              m_trading_allowed = true;
  137 |         }
  138 |     }
  139 |     // More complex session logic would go here
  140 | }
  141 | 
  142 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  143 | //| IsTradingAllowed                                                 |
  144 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  145 | bool CTimeManager::IsTradingAllowed() const {
  146 |     // This can be expanded with session times, news filters, etc.
  147 |     return m_trading_allowed;
  148 | }
  149 | 
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | //| IsWeekend                                                        |
  152 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  153 | bool CTimeManager::IsWeekend(datetime time) const {
  154 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  155 |     TimeToStruct(time, dt);
  156 |     // Saturday = 6, Sunday = 0
  157 |     return (dt.day_of_week == 0 || dt.day_of_week == 6);
  158 | }
  159 | 
  160 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  161 | //| GetServerTime                                                    |
  162 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  163 | datetime CTimeManager::GetServerTime() const {
  164 |     return m_server_time_utc;
  165 | }
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| GetUTCTime                                                       |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | datetime CTimeManager::GetUTCTime() const {
  171 |     return m_server_time_utc - m_server_utc_offset;
  172 | }

  179 |         m_logger = m_context->pLogger;
  180 |     }

    4 | //|      Description: Advanced indicator management system with     |
    5 | //|                   intelligent caching, multi-timeframe         |
    6 | //|                   support, and performance optimization.        |
    7 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    8 | 
    9 | #ifndef INDICATOR_MANAGER_MQH_
   10 | #define INDICATOR_MANAGER_MQH_
   11 | 
   12 | #include "..\..\00_Core\CommonStructs.mqh"
   13 | 
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| Indicator Types                                                  |
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | enum ENUM_INDICATOR_TYPE {
   18 |     INDICATOR_MA,           // Moving Average
   19 |     INDICATOR_RSI,          // Relative Strength Index
   20 |     INDICATOR_MACD,         // MACD
   21 |     INDICATOR_BOLLINGER,    // Bollinger Bands
   22 |     INDICATOR_STOCHASTIC,   // Stochastic
   23 |     INDICATOR_ATR,          // Average True Range
   24 |     INDICATOR_ADX,          // Average Directional Index
   25 |     INDICATOR_CCI,          // Commodity Channel Index
   26 |     INDICATOR_WILLIAMS,     // Williams %R
   27 |     INDICATOR_MOMENTUM,     // Momentum
   28 |     INDICATOR_CUSTOM        // Custom indicator
   29 | };
   30 | 
   31 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   32 | //| Indicator Status                                                 |
   33 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   34 | enum ENUM_INDICATOR_STATUS {
   35 |     INDICATOR_STATUS_UNINITIALIZED,
   36 |     INDICATOR_STATUS_INITIALIZING,
   37 |     INDICATOR_STATUS_READY,
   38 |     INDICATOR_STATUS_ERROR,
   39 |     INDICATOR_STATUS_UPDATING
   40 | };
   41 | 
   42 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   43 | //| Indicator Configuration                                          |
   44 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   45 | struct SIndicatorConfig {
   46 |     ENUM_INDICATOR_TYPE   Type;             // Indicator type
   47 |     string                Name;             // Indicator name
   48 |     string                Symbol;           // Symbol
   49 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES       Timeframe;        // Timeframe
   50 |     int                   Period;           // Main period
   51 |     int                   Period2;          // Secondary period (for MACD, etc.)
   52 |     int                   Period3;          // Third period (for MACD signal)
   53 |     ENUM_MA_METHOD        MAMethod;         // Moving average method
   54 |     ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE    AppliedPrice;     // Applied price
   55 |     double                Deviation;        // Deviation (for Bollinger)
   56 |     int                   Shift;            // Shift
   57 |     string                CustomPath;       // Custom indicator path
   58 |     bool                  UseCache;         // Use caching
   59 |     int                   CacheSize;        // Cache size
   60 |     int                   UpdateInterval;   // Update interval in seconds
   61 | };
   62 | 
   63 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   64 | //| Indicator Data                                                   |
   65 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   66 | struct SIndicatorData {
   67 |     datetime              Time[];           // Time array
   68 |     double                Buffer0[];        // Main buffer
   69 |     double                Buffer1[];        // Secondary buffer
   70 |     double                Buffer2[];        // Third buffer
   71 |     double                Buffer3[];        // Fourth buffer
   72 |     int                   BufferCount;      // Number of buffers
   73 |     int                   DataCount;        // Data count
   74 |     datetime              LastUpdate;       // Last update time
   75 |     bool                  IsValid;          // Data validity
   76 | };
   77 | 
   78 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 | //| Indicator Instance                                               |
   80 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 | struct SIndicatorInstance {
   82 |     SIndicatorConfig      Config;           // Configuration
   83 |     SIndicatorData        Data;             // Cached data
   84 |     int                   Handle;           // Indicator handle
   85 |     ENUM_INDICATOR_STATUS Status;           // Current status
   86 |     datetime              LastAccess;       // Last access time
   87 |     int                   AccessCount;      // Access counter
   88 |     string                ErrorMessage;     // Last error message
   89 |     bool                  AutoUpdate;       // Auto update flag
   90 | };
   91 | 
   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | //| Indicator Statistics                                             |
   94 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   95 | struct SIndicatorStats {
   96 |     int                   TotalIndicators;  // Total indicators
   97 |     int                   ActiveIndicators; // Active indicators
   98 |     int                   CachedValues;     // Cached values
   99 |     int                   CacheHits;        // Cache hits
  100 |     int                   CacheMisses;      // Cache misses
  101 |     double                CacheHitRatio;    // Cache hit ratio
  102 |     int                   UpdatesPerSecond; // Updates per second
  103 |     datetime              LastStatsUpdate;  // Last statistics update
  104 | };
  105 | 
  106 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  107 | //| Indicator Cache Entry Structure                                  |
  108 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 | struct SIndicatorCacheEntry {
  110 |     double               values[1000];      // Cached values (circular buffer)
  111 |     datetime             timestamps[1000];   // Corresponding timestamps
  112 |     int                  head;              // Head position in circular buffer
  113 |     int                  size;              // Current size of cache
  114 |     datetime             lastUpdate;        // Last update timestamp
  115 |     bool                 isValid;           // Cache validity flag
  116 |     
  117 |     void Clear() {
  118 |         ArrayInitialize(values, 0.0);
  119 |         ArrayInitialize(timestamps, 0);
  120 |         head = 0;
  121 |         size = 0;
  122 |         lastUpdate = 0;
  123 |         isValid = false;
  124 |     }
  125 |     
  126 |     void AddValue(double value, datetime time) {
  127 |         values[head] = value;
  128 |         timestamps[head] = time;
  129 |         head = (head + 1) % 1000;
  130 |         if (size < 1000) size++;
  131 |         lastUpdate = time;
  132 |         isValid = true;
  133 |     }
  134 |     
  135 |     bool GetValue(int shift, double& value, datetime& time) {
  136 |         if (!isValid || shift >= size) return false;
  137 |         
  138 |         int index = (head - 1 - shift + 1000) % 1000;
  139 |         value = values[index];
  140 |         time = timestamps[index];
  141 |         return true;
  142 |     }
  143 | };
  144 | 
  145 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  146 | //| Indicator Definition Structure                                   |
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | struct SIndicatorDefinition {
  149 |     string               name;              // Indicator name
  150 |     int                  handle;            // MT5 indicator handle
  151 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES      timeframe;         // Timeframe
  152 |     int                  period;            // Period parameter
  153 |     string               symbol;            // Symbol
  154 |     bool                 isActive;          // Active status
  155 |     datetime             lastAccess;        // Last access time
  156 |     SIndicatorCacheEntry cache;             // Cache for this indicator
  157 |     
  158 |     void Clear() {
  159 |         name = "";
  160 |         handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  161 |         timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  162 |         period = 0;
  163 |         symbol = "";
  164 |         isActive = false;
  165 |         lastAccess = 0;
  166 |         cache.Clear();
  167 |     }
  168 | };
  169 | 
  170 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  171 | //| CIndicatorManager - Advanced Indicator Management               |
  172 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  173 | class CIndicatorManager {
  174 | private:
  175 |     EAContext*            m_pContext;       // Reference to EA context
  176 |     bool                  m_bInitialized;  // Initialization status
  177 |     
  178 |     // Indicator storage
  179 |     SIndicatorDefinition  m_Indicators[50];   // Array of managed indicators
  180 |     int                   m_iIndicatorCount; // Number of active indicators
  181 |     
  182 |     // Cache management
  183 |     bool                  m_bCacheEnabled;   // Cache enable flag
  184 |     int                   m_iCacheSize;      // Maximum cache size per indicator
  185 |     datetime              m_dtCacheTimeout;  // Cache timeout (seconds)
  186 |     
  187 |     // Performance metrics
  188 |     int                   m_iCacheHits;      // Cache hit counter
  189 |     int                   m_iCacheMisses;    // Cache miss counter
  190 |     int                   m_iTotalRequests;  // Total requests counter
  191 |     
  192 |     // Performance tracking
  193 |     SIndicatorStats       m_Stats;          // Statistics
  194 |     datetime              m_LastCleanup;    // Last cleanup time
  195 |     
  196 |     // Configuration
  197 |     static const int      MAX_INDICATORS;
  198 |     static const int      DEFAULT_CACHE_SIZE;
  199 |     static const int      CLEANUP_INTERVAL;
  200 |     static const int      MAX_CACHE_AGE;
  201 |     
  202 | public:
  203 |     //--- Constructor/Destructor ---
  204 |     CIndicatorManager();
  205 |     ~CIndicatorManager();
  206 |     
  207 |     //--- Core Methods ---
  208 |     bool                  Initialize(EAContext* context);
  209 |     void                  Deinitialize();
  210 |     bool                  IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  211 |     void                  Update();
  212 |     
  213 |     //--- Indicator Management ---
  214 |     int                   CreateIndicator(const SIndicatorConfig& config);
  215 |     bool                  RemoveIndicator(const int indicator_id);
  216 |     bool                  IsIndicatorReady(const int indicator_id);
  217 |     ENUM_INDICATOR_STATUS GetIndicatorStatus(const int indicator_id);
  218 |     
  219 |     //--- Standard Indicators ---
  220 |     int                   CreateMA(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  221 |                                    const int period, const ENUM_MA_METHOD method = MODE_SMA,
  222 |                                    const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE);
  223 |     
  224 |     int                   CreateRSI(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  225 |                                     const int period, const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE);
  226 |     
  227 |     int                   CreateMACD(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  228 |                                      const int fast_period, const int slow_period, const int signal_period,
  229 |                                      const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE);
  230 |     
  231 |     int                   CreateBollinger(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  232 |                                            const int period, const double deviation = 2.0,
  233 |                                            const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE);
  234 |     
  235 |     int                   CreateATR(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  236 |                                     const int period);
  237 |     
  238 |     int                   CreateStochastic(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  239 |                                             const int k_period, const int d_period, const int slowing);
  240 |     
  241 |     int                   CreateADX(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  242 |                                     const int period);
  243 |     
  244 |     //--- Data Access ---
  245 |     double                GetValue(const int indicator_id, const int buffer = 0, const int shift = 0);
  246 |     bool                  GetValues(const int indicator_id, const int buffer, const int start_pos,
  247 |                                     const int count, double& values[]);
  248 |     
  249 |     datetime              GetTime(const int indicator_id, const int shift = 0);
  250 |     bool                  GetTimes(const int indicator_id, const int start_pos, const int count,
  251 |                                    datetime& times[]);
  252 |     
  253 |     //--- Multi-buffer Access ---
  254 |     bool                  GetMACD(const int indicator_id, const int shift, double& main, double& signal);
  255 |     bool                  GetBollinger(const int indicator_id, const int shift, double& upper,
  256 |                                        double& middle, double& lower);
  257 |     bool                  GetStochastic(const int indicator_id, const int shift, double& main, double& signal);
  258 |     bool                  GetADX(const int indicator_id, const int shift, double& adx, double& plus_di, double& minus_di);
  259 |     
  260 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
  261 |     bool                  IsDataReady(const int indicator_id, const int required_bars = 1);
  262 |     int                   GetDataCount(const int indicator_id);
  263 |     datetime              GetLastUpdate(const int indicator_id);
  264 |     
  265 |     //--- Cache Management ---
  266 |     void                  ClearCache(const int indicator_id = -1);
  267 |     void                  OptimizeCache();
  268 |     bool                  PreloadData(const int indicator_id, const int bars_count);
  269 |     
  270 |     //--- Configuration ---
  271 |     bool                  SetUpdateInterval(const int indicator_id, const int interval_seconds);
  272 |     bool                  SetCacheSize(const int indicator_id, const int cache_size);
  273 | 
  274 |     bool                  SetAutoUpdate(const int indicator_id, const bool auto_update);
  275 |     
  276 |     //--- Statistics ---
  277 |     SIndicatorStats       GetStatistics() const { return m_Stats; }
  278 |     void                  ResetStatistics();
  279 |     string                GetPerformanceReport();
  280 |     
  281 |     //--- Information ---
  282 |     int                   GetIndicatorCount() const { return m_iIndicatorCount; }
  283 |     string                GetIndicatorInfo(const int indicator_id);
  284 |     string                GetSystemSummary();
  285 |     
  286 | private:
  287 |     //--- Internal Methods ---
  288 |     int                   FindFreeSlot();
  289 |     bool                  ValidateConfig(const SIndicatorConfig& config);
  290 |     bool                  InitializeIndicator(const int indicator_id);
  291 |     void                  UpdateIndicator(const int indicator_id);
  292 |     bool                  LoadIndicatorData(const int indicator_id, const int bars_count = 100);
  293 |     
  294 |     //--- Cache Methods ---
  295 |     bool                  IsCacheValid(const int indicator_id);
  296 |     void                  InvalidateCache(const int indicator_id);
  297 |     void                  UpdateCache(const int indicator_id);
  298 |     void                  CleanupOldCache();
  299 |     
  300 |     //--- Utility ---
  301 |     string                IndicatorTypeToString(const ENUM_INDICATOR_TYPE type);
  302 |     string                StatusToString(const ENUM_INDICATOR_STATUS status);
  303 |     void                  LogIndicatorEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  304 |     void                  UpdateStatistics();
  305 |     
  306 |     //--- Error Handling ---
  307 |     void                  HandleIndicatorError(const int indicator_id, const string& error_msg);
  308 |     bool                  RecoverIndicator(const int indicator_id);
  309 |     
  310 |     //--- Cache Methods ---
  311 |     bool                  GetCachedValue(int indicator_id, int buffer_num, int shift, double& value);
  312 |     void                  CacheValue(int indicator_id, int buffer_num, int shift, double value);
  313 |     void                  UpdateCacheStats(bool hit);
  314 | };
  315 | 
  316 | // Static constants definition
  317 | const int CIndicatorManager::MAX_INDICATORS = 50;
  318 | const int CIndicatorManager::DEFAULT_CACHE_SIZE = 1000;
  319 | const int CIndicatorManager::CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 300;  // 5 minutes
  320 | const int CIndicatorManager::MAX_CACHE_AGE = 3600;    // 1 hour
  321 | 
  322 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  324 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  325 | CIndicatorManager::CIndicatorManager() {
  326 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  327 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  328 |     m_iIndicatorCount = 0;
  329 |     
  330 |     // Cache settings
  331 |     m_bCacheEnabled = true;
  332 |     m_iCacheSize = 100;      // Default cache size
  333 |     m_dtCacheTimeout = 300;  // 5 minutes default timeout
  334 |     
  335 |     // Performance stats
  336 |     m_iCacheHits = 0;
  337 |     m_iCacheMisses = 0;
  338 |     m_iTotalRequests = 0;
  339 |     
  340 |     // Initialize indicator array
  341 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Indicators); i++) {
  342 |         m_Indicators[i].Clear();
  343 |     }
  344 |     
  345 |     // Initialize statistics
  346 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  347 |     
  348 |     // Initialize all slots
  349 |     for (int i = 0; i < MAX_INDICATORS; i++) {
  350 |         m_Indicators[i].Status = INDICATOR_STATUS_UNINITIALIZED;
  351 |     }
  352 | }
  353 | 
  354 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  355 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 | CIndicatorManager::~CIndicatorManager() {
  358 |     Deinitialize();
  359 | }
  360 | 
  361 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  362 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  363 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  364 | bool CIndicatorManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  365 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  366 |         return true;
  367 |     }
  368 |     
  369 |     m_pContext = context;
  370 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  371 |         Print("[INDICATOR_MANAGER] Context is NULL");
  372 |         return false;
  373 |     }
  374 |     
  375 |     // Initialize cache settings from input parameters
  376 |     m_bCacheEnabled = true;
  377 |     m_iCacheSize = 200;
  378 |     m_dtCacheTimeout = 600; // 10 minutes
  379 |     
  380 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  381 |     
  382 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  383 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("IndicatorManager initialized with caching enabled", __FUNCTION__);
  384 |     }
  385 |     
  386 |     return true;
  387 | }
  388 | 
  389 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  390 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  391 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  392 | void CIndicatorManager::Deinitialize() {
  393 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  394 |         return;
  395 |     }
  396 |     
  397 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  398 |         string perf_report = GetPerformanceReport();
  399 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("IndicatorManager performance: " + perf_report, __FUNCTION__);
  400 |     }
  401 |     
  402 |     ReleaseAllIndicators();
  403 |     
  404 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  405 | }
  406 | 
  407 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  408 | //| Update                                                           |
  409 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  410 | void CIndicatorManager::Update() {
  411 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  412 |         return;
  413 |     }
  414 |     
  415 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  416 |     
  417 |     // Update active indicators
  418 |     for (int i = 0; i < MAX_INDICATORS; i++) {
  419 |         if (m_Indicators[i].isActive && m_Indicators[i].handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  420 |             if (current_time - m_Indicators[i].lastAccess >= m_Indicators[i].cache.lastUpdate) {
  421 |                 UpdateIndicator(i);
  422 |             }
  423 |         }
  424 |     }
  425 |     
  426 |     // Periodic cleanup
  427 |     if (current_time - m_LastCleanup >= CLEANUP_INTERVAL) {
  428 |         CleanupOldCache();
  429 |         OptimizeCache();
  430 |         m_LastCleanup = current_time;
  431 |     }
  432 |     
  433 |     // Update statistics
  434 |     UpdateStatistics();
  435 | }
  436 | 
  437 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  438 | //| Create Indicator                                                 |
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | int CIndicatorManager::CreateIndicator(const SIndicatorConfig& config) {
  441 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  442 |         return -1;
  443 |     }
  444 |     
  445 |     // Validate configuration
  446 |     if (!ValidateConfig(config)) {
  447 |         LogIndicatorEvent("Invalid indicator configuration", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  448 |         return -1;
  449 |     }
  450 |     
  451 |     // Find free slot
  452 |     int slot = FindFreeSlot();
  453 |     if (slot == -1) {
  454 |         LogIndicatorEvent("No free slots available for new indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  455 |         return -1;
  456 |     }
  457 |     
  458 |     // Initialize indicator instance
  459 |     m_Indicators[slot].name = config.Name;
  460 |     m_Indicators[slot].handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  461 |     m_Indicators[slot].timeframe = config.Timeframe;
  462 |     m_Indicators[slot].period = config.Period;
  463 |     m_Indicators[slot].symbol = config.Symbol;
  464 |     m_Indicators[slot].isActive = true;
  465 |     m_Indicators[slot].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  466 |     m_Indicators[slot].cache.Clear();
  467 |     
  468 |     // Initialize the indicator
  469 |     if (!InitializeIndicator(slot)) {
  470 |         m_Indicators[slot].isActive = false;
  471 |         return -1;
  472 |     }
  473 |     
  474 |     m_iIndicatorCount++;
  475 |     
  476 |     LogIndicatorEvent(StringFormat("Indicator created: %s [ID: %d]", config.Name, slot), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  477 |     
  478 |     return slot;
  479 | }
  480 | 
  481 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  482 | //| Create Moving Average                                            |
  483 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  484 | int CIndicatorManager::CreateMA(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  485 |                                 const int period, const ENUM_MA_METHOD method = MODE_SMA,
  486 |                                 const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE) {
  487 |     int slot = FindFreeSlot();
  488 |     if (slot == -1) {
  489 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  490 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("No free slots for new indicator", __FUNCTION__);
  491 |         }
  492 |         return -1;
  493 |     }
  494 |     
  495 |     int handle = iMA(symbol, timeframe, period, 0, method, applied);
  496 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  497 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  498 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create MA indicator", __FUNCTION__);
  499 |         }
  500 |         return -1;
  501 |     }
  502 |     
  503 |     // Setup indicator definition
  504 |     m_Indicators[slot].name = GenerateIndicatorName("MA", symbol, timeframe, period);
  505 |     m_Indicators[slot].handle = handle;
  506 |     m_Indicators[slot].timeframe = timeframe;
  507 |     m_Indicators[slot].period = period;
  508 |     m_Indicators[slot].symbol = symbol;
  509 |     m_Indicators[slot].isActive = true;
  510 |     m_Indicators[slot].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  511 |     m_Indicators[slot].cache.Clear();
  512 |     
  513 |     m_iIndicatorCount++;
  514 |     
  515 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  516 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Created MA indicator: " + m_Indicators[slot].name, __FUNCTION__);
  517 |     }
  518 |     
  519 |     return slot;
  520 | }
  521 | 
  522 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  523 | //| Create RSI                                                       |
  524 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  525 | int CIndicatorManager::CreateRSI(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  526 |                                  const int period, const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE) {
  527 |     int slot = FindFreeSlot();
  528 |     if (slot == -1) return -1;
  529 |     
  530 |     int handle = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, period, applied);
  531 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return -1;
  532 |     
  533 |     m_Indicators[slot].name = GenerateIndicatorName("RSI", symbol, timeframe, period);
  534 |     m_Indicators[slot].handle = handle;
  535 |     m_Indicators[slot].timeframe = timeframe;
  536 |     m_Indicators[slot].period = period;
  537 |     m_Indicators[slot].symbol = symbol;
  538 |     m_Indicators[slot].isActive = true;
  539 |     m_Indicators[slot].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  540 |     m_Indicators[slot].cache.Clear();
  541 |     
  542 |     m_iIndicatorCount++;
  543 |     
  544 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  545 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Created RSI indicator: " + m_Indicators[slot].name, __FUNCTION__);
  546 |     }
  547 |     
  548 |     return slot;
  549 | }
  550 | 
  551 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  552 | //| Create MACD                                                      |
  553 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  554 | int CIndicatorManager::CreateMACD(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  555 |                                   const int fast_period, const int slow_period, const int signal_period,
  556 |                                   const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE) {
  557 |     int slot = FindFreeSlot();
  558 |     if (slot == -1) return -1;
  559 |     
  560 |     int handle = iMACD(symbol, timeframe, fast_period, slow_period, signal_period, applied);
  561 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return -1;
  562 |     
  563 |     m_Indicators[slot].name = GenerateIndicatorName("MACD", symbol, timeframe, fast_period);
  564 |     m_Indicators[slot].handle = handle;
  565 |     m_Indicators[slot].timeframe = timeframe;
  566 |     m_Indicators[slot].period = fast_period;
  567 |     m_Indicators[slot].symbol = symbol;
  568 |     m_Indicators[slot].isActive = true;
  569 |     m_Indicators[slot].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  570 |     m_Indicators[slot].cache.Clear();
  571 |     
  572 |     m_iIndicatorCount++;
  573 |     
  574 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  575 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Created MACD indicator: " + m_Indicators[slot].name, __FUNCTION__);
  576 |     }
  577 |     
  578 |     return slot;
  579 | }
  580 | 
  581 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  582 | //| Create Bollinger Bands                                          |
  583 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  584 | int CIndicatorManager::CreateBollinger(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  585 |                                         const int period, const double deviation = 2.0,
  586 |                                         const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied = PRICE_CLOSE) {
  587 |     int slot = FindFreeSlot();
  588 |     if (slot == -1) return -1;
  589 |     
  590 |     int handle = iBands(symbol, timeframe, period, 0, deviation, applied);
  591 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return -1;
  592 |     
  593 |     m_Indicators[slot].name = GenerateIndicatorName("BB", symbol, timeframe, period);
  594 |     m_Indicators[slot].handle = handle;
  595 |     m_Indicators[slot].timeframe = timeframe;
  596 |     m_Indicators[slot].period = period;
  597 |     m_Indicators[slot].symbol = symbol;
  598 |     m_Indicators[slot].isActive = true;
  599 |     m_Indicators[slot].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  600 |     m_Indicators[slot].cache.Clear();
  601 |     
  602 |     m_iIndicatorCount++;
  603 |     
  604 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  605 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Created Bollinger indicator: " + m_Indicators[slot].name, __FUNCTION__);
  606 |     }
  607 |     
  608 |     return slot;
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  612 | //| Create ATR                                                       |
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | int CIndicatorManager::CreateATR(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe,
  615 |                                  const int period) {
  616 |     int slot = FindFreeSlot();
  617 |     if (slot == -1) return -1;
  618 |     
  619 |     int handle = iATR(symbol, timeframe, period);
  620 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return -1;
  621 |     
  622 |     m_Indicators[slot].name = GenerateIndicatorName("ATR", symbol, timeframe, period);
  623 |     m_Indicators[slot].handle = handle;
  624 |     m_Indicators[slot].timeframe = timeframe;
  625 |     m_Indicators[slot].period = period;
  626 |     m_Indicators[slot].symbol = symbol;
  627 |     m_Indicators[slot].isActive = true;
  628 |     m_Indicators[slot].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  629 |     m_Indicators[slot].cache.Clear();
  630 |     
  631 |     m_iIndicatorCount++;
  632 |     
  633 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  634 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Created ATR indicator: " + m_Indicators[slot].name, __FUNCTION__);
  635 |     }
  636 |     
  637 |     return slot;
  638 | }
  639 | 
  640 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  641 | //| Get Value                                                        |
  642 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  643 | double CIndicatorManager::GetValue(const int indicator_id, const int buffer = 0, const int shift = 0) {
  644 |     if (!m_bInitialized || indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  645 |         return EMPTY_VALUE;
  646 |     }
  647 |     
  648 |     if (!m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive) {
  649 |         return EMPTY_VALUE;
  650 |     }
  651 |     
  652 |     // Update access statistics
  653 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  654 |     
  655 |     // Check cache first
  656 |     if (m_bCacheEnabled && IsCacheValid(indicator_id)) {
  657 |         double value = EMPTY_VALUE;
  658 |         if (m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.GetValue(shift, value, m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.timestamps[m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.head])) {
  659 |             m_Stats.CacheHits++;
  660 |             return value;
  661 |         }
  662 |     }
  663 |     
  664 |     // Cache miss - get from indicator
  665 |     m_Stats.CacheMisses++;
  666 |     
  667 |     double value = EMPTY_VALUE;
  668 |     int handle = m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle;
  669 |     
  670 |     if (handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  671 |         double buffer_data[];
  672 |         if (CopyBuffer(handle, buffer, shift, 1, buffer_data) > 0) {
  673 |             value = buffer_data[0];
  674 |             
  675 |             // Update cache if enabled
  676 |             if (m_bCacheEnabled) {
  677 |                 CacheValue(indicator_id, buffer, shift, value);
  678 |             }
  679 |         }
  680 |     }
  681 |     
  682 |     return value;
  683 | }
  684 | 
  685 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  686 | //| Get MACD Values                                                  |
  687 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  688 | bool CIndicatorManager::GetMACD(const int indicator_id, const int shift, double& main, double& signal) {
  689 |     if (!m_bInitialized || indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  690 |         return false;
  691 |     }
  692 |     
  693 |     if (!m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive || m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  694 |         return false;
  695 |     }
  696 |     
  697 |     main = GetValue(indicator_id, 0, shift);
  698 |     signal = GetValue(indicator_id, 1, shift);
  699 |     
  700 |     return (main != EMPTY_VALUE && signal != EMPTY_VALUE);
  701 | }
  702 | 
  703 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  704 | //| Get Bollinger Bands Values                                      |
  705 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  706 | bool CIndicatorManager::GetBollinger(const int indicator_id, const int shift, double& upper,
  707 |                                       double& middle, double& lower) {
  708 |     if (!m_bInitialized || indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  709 |         return false;
  710 |     }
  711 |     
  712 |     if (!m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive || m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  713 |         return false;
  714 |     }
  715 |     
  716 |     upper = GetValue(indicator_id, 1, shift);   // Upper band
  717 |     middle = GetValue(indicator_id, 0, shift);  // Middle line (MA)
  718 |     lower = GetValue(indicator_id, 2, shift);   // Lower band
  719 |     
  720 |     return (upper != EMPTY_VALUE && middle != EMPTY_VALUE && lower != EMPTY_VALUE);
  721 | }
  722 | 
  723 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  724 | //| Is Data Ready                                                    |
  725 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  726 | bool CIndicatorManager::IsDataReady(const int indicator_id, const int required_bars = 1) {
  727 |     if (!m_bInitialized || indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  728 |         return false;
  729 |     }
  730 |     
  731 |     if (!m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive || m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  732 |         return false;
  733 |     }
  734 |     
  735 |     return BarsCalculated(m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle) >= required_bars;
  736 | }
  737 | 
  738 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  739 | //| Clear Cache                                                      |
  740 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  741 | void CIndicatorManager::ClearCache(const int indicator_id = -1) {
  742 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  743 |         return;
  744 |     }
  745 |     
  746 |     if (indicator_id == -1) {
  747 |         // Clear all caches
  748 |         for (int i = 0; i < MAX_INDICATORS; i++) {
  749 |             if (m_Indicators[i].isActive) {
  750 |                 InvalidateCache(i);
  751 |             }
  752 |         }
  753 |         LogIndicatorEvent("All indicator caches cleared", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  754 |     } else if (indicator_id >= 0 && indicator_id < MAX_INDICATORS) {
  755 |         InvalidateCache(indicator_id);
  756 |         LogIndicatorEvent(StringFormat("Cache cleared for indicator ID: %d", indicator_id), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  757 |     }
  758 | }
  759 | 
  760 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  761 | //| Get Performance Report                                           |
  762 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  763 | string CIndicatorManager::GetPerformanceReport() {
  764 |     string report = "=== INDICATOR MANAGER PERFORMANCE REPORT ===\n";
  765 |     
  766 |     report += StringFormat("Total Indicators: %d\n", m_Stats.TotalIndicators);
  767 |     report += StringFormat("Active Indicators: %d\n", m_Stats.ActiveIndicators);
  768 |     report += StringFormat("Cached Values: %d\n", m_Stats.CachedValues);
  769 |     report += StringFormat("Cache Hits: %d\n", m_Stats.CacheHits);
  770 |     report += StringFormat("Cache Misses: %d\n", m_Stats.CacheMisses);
  771 |     report += StringFormat("Cache Hit Ratio: %.2f%%\n", m_Stats.CacheHitRatio * 100);
  772 |     report += StringFormat("Updates/Second: %d\n", m_Stats.UpdatesPerSecond);
  773 |     
  774 |     return report;
  775 | }

  777 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  778 | //| Get System Summary                                               |
  779 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  780 | string CIndicatorManager::GetSystemSummary() {
  781 |     return StringFormat("Indicators: %d/%d | Cache: %.1f%% | Updates: %d/s",
  782 |                         m_Stats.ActiveIndicators,
  783 |                         MAX_INDICATORS,
  784 |                         m_Stats.CacheHitRatio * 100,
  785 |                         m_Stats.UpdatesPerSecond);
  786 | }
  787 | 
  788 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  789 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
  790 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  791 | int CIndicatorManager::FindFreeSlot() {
  792 |     for (int i = 0; i < MAX_INDICATORS; i++) {
  793 |         if (!m_Indicators[i].isActive) {
  794 |             return i;
  795 |         }
  796 |     }
  797 |     return -1;
  798 | }
  799 | 
  800 | bool CIndicatorManager::ValidateConfig(const SIndicatorConfig& config) {
  801 |     if (config.Symbol == "" || config.Period <= 0) {
  802 |         return false;
  803 |     }
  804 |     
  805 |     if (config.CacheSize <= 0 || config.CacheSize > 10000) {
  806 |         return false;
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     return true;
  810 | }
  811 | 
  812 | bool CIndicatorManager::InitializeIndicator(const int indicator_id) {
  813 |     if (indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  814 |         return false;
  815 |     }
  816 |     
  817 |     if (m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive) {
  818 |         return true;
  819 |     }
  820 |     
  821 |     int handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  822 |     
  823 |     // Create indicator based on type
  824 |     switch(m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle) {
  825 |         case INVALID_HANDLE:
  826 |             // This should never happen, as the handle should be initialized
  827 |             break;
  828 |             
  829 |         default:
  830 |             // This should also never happen, as the handle should be initialized
  831 |             break;
  832 |     }
  833 |     
  834 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  835 |         HandleIndicatorError(indicator_id, "Failed to create indicator handle");
  836 |         return false;
  837 |     }
  838 |     
  839 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle = handle;
  840 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive = true;
  841 |     
  842 |     // Load initial data
  843 |     if (!LoadIndicatorData(indicator_id)) {
  844 |         LogIndicatorEvent("Warning: Failed to load initial indicator data", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  845 |     }
  846 |     
  847 |     return true;
  848 | }
  849 | 
  850 | void CIndicatorManager::UpdateIndicator(const int indicator_id) {
  851 |     if (indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  852 |         return;
  853 |     }
  854 |     
  855 |     if (!m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive) {
  856 |         return;
  857 |     }
  858 |     
  859 |     // Update cache if enabled
  860 |     if (m_bCacheEnabled) {
  861 |         UpdateCache(indicator_id);
  862 |     }
  863 |     
  864 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  865 | }
  866 | 
  867 | bool CIndicatorManager::IsCacheValid(const int indicator_id) {
  868 |     if (indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  869 |         return false;
  870 |     }
  871 |     
  872 |     if (!m_bCacheEnabled) {
  873 |         return false;
  874 |     }
  875 |     
  876 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  877 |     datetime last_update = m_Indicators[indicator_id].lastAccess;
  878 |     
  879 |     // Check if cache is too old
  880 |     if (current_time - last_update > m_dtCacheTimeout) {
  881 |         return false;
  882 |     }
  883 |     
  884 |     return m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.isValid;
  885 | }
  886 | 
  887 | void CIndicatorManager::InvalidateCache(const int indicator_id) {
  888 |     if (indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  889 |         return;
  890 |     }
  891 |     
  892 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.isValid = false;
  893 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.size = 0;
  894 | }
  895 | 
  896 | void CIndicatorManager::UpdateCache(const int indicator_id) {
  897 |     if (indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
  898 |         return;
  899 |     }
  900 |     
  901 |     int handle = m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle;
  902 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  903 |         return;
  904 |     }
  905 |     
  906 |     int cache_size = m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.size;
  907 |     int buffer_count = m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.size;
  908 |     
  909 |     // Copy data from indicator buffers
  910 |     for (int buffer = 0; buffer < buffer_count; buffer++) {
  911 |         double temp_buffer[];
  912 |         int copied = CopyBuffer(handle, buffer, 0, cache_size, temp_buffer);
  913 |         
  914 |         if (copied > 0) {
  915 |             switch(buffer) {
  916 |                 case 0:
  917 |                     ArrayCopy(m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.values, temp_buffer);
  918 |                     break;
  919 |                 case 1:
  920 |                     ArrayCopy(m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.values + 1000, temp_buffer);
  921 |                     break;
  922 |                 case 2:
  923 |                     ArrayCopy(m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.values + 2000, temp_buffer);
  924 |                     break;
  925 |                 case 3:
  926 |                     ArrayCopy(m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.values + 3000, temp_buffer);
  927 |                     break;
  928 |             }
  929 |         }
  930 |     }
  931 |     
  932 |     // Copy time data
  933 |     datetime temp_times[];
  934 |     int time_copied = CopyTime(m_Indicators[indicator_id].symbol,
  935 |                                m_Indicators[indicator_id].timeframe,
  936 |                                0, cache_size, temp_times);
  937 |     
  938 |     if (time_copied > 0) {
  939 |         ArrayCopy(m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.timestamps, temp_times);
  940 |         m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.size = time_copied;
  941 |     }
  942 |     
  943 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.isValid = true;
  944 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].lastAccess = TimeCurrent();
  945 | }
  946 | 
  947 | void CIndicatorManager::CleanupOldCache() {
  948 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  949 |     
  950 |     for (int i = 0; i < MAX_INDICATORS; i++) {
  951 |         if (m_Indicators[i].isActive) {
  952 |             // Check if indicator hasn't been accessed recently
  953 |             if (current_time - m_Indicators[i].lastAccess > MAX_CACHE_AGE) {
  954 |                 InvalidateCache(i);
  955 |             }
  956 |         }
  957 |     }
  958 | }
  959 | 
  960 | void CIndicatorManager::UpdateStatistics() {
  961 |     m_Stats.TotalIndicators = 0;
  962 |     m_Stats.ActiveIndicators = 0;
  963 |     m_Stats.CachedValues = 0;
  964 |     
  965 |     for (int i = 0; i < MAX_INDICATORS; i++) {
  966 |         if (m_Indicators[i].isActive) {
  967 |             m_Stats.TotalIndicators++;
  968 |             
  969 |             if (m_Indicators[i].isActive) {
  970 |                 m_Stats.ActiveIndicators++;
  971 |             }
  972 |             
  973 |             if (m_Indicators[i].cache.isValid) {
  974 |                 m_Stats.CachedValues += m_Indicators[i].cache.size;
  975 |             }
  976 |         }
  977 |     }
  978 |     
  979 |     // Calculate cache hit ratio
  980 |     int total_accesses = m_Stats.CacheHits + m_Stats.CacheMisses;
  981 |     if (total_accesses > 0) {
  982 |         m_Stats.CacheHitRatio = (double)m_Stats.CacheHits / total_accesses;
  983 |     }
  984 |     
  985 |     m_Stats.LastStatsUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  986 | }
  987 | 
  988 | string CIndicatorManager::IndicatorTypeToString(const ENUM_INDICATOR_TYPE type) {
  989 |     switch(type) {
  990 |         case INDICATOR_MA: return "Moving Average";
  991 |         case INDICATOR_RSI: return "RSI";
  992 |         case INDICATOR_MACD: return "MACD";
  993 |         case INDICATOR_BOLLINGER: return "Bollinger Bands";
  994 |         case INDICATOR_STOCHASTIC: return "Stochastic";
  995 |         case INDICATOR_ATR: return "ATR";
  996 |         case INDICATOR_ADX: return "ADX";
  997 |         case INDICATOR_CCI: return "CCI";
  998 |         case INDICATOR_WILLIAMS: return "Williams %R";
  999 |         case INDICATOR_MOMENTUM: return "Momentum";
 1000 |         case INDICATOR_CUSTOM: return "Custom";
 1001 |         default: return "Unknown";
 1002 |     }
 1003 | }
 1004 | 
 1005 | void CIndicatorManager::LogIndicatorEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
 1006 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1007 |         switch(level) {
 1008 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
 1009 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1010 |                 break;
 1011 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
 1012 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1013 |                 break;
 1014 |             default:
 1015 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1016 |         }
 1017 |     }
 1018 | }
 1019 | 
 1020 | void CIndicatorManager::HandleIndicatorError(const int indicator_id, const string& error_msg) {
 1021 |     if (indicator_id >= 0 && indicator_id < MAX_INDICATORS) {
 1022 |         m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive = false;
 1023 |         m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
 1024 |         
 1025 |         LogIndicatorEvent(StringFormat("Indicator error [ID: %d]: %s", indicator_id, error_msg), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1026 |         
 1027 |         // Attempt recovery
 1028 |         if (!RecoverIndicator(indicator_id)) {
 1029 |             LogIndicatorEvent(StringFormat("Failed to recover indicator [ID: %d]", indicator_id), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1030 |         }
 1031 |     }
 1032 | }
 1033 | 
 1034 | bool CIndicatorManager::RecoverIndicator(const int indicator_id) {
 1035 |     if (indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
 1036 |         return false;
 1037 |     }
 1038 |     
 1039 |     // Release old handle
 1040 |     if (m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1041 |         IndicatorRelease(m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle);
 1042 |         m_Indicators[indicator_id].handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
 1043 |     }
 1044 |     
 1045 |     // Try to reinitialize
 1046 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].isActive = true;
 1047 |     
 1048 |     if (InitializeIndicator(indicator_id)) {
 1049 |         LogIndicatorEvent(StringFormat("Indicator recovered [ID: %d]", indicator_id), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
 1050 |         return true;
 1051 |     }
 1052 |     
 1053 |     return false;
 1054 | }
 1055 | 
 1056 | void CIndicatorManager::CacheValue(int indicator_id, int buffer_num, int shift, double value) {
 1057 |     if (indicator_id < 0 || indicator_id >= MAX_INDICATORS) {
 1058 |         return;
 1059 |     }
 1060 |     
 1061 |     if (!m_bCacheEnabled) {
 1062 |         return;
 1063 |     }
 1064 |     
 1065 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1066 |     m_Indicators[indicator_id].cache.AddValue(value, current_time);
 1067 | }
 1068 | 
 1069 | string CIndicatorManager::GenerateIndicatorName(const string& type, const string& symbol, 
 1070 |                                                  ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int period) {
 1071 |     return StringFormat("%s_%s_%s_%d", type, symbol, EnumToString(timeframe), period);
 1072 | }
 1073 | 
 1074 | void CIndicatorManager::ReleaseAllIndicators() {
 1075 |     for (int i = 0; i < MAX_INDICATORS; i++) {
 1076 |         if (m_Indicators[i].isActive && m_Indicators[i].handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1077 |             IndicatorRelease(m_Indicators[i].handle);
 1078 |             m_Indicators[i].handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
 1079 |             m_Indicators[i].isActive = false;
 1080 |         }
 1081 |     }
 1082 |     m_iIndicatorCount = 0;
 1083 | }
 1084 | 
 1085 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5

 1087 | #endif // INDICATOR_MANAGER_MQH_
