   46 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   47 | //| Multi-Timeframe Data Cache                                       |
   48 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   49 | struct STimeframeCache {
   50 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES       Timeframe;           // Timeframe
   51 |     SOHLCData             Data[];              // OHLC data array
   52 |     int                   Size;                // Current size
   53 |     int                   MaxSize;             // Maximum cache size
   54 |     datetime              LastUpdate;          // Last update time
   55 |     SMarketDataQuality    Quality;             // Data quality metrics
   56 |     bool                  IsInitialized;       // Initialization status
   57 | };
   58 | 
   59 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   60 | //| Tick Data Structure                                              |
   61 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   62 | struct STickData {
   63 |     datetime              Time;                 // Tick time
   64 |     double                Bid;                 // Bid price
   65 |     double                Ask;                 // Ask price
   66 |     double                Last;                // Last price
   67 |     long                  Volume;              // Volume
   68 |     uint                  Flags;               // Tick flags
   69 |     bool                  IsValid;             // Tick validity
   70 | };
   71 | 
   72 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   73 | //| Market Statistics                                                |
   74 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   75 | struct SMarketStatistics {
   76 |     double                DailyRange;          // Daily price range
   77 |     double                AverageTrueRange;    // Average True Range
   78 |     double                Volatility;          // Price volatility
   79 |     double                AverageVolume;       // Average volume
   80 |     double                VolumeRatio;         // Current vs average volume
   81 |     int                   TicksPerMinute;      // Ticks per minute
   82 |     double                SpreadAverage;       // Average spread
   83 |     double                SpreadCurrent;       // Current spread
   84 |     datetime              LastCalculation;     // Last calculation time
   85 | };
   86 | 
   87 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   88 | //| CMarketDataProvider - Comprehensive Market Data Management      |
   89 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   90 | class CMarketDataProvider {
   91 | private:
   92 |     EAContext*            m_pContext;           // Reference to EA context
   93 |     bool                  m_bInitialized;      // Initialization status
   94 |     string                m_Symbol;             // Current symbol
   95 |     
   96 |     // Multi-timeframe cache
   97 |     STimeframeCache       m_TimeframeCache[];   // Cache for different timeframes
   98 |     int                   m_CacheCount;         // Number of cached timeframes
   99 |     
  100 |     // Tick data management
  101 |     STickData             m_TickHistory[];      // Recent tick history
  102 |     int                   m_TickHistorySize;    // Tick history size
  103 |     int                   m_MaxTickHistory;     // Maximum tick history
  104 |     
  105 |     // Market statistics
  106 |     SMarketStatistics     m_Statistics;         // Market statistics
  107 |     datetime              m_LastStatsUpdate;    // Last statistics update
  108 |     
  109 |     // Data validation settings
  110 |     static const int      MIN_BARS_REQUIRED;
  111 |     static const int      MAX_CACHE_SIZE;
  112 |     static const double   MAX_PRICE_DEVIATION;
  113 |     static const int      TICK_HISTORY_SIZE;
  114 |     
  115 | public:
  116 |     //--- Constructor/Destructor ---
  117 |     CMarketDataProvider();
  118 |     ~CMarketDataProvider();
  119 |     
  120 |     //--- Core Methods ---
  121 |     bool                  Initialize(EAContext* context, const string& symbol = "");
  122 |     void                  Deinitialize();
  123 |     bool                  IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  124 |     void                  Update();
  125 |     
  126 |     //--- Data Access Methods ---
  127 |     bool                  GetOHLC(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index, SOHLCData& data);
  128 |     bool                  GetOHLCArray(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int start, const int count, SOHLCData& data[]);
  129 |     bool                  GetCurrentTick(STickData& tick);
  130 |     bool                  GetTickHistory(STickData& ticks[], const int count = 100);
  131 |     
  132 |     //--- Price Data Methods ---
  133 |     double                GetPrice(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index, const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE price_type);
  134 |     double                GetOpen(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0);
  135 |     double                GetHigh(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0);
  136 |     double                GetLow(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0);
  137 |     double                GetClose(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0);
  138 |     long                  GetVolume(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0);
  139 |     
  140 |     //--- Multi-Timeframe Support ---
  141 |     bool                  AddTimeframe(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int cache_size = 1000);
  142 |     bool                  RemoveTimeframe(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  143 |     bool                  IsTimeframeSupported(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  144 |     int                   GetSupportedTimeframes(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES& timeframes[]);
  145 |     
  146 |     //--- Data Quality Methods ---
  147 |     SMarketDataQuality    GetDataQuality(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  148 |     bool                  ValidateData(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int bars_to_check = 100);
  149 |     bool                  HasSufficientData(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int required_bars);
  150 |     double                GetDataCompleteness(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  151 |     
  152 |     //--- Market Statistics ---
  153 |     SMarketStatistics     GetMarketStatistics() { return m_Statistics; }
  154 |     void                  UpdateStatistics();
  155 |     double                GetVolatility(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int periods = 20);
  156 |     double                GetAverageTrueRange(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int periods = 14);
  157 |     double                GetVolumeProfile(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int periods = 20);
  158 |     
  159 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
  160 |     datetime              GetBarTime(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0);
  161 |     int                   GetBarIndex(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const datetime time);
  162 |     bool                  IsNewBar(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  163 |     int                   GetAvailableBars(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  164 |     
  165 |     //--- Cache Management ---
  166 |     void                  RefreshCache(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT);
  167 |     void                  ClearCache(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT);
  168 |     int                   GetCacheSize(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  169 |     datetime              GetLastCacheUpdate(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  170 |     
  171 |     //--- Symbol Information ---
  172 |     string                GetSymbol() const { return m_Symbol; }
  173 |     bool                  SetSymbol(const string& symbol);
  174 |     double                GetPoint();
  175 |     int                   GetDigits();
  176 |     double                GetTickSize();
  177 |     double                GetTickValue();
  178 |     
  179 | private:
  180 |     //--- Internal Methods ---
  181 |     int                   FindTimeframeIndex(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  182 |     bool                  LoadHistoricalData(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int bars_count);
  183 |     bool                  UpdateTimeframeCache(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
  184 |     bool                  ValidateOHLCData(const SOHLCData& data);
  185 |     void                  DetectDataGaps(STimeframeCache& cache);
  186 |     void                  CalculateDataQuality(STimeframeCache& cache);
  187 |     void                  ProcessNewTick();
  188 |     void                  UpdateTickHistory(const STickData& tick);
  189 |     bool                  IsValidPrice(const double price);
  190 |     bool                  IsValidVolume(const long volume);
  191 |     void                  LogDataEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  192 |     void                  ResizeCache(STimeframeCache& cache, const int new_size);
  193 | };
  194 | 
  195 | // Static constants definition
  196 | const int CMarketDataProvider::MIN_BARS_REQUIRED = 100;
  197 | const int CMarketDataProvider::MAX_CACHE_SIZE = 5000;
  198 | const double CMarketDataProvider::MAX_PRICE_DEVIATION = 0.1; // 10%
  199 | const int CMarketDataProvider::TICK_HISTORY_SIZE = 1000;
  200 | 
  201 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  202 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  203 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  204 | CMarketDataProvider::CMarketDataProvider() {
  205 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  206 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  207 |     m_Symbol = "";
  208 |     m_CacheCount = 0;
  209 |     m_TickHistorySize = 0;
  210 |     m_MaxTickHistory = TICK_HISTORY_SIZE;
  211 |     m_LastStatsUpdate = 0;
  212 |     
  213 |     // Initialize statistics
  214 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  215 |     
  216 |     // Resize arrays
  217 |     ArrayResize(m_TimeframeCache, 10); // Support up to 10 timeframes
  218 |     ArrayResize(m_TickHistory, m_MaxTickHistory);
  219 | }
  220 | 
  221 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  222 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  223 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  224 | CMarketDataProvider::~CMarketDataProvider() {
  225 |     Deinitialize();
  226 | }
  227 | 
  228 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  229 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  230 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  231 | bool CMarketDataProvider::Initialize(EAContext* context, const string& symbol = "") {
  232 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  233 |         return true;
  234 |     }
  235 |     
  236 |     m_pContext = context;
  237 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  238 |         Print("[MARKET_DATA] Context is NULL");
  239 |         return false;
  240 |     }
  241 |     
  242 |     // Set symbol
  243 |     m_Symbol = (symbol == "") ? _Symbol : symbol;
  244 |     
  245 |     // Validate symbol
  246 |     if (!SymbolSelect(m_Symbol, true)) {
  247 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  248 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to select symbol: " + m_Symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  249 |         }
  250 |         return false;
  251 |     }
  252 |     
  253 |     // Add default timeframes
  254 |     if (!AddTimeframe(PERIOD_M1, 1000)) {
  255 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  256 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to add M1 timeframe", __FUNCTION__);
  257 |         }
  258 |         return false;
  259 |     }
  260 |     
  261 |     if (!AddTimeframe(PERIOD_M5, 1000)) {
  262 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  263 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to add M5 timeframe", __FUNCTION__);
  264 |         }
  265 |         return false;
  266 |     }
  267 |     
  268 |     if (!AddTimeframe(PERIOD_M15, 1000)) {
  269 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  270 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to add M15 timeframe", __FUNCTION__);
  271 |         }
  272 |         return false;
  273 |     }
  274 |     
  275 |     if (!AddTimeframe(PERIOD_H1, 500)) {
  276 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  277 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to add H1 timeframe", __FUNCTION__);
  278 |         }
  279 |         return false;
  280 |     }
  281 |     
  282 |     // Initialize statistics
  283 |     UpdateStatistics();
  284 |     
  285 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  286 |     
  287 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  288 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("MarketDataProvider initialized for symbol: " + m_Symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  289 |     }
  290 |     
  291 |     return true;
  292 | }
  293 | 
  294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  296 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  297 | void CMarketDataProvider::Deinitialize() {
  298 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  299 |         return;
  300 |     }
  301 |     
  302 |     // Clear all caches
  303 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CacheCount; i++) {
  304 |         ArrayFree(m_TimeframeCache[i].Data);
  305 |     }
  306 |     
  307 |     ArrayFree(m_TimeframeCache);
  308 |     ArrayFree(m_TickHistory);
  309 |     
  310 |     m_CacheCount = 0;
  311 |     m_TickHistorySize = 0;
  312 |     
  313 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  314 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("MarketDataProvider deinitialized", __FUNCTION__);
  315 |     }
  316 |     
  317 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  318 | }
  319 | 
  320 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  321 | //| Update                                                           |
  322 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 | void CMarketDataProvider::Update() {
  324 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  325 |         return;
  326 |     }
  327 |     
  328 |     // Process new tick
  329 |     ProcessNewTick();
  330 |     
  331 |     // Update all timeframe caches
  332 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CacheCount; i++) {
  333 |         UpdateTimeframeCache(m_TimeframeCache[i].Timeframe);
  334 |     }
  335 |     
  336 |     // Update statistics periodically
  337 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  338 |     if (current_time - m_LastStatsUpdate >= 60) { // Every minute
  339 |         UpdateStatistics();
  340 |         m_LastStatsUpdate = current_time;
  341 |     }
  342 | }
  343 | 
  344 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  345 | //| Get OHLC Data                                                    |
  346 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  347 | bool CMarketDataProvider::GetOHLC(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index, SOHLCData& data) {
  348 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  349 |         return false;
  350 |     }
  351 |     
  352 |     int tf_index = FindTimeframeIndex(timeframe);
  353 |     if (tf_index < 0) {
  354 |         return false;
  355 |     }
  356 |     
  357 |     STimeframeCache& cache = m_TimeframeCache[tf_index];
  358 |     
  359 |     if (index < 0 || index >= cache.Size) {
  360 |         return false;
  361 |     }
  362 |     
  363 |     data = cache.Data[index];
  364 |     return data.IsValid;
  365 | }
  366 | 
  367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  368 | //| Get Price                                                        |
  369 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  370 | double CMarketDataProvider::GetPrice(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index, const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE price_type) {
  371 |     SOHLCData data;
  372 |     if (!GetOHLC(timeframe, index, data)) {
  373 |         return 0.0;
  374 |     }
  375 |     
  376 |     switch(price_type) {
  377 |         case PRICE_OPEN:    return data.Open;
  378 |         case PRICE_HIGH:    return data.High;
  379 |         case PRICE_LOW:     return data.Low;
  380 |         case PRICE_CLOSE:   return data.Close;
  381 |         case PRICE_MEDIAN:  return (data.High + data.Low) / 2.0;
  382 |         case PRICE_TYPICAL: return (data.High + data.Low + data.Close) / 3.0;
  383 |         case PRICE_WEIGHTED: return (data.High + data.Low + 2 * data.Close) / 4.0;
  384 |         default:            return data.Close;
  385 |     }
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  389 | //| Get Open Price                                                   |
  390 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  391 | double CMarketDataProvider::GetOpen(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0) {
  392 |     return GetPrice(timeframe, index, PRICE_OPEN);
  393 | }
  394 | 
  395 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  396 | //| Get High Price                                                   |
  397 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  398 | double CMarketDataProvider::GetHigh(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0) {
  399 |     return GetPrice(timeframe, index, PRICE_HIGH);
  400 | }
  401 | 
  402 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  403 | //| Get Low Price                                                    |
  404 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  405 | double CMarketDataProvider::GetLow(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0) {
  406 |     return GetPrice(timeframe, index, PRICE_LOW);
  407 | }
  408 | 
  409 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  410 | //| Get Close Price                                                  |
  411 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  412 | double CMarketDataProvider::GetClose(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0) {
  413 |     return GetPrice(timeframe, index, PRICE_CLOSE);
  414 | }
  415 | 
  416 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  417 | //| Get Volume                                                       |
  418 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  419 | long CMarketDataProvider::GetVolume(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0) {
  420 |     SOHLCData data;
  421 |     if (!GetOHLC(timeframe, index, data)) {
  422 |         return 0;
  423 |     }
  424 |     return data.Volume;
  425 | }
  426 | 
  427 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  428 | //| Add Timeframe                                                    |
  429 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  430 | bool CMarketDataProvider::AddTimeframe(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int cache_size = 1000) {
  431 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  432 |         return false;
  433 |     }
  434 |     
  435 |     // Check if timeframe already exists
  436 |     if (FindTimeframeIndex(timeframe) >= 0) {
  437 |         return true; // Already exists
  438 |     }
  439 |     
  440 |     // Check cache limit
  441 |     if (m_CacheCount >= ArraySize(m_TimeframeCache)) {
  442 |         LogDataEvent("Maximum timeframe cache limit reached", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  443 |         return false;
  444 |     }
  445 |     
  446 |     // Initialize new cache
  447 |     STimeframeCache& cache = m_TimeframeCache[m_CacheCount];
  448 |     cache.Timeframe = timeframe;
  449 |     cache.MaxSize = MathMin(cache_size, MAX_CACHE_SIZE);
  450 |     cache.Size = 0;
  451 |     cache.LastUpdate = 0;
  452 |     cache.IsInitialized = false;
  453 |     
  454 |     ArrayResize(cache.Data, cache.MaxSize);
  455 |     ZeroMemory(cache.Quality);
  456 |     
  457 |     // Load historical data
  458 |     if (!LoadHistoricalData(timeframe, cache.MaxSize)) {
  459 |         LogDataEvent("Failed to load historical data for timeframe: " + EnumToString(timeframe), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  460 |         return false;
  461 |     }
  462 |     
  463 |     cache.IsInitialized = true;
  464 |     m_CacheCount++;
  465 |     
  466 |     LogDataEvent("Added timeframe: " + EnumToString(timeframe) + " with cache size: " + IntegerToString(cache_size), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  467 |     
  468 |     return true;
  469 | }
  470 | 
  471 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  472 | //| Validate Data                                                    |
  473 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  474 | bool CMarketDataProvider::ValidateData(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int bars_to_check = 100) {
  475 |     int tf_index = FindTimeframeIndex(timeframe);
  476 |     if (tf_index < 0) {
  477 |         return false;
  478 |     }
  479 |     
  480 |     STimeframeCache& cache = m_TimeframeCache[tf_index];
  481 |     int check_count = MathMin(bars_to_check, cache.Size);
  482 |     
  483 |     int invalid_count = 0;
  484 |     
  485 |     for (int i = 0; i < check_count; i++) {
  486 |         if (!ValidateOHLCData(cache.Data[i])) {
  487 |             invalid_count++;
  488 |         }
  489 |     }
  490 |     
  491 |     double validity_ratio = (check_count > 0) ? (double)(check_count - invalid_count) / check_count : 0.0;
  492 |     
  493 |     cache.Quality.IsValid = (validity_ratio >= 0.95); // 95% validity threshold
  494 |     cache.Quality.InvalidBars = invalid_count;
  495 |     cache.Quality.DataCompleteness = validity_ratio * 100.0;
  496 |     
  497 |     return cache.Quality.IsValid;
  498 | }
  499 | 
  500 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  501 | //| Update Statistics                                                |
  502 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  503 | void CMarketDataProvider::UpdateStatistics() {
  504 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  505 |         return;
  506 |     }
  507 |     
  508 |     // Get current prices
  509 |     double current_high = GetHigh(PERIOD_D1, 0);
  510 |     double current_low = GetLow(PERIOD_D1, 0);
  511 |     
  512 |     if (current_high > 0 && current_low > 0) {
  513 |         m_Statistics.DailyRange = current_high - current_low;
  514 |     }
  515 |     
  516 |     // Calculate ATR
  517 |     m_Statistics.AverageTrueRange = GetAverageTrueRange(PERIOD_H1, 14);
  518 |     
  519 |     // Calculate volatility
  520 |     m_Statistics.Volatility = GetVolatility(PERIOD_H1, 20);
  521 |     
  522 |     // Update volume statistics
  523 |     long current_volume = GetVolume(PERIOD_H1, 0);
  524 |     static long volume_sum = 0;
  525 |     static int volume_count = 0;
  526 |     
  527 |     if (current_volume > 0) {
  528 |         volume_sum += current_volume;
  529 |         volume_count++;
  530 |         m_Statistics.AverageVolume = (double)volume_sum / volume_count;
  531 |         m_Statistics.VolumeRatio = (m_Statistics.AverageVolume > 0) ? 
  532 |                                    (double)current_volume / m_Statistics.AverageVolume : 1.0;
  533 |     }
  534 |     
  535 |     // Update spread statistics
  536 |     m_Statistics.SpreadCurrent = SymbolInfoInteger(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
  537 |     
  538 |     static double spread_sum = 0;
  539 |     static int spread_count = 0;
  540 |     
  541 |     if (m_Statistics.SpreadCurrent > 0) {
  542 |         spread_sum += m_Statistics.SpreadCurrent;
  543 |         spread_count++;
  544 |         m_Statistics.SpreadAverage = spread_sum / spread_count;
  545 |     }
  546 |     
  547 |     m_Statistics.LastCalculation = TimeCurrent();
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | //| Get Volatility                                                   |
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | double CMarketDataProvider::GetVolatility(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int periods = 20) {
  554 |     if (periods <= 1) {
  555 |         return 0.0;
  556 |     }
  557 |     
  558 |     double sum = 0.0;
  559 |     double sum_squares = 0.0;
  560 |     int valid_periods = 0;
  561 |     
  562 |     for (int i = 0; i < periods; i++) {
  563 |         double close_current = GetClose(timeframe, i);
  564 |         double close_previous = GetClose(timeframe, i + 1);
  565 |         
  566 |         if (close_current > 0 && close_previous > 0) {
  567 |             double return_rate = (close_current - close_previous) / close_previous;
  568 |             sum += return_rate;
  569 |             sum_squares += return_rate * return_rate;
  570 |             valid_periods++;
  571 |         }
  572 |     }
  573 |     
  574 |     if (valid_periods <= 1) {
  575 |         return 0.0;
  576 |     }
  577 |     
  578 |     double mean = sum / valid_periods;
  579 |     double variance = (sum_squares / valid_periods) - (mean * mean);
  580 |     
  581 |     return MathSqrt(variance);
  582 | }
  583 | 
  584 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  585 | //| Get Average True Range                                           |
  586 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  587 | double CMarketDataProvider::GetAverageTrueRange(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int periods = 14) {
  588 |     if (periods <= 0) {
  589 |         return 0.0;
  590 |     }
  591 |     
  592 |     double atr_sum = 0.0;
  593 |     int valid_periods = 0;
  594 |     
  595 |     for (int i = 0; i < periods; i++) {
  596 |         double high = GetHigh(timeframe, i);
  597 |         double low = GetLow(timeframe, i);
  598 |         double close_prev = GetClose(timeframe, i + 1);
  599 |         
  600 |         if (high > 0 && low > 0 && close_prev > 0) {
  601 |             double tr1 = high - low;
  602 |             double tr2 = MathAbs(high - close_prev);
  603 |             double tr3 = MathAbs(low - close_prev);
  604 |             
  605 |             double true_range = MathMax(tr1, MathMax(tr2, tr3));
  606 |             atr_sum += true_range;
  607 |             valid_periods++;
  608 |         }
  609 |     }
  610 |     
  611 |     return (valid_periods > 0) ? atr_sum / valid_periods : 0.0;
  612 | }
  613 | 
  614 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  615 | //| Is New Bar                                                       |
  616 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  617 | bool CMarketDataProvider::IsNewBar(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe) {
  618 |     static datetime last_bar_time = 0;
  619 |     datetime current_bar_time = GetBarTime(timeframe, 0);
  620 |     
  621 |     if (current_bar_time != last_bar_time) {
  622 |         last_bar_time = current_bar_time;
  623 |         return true;
  624 |     }
  625 |     
  626 |     return false;
  627 | }
  628 | 
  629 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  630 | //| Get Bar Time                                                     |
  631 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  632 | datetime CMarketDataProvider::GetBarTime(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int index = 0) {
  633 |     SOHLCData data;
  634 |     if (!GetOHLC(timeframe, index, data)) {
  635 |         return 0;
  636 |     }
  637 |     return data.Time;
  638 | }
  639 | 
  640 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  641 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
  642 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  643 | int CMarketDataProvider::FindTimeframeIndex(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe) {
  644 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CacheCount; i++) {
  645 |         if (m_TimeframeCache[i].Timeframe == timeframe) {
  646 |             return i;
  647 |         }
  648 |     }
  649 |     return -1;
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | bool CMarketDataProvider::LoadHistoricalData(const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int bars_count) {
  653 |     int tf_index = FindTimeframeIndex(timeframe);
  654 |     if (tf_index < 0) {
  655 |         return false;
  656 |     }
  657 |     
  658 |     STimeframeCache& cache = m_TimeframeCache[tf_index];
  659 |     
  660 |     // Load OHLC data
  661 |     datetime time_array[];
  662 |     double open_array[], high_array[], low_array[], close_array[];
  663 |     long volume_array[], tick_volume_array[];
  664 |     int spread_array[];
  665 |     
  666 |     int copied = CopyTime(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, bars_count, time_array);
  667 |     if (copied <= 0) {
  668 |         LogDataEvent("Failed to copy time data for " + EnumToString(timeframe), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  669 |         return false;
  670 |     }
  671 |     
  672 |     CopyOpen(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, copied, open_array);
  673 |     CopyHigh(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, copied, high_array);
  674 |     CopyLow(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, copied, low_array);
  675 |     CopyClose(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, copied, close_array);
  676 |     CopyRealVolume(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, copied, volume_array);
  677 |     CopyTickVolume(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, copied, tick_volume_array);
  678 |     CopySpread(m_Symbol, timeframe, 0, copied, spread_array);
  679 |     
  680 |     // Fill cache
  681 |     cache.Size = copied;
  682 |     for (int i = 0; i < copied; i++) {
  683 |         cache.Data[i].Time = time_array[i];
  684 |         cache.Data[i].Open = open_array[i];
  685 |         cache.Data[i].High = high_array[i];
  686 |         cache.Data[i].Low = low_array[i];
  687 |         cache.Data[i].Close = close_array[i];
  688 |         cache.Data[i].Volume = (ArraySize(volume_array) > i) ? volume_array[i] : 0;
  689 |         cache.Data[i].TickVolume = (ArraySize(tick_volume_array) > i) ? tick_volume_array[i] : 0;
  690 |         cache.Data[i].Spread = (ArraySize(spread_array) > i) ? spread_array[i] : 0;
  691 |         cache.Data[i].IsValid = ValidateOHLCData(cache.Data[i]);
  692 |     }
  693 |     
  694 |     cache.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  695 |     
  696 |     // Calculate data quality
  697 |     CalculateDataQuality(cache);
  698 |     
  699 |     LogDataEvent(StringFormat("Loaded %d bars for %s", copied, EnumToString(timeframe)), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  700 |     
  701 |     return true;
  702 | }
  703 | 
  704 | bool CMarketDataProvider::ValidateOHLCData(const SOHLCData& data) {
  705 |     // Check for valid prices
  706 |     if (data.Open <= 0 || data.High <= 0 || data.Low <= 0 || data.Close <= 0) {
  707 |         return false;
  708 |     }
  709 |     
  710 |     // Check price relationships
  711 |     if (data.High < data.Low || data.High < data.Open || data.High < data.Close ||
  712 |         data.Low > data.Open || data.Low > data.Close) {
  713 |         return false;
  714 |     }
  715 |     
  716 |     // Check for reasonable price ranges
  717 |     double range = data.High - data.Low;
  718 |     double avg_price = (data.High + data.Low) / 2.0;
  719 |     
  720 |     if (range / avg_price > MAX_PRICE_DEVIATION) {
  721 |         return false; // Unrealistic price movement
  722 |     }
  723 |     
  724 |     return true;
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | void CMarketDataProvider::ProcessNewTick() {
  728 |     STickData tick;
  729 |     tick.Time = TimeCurrent();
  730 |     tick.Bid = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  731 |     tick.Ask = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  732 |     tick.Last = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_LAST);
  733 |     tick.Volume = SymbolInfoInteger(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME);
  734 |     tick.IsValid = (tick.Bid > 0 && tick.Ask > 0 && tick.Ask > tick.Bid);
  735 |     
  736 |     if (tick.IsValid) {
  737 |         UpdateTickHistory(tick);
  738 |     }
  739 | }
  740 | 
  741 | void CMarketDataProvider::UpdateTickHistory(const STickData& tick) {
  742 |     if (m_TickHistorySize < m_MaxTickHistory) {
  743 |         m_TickHistory[m_TickHistorySize] = tick;
  744 |         m_TickHistorySize++;
  745 |     } else {
  746 |         // Shift array and add new tick
  747 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_MaxTickHistory - 1; i++) {
  748 |             m_TickHistory[i] = m_TickHistory[i + 1];
  749 |         }
  750 |         m_TickHistory[m_MaxTickHistory - 1] = tick;
  751 |     }
  752 | }
  753 | 
  754 | void CMarketDataProvider::CalculateDataQuality(STimeframeCache& cache) {
  755 |     int valid_bars = 0;
  756 |     int total_bars = cache.Size;
  757 |     
  758 |     for (int i = 0; i < total_bars; i++) {
  759 |         if (cache.Data[i].IsValid) {
  760 |             valid_bars++;
  761 |         }
  762 |     }
  763 |     
  764 |     cache.Quality.DataCompleteness = (total_bars > 0) ? (double)valid_bars / total_bars * 100.0 : 0.0;
  765 |     cache.Quality.InvalidBars = total_bars - valid_bars;
  766 |     cache.Quality.IsValid = (cache.Quality.DataCompleteness >= 95.0);
  767 |     cache.Quality.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  768 |     
  769 |     DetectDataGaps(cache);
  770 | }
  771 | 
  772 | void CMarketDataProvider::DetectDataGaps(STimeframeCache& cache) {
  773 |     cache.Quality.HasGaps = false;
  774 |     cache.Quality.GapCount = 0;
  775 |     
  776 |     int timeframe_seconds = PeriodSeconds(cache.Timeframe);
  777 |     
  778 |     for (int i = 1; i < cache.Size; i++) {
  779 |         datetime expected_time = cache.Data[i-1].Time + timeframe_seconds;
  780 |         if (cache.Data[i].Time > expected_time) {
  781 |             if (!cache.Quality.HasGaps) {
  782 |                 cache.Quality.HasGaps = true;
  783 |                 cache.Quality.FirstGapTime = cache.Data[i].Time;
  784 |             }
  785 |             cache.Quality.LastGapTime = cache.Data[i].Time;
  786 |             cache.Quality.GapCount++;
  787 |         }
  788 |     }
  789 | }
  790 | 
  791 | void CMarketDataProvider::LogDataEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  792 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  793 |         switch(level) {
  794 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  795 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  796 |                 break;
  797 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  798 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  799 |                 break;
  800 |             default:
  801 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  802 |         }
  803 |     }
  804 | }
  805 | 
  806 | } // namespace ApexPullback
  807 | 
  808 | #endif // MARKET_DATA_PROVIDER_MQH_

  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | CSymbolManager::CSymbolManager(EAContext* context) {
  243 |     m_pContext = context;
  244 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  245 |     m_CurrentSymbol = "";
  246 |     m_SessionCount = 0;
  247 |     m_LastMarketUpdate = 0;
  248 |     m_LastStatsUpdate = 0;
  249 |     
  250 |     // Initialize structures
  251 |     ZeroMemory(m_Specs);
  252 |     ZeroMemory(m_MarketInfo);
  253 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  254 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  255 |     
  256 |     // Resize sessions array
  257 |     ArrayResize(m_Sessions, 10); // Support up to 10 sessions
  258 | }

  260 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  261 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  262 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  263 | CSymbolManager::~CSymbolManager() {
  264 |     Deinitialize();
  265 | }
  266 | 
  267 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  268 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  269 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  270 | bool CSymbolManager::Initialize(const string& symbol = "") {
  271 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  272 |         return true;
  273 |     }
  274 |     
  275 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  276 |         Print("[SYMBOL_MANAGER] Context is NULL");
  277 |         return false;
  278 |     }
  279 |     
  280 |     // Set symbol
  281 |     m_CurrentSymbol = (symbol == "") ? _Symbol : symbol;
  282 |     
  283 |     // Validate symbol
  284 |     if (!ValidateSymbol(m_CurrentSymbol)) {
  285 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  286 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Invalid symbol: " + m_CurrentSymbol, __FUNCTION__);
  287 |         }
  288 |         return false;
  289 |     }
  290 |     
  291 |     // Load symbol specifications
  292 |     if (!LoadSymbolSpecs()) {
  293 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  294 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to load symbol specifications", __FUNCTION__);
  295 |         }
  296 |         return false;
  297 |     }
  298 |     
  299 |     // Load trading sessions
  300 |     if (!LoadTradingSessions()) {
  301 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  302 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning("Failed to load trading sessions", __FUNCTION__);
  303 |         }
  304 |     }
  305 |     
  306 |     // Initialize configuration
  307 |     InitializeDefaultConfig();
  308 |     LoadConfiguration();
  309 |     
  310 |     // Update market information
  311 |     UpdateMarketInfo();
  312 |     UpdateStatistics();
  313 |     
  314 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  315 |     
  316 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  317 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("SymbolManager initialized for: " + m_CurrentSymbol, __FUNCTION__);
  318 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetSymbolSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  319 |     }
  320 |     
  321 |     return true;
  322 | }
  323 | 
  324 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  325 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  326 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  327 | void CSymbolManager::Deinitialize() {
  328 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  329 |         return;
  330 |     }
  331 |     
  332 |     // Save configuration
  333 |     SaveConfiguration();
  334 |     
  335 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  336 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetTradingSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  337 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("SymbolManager shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
  338 |     }
  339 |     
  340 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  344 | //| Update                                                           |
  345 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  346 | void CSymbolManager::Update() {
  347 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  348 |         return;
  349 |     }
  350 |     
  351 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  352 |     
  353 |     // Update market information
  354 |     if (current_time - m_LastMarketUpdate >= MARKET_UPDATE_INTERVAL) {
  355 |         UpdateMarketInfo();
  356 |         m_LastMarketUpdate = current_time;
  357 |     }
  358 |     
  359 |     // Update statistics
  360 |     if (current_time - m_LastStatsUpdate >= STATS_UPDATE_INTERVAL) {
  361 |         UpdateStatistics();
  362 |         m_LastStatsUpdate = current_time;
  363 |     }
  364 | }
  365 | 
  366 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 | //| Set Symbol                                                       |
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | bool CSymbolManager::SetSymbol(const string& symbol) {
  370 |     if (!ValidateSymbol(symbol)) {
  371 |         return false;
  372 |     }
  373 |     
  374 |     if (symbol == m_CurrentSymbol) {
  375 |         return true; // Already set
  376 |     }
  377 |     
  378 |     m_CurrentSymbol = symbol;
  379 |     
  380 |     // Reload specifications
  381 |     if (!LoadSymbolSpecs()) {
  382 |         LogSymbolEvent("Failed to reload symbol specifications for: " + symbol, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  383 |         return false;
  384 |     }
  385 |     
  386 |     // Reload sessions
  387 |     LoadTradingSessions();
  388 |     
  389 |     // Update market info
  390 |     UpdateMarketInfo();
  391 |     UpdateStatistics();
  392 |     
  393 |     LogSymbolEvent("Symbol changed to: " + symbol, LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  394 |     
  395 |     return true;
  396 | }

  401 | int CSymbolManager::GetDigits() {

  404 |

  424 | 
  425 | double CSymbolManager::GetLotStep() {
  426 |     return m_Specs.LotStep;
  427 | }
  428 | 
  429 | int CSymbolManager::GetStopLevel() {
  430 |     return m_Specs.StopLevel;
  431 | }
  432 | 
  433 | int CSymbolManager::GetFreezeLevel() {
  434 |     return m_Specs.FreezeLevel;
  435 | }
  436 | 
  437 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  438 | //| Get Market Information                                           |
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | double CSymbolManager::GetBid() {
  441 |     return m_MarketInfo.Bid;
  442 | }
  443 | 
  444 | double CSymbolManager::GetAsk() {
  445 |     return m_MarketInfo.Ask;
  446 | }

  449 |     return m_MarketInfo.Spread;
  450 | }

  452 | long CSymbolManager::GetVolume() {
  453 |     return m_MarketInfo.Volume;
  454 | }
  455 | 
  456 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 | //| Trading Conditions                                               |
  458 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  459 | bool CSymbolManager::IsTradeAllowed() {
  460 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  461 |         return false;
  462 |     }
  463 |     
  464 |     // Check symbol trade mode
  465 |     if (m_MarketInfo.TradeMode == SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE_DISABLED) {
  466 |         return false;
  467 |     }
  468 |     
  469 |     // Check if trading is allowed in configuration
  470 |     if (!m_Config.AllowTrading) {
  471 |         return false;
  472 |     }
  473 |     
  474 |     // Check trading session
  475 |     if (m_Config.UseSessionFilter && !IsInTradingSession()) {
  476 |         return false;
  477 |     }
  478 |     
  479 |     // Check spread
  480 |     if (!IsSpreadAcceptable()) {
  481 |         return false;
  482 |     }
  483 |     
  484 |     // Check volume
  485 |     if (!IsVolumeAcceptable()) {
  486 |         return false;
  487 |     }
  488 |     
  489 |     return true;
  490 | }
  491 | 
  492 | bool CSymbolManager::IsSpreadAcceptable() {
  493 |     if (m_Config.MaxSpreadAllowed <= 0) {
  494 |         return true; // No spread limit
  495 |     }
  496 |     
  497 |     return m_MarketInfo.Spread <= m_Config.MaxSpreadAllowed;
  498 | }
  499 | 
  500 | bool CSymbolManager::IsVolumeAcceptable() {
  501 |     if (m_Config.MinVolumeRequired <= 0) {
  502 |         return true; // No volume requirement
  503 |     }
  504 |     
  505 |     return m_MarketInfo.Volume >= m_Config.MinVolumeRequired;
  506 | }
  507 | 
  508 | bool CSymbolManager::CanOpenPosition(const ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, const double lot_size) {
  509 |     if (!IsTradeAllowed()) {
  510 |         return false;
  511 |     }
  512 |     
  513 |     // Check position direction
  514 |     if (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY && !m_Config.AllowLongPositions) {
  515 |         return false;
  516 |     }
  517 |     
  518 |     if (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_SELL && !m_Config.AllowShortPositions) {
  519 |         return false;
  520 |     }
  521 |     
  522 |     // Check lot size
  523 |     if (!ValidateLotSize(lot_size)) {
  524 |         return false;
  525 |     }
  526 |     
  527 |     // Check maximum position size
  528 |     if (m_Config.MaxPositionSize > 0 && lot_size > m_Config.MaxPositionSize) {
  529 |         return false;
  530 |     }
  531 |     
  532 |     return true;
  533 | }
  534 | 
  535 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  536 | //| Position Sizing                                                  |
  537 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  538 | double CSymbolManager::NormalizeLotSize(const double lot_size) {
  539 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  540 |         return 0.0;
  541 |     }
  542 |     
  543 |     double normalized = lot_size;
  544 |     
  545 |     // Ensure within bounds
  546 |     if (normalized < m_Specs.MinLot) {
  547 |         normalized = m_Specs.MinLot;
  548 |     } else if (normalized > m_Specs.MaxLot) {
  549 |         normalized = m_Specs.MaxLot;
  550 |     }
  551 |     
  552 |     // Round to lot step
  553 |     if (m_Specs.LotStep > 0) {
  554 |         normalized = MathRound(normalized / m_Specs.LotStep) * m_Specs.LotStep;
  555 |     }
  556 |     
  557 |     return normalized;
  558 | }
  559 | 
  560 | double CSymbolManager::CalculatePositionSize(const double risk_percent, const double stop_loss_points) {
  561 |     if (!m_bInitialized || risk_percent <= 0 || stop_loss_points <= 0) {
  562 |         return 0.0;
  563 |     }
  564 |     
  565 |     double account_balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  566 |     double risk_amount = account_balance * risk_percent / 100.0;
  567 |     
  568 |     double tick_value = GetTickValue();
  569 |     double tick_size = GetTickSize();
  570 |     
  571 |     if (tick_value <= 0 || tick_size <= 0) {
  572 |         return 0.0;
  573 |     }
  574 |     
  575 |     double stop_loss_value = stop_loss_points * tick_value / tick_size;
  576 |     double lot_size = risk_amount / stop_loss_value;
  577 |     
  578 |     return NormalizeLotSize(lot_size);
  579 | }
  580 | 
  581 | bool CSymbolManager::ValidateLotSize(const double lot_size) {
  582 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  583 |         return false;
  584 |     }
  585 |     
  586 |     if (lot_size < m_Specs.MinLot || lot_size > m_Specs.MaxLot) {
  587 |         return false;
  588 |     }
  589 |     
  590 |     // Check lot step
  591 |     if (m_Specs.LotStep > 0) {
  592 |         double remainder = fmod(lot_size, m_Specs.LotStep);
  593 |         if (remainder > 0.0001) { // Small tolerance for floating point
  594 |             return false;
  595 |         }
  596 |     }
  597 |     
  598 |     return true;
  599 | }
  600 | 
  601 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  602 | //| Session Management                                               |
  603 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  604 | bool CSymbolManager::IsInTradingSession() {
  605 |     if (m_SessionCount == 0) {
  606 |         return true; // No session restrictions
  607 |     }
  608 |     
  609 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_SessionCount; i++) {
  610 |         if (IsSessionActive(m_Sessions[i])) {
  611 |             return true;
  612 |         }
  613 |     }
  614 |     
  615 |     return false;
  616 | }
  617 | 
  618 | SSymbolSession CSymbolManager::GetCurrentSession() {
  619 |     SSymbolSession empty_session;
  620 |     ZeroMemory(empty_session);
  621 |     
  622 |     if (m_SessionCount == 0) {
  623 |         return empty_session;
  624 |     }
  625 |     
  626 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_SessionCount; i++) {
  627 |         if (IsSessionActive(m_Sessions[i])) {
  628 |             return m_Sessions[i];
  629 |         }
  630 |     }
  631 |     
  632 |     return empty_session;
  633 | }
  634 | 
  635 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  636 | //| Statistics                                                       |
  637 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  638 | void CSymbolManager::UpdateStatistics() {
  639 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  640 |         return;
  641 |     }
  642 |     
  643 |     CalculateStatistics();
  644 |     m_Statistics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  645 | }
  646 | 
  647 | double CSymbolManager::GetDailyRange() {
  648 |     return m_Statistics.DailyRange;
  649 | }
  650 | 
  651 | double CSymbolManager::GetAverageSpread() {
  652 |     return m_Statistics.AverageSpread;
  653 | }
  654 | 
  655 | double CSymbolManager::GetVolatility(const int periods = 20) {
  656 |     return CalculateVolatility();
  657 | }

  659 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 | //| Utility Methods                                                  |

  662 | double CSymbolManager::PointsToPrice(const double points) {
  663 |     return points * m_Specs.Point;
  664 | }
  665 | 
  666 | double CSymbolManager::PriceToPoints(const double price_diff) {
  667 |     return (m_Specs.Point > 0) ? price_diff / m_Specs.Point : 0.0;
  668 | }
  669 | 
  670 | string CSymbolManager::FormatPrice(const double price) {
  671 |     return DoubleToString(price, m_Specs.Digits);
  672 | }
  673 | 
  674 | bool CSymbolManager::IsValidPrice(const double price) {
  675 |     return (price > 0 && price < DBL_MAX);
  676 | }
  677 | 
  678 | double CSymbolManager::RoundToTickSize(const double price) {
  679 |     if (m_Specs.TickSize <= 0) {
  680 |         return price;
  681 |     }
  682 |     
  683 |     return MathRound(price / m_Specs.TickSize) * m_Specs.TickSize;
  684 | }

  691 |                         m_CurrentSymbol,
  692 |                         m_Specs.Digits,
  693 |                         m_Specs.Point,
  694 |                         m_MarketInfo.Spread,
  695 |                         m_Specs.MinLot,
  696 |                         m_Specs.MaxLot);
  697 | }

  699 | string CSymbolManager::GetMarketSummary() {
  700 |     return StringFormat("Market: Bid=%.5f | Ask=%.5f | Spread=%.1f | Volume=%d | Session=%s",
  701 |                         m_MarketInfo.Bid,
  702 |                         m_MarketInfo.Ask,
  703 |                         m_MarketInfo.Spread,
  704 |                         m_MarketInfo.Volume,
  705 |                         GetSessionName());
  706 | }

  708 | string CSymbolManager::GetTradingSummary() {
  709 |     return StringFormat("Trading: Allowed=%s | Long=%s | Short=%s | SpreadOK=%s | VolumeOK=%s",
  710 |                         IsTradeAllowed() ? "Yes" : "No",
  711 |                         m_Config.AllowLongPositions ? "Yes" : "No",
  712 |                         m_Config.AllowShortPositions ? "Yes" : "No",
  713 |                         IsSpreadAcceptable() ? "Yes" : "No",
  714 |                         IsVolumeAcceptable() ? "Yes" : "No");
  715 | }
  716 | 
  717 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  718 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
  719 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  720 | bool CSymbolManager::LoadSymbolSpecs() {
  721 |     if (m_CurrentSymbol == "") {
  722 |         return false;
  723 |     }
  724 |     
  725 |     // Load symbol specifications
  726 |     m_Specs.Symbol = m_CurrentSymbol;
  727 |     m_Specs.Digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
  728 |     m_Specs.Point = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  729 |     m_Specs.TickSize = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
  730 |     m_Specs.TickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  731 |     m_Specs.ContractSize = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_CONTRACT_SIZE);
  732 |     m_Specs.MinLot = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  733 |     m_Specs.MaxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  734 |     m_Specs.LotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  735 |     m_Specs.StopLevel = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL);
  736 |     m_Specs.FreezeLevel = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_FREEZE_LEVEL);
  737 |     m_Specs.CalcMode = (ENUM_SYMBOL_CALC_MODE)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_CALC_MODE);
  738 |     m_Specs.TradeMode = (ENUM_SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE);
  739 |     m_Specs.TradeExecution = (ENUM_SYMBOL_TRADE_EXECUTION)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_EXEMODE);
  740 |     
  741 |     // Validate specifications
  742 |     m_Specs.IsValid = (m_Specs.Point > 0 && m_Specs.TickSize > 0 && 
  743 |                        m_Specs.MinLot > 0 && m_Specs.MaxLot >= m_Specs.MinLot);
  744 |     
  745 |     if (!m_Specs.IsValid) {
  746 |         LogSymbolEvent("Invalid symbol specifications loaded", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  747 |         return false;
  748 |     }
  749 |     
  750 |     return true;
  751 | }
  752 | 
  753 | void CSymbolManager::UpdateMarketInfo() {
  754 |     if (m_CurrentSymbol == "") {
  755 |         return;
  756 |     }
  757 |     
  758 |     m_MarketInfo.Bid = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  759 |     m_MarketInfo.Ask = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  760 |     m_MarketInfo.Last = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_LAST);
  761 |     m_MarketInfo.Volume = SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME);
  762 |     m_MarketInfo.VolumeHigh = SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_VOLUMEHIGH);
  763 |     m_MarketInfo.VolumeLow = SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_VOLUMELOW);
  764 |     m_MarketInfo.Time = (datetime)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TIME);
  765 |     m_MarketInfo.TradeMode = (ENUM_SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE)SymbolInfoInteger(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE);
  766 |     
  767 |     // Calculate spread
  768 |     if (m_MarketInfo.Bid > 0 && m_MarketInfo.Ask > 0 && m_Specs.Point > 0) {
  769 |         m_MarketInfo.Spread = (m_MarketInfo.Ask - m_MarketInfo.Bid) / m_Specs.Point;
  770 |     }
  771 |     
  772 |     // Update trading flags
  773 |     m_MarketInfo.IsTradeAllowed = (m_MarketInfo.TradeMode != SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE_DISABLED);
  774 |     m_MarketInfo.IsQuoteSession = IsInQuoteSession();
  775 |     m_MarketInfo.IsTradeSession = IsInTradingSession();
  776 | }
  777 | 
  778 | bool CSymbolManager::ValidateSymbol(const string& symbol) {
  779 |     if (symbol == "") {
  780 |         return false;
  781 |     }
  782 |     
  783 |     // Try to select the symbol
  784 |     if (!SymbolSelect(symbol, true)) {
  785 |         return false;
  786 |     }
  787 |     
  788 |     // Check if symbol exists in market watch
  789 |     return SymbolInfoInteger(symbol, SYMBOL_SELECT);
  790 | }
  791 | 
  792 | void CSymbolManager::CalculateStatistics() {
  793 |     // Get daily high/low
  794 |     m_Statistics.DailyHigh = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_LASTHIGH);
  795 |     m_Statistics.DailyLow = SymbolInfoDouble(m_CurrentSymbol, SYMBOL_LASTLOW);
  796 |     
  797 |     if (m_Statistics.DailyHigh > 0 && m_Statistics.DailyLow > 0) {
  798 |         m_Statistics.DailyRange = m_Statistics.DailyHigh - m_Statistics.DailyLow;
  799 |     }
  800 |     
  801 |     // Calculate average spread
  802 |     m_Statistics.AverageSpread = CalculateAverageSpread();
  803 |     
  804 |     // Update min/max spread
  805 |     if (m_Statistics.MinSpread == 0 || m_MarketInfo.Spread < m_Statistics.MinSpread) {
  806 |         m_Statistics.MinSpread = m_MarketInfo.Spread;
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     if (m_MarketInfo.Spread > m_Statistics.MaxSpread) {
  810 |         m_Statistics.MaxSpread = m_MarketInfo.Spread;
  811 |     }
  812 |     
  813 |     // Calculate volatility
  814 |     m_Statistics.Volatility = CalculateVolatility();
  815 | }
  816 | 
  817 | void CSymbolManager::InitializeDefaultConfig() {
  818 |     m_Config.MaxSpreadAllowed = 50.0;        // 50 points
  819 |     m_Config.MinVolumeRequired = 0;          // No minimum volume
  820 |     m_Config.AllowTrading = true;
  821 |     m_Config.AllowLongPositions = true;
  822 |     m_Config.AllowShortPositions = true;
  823 |     m_Config.MaxPositionSize = 10.0;         // 10 lots
  824 |     m_Config.RiskPerTrade = 2.0;             // 2% per trade
  825 |     m_Config.MaxPositions = 5;               // 5 concurrent positions
  826 |     m_Config.UseNewsFilter = false;
  827 |     m_Config.UseSessionFilter = false;
  828 | }
  829 | 
  830 | double CSymbolManager::CalculateAverageSpread() {
  831 |     static double spread_sum = 0;
  832 |     static int spread_count = 0;
  833 |     
  834 |     if (m_MarketInfo.Spread > 0) {
  835 |         spread_sum += m_MarketInfo.Spread;
  836 |         spread_count++;
  837 |         return spread_sum / spread_count;
  838 |     }
  839 |     
  840 |     return m_Statistics.AverageSpread;
  841 | }
  842 | 
  843 | double CSymbolManager::CalculateVolatility() {
  844 |     // Simple volatility calculation based on daily range
  845 |     if (m_Statistics.DailyRange > 0 && m_MarketInfo.Bid > 0) {
  846 |         return m_Statistics.DailyRange / m_MarketInfo.Bid * 100.0; // Percentage
  847 |     }
  848 |     
  849 |     return 0.0;
  850 | }
  851 | 
  852 | bool CSymbolManager::IsSessionActive(const SSymbolSession& session) {
  853 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  854 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  855 |     TimeToStruct(current_time, dt);
  856 |     
  857 |     // Check day of week
  858 |     if (session.DayOfWeek != (ENUM_DAY_OF_WEEK)dt.day_of_week) {
  859 |         return false;
  860 |     }
  861 |     
  862 |     // Check time range
  863 |     datetime current_seconds = dt.hour * 3600 + dt.min * 60 + dt.sec;
  864 |     
  865 |     MqlDateTime session_begin, session_end;
  866 |     TimeToStruct(session.SessionBegin, session_begin);
  867 |     TimeToStruct(session.SessionEnd, session_end);
  868 |     
  869 |     datetime begin_seconds = session_begin.hour * 3600 + session_begin.min * 60;
  870 |     datetime end_seconds = session_end.hour * 3600 + session_end.min * 60;
  871 |     
  872 |     if (begin_seconds <= end_seconds) {
  873 |         return (current_seconds >= begin_seconds && current_seconds <= end_seconds);
  874 |     } else {
  875 |         // Session crosses midnight
  876 |         return (current_seconds >= begin_seconds || current_seconds <= end_seconds);
  877 |     }
  878 | }
  879 | 
  880 | void CSymbolManager::LogSymbolEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  881 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  882 |         switch(level) {
  883 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  884 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  885 |                 break;
  886 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  887 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  888 |                 break;
  889 |             default:
  890 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  891 |         }
  892 |     }
  893 | }
  894 | 
  895 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5

  897 | #endif // SYMBOL_MANAGER_MQH_

   74 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES m_timeframe;

  117 |     bool IsStrategyReliable(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy);
  118 |

  121 |     double CalculateVolatilityScore(double atrPercent);
  122 |     double CalculateTrendScore(double ema20, double ema50, double ema200);
  123 |     double CalculateMomentumScore(double rsi, double macd);
  124 |     double CalculateTradeDecayWeight(datetime tradeTime);
  125 |     
  126 |     // Cross-Validation
  127 |     CrossValidationResult PerformCrossValidation(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy, int folds = 5);
  128 |     double CalculateStabilityScore(const CrossValidationResult& cvResult);
  129 |     double CalculateOverfittingPenalty(const CrossValidationResult& cvResult);
  130 |     
  131 |     // Market Suitability
  132 |     double CalculateMarketSuitability(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy, const MarketState& profile);
  133 |     double GetPastPerformanceScore(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy);
  134 |     
  135 |     // Utility Methods
  136 |     void PrintAnalysisSummary();
  137 |     void UpdateConfiguration();
  138 | };
  139 | 
  140 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  141 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  142 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  143 | CAssetDNA::CAssetDNA() : 
  144 |     m_pContext(NULL),
  145 |     m_tradeHistory(NULL),
  146 |     m_volatilityScore(0.0),
  147 |     m_trendScore(0.0),
  148 |     m_momentumScore(0.0),
  149 |     m_regimeScore(0.0),
  150 |     m_cutoffTime(0),
  151 |     m_decayHalfLife(30.0),
  152 |     m_minTradesForAnalysis(10)
  153 | {
  154 |     // Initialize strategy stats
  155 |     for(int i = 0; i < ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT; i++) {
  156 |         m_strategyStats[i].Clear();
  157 |         m_strategyStats[i].strategy = (ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY)i;
  158 |     }
  159 | }
  160 | 
  161 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  162 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  163 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  164 | CAssetDNA::~CAssetDNA() {
  165 |     if(m_tradeHistory) {
  166 |         delete m_tradeHistory;
  167 |         m_tradeHistory = NULL;
  168 |     }
  169 | }
  170 | 
  171 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  172 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  173 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  174 | bool CAssetDNA::Initialize(EAContext* context, const string symbol) {
  175 |     if(!context || !context->pLogger) return false;
  176 |     
  177 |     m_pContext = context;
  178 |     m_symbol = symbol;
  179 |     m_timeframe = context->InputParams.MainTimeframe;
  180 |     
  181 |     // Initialize trade history
  182 |     m_tradeHistory = new CArrayObj();
  183 |     if(!m_tradeHistory) {
  184 |         if(m_pContext->pLogger) 
  185 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create trade history array", __FUNCTION__);
  186 |         return false;
  187 |     }
  188 |     m_tradeHistory->FreeMode(true);
  189 |     
  190 |     // Set analysis parameters from context
  191 |     if(context->InputParams.HistoryAnalysisMonths > 0) {
  192 |         m_cutoffTime = TimeCurrent() - (context->InputParams.HistoryAnalysisMonths * 30 * 24 * 3600);
  193 |     }
  194 |     m_decayHalfLife = context->InputParams.DecayHalfLifeDays;
  195 |     m_minTradesForAnalysis = context->InputParams.MinTradesForPerformance;
  196 |     
  197 |     if(m_pContext->pLogger)
  198 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("AssetDNA initialized for " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  199 |         
  200 |     return true;
  201 | }
  202 | 
  203 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  204 | //| Full Analysis Implementation                                     |
  205 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  206 | bool CAssetDNA::FullAnalysis() {
  207 |     if(!m_pContext || !m_pContext->pLogger) return false;
  208 |     
  209 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Starting comprehensive AssetDNA analysis for " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  210 |     
  211 |     // Perform all analysis components
  212 |     AnalyzeAssetCharacteristics();
  213 |     LoadTradeHistory();
  214 |     AnalyzeStrategyPerformance();
  215 |     
  216 |     if(m_pContext->InputParams.EnableDNAPrinting) {
  217 |         PrintAnalysisSummary();
  218 |     }
  219 |     
  220 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("AssetDNA analysis completed for " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  221 |     return true;
  222 | }
  223 | 
  224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 | //| Get Optimal Strategy                                             |
  226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 | ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY CAssetDNA::GetOptimalStrategy(const MarketState& currentProfile) {
  228 |     if(!m_pContext || !m_pContext->pLogger) return STRATEGY_UNDEFINED;
  229 |     
  230 |     double highestScore = -1.0;
  231 |     ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY bestStrategy = STRATEGY_UNDEFINED;
  232 |     
  233 |     for(int i = 0; i < ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT; i++) {
  234 |         ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy = (ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY)i;
  235 |         if(strategy == STRATEGY_UNDEFINED) continue;
  236 |         
  237 |         double marketSuitability = CalculateMarketSuitability(strategy, currentProfile);
  238 |         double pastPerformance = GetPastPerformanceScore(strategy);
  239 |         
  240 |         double finalScore = (marketSuitability * m_pContext->InputParams.MarketSuitabilityWeight) + 
  241 |                            (pastPerformance * m_pContext->InputParams.PastPerformanceWeight);
  242 |         
  243 |         if(finalScore > highestScore) {
  244 |             highestScore = finalScore;
  245 |             bestStrategy = strategy;
  246 |         }
  247 |     }
  248 |     
  249 |     if(m_pContext->pLogger && m_pContext->InputParams.EnableDetailedScoreLogging) {
  250 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Optimal strategy: %s (Score: %.3f)", 
  251 |                                     EnumToString(bestStrategy), highestScore), __FUNCTION__);
  252 |     }
  253 |     
  254 |     return bestStrategy;
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | } // namespace ApexPullback
  258 | 
  259 | #endif // ASSET_DNA_V5_FINAL_MQH
================================================================================

  171 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  172 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  173 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  174 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  175 |     if(!context || !context->pLogger) return false;
  176 |     
  177 |     m_pContext = context;
  178 |     
  179 |     if(!m_pContext->InputParams.EnableBrokerHealthMonitoring) {
  180 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("BrokerHealthMonitor is disabled by settings", __FUNCTION__);
  181 |         return true;
  182 |     }
  183 |     
  184 |     // Initialize history arrays
  185 |     ArrayResize(m_healthHistory, m_maxHistorySize);
  186 |     ArrayResize(m_slippageHistory, m_maxHistorySize);
  187 |     ArrayResize(m_latencyHistory, m_maxHistorySize);
  188 |     
  189 |     ArrayInitialize(m_healthHistory, 100.0);
  190 |     ArrayInitialize(m_slippageHistory, 0.0);
  191 |     ArrayInitialize(m_latencyHistory, 0.0);
  192 |     
  193 |     m_historySize = 0;
  194 |     
  195 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("BrokerHealthMonitor initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  196 |     return true;
  197 | }
  198 | 
  199 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  200 | //| Update Metrics                                                   |
  201 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  202 | void CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateMetrics() {
  203 |     if(!m_pContext || !m_pContext->InputParams.EnableBrokerHealthMonitoring) return;
  204 |     
  205 |     // Store previous metrics
  206 |     m_previousMetrics = m_currentMetrics;
  207 |     
  208 |     // Calculate component scores
  209 |     m_currentMetrics.SlippageScore = CalculateSlippageScore();
  210 |     m_currentMetrics.LatencyScore = CalculateLatencyScore();
  211 |     m_currentMetrics.RequoteScore = CalculateRequoteScore();
  212 |     m_currentMetrics.SuccessRateScore = CalculateSuccessRateScore();
  213 |     
  214 |     // Calculate overall health
  215 |     m_currentMetrics.HealthScore = CalculateOverallHealthScore();
  216 |     m_currentMetrics.HealthStatus = DetermineHealthStatus(m_currentMetrics.HealthScore);
  217 |     
  218 |     // Update trend analysis
  219 |     UpdateHealthHistory(m_currentMetrics.HealthScore);
  220 |     UpdateTrendAnalysis();
  221 |     
  222 |     // Check for alerts
  223 |     CheckAndTriggerAlerts();
  224 |     
  225 |     if(m_pContext->pLogger && m_pContext->InputParams.EnableMethodLogging) {
  226 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug(StringFormat("Health updated: Score=%.2f, Status=%s", 
  227 |                                      m_currentMetrics.HealthScore, 
  228 |                                      GetHealthStatusString(m_currentMetrics.HealthStatus)), __FUNCTION__);
  229 |     }
  230 | }
  231 | 
  232 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  233 | //| Get Risk Adjustment Factor                                       |
  234 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  235 | double CBrokerHealthMonitor::GetRiskAdjustmentFactor() {
  236 |     switch(m_currentMetrics.HealthStatus) {
  237 |         case HEALTH_EXCELLENT: return 1.0;
  238 |         case HEALTH_GOOD:      return 0.9;
  239 |         case HEALTH_WARNING:   return 0.7;
  240 |         case HEALTH_CRITICAL:  return 0.5;
  241 |         default:               return 1.0;
  242 |     }
  243 | }

  245 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  246 | //| Generate Health Report                                           |
  247 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  248 | void CBrokerHealthMonitor::GenerateHealthReport(string& report) {
  249 |     report = "=== BROKER HEALTH REPORT ===\n";
  250 |     report += StringFormat("Overall Score: %.2f (%s)\n", 
  251 |                           m_currentMetrics.HealthScore, 
  252 |                           GetHealthStatusString(m_currentMetrics.HealthStatus));
  253 |     report += StringFormat("Health Trend: %.3f\n", m_currentMetrics.HealthTrend);
  254 |     report += StringFormat("Slippage Score: %.2f\n", m_currentMetrics.SlippageScore);
  255 |     report += StringFormat("Latency Score: %.2f\n", m_currentMetrics.LatencyScore);
  256 |     report += StringFormat("Success Rate: %.2f\n", m_currentMetrics.SuccessRateScore);
  257 |     report += "============================";
  258 | }

   21 |     REGIME_TRENDING_BULL,        // Strong bullish trend

   29 | };

  395 | class CMarketProfile {
  396 | private:

  412 |     // Historical profiles

  416 |     // Session data
  417 |     SProfileSession       m_CurrentSession; // Current session
  418 |     SProfileSession       m_PreviousSession; // Previous session
  419 |     
  420 |     // Working data
  421 |     double                m_PriceData[];    // Price data buffer
  422 |     long                  m_VolumeData[];   // Volume data buffer
  423 |     datetime              m_TimeData[];     // Time data buffer
  424 |     int                   m_DataCount;      // Data count
  425 |

  428 |     double                m_ResistanceLevels[]; // Resistance levels from profile
  429 |     int                   m_SupportCount;   // Support levels count
  430 |     int                   m_ResistanceCount; // Resistance levels count
  431 |

  433 |     double                m_ATRHistory[];   // ATR history for calculations
  434 |     double                m_SpreadHistory[]; // Spread history
  435 |     int                   m_SpreadCount;    // Spread count
  436 |     datetime              m_LastUpdateTime; // Last update time
  437 |     datetime              m_LastRegimeUpdate; // Last regime update
  438 |     
  439 |     // Update tracking
  440 |     datetime              m_LastUpdate;     // Last update time
  441 |     datetime              m_LastProfileBuild; // Last profile build time
  442 |     
  443 |     // Constants
  444 |     static const double   DEFAULT_VALUE_AREA_PERCENT;
  445 |     static const int      DEFAULT_TICKS_PER_LEVEL;
  446 |     static const int      MAX_PRICE_LEVELS;

  668 | // Static constants definition
  669 | const double CMarketProfile::DEFAULT_VALUE_AREA_PERCENT = 70.0;
  670 | const int CMarketProfile::DEFAULT_TICKS_PER_LEVEL = 1;
  671 | const int CMarketProfile::MAX_PRICE_LEVELS = 1000;
