  673 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  674 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  675 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  676 | CMarketProfile::CMarketProfile(EAContext* context) {
  677 |     m_pContext = context;
  678 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  679 |     m_Symbol = "";
  680 |     m_Timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  681 |     m_DataCount = 0;
  682 |     m_ProfileCount = 0;
  683 |     m_SupportCount = 0;
  684 |     m_ResistanceCount = 0;
  685 |     m_SpreadCount = 0;
  686 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  687 |     m_LastProfileBuild = 0;
  688 |     m_LastUpdateTime = 0;
  689 |     m_LastRegimeUpdate = 0;
  690 |     
  691 |     // Initialize structures
  692 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  693 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentProfile);
  694 |     ZeroMemory(m_MarketContext);
  695 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentData);
  696 |     ZeroMemory(m_PreviousData);
  697 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  698 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentSession);
  699 |     ZeroMemory(m_PreviousSession);
  700 |     
  701 |     // Set enhanced default configuration (v14)
  702 |     m_Config.ProfileType = PROFILE_DAILY;
  703 |     m_Config.TicksPerLevel = DEFAULT_TICKS_PER_LEVEL;
  704 |     m_Config.ValueAreaPercent = DEFAULT_VALUE_AREA_PERCENT;
  705 |     m_Config.MinVolumeThreshold = 10;
  706 |     m_Config.UseTickVolume = true;
  707 |     m_Config.CalculateTPO = true;
  708 |     m_Config.ShowLowVolumeNodes = true;
  709 |     m_Config.ShowHighVolumeNodes = true;
  710 |     m_Config.SessionStartHour = 0;
  711 |     m_Config.SessionEndHour = 24;
  712 |     m_Config.AutoDetectSessions = true;
  713 |     m_Config.MaxProfileDays = 30;
  714 |     
  715 |     // Enhanced configuration (v14)
  716 |     m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe = true;
  717 |     m_Config.HigherTimeframe = PERIOD_H4;
  718 |     m_Config.EnableRegimeAnalysis = true;
  719 |     m_Config.EnableVolatilityAnalysis = true;
  720 |     m_Config.VolatilityThreshold = 1.5;
  721 |     m_Config.TrendThreshold = 25.0;
  722 |     m_Config.EnableSmartFiltering = true;
  723 |     m_Config.RegimeUpdateInterval = 5;
  724 | }
  725 | 
  726 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  727 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  728 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  729 | CMarketProfile::~CMarketProfile() {
  730 |     Deinitialize();
  731 | }
  732 | 
  733 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  734 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  735 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  736 | bool CMarketProfile::Initialize(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const SProfileConfig& config) {
  737 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  738 |         return true;
  739 |     }
  740 |     
  741 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  742 |         Print("[MARKET_PROFILE] Context is NULL");
  743 |         return false;
  744 |     }
  745 |     
  746 |     m_Symbol = symbol;
  747 |     m_Timeframe = timeframe;
  748 |     m_Config = config;
  749 |     
  750 |     // Validate configuration
  751 |     if (m_Config.ValueAreaPercent <= 0 || m_Config.ValueAreaPercent > 100) {
  752 |         m_Config.ValueAreaPercent = DEFAULT_VALUE_AREA_PERCENT;
  753 |     }
  754 |     
  755 |     if (m_Config.TicksPerLevel <= 0) {
  756 |         m_Config.TicksPerLevel = DEFAULT_TICKS_PER_LEVEL;
  757 |     }
  758 |     
  759 |     // Initialize enhanced arrays (v14)
  760 |     if (!InitializeDataArrays()) {
  761 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  762 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("Failed to initialize data arrays", __FUNCTION__);
  763 |         }
  764 |         return false;
  765 |     }
  766 |     
  767 |     // Initialize arrays
  768 |     ArrayResize(m_HistoricalProfiles, m_Config.MaxProfileDays);
  769 |     ArrayResize(m_SupportLevels, 20);
  770 |     ArrayResize(m_ResistanceLevels, 20);
  771 |     
  772 |     // Initialize market data
  773 |     if (!UpdateMarketData()) {
  774 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  775 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning("Failed to update initial market data", __FUNCTION__);
  776 |         }
  777 |     }
  778 |     
  779 |     // Build initial profile
  780 |     if (!BuildCurrentProfile()) {
  781 |         LogProfileEvent("Failed to build initial profile", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  782 |     }
  783 |     
  784 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  785 |     
  786 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  787 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("Enhanced MarketProfile initialized for: " + symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  788 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetProfileSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  789 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetRegimeAnalysis(), __FUNCTION__);
  790 |     }
  791 |     
  792 |     return true;
  793 | }
  794 | 
  795 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  796 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  797 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  798 | void CMarketProfile::Deinitialize() {
  799 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  800 |         return;
  801 |     }
  802 |     
  803 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  804 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetTradingRecommendations(), __FUNCTION__);
  805 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetRegimeAnalysis(), __FUNCTION__);
  806 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("Enhanced MarketProfile shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  810 | }
  811 | 
  812 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  813 | //| Enhanced Update Method (v14)                                    |
  814 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  815 | void CMarketProfile::Update() {
  816 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  817 |         return;
  818 |     }
  819 |     
  820 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  821 |     
  822 |     // Check for new bar
  823 |     if (!IsNewBar()) {
  824 |         return; // No new data to process
  825 |     }
  826 |     
  827 |     // Update market data
  828 |     if (!UpdateMarketData()) {
  829 |         LogProfileEvent("Failed to update market data", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  830 |         return;
  831 |     }
  832 |     
  833 |     // Update market regime (at configured intervals)
  834 |     if (m_Config.EnableRegimeAnalysis && 
  835 |         (current_time - m_LastRegimeUpdate >= m_Config.RegimeUpdateInterval * 60)) {
  836 |         AnalyzeMarketRegime();
  837 |         m_LastRegimeUpdate = current_time;
  838 |     }
  839 |     
  840 |     // Update session
  841 |     UpdateCurrentSession();
  842 |     
  843 |     // Rebuild profile periodically
  844 |     if (current_time - m_LastProfileBuild >= 3600) { // Every hour
  845 |         BuildCurrentProfile();
  846 |         m_LastProfileBuild = current_time;
  847 |     }
  848 |     
  849 |     // Update market structure
  850 |     AnalyzeMarketStructure();
  851 |     
  852 |     // Multi-timeframe analysis
  853 |     if (m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe) {
  854 |         AnalyzeMultiTimeframe();
  855 |     }
  856 |     
  857 |     // Calculate enhanced statistics
  858 |     CalculateEnhancedStatistics();
  859 |     
  860 |     m_LastUpdate = current_time;
  861 |     
  862 |     // Log significant changes
  863 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger.IsDebugEnabled()) {
  864 |         string log_msg = StringFormat("MarketProfile Update - Regime: %s, Trend: %s, Volatility: %.2f, Strength: %.1f",
  865 |             EnumToString(m_MarketContext.Regime),
  866 |             EnumToString(m_MarketContext.Trend),
  867 |             m_MarketContext.VolatilityRatio,
  868 |             m_MarketContext.TrendStrength);
  869 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogDebug(log_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  870 |     }
  871 | }
  872 | 
  873 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  874 | //| Build Current Profile                                            |
  875 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  876 | bool CMarketProfile::BuildCurrentProfile() {
  877 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  878 |         return false;
  879 |     }
  880 |     
  881 |     LogProfileEvent("Building current market profile", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  882 |     
  883 |     // Determine time range based on profile type
  884 |     datetime start_time, end_time;
  885 |     end_time = TimeCurrent();
  886 |     
  887 |     switch(m_Config.ProfileType) {
  888 |         case PROFILE_DAILY:
  889 |             start_time = end_time - 86400; // 24 hours
  890 |             break;
  891 |         case PROFILE_WEEKLY:
  892 |             start_time = end_time - 604800; // 7 days
  893 |             break;
  894 |         case PROFILE_MONTHLY:
  895 |             start_time = end_time - 2592000; // 30 days
  896 |             break;
  897 |         case PROFILE_SESSION:
  898 |             // Use session times
  899 |             start_time = end_time - (m_Config.SessionEndHour - m_Config.SessionStartHour) * 3600;
  900 |             break;
  901 |         default:
  902 |             start_time = end_time - 86400;
  903 |     }
  904 |     
  905 |     // Load market data
  906 |     if (!LoadMarketData(start_time, end_time)) {
  907 |         LogProfileEvent("Failed to load market data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  908 |         return false;
  909 |     }
  910 |     
  911 |     // Build profile
  912 |     CalculatePriceLevels();
  913 |     DistributeVolume();
  914 |     CalculateValueArea();
  915 |     AnalyzeProfileShape();
  916 |     CalculateStatistics();
  917 |     IdentifyVolumeNodes();
  918 |     IdentifySupportResistance();
  919 |     
  920 |     // Update metadata
  921 |     m_CurrentProfile.ProfileDate = TimeCurrent();
  922 |     m_CurrentProfile.ProfileType = m_Config.ProfileType;
  923 |     
  924 |     LogProfileEvent("Market profile built successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  925 |     
  926 |     return true;
  927 | }
  928 | 
  929 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  930 | //| Get POC                                                          |
  931 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  932 | double CMarketProfile::GetPOC() const {
  933 |     return m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.POC;
  934 | }
  935 | 
  936 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  937 | //| Is Price In Value Area                                           |
  938 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  939 | bool CMarketProfile::IsPriceInValueArea(const double price) {
  940 |     return (price >= m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAL && 
  941 |             price <= m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAH);
  942 | }
  943 | 
  944 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  945 | //| Is Price Above Value Area                                        |
  946 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  947 | bool CMarketProfile::IsPriceAboveValueArea(const double price) {
  948 |     return (price > m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAH);
  949 | }
  950 | 
  951 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  952 | //| Is Price Below Value Area                                        |
  953 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  954 | bool CMarketProfile::IsPriceBelowValueArea(const double price) {
  955 |     return (price < m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAL);
  956 | }
  957 | 
  958 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  959 | //| Get Volume At Price                                              |
  960 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  961 | long CMarketProfile::GetVolumeAtPrice(const double price) {
  962 |     int level = PriceToLevel(price);
  963 |     
  964 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount; i++) {
  965 |         if (PriceToLevel(m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Price) == level) {
  966 |             return m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Volume;
  967 |         }
  968 |     }
  969 |     
  970 |     return 0;
  971 | }
  972 | 
  973 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  974 | //| Is High Volume Node                                              |
  975 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  976 | bool CMarketProfile::IsHighVolumeNode(const double price) {
  977 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount; i++) {
  978 |         if (MathAbs(m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Price - price) < m_CurrentProfile.TickSize) {
  979 |             return m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].IsHighVolume;
  980 |         }
  981 |     }
  982 |     return false;
  983 | }
  984 | 
  985 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  986 | //| Is Value Area Rejection                                          |
  987 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  988 | bool CMarketProfile::IsValueAreaRejection(const double price) {
  989 |     // Check if price tested value area boundaries and was rejected
  990 |     double vah = m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAH;
  991 |     double val = m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAL;
  992 |     
  993 |     // Price near VAH and moving down = rejection
  994 |     if (MathAbs(price - vah) < m_CurrentProfile.TickSize * 3) {
  995 |         return true;
  996 |     }
  997 |     
  998 |     // Price near VAL and moving up = rejection
  999 |     if (MathAbs(price - val) < m_CurrentProfile.TickSize * 3) {
 1000 |         return true;
 1001 |     }
 1002 |     
 1003 |     return false;
 1004 | }
 1005 | 
 1006 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1007 | //| Get Profile Summary                                              |
 1008 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1009 | string CMarketProfile::GetProfileSummary() {
 1010 |     string summary = "=== MARKET PROFILE ANALYSIS ===\n";
 1011 |     summary += StringFormat("Symbol: %s\n", m_Symbol);
 1012 |     summary += StringFormat("Profile Type: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Config.ProfileType));
 1013 |     summary += StringFormat("POC: %.5f\n", m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.POC);
 1014 |     summary += StringFormat("VAH: %.5f\n", m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAH);
 1015 |     summary += StringFormat("VAL: %.5f\n", m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAL);
 1016 |     summary += StringFormat("Value Area Volume: %.1f%%\n", m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.ValueAreaPercent);
 1017 |     summary += StringFormat("Profile Shape: %s\n", EnumToString(m_CurrentProfile.Shape));
 1018 |     summary += StringFormat("Market Structure: %s\n", EnumToString(m_MarketContext.Structure));
 1019 |     summary += StringFormat("High Volume Nodes: %d\n", m_Stats.HighVolumeNodes);
 1020 |     summary += StringFormat("Low Volume Nodes: %d\n", m_Stats.LowVolumeNodes);
 1021 |     
 1022 |     return summary;
 1023 | }
 1024 | 
 1025 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1026 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
 1027 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1028 | bool CMarketProfile::LoadMarketData(const datetime start_time, const datetime end_time) {
 1029 |     if (m_Symbol == "") {
 1030 |         return false;
 1031 |     }
 1032 |     
 1033 |     // Calculate required bars
 1034 |     int bars_needed = (int)((end_time - start_time) / PeriodSeconds(m_Timeframe));
 1035 |     if (bars_needed <= 0) {
 1036 |         return false;
 1037 |     }
 1038 |     
 1039 |     // Load price data
 1040 |     double high_prices[], low_prices[], close_prices[];
 1041 |     long volumes[];
 1042 |     datetime times[];
 1043 |     
 1044 |     int copied_high = CopyHigh(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, start_time, bars_needed, high_prices);
 1045 |     int copied_low = CopyLow(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, start_time, bars_needed, low_prices);
 1046 |     int copied_close = CopyClose(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, start_time, bars_needed, close_prices);
 1047 |     int copied_volumes = CopyTickVolume(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, start_time, bars_needed, volumes);
 1048 |     int copied_times = CopyTime(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, start_time, bars_needed, times);
 1049 |     
 1050 |     if (copied_high < 10 || copied_low < 10 || copied_close < 10) {
 1051 |         LogProfileEvent("Insufficient market data loaded", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1052 |         return false;
 1053 |     }
 1054 |     
 1055 |     // Store data for profile building
 1056 |     m_DataCount = copied_high;
 1057 |     ArrayResize(m_PriceData, m_DataCount * 3); // High, Low, Close
 1058 |     ArrayResize(m_VolumeData, m_DataCount);
 1059 |     ArrayResize(m_TimeData, m_DataCount);
 1060 |     
 1061 |     // Combine price data (High, Low, Close for each bar)
 1062 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DataCount; i++) {
 1063 |         m_PriceData[i * 3] = high_prices[i];
 1064 |         m_PriceData[i * 3 + 1] = low_prices[i];
 1065 |         m_PriceData[i * 3 + 2] = close_prices[i];
 1066 |         
 1067 |         if (copied_volumes > i) {
 1068 |             m_VolumeData[i] = volumes[i];
 1069 |         } else {
 1070 |             m_VolumeData[i] = 1; // Default volume
 1071 |         }
 1072 |         
 1073 |         if (copied_times > i) {
 1074 |             m_TimeData[i] = times[i];
 1075 |         }
 1076 |     }
 1077 |     
 1078 |     return true;
 1079 | }
 1080 | 
 1081 | void CMarketProfile::CalculatePriceLevels() {
 1082 |     if (m_DataCount == 0) {
 1083 |         return;
 1084 |     }
 1085 |     
 1086 |     // Find price range
 1087 |     double min_price = m_PriceData[0];
 1088 |     double max_price = m_PriceData[0];
 1089 |     
 1090 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DataCount * 3; i++) {
 1091 |         if (m_PriceData[i] < min_price) min_price = m_PriceData[i];
 1092 |         if (m_PriceData[i] > max_price) max_price = m_PriceData[i];
 1093 |     }
 1094 |     
 1095 |     // Get symbol tick size
 1096 |     double tick_size = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
 1097 |     if (tick_size <= 0) tick_size = 0.00001; // Default for forex
 1098 |     
 1099 |     m_CurrentProfile.TickSize = tick_size * m_Config.TicksPerLevel;
 1100 |     m_CurrentProfile.MinPrice = min_price;
 1101 |     m_CurrentProfile.MaxPrice = max_price;
 1102 |     
 1103 |     // Calculate number of levels
 1104 |     int level_count = (int)((max_price - min_price) / m_CurrentProfile.TickSize) + 1;
 1105 |     level_count = MathMin(level_count, MAX_PRICE_LEVELS);
 1106 |     
 1107 |     // Initialize price levels
 1108 |     ArrayResize(m_CurrentProfile.Levels, level_count);
 1109 |     m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount = level_count;
 1110 |     
 1111 |     for (int i = 0; i < level_count; i++) {
 1112 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Price = min_price + i * m_CurrentProfile.TickSize;
 1113 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Volume = 0;
 1114 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].TimeSpent = 0;
 1115 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].VolumePercent = 0.0;
 1116 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].IsHighVolume = false;
 1117 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].IsLowVolume = false;
 1118 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].IsPOC = false;
 1119 |         m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].IsValueArea = false;
 1120 |     }
 1121 | }
 1122 | 
 1123 | void CMarketProfile::DistributeVolume() {
 1124 |     if (m_DataCount == 0 || m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount == 0) {
 1125 |         return;
 1126 |     }
 1127 |     
 1128 |     m_CurrentProfile.TotalVolume = 0;
 1129 |     
 1130 |     // Distribute volume across price levels
 1131 |     for (int bar = 0; bar < m_DataCount; bar++) {
 1132 |         double high = m_PriceData[bar * 3];
 1133 |         double low = m_PriceData[bar * 3 + 1];
 1134 |         double close = m_PriceData[bar * 3 + 2];
 1135 |         long volume = m_VolumeData[bar];
 1136 |         
 1137 |         // Find levels within this bar's range
 1138 |         int start_level = PriceToLevel(low);
 1139 |         int end_level = PriceToLevel(high);
 1140 |         
 1141 |         if (start_level == end_level) {
 1142 |             // All volume goes to one level
 1143 |             if (start_level >= 0 && start_level < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount) {
 1144 |                 m_CurrentProfile.Levels[start_level].Volume += volume;
 1145 |                 m_CurrentProfile.Levels[start_level].TimeSpent++;
 1146 |             }
 1147 |         } else {
 1148 |             // Distribute volume across multiple levels
 1149 |             int level_count = end_level - start_level + 1;
 1150 |             long volume_per_level = volume / level_count;
 1151 |             
 1152 |             for (int level = start_level; level <= end_level; level++) {
 1153 |                 if (level >= 0 && level < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount) {
 1154 |                     m_CurrentProfile.Levels[level].Volume += volume_per_level;
 1155 |                     m_CurrentProfile.Levels[level].TimeSpent++;
 1156 |                 }
 1157 |             }
 1158 |         }
 1159 |         
 1160 |         m_CurrentProfile.TotalVolume += volume;
 1161 |     }
 1162 |     
 1163 |     // Calculate volume percentages
 1164 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount; i++) {
 1165 |         if (m_CurrentProfile.TotalVolume > 0) {
 1166 |             m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].VolumePercent = 
 1167 |                 (double)m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Volume / m_CurrentProfile.TotalVolume * 100.0;
 1168 |         }
 1169 |     }
 1170 | }
 1171 | 
 1172 | void CMarketProfile::CalculateValueArea() {
 1173 |     if (m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount == 0 || m_CurrentProfile.TotalVolume == 0) {
 1174 |         return;
 1175 |     }
 1176 |     
 1177 |     // Find POC (Point of Control) - level with highest volume
 1178 |     int poc_index = 0;
 1179 |     long max_volume = 0;
 1180 |     
 1181 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount; i++) {
 1182 |         if (m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Volume > max_volume) {
 1183 |             max_volume = m_CurrentProfile.Levels[i].Volume;
 1184 |             poc_index = i;
 1185 |         }
 1186 |     }
 1187 |     
 1188 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.POC = m_CurrentProfile.Levels[poc_index].Price;
 1189 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VolumeAtPOC = (double)max_volume;
 1190 |     m_CurrentProfile.Levels[poc_index].IsPOC = true;
 1191 |     
 1192 |     // Calculate value area (default 70% of volume)
 1193 |     long target_volume = (long)(m_CurrentProfile.TotalVolume * m_Config.ValueAreaPercent / 100.0);
 1194 |     long accumulated_volume = max_volume;
 1195 |     
 1196 |     int va_high_index = poc_index;
 1197 |     int va_low_index = poc_index;
 1198 |     
 1199 |     // Expand value area up and down from POC
 1200 |     while (accumulated_volume < target_volume && 
 1201 |            (va_high_index < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount - 1 || va_low_index > 0)) {
 1202 |         
 1203 |         long volume_above = 0, volume_below = 0;
 1204 |         
 1205 |         if (va_high_index < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount - 1) {
 1206 |             volume_above = m_CurrentProfile.Levels[va_high_index + 1].Volume;
 1207 |         }
 1208 |         
 1209 |         if (va_low_index > 0) {
 1210 |             volume_below = m_CurrentProfile.Levels[va_low_index - 1].Volume;
 1211 |         }
 1212 |         
 1213 |         // Add the side with more volume
 1214 |         if (volume_above >= volume_below && va_high_index < m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount - 1) {
 1215 |             va_high_index++;
 1216 |             accumulated_volume += volume_above;
 1217 |             m_CurrentProfile.Levels[va_high_index].IsValueArea = true;
 1218 |         } else if (va_low_index > 0) {
 1219 |             va_low_index--;
 1220 |             accumulated_volume += volume_below;
 1221 |             m_CurrentProfile.Levels[va_low_index].IsValueArea = true;
 1222 |         } else {
 1223 |             break;
 1224 |         }
 1225 |     }
 1226 |     
 1227 |     // Set value area boundaries
 1228 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAH = m_CurrentProfile.Levels[va_high_index].Price;
 1229 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAL = m_CurrentProfile.Levels[va_low_index].Price;
 1230 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.ValueAreaVolume = (double)accumulated_volume;
 1231 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.ValueAreaPercent = 
 1232 |         (double)accumulated_volume / m_CurrentProfile.TotalVolume * 100.0;
 1233 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.ValueAreaWidth = va_high_index - va_low_index + 1;
 1234 |     m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.IsValid = true;
 1235 | }
 1236 | 
 1237 | int CMarketProfile::PriceToLevel(const double price) {
 1238 |     if (m_CurrentProfile.TickSize <= 0) {
 1239 |         return 0;
 1240 |     }
 1241 |     
 1242 |     int level = (int)((price - m_CurrentProfile.MinPrice) / m_CurrentProfile.TickSize);
 1243 |     return MathMax(0, MathMin(level, m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount - 1));
 1244 | }
 1245 | 
 1246 | double CMarketProfile::LevelToPrice(const int level) {
 1247 |     if (level < 0 || level >= m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount) {
 1248 |         return 0.0;
 1249 |     }
 1250 |     
 1251 |     return m_CurrentProfile.MinPrice + level * m_CurrentProfile.TickSize;
 1252 | }
 1253 | 
 1254 | void CMarketProfile::AnalyzeMarketStructure() {
 1255 |     // Determine market structure based on profile characteristics
 1256 |     m_MarketContext.Structure = DetermineMarketStructure();
 1257 |     m_MarketContext.StructureScore = CalculateStructureScore();
 1258 |     m_MarketContext.IsBalanced = DetectBalance();
 1259 |     m_MarketContext.IsTrending = DetectTrend();
 1260 |     m_MarketContext.IsRotational = DetectRotation();
 1261 |     
 1262 |     // Calculate trend strength
 1263 |     if (m_MarketContext.IsTrending) {
 1264 |         double price_range = m_CurrentProfile.MaxPrice - m_CurrentProfile.MinPrice;
 1265 |         double va_range = m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAH - m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAL;
 1266 |         m_MarketContext.TrendStrength = (1.0 - va_range / price_range) * 100.0;
 1267 |     } else {
 1268 |         m_MarketContext.TrendStrength = 0.0;
 1269 |     }
 1270 | }
 1271 | 
 1272 | ENUM_MARKET_STRUCTURE CMarketProfile::DetermineMarketStructure() {
 1273 |     if (m_CurrentProfile.LevelCount == 0) {
 1274 |         return STRUCTURE_CONSOLIDATION;
 1275 |     }
 1276 |     
 1277 |     // Analyze profile shape and distribution
 1278 |     ENUM_PROFILE_SHAPE shape = m_CurrentProfile.Shape;
 1279 |     double skewness = m_CurrentProfile.Skewness;
 1280 |     
 1281 |     // Determine structure based on shape and skewness
 1282 |     if (shape == SHAPE_P_SHAPED || skewness > 0.5) {
 1283 |         return STRUCTURE_TRENDING_UP;
 1284 |     } else if (shape == SHAPE_B_SHAPED_DOWN || skewness < -0.5) {
 1285 |         return STRUCTURE_TRENDING_DOWN;
 1286 |     } else if (shape == SHAPE_B_SHAPED) {
 1287 |         return STRUCTURE_ROTATIONAL;
 1288 |     } else if (shape == SHAPE_RECTANGULAR) {
 1289 |         return STRUCTURE_BALANCED;
 1290 |     } else {
 1291 |         return STRUCTURE_CONSOLIDATION;
 1292 |     }
 1293 | }
 1294 | 
 1295 | bool CMarketProfile::DetectBalance() {
 1296 |     // Market is balanced if value area contains significant portion of price action
 1297 |     double va_range = m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAH - m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.VAL;
 1298 |     double total_range = m_CurrentProfile.MaxPrice - m_CurrentProfile.MinPrice;
 1299 |     
 1300 |     if (total_range <= 0) {
 1301 |         return false;
 1302 |     }
 1303 |     
 1304 |     double balance_ratio = va_range / total_range;
 1305 |     return (balance_ratio > 0.6 && m_CurrentProfile.ValueArea.ValueAreaPercent > 65.0);
 1306 | }
 1307 | 
 1308 | void CMarketProfile::LogProfileEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
 1309 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1310 |         switch(level) {
 1311 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
 1312 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1313 |                 break;
 1314 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
 1315 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1316 |                 break;
 1317 |             default:
 1318 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1319 |         }
 1320 |     }
 1321 | }
 1322 | 
 1323 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1324 | //| Initialize Data Arrays                                           |
 1325 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1326 | bool CMarketProfile::InitializeDataArrays() {
 1327 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
 1328 |         return false;
 1329 |     }
 1330 |     
 1331 |     // Initialize ATR history for calculations
 1332 |     int atr_buffer_size = 100; // Sufficient for volatility analysis
 1333 |     if (ArrayResize(m_ATRHistory, atr_buffer_size) != atr_buffer_size) {
 1334 |         LogProfileEvent("Failed to resize ATR history array", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1335 |         return false;
 1336 |     }
 1337 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_ATRHistory, true);
 1338 |     
 1339 |     // Initialize spread history for monitoring
 1340 |     int spread_buffer_size = 50;
 1341 |     if (ArrayResize(m_SpreadHistory, spread_buffer_size) != spread_buffer_size) {
 1342 |         LogProfileEvent("Failed to resize spread history array", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1343 |         return false;
 1344 |     }
 1345 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_SpreadHistory, true);
 1346 |     
 1347 |     return true;
 1348 | }
 1349 | 
 1350 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1351 | //| Is New Bar                                                       |
 1352 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1353 | bool CMarketProfile::IsNewBar() {
 1354 |     MqlRates rates[1];
 1355 |     if (CopyRates(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, 1, rates) < 1) {
 1356 |         return false;
 1357 |     }
 1358 |     
 1359 |     if (rates[0].time > m_LastUpdateTime) {
 1360 |         m_LastUpdateTime = rates[0].time;
 1361 |         return true;
 1362 |     }
 1363 |     
 1364 |     return false;
 1365 | }
 1366 | 
 1367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1368 | //| Update Market Data                                               |
 1369 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1370 | bool CMarketProfile::UpdateMarketData() {
 1371 |     if (m_pContext == NULL || m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils == NULL) {
 1372 |         return false;
 1373 |     }
 1374 |     
 1375 |     // Save previous data
 1376 |     m_PreviousData = m_CurrentData;
 1377 |     
 1378 |     // Get current price data
 1379 |     MqlRates rates[1];
 1380 |     if (CopyRates(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, 1, rates) < 1) {
 1381 |         LogProfileEvent("Failed to get current price data", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
 1382 |         return false;
 1383 |     }
 1384 |     
 1385 |     // Update basic market data
 1386 |     m_CurrentData.currentPrice = rates[0].close;
 1387 |     m_CurrentData.currentHigh = rates[0].high;
 1388 |     m_CurrentData.currentLow = rates[0].low;
 1389 |     m_CurrentData.currentOpen = rates[0].open;
 1390 |     m_CurrentData.previousPrice = m_PreviousData.currentPrice;
 1391 |     m_CurrentData.timestamp = rates[0].time;
 1392 |     m_CurrentData.symbol = m_Symbol;
 1393 |     m_CurrentData.timeframe = m_Timeframe;
 1394 |     
 1395 |     // Update technical indicators
 1396 |     m_CurrentData.currentSpread = (double)SymbolInfoInteger(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
 1397 |     m_CurrentData.atrCurrent = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetATR(0);
 1398 |     m_CurrentData.atrPrevious = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetATR(1);
 1399 |     
 1400 |     // Calculate ATR ratio
 1401 |     UpdateATRHistory();
 1402 |     UpdateSpreadHistory();
 1403 |     
 1404 |     // Update other indicators
 1405 |     m_CurrentData.adxValue = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetADX(0);
 1406 |     m_CurrentData.adxSlope = m_CurrentData.adxValue - m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetADX(1);
 1407 |     m_CurrentData.diPlus = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetADXPlus(0);
 1408 |     m_CurrentData.diMinus = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetADXMinus(0);
 1409 |     
 1410 |     m_CurrentData.rsiValue = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetRSI(0);
 1411 |     m_CurrentData.rsiSlope = m_CurrentData.rsiValue - m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetRSI(1);
 1412 |     
 1413 |     m_CurrentData.macdValue = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetMACDMain(0);
 1414 |     m_CurrentData.macdSignal = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetMACDSignal(0);
 1415 |     m_CurrentData.macdHistogram = m_CurrentData.macdValue - m_CurrentData.macdSignal;
 1416 |     m_CurrentData.macdHistogramSlope = m_CurrentData.macdHistogram - 
 1417 |         (m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetMACDMain(1) - m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetMACDSignal(1));
 1418 |     
 1419 |     // Update moving averages
 1420 |     m_CurrentData.emaFast = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetEMA(m_pContext.Inputs.CoreStrategy.EmaFastPeriod, 0);
 1421 |     m_CurrentData.emaMedium = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetEMA(m_pContext.Inputs.CoreStrategy.EmaMediumPeriod, 0);
 1422 |     m_CurrentData.emaSlow = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetEMA(m_pContext.Inputs.CoreStrategy.EmaSlowPeriod, 0);
 1423 |     
 1424 |     // Multi-timeframe EMAs
 1425 |     if (m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe) {
 1426 |         m_CurrentData.emaFastH4 = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetEMA(m_pContext.Inputs.CoreStrategy.EmaFastPeriod, 0, m_Config.HigherTimeframe);
 1427 |         m_CurrentData.emaMediumH4 = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetEMA(m_pContext.Inputs.CoreStrategy.EmaMediumPeriod, 0, m_Config.HigherTimeframe);
 1428 |         m_CurrentData.emaSlowH4 = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetEMA(m_pContext.Inputs.CoreStrategy.EmaSlowPeriod, 0, m_Config.HigherTimeframe);
 1429 |     }
 1430 |     
 1431 |     // Update Bollinger Bands
 1432 |     m_CurrentData.bbWidth = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetBBWidth(0);
 1433 |     m_CurrentData.bbUpper = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetBBUpper(0);
 1434 |     m_CurrentData.bbLower = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetBBLower(0);
 1435 |     m_CurrentData.bbMiddle = m_pContext.pIndicatorUtils.GetBBMiddle(0);
 1436 |     
 1437 |     // Update volume data
 1438 |     long volumes[1];
 1439 |     if (CopyTickVolume(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, 1, volumes) > 0) {
 1440 |         m_CurrentData.currentVolume = volumes[0];
 1441 |         // Calculate volume ratio if we have previous volume
 1442 |         if (m_PreviousData.currentVolume > 0) {
 1443 |             m_CurrentData.volumeRatio = (double)m_CurrentData.currentVolume / m_PreviousData.currentVolume;
 1444 |         }
 1445 |     }
 1446 |     
 1447 |     return ValidateMarketData();
 1448 | }
 1449 | 
 1450 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1451 | //| Update ATR History                                               |
 1452 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1453 | void CMarketProfile::UpdateATRHistory() {
 1454 |     if (m_CurrentData.atrCurrent > 0) {
 1455 |         // Shift array and add new value
 1456 |         for (int i = ArraySize(m_ATRHistory) - 1; i > 0; i--) {
 1457 |             m_ATRHistory[i] = m_ATRHistory[i - 1];
 1458 |         }
 1459 |         m_ATRHistory[0] = m_CurrentData.atrCurrent;
 1460 |         
 1461 |         // Calculate ATR ratio
 1462 |         double sum = 0;
 1463 |         int count = 0;
 1464 |         for (int i = 1; i < MathMin(20, ArraySize(m_ATRHistory)); i++) {
 1465 |             if (m_ATRHistory[i] > 0) {
 1466 |                 sum += m_ATRHistory[i];
 1467 |                 count++;
 1468 |             }
 1469 |         }
 1470 |         
 1471 |         if (count > 0) {
 1472 |             m_CurrentData.averageDailyAtr = sum / count;
 1473 |             m_CurrentData.atrRatio = m_CurrentData.atrCurrent / m_CurrentData.averageDailyAtr;
 1474 |         } else {
 1475 |             m_CurrentData.atrRatio = 1.0;
 1476 |         }
 1477 |     }
 1478 | }
 1479 | 
 1480 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1481 | //| Update Spread History                                            |
 1482 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1483 | void CMarketProfile::UpdateSpreadHistory() {
 1484 |     if (m_CurrentData.currentSpread > 0) {
 1485 |         // Shift array and add new value
 1486 |         for (int i = ArraySize(m_SpreadHistory) - 1; i > 0; i--) {
 1487 |             m_SpreadHistory[i] = m_SpreadHistory[i - 1];
 1488 |         }
 1489 |         m_SpreadHistory[0] = m_CurrentData.currentSpread;
 1490 |         m_SpreadCount = MathMin(m_SpreadCount + 1, ArraySize(m_SpreadHistory));
 1491 |     }
 1492 | }
 1493 | 
 1494 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1495 | //| Validate Market Data                                             |
 1496 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1497 | bool CMarketProfile::ValidateMarketData() {
 1498 |     // Basic validation checks
 1499 |     if (m_CurrentData.currentPrice <= 0) {
 1500 |         LogProfileEvent("Invalid current price", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
 1501 |         return false;
 1502 |     }
 1503 |     
 1504 |     if (m_CurrentData.atrCurrent <= 0) {
 1505 |         LogProfileEvent("Invalid ATR value", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
 1506 |         return false;
 1507 |     }
 1508 |     
 1509 |     if (m_CurrentData.adxValue < 0 || m_CurrentData.adxValue > 100) {
 1510 |         LogProfileEvent("ADX value out of range", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
 1511 |         return false;
 1512 |     }
 1513 |     
 1514 |     if (m_CurrentData.rsiValue < 0 || m_CurrentData.rsiValue > 100) {
 1515 |         LogProfileEvent("RSI value out of range", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
 1516 |         return false;
 1517 |     }
 1518 |     
 1519 |     return true;
 1520 | }
 1521 | 
 1522 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1523 | //| Analyze Market Regime                                            |
 1524 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1525 | void CMarketProfile::AnalyzeMarketRegime() {
 1526 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
 1527 |         return;
 1528 |     }
 1529 |     
 1530 |     // Determine trend and regime
 1531 |     m_MarketContext.Trend = DetermineTrend();
 1532 |     m_MarketContext.Regime = DetermineMarketRegime();
 1533 |     m_MarketContext.TrendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
 1534 |     m_MarketContext.RegimeConfidence = CalculateRegimeConfidence();
 1535 |     
 1536 |     // Detect market conditions
 1537 |     m_CurrentData.isTrending = (m_CurrentData.adxValue > 25.0 && m_MarketContext.TrendStrength > m_Config.TrendThreshold);
 1538 |     m_CurrentData.isSidewaysOrChoppy = CheckSidewaysMarket() || CheckChoppyMarket();
 1539 |     m_CurrentData.isLowMomentum = CheckLowMomentum();
 1540 |     m_CurrentData.isVolatile = CheckHighVolatility();
 1541 |     m_CurrentData.isTransitioning = DetectRegimeTransition();
 1542 |     
 1543 |     // Update market context
 1544 |     m_MarketContext.IsTrending = m_CurrentData.isTrending;
 1545 |     m_MarketContext.IsVolatile = m_CurrentData.isVolatile;
 1546 |     m_MarketContext.IsTransitioning = m_CurrentData.isTransitioning;
 1547 |     m_MarketContext.VolatilityRatio = m_CurrentData.atrRatio;
 1548 |     m_MarketContext.MomentumStrength = CalculateMomentumScore();
 1549 |     
 1550 |     // Log regime changes
 1551 |     if (m_MarketContext.Regime != m_PreviousData.regime) {
 1552 |         m_MarketContext.LastRegimeChange = TimeCurrent();
 1553 |         LogProfileEvent(StringFormat("Market regime changed to: %s", EnumToString(m_MarketContext.Regime)), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
 1554 |     }
 1555 | }
 1556 | 
 1557 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1558 | //| Determine Market Regime                                          |
 1559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1560 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME CMarketProfile::DetermineMarketRegime() {
 1561 |     double adx = m_CurrentData.adxValue;
 1562 |     double atrRatio = m_CurrentData.atrRatio;
 1563 |     ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend = m_MarketContext.Trend;
 1564 |     
 1565 |     // High volatility conditions
 1566 |     if (atrRatio > m_Config.VolatilityThreshold * 1.5) {
 1567 |         return REGIME_VOLATILE_EXPANSION;
 1568 |     }
 1569 |     
 1570 |     // Low volatility conditions
 1571 |     if (atrRatio < 0.7) {
 1572 |         return REGIME_VOLATILE_CONTRACTION;
 1573 |     }
 1574 |     
 1575 |     // Trending conditions
 1576 |     if (adx > 30 && m_MarketContext.TrendStrength > 50) {
 1577 |         if (trend == TREND_UP_STRONG || trend == TREND_UP_NORMAL) {
 1578 |             return REGIME_TRENDING_BULL;
 1579 |         } else if (trend == TREND_DOWN_STRONG || trend == TREND_DOWN_NORMAL) {
 1580 |             return REGIME_TRENDING_BEAR;
 1581 |         }
 1582 |     }
 1583 |     
 1584 |     // Ranging conditions
 1585 |     if (adx < 25 && m_MarketContext.TrendStrength < 30) {
 1586 |         if (atrRatio > 1.2) {
 1587 |             return REGIME_RANGING_VOLATILE;
 1588 |         } else {
 1589 |             return REGIME_RANGING_STABLE;
 1590 |         }
 1591 |     }
 1592 |     
 1593 |     // Transition detection
 1594 |     if (m_CurrentData.isTransitioning) {
 1595 |         return REGIME_TRANSITION;
 1596 |     }
 1597 |     
 1598 |     return REGIME_UNKNOWN;
 1599 | }
 1600 | 
 1601 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1602 | //| Determine Trend                                                  |
 1603 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1604 | ENUM_MARKET_TREND CMarketProfile::DetermineTrend() {
 1605 |     double emaFast = m_CurrentData.emaFast;
 1606 |     double emaMedium = m_CurrentData.emaMedium;
 1607 |     double emaSlow = m_CurrentData.emaSlow;
 1608 |     double currentPrice = m_CurrentData.currentPrice;
 1609 |     double adx = m_CurrentData.adxValue;
 1610 |     
 1611 |     // Check EMA alignment
 1612 |     bool bullishAlignment = (emaFast > emaMedium && emaMedium > emaSlow);
 1613 |     bool bearishAlignment = (emaFast < emaMedium && emaMedium < emaSlow);
 1614 |     
 1615 |     // Price position relative to EMAs
 1616 |     bool priceAboveEMAs = (currentPrice > emaFast && currentPrice > emaMedium);
 1617 |     bool priceBelowEMAs = (currentPrice < emaFast && currentPrice < emaMedium);
 1618 |     
 1619 |     // Strong trend conditions
 1620 |     if (bullishAlignment && priceAboveEMAs && adx > 30) {
 1621 |         return TREND_UP_STRONG;
 1622 |     }
 1623 |     if (bearishAlignment && priceBelowEMAs && adx > 30) {
 1624 |         return TREND_DOWN_STRONG;
 1625 |     }
 1626 |     
 1627 |     // Normal trend conditions
 1628 |     if (bullishAlignment && adx > 20) {
 1629 |         return TREND_UP_NORMAL;
 1630 |     }
 1631 |     if (bearishAlignment && adx > 20) {
 1632 |         return TREND_DOWN_NORMAL;
 1633 |     }
 1634 |     
 1635 |     // Weak trend conditions
 1636 |     if (bullishAlignment || (currentPrice > emaMedium && adx > 15)) {
 1637 |         return TREND_UP_WEAK;
 1638 |     }
 1639 |     if (bearishAlignment || (currentPrice < emaMedium && adx > 15)) {
 1640 |         return TREND_DOWN_WEAK;
 1641 |     }
 1642 |     
 1643 |     // Sideways
 1644 |     if (adx < 20) {
 1645 |         return TREND_SIDEWAYS;
 1646 |     }
 1647 |     
 1648 |     return TREND_UNDEFINED;
 1649 | }
 1650 | 
 1651 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1652 | //| Calculate Trend Strength                                         |
 1653 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1654 | double CMarketProfile::CalculateTrendStrength() {
 1655 |     double strength = 0.0;
 1656 |     
 1657 |     // ADX component (40% weight)
 1658 |     strength += (m_CurrentData.adxValue / 100.0) * 40.0;
 1659 |     
 1660 |     // EMA alignment component (30% weight)
 1661 |     double emaFast = m_CurrentData.emaFast;
 1662 |     double emaMedium = m_CurrentData.emaMedium;
 1663 |     double emaSlow = m_CurrentData.emaSlow;
 1664 |     
 1665 |     double emaSpread = MathAbs(emaFast - emaSlow);
 1666 |     double priceLevel = (emaFast + emaSlow) / 2.0;
 1667 |     double emaStrength = 0.0;
 1668 |     
 1669 |     if (priceLevel > 0) {
 1670 |         emaStrength = (emaSpread / priceLevel) * 100.0;
 1671 |         emaStrength = MathMin(emaStrength, 30.0); // Cap at 30%
 1672 |     }
 1673 |     strength += emaStrength;
 1674 |     
 1675 |     // Price momentum component (20% weight)
 1676 |     double priceChange = 0.0;
 1677 |     if (m_PreviousData.currentPrice > 0) {
 1678 |         priceChange = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.currentPrice - m_PreviousData.currentPrice);
 1679 |         double momentumStrength = (priceChange / m_CurrentData.atrCurrent) * 10.0;
 1680 |         momentumStrength = MathMin(momentumStrength, 20.0); // Cap at 20%
 1681 |         strength += momentumStrength;
 1682 |     }
 1683 |     
 1684 |     // Volume component (10% weight)
 1685 |     if (m_CurrentData.volumeRatio > 1.0) {
 1686 |         double volumeStrength = MathMin((m_CurrentData.volumeRatio - 1.0) * 10.0, 10.0);
 1687 |         strength += volumeStrength;
 1688 |     }
 1689 |     
 1690 |     return MathMin(strength, 100.0);
 1691 | }
 1692 | 
 1693 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1694 | //| Calculate Regime Confidence                                      |
 1695 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1696 | double CMarketProfile::CalculateRegimeConfidence() {
 1697 |     double confidence = 0.0;
 1698 |     
 1699 |     // ADX confidence
 1700 |     if (m_CurrentData.adxValue > 30) {
 1701 |         confidence += 0.4;
 1702 |     } else if (m_CurrentData.adxValue > 20) {
 1703 |         confidence += 0.3;
 1704 |     } else {
 1705 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1706 |     }
 1707 |     
 1708 |     // Trend consistency
 1709 |     if (m_MarketContext.TrendStrength > 50) {
 1710 |         confidence += 0.3;
 1711 |     } else if (m_MarketContext.TrendStrength > 25) {
 1712 |         confidence += 0.2;
 1713 |     } else {
 1714 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1715 |     }
 1716 |     
 1717 |     // Multi-timeframe alignment
 1718 |     if (m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe && IsMultiTimeframeAligned()) {
 1719 |         confidence += 0.2;
 1720 |     } else {
 1721 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1722 |     }
 1723 |     
 1724 |     // Volatility consistency
 1725 |     if (m_CurrentData.atrRatio > 0.8 && m_CurrentData.atrRatio < 1.5) {
 1726 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1727 |     }
 1728 |     
 1729 |     return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
 1730 | }
 1731 | 
 1732 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1733 | //| Detect Regime Transition                                         |
 1734 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1735 | bool CMarketProfile::DetectRegimeTransition() {
 1736 |     // Check for regime transition signals
 1737 |     
 1738 |     // ADX direction change
 1739 |     bool adxDirectionChange = (m_CurrentData.adxSlope > 0 && m_PreviousData.adxSlope < 0) ||
 1740 |                              (m_CurrentData.adxSlope < 0 && m_PreviousData.adxSlope > 0);
 1741 |     
 1742 |     // Significant volatility change
 1743 |     bool volatilityChange = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.atrRatio - 1.0) > 0.3;
 1744 |     
 1745 |     // MACD histogram change
 1746 |     bool macdChange = (m_CurrentData.macdHistogramSlope > 0 && m_PreviousData.macdHistogramSlope < 0) ||
 1747 |                      (m_CurrentData.macdHistogramSlope < 0 && m_PreviousData.macdHistogramSlope > 0);
 1748 |     
 1749 |     return adxDirectionChange || volatilityChange || macdChange;
 1750 | }
 1751 | 
 1752 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1753 | //| Check Low Momentum                                               |
 1754 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1755 | bool CMarketProfile::CheckLowMomentum() {
 1756 |     // Low ADX indicates low momentum
 1757 |     if (m_CurrentData.adxValue < 20) {
 1758 |         return true;
 1759 |     }
 1760 |     
 1761 |     // Small price movements relative to ATR
 1762 |     if (m_PreviousData.currentPrice > 0) {
 1763 |         double priceChange = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.currentPrice - m_PreviousData.currentPrice);
 1764 |         if (priceChange < m_CurrentData.atrCurrent * 0.3) {
 1765 |             return true;
 1766 |         }
 1767 |     }
 1768 |     
 1769 |     // Low volume
 1770 |     if (m_CurrentData.volumeRatio < 0.7) {
 1771 |         return true;
 1772 |     }
 1773 |     
 1774 |     return false;
 1775 | }
 1776 | 
 1777 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1778 | //| Check High Volatility                                            |
 1779 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1780 | bool CMarketProfile::CheckHighVolatility() {
 1781 |     // High ATR ratio
 1782 |     if (m_CurrentData.atrRatio > m_Config.VolatilityThreshold) {
 1783 |         return true;
 1784 |     }
 1785 |     
 1786 |     // Wide Bollinger Bands
 1787 |     if (m_CurrentData.bbWidth > m_CurrentData.atrCurrent * 2.0) {
 1788 |         return true;
 1789 |     }
 1790 |     
 1791 |     // Large recent price movements
 1792 |     double priceRange = m_CurrentData.currentHigh - m_CurrentData.currentLow;
 1793 |     if (priceRange > m_CurrentData.atrCurrent * 1.5) {
 1794 |         return true;
 1795 |     }
 1796 |     
 1797 |     return false;
 1798 | }
 1799 | 
 1800 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1801 | //| Check Sideways Market                                            |
 1802 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1803 | bool CMarketProfile::CheckSidewaysMarket() {
 1804 |     double score = CalculateSidewaysScore();
 1805 |     return (score >= 70.0);
 1806 | }
 1807 | 
 1808 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1809 | //| Check Choppy Market                                              |
 1810 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1811 | bool CMarketProfile::CheckChoppyMarket() {
 1812 |     double score = CalculateChoppyScore();
 1813 |     return (score >= 70.0);
 1814 | }
 1815 | 
 1816 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1817 | //| Calculate Choppy Score                                           |
 1818 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1819 | double CMarketProfile::CalculateChoppyScore() {
 1820 |     double choppyScore = 0.0;
 1821 |     
 1822 |     // ADX component (low ADX = choppy)
 1823 |     if (m_CurrentData.adxValue < 20) {
 1824 |         choppyScore += 30.0;
 1825 |     } else if (m_CurrentData.adxValue < 25) {
 1826 |         choppyScore += 20.0;
 1827 |     }
 1828 |     
 1829 |     // RSI whipsaws
 1830 |     if (m_CurrentData.rsiValue > 30 && m_CurrentData.rsiValue < 70) {
 1831 |         choppyScore += 25.0;
 1832 |     }
 1833 |     
 1834 |     // MACD histogram oscillations
 1835 |     if (MathAbs(m_CurrentData.macdHistogramSlope) > MathAbs(m_CurrentData.macdHistogram) * 0.5) {
 1836 |         choppyScore += 25.0;
 1837 |     }
 1838 |     
 1839 |     // Narrow Bollinger Bands
 1840 |     if (m_CurrentData.bbWidth < m_CurrentData.atrCurrent * 0.8) {
 1841 |         choppyScore += 20.0;
 1842 |     }
 1843 |     
 1844 |     return MathMin(choppyScore, 100.0);
 1845 | }
 1846 | 
 1847 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1848 | //| Calculate Sideways Score                                         |
 1849 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1850 | double CMarketProfile::CalculateSidewaysScore() {
 1851 |     double sidewaysScore = 0.0;
 1852 |     
 1853 |     // ADX component (low ADX = sideways)
 1854 |     if (m_CurrentData.adxValue < 20) {
 1855 |         sidewaysScore += 40.0;
 1856 |     } else if (m_CurrentData.adxValue < 25) {
 1857 |         sidewaysScore += 25.0;
 1858 |     }
 1859 |     
 1860 |     // EMA convergence
 1861 |     double emaSpread = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.emaFast - m_CurrentData.emaSlow);
 1862 |     if (emaSpread < m_CurrentData.atrCurrent) {
 1863 |         sidewaysScore += 30.0;
 1864 |     }
 1865 |     
 1866 |     // Price within Bollinger Bands middle
 1867 |     double bbMiddle = m_CurrentData.bbMiddle;
 1868 |     double bbRange = m_CurrentData.bbUpper - m_CurrentData.bbLower;
 1869 |     if (bbRange > 0) {
 1870 |         double pricePosition = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.currentPrice - bbMiddle) / (bbRange / 2.0);
 1871 |         if (pricePosition < 0.5) {
 1872 |             sidewaysScore += 30.0;
 1873 |         }
 1874 |     }
 1875 |     
 1876 |     return MathMin(sidewaysScore, 100.0);
 1877 | }
 1878 | 
 1879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1880 | //| Calculate Momentum Score                                         |
 1881 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1882 | double CMarketProfile::CalculateMomentumScore() {
 1883 |     double momentumScore = 0.0;
 1884 |     
 1885 |     // RSI momentum
 1886 |     if (m_CurrentData.rsiValue > 70 || m_CurrentData.rsiValue < 30) {
 1887 |         momentumScore += 25.0;
 1888 |     }
 1889 |     
 1890 |     // MACD momentum
 1891 |     if (m_CurrentData.macdHistogram > 0 && m_CurrentData.macdHistogramSlope > 0) {
 1892 |         momentumScore += 25.0;
 1893 |     } else if (m_CurrentData.macdHistogram < 0 && m_CurrentData.macdHistogramSlope < 0) {
 1894 |         momentumScore += 25.0;
 1895 |     }
 1896 |     
 1897 |     // ADX strength
 1898 |     momentumScore += (m_CurrentData.adxValue / 100.0) * 25.0;
 1899 |     
 1900 |     // Price momentum
 1901 |     if (m_PreviousData.currentPrice > 0) {
 1902 |         double priceChange = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.currentPrice - m_PreviousData.currentPrice);
 1903 |         double priceMomentum = (priceChange / m_CurrentData.atrCurrent) * 25.0;
 1904 |         momentumScore += MathMin(priceMomentum, 25.0);
 1905 |     }
 1906 |     
 1907 |     return MathMin(momentumScore, 100.0);
 1908 | }
 1909 | 
 1910 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1911 | //| Multi-timeframe Analysis                                         |
 1912 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1913 | bool CMarketProfile::AnalyzeMultiTimeframe() {
 1914 |     if (!m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe) {
 1915 |         return true;
 1916 |     }
 1917 |     
 1918 |     m_MarketContext.MTFAlignment = CheckMTFAlignment();
 1919 |     m_MarketContext.MTFStrength = CalculateMTFStrength();
 1920 |     
 1921 |     m_CurrentData.mtfBullishAlignment = m_MarketContext.MTFAlignment && 
 1922 |         (m_MarketContext.Trend == TREND_UP_STRONG || m_MarketContext.Trend == TREND_UP_NORMAL);
 1923 |     m_CurrentData.mtfBearishAlignment = m_MarketContext.MTFAlignment && 
 1924 |         (m_MarketContext.Trend == TREND_DOWN_STRONG || m_MarketContext.Trend == TREND_DOWN_NORMAL);
 1925 |     m_CurrentData.mtfStrength = m_MarketContext.MTFStrength;
 1926 |     
 1927 |     return true;
 1928 | }
 1929 | 
 1930 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1931 | //| Check Multi-timeframe Alignment                                  |
 1932 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1933 | bool CMarketProfile::CheckMTFAlignment() {
 1934 |     if (!m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe) {
 1935 |         return false;
 1936 |     }
 1937 |     
 1938 |     // Compare current timeframe EMAs with higher timeframe EMAs
 1939 |     bool h1Bullish = (m_CurrentData.emaFast > m_CurrentData.emaMedium && m_CurrentData.emaMedium > m_CurrentData.emaSlow);
 1940 |     bool h1Bearish = (m_CurrentData.emaFast < m_CurrentData.emaMedium && m_CurrentData.emaMedium < m_CurrentData.emaSlow);
 1941 |     
 1942 |     bool h4Bullish = (m_CurrentData.emaFastH4 > m_CurrentData.emaMediumH4 && m_CurrentData.emaMediumH4 > m_CurrentData.emaSlowH4);
 1943 |     bool h4Bearish = (m_CurrentData.emaFastH4 < m_CurrentData.emaMediumH4 && m_CurrentData.emaMediumH4 < m_CurrentData.emaSlowH4);
 1944 |     
 1945 |     // Check for alignment
 1946 |     return (h1Bullish && h4Bullish) || (h1Bearish && h4Bearish);
 1947 | }
 1948 | 
 1949 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1950 | //| Calculate Multi-timeframe Strength                               |
 1951 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1952 | double CMarketProfile::CalculateMTFStrength() {
 1953 |     if (!m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe) {
 1954 |         return 0.0;
 1955 |     }
 1956 |     
 1957 |     double strength = 0.0;
 1958 |     
 1959 |     // EMA separation on H1
 1960 |     double h1Separation = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.emaFast - m_CurrentData.emaSlow);
 1961 |     double h1Price = (m_CurrentData.emaFast + m_CurrentData.emaSlow) / 2.0;
 1962 |     if (h1Price > 0) {
 1963 |         strength += (h1Separation / h1Price) * 50.0;
 1964 |     }
 1965 |     
 1966 |     // EMA separation on H4
 1967 |     double h4Separation = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.emaFastH4 - m_CurrentData.emaSlowH4);
 1968 |     double h4Price = (m_CurrentData.emaFastH4 + m_CurrentData.emaSlowH4) / 2.0;
 1969 |     if (h4Price > 0) {
 1970 |         strength += (h4Separation / h4Price) * 50.0;
 1971 |     }
 1972 |     
 1973 |     return MathMin(strength, 100.0);
 1974 | }
 1975 | 
 1976 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1977 | //| Enhanced Public Methods                                          |
 1978 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1979 | 
 1980 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1981 | //| Is Trend Strong Enough                                           |
 1982 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1983 | bool CMarketProfile::IsTrendStrongEnough() const {
 1984 |     return (m_MarketContext.TrendStrength > m_Config.TrendThreshold && 
 1985 |             m_CurrentData.adxValue > 25.0);
 1986 | }
 1987 | 
 1988 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1989 | //| Is Multi-timeframe Aligned                                       |
 1990 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1991 | bool CMarketProfile::IsMultiTimeframeAligned() const {
 1992 |     return m_MarketContext.MTFAlignment;
 1993 | }
 1994 | 
 1995 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1996 | //| Validate Multi-timeframe Trend                                   |
 1997 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1998 | bool CMarketProfile::ValidateMultiTimeframeTrend(bool isLong) {
 1999 |     if (!m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe) {
 2000 |         return true; // No MTF validation required
 2001 |     }
 2002 |     
 2003 |     if (isLong) {
 2004 |         return m_CurrentData.mtfBullishAlignment;
 2005 |     } else {
 2006 |         return m_CurrentData.mtfBearishAlignment;
 2007 |     }
 2008 | }
 2009 | 
 2010 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2011 | //| Calculate Pullback Percent                                       |
 2012 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2013 | double CMarketProfile::CalculatePullbackPercent(bool isLong) const {
 2014 |     if (m_CurrentData.emaFast == 0 || m_CurrentData.emaSlow == 0) {
 2015 |         return 0.0;
 2016 |     }
 2017 |     
 2018 |     double currentPrice = m_CurrentData.currentPrice;
 2019 |     double fastEMA = m_CurrentData.emaFast;
 2020 |     double slowEMA = m_CurrentData.emaSlow;
 2021 |     
 2022 |     if (isLong) {
 2023 |         // For long trades, calculate pullback from swing high
 2024 |         double trendDirection = fastEMA - slowEMA;
 2025 |         if (trendDirection > 0) {
 2026 |             double pullbackDistance = fastEMA - currentPrice;
 2027 |             return (pullbackDistance / m_CurrentData.atrCurrent) * 100.0;
 2028 |         }
 2029 |     } else {
 2030 |         // For short trades, calculate pullback from swing low
 2031 |         double trendDirection = slowEMA - fastEMA;
 2032 |         if (trendDirection > 0) {
 2033 |             double pullbackDistance = currentPrice - fastEMA;
 2034 |             return (pullbackDistance / m_CurrentData.atrCurrent) * 100.0;
 2035 |         }
 2036 |     }
 2037 |     
 2038 |     return 0.0;
 2039 | }
 2040 | 
 2041 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2042 | //| Is Price In Pullback Zone                                        |
 2043 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2044 | bool CMarketProfile::IsPriceInPullbackZone(bool isLong) {
 2045 |     double pullbackPercent = CalculatePullbackPercent(isLong);
 2046 |     return (pullbackPercent >= 38.2 && pullbackPercent <= 61.8); // Fibonacci retracement zone
 2047 | }
 2048 | 
 2049 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2050 | //| Is Valid Pullback Entry                                          |
 2051 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2052 | bool CMarketProfile::IsValidPullbackEntry(bool isLong, double entryPrice) {
 2053 |     // Check if entry price is in pullback zone
 2054 |     if (!IsPriceInPullbackZone(isLong)) {
 2055 |         return false;
 2056 |     }
 2057 |     
 2058 |     // Check trend strength
 2059 |     if (!IsTrendStrongEnough()) {
 2060 |         return false;
 2061 |     }
 2062 |     
 2063 |     // Check multi-timeframe alignment
 2064 |     if (!ValidateMultiTimeframeTrend(isLong)) {
 2065 |         return false;
 2066 |     }
 2067 |     
 2068 |     // Check market conditions
 2069 |     if (m_CurrentData.isSidewaysOrChoppy || m_CurrentData.isLowMomentum) {
 2070 |         return false;
 2071 |     }
 2072 |     
 2073 |     return true;
 2074 | }
 2075 | 
 2076 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2077 | //| Calculate Enhanced Statistics                                    |
 2078 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2079 | void CMarketProfile::CalculateEnhancedStatistics() {
 2080 |     // Calculate volatility index
 2081 |     m_Stats.VolatilityIndex = m_CurrentData.atrRatio * 100.0;
 2082 |     
 2083 |     // Calculate trend intensity
 2084 |     m_Stats.TrendIntensity = m_MarketContext.TrendStrength;
 2085 |     
 2086 |     // Calculate market efficiency (price movement vs volatility)
 2087 |     if (m_CurrentData.atrCurrent > 0 && m_PreviousData.currentPrice > 0) {
 2088 |         double priceMove = MathAbs(m_CurrentData.currentPrice - m_PreviousData.currentPrice);
 2089 |         m_Stats.MarketEfficiency = (priceMove / m_CurrentData.atrCurrent) * 100.0;
 2090 |     }
 2091 |     
 2092 |     // Calculate liquidity score (based on volume and spread)
 2093 |     double baseScore = 50.0;
 2094 |     if (m_CurrentData.volumeRatio > 1.0) {
 2095 |         baseScore += (m_CurrentData.volumeRatio - 1.0) * 25.0;
 2096 |     }
 2097 |     if (m_SpreadCount > 5) {
 2098 |         double avgSpread = 0;
 2099 |         for (int i = 0; i < MathMin(5, m_SpreadCount); i++) {
 2100 |             avgSpread += m_SpreadHistory[i];
 2101 |         }
 2102 |         avgSpread /= 5.0;
 2103 |         if (m_CurrentData.currentSpread < avgSpread) {
 2104 |             baseScore += 25.0;
 2105 |         }
 2106 |     }
 2107 |     m_Stats.LiquidityScore = MathMin(baseScore, 100.0);
 2108 | }
 2109 | 
 2110 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2111 | //| Get Regime Analysis                                              |
 2112 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2113 | string CMarketProfile::GetRegimeAnalysis() {
 2114 |     string analysis = "=== MARKET REGIME ANALYSIS ===\n";
 2115 |     analysis += StringFormat("Current Regime: %s (Confidence: %.1f%%)\n", 
 2116 |         EnumToString(m_MarketContext.Regime), m_MarketContext.RegimeConfidence * 100);
 2117 |     analysis += StringFormat("Market Trend: %s (Strength: %.1f%%)\n", 
 2118 |         EnumToString(m_MarketContext.Trend), m_MarketContext.TrendStrength);
 2119 |     analysis += StringFormat("Volatility Ratio: %.2f\n", m_MarketContext.VolatilityRatio);
 2120 |     analysis += StringFormat("Momentum Strength: %.1f%%\n", m_MarketContext.MomentumStrength);
 2121 |     analysis += StringFormat("Market Conditions:\n");
 2122 |     analysis += StringFormat("  - Trending: %s\n", m_CurrentData.isTrending ? "Yes" : "No");
 2123 |     analysis += StringFormat("  - Sideways/Choppy: %s\n", m_CurrentData.isSidewaysOrChoppy ? "Yes" : "No");
 2124 |     analysis += StringFormat("  - Low Momentum: %s\n", m_CurrentData.isLowMomentum ? "Yes" : "No");
 2125 |     analysis += StringFormat("  - High Volatility: %s\n", m_CurrentData.isVolatile ? "Yes" : "No");
 2126 |     analysis += StringFormat("  - Transitioning: %s\n", m_CurrentData.isTransitioning ? "Yes" : "No");
 2127 |     
 2128 |     if (m_Config.UseMultiTimeframe) {
 2129 |         analysis += StringFormat("Multi-timeframe Alignment: %s (Strength: %.1f%%)\n", 
 2130 |             m_MarketContext.MTFAlignment ? "Yes" : "No", m_MarketContext.MTFStrength);
 2131 |     }
 2132 |     
 2133 |     return analysis;
 2134 | }
 2135 | 
 2136 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2137 | //| Calculate Slope                                                  |
 2138 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2139 | double CMarketProfile::CalculateSlope(const double& buffer[], int periods = 5) {
 2140 |     if (ArraySize(buffer) < periods || periods < 2) {
 2141 |         return 0.0;
 2142 |     }
 2143 |     
 2144 |     double sum_x = 0, sum_y = 0, sum_xy = 0, sum_x2 = 0;
 2145 |     
 2146 |     for (int i = 0; i < periods; i++) {
 2147 |         sum_x += i;
 2148 |         sum_y += buffer[i];
 2149 |         sum_xy += i * buffer[i];
 2150 |         sum_x2 += i * i;
 2151 |     }
 2152 |     
 2153 |     double denominator = periods * sum_x2 - sum_x * sum_x;
 2154 |     if (denominator == 0) {
 2155 |         return 0.0;
 2156 |     }
 2157 |     
 2158 |     return (periods * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / denominator;
 2159 | }
 2160 | 
 2161 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5
 2162 | 
 2163 | #endif // MARKET_PROFILE_MQH_

  396 | 
  397 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  398 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  399 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  400 | bool CNewsAnalysis::Initialize(EAContext* context, const SNewsFilter& filter) {
  401 |     if(context == NULL) {
  402 |         printf("Error: CNewsAnalysis received a null EAContext pointer.");
  403 |         return false;
  404 |     }
  405 |     m_pContext = context;
  406 | 
  407 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  408 |         return true;
  409 |     }
  410 |     
  411 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  412 |         Print("[NEWS_ANALYSIS] Context is NULL. Call Initialize(EAContext*, SNewsFilter) first.");
  413 |         return false;
  414 |     }
  415 |     
  416 |     // Set filter configuration
  417 |     m_Filter = filter;
  418 |     
  419 |     // Setup monitored currencies based on symbol
  420 |     SetMonitoredCurrencies(_Symbol);
  421 |     
  422 |     // Initialize default impact models
  423 |     // This would typically load from configuration or historical data
  424 |     
  425 |     // Load holidays data
  426 |     LoadHolidays("market_holidays.csv");
  427 |     
  428 |     // Setup auto-update if enabled
  429 |     if (m_AutoUpdateEnabled) {
  430 |         m_NextUpdate = TimeCurrent() + m_UpdateIntervalMinutes * 60;
  431 |     }
  432 |     
  433 |     // Initial news data update
  434 |     bool update_success = UpdateNewsData();
  435 |     
  436 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  437 |     
  438 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  439 |         string init_msg = StringFormat("News Analysis initialized: Filter=%d, Sources=%d, Update=%s",
  440 |                                       (int)m_Filter.FilterLevel, ArraySize(m_Sources),
  441 |                                       update_success ? "Success" : "Failed");
  442 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(init_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  443 |     }
  444 |     
  445 |     LogNewsEvent("News Analysis initialized successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  446 |     
  447 |     return true;
  448 | }
  449 | 
  450 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  451 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  452 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  453 | void CNewsAnalysis::Deinitialize() {
  454 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  455 |         return;
  456 |     }
  457 |     
  458 |     // Save current events to cache if enabled
  459 |     SaveEventsToCache();
  460 |     
  461 |     // Log final statistics
  462 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  463 |         string final_msg = StringFormat("News Analysis shutting down: Events=%d, Updates=%d/%d, Accuracy=%.1f%%",
  464 |                                        m_EventCount, m_SuccessfulUpdates, 
  465 |                                        m_SuccessfulUpdates + m_FailedUpdates,
  466 |                                        m_PredictionAccuracy * 100);
  467 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(final_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  468 |     }
  469 |     
  470 |     // Cleanup resources
  471 |     CleanupResources();
  472 |     
  473 |     LogNewsEvent("News Analysis deinitialized", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  474 |     
  475 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  476 | }
  477 | 
  478 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  479 | //| Analyze Current Situation                                        |
  480 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  481 | SNewsImpactAnalysis CNewsAnalysis::AnalyzeCurrentSituation() {
  482 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  483 |         ZeroMemory(m_CurrentAnalysis);
  484 |         return m_CurrentAnalysis;
  485 |     }
  486 |     
  487 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  488 |     
  489 |     // Check if analysis is still valid (cache for 1 minute)
  490 |     if (m_AnalysisValid && current_time - m_LastAnalysisTime < 60) {
  491 |         return m_CurrentAnalysis;
  492 |     }
  493 |     
  494 |     // Update news data if needed
  495 |     if (m_AutoUpdateEnabled && current_time >= m_NextUpdate) {
  496 |         UpdateNewsData();
  497 |         m_NextUpdate = current_time + m_UpdateIntervalMinutes * 60;
  498 |     }
  499 |     
  500 |     // Perform fresh analysis
  501 |     PerformAnalysis();
  502 |     
  503 |     m_LastAnalysisTime = current_time;
  504 |     m_AnalysisValid = true;
  505 |     
  506 |     return m_CurrentAnalysis;
  507 | }
  508 | 
  509 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  510 | //| Check if currently in news window                               |
  511 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  512 | bool CNewsAnalysis::IsInNewsWindow() {
  513 |     if (m_Filter.FilterLevel == NEWS_FILTER_NONE) {
  514 |         return false;
  515 |     }
  516 |     
  517 |     SNewsImpactAnalysis analysis = AnalyzeCurrentSituation();
  518 |     return analysis.InNewsWindow;
  519 | }
  520 | 
  521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  522 | //| Internal Methods Implementation                                  |
  523 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  524 | 
  525 | void CNewsAnalysis::PerformAnalysis() {
  526 |     // Reset analysis structure
  527 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentAnalysis);
  528 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  529 |     
  530 |     // Update active events
  531 |     UpdateActiveEvents();
  532 |     
  533 |     // Calculate impact metrics
  534 |     CalculateImpactMetrics();
  535 |     
  536 |     // Update trading recommendations
  537 |     UpdateTradingRecommendations();
  538 |     
  539 |     // Calculate overall risk score
  540 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.RiskScore = CalculateRiskScore();
  541 | }
  542 | 
  543 | void CNewsAnalysis::SetMonitoredCurrencies(const string& symbol) {
  544 |     ArrayResize(m_MonitoredCurrencies, 0);
  545 |     
  546 |     if (StringLen(symbol) >= 6) {
  547 |         m_BaseCurrency = StringSubstr(symbol, 0, 3);
  548 |         m_QuoteCurrency = StringSubstr(symbol, 3, 3);
  549 |         
  550 |         // Add both currencies to monitoring list
  551 |         int size = ArraySize(m_MonitoredCurrencies);
  552 |         ArrayResize(m_MonitoredCurrencies, size + 2);
  553 |         m_MonitoredCurrencies[size] = m_BaseCurrency;
  554 |         m_MonitoredCurrencies[size + 1] = m_QuoteCurrency;
  555 |         
  556 |         LogNewsEvent(StringFormat("Monitoring currencies: %s, %s", 
  557 |                                  m_BaseCurrency, m_QuoteCurrency), LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG);
  558 |     } else {
  559 |         // Handle special symbols like GOLD, SILVER, etc.
  560 |         if (symbol == "XAUUSD" || symbol == "GOLD") {
  561 |             ArrayResize(m_MonitoredCurrencies, 2);
  562 |             m_MonitoredCurrencies[0] = "XAU";
  563 |             m_MonitoredCurrencies[1] = "USD";
  564 |         } else if (symbol == "XAGUSD" || symbol == "SILVER") {
  565 |             ArrayResize(m_MonitoredCurrencies, 2);
  566 |             m_MonitoredCurrencies[0] = "XAG";
  567 |             m_MonitoredCurrencies[1] = "USD";
  568 |         }
  569 |     }
  570 | }
  571 | 
  572 | bool CNewsAnalysis::UpdateNewsData() {
  573 |     if (m_UpdateInProgress) {
  574 |         return false; // Update already in progress
  575 |     }
  576 |     
  577 |     m_UpdateInProgress = true;
  578 |     bool overall_success = false;
  579 |     
  580 |     LogNewsEvent("Starting news data update", LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG);
  581 |     
  582 |     // Update from all configured sources
  583 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Sources); i++) {
  584 |         if (m_Sources[i].IsEnabled) {
  585 |             bool source_success = UpdateFromSource(m_Sources[i].Source);
  586 |             if (source_success) {
  587 |                 overall_success = true;
  588 |                 m_Sources[i].LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  589 |                 m_Sources[i].SuccessfulUpdates++;
  590 |             } else {
  591 |                 m_Sources[i].FailedUpdates++;
  592 |             }
  593 |             
  594 |             // Update reliability score
  595 |             int total_updates = m_Sources[i].SuccessfulUpdates + m_Sources[i].FailedUpdates;
  596 |             if (total_updates > 0) {
  597 |                 m_Sources[i].ReliabilityScore = (double)m_Sources[i].SuccessfulUpdates / total_updates;
  598 |             }
  599 |         }
  600 |     }
  601 |     
  602 |     if (overall_success) {
  603 |         // Clean up old events
  604 |         CleanupOldEvents();
  605 |         
  606 |         // Sort events by time
  607 |         SortEventsByTime();
  608 |         
  609 |         // Remove duplicates
  610 |         RemoveDuplicateEvents();
  611 |         
  612 |         // Validate data
  613 |         ValidateEventData();
  614 |         
  615 |         m_LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  616 |         m_SuccessfulUpdates++;
  617 |         
  618 |         LogNewsEvent(StringFormat("News update completed: %d events loaded", m_EventCount), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  619 |     } else {
  620 |         m_FailedUpdates++;
  621 |         LogNewsEvent("News update failed from all sources", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  622 |     }
  623 |     
  624 |     m_UpdateInProgress = false;
  625 |     return overall_success;
  626 | }
  627 | 
  628 | void CNewsAnalysis::LogNewsEvent(const string& event, ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  629 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  630 |         switch(level) {
  631 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  632 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  633 |                 break;
  634 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  635 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  636 |                 break;
  637 |             case LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG:
  638 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug(event, __FUNCTION__);
  639 |                 break;
  640 |             default:
  641 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  642 |         }
  643 |     }
  644 | }
  645 | 
  646 | #endif // NEWS_ANALYSIS_MQH

  353 |

  355 |     SPatternPoint         m_SwingHighs[];       // Recent swing highs
  356 |     SPatternPoint         m_SwingLows[];        // Recent swing lows
  357 |     int                   m_SwingHighCount;     // Number of swing highs
  358 |     int                   m_SwingLowCount;      // Number of swing lows
  359 |     
  360 |     // Detection Parameters
  361 |     int                   m_LookbackPeriod;     // Pattern lookback period
  362 |     int                   m_MinPatternBars;     // Minimum pattern bars
  363 |     int                   m_MaxPatternBars;     // Maximum pattern bars
  364 |     double                m_FibTolerance;       // Fibonacci tolerance
  365 |     double                m_PriceTolerancePercent; // Price tolerance percentage
  366 |     
  367 |     // Performance Tracking
  368 |     datetime              m_LastDetectionTime;  // Last detection time
  369 |     int                   m_DetectionCount;     // Total detections
  370 |     int                   m_ValidDetectionCount; // Valid detections
  371 |     double                m_AverageDetectionTime; // Average detection time
  372 |     
  373 |     // Memory Management
  374 |     int                   m_MaxPatterns;        // Maximum stored patterns
  375 |     bool                  m_MemoryOptimized;    // Memory optimization flag
  376 |
