  541 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  542 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  543 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  544 | CPatterns::CPatterns(EAContext* context) {
  545 |     m_pContext = context;
  546 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  547 |     m_PatternCount = 0;
  548 |     m_HasActivePattern = false;
  549 |     m_SwingHighCount = 0;
  550 |     m_SwingLowCount = 0;
  551 |     m_DetectionCount = 0;
  552 |     m_ValidDetectionCount = 0;
  553 |     m_AverageDetectionTime = 0.0;
  554 |     m_MemoryOptimized = false;
  555 |     m_MaxPatterns = 100;
  556 |     
  557 |     // Initialize handles
  558 |     m_ATRHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  559 |     m_RSIHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  560 |     m_MACDHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  561 |     m_BBHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  562 |     
  563 |     // Initialize configuration
  564 |     ZeroMemory(m_Filter);
  565 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  566 |     ZeroMemory(m_ActivePattern);
  567 |     
  568 |     // Set default configuration
  569 |     m_EnableRealTimeDetection = true;
  570 |     m_EnableMultiTimeframe = false;
  571 |     m_EnableHarmonicPatterns = true;
  572 |     m_EnableCandlestickPatterns = true;
  573 |     
  574 |     // Set default filter
  575 |     m_Filter.MinQuality = PATTERN_QUALITY_FAIR;
  576 |     m_Filter.MinStrength = 0.6;
  577 |     m_Filter.MinReliability = 0.7;
  578 |     m_Filter.MinConfidence = 0.8;
  579 |     m_Filter.MinRiskReward = 1.5;
  580 |     m_Filter.AllowReversals = true;
  581 |     m_Filter.AllowContinuations = true;
  582 |     m_Filter.AllowBreakouts = true;
  583 |     m_Filter.RequireVolumeConfirmation = false;
  584 |     m_Filter.RequireMomentumConfirmation = false;
  585 |     m_Filter.RequireStructureConfirmation = true;
  586 |     
  587 |     // Set detection parameters
  588 |     m_LookbackPeriod = 100;
  589 |     m_MinPatternBars = 5;
  590 |     m_MaxPatternBars = 50;
  591 |     m_FibTolerance = 0.03; // 3% tolerance
  592 |     m_PriceTolerancePercent = 0.5; // 0.5% tolerance
  593 |     
  594 |     // Initialize times
  595 |     m_LastDetectionTime = 0;
  596 |     m_LastStatisticsUpdate = 0;
  597 |     
  598 |     // Resize arrays
  599 |     ArrayResize(m_Patterns, m_MaxPatterns);
  600 |     ArrayResize(m_SwingHighs, 50);
  601 |     ArrayResize(m_SwingLows, 50);
  602 | }
  603 | 
  604 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  605 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  606 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  607 | CPatterns::~CPatterns() {
  608 |     Deinitialize();
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  612 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | bool CPatterns::Initialize(const SPatternFilter& filter) {
  615 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  616 |         return true;
  617 |     }
  618 |     
  619 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  620 |         Print("[PATTERNS] Context is NULL");
  621 |         return false;
  622 |     }
  623 |     
  624 |     // Set filter configuration
  625 |     m_Filter = filter;
  626 |     
  627 |     // Initialize technical indicators
  628 |     if (!InitializeIndicators()) {
  629 |         LogPatternEvent("Failed to initialize indicators", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  630 |         return false;
  631 |     }
  632 |     
  633 |     // Initialize price buffers
  634 |     UpdatePriceBuffers(m_LookbackPeriod);
  635 |     
  636 |     // Update indicator buffers
  637 |     UpdateIndicatorBuffers();
  638 |     
  639 |     // Initial swing point detection
  640 |     UpdateSwingPoints();
  641 |     
  642 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  643 |     
  644 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  645 |         string init_msg = StringFormat("Pattern Detection initialized: MinQuality=%d, MinStrength=%.2f",
  646 |                                       (int)m_Filter.MinQuality, m_Filter.MinStrength);
  647 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(init_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  648 |     }
  649 |     
  650 |     LogPatternEvent("Pattern Detection initialized successfully", LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  651 |     
  652 |     return true;
  653 | }
  654 | 
  655 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  656 | //| Internal Methods Implementation                                  |
  657 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  658 | 
  659 | bool CPatterns::InitializeIndicators() {
  660 |     // Initialize ATR
  661 |     m_ATRHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  662 |     if (m_ATRHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  663 |         LogPatternEvent("Failed to create ATR indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  664 |         return false;
  665 |     }
  666 |     
  667 |     // Initialize RSI
  668 |     m_RSIHandle = iRSI(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14, PRICE_CLOSE);
  669 |     if (m_RSIHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  670 |         LogPatternEvent("Failed to create RSI indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  671 |         return false;
  672 |     }
  673 |     
  674 |     // Initialize MACD
  675 |     m_MACDHandle = iMACD(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 12, 26, 9, PRICE_CLOSE);
  676 |     if (m_MACDHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  677 |         LogPatternEvent("Failed to create MACD indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  678 |         return false;
  679 |     }
  680 |     
  681 |     // Initialize Bollinger Bands
  682 |     m_BBHandle = iBands(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 20, 0, 2.0, PRICE_CLOSE);
  683 |     if (m_BBHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  684 |         LogPatternEvent("Failed to create Bollinger Bands indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  685 |         return false;
  686 |     }
  687 |     
  688 |     // Resize indicator buffers
  689 |     ArrayResize(m_ATRBuffer, m_LookbackPeriod);
  690 |     ArrayResize(m_RSIBuffer, m_LookbackPeriod);
  691 |     ArrayResize(m_MACDMainBuffer, m_LookbackPeriod);
  692 |     ArrayResize(m_MACDSignalBuffer, m_LookbackPeriod);
  693 |     ArrayResize(m_BBUpperBuffer, m_LookbackPeriod);
  694 |     ArrayResize(m_BBLowerBuffer, m_LookbackPeriod);
  695 |     ArrayResize(m_BBMiddleBuffer, m_LookbackPeriod);
  696 |     
  697 |     // Set arrays as series
  698 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_ATRBuffer, true);
  699 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_RSIBuffer, true);
  700 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_MACDMainBuffer, true);
  701 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_MACDSignalBuffer, true);
  702 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_BBUpperBuffer, true);
  703 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_BBLowerBuffer, true);
  704 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_BBMiddleBuffer, true);
  705 |     
  706 |     return true;
  707 | }
  708 | 
  709 | void CPatterns::LogPatternEvent(const string& event, ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  710 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  711 |         switch(level) {
  712 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  713 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  714 |                 break;
  715 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  716 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  717 |                 break;
  718 |             case LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG:
  719 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug(event, __FUNCTION__);
  720 |                 break;
  721 |             default:
  722 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  723 |         }
  724 |     }
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5

  729 | #endif // PATTERNS_MQH_

  198 |     double                Volatility;

  200 |     datetime              LastExtremeReading;

   19 | enum ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE {
   20 |     STRUCTURE_NONE,                  // No structure
   21 |     STRUCTURE_SUPPORT,               // Support level
   22 |     STRUCTURE_RESISTANCE,            // Resistance level
   23 |     STRUCTURE_TREND_LINE,            // Trend line
   24 |     STRUCTURE_CHANNEL_TOP,           // Channel top
   25 |     STRUCTURE_CHANNEL_BOTTOM,        // Channel bottom
   26 |     STRUCTURE_PIVOT_HIGH,            // Pivot high
   27 |     STRUCTURE_PIVOT_LOW,             // Pivot low
   28 |     STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH,            // Swing high
   29 |     STRUCTURE_SWING_LOW,             // Swing low
   30 |     STRUCTURE_HIGHER_HIGH,           // Higher high
   31 |     STRUCTURE_HIGHER_LOW,            // Higher low
   32 |     STRUCTURE_LOWER_HIGH,            // Lower high
   33 |     STRUCTURE_LOWER_LOW,             // Lower low
   34 |     STRUCTURE_EQUAL_HIGH,            // Equal high
   35 |     STRUCTURE_EQUAL_LOW,             // Equal low
   36 |     STRUCTURE_BREAK_HIGH,            // Break of high
   37 |     STRUCTURE_BREAK_LOW,             // Break of low
   38 |     STRUCTURE_LIQUIDITY_POOL,        // Liquidity pool
   39 |     STRUCTURE_ORDER_BLOCK,           // Order block
   40 |     STRUCTURE_FAIR_VALUE_GAP,        // Fair value gap
   41 |     STRUCTURE_IMBALANCE,             // Price imbalance
   42 |     STRUCTURE_INSTITUTIONAL_LEVEL    // Institutional level
   43 | };

   45 | enum ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION {

   47 |     TREND_BULLISH,                   // Bullish trend
   48 |     TREND_BEARISH,                   // Bearish trend
   49 |     TREND_SIDEWAYS,                  // Sideways trend
   50 |     TREND_REVERSAL_BULL,             // Bullish reversal
   51 |     TREND_REVERSAL_BEAR,             // Bearish reversal
   52 |     TREND_CONSOLIDATION,             // Consolidation
   53 |     TREND_BREAKOUT_BULL,             // Bullish breakout
   54 |     TREND_BREAKOUT_BEAR              // Bearish breakout
   55 | };

   57 | enum ENUM_STRUCTURE_STRENGTH {
   58 |     STRENGTH_WEAK,                   // Weak structure (1-2 touches)
   59 |     STRENGTH_MODERATE,               // Moderate structure (3-4 touches)
   60 |     STRENGTH_STRONG,                 // Strong structure (5-7 touches)
   61 |     STRENGTH_VERY_STRONG,            // Very strong structure (8+ touches)
   62 |     STRENGTH_INSTITUTIONAL           // Institutional level
   63 | };

   87 | struct SStructureLevel {
   88 |     ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE   Type;              // Structure type
   89 |     ENUM_STRUCTURE_STRENGTH Strength;       // Structure strength
   90 |     ENUM_STRUCTURE_STATUS Status;            // Structure status
   91 |     ENUM_BREAK_TYPE       BreakType;         // Break type
   92 |

   94 |     datetime              FirstTouch;        // First touch time
   95 |     datetime              LastTouch;         // Last touch time
   96 |     datetime              BreakTime;         // Break time
   97 |     datetime              RetestTime;        // Retest time
   98 |     
   99 |     int                   TouchCount;        // Number of touches
  100 |     int                   BarsSinceTouch;    // Bars since last touch
  101 |     int                   BarsSinceBreak;    // Bars since break
  102 |     
  103 |     double                MaxDeviation;      // Maximum price deviation
  104 |     double                AverageDeviation;  // Average price deviation
  105 |     double                Significance;      // Significance score (0-100)
  106 |     double                Reliability;       // Reliability score (0-100)
  107 |     
  108 |     bool                  IsActive;          // Active status
  109 |     bool                  IsBroken;          // Broken status
  110 |     bool                  IsRetested;        // Retested status
  111 |     bool                  IsInstitutional;   // Institutional level
  112 |     
  113 |     string                Description;       // Level description
  114 |     string                Notes;             // Additional notes
  115 |     
  116 |     // Touch history (last 10 touches)
  117 |     datetime              TouchTimes[10];    // Touch times

  337 |     bool                  GetRecentSwings(SSwingPoint& swings[], const int count = 10);
  338 |     
  339 |     //--- Market Structure ---
  340 |     SMarketStructure      GetMarketStructure() const { return m_Structure; }
  341 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  GetPrimaryTrend() const { return m_Structure.PrimaryTrend; }
  342 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  GetSecondaryTrend() const { return m_Structure.SecondaryTrend; }
  343 |     double                GetTrendStrength() const { return m_Structure.TrendStrength; }
  344 |     double                GetTrendAngle() const { return m_Structure.TrendAngle; }
  345 |     
  346 |     //--- Structure Queries ---
  347 |     bool                  IsSupport(const double price, const double tolerance = 0);
  348 |     bool                  IsResistance(const double price, const double tolerance = 0);
  349 |     bool                  IsStructureLevel(const double price, const double tolerance = 0);
  350 |     bool                  IsSwingHigh(const double price, const double tolerance = 0);
  351 |     bool                  IsSwingLow(const double price, const double tolerance = 0);
  352 |     
  353 |     //--- Break Analysis ---
  354 |     bool                  IsStructureBroken(const double price);
  355 |     bool                  IsHighBroken() const { return m_Structure.HighBroken; }
  356 |     bool                  IsLowBroken() const { return m_Structure.LowBroken; }
  357 |     ENUM_BREAK_TYPE       GetLastBreakType();
  358 |     datetime              GetLastBreakTime();
  359 |     
  360 |     //--- Trend Analysis ---
  361 |     bool                  IsBullishStructure();
  362 |     bool                  IsBearishStructure();
  363 |     bool                  IsSidewaysStructure();
  364 |     bool                  IsStructureChanging();
  365 |     bool                  IsHigherHigh(const double price);
  366 |     bool                  IsHigherLow(const double price);
  367 |     bool                  IsLowerHigh(const double price);
  368 |     bool                  IsLowerLow(const double price);
  369 |     
  370 |     //--- Key Levels ---
  371 |     double                GetCurrentHigh() const { return m_Structure.CurrentHigh; }
  372 |     double                GetCurrentLow() const { return m_Structure.CurrentLow; }
  373 |     double                GetPreviousHigh() const { return m_Structure.PreviousHigh; }
  374 |     double                GetPreviousLow() const { return m_Structure.PreviousLow; }
  375 |     double                GetNearestSupport(const double price);
  376 |     double                GetNearestResistance(const double price);
  377 |     
  378 |     //--- Advanced Features ---
  379 |     bool                  DetectOrderBlocks();
  380 |     bool                  DetectFairValueGaps();
  381 |     bool                  DetectLiquidityPools();
  382 |     bool                  DetectInstitutionalLevels();
  383 |     
  384 |     //--- Level Validation ---
  385 |     bool                  ValidateLevel(const SStructureLevel& level);
  386 |     double                CalculateLevelStrength(const SStructureLevel& level);
  387 |     double                CalculateLevelSignificance(const SStructureLevel& level);
  388 |     ENUM_STRUCTURE_STRENGTH DetermineStrength(const int touch_count);
  389 |     
  390 |     //--- Trading Signals ---
  391 |     bool                  IsBreakoutSignal(const double price);
  392 |     bool                  IsRetestSignal(const double price);
  393 |     bool                  IsRejectionSignal(const double price);
  394 |     double                GetBreakoutTarget(const double break_price);
  395 |     double                GetRetestLevel(const double break_price);
  396 |     
  397 |     //--- Statistics ---
  398 |     SStructureStats       GetStatistics() const { return m_Stats; }
  399 |     void                  UpdateStatistics();
  400 |     double                GetBreakoutSuccessRate() const { return m_Stats.BreakoutRate; }
  401 |     double                GetRetestSuccessRate() const { return m_Stats.RetestRate; }
  402 |     
  403 |     //--- Configuration ---
  404 |     bool                  SetConfiguration(const SStructureConfig& config);
  405 |     SStructureConfig      GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  406 |     bool                  EnableStructureType(const ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE type, const bool enable);
  407 |     
  408 |     //--- Information ---
  409 |     string                GetStructureSummary();
  410 |     string                GetTrendSummary();
  411 |     string                GetLevelsSummary();
  412 |     string                GetStatisticsSummary();
  413 |     
  414 | private:
  415 |     //--- Data Loading ---
  416 |     bool                  LoadMarketData();
  417 |     void                  UpdateMarketData();
  418 |     
  419 |     //--- Structure Detection Implementation ---
  420 |     bool                  FindSupportResistance();
  421 |     bool                  FindTrendLines();
  422 |     bool                  FindChannels();
  423 |     bool                  FindPivotPoints();
  424 |     
  425 |     //--- Swing Detection Implementation ---
  426 |     bool                  FindSwingHighs();
  427 |     bool                  FindSwingLows();
  428 |     bool                  ValidateSwing(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  429 |     SSwingPoint           CreateSwing(const ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE type, const double price, const datetime time, const int index);
  430 |     
  431 |     //--- Break Detection Implementation ---
  432 |     bool                  CheckLevelBreaks();
  433 |     bool                  CheckSwingBreaks();
  434 |     bool                  ValidateBreak(const double level, const double break_price);
  435 |     ENUM_BREAK_TYPE       ClassifyBreak(const SStructureLevel& level, const double break_price);
  436 |     
  437 |     //--- Trend Analysis Implementation ---
  438 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  AnalyzePrimaryTrend();
  439 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  AnalyzeSecondaryTrend();
  440 |     double                CalculateTrendStrength();
  441 |     double                CalculateTrendAngle();
  442 |     double                CalculateTrendVelocity();
  443 |     
  444 |     //--- Level Creation ---
  445 |     SStructureLevel       CreateLevel(const ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE type, const double price, const datetime time);
  446 |     void                  UpdateLevel(SStructureLevel& level, const double price, const datetime time);
  447 |     bool                  AddLevel(const SStructureLevel& level);
  448 |     bool                  RemoveLevel(const int index);
  449 |     
  450 |     //--- Level Management ---
  451 |     void                  UpdateLevelStatus();
  452 |     void                  CleanupOldLevels();
  453 |     void                  SortLevels();
  454 |     bool                  IsLevelNearby(const double price, const double tolerance);
  455 |     
  456 |     //--- Calculation Methods ---
  457 |     double                CalculateAverageRange(const int period);
  458 |     double                CalculateVolatility(const int period);
  459 |     double                CalculateMomentum(const int period);
  460 |     bool                  IsPriceAtLevel(const double price, const double level, const double tolerance);
  461 |     
  462 |     //--- Support Methods ---
  463 |     bool                  IsLocalHigh(const int index, const int lookback);
  464 |     bool                  IsLocalLow(const int index, const int lookback);
  465 |     int                   CountTouches(const double level, const double tolerance, const int lookback);
  466 |     double                GetMaxDeviation(const double level, const int start_index, const int end_index);
  467 |     
  468 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
  469 |     bool                  IsValidIndex(const int index);
  470 |     bool                  IsValidPrice(const double price);
  471 |     int                   GetBarIndex(const datetime time);
  472 |     datetime              GetBarTime(const int index);
  473 |     void                  LogStructureEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  474 |     
  475 |     //--- Array Management ---
  476 |     void                  ResizeLevelArray(const int new_size);
  477 |     void                  ResizeSwingArray(const int new_size);
  478 |     void                  AddLevelToArray(const SStructureLevel& level);
  479 |     void                  AddSwingToArray(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  480 | };
  481 | 
  482 | // Static constants definition
  483 | const int CStructure::MAX_LEVELS = 200;
  484 | const int CStructure::MAX_SWINGS = 100;
  485 | const double CStructure::STRUCTURE_TOLERANCE = 0.0001;
  486 | 
  487 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  489 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 | CStructure::CStructure() {
  491 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  492 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  493 |     m_Symbol = "";
  494 |     m_Timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  495 |     m_LevelCount = 0;
  496 |     m_SwingCount = 0;
  497 |     m_DataCount = 0;
  498 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  499 |     m_LastScan = 0;
  500 |     m_StructureChanged = false;
  501 |     
  502 |     // Initialize structures
  503 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  504 |     ZeroMemory(m_Structure);
  505 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  506 |     
  507 |     // Set default configuration
  508 |     m_Config.LookbackPeriod = 500;
  509 |     m_Config.SwingLookback = 10;
  510 |     m_Config.MinSwingSize = 100; // points
  511 |     m_Config.LevelTolerance = 20; // points
  512 |     m_Config.DetectSupport = true;
  513 |     m_Config.DetectResistance = true;
  514 |     m_Config.DetectTrendLines = true;
  515 |     m_Config.DetectChannels = true;
  516 |     m_Config.DetectSwings = true;
  517 |     m_Config.DetectBreaks = true;
  518 |     m_Config.UseOrderBlocks = false;
  519 |     m_Config.UseFairValueGaps = false;
  520 |     m_Config.UseLiquidityPools = false;
  521 |     m_Config.UseInstitutional = false;
  522 |     m_Config.MinTouchCount = 2;
  523 |     m_Config.MinSignificance = 50.0;
  524 |     m_Config.MinReliability = 60.0;
  525 |     m_Config.UseTimeFilter = false;
  526 |     m_Config.UseVolumeFilter = false;
  527 |     m_Config.ShowLevels = true;
  528 |     m_Config.ShowSwings = true;
  529 |     m_Config.ShowBreaks = true;
  530 |     m_Config.ShowLabels = true;
  531 |     m_Config.MaxLevels = 50;
  532 |     m_Config.RealTimeUpdate = true;
  533 |     m_Config.HistoricalScan = true;
  534 |     m_Config.UpdateFrequency = 60; // 1 minute
  535 |     m_Config.AutoCleanup = true;
  536 | }
  537 | 
  538 | bool CStructure::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  539 |     if(context == NULL) {
  540 |         printf("Error: CStructure received a null EAContext pointer.");
  541 |         return false;
  542 |     }
  543 |     m_pContext = context;
  544 |     return true;
  545 | }
  546 | 
  547 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  548 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  549 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  550 | CStructure::~CStructure() {
  551 |     Deinitialize();
  552 | }
  553 | 
  554 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  555 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  556 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  557 | bool CStructure::Initialize(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const SStructureConfig& config) {
  558 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  559 |         return true;
  560 |     }
  561 |     
  562 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  563 |         Print("[STRUCTURE] Context is NULL. Call Initialize(EAContext*) first.");
  564 |         return false;
  565 |     }
  566 |     
  567 |     m_Symbol = symbol;
  568 |     m_Timeframe = timeframe;
  569 |     m_Config = config;
  570 |     
  571 |     // Validate configuration
  572 |     if (m_Config.LookbackPeriod < 100) {
  573 |         m_Config.LookbackPeriod = 500;
  574 |     }
  575 |     
  576 |     if (m_Config.SwingLookback < 5) {
  577 |         m_Config.SwingLookback = 10;
  578 |     }
  579 |     
  580 |     if (m_Config.MaxLevels > MAX_LEVELS) {
  581 |         m_Config.MaxLevels = MAX_LEVELS;
  582 |     }
  583 |     
  584 |     // Initialize arrays
  585 |     ArrayResize(m_Levels, MAX_LEVELS);
  586 |     ArrayResize(m_Swings, MAX_SWINGS);
  587 |     
  588 |     // Load initial market data
  589 |     if (!LoadMarketData()) {
  590 |         LogStructureEvent("Failed to load market data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  591 |         return false;
  592 |     }
  593 |     
  594 |     // Perform initial structure analysis
  595 |     if (m_Config.HistoricalScan) {
  596 |         AnalyzeStructure();
  597 |         UpdateStatistics();
  598 |     }
  599 |     
  600 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  601 |     
  602 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  603 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Structure analysis initialized for: " + symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  604 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetStructureSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  605 |     }
  606 |     
  607 |     return true;
  608 | }
  609 | 
  610 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  611 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  612 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  613 | void CStructure::Deinitialize() {
  614 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  615 |         return;
  616 |     }
  617 |     
  618 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  619 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetStatisticsSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  620 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Structure analysis shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
  621 |     }
  622 |     
  623 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  624 | }
  625 | 
  626 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  627 | //| Update                                                           |
  628 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  629 | void CStructure::Update() {
  630 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  631 |         return;
  632 |     }
  633 |     
  634 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  635 |     
  636 |     // Real-time structure analysis
  637 |     if (m_Config.RealTimeUpdate) {
  638 |         UpdateMarketData();
  639 |         
  640 |         // Update level status
  641 |         UpdateLevelStatus();
  642 |         
  643 |         // Check for structure breaks
  644 |         if (DetectStructureBreaks()) {
  645 |             m_StructureChanged = true;
  646 |             UpdateTrendDirection();
  647 |         }
  648 |         
  649 |         // Full structure analysis every few minutes
  650 |         if (current_time - m_LastScan >= m_Config.UpdateFrequency) {
  651 |             if (AnalyzeStructure()) {
  652 |                 m_StructureChanged = true;
  653 |                 UpdateStatistics();
  654 |             }
  655 |             m_LastScan = current_time;
  656 |         }
  657 |     }
  658 |     
  659 |     // Cleanup old levels
  660 |     if (m_Config.AutoCleanup && current_time - m_LastUpdate >= 3600) { // Every hour
  661 |         CleanupOldLevels();
  662 |         UpdateStatistics();
  663 |         m_LastUpdate = current_time;
  664 |     }
  665 | }
  666 | 
  667 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  668 | //| Analyze Structure                                                |
  669 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  670 | bool CStructure::AnalyzeStructure() {
  671 |     if (m_DataCount < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2) {
  672 |         return false;
  673 |     }
  674 |     
  675 |     bool structure_found = false;
  676 |     
  677 |     // Detect structure levels
  678 |     if (DetectStructureLevels()) {
  679 |         structure_found = true;
  680 |     }
  681 |     
  682 |     // Detect swing points
  683 |     if (DetectSwingPoints()) {
  684 |         structure_found = true;
  685 |     }
  686 |     
  687 |     // Update trend direction
  688 |     if (UpdateTrendDirection()) {
  689 |         structure_found = true;
  690 |     }
  691 |     
  692 |     // Detect structure breaks
  693 |     if (DetectStructureBreaks()) {
  694 |         structure_found = true;
  695 |     }
  696 |     
  697 |     if (structure_found) {
  698 |         SortLevels();
  699 |         LogStructureEvent(StringFormat("Structure analysis completed. Found %d levels, %d swings", 
  700 |                                       m_LevelCount, m_SwingCount));
  701 |     }
  702 |     
  703 |     return structure_found;
  704 | }
  705 | 
  706 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  707 | //| Detect Structure Levels                                          |
  708 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  709 | bool CStructure::DetectStructureLevels() {
  710 |     bool levels_found = false;
  711 |     
  712 |     // Find support and resistance levels
  713 |     if (m_Config.DetectSupport || m_Config.DetectResistance) {
  714 |         if (FindSupportResistance()) {
  715 |             levels_found = true;
  716 |         }
  717 |     }
  718 |     
  719 |     // Find trend lines
  720 |     if (m_Config.DetectTrendLines) {
  721 |         if (FindTrendLines()) {
  722 |             levels_found = true;
  723 |         }
  724 |     }
  725 |     
  726 |     // Find channels
  727 |     if (m_Config.DetectChannels) {
  728 |         if (FindChannels()) {
  729 |             levels_found = true;
  730 |         }
  731 |     }
  732 |     
  733 |     // Find pivot points
  734 |     if (FindPivotPoints()) {
  735 |         levels_found = true;
  736 |     }
  737 |     
  738 |     return levels_found;
  739 | }
  740 | 
  741 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  742 | //| Detect Swing Points                                              |
  743 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  744 | bool CStructure::DetectSwingPoints() {
  745 |     bool swings_found = false;
  746 |     
  747 |     // Find swing highs
  748 |     if (FindSwingHighs()) {
  749 |         swings_found = true;
  750 |     }
  751 |     
  752 |     // Find swing lows
  753 |     if (FindSwingLows()) {
  754 |         swings_found = true;
  755 |     }
  756 |     
  757 |     return swings_found;
  758 | }
  759 | 
  760 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  761 | //| Update Trend Direction                                           |
  762 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  763 | bool CStructure::UpdateTrendDirection() {
  764 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION old_primary = m_Structure.PrimaryTrend;
  765 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION old_secondary = m_Structure.SecondaryTrend;
  766 |     
  767 |     // Analyze primary trend
  768 |     m_Structure.PrimaryTrend = AnalyzePrimaryTrend();
  769 |     
  770 |     // Analyze secondary trend
  771 |     m_Structure.SecondaryTrend = AnalyzeSecondaryTrend();
  772 |     
  773 |     // Calculate trend metrics
  774 |     m_Structure.TrendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  775 |     m_Structure.TrendAngle = CalculateTrendAngle();
  776 |     m_Structure.TrendVelocity = CalculateTrendVelocity();
  777 |     
  778 |     // Update market character
  779 |     m_Structure.IsImpulsive = (m_Structure.TrendStrength > 70.0);
  780 |     m_Structure.IsCorrective = (m_Structure.TrendStrength < 30.0);
  781 |     m_Structure.IsConsolidating = (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_SIDEWAYS);
  782 |     m_Structure.IsBreakingOut = (m_Structure.HighBroken || m_Structure.LowBroken);
  783 |     
  784 |     // Check for trend changes
  785 |     bool trend_changed = (old_primary != m_Structure.PrimaryTrend || 
  786 |                          old_secondary != m_Structure.SecondaryTrend);
  787 |     
  788 |     if (trend_changed) {
  789 |         m_Stats.TrendChanges++;
  790 |         LogStructureEvent(StringFormat("Trend changed: %s -> %s", 
  791 |                                       EnumToString(old_primary), 
  792 |                                       EnumToString(m_Structure.PrimaryTrend)));
  793 |     }
  794 |     
  795 |     return trend_changed;
  796 | }
  797 | 
  798 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  799 | //| Is Bullish Structure                                             |
  800 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  801 | bool CStructure::IsBullishStructure() {
  802 |     return (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BULLISH || 
  803 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BREAKOUT_BULL || 
  804 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_REVERSAL_BULL);
  805 | }
  806 | 
  807 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  808 | //| Is Bearish Structure                                             |
  809 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  810 | bool CStructure::IsBearishStructure() {
  811 |     return (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BEARISH || 
  812 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BREAKOUT_BEAR || 
  813 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_REVERSAL_BEAR);
  814 | }
  815 | 
  816 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  817 | //| Is Sideways Structure                                            |
  818 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  819 | bool CStructure::IsSidewaysStructure() {
  820 |     return (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_SIDEWAYS || 
  821 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_CONSOLIDATION);
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  825 | //| Is Higher High                                                   |
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | bool CStructure::IsHigherHigh(const double price) {
  828 |     return (price > m_Structure.CurrentHigh && 
  829 |             m_Structure.CurrentHigh > m_Structure.PreviousHigh);
  830 | }
  831 | 
  832 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  833 | //| Is Higher Low                                                    |
  834 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  835 | bool CStructure::IsHigherLow(const double price) {
  836 |     return (price > m_Structure.CurrentLow && 
  837 |             m_Structure.CurrentLow > m_Structure.PreviousLow);
  838 | }
  839 | 
  840 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  841 | //| Is Lower High                                                    |
  842 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  843 | bool CStructure::IsLowerHigh(const double price) {
  844 |     return (price < m_Structure.CurrentHigh && 
  845 |             m_Structure.CurrentHigh < m_Structure.PreviousHigh);
  846 | }
  847 | 
  848 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  849 | //| Is Lower Low                                                     |
  850 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  851 | bool CStructure::IsLowerLow(const double price) {
  852 |     return (price < m_Structure.CurrentLow && 
  853 |             m_Structure.CurrentLow < m_Structure.PreviousLow);
  854 | }
  855 | 
  856 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  857 | //| Get Nearest Support                                              |
  858 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  859 | double CStructure::GetNearestSupport(const double price) {
  860 |     double nearest_support = 0;
  861 |     double min_distance = DBL_MAX;
  862 |     
  863 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
  864 |         if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SUPPORT && 
  865 |             m_Levels[i].IsActive && 
  866 |             m_Levels[i].Price < price) {
  867 |             
  868 |             double distance = price - m_Levels[i].Price;
  869 |             if (distance < min_distance) {
  870 |                 min_distance = distance;
  871 |                 nearest_support = m_Levels[i].Price;
  872 |             }
  873 |         }
  874 |     }
  875 |     
  876 |     return nearest_support;
  877 | }
  878 | 
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | //| Get Nearest Resistance                                           |
  881 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  882 | double CStructure::GetNearestResistance(const double price) {
  883 |     double nearest_resistance = 0;
  884 |     double min_distance = DBL_MAX;
  885 |     
  886 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
  887 |         if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_RESISTANCE && 
  888 |             m_Levels[i].IsActive && 
  889 |             m_Levels[i].Price > price) {
  890 |             
  891 |             double distance = m_Levels[i].Price - price;
  892 |             if (distance < min_distance) {
  893 |                 min_distance = distance;
  894 |                 nearest_resistance = m_Levels[i].Price;
  895 |             }
  896 |         }
  897 |     }
  898 |     
  899 |     return nearest_resistance;
  900 | }
  901 | 
  902 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  903 | //| Get Structure Summary                                            |
  904 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  905 | string CStructure::GetStructureSummary() {
  906 |     string summary = "=== MARKET STRUCTURE ===\n";
  907 |     summary += StringFormat("Symbol: %s\n", m_Symbol);
  908 |     summary += StringFormat("Timeframe: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Timeframe));
  909 |     summary += StringFormat("Primary Trend: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Structure.PrimaryTrend));
  910 |     summary += StringFormat("Secondary Trend: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Structure.SecondaryTrend));
  911 |     summary += StringFormat("Trend Strength: %.1f%%\n", m_Structure.TrendStrength);
  912 |     summary += StringFormat("Trend Angle: %.1f°\n", m_Structure.TrendAngle);
  913 |     summary += StringFormat("Current High: %.5f\n", m_Structure.CurrentHigh);
  914 |     summary += StringFormat("Current Low: %.5f\n", m_Structure.CurrentLow);
  915 |     summary += StringFormat("Structure Levels: %d\n", m_Stats.ActiveLevels);
  916 |     summary += StringFormat("Swing Points: %d\n", m_SwingCount);
  917 |     summary += StringFormat("High Broken: %s\n", m_Structure.HighBroken ? "Yes" : "No");
  918 |     summary += StringFormat("Low Broken: %s\n", m_Structure.LowBroken ? "Yes" : "No");
  919 |     
  920 |     return summary;
  921 | }
  922 | 
  923 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  924 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
  925 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  926 | bool CStructure::LoadMarketData() {
  927 |     if (m_Symbol == "") {
  928 |         return false;
  929 |     }
  930 |     
  931 |     // Load OHLC and volume data
  932 |     double high_prices[], low_prices[], open_prices[], close_prices[];
  933 |     long volumes[];
  934 |     datetime times[];
  935 |     
  936 |     int copied_high = CopyHigh(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, high_prices);
  937 |     int copied_low = CopyLow(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, low_prices);
  938 |     int copied_open = CopyOpen(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, open_prices);
  939 |     int copied_close = CopyClose(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, close_prices);
  940 |     int copied_volumes = CopyTickVolume(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, volumes);
  941 |     int copied_times = CopyTime(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, times);
  942 |     
  943 |     if (copied_high < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2 || 
  944 |         copied_low < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2 || 
  945 |         copied_open < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2 || 
  946 |         copied_close < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2) {
  947 |         LogStructureEvent("Insufficient market data loaded", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  948 |         return false;
  949 |     }
  950 |     
  951 |     // Store data
  952 |     m_DataCount = copied_high;
  953 |     ArrayResize(m_HighData, m_DataCount);
  954 |     ArrayResize(m_LowData, m_DataCount);
  955 |     ArrayResize(m_OpenData, m_DataCount);
  956 |     ArrayResize(m_CloseData, m_DataCount);
  957 |     ArrayResize(m_VolumeData, m_DataCount);
  958 |     ArrayResize(m_TimeData, m_DataCount);
  959 |     
  960 |     ArrayCopy(m_HighData, high_prices);
  961 |     ArrayCopy(m_LowData, low_prices);
  962 |     ArrayCopy(m_OpenData, open_prices);
  963 |     ArrayCopy(m_CloseData, close_prices);
  964 |     ArrayCopy(m_TimeData, times);
  965 |     
  966 |     if (copied_volumes > 0) {
  967 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_DataCount; i++) {
  968 |             m_VolumeData[i] = (i < copied_volumes) ? volumes[i] : 1;
  969 |         }
  970 |     } else {
  971 |         ArrayInitialize(m_VolumeData, 1);
  972 |     }
  973 |     
  974 |     return true;
  975 | }
  976 | 
  977 | bool CStructure::AddLevel(const SStructureLevel& level) {
  978 |     if (m_LevelCount >= ArraySize(m_Levels)) {
  979 |         // Remove weakest level if array is full
  980 |         int weakest_index = 0;
  981 |         double weakest_strength = m_Levels[0].Reliability;
  982 |         
  983 |         for (int i = 1; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
  984 |             if (m_Levels[i].Reliability < weakest_strength) {
  985 |                 weakest_strength = m_Levels[i].Reliability;
  986 |                 weakest_index = i;
  987 |             }
  988 |         }
  989 |         
  990 |         // Remove weakest level
  991 |         for (int i = weakest_index; i < m_LevelCount - 1; i++) {
  992 |             m_Levels[i] = m_Levels[i + 1];
  993 |         }
  994 |         m_LevelCount--;
  995 |     }
  996 |     
  997 |     // Add new level
  998 |     m_Levels[m_LevelCount] = level;
  999 |     m_LevelCount++;
 1000 |     
 1001 |     return true;
 1002 | }
 1003 | 
 1004 | void CStructure::AddSwingToArray(const SSwingPoint& swing) {
 1005 |     if (m_SwingCount >= ArraySize(m_Swings)) {
 1006 |         // Shift array to make room
 1007 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_SwingCount - 1; i++) {
 1008 |             m_Swings[i] = m_Swings[i + 1];
 1009 |         }
 1010 |         m_SwingCount--;
 1011 |     }
 1012 |     
 1013 |     m_Swings[m_SwingCount] = swing;
 1014 |     m_SwingCount++;
 1015 | }
 1016 | 
 1017 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5
 1018 | 
 1019 | #endif // STRUCTURE_MQH--;
 1020 |     }
 1021 |     
 1022 |     // Add new level
 1023 |     m_Levels[m_LevelCount] = level;
 1024 |     m_LevelCount++;
 1025 |     
 1026 |     return true;
 1027 | }
 1028 | 
 1029 | void CStructure::AddSwingToArray(const SSwingPoint& swing) {
 1030 |     if (m_SwingCount >= ArraySize(m_Swings)) {
 1031 |         // Shift array to make room
 1032 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_SwingCount - 1; i++) {
 1033 |             m_Swings[i] = m_Swings[i + 1];
 1034 |         }
 1035 |         m_SwingCount--;
 1036 |     }
 1037 |     
 1038 |     m_Swings[m_SwingCount] = swing;
 1039 |     m_SwingCount++;
 1040 | }
 1041 | 
 1042 | void CStructure::UpdateStatistics() {
 1043 |     // Reset statistics
 1044 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
 1045 |     
 1046 |     // Count levels by type and status
 1047 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
 1048 |         m_Stats.TotalLevels++;
 1049 |         
 1050 |         if (m_Levels[i].IsActive) {
 1051 |             m_Stats.ActiveLevels++;
 1052 |         }
 1053 |         
 1054 |         if (m_Levels[i].IsBroken) {
 1055 |             m_Stats.BrokenLevels++;
 1056 |         }
 1057 |         
 1058 |         if (m_Levels[i].TouchCount > 1) {
 1059 |             m_Stats.TestedLevels++;
 1060 |         }
 1061 |         
 1062 |         if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SUPPORT) {
 1063 |             m_Stats.SupportLevels++;
 1064 |         } else if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_RESISTANCE) {
 1065 |             m_Stats.ResistanceLevels++;
 1066 |         }
 1067 |         
 1068 |         m_Stats.AvgLevelStrength += m_Levels[i].Reliability;
 1069 |         m_Stats.AvgReliability += m_Levels[i].Significance;
 1070 |     }
 1071 |     
 1072 |     // Calculate averages
 1073 |     if (m_Stats.TotalLevels > 0) {
 1074 |         m_Stats.AvgLevelStrength /= m_Stats.TotalLevels;
 1075 |         m_Stats.AvgReliability /= m_Stats.TotalLevels;
 1076 |     }
 1077 |     
 1078 |     // Count swing points
 1079 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_SwingCount; i++) {
 1080 |         if (m_Swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH) {
 1081 |             m_Stats.SwingHighs++;
 1082 |         } else if (m_Swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_LOW) {
 1083 |             m_Stats.SwingLows++;
 1084 |         }
 1085 |     }
 1086 |     
 1087 |     // Calculate success rates (simplified)
 1088 |     if (m_Stats.BrokenLevels > 0) {
 1089 |         m_Stats.BreakoutRate = (double)m_Stats.BrokenLevels / m_Stats.TotalLevels * 100.0;
 1090 |     }
 1091 |     
 1092 |     m_Stats.LastStructureTime = TimeCurrent();
 1093 | }
 1094 | 
 1095 | void CStructure::UpdateMarketData() {
 1096 |     // Update only the latest bars
 1097 |     double high_prices[10], low_prices[10], open_prices[10], close_prices[10];
 1098 |     long volumes[10];
 1099 |     datetime times[10];
 1100 |     
 1101 |     int copied = CopyHigh(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, 10, high_prices);
 1102 |     if (copied > 0) {
 1103 |         CopyLow(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, copied, low_prices);
 1104 |         CopyOpen(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, copied, open_prices);
 1105 |         CopyClose(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, copied, close_prices);
 1106 |         CopyTickVolume(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, copied, volumes);
 1107 |         CopyTime(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, copied, times);
 1108 |         
 1109 |         // Update latest data
 1110 |         for (int i = 0; i < copied && i < 10; i++) {
 1111 |             int index = m_DataCount - copied + i;
 1112 |             if (index >= 0 && index < m_DataCount) {
 1113 |                 m_HighData[index] = high_prices[i];
 1114 |                 m_LowData[index] = low_prices[i];
 1115 |                 m_OpenData[index] = open_prices[i];
 1116 |                 m_CloseData[index] = close_prices[i];
 1117 |                 m_VolumeData[index] = (i < ArraySize(volumes)) ? volumes[i] : 1;
 1118 |                 m_TimeData[index] = times[i];
 1119 |             }
 1120 |         }
 1121 |     }
 1122 | }
 1123 | 
 1124 | void CStructure::UpdateLevelStatus() {
 1125 |     double current_price = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 1126 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1127 |     
 1128 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
 1129 |         // Update bars since touch
 1130 |         m_Levels[i].BarsSinceTouch = (int)((current_time - m_Levels[i].LastTouch) / PeriodSeconds(m_Timeframe));
 1131 |         
 1132 |         // Update bars since break
 1133 |         if (m_Levels[i].IsBroken) {
 1134 |             m_Levels[i].BarsSinceBreak = (int)((current_time - m_Levels[i].BreakTime) / PeriodSeconds(m_Timeframe));
 1135 |         }
 1136 |         
 1137 |         // Check for new touches
 1138 |         double tolerance = m_Config.LevelTolerance * SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1139 |         if (IsPriceAtLevel(current_price, m_Levels[i].Price, tolerance)) {
 1140 |             m_Levels[i].LastTouch = current_time;
 1141 |             m_Levels[i].TouchCount++;
 1142 |             m_Levels[i].BarsSinceTouch = 0;
 1143 |             
 1144 |             // Add to touch history
 1145 |             if (m_Levels[i].TouchHistoryCount < 10) {
 1146 |                 m_Levels[i].TouchTimes[m_Levels[i].TouchHistoryCount] = current_time;
 1147 |                 m_Levels[i].TouchPrices[m_Levels[i].TouchHistoryCount] = current_price;
 1148 |                 m_Levels[i].TouchHistoryCount++;
 1149 |             }
 1150 |         }
 1151 |     }
 1152 | }
 1153 | 
 1154 | bool CStructure::DetectStructureBreaks() {
 1155 |     bool breaks_detected = false;
 1156 |     double current_price = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 1157 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1158 |     
 1159 |     // Check level breaks
 1160 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
 1161 |         if (!m_Levels[i].IsBroken && m_Levels[i].IsActive) {
 1162 |             bool is_broken = false;
 1163 |             
 1164 |             if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SUPPORT && current_price < m_Levels[i].Price) {
 1165 |                 is_broken = true;
 1166 |             } else if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_RESISTANCE && current_price > m_Levels[i].Price) {
 1167 |                 is_broken = true;
 1168 |             }
 1169 |             
 1170 |             if (is_broken) {
 1171 |                 m_Levels[i].IsBroken = true;
 1172 |                 m_Levels[i].BreakTime = current_time;
 1173 |                 m_Levels[i].Status = STATUS_BROKEN;
 1174 |                 m_Levels[i].BreakType = ClassifyBreak(m_Levels[i], current_price);
 1175 |                 
 1176 |                 m_Stats.StructureBreaks++;
 1177 |                 m_Stats.LastBreakTime = current_time;
 1178 |                 m_Stats.LastBreakType = m_Levels[i].Type;
 1179 |                 
 1180 |                 LogStructureEvent(StringFormat("Structure break: %s at %.5f", 
 1181 |                                               EnumToString(m_Levels[i].Type), 
 1182 |                                               m_Levels[i].Price));
 1183 |                 
 1184 |                 breaks_detected = true;
 1185 |             }
 1186 |         }
 1187 |     }
 1188 |     
 1189 |     // Check swing breaks
 1190 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_SwingCount; i++) {
 1191 |         if (!m_Swings[i].IsBroken) {
 1192 |             bool is_broken = false;
 1193 |             
 1194 |             if (m_Swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH && current_price > m_Swings[i].Price) {
 1195 |                 is_broken = true;
 1196 |                 m_Structure.HighBroken = true;
 1197 |                 m_Structure.HighBreakTime = current_time;
 1198 |             } else if (m_Swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_LOW && current_price < m_Swings[i].Price) {
 1199 |                 is_broken = true;
 1200 |                 m_Structure.LowBroken = true;
 1201 |                 m_Structure.LowBreakTime = current_time;
 1202 |             }
 1203 |             
 1204 |             if (is_broken) {
 1205 |                 m_Swings[i].IsBroken = true;
 1206 |                 m_Swings[i].BreakTime = current_time;
 1207 |                 m_Swings[i].BreakPrice = current_price;
 1208 |                 
 1209 |                 breaks_detected = true;
 1210 |             }
 1211 |         }
 1212 |     }
 1213 |     
 1214 |     return breaks_detected;
 1215 | }
 1216 | 
 1217 | ENUM_BREAK_TYPE CStructure::ClassifyBreak(const SStructureLevel& level, const double break_price) {
 1218 |     double break_distance = MathAbs(break_price - level.Price);
 1219 |     double atr = CalculateAverageRange(14);
 1220 |     
 1221 |     if (break_distance > atr * 0.5) {
 1222 |         return BREAK_CLEAN;
 1223 |     } else {
 1224 |         return BREAK_FALSE; // Might be false break
 1225 |     }
 1226 | }
 1227 | 
 1228 | double CStructure::CalculateAverageRange(const int period) {
 1229 |     if (m_DataCount < period) {
 1230 |         return 0;
 1231 |     }
 1232 |     
 1233 |     double total_range = 0;
 1234 |     int start_index = m_DataCount - period;
 1235 |     
 1236 |     for (int i = start_index; i < m_DataCount; i++) {
 1237 |         total_range += (m_HighData[i] - m_LowData[i]);
 1238 |     }
 1239 |     
 1240 |     return total_range / period;
 1241 | }
 1242 | 
 1243 | double CStructure::CalculateTrendStrength() {
 1244 |     if (m_SwingCount < 4) {
 1245 |         return 50.0;
 1246 |     }
 1247 |     
 1248 |     // Simple trend strength calculation based on swing consistency
 1249 |     int consistent_moves = 0;
 1250 |     int total_moves = 0;
 1251 |     
 1252 |     for (int i = 1; i < m_SwingCount; i++) {
 1253 |         if (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BULLISH) {
 1254 |             if (m_Swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH && 
 1255 |                 m_Swings[i].Price > m_Swings[i-1].Price) {
 1256 |                 consistent_moves++;
 1257 |             }
 1258 |         } else if (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BEARISH) {
 1259 |             if (m_Swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_LOW && 
 1260 |                 m_Swings[i].Price < m_Swings[i-1].Price) {
 1261 |                 consistent_moves++;
 1262 |             }
 1263 |         }
 1264 |         total_moves++;
 1265 |     }
 1266 |     
 1267 |     if (total_moves > 0) {
 1268 |         return (double)consistent_moves / total_moves * 100.0;
 1269 |     }
 1270 |     
 1271 |     return 50.0;
 1272 | }
 1273 | 
 1274 | void CStructure::CleanupOldLevels() {
 1275 |     datetime cutoff_time = TimeCurrent() - (PeriodSeconds(m_Timeframe) * m_Config.LookbackPeriod);
 1276 |     
 1277 |     for (int i = m_LevelCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 1278 |         bool should_remove = false;
 1279 |         
 1280 |         // Remove very old levels
 1281 |         if (m_Levels[i].LastTouch < cutoff_time) {
 1282 |             should_remove = true;
 1283 |         }
 1284 |         
 1285 |         // Remove broken levels that are old
 1286 |         if (m_Levels[i].IsBroken && m_Levels[i].BarsSinceBreak > 100) {
 1287 |             should_remove = true;
 1288 |         }
 1289 |         
 1290 |         // Remove weak levels
 1291 |         if (m_Levels[i].Reliability < 30.0 && m_Levels[i].TouchCount < 3) {
 1292 |             should_remove = true;
 1293 |         }
 1294 |         
 1295 |         if (should_remove) {
 1296 |             RemoveLevel(i);
 1297 |         }
 1298 |     }
 1299 | }
 1300 | 
 1301 | bool CStructure::RemoveLevel(const int index) {
 1302 |     if (index < 0 || index >= m_LevelCount) {
 1303 |         return false;
 1304 |     }
 1305 |     
 1306 |     // Shift array elements
 1307 |     for (int i = index; i < m_LevelCount - 1; i++) {
 1308 |         m_Levels[i] = m_Levels[i + 1];
 1309 |     }
 1310 |     
 1311 |     m_LevelCount--;
 1312 |     return true;
 1313 | }
 1314 | 
 1315 | void CStructure::SortLevels() {
 1316 |     // Simple bubble sort by price
 1317 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount - 1; i++) {
 1318 |         for (int j = 0; j < m_LevelCount - i - 1; j++) {
 1319 |             if (m_Levels[j].Price > m_Levels[j + 1].Price) {
 1320 |                 SStructureLevel temp = m_Levels[j];
 1321 |                 m_Levels[j] = m_Levels[j + 1];
 1322 |                 m_Levels[j + 1] = temp;
 1323 |             }
 1324 |         }
 1325 |     }
 1326 | }
 1327 | 
 1328 | bool CStructure::IsValidIndex(const int index) {
 1329 |     return (index >= 0 && index < m_DataCount);
 1330 | }
 1331 | 
 1332 | bool CStructure::IsValidPrice(const double price) {
 1333 |     return (price > 0 && price != EMPTY_VALUE);
 1334 | }

 1338 |         m_pContext->pLogger->Log(level, event, __FUNCTION__);
 1339 |     }
 1340 | }
