 1476 |     
 1477 |     //--- Statistics ---
 1478 |     SStructureStats       GetStatistics() const { return m_Stats; }
 1479 |     void                  UpdateStatistics();
 1480 |     double                GetBreakoutSuccessRate() const { return m_Stats.BreakoutRate; }
 1481 |     double                GetRetestSuccessRate() const { return m_Stats.RetestRate; }
 1482 |     
 1483 |     //--- Configuration ---
 1484 |     bool                  SetConfiguration(const SStructureConfig& config);
 1485 |     SStructureConfig      GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
 1486 |     bool                  EnableStructureType(const ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE type, const bool enable);
 1487 |     
 1488 |     //--- Information ---
 1489 |     string                GetStructureSummary();
 1490 |     string                GetTrendSummary();
 1491 |     string                GetLevelsSummary();
 1492 |     string                GetStatisticsSummary();
 1493 |     
 1494 | private:
 1495 |     //--- Data Loading ---
 1496 |     bool                  LoadMarketData();
 1497 |     void                  UpdateMarketData();
 1498 |     
 1499 |     //--- Structure Detection Implementation ---
 1500 |     bool                  FindSupportResistance();
 1501 |     bool                  FindTrendLines();
 1502 |     bool                  FindChannels();
 1503 |     bool                  FindPivotPoints();
 1504 |     
 1505 |     //--- Swing Detection Implementation ---
 1506 |     bool                  FindSwingHighs();
 1507 |     bool                  FindSwingLows();
 1508 |     bool                  ValidateSwing(const SSwingPoint& swing);
 1509 |     SSwingPoint           CreateSwing(const ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE type, const double price, const datetime time, const int index);
 1510 |     
 1511 |     //--- Break Detection Implementation ---
 1512 |     bool                  CheckLevelBreaks();
 1513 |     bool                  CheckSwingBreaks();
 1514 |     bool                  ValidateBreak(const double level, const double break_price);
 1515 |     ENUM_BREAK_TYPE       ClassifyBreak(const SStructureLevel& level, const double break_price);
 1516 |     
 1517 |     //--- Trend Analysis Implementation ---
 1518 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  AnalyzePrimaryTrend();
 1519 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  AnalyzeSecondaryTrend();
 1520 |     double                CalculateTrendStrength();
 1521 |     double                CalculateTrendAngle();
 1522 |     double                CalculateTrendVelocity();
 1523 |     
 1524 |     //--- Level Creation ---
 1525 |     SStructureLevel       CreateLevel(const ENUM_STRUCTURE_TYPE type, const double price, const datetime time);
 1526 |     void                  UpdateLevel(SStructureLevel& level, const double price, const datetime time);
 1527 |     bool                  AddLevel(const SStructureLevel& level);
 1528 |     bool                  RemoveLevel(const int index);
 1529 |     
 1530 |     //--- Level Management ---
 1531 |     void                  UpdateLevelStatus();
 1532 |     void                  CleanupOldLevels();
 1533 |     void                  SortLevels();
 1534 |     bool                  IsLevelNearby(const double price, const double tolerance);
 1535 |     
 1536 |     //--- Calculation Methods ---
 1537 |     double                CalculateAverageRange(const int period);
 1538 |     double                CalculateVolatility(const int period);
 1539 |     double                CalculateMomentum(const int period);
 1540 |     bool                  IsPriceAtLevel(const double price, const double level, const double tolerance);
 1541 |     
 1542 |     //--- Support Methods ---
 1543 |     bool                  IsLocalHigh(const int index, const int lookback);
 1544 |     bool                  IsLocalLow(const int index, const int lookback);
 1545 |     int                   CountTouches(const double level, const double tolerance, const int lookback);
 1546 |     double                GetMaxDeviation(const double level, const int start_index, const int end_index);
 1547 |     
 1548 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
 1549 |     bool                  IsValidIndex(const int index);
 1550 |     bool                  IsValidPrice(const double price);
 1551 |     int                   GetBarIndex(const datetime time);
 1552 |     datetime              GetBarTime(const int index);
 1553 |     void                  LogStructureEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
 1554 |     
 1555 |     //--- Array Management ---
 1556 |     void                  ResizeLevelArray(const int new_size);
 1557 |     void                  ResizeSwingArray(const int new_size);
 1558 |     void                  AddLevelToArray(const SStructureLevel& level);
 1559 |     void                  AddSwingToArray(const SSwingPoint& swing);
 1560 | };
 1561 | 
 1562 | // Static constants definition
 1563 | const int CStructure::MAX_LEVELS = 200;
 1564 | const int CStructure::MAX_SWINGS = 100;
 1565 | const double CStructure::STRUCTURE_TOLERANCE = 0.0001;
 1566 | 
 1567 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1568 | //| Constructor                                                      |
 1569 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1570 | CStructure::CStructure(EAContext* context) {
 1571 |     m_pContext = context;
 1572 |     m_bInitialized = false;
 1573 |     m_Symbol = "";
 1574 |     m_Timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
 1575 |     m_LevelCount = 0;
 1576 |     m_SwingCount = 0;
 1577 |     m_DataCount = 0;
 1578 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
 1579 |     m_LastScan = 0;
 1580 |     m_StructureChanged = false;
 1581 |     
 1582 |     // Initialize structures
 1583 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
 1584 |     ZeroMemory(m_Structure);
 1585 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
 1586 |     
 1587 |     // Set default configuration
 1588 |     m_Config.LookbackPeriod = 500;
 1589 |     m_Config.SwingLookback = 10;
 1590 |     m_Config.MinSwingSize = 100; // points
 1591 |     m_Config.LevelTolerance = 20; // points
 1592 |     m_Config.DetectSupport = true;
 1593 |     m_Config.DetectResistance = true;
 1594 |     m_Config.DetectTrendLines = true;
 1595 |     m_Config.DetectChannels = true;
 1596 |     m_Config.DetectSwings = true;
 1597 |     m_Config.DetectBreaks = true;
 1598 |     m_Config.UseOrderBlocks = false;
 1599 |     m_Config.UseFairValueGaps = false;
 1600 |     m_Config.UseLiquidityPools = false;
 1601 |     m_Config.UseInstitutional = false;
 1602 |     m_Config.MinTouchCount = 2;
 1603 |     m_Config.MinSignificance = 50.0;
 1604 |     m_Config.MinReliability = 60.0;
 1605 |     m_Config.UseTimeFilter = false;
 1606 |     m_Config.UseVolumeFilter = false;
 1607 |     m_Config.ShowLevels = true;
 1608 |     m_Config.ShowSwings = true;
 1609 |     m_Config.ShowBreaks = true;
 1610 |     m_Config.ShowLabels = true;
 1611 |     m_Config.MaxLevels = 50;
 1612 |     m_Config.RealTimeUpdate = true;
 1613 |     m_Config.HistoricalScan = true;
 1614 |     m_Config.UpdateFrequency = 60; // 1 minute
 1615 |     m_Config.AutoCleanup = true;
 1616 | }
 1617 | 
 1618 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1619 | //| Destructor                                                       |
 1620 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1621 | CStructure::~CStructure() {
 1622 |     Deinitialize();
 1623 | }
 1624 | 
 1625 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1626 | //| Initialize                                                       |
 1627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1628 | bool CStructure::Initialize(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const SStructureConfig& config) {
 1629 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
 1630 |         return true;
 1631 |     }
 1632 |     
 1633 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
 1634 |         Print("[STRUCTURE] Context is NULL");
 1635 |         return false;
 1636 |     }
 1637 |     
 1638 |     m_Symbol = symbol;
 1639 |     m_Timeframe = timeframe;
 1640 |     m_Config = config;
 1641 |     
 1642 |     // Validate configuration
 1643 |     if (m_Config.LookbackPeriod < 100) {
 1644 |         m_Config.LookbackPeriod = 500;
 1645 |     }
 1646 |     
 1647 |     if (m_Config.SwingLookback < 5) {
 1648 |         m_Config.SwingLookback = 10;
 1649 |     }
 1650 |     
 1651 |     if (m_Config.MaxLevels > MAX_LEVELS) {
 1652 |         m_Config.MaxLevels = MAX_LEVELS;
 1653 |     }
 1654 |     
 1655 |     // Initialize arrays
 1656 |     ArrayResize(m_Levels, MAX_LEVELS);
 1657 |     ArrayResize(m_Swings, MAX_SWINGS);
 1658 |     
 1659 |     // Load initial market data
 1660 |     if (!LoadMarketData()) {
 1661 |         LogStructureEvent("Failed to load market data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1662 |         return false;
 1663 |     }
 1664 |     
 1665 |     // Perform initial structure analysis
 1666 |     if (m_Config.HistoricalScan) {
 1667 |         AnalyzeStructure();
 1668 |         UpdateStatistics();
 1669 |     }
 1670 |     
 1671 |     m_bInitialized = true;
 1672 |     
 1673 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1674 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Structure analysis initialized for: " + symbol, __FUNCTION__);
 1675 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetStructureSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
 1676 |     }
 1677 |     
 1678 |     return true;
 1679 | }
 1680 | 
 1681 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1682 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
 1683 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1684 | void CStructure::Deinitialize() {
 1685 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
 1686 |         return;
 1687 |     }
 1688 |     
 1689 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1690 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetStatisticsSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
 1691 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Structure analysis shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
 1692 |     }
 1693 |     
 1694 |     m_bInitialized = false;
 1695 | }
 1696 | 
 1697 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1698 | //| Update                                                           |
 1699 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1700 | void CStructure::Update() {
 1701 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
 1702 |         return;
 1703 |     }
 1704 |     
 1705 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1706 |     
 1707 |     // Real-time structure analysis
 1708 |     if (m_Config.RealTimeUpdate) {
 1709 |         UpdateMarketData();
 1710 |         
 1711 |         // Update level status
 1712 |         UpdateLevelStatus();
 1713 |         
 1714 |         // Check for structure breaks
 1715 |         if (DetectStructureBreaks()) {
 1716 |             m_StructureChanged = true;
 1717 |             UpdateTrendDirection();
 1718 |         }
 1719 |         
 1720 |         // Full structure analysis every few minutes
 1721 |         if (current_time - m_LastScan >= m_Config.UpdateFrequency) {
 1722 |             if (AnalyzeStructure()) {
 1723 |                 m_StructureChanged = true;
 1724 |                 UpdateStatistics();
 1725 |             }
 1726 |             m_LastScan = current_time;
 1727 |         }
 1728 |     }
 1729 |     
 1730 |     // Cleanup old levels
 1731 |     if (m_Config.AutoCleanup && current_time - m_LastUpdate >= 3600) { // Every hour
 1732 |         CleanupOldLevels();
 1733 |         UpdateStatistics();
 1734 |         m_LastUpdate = current_time;
 1735 |     }
 1736 | }
 1737 | 
 1738 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1739 | //| Analyze Structure                                                |
 1740 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1741 | bool CStructure::AnalyzeStructure() {
 1742 |     if (m_DataCount < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2) {
 1743 |         return false;
 1744 |     }
 1745 |     
 1746 |     bool structure_found = false;
 1747 |     
 1748 |     // Detect structure levels
 1749 |     if (DetectStructureLevels()) {
 1750 |         structure_found = true;
 1751 |     }
 1752 |     
 1753 |     // Detect swing points
 1754 |     if (DetectSwingPoints()) {
 1755 |         structure_found = true;
 1756 |     }
 1757 |     
 1758 |     // Update trend direction
 1759 |     if (UpdateTrendDirection()) {
 1760 |         structure_found = true;
 1761 |     }
 1762 |     
 1763 |     // Detect structure breaks
 1764 |     if (DetectStructureBreaks()) {
 1765 |         structure_found = true;
 1766 |     }
 1767 |     
 1768 |     if (structure_found) {
 1769 |         SortLevels();
 1770 |         LogStructureEvent(StringFormat("Structure analysis completed. Found %d levels, %d swings", 
 1771 |                                       m_LevelCount, m_SwingCount));
 1772 |     }
 1773 |     
 1774 |     return structure_found;
 1775 | }
 1776 | 
 1777 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1778 | //| Detect Structure Levels                                          |
 1779 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1780 | bool CStructure::DetectStructureLevels() {
 1781 |     bool levels_found = false;
 1782 |     
 1783 |     // Find support and resistance levels
 1784 |     if (m_Config.DetectSupport || m_Config.DetectResistance) {
 1785 |         if (FindSupportResistance()) {
 1786 |             levels_found = true;
 1787 |         }
 1788 |     }
 1789 |     
 1790 |     // Find trend lines
 1791 |     if (m_Config.DetectTrendLines) {
 1792 |         if (FindTrendLines()) {
 1793 |             levels_found = true;
 1794 |         }
 1795 |     }
 1796 |     
 1797 |     // Find channels
 1798 |     if (m_Config.DetectChannels) {
 1799 |         if (FindChannels()) {
 1800 |             levels_found = true;
 1801 |         }
 1802 |     }
 1803 |     
 1804 |     // Find pivot points
 1805 |     if (FindPivotPoints()) {
 1806 |         levels_found = true;
 1807 |     }
 1808 |     
 1809 |     return levels_found;
 1810 | }
 1811 | 
 1812 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1813 | //| Detect Swing Points                                              |
 1814 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1815 | bool CStructure::DetectSwingPoints() {
 1816 |     bool swings_found = false;
 1817 |     
 1818 |     // Find swing highs
 1819 |     if (FindSwingHighs()) {
 1820 |         swings_found = true;
 1821 |     }
 1822 |     
 1823 |     // Find swing lows
 1824 |     if (FindSwingLows()) {
 1825 |         swings_found = true;
 1826 |     }
 1827 |     
 1828 |     return swings_found;
 1829 | }
 1830 | 
 1831 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1832 | //| Update Trend Direction                                           |
 1833 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1834 | bool CStructure::UpdateTrendDirection() {
 1835 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION old_primary = m_Structure.PrimaryTrend;
 1836 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION old_secondary = m_Structure.SecondaryTrend;
 1837 |     
 1838 |     // Analyze primary trend
 1839 |     m_Structure.PrimaryTrend = AnalyzePrimaryTrend();
 1840 |     
 1841 |     // Analyze secondary trend
 1842 |     m_Structure.SecondaryTrend = AnalyzeSecondaryTrend();
 1843 |     
 1844 |     // Calculate trend metrics
 1845 |     m_Structure.TrendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
 1846 |     m_Structure.TrendAngle = CalculateTrendAngle();
 1847 |     m_Structure.TrendVelocity = CalculateTrendVelocity();
 1848 |     
 1849 |     // Update market character
 1850 |     m_Structure.IsImpulsive = (m_Structure.TrendStrength > 70.0);
 1851 |     m_Structure.IsCorrective = (m_Structure.TrendStrength < 30.0);
 1852 |     m_Structure.IsConsolidating = (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_SIDEWAYS);
 1853 |     m_Structure.IsBreakingOut = (m_Structure.HighBroken || m_Structure.LowBroken);
 1854 |     
 1855 |     // Check for trend changes
 1856 |     bool trend_changed = (old_primary != m_Structure.PrimaryTrend || 
 1857 |                          old_secondary != m_Structure.SecondaryTrend);
 1858 |     
 1859 |     if (trend_changed) {
 1860 |         m_Stats.TrendChanges++;
 1861 |         LogStructureEvent(StringFormat("Trend changed: %s -> %s", 
 1862 |                                       EnumToString(old_primary), 
 1863 |                                       EnumToString(m_Structure.PrimaryTrend)));
 1864 |     }
 1865 |     
 1866 |     return trend_changed;
 1867 | }
 1868 | 
 1869 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1870 | //| Is Bullish Structure                                             |
 1871 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1872 | bool CStructure::IsBullishStructure() {
 1873 |     return (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BULLISH || 
 1874 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BREAKOUT_BULL || 
 1875 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_REVERSAL_BULL);
 1876 | }
 1877 | 
 1878 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1879 | //| Is Bearish Structure                                             |
 1880 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1881 | bool CStructure::IsBearishStructure() {
 1882 |     return (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BEARISH || 
 1883 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_BREAKOUT_BEAR || 
 1884 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_REVERSAL_BEAR);
 1885 | }
 1886 | 
 1887 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1888 | //| Is Sideways Structure                                            |
 1889 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1890 | bool CStructure::IsSidewaysStructure() {
 1891 |     return (m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_SIDEWAYS || 
 1892 |             m_Structure.PrimaryTrend == TREND_CONSOLIDATION);
 1893 | }
 1894 | 
 1895 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1896 | //| Is Higher High                                                   |
 1897 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1898 | bool CStructure::IsHigherHigh(const double price) {
 1899 |     return (price > m_Structure.CurrentHigh && 
 1900 |             m_Structure.CurrentHigh > m_Structure.PreviousHigh);
 1901 | }
 1902 | 
 1903 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1904 | //| Is Higher Low                                                    |
 1905 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1906 | bool CStructure::IsHigherLow(const double price) {
 1907 |     return (price > m_Structure.CurrentLow && 
 1908 |             m_Structure.CurrentLow > m_Structure.PreviousLow);
 1909 | }
 1910 | 
 1911 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1912 | //| Is Lower High                                                    |
 1913 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1914 | bool CStructure::IsLowerHigh(const double price) {
 1915 |     return (price < m_Structure.CurrentHigh && 
 1916 |             m_Structure.CurrentHigh < m_Structure.PreviousHigh);
 1917 | }
 1918 | 
 1919 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1920 | //| Is Lower Low                                                     |
 1921 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1922 | bool CStructure::IsLowerLow(const double price) {
 1923 |     return (price < m_Structure.CurrentLow && 
 1924 |             m_Structure.CurrentLow < m_Structure.PreviousLow);
 1925 | }
 1926 | 
 1927 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1928 | //| Get Nearest Support                                              |
 1929 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1930 | double CStructure::GetNearestSupport(const double price) {
 1931 |     double nearest_support = 0;
 1932 |     double min_distance = DBL_MAX;
 1933 |     
 1934 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
 1935 |         if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SUPPORT && 
 1936 |             m_Levels[i].IsActive && 
 1937 |             m_Levels[i].Price < price) {
 1938 |             
 1939 |             double distance = price - m_Levels[i].Price;
 1940 |             if (distance < min_distance) {
 1941 |                 min_distance = distance;
 1942 |                 nearest_support = m_Levels[i].Price;
 1943 |             }
 1944 |         }
 1945 |     }
 1946 |     
 1947 |     return nearest_support;
 1948 | }
 1949 | 
 1950 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1951 | //| Get Nearest Resistance                                           |
 1952 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1953 | double CStructure::GetNearestResistance(const double price) {
 1954 |     double nearest_resistance = 0;
 1955 |     double min_distance = DBL_MAX;
 1956 |     
 1957 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
 1958 |         if (m_Levels[i].Type == STRUCTURE_RESISTANCE && 
 1959 |             m_Levels[i].IsActive && 
 1960 |             m_Levels[i].Price > price) {
 1961 |             
 1962 |             double distance = m_Levels[i].Price - price;
 1963 |             if (distance < min_distance) {
 1964 |                 min_distance = distance;
 1965 |                 nearest_resistance = m_Levels[i].Price;
 1966 |             }
 1967 |         }
 1968 |     }
 1969 |     
 1970 |     return nearest_resistance;
 1971 | }
 1972 | 
 1973 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1974 | //| Get Structure Summary                                            |
 1975 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1976 | string CStructure::GetStructureSummary() {
 1977 |     string summary = "=== MARKET STRUCTURE ===\n";
 1978 |     summary += StringFormat("Symbol: %s\n", m_Symbol);
 1979 |     summary += StringFormat("Timeframe: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Timeframe));
 1980 |     summary += StringFormat("Primary Trend: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Structure.PrimaryTrend));
 1981 |     summary += StringFormat("Secondary Trend: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Structure.SecondaryTrend));
 1982 |     summary += StringFormat("Trend Strength: %.1f%%\n", m_Structure.TrendStrength);
 1983 |     summary += StringFormat("Trend Angle: %.1f°\n", m_Structure.TrendAngle);
 1984 |     summary += StringFormat("Current High: %.5f\n", m_Structure.CurrentHigh);
 1985 |     summary += StringFormat("Current Low: %.5f\n", m_Structure.CurrentLow);
 1986 |     summary += StringFormat("Structure Levels: %d\n", m_Stats.ActiveLevels);
 1987 |     summary += StringFormat("Swing Points: %d\n", m_SwingCount);
 1988 |     summary += StringFormat("High Broken: %s\n", m_Structure.HighBroken ? "Yes" : "No");
 1989 |     summary += StringFormat("Low Broken: %s\n", m_Structure.LowBroken ? "Yes" : "No");
 1990 |     
 1991 |     return summary;
 1992 | }
 1993 | 
 1994 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1995 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
 1996 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1997 | bool CStructure::LoadMarketData() {
 1998 |     if (m_Symbol == "") {
 1999 |         return false;
 2000 |     }
 2001 |     
 2002 |     // Load OHLC and volume data
 2003 |     double high_prices[], low_prices[], open_prices[], close_prices[];
 2004 |     long volumes[];
 2005 |     datetime times[];
 2006 |     
 2007 |     int copied_high = CopyHigh(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, high_prices);
 2008 |     int copied_low = CopyLow(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, low_prices);
 2009 |     int copied_open = CopyOpen(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, open_prices);
 2010 |     int copied_close = CopyClose(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, close_prices);
 2011 |     int copied_volumes = CopyTickVolume(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, volumes);
 2012 |     int copied_times = CopyTime(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, times);
 2013 |     
 2014 |     if (copied_high < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2 || 
 2015 |         copied_low < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2 || 
 2016 |         copied_open < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2 || 
 2017 |         copied_close < m_Config.SwingLookback * 2) {
 2018 |         LogStructureEvent("Insufficient market data loaded", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 2019 |         return false;
 2020 |     }
 2021 |     
 2022 |     // Store data
 2023 |     m_DataCount = copied_high;
 2024 |     ArrayResize(m_HighData, m_DataCount);
 2025 |     ArrayResize(m_LowData, m_DataCount);
 2026 |     ArrayResize(m_OpenData, m_DataCount);
 2027 |     ArrayResize(m_CloseData, m_DataCount);
 2028 |     ArrayResize(m_VolumeData, m_DataCount);
 2029 |     ArrayResize(m_TimeData, m_DataCount);
 2030 |     
 2031 |     ArrayCopy(m_HighData, high_prices);
 2032 |     ArrayCopy(m_LowData, low_prices);
 2033 |     ArrayCopy(m_OpenData, open_prices);
 2034 |     ArrayCopy(m_CloseData, close_prices);
 2035 |     ArrayCopy(m_TimeData, times);
 2036 |     
 2037 |     if (copied_volumes > 0) {
 2038 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_DataCount; i++) {
 2039 |             m_VolumeData[i] = (i < copied_volumes) ? volumes[i] : 1;
 2040 |         }
 2041 |     } else {
 2042 |         ArrayInitialize(m_VolumeData, 1);
 2043 |     }
 2044 |     
 2045 |     return true;
 2046 | }
 2047 | 
 2048 | bool CStructure::FindSupportResistance() {
 2049 |     if (m_DataCount < 50) {
 2050 |         return false;
 2051 |     }
 2052 |     
 2053 |     bool levels_found = false;
 2054 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 2055 |     double tolerance = m_Config.LevelTolerance * point;
 2056 |     
 2057 |     // Scan for potential support/resistance levels
 2058 |     for (int i = m_Config.SwingLookback; i < m_DataCount - m_Config.SwingLookback; i++) {
 2059 |         double high = m_HighData[i];
 2060 |         double low = m_LowData[i];
 2061 |         
 2062 |         // Check for resistance level (local high)
 2063 |         if (IsLocalHigh(i, m_Config.SwingLookback)) {
 2064 |             // Count touches of this level
 2065 |             int touch_count = CountTouches(high, tolerance, m_Config.LookbackPeriod);
 2066 |             
 2067 |             if (touch_count >= m_Config.MinTouchCount) {
 2068 |                 // Check if level already exists
 2069 |                 if (!IsLevelNearby(high, tolerance)) {
 2070 |                     SStructureLevel level = CreateLevel(STRUCTURE_RESISTANCE, high, m_TimeData[i]);
 2071 |                     level.TouchCount = touch_count;
 2072 |                     level.Significance = CalculateLevelSignificance(level);
 2073 |                     level.Reliability = CalculateLevelStrength(level);
 2074 |                     level.Strength = DetermineStrength(touch_count);
 2075 |                     
 2076 |                     if (ValidateLevel(level)) {
 2077 |                         AddLevel(level);
 2078 |                         levels_found = true;
 2079 |                     }
 2080 |                 }
 2081 |             }
 2082 |         }
 2083 |         
 2084 |         // Check for support level (local low)
 2085 |         if (IsLocalLow(i, m_Config.SwingLookback)) {
 2086 |             // Count touches of this level
 2087 |             int touch_count = CountTouches(low, tolerance, m_Config.LookbackPeriod);
 2088 |             
 2089 |             if (touch_count >= m_Config.MinTouchCount) {
 2090 |                 // Check if level already exists
 2091 |                 if (!IsLevelNearby(low, tolerance)) {
 2092 |                     SStructureLevel level = CreateLevel(STRUCTURE_SUPPORT, low, m_TimeData[i]);
 2093 |                     level.TouchCount = touch_count;
 2094 |                     level.Significance = CalculateLevelSignificance(level);
 2095 |                     level.Reliability = CalculateLevelStrength(level);
 2096 |                     level.Strength = DetermineStrength(touch_count);
 2097 |                     
 2098 |                     if (ValidateLevel(level)) {
 2099 |                         AddLevel(level);
 2100 |                         levels_found = true;
 2101 |                     }
 2102 |                 }
 2103 |             }
 2104 |         }
 2105 |     }
 2106 |     
 2107 |     return levels_found;
 2108 | }
 2109 | 
 2110 | bool CStructure::FindSwingHighs() {
 2111 |     bool swings_found = false;
 2112 |     
 2113 |     for (int i = m_Config.SwingLookback; i < m_DataCount - m_Config.SwingLookback; i++) {
 2114 |         if (IsLocalHigh(i, m_Config.SwingLookback)) {
 2115 |             SSwingPoint swing = CreateSwing(STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH, m_HighData[i], m_TimeData[i], i);
 2116 |             swing.LookbackLeft = m_Config.SwingLookback;
 2117 |             swing.LookbackRight = m_Config.SwingLookback;
 2118 |             swing.Strength = CalculateLevelStrength(CreateLevel(STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH, swing.Price, swing.Time));
 2119 |             swing.IsConfirmed = true;
 2120 |             
 2121 |             if (ValidateSwing(swing)) {
 2122 |                 AddSwingToArray(swing);
 2123 |                 swings_found = true;
 2124 |             }
 2125 |         }
 2126 |     }
 2127 |     
 2128 |     return swings_found;

 2131 | bool CStructure::FindSwingLows() {
 2132 |     bool swings_found = false;
 2133 |     
 2134 |     for (int i = m_Config.SwingLookback; i < m_DataCount - m_Config.SwingLookback; i++) {
 2135 |         if (IsLocalLow(i, m_Config.SwingLookback)) {
 2136 |             SSwingPoint swing = CreateSwing(STRUCTURE_SWING_LOW, m_LowData[i], m_TimeData[i], i);

 2138 |             swing.LookbackRight = m_Config.SwingLookback;

 2140 |             swing.IsConfirmed = true;

 2151 | 
 2152 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION CStructure::AnalyzePrimaryTrend() {
 2153 |     if (m_SwingCount < 4) {
 2154 |         return TREND_UNDEFINED;
 2155 |     }
 2156 |     
 2157 |     // Get recent swing points
 2158 |     SSwingPoint recent_swings[10];
 2159 |     int swing_count = 0;
 2160 |     
 2161 |     // Collect recent swings (last 10)
 2162 |     for (int i = MathMax(0, m_SwingCount - 10); i < m_SwingCount; i++) {
 2163 |         recent_swings[swing_count] = m_Swings[i];
 2164 |         swing_count++;
 2165 |     }
 2166 |     
 2167 |     if (swing_count < 4) {
 2168 |         return TREND_UNDEFINED;
 2169 |     }
 2170 |     
 2171 |     // Analyze swing pattern
 2172 |     int higher_highs = 0;
 2173 |     int higher_lows = 0;
 2174 |     int lower_highs = 0;
 2175 |     int lower_lows = 0;
 2176 |     
 2177 |     for (int i = 1; i < swing_count; i++) {
 2178 |         if (recent_swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH) {
 2179 |             // Find previous high
 2180 |             for (int j = i - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
 2181 |                 if (recent_swings[j].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_HIGH) {
 2182 |                     if (recent_swings[i].Price > recent_swings[j].Price) {
 2183 |                         higher_highs++;
 2184 |                     } else {
 2185 |                         lower_highs++;
 2186 |                     }
 2187 |                     break;
 2188 |                 }
 2189 |             }
 2190 |         } else if (recent_swings[i].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_LOW) {
 2191 |             // Find previous low
 2192 |             for (int j = i - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
 2193 |                 if (recent_swings[j].Type == STRUCTURE_SWING_LOW) {
 2194 |                     if (recent_swings[i].Price > recent_swings[j].Price) {
 2195 |                         higher_lows++;
 2196 |                     } else {
 2197 |                         lower_lows++;
 2198 |                     }
 2199 |                     break;
 2200 |                 }
 2201 |             }
 2202 |         }
 2203 |     }
 2204 |     
 2205 |     // Determine trend based on swing analysis
 2206 |     if (higher_highs > lower_highs && higher_lows > lower_lows) {
 2207 |         return TREND_BULLISH;
 2208 |     } else if (lower_highs > higher_highs && lower_lows > higher_lows) {
 2209 |         return TREND_BEARISH;
 2210 |     } else {
 2211 |         return TREND_SIDEWAYS;
 2212 |     }
 2213 | }

 2220 |     level.Strength = STRENGTH_WEAK;
 2221 |     level.Status = STATUS_ACTIVE;

 2223 |     level.Price = price;
 2224 |     level.FirstTouch = time;
 2225 |     level.LastTouch = time;
 2226 |     level.TouchCount = 1;
 2227 |     level.BarsSinceTouch = 0;
 2228 |     level.BarsSinceBreak = 0;
 2229 |     level.MaxDeviation = 0;
 2230 |     level.AverageDeviation = 0;
 2231 |     level.Significance = 50.0;
 2232 |     level.Reliability = 50.0;
 2233 |     level.IsActive = true;
 2234 |     level.IsBroken = false;
 2235 |     level.IsRetested = false;
 2236 |     level.IsInstitutional = false;
 2237 |     level.TouchHistoryCount = 0;
 2238 |     
 2239 |     return level;
 2240 | }

 2262 | bool CStructure::ValidateLevel(const SStructureLevel& level) {
 2263 |     // Basic validation
 2264 |     if (!IsValidPrice(level.Price)) {
 2265 |         return false;
 2266 |     }
 2267 |     
 2268 |     if (level.TouchCount < m_Config.MinTouchCount) {
 2269 |         return false;
 2270 |     }
 2271 |     
 2272 |     if (level.Significance < m_Config.MinSignificance) {
 2273 |         return false;
 2274 |     }
 2275 |     
 2276 |     if (level.Reliability < m_Config.MinReliability) {
 2277 |         return false;
 2278 |     }
 2279 |     
 2280 |     return true;
 2281 | }
 2282 | 
 2283 | bool CStructure::ValidateSwing(const SSwingPoint& swing) {
 2284 |     // Basic validation
 2285 |     if (!IsValidPrice(swing.Price)) {
 2286 |         return false;
 2287 |     }
 2288 |     
 2289 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 2290 |     double min_size = m_Config.MinSwingSize * point;
 2291 |     
 2292 |     // Check swing size (simplified)
 2293 |     if (m_SwingCount > 0) {
 2294 |         SSwingPoint last_swing = m_Swings[m_SwingCount - 1];
 2295 |         double swing_size = MathAbs(swing.Price - last_swing.Price);
 2296 |         if (swing_size < min_size) {
 2297 |             return false;
 2298 |         }
 2299 |     }
 2300 |     
 2301 |     return true;
 2302 | }
 2303 | 
 2304 | bool CStructure::IsLocalHigh(const int index, const int lookback) {
 2305 |     if (!IsValidIndex(index) || index < lookback || index >= m_DataCount - lookback) {
 2306 |         return false;
 2307 |     }
 2308 |     
 2309 |     double current_high = m_HighData[index];
 2310 |     
 2311 |     // Check left side
 2312 |     for (int i = index - lookback; i < index; i++) {
 2313 |         if (m_HighData[i] >= current_high) {
 2314 |             return false;
 2315 |         }
 2316 |     }
 2317 |     
 2318 |     // Check right side
 2319 |     for (int i = index + 1; i <= index + lookback; i++) {
 2320 |         if (m_HighData[i] >= current_high) {
 2321 |             return false;
 2322 |         }
 2323 |     }
 2324 |     
 2325 |     return true;
 2326 | }
 2327 | 
 2328 | bool CStructure::IsLocalLow(const int index, const int lookback) {
 2329 |     if (!IsValidIndex(index) || index < lookback || index >= m_DataCount - lookback) {
 2330 |         return false;
 2331 |     }
 2332 |     
 2333 |     double current_low = m_LowData[index];
 2334 |     
 2335 |     // Check left side
 2336 |     for (int i = index - lookback; i < index; i++) {
 2337 |         if (m_LowData[i] <= current_low) {
 2338 |             return false;
 2339 |         }
 2340 |     }
 2341 |     
 2342 |     // Check right side
 2343 |     for (int i = index + 1; i <= index + lookback; i++) {
 2344 |         if (m_LowData[i] <= current_low) {
 2345 |             return false;
 2346 |         }
 2347 |     }
 2348 |     
 2349 |     return true;
 2350 | }

 2352 | int CStructure::CountTouches(const double level, const double tolerance, const int lookback) {
 2353 |     int touches = 0;
 2354 |     int start_index = MathMax(0, m_DataCount - lookback);
 2355 |     
 2356 |     for (int i = start_index; i < m_DataCount; i++) {
 2357 |         if (IsPriceAtLevel(m_HighData[i], level, tolerance) || 
 2358 |             IsPriceAtLevel(m_LowData[i], level, tolerance)) {
 2359 |             touches++;
 2360 |         }
 2361 |     }
 2362 |     
 2363 |     return touches;

 2366 | bool CStructure::IsPriceAtLevel(const double price, const double level, const double tolerance) {
 2367 |     return (MathAbs(price - level) <= tolerance);

 2370 | bool CStructure::IsLevelNearby(const double price, const double tolerance) {

 2372 |         if (IsPriceAtLevel(price, m_Levels[i].Price, tolerance)) {

 2379 | double CStructure::CalculateLevelStrength(const SStructureLevel& level) {
 2380 |     double strength = 0;
 2381 |     
 2382 |     // Base strength from touch count
 2383 |     strength += level.TouchCount * 10.0;
 2384 |     
 2385 |     // Bonus for age
 2386 |     int age_bars = (int)((TimeCurrent() - level.FirstTouch) / PeriodSeconds(m_Timeframe));
 2387 |     strength += MathMin(age_bars / 100.0, 20.0);
 2388 |     
 2389 |     // Penalty for deviation
 2390 |     if (level.MaxDeviation > 0) {
 2391 |         double deviation_penalty = (level.MaxDeviation / level.Price) * 100.0;
 2392 |         strength -= deviation_penalty;
 2393 |     }
 2394 |     
 2395 |     return MathMax(0, MathMin(100, strength));
 2396 | }
 2397 | 
 2398 | double CStructure::CalculateLevelSignificance(const SStructureLevel& level) {
 2399 |     double significance = 50.0; // Base significance
 2400 |     
 2401 |     // Increase based on touch count
 2402 |     significance += (level.TouchCount - 1) * 15.0;
 2403 |     
 2404 |     // Increase based on time span
 2405 |     int time_span = (int)((level.LastTouch - level.FirstTouch) / PeriodSeconds(m_Timeframe));
 2406 |     significance += MathMin(time_span / 50.0, 25.0);
 2407 |     
 2408 |     return MathMax(0, MathMin(100, significance));
 2409 | }
 2410 | 
 2411 | ENUM_STRUCTURE_STRENGTH CStructure::DetermineStrength(const int touch_count) {
 2412 |     if (touch_count >= 8) {
 2413 |         return STRENGTH_VERY_STRONG;
 2414 |     } else if (touch_count >= 5) {
 2415 |         return STRENGTH_STRONG;
 2416 |     } else if (touch_count >= 3) {
 2417 |         return STRENGTH_MODERATE;
 2418 |     } else {
 2419 |         return STRENGTH_WEAK;
 2420 |     }
 2421 | }

 2423 | bool CStructure::AddLevel(const SStructureLevel& level) {
 2424 |     if (m_LevelCount >= ArraySize(m_Levels)) {
 2425 |         // Remove weakest level if array is full
 2426 |         int weakest_index = 0;
 2427 |         double weakest_strength = m_Levels[0].Reliability;
 2428 |         
 2429 |         for (int i = 1; i < m_LevelCount; i++) {
 2430 |             if (m_Levels[i].Reliability < weakest_strength) {
 2431 |                 weakest_strength = m_Levels[i].Reliability;
 2432 |                 weakest_index = i;
 2433 |             }
 2434 |         }
 2435 |         
 2436 |         // Remove weakest level
 2437 |         for (int i = weakest_index; i < m_LevelCount - 1; i++) {
 2438 |             m_Levels[i] = m_Levels[i + 1];
 2439 |         }
 2440 |         m_LevelCount

  214 |     bool                  IsUptrend() const { return m_Analysis.TrendDirection == TREND_UP; }
  215 |     bool                  IsDowntrend() const { return m_Analysis.TrendDirection == TREND_DOWN; }
  216 |     bool                  IsSideways() const { return m_Analysis.TrendDirection == TREND_SIDEWAYS; }
  217 |     
  218 |     //--- Structure Analysis ---
  219 |     bool                  IsStructureBroken() const { return m_Analysis.IsStructureBroken; }
  220 |     bool                  IsHigherHigh(const double price);
  221 |     bool                  IsLowerHigh(const double price);
  222 |     bool                  IsHigherLow(const double price);
  223 |     bool                  IsLowerLow(const double price);
  224 |     bool                  IsStructureBreak(const double price);
  225 |     
  226 |     //--- Support/Resistance ---
  227 |     int                   GetSRLevels(SSRLevel& levels[]);
  228 |     SSRLevel              GetNearestSupport(const double price);
  229 |     SSRLevel              GetNearestResistance(const double price);
  230 |     bool                  IsSupportLevel(const double price, const double tolerance = 0.0);
  231 |     bool                  IsResistanceLevel(const double price, const double tolerance = 0.0);
  232 |     double                GetSupportStrength(const double price);
  233 |     double                GetResistanceStrength(const double price);
  234 |     
  235 |     //--- Pattern Detection ---
  236 |     bool                  IsDoubleTop(const double tolerance = 0.001);
  237 |     bool                  IsDoubleBottom(const double tolerance = 0.001);
  238 |     bool                  IsTripleTop(const double tolerance = 0.001);
  239 |     bool                  IsTripleBottom(const double tolerance = 0.001);
  240 |     bool                  IsHeadAndShoulders();
  241 |     bool                  IsInverseHeadAndShoulders();
  242 |     
  243 |     //--- Swing Measurements ---
  244 |     double                GetSwingRange() const { return m_Analysis.SwingRange; }
  245 |     double                GetAverageSwingSize() const { return m_Analysis.AverageSwingSize; }
  246 |     double                GetSwingRetracement(const SSwingPoint& swing1, const SSwingPoint& swing2);
  247 |     double                GetSwingExtension(const SSwingPoint& swing1, const SSwingPoint& swing2);
  248 |     
  249 |     //--- Fibonacci Levels ---
  250 |     bool                  GetFibonacciRetracements(const SSwingPoint& high, const SSwingPoint& low, double& levels[]);
  251 |     bool                  GetFibonacciExtensions(const SSwingPoint& swing1, const SSwingPoint& swing2, const SSwingPoint& swing3, double& levels[]);
  252 |     double                GetFibonacciLevel(const double start, const double end, const double ratio);
  253 |     
  254 |     //--- Trading Signals ---
  255 |     bool                  IsSwingBreakout(const double price);
  256 |     bool                  IsSwingReversal(const double price);
  257 |     bool                  IsPullbackComplete();
  258 |     bool                  IsRetestSignal(const double price);
  259 |     bool                  IsBreakoutConfirmation(const double price);
  260 |     
  261 |     //--- Validation ---
  262 |     bool                  ValidateSwingPoint(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  263 |     bool                  IsSignificantSwing(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  264 |     double                CalculateSwingStrength(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  265 |     
  266 |     //--- Configuration ---
  267 |     bool                  SetConfiguration(const SSwingConfig& config);
  268 |     SSwingConfig          GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  269 |     bool                  SetLookbackPeriod(const int period);
  270 |     bool                  SetMinSwingSize(const int size);
  271 |     
  272 |     //--- Information ---
  273 |     string                GetSwingSummary();
  274 |     string                GetTrendDescription();
  275 |     string                GetStructureDescription();
  276 |     string                GetSRLevelDescription();
  277 |     
  278 | private:
  279 |     //--- Data Loading ---
  280 |     bool                  LoadMarketData();
  281 |     void                  UpdateMarketData();
  282 |     
  283 |     //--- Swing Detection Implementation ---
  284 |     bool                  DetectSwingHigh(const int index);
  285 |     bool                  DetectSwingLow(const int index);
  286 |     bool                  ValidateSwingHigh(const int index);
  287 |     bool                  ValidateSwingLow(const int index);
  288 |     SSwingPoint           CreateSwingPoint(const int index, const ENUM_SWING_TYPE type);
  289 |     
  290 |     //--- Fractal Implementation ---
  291 |     bool                  IsFractalHigh(const int index, const int period = 5);
  292 |     bool                  IsFractalLow(const int index, const int period = 5);
  293 |     SFractal              CreateFractal(const int index, const bool is_high);
  294 |     
  295 |     //--- Trend Analysis Implementation ---
  296 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  AnalyzeTrendDirection();
  297 |     double                CalculateTrendStrength();
  298 |     double                CalculateTrendAngle();
  299 |     void                  UpdateTrendAnalysis();
  300 |     
  301 |     //--- Structure Analysis Implementation ---
  302 |     void                  AnalyzeMarketStructure();
  303 |     bool                  DetectStructureBreak();
  304 |     void                  ClassifySwingTypes();
  305 |     
  306 |     //--- Support/Resistance Implementation ---
  307 |     void                  UpdateSRLevels();
  308 |     void                  AddSRLevel(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  309 |     void                  UpdateSRLevel(SSRLevel& level, const double price, const datetime time);
  310 |     void                  CleanupSRLevels();
  311 |     bool                  IsPriceNearLevel(const double price, const double level, const double tolerance);
  312 |     
  313 |     //--- Pattern Detection Implementation ---
  314 |     bool                  FindDoublePattern(const ENUM_SWING_TYPE type, const double tolerance);
  315 |     bool                  FindTriplePattern(const ENUM_SWING_TYPE type, const double tolerance);
  316 |     bool                  FindHeadAndShouldersPattern(const bool inverse = false);
  317 |     
  318 |     //--- Calculation Methods ---
  319 |     double                CalculateSwingSize(const SSwingPoint& swing1, const SSwingPoint& swing2);
  320 |     double                CalculateSwingPercent(const SSwingPoint& swing1, const SSwingPoint& swing2);
  321 |     double                CalculateSignificance(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  322 |     ENUM_SWING_STRENGTH   DetermineSwingStrength(const double significance);
  323 |     
  324 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
  325 |     void                  SortSwingPoints();
  326 |     void                  SortSRLevels();
  327 |     void                  CleanupOldSwings();
  328 |     bool                  IsValidIndex(const int index);
  329 |     void                  LogSwingEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  330 |     
  331 |     //--- Array Management ---
  332 |     void                  ResizeSwingArray(const int new_size);
  333 |     void                  ResizeSRArray(const int new_size);
  334 |     void                  AddSwingPoint(const SSwingPoint& swing);
  335 |     void                  RemoveSwingPoint(const int index);
  336 | };
  337 | 
  338 | // Static constants definition
  339 | const int CSwingPoints::DEFAULT_LOOKBACK = 100;
  340 | const int CSwingPoints::DEFAULT_MIN_SWING_SIZE = 10;
  341 | const double CSwingPoints::DEFAULT_MIN_SWING_PERCENT = 0.5;
  342 | const int CSwingPoints::MAX_SWING_POINTS = 500;
  343 | const int CSwingPoints::MAX_SR_LEVELS = 50;
  344 | 
  345 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  346 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  347 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  348 | CSwingPoints::CSwingPoints(EAContext* context) {
  349 |     m_pContext = context;
  350 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  351 |     m_Symbol = "";
  352 |     m_Timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  353 |     m_SwingCount = 0;
  354 |     m_SRCount = 0;
  355 |     m_FractalCount = 0;
  356 |     m_DataCount = 0;
  357 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  358 |     m_LastSwingTime = 0;
  359 |     m_StructureChanged = false;
  360 |     
  361 |     // Initialize structures
  362 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  363 |     ZeroMemory(m_Analysis);
  364 |     
  365 |     // Set default configuration
  366 |     m_Config.LookbackPeriod = DEFAULT_LOOKBACK;
  367 |     m_Config.MinSwingSize = DEFAULT_MIN_SWING_SIZE;
  368 |     m_Config.MinSwingPercent = DEFAULT_MIN_SWING_PERCENT;
  369 |     m_Config.ConfirmationBars = 3;
  370 |     m_Config.UseVolume = true;
  371 |     m_Config.DetectPatterns = true;
  372 |     m_Config.TrackSRLevels = true;
  373 |     m_Config.SRTolerance = 0.0001;
  374 |     m_Config.MaxSRLevels = MAX_SR_LEVELS;
  375 |     m_Config.AutoCleanup = true;
  376 |     m_Config.MaxSwingHistory = MAX_SWING_POINTS;
  377 |     m_Config.RealTimeUpdate = true;
  378 | }
  379 | 
  380 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  381 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  382 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  383 | CSwingPoints::~CSwingPoints() {
  384 |     Deinitialize();
  385 | }
  386 | 
  387 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  388 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  389 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  390 | bool CSwingPoints::Initialize(const string& symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const SSwingConfig& config) {
  391 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  392 |         return true;
  393 |     }
  394 |     
  395 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  396 |         Print("[SWING_POINTS] Context is NULL");
  397 |         return false;
  398 |     }
  399 |     
  400 |     m_Symbol = symbol;
  401 |     m_Timeframe = timeframe;
  402 |     m_Config = config;
  403 |     
  404 |     // Validate configuration
  405 |     if (m_Config.LookbackPeriod < 10) {
  406 |         m_Config.LookbackPeriod = DEFAULT_LOOKBACK;
  407 |     }
  408 |     
  409 |     if (m_Config.MinSwingSize < 1) {
  410 |         m_Config.MinSwingSize = DEFAULT_MIN_SWING_SIZE;
  411 |     }
  412 |     
  413 |     if (m_Config.MaxSwingHistory > MAX_SWING_POINTS) {
  414 |         m_Config.MaxSwingHistory = MAX_SWING_POINTS;
  415 |     }
  416 |     
  417 |     // Initialize arrays
  418 |     ArrayResize(m_SwingPoints, m_Config.MaxSwingHistory);
  419 |     ArrayResize(m_SRLevels, m_Config.MaxSRLevels);
  420 |     ArrayResize(m_Fractals, m_Config.LookbackPeriod);
  421 |     
  422 |     // Load initial market data
  423 |     if (!LoadMarketData()) {
  424 |         LogSwingEvent("Failed to load market data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  425 |         return false;
  426 |     }
  427 |     
  428 |     // Perform initial swing detection
  429 |     DetectSwingPoints();
  430 |     DetectFractals();
  431 |     UpdateSwingAnalysis();
  432 |     
  433 |     if (m_Config.TrackSRLevels) {
  434 |         UpdateSRLevels();
  435 |     }
  436 |     
  437 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  438 |     
  439 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  440 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("SwingPoints initialized for: " + symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  441 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetSwingSummary(), __FUNCTION__);
  442 |     }
  443 |     
  444 |     return true;
  445 | }
  446 | 
  447 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  448 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  449 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  450 | void CSwingPoints::Deinitialize() {
  451 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  452 |         return;
  453 |     }
  454 |     
  455 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  456 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(GetStructureDescription(), __FUNCTION__);
  457 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("SwingPoints shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
  458 |     }
  459 |     
  460 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  461 | }
  462 | 
  463 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  464 | //| Update                                                           |
  465 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  466 | void CSwingPoints::Update() {
  467 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  468 |         return;
  469 |     }
  470 |     
  471 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  472 |     
  473 |     // Real-time updates
  474 |     if (m_Config.RealTimeUpdate) {
  475 |         UpdateMarketData();
  476 |         
  477 |         // Check for new swing points
  478 |         if (DetectSwingPoints()) {
  479 |             ConfirmSwingPoints();
  480 |             UpdateSwingAnalysis();
  481 |             
  482 |             if (m_Config.TrackSRLevels) {
  483 |                 UpdateSRLevels();
  484 |             }
  485 |             
  486 |             m_StructureChanged = true;
  487 |         }
  488 |     }
  489 |     
  490 |     // Periodic full analysis
  491 |     if (current_time - m_LastUpdate >= 3600) { // Every hour
  492 |         DetectFractals();
  493 |         AnalyzeMarketStructure();
  494 |         
  495 |         if (m_Config.AutoCleanup) {
  496 |             CleanupOldSwings();
  497 |             CleanupSRLevels();
  498 |         }
  499 |         
  500 |         m_LastUpdate = current_time;
  501 |     }
  502 | }
  503 | 
  504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 | //| Detect Swing Points                                              |
  506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 | bool CSwingPoints::DetectSwingPoints() {
  508 |     if (m_DataCount < m_Config.LookbackPeriod) {
  509 |         return false;
  510 |     }
  511 |     
  512 |     bool new_swings_found = false;
  513 |     
  514 |     // Scan for swing highs and lows
  515 |     for (int i = m_Config.ConfirmationBars; i < m_DataCount - m_Config.ConfirmationBars; i++) {
  516 |         // Check for swing high
  517 |         if (DetectSwingHigh(i) && ValidateSwingHigh(i)) {
  518 |             SSwingPoint swing = CreateSwingPoint(i, SWING_HIGH);
  519 |             if (ValidateSwingPoint(swing)) {
  520 |                 AddSwingPoint(swing);
  521 |                 new_swings_found = true;
  522 |                 LogSwingEvent(StringFormat("New swing high detected at %.5f", swing.Price));
  523 |             }
  524 |         }
  525 |         
  526 |         // Check for swing low
  527 |         if (DetectSwingLow(i) && ValidateSwingLow(i)) {
  528 |             SSwingPoint swing = CreateSwingPoint(i, SWING_LOW);
  529 |             if (ValidateSwingPoint(swing)) {
  530 |                 AddSwingPoint(swing);
  531 |                 new_swings_found = true;
  532 |                 LogSwingEvent(StringFormat("New swing low detected at %.5f", swing.Price));
  533 |             }
  534 |         }
  535 |     }
  536 |     
  537 |     if (new_swings_found) {
  538 |         SortSwingPoints();
  539 |         ClassifySwingTypes();
  540 |     }
  541 |     
  542 |     return new_swings_found;
  543 | }
  544 | 
  545 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  546 | //| Get Last Swing High                                              |
  547 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  548 | SSwingPoint CSwingPoints::GetLastSwingHigh() const {
  549 |     return m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh;
  550 | }
  551 | 
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | //| Get Last Swing Low                                               |
  554 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  555 | SSwingPoint CSwingPoints::GetLastSwingLow() const {
  556 |     return m_Analysis.LastSwingLow;
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | //| Is Higher High                                                   |
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | bool CSwingPoints::IsHigherHigh(const double price) {
  563 |     if (m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh.Price <= 0) {
  564 |         return false;
  565 |     }
  566 |     
  567 |     return (price > m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh.Price);
  568 | }
  569 | 
  570 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  571 | //| Is Lower Low                                                     |
  572 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  573 | bool CSwingPoints::IsLowerLow(const double price) {
  574 |     if (m_Analysis.LastSwingLow.Price <= 0) {
  575 |         return false;
  576 |     }
  577 |     
  578 |     return (price < m_Analysis.LastSwingLow.Price);
  579 | }
  580 | 
  581 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  582 | //| Is Structure Break                                               |
  583 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  584 | bool CSwingPoints::IsStructureBreak(const double price) {
  585 |     // Check if price breaks significant swing levels
  586 |     if (m_Analysis.TrendDirection == TREND_UP) {
  587 |         return IsLowerLow(price);
  588 |     } else if (m_Analysis.TrendDirection == TREND_DOWN) {
  589 |         return IsHigherHigh(price);
  590 |     }
  591 |     
  592 |     return false;
  593 | }
  594 | 
  595 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  596 | //| Get Nearest Support                                              |
  597 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  598 | SSRLevel CSwingPoints::GetNearestSupport(const double price) {
  599 |     SSRLevel nearest_support;
  600 |     ZeroMemory(nearest_support);
  601 |     
  602 |     double min_distance = DBL_MAX;
  603 |     
  604 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_SRCount; i++) {
  605 |         if (m_SRLevels[i].Type == SWING_LOW && 
  606 |             m_SRLevels[i].IsActive && 
  607 |             m_SRLevels[i].Price < price) {
  608 |             
  609 |             double distance = price - m_SRLevels[i].Price;
  610 |             if (distance < min_distance) {
  611 |                 min_distance = distance;
  612 |                 nearest_support = m_SRLevels[i];
  613 |             }
  614 |         }
  615 |     }
  616 |     
  617 |     return nearest_support;
  618 | }
  619 | 
  620 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  621 | //| Get Nearest Resistance                                           |
  622 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  623 | SSRLevel CSwingPoints::GetNearestResistance(const double price) {
  624 |     SSRLevel nearest_resistance;
  625 |     ZeroMemory(nearest_resistance);
  626 |     
  627 |     double min_distance = DBL_MAX;
  628 |     
  629 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_SRCount; i++) {
  630 |         if (m_SRLevels[i].Type == SWING_HIGH && 
  631 |             m_SRLevels[i].IsActive && 
  632 |             m_SRLevels[i].Price > price) {
  633 |             
  634 |             double distance = m_SRLevels[i].Price - price;
  635 |             if (distance < min_distance) {
  636 |                 min_distance = distance;
  637 |                 nearest_resistance = m_SRLevels[i];
  638 |             }
  639 |         }
  640 |     }
  641 |     
  642 |     return nearest_resistance;
  643 | }
  644 | 
  645 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  646 | //| Is Double Top                                                    |
  647 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  648 | bool CSwingPoints::IsDoubleTop(const double tolerance = 0.001) {
  649 |     return FindDoublePattern(SWING_HIGH, tolerance);
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  653 | //| Is Double Bottom                                                 |
  654 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  655 | bool CSwingPoints::IsDoubleBottom(const double tolerance = 0.001) {
  656 |     return FindDoublePattern(SWING_LOW, tolerance);
  657 | }
  658 | 
  659 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 | //| Get Swing Summary                                                |
  661 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  662 | string CSwingPoints::GetSwingSummary() {
  663 |     string summary = "=== SWING POINT ANALYSIS ===\n";
  664 |     summary += StringFormat("Symbol: %s\n", m_Symbol);
  665 |     summary += StringFormat("Timeframe: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Timeframe));
  666 |     summary += StringFormat("Trend Direction: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Analysis.TrendDirection));
  667 |     summary += StringFormat("Trend Strength: %.1f\n", m_Analysis.TrendStrength);
  668 |     summary += StringFormat("Swing Count: %d\n", m_SwingCount);
  669 |     summary += StringFormat("Last Swing High: %.5f\n", m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh.Price);
  670 |     summary += StringFormat("Last Swing Low: %.5f\n", m_Analysis.LastSwingLow.Price);
  671 |     summary += StringFormat("Current Range: %.1f points\n", m_Analysis.SwingRange);
  672 |     summary += StringFormat("Average Swing: %.1f points\n", m_Analysis.AverageSwingSize);
  673 |     summary += StringFormat("S/R Levels: %d\n", m_SRCount);
  674 |     summary += StringFormat("Structure Broken: %s\n", m_Analysis.IsStructureBroken ? "Yes" : "No");
  675 |     
  676 |     return summary;
  677 | }
  678 | 
  679 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  680 | //| Internal Methods                                                 |
  681 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  682 | bool CSwingPoints::LoadMarketData() {
  683 |     if (m_Symbol == "") {
  684 |         return false;
  685 |     }
  686 |     
  687 |     // Load OHLC and volume data
  688 |     double high_prices[], low_prices[], close_prices[];
  689 |     long volumes[];
  690 |     datetime times[];
  691 |     
  692 |     int copied_high = CopyHigh(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, high_prices);
  693 |     int copied_low = CopyLow(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, low_prices);
  694 |     int copied_close = CopyClose(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, close_prices);
  695 |     int copied_volumes = CopyTickVolume(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, volumes);
  696 |     int copied_times = CopyTime(m_Symbol, m_Timeframe, 0, m_Config.LookbackPeriod, times);
  697 |     
  698 |     if (copied_high < 10 || copied_low < 10 || copied_close < 10) {
  699 |         LogSwingEvent("Insufficient market data loaded", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  700 |         return false;
  701 |     }
  702 |     
  703 |     // Store data
  704 |     m_DataCount = copied_high;
  705 |     ArrayResize(m_HighData, m_DataCount);
  706 |     ArrayResize(m_LowData, m_DataCount);
  707 |     ArrayResize(m_CloseData, m_DataCount);
  708 |     ArrayResize(m_VolumeData, m_DataCount);
  709 |     ArrayResize(m_TimeData, m_DataCount);
  710 |     
  711 |     ArrayCopy(m_HighData, high_prices);
  712 |     ArrayCopy(m_LowData, low_prices);
  713 |     ArrayCopy(m_CloseData, close_prices);
  714 |     ArrayCopy(m_TimeData, times);
  715 |     
  716 |     if (copied_volumes > 0) {
  717 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_DataCount; i++) {
  718 |             m_VolumeData[i] = (i < copied_volumes) ? volumes[i] : 1;
  719 |         }
  720 |     } else {
  721 |         ArrayInitialize(m_VolumeData, 1);
  722 |     }
  723 |     
  724 |     return true;
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | bool CSwingPoints::DetectSwingHigh(const int index) {
  728 |     if (!IsValidIndex(index)) {
  729 |         return false;
  730 |     }
  731 |     
  732 |     double current_high = m_HighData[index];
  733 |     
  734 |     // Check if current high is higher than surrounding highs
  735 |     for (int i = 1; i <= m_Config.ConfirmationBars; i++) {
  736 |         if (index - i < 0 || index + i >= m_DataCount) {
  737 |             return false;
  738 |         }
  739 |         
  740 |         if (current_high <= m_HighData[index - i] || 
  741 |             current_high <= m_HighData[index + i]) {
  742 |             return false;
  743 |         }
  744 |     }
  745 |     
  746 |     return true;
  747 | }
  748 | 
  749 | bool CSwingPoints::DetectSwingLow(const int index) {
  750 |     if (!IsValidIndex(index)) {
  751 |         return false;
  752 |     }
  753 |     
  754 |     double current_low = m_LowData[index];
  755 |     
  756 |     // Check if current low is lower than surrounding lows
  757 |     for (int i = 1; i <= m_Config.ConfirmationBars; i++) {
  758 |         if (index - i < 0 || index + i >= m_DataCount) {
  759 |             return false;
  760 |         }
  761 |         
  762 |         if (current_low >= m_LowData[index - i] || 
  763 |             current_low >= m_LowData[index + i]) {
  764 |             return false;
  765 |         }
  766 |     }
  767 |     
  768 |     return true;
  769 | }
  770 | 
  771 | SSwingPoint CSwingPoints::CreateSwingPoint(const int index, const ENUM_SWING_TYPE type) {
  772 |     SSwingPoint swing;
  773 |     ZeroMemory(swing);
  774 |     
  775 |     if (!IsValidIndex(index)) {
  776 |         return swing;
  777 |     }
  778 |     
  779 |     swing.Time = m_TimeData[index];
  780 |     swing.BarIndex = index;
  781 |     swing.Type = type;
  782 |     swing.IsConfirmed = false;
  783 |     swing.IsBroken = false;
  784 |     swing.TouchCount = 1;
  785 |     swing.LastTouchTime = swing.Time;
  786 |     
  787 |     if (type == SWING_HIGH) {
  788 |         swing.Price = m_HighData[index];
  789 |         swing.LastTouchPrice = swing.Price;
  790 |     } else if (type == SWING_LOW) {
  791 |         swing.Price = m_LowData[index];
  792 |         swing.LastTouchPrice = swing.Price;
  793 |     }
  794 |     
  795 |     if (m_Config.UseVolume && index < ArraySize(m_VolumeData)) {
  796 |         swing.Volume = (double)m_VolumeData[index];
  797 |     }
  798 |     
  799 |     // Calculate significance
  800 |     swing.Significance = CalculateSignificance(swing);
  801 |     swing.Strength = DetermineSwingStrength(swing.Significance);
  802 |     
  803 |     return swing;
  804 | }
  805 | 
  806 | bool CSwingPoints::ValidateSwingPoint(const SSwingPoint& swing) {
  807 |     if (swing.Price <= 0 || swing.Time <= 0) {
  808 |         return false;
  809 |     }
  810 |     
  811 |     // Check minimum swing size
  812 |     if (m_SwingCount > 0) {
  813 |         SSwingPoint last_swing = m_SwingPoints[m_SwingCount - 1];
  814 |         double swing_size = MathAbs(swing.Price - last_swing.Price);
  815 |         
  816 |         // Check minimum points
  817 |         double min_points = m_Config.MinSwingSize * SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  818 |         if (swing_size < min_points) {
  819 |             return false;
  820 |         }
  821 |         
  822 |         // Check minimum percentage
  823 |         if (last_swing.Price > 0) {
  824 |             double swing_percent = swing_size / last_swing.Price * 100.0;
  825 |             if (swing_percent < m_Config.MinSwingPercent) {
  826 |                 return false;
  827 |             }
  828 |         }
  829 |     }
  830 |     
  831 |     return true;
  832 | }
  833 | 
  834 | double CSwingPoints::CalculateSignificance(const SSwingPoint& swing) {
  835 |     double significance = 50.0; // Base significance
  836 |     
  837 |     // Volume factor
  838 |     if (m_Config.UseVolume && swing.Volume > 0) {
  839 |         // Calculate average volume
  840 |         double avg_volume = 0.0;
  841 |         int volume_count = 0;
  842 |         
  843 |         for (int i = MathMax(0, swing.BarIndex - 20); 
  844 |              i < MathMin(m_DataCount, swing.BarIndex + 20); i++) {
  845 |             if (i < ArraySize(m_VolumeData)) {
  846 |                 avg_volume += m_VolumeData[i];
  847 |                 volume_count++;
  848 |             }
  849 |         }
  850 |         
  851 |         if (volume_count > 0) {
  852 |             avg_volume /= volume_count;
  853 |             if (avg_volume > 0) {
  854 |                 double volume_ratio = swing.Volume / avg_volume;
  855 |                 significance += (volume_ratio - 1.0) * 20.0; // Max 20 points from volume
  856 |             }
  857 |         }
  858 |     }
  859 |     
  860 |     // Time factor (older swings are more significant)
  861 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  862 |     int time_diff_hours = (int)((current_time - swing.Time) / 3600);
  863 |     if (time_diff_hours > 24) {
  864 |         significance += MathMin(time_diff_hours / 24.0 * 5.0, 20.0); // Max 20 points from age
  865 |     }
  866 |     
  867 |     // Touch count factor
  868 |     significance += (swing.TouchCount - 1) * 5.0; // 5 points per additional touch
  869 |     
  870 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, significance));
  871 | }
  872 | 
  873 | ENUM_SWING_STRENGTH CSwingPoints::DetermineSwingStrength(const double significance) {
  874 |     if (significance >= 90.0) {
  875 |         return STRENGTH_EXTREME;
  876 |     } else if (significance >= 75.0) {
  877 |         return STRENGTH_VERY_STRONG;
  878 |     } else if (significance >= 60.0) {
  879 |         return STRENGTH_STRONG;
  880 |     } else if (significance >= 40.0) {
  881 |         return STRENGTH_MODERATE;
  882 |     } else {
  883 |         return STRENGTH_WEAK;
  884 |     }
  885 | }
  886 | 
  887 | void CSwingPoints::UpdateSwingAnalysis() {
  888 |     if (m_SwingCount < 2) {
  889 |         return;
  890 |     }
  891 |     
  892 |     // Find last swing high and low
  893 |     for (int i = m_SwingCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  894 |         if (m_SwingPoints[i].Type == SWING_HIGH && m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh.Time == 0) {
  895 |             m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh = m_SwingPoints[i];
  896 |         }
  897 |         if (m_SwingPoints[i].Type == SWING_LOW && m_Analysis.LastSwingLow.Time == 0) {
  898 |             m_Analysis.LastSwingLow = m_SwingPoints[i];
  899 |         }
  900 |         
  901 |         if (m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh.Time > 0 && m_Analysis.LastSwingLow.Time > 0) {
  902 |             break;
  903 |         }
  904 |     }
  905 |     
  906 |     // Calculate swing range
  907 |     if (m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh.Price > 0 && m_Analysis.LastSwingLow.Price > 0) {
  908 |         m_Analysis.SwingRange = MathAbs(m_Analysis.LastSwingHigh.Price - m_Analysis.LastSwingLow.Price);
  909 |     }
  910 |     
  911 |     // Calculate average swing size
  912 |     double total_swing_size = 0.0;
  913 |     int swing_count = 0;
  914 |     
  915 |     for (int i = 1; i < m_SwingCount; i++) {
  916 |         double swing_size = MathAbs(m_SwingPoints[i].Price - m_SwingPoints[i-1].Price);
  917 |         total_swing_size += swing_size;
  918 |         swing_count++;
  919 |     }
  920 |     
  921 |     if (swing_count > 0) {
  922 |         m_Analysis.AverageSwingSize = total_swing_size / swing_count;
  923 |     }
  924 |     
  925 |     // Update trend analysis
  926 |     UpdateTrendAnalysis();
  927 |     
  928 |     // Update swing count
  929 |     m_Analysis.SwingCount = m_SwingCount;
  930 | }
  931 | 
  932 | void CSwingPoints::UpdateTrendAnalysis() {
  933 |     m_Analysis.TrendDirection = AnalyzeTrendDirection();
  934 |     m_Analysis.TrendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  935 |     m_Analysis.TrendAngle = CalculateTrendAngle();
  936 | }
  937 | 
  938 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION CSwingPoints::AnalyzeTrendDirection() {
  939 |     if (m_SwingCount < 4) {
  940 |         return TREND_UNKNOWN;
  941 |     }
  942 |     
  943 |     // Analyze last few swings to determine trend
  944 |     int highs_count = 0, lows_count = 0;
  945 |     int higher_highs = 0, lower_highs = 0;
  946 |     int higher_lows = 0, lower_lows = 0;
  947 |     
  948 |     // Look at last 6 swings
  949 |     int start_index = MathMax(0, m_SwingCount - 6);
  950 |     
  951 |     for (int i = start_index; i < m_SwingCount - 1; i++) {
  952 |         if (m_SwingPoints[i].Type == SWING_HIGH) {
  953 |             highs_count++;
  954 |             if (i > 0 && m_SwingPoints[i].Price > m_SwingPoints[i-1].Price) {
  955 |                 higher_highs++;
  956 |             } else if (i > 0) {
  957 |                 lower_highs++;
  958 |             }
  959 |         } else if (m_SwingPoints[i].Type == SWING_LOW) {
  960 |             lows_count++;
  961 |             if (i > 0 && m_SwingPoints[i].Price > m_SwingPoints[i-1].Price) {
  962 |                 higher_lows++;
  963 |             } else if (i > 0) {
  964 |                 lower_lows++;
  965 |             }
  966 |         }
  967 |     }
  968 |     
  969 |     // Determine trend based on swing pattern
  970 |     if (higher_highs > lower_highs && higher_lows > lower_lows) {
  971 |         return TREND_UP;
  972 |     } else if (lower_highs > higher_highs && lower_lows > higher_lows) {
  973 |         return TREND_DOWN;
  974 |     } else {
  975 |         return TREND_SIDEWAYS;
  976 |     }
  977 | }
  978 | 
  979 | bool CSwingPoints::FindDoublePattern(const ENUM_SWING_TYPE type, const double tolerance) {
  980 |     if (m_SwingCount < 3) {
  981 |         return false;
  982 |     }
  983 |     
  984 |     // Look for two similar swing levels
  985 |     for (int i = m_SwingCount - 1; i >= 2; i--) {
  986 |         if (m_SwingPoints[i].Type == type) {
  987 |             for (int j = i - 2; j >= 0; j--) {
  988 |                 if (m_SwingPoints[j].Type == type) {
  989 |                     double price_diff = MathAbs(m_SwingPoints[i].Price - m_SwingPoints[j].Price);
  990 |                     double avg_price = (m_SwingPoints[i].Price + m_SwingPoints[j].Price) / 2.0;
  991 |                     
  992 |                     if (price_diff / avg_price <= tolerance) {
  993 |                         return true;
  994 |                     }
  995 |                 }
  996 |             }
  997 |         }
  998 |     }
  999 |     
 1000 |     return false;
 1001 | }
 1002 | 
 1003 | void CSwingPoints::AddSwingPoint(const SSwingPoint& swing) {
 1004 |     if (m_SwingCount >= ArraySize(m_SwingPoints)) {
 1005 |         // Remove oldest swing if array is full
 1006 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_SwingCount - 1; i++) {
 1007 |             m_SwingPoints[i] = m_SwingPoints[i + 1];
 1008 |         }
 1009 |         m_SwingCount--;
 1010 |     }
 1011 |     
 1012 |     m_SwingPoints[m_SwingCount] = swing;
 1013 |     m_SwingCount++;
 1014 | }
 1015 | 
 1016 | bool CSwingPoints::IsValidIndex(const int index) {
 1017 |     return (index >= 0 && index < m_DataCount);
 1018 | }
 1019 | 
 1020 | void CSwingPoints::LogSwingEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
 1021 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1022 |         switch(level) {
 1023 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
 1024 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1025 |                 break;
 1026 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
 1027 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1028 |                 break;
 1029 |             default:
 1030 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1031 |         }
 1032 |     }
 1033 | }
 1034 | 
 1035 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5
 1036 | 
 1037 | #endif // SWING_POINTS_MQH_

  340 |     bool                  GetADXData(double& adx_buffer[], double& plus_buffer[], double& minus_buffer[]);
  341 |     bool                  GetATRData(double& atr_buffer[]);
  342 |

  115 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  116 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 | CTechnicalAnalyzer::CTechnicalAnalyzer() {
  119 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  120 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  121 |     
  122 |     // Initialize arrays
  123 |     ArrayResize(m_MA_Values, BUFFER_SIZE);
  124 |     ArrayResize(m_RSI_Values, BUFFER_SIZE);
  125 |     ArrayResize(m_MACD_Values, BUFFER_SIZE);
  126 |     ArrayResize(m_ATR_Values, BUFFER_SIZE);
  127 |     
  128 |     // Set default periods
  129 |     m_MA_Period = 20;
  130 |     m_RSI_Period = 14;
  131 |     m_MACD_Fast = 12;
  132 |     m_MACD_Slow = 26;
  133 |     m_MACD_Signal = 9;
  134 |     m_ATR_Period = 14;
  135 |     
  136 |     // Reset analysis
  137 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Reset();
  138 |     m_PreviousAnalysis.Reset();
  139 | }
