  148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 | //| Initialize Technical Analyzer                                    |
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | bool CTechnicalAnalyzer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  152 |     if (context == NULL) {
  153 |         Print("[TECHNICAL] ERROR: Invalid context provided");
  154 |         return false;
  155 |     }
  156 |     
  157 |     m_pContext = context;
  158 |     
  159 |     // Update indicator periods from context
  160 |     if (context.InputParams.RSI_Period > 0) {
  161 |         m_RSI_Period = context.InputParams.RSI_Period;
  162 |     }
  163 |     if (context.InputParams.ATR_Period > 0) {
  164 |         m_ATR_Period = context.InputParams.ATR_Period;
  165 |     }
  166 |     
  167 |     // Initialize indicators
  168 |     UpdateIndicators();
  169 |     
  170 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  171 |     Print("[TECHNICAL] Technical Analyzer initialized successfully");
  172 |     return true;
  173 | }
  174 | 
  175 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  176 | //| Cleanup                                                          |
  177 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  178 | void CTechnicalAnalyzer::Cleanup() {
  179 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  180 |         Print("[TECHNICAL] Technical Analyzer cleaned up");
  181 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  182 |     }
  183 | }
  184 | 
  185 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 | //| Main Update Method                                               |
  187 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  188 | void CTechnicalAnalyzer::Update() {
  189 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  190 |     
  191 |     // Store previous analysis
  192 |     m_PreviousAnalysis = m_CurrentAnalysis;
  193 |     
  194 |     // Update indicators
  195 |     UpdateIndicators();
  196 |     
  197 |     // Perform technical analysis
  198 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  199 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore = CalculateMomentumScore();
  200 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.VolatilityLevel = CalculateVolatilityLevel();
  201 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.SupportLevel = FindSupportLevel();
  202 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.ResistanceLevel = FindResistanceLevel();
  203 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBullish = DetermineBullishSentiment();
  204 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBearish = DetermineBearishSentiment();
  205 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.ConfidenceLevel = CalculateConfidence();
  206 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  207 |     
  208 |     // Generate analysis reason
  209 |     if (m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBullish) {
  210 |         m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisReason = StringFormat("Bullish: Trend=%.2f, Momentum=%.1f", 
  211 |                                                        m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength, 
  212 |                                                        m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore);
  213 |     } else if (m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBearish) {
  214 |         m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisReason = StringFormat("Bearish: Trend=%.2f, Momentum=%.1f", 
  215 |                                                        m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength, 
  216 |                                                        m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore);
  217 |     } else {
  218 |         m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisReason = StringFormat("Neutral: Trend=%.2f, Momentum=%.1f", 
  219 |                                                        m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength, 
  220 |                                                        m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore);
  221 |     }
  222 | }
  223 | 
  224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 | //| Update Technical Indicators                                      |
  226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 | void CTechnicalAnalyzer::UpdateIndicators() {
  228 |     // Update moving averages
  229 |     for (int i = 0; i < BUFFER_SIZE; i++) {
  230 |         m_MA_Values[i] = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, m_MA_Period, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE, i);
  231 |         m_RSI_Values[i] = iRSI(_Symbol, _Period, m_RSI_Period, PRICE_CLOSE, i);
  232 |         m_MACD_Values[i] = iMACD(_Symbol, _Period, m_MACD_Fast, m_MACD_Slow, m_MACD_Signal, PRICE_CLOSE, MODE_MAIN, i);
  233 |         m_ATR_Values[i] = iATR(_Symbol, _Period, m_ATR_Period, i);
  234 |     }
  235 | }
  236 | 
  237 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  238 | //| Calculate Trend Strength                                         |
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | double CTechnicalAnalyzer::CalculateTrendStrength() {
  241 |     if (ArraySize(m_MA_Values) < 5) return 0.0;
  242 |     
  243 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  244 |     double ma_current = m_MA_Values[0];
  245 |     double ma_previous = m_MA_Values[4];
  246 |     
  247 |     // Calculate trend direction
  248 |     double priceMA_ratio = (currentPrice - ma_current) / ma_current * 100.0;
  249 |     double ma_slope = (ma_current - ma_previous) / ma_previous * 100.0;
  250 |     
  251 |     // Combine price position and MA slope
  252 |     double trendStrength = (priceMA_ratio + ma_slope) / 2.0;
  253 |     
  254 |     // Normalize to -1 to 1 range
  255 |     trendStrength = MathMax(-1.0, MathMin(1.0, trendStrength / 5.0));
  256 |     
  257 |     return trendStrength;
  258 | }
  259 | 
  260 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  261 | //| Calculate Momentum Score                                         |
  262 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  263 | double CTechnicalAnalyzer::CalculateMomentumScore() {
  264 |     if (ArraySize(m_RSI_Values) < 2 || ArraySize(m_MACD_Values) < 2) return 50.0;
  265 |     
  266 |     double rsi_current = m_RSI_Values[0];
  267 |     double macd_current = m_MACD_Values[0];
  268 |     double macd_previous = m_MACD_Values[1];
  269 |     
  270 |     // RSI momentum component (0-100)
  271 |     double rsi_momentum = rsi_current;
  272 |     
  273 |     // MACD momentum component
  274 |     double macd_momentum = 50.0; // Neutral
  275 |     if (macd_current > macd_previous) {
  276 |         macd_momentum += 25.0; // Positive momentum
  277 |     } else if (macd_current < macd_previous) {
  278 |         macd_momentum -= 25.0; // Negative momentum
  279 |     }
  280 |     
  281 |     // Combine and normalize
  282 |     double momentum = (rsi_momentum + macd_momentum) / 2.0;
  283 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, momentum));
  284 | }
  285 | 
  286 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  287 | //| Calculate Volatility Level                                       |
  288 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  289 | double CTechnicalAnalyzer::CalculateVolatilityLevel() {
  290 |     if (ArraySize(m_ATR_Values) < 10) return 50.0;
  291 |     
  292 |     double atr_current = m_ATR_Values[0];
  293 |     
  294 |     // Calculate average ATR over last 10 periods
  295 |     double atr_sum = 0.0;
  296 |     for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
  297 |         atr_sum += m_ATR_Values[i];
  298 |     }
  299 |     double atr_average = atr_sum / 10.0;
  300 |     
  301 |     // Calculate relative volatility
  302 |     double volatility_ratio = (atr_average > 0) ? atr_current / atr_average : 1.0;
  303 |     
  304 |     // Convert to 0-100 scale
  305 |     double volatility_level = volatility_ratio * 50.0;
  306 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, volatility_level));
  307 | }
  308 | 
  309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 | //| Find Support Level                                               |
  311 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  312 | double CTechnicalAnalyzer::FindSupportLevel() {
  313 |     double min_low = iLow(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  314 |     
  315 |     // Find lowest low in recent periods
  316 |     for (int i = 1; i < 20; i++) {
  317 |         double low = iLow(_Symbol, _Period, i);
  318 |         if (low < min_low) {
  319 |             min_low = low;
  320 |         }
  321 |     }
  322 |     
  323 |     return min_low;
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  327 | //| Find Resistance Level                                            |
  328 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  329 | double CTechnicalAnalyzer::FindResistanceLevel() {
  330 |     double max_high = iHigh(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  331 |     
  332 |     // Find highest high in recent periods
  333 |     for (int i = 1; i < 20; i++) {
  334 |         double high = iHigh(_Symbol, _Period, i);
  335 |         if (high > max_high) {
  336 |             max_high = high;
  337 |         }
  338 |     }
  339 |     
  340 |     return max_high;
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  344 | //| Determine Bullish Sentiment                                      |
  345 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  346 | bool CTechnicalAnalyzer::DetermineBullishSentiment() {
  347 |     return (m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength > 0.3 && 
  348 |             m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore > 60.0);
  349 | }
  350 | 
  351 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  352 | //| Determine Bearish Sentiment                                      |
  353 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  354 | bool CTechnicalAnalyzer::DetermineBearishSentiment() {
  355 |     return (m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength < -0.3 && 
  356 |             m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore < 40.0);
  357 | }
  358 | 
  359 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  360 | //| Calculate Analysis Confidence                                    |
  361 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  362 | double CTechnicalAnalyzer::CalculateConfidence() {
  363 |     double confidence = 0.5; // Base confidence
  364 |     
  365 |     // Add confidence based on trend strength
  366 |     confidence += MathAbs(m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength) * 0.3;
  367 |     
  368 |     // Add confidence based on momentum clarity
  369 |     double momentum_distance = MathAbs(m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore - 50.0);
  370 |     confidence += momentum_distance / 50.0 * 0.2;
  371 |     
  372 |     // Ensure bounds
  373 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, confidence));
  374 | }
  375 | 
  376 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  377 | //| Get Analysis Report                                              |
  378 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  379 | string CTechnicalAnalyzer::GetAnalysisReport() {
  380 |     string report = "=== TECHNICAL ANALYSIS REPORT ===\n";
  381 |     report += StringFormat("Trend Strength: %.2f\n", m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength);
  382 |     report += StringFormat("Momentum Score: %.1f\n", m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore);
  383 |     report += StringFormat("Volatility Level: %.1f\n", m_CurrentAnalysis.VolatilityLevel);
  384 |     report += StringFormat("Support Level: %.5f\n", m_CurrentAnalysis.SupportLevel);
  385 |     report += StringFormat("Resistance Level: %.5f\n", m_CurrentAnalysis.ResistanceLevel);
  386 |     report += StringFormat("Market Sentiment: %s\n", 
  387 |               m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBullish ? "BULLISH" : 
  388 |               (m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBearish ? "BEARISH" : "NEUTRAL"));
  389 |     report += StringFormat("Confidence: %.1f%%\n", m_CurrentAnalysis.ConfidenceLevel * 100.0);
  390 |     report += StringFormat("Analysis: %s\n", m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisReason);
  391 |     
  392 |     return report;
  393 | }
  394 | 
  395 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  396 | //| Run Diagnostics                                                  |
  397 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  398 | void CTechnicalAnalyzer::RunDiagnostics() {
  399 |     Print("=== TECHNICAL ANALYZER DIAGNOSTICS ===");
  400 |     Print("Initialized: ", m_bInitialized ? "YES" : "NO");
  401 |     Print("Trend Strength: ", m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength);
  402 |     Print("Momentum Score: ", m_CurrentAnalysis.MomentumScore);
  403 |     Print("Volatility Level: ", m_CurrentAnalysis.VolatilityLevel);
  404 |     Print("Is Bullish: ", m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBullish ? "YES" : "NO");
  405 |     Print("Is Bearish: ", m_CurrentAnalysis.IsBearish ? "YES" : "NO");
  406 |     Print("Confidence: ", m_CurrentAnalysis.ConfidenceLevel);
  407 |     Print("======================================");
  408 | }
  409 | 
  410 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  411 | //| Update Configuration                                             |
  412 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  413 | bool CTechnicalAnalyzer::UpdateConfiguration(EAContext* context) {
  414 |     if (context == NULL) return false;
  415 |     
  416 |     // Update periods if changed
  417 |     if (context.InputParams.RSI_Period > 0) {
  418 |         m_RSI_Period = context.InputParams.RSI_Period;
  419 |     }
  420 |     if (context.InputParams.ATR_Period > 0) {
  421 |         m_ATR_Period = context.InputParams.ATR_Period;
  422 |     }
  423 |     
  424 |     return true;
  425 | }

   72 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

   18 | struct SSignalContext {
   19 |     // Basic signal information
   20 |     ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE      signalType;         // Signal type
   21 |     ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy;           // Strategy that generated signal
   22 |     double                confidenceScore;    // Confidence score (0-1)
   23 |     double                entryPrice;         // Suggested entry price
   24 |     double                stopLoss;           // Suggested stop loss
   25 |     double                takeProfit;         // Suggested take profit
   26 |     
   27 |     // Market context
   28 |     ENUM_MARKET_REGIME    marketRegime;       // Current market regime
   29 |     double                volatility;         // Current volatility (ATR)
   30 |     double                spread;             // Current spread
   31 |     double                trendStrength;      // Trend strength (0-1)
   32 |     
   33 |     // Signal quality metrics
   34 |     double                riskRewardRatio;    // Risk/reward ratio
   35 |     double                expectedPips;       // Expected profit in pips
   36 |     double                maxRiskPips;        // Maximum risk in pips
   37 |     int                   urgencyLevel;       // Urgency level (1-5)
   38 |     
   39 |     // Timing and validation
   40 |     datetime              signalTime;         // Signal generation time
   41 |     datetime              expiryTime;         // Signal expiry time
   42 |     bool                  isValidated;        // Validation status
   43 |     string                signalReason;       // Reason for signal
   44 |     
   45 |     // Multi-timeframe analysis
   46 |     bool                  mtfAlignment;       // Multi-timeframe alignment
   47 |     double                mtfStrength;        // MTF strength score
   48 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  h1Trend;           // H1 trend direction
   49 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION  h4Trend;           // H4 trend direction
   50 |     
   51 |     void Clear() {
   52 |         signalType = SIGNAL_NONE;
   53 |         strategy = STRATEGY_UNDEFINED;
   54 |         confidenceScore = 0.0;
   55 |         entryPrice = 0.0;
   56 |         stopLoss = 0.0;
   57 |         takeProfit = 0.0;
   58 |         marketRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
   59 |         volatility = 0.0;
   60 |         spread = 0.0;
   61 |         trendStrength = 0.0;
   62 |         riskRewardRatio = 0.0;
   63 |         expectedPips = 0.0;
   64 |         maxRiskPips = 0.0;
   65 |         urgencyLevel = 1;
   66 |         signalTime = 0;
   67 |         expiryTime = 0;
   68 |         isValidated = false;
   69 |         signalReason = "";
   70 |         mtfAlignment = false;
   71 |         mtfStrength = 0.0;
   72 |         h1Trend = TREND_UNKNOWN;
   73 |         h4Trend = TREND_UNKNOWN;
   74 |     }
   75 | };

  225 |     SSignalQuality        GetSignalQuality() const { return m_SignalQuality; }
  226 |     SSignalStatistics     GetStatistics() const { return m_Statistics; }
  227 |     int                   GetSignalCount() const { return m_iSignalCount; }
  228 |     datetime              GetLastSignalTime() const { return m_dtLastSignalTime; }
  229 |     ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE      GetLastSignalType() const { return m_LastSignalType; }
  230 |     double                GetMinConfidenceThreshold() const { return m_MinConfidenceThreshold; }
  231 |     
  232 |     //--- Configuration ---
  233 |     void                  SetMinConfidenceThreshold(double threshold) { m_MinConfidenceThreshold = threshold; }
  234 |     void                  SetCurrentStrategy(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy) { m_CurrentStrategy = strategy; }
  235 |     void                  EnableAssetDNA(bool enable) { m_UseAssetDNA = enable; }
  236 |     
  237 | private:
  238 |     //--- Enhanced Helper Methods (v14) ---
  239 |     bool                  CreateIndicators();
  240 |     bool                  CreateMultiTimeframeIndicators();
  241 |     void                  ReleaseIndicators();
  242 |     bool                  GetIndicatorValues(double& trend_ema, double& pullback_ema, double& rsi_value, double& atr_value);
  243 |     bool                  GetEnhancedIndicatorValues(double values[]);
  244 |     bool                  GetMultiTimeframeValues(double h1_values[], double h4_values[]);
  245 |     
  246 |     //--- Signal Processing ---
  247 |     void                  ProcessSignal(SSignalContext& signal);
  248 |     void                  CalculateSignalParameters(SSignalContext& signal);
  249 |     void                  ApplyRiskManagement(SSignalContext& signal);
  250 |     void                  OptimizeEntryTiming(SSignalContext& signal);
  251 |     
  252 |     //--- Validation Helpers ---
  253 |     bool                  CheckSignalTiming();
  254 |     bool                  CheckSpreadConditions();
  255 |     bool                  CheckVolatilityConditions();
  256 |     bool                  CheckNewsEvents();
  257 |     
  258 |     //--- Statistics and Logging ---
  259 |     void                  UpdateSignalStatistics(const SSignalContext& signal);
  260 |     void                  LogSignalDetails(const SSignalContext& signal);
  261 |     void                  LogSignalQuality(const SSignalQuality& quality);
  262 |     
  263 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
  264 |     double                NormalizeScore(double value, double min_val, double max_val);
  265 |     string                SignalTypeToString(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal_type);
  266 |     string                StrategyToString(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy);
  267 | };
  268 |

  276 |     m_hPullbackEMA(INVALID_HANDLE),

  280 |     m_hStochastic(INVALID_HANDLE),
  281 |     m_hBollinger(INVALID_HANDLE),

  283 |     m_hH4_EMA(INVALID_HANDLE),
  284 |     m_hH1_RSI(INVALID_HANDLE),
  285 |     m_hH4_RSI(INVALID_HANDLE),
  286 |     m_dtLastSignalTime(0),
  287 |     m_LastSignalType(SIGNAL_NONE),
  288 |     m_iSignalCount(0),
  289 |     m_MinConfidenceThreshold(0.6),
  290 |     m_CurrentStrategy(STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND),
  291 |     m_UseAssetDNA(true)
  292 | {

  294 |     m_SignalQuality.Clear();
  295 |     m_Statistics.Clear();
  296 | }
  297 |

  299 |     m_hTrendEMA = INVALID_HANDLE;
  300 |     m_hPullbackEMA = INVALID_HANDLE;
  301 |     m_hRSI = INVALID_HANDLE;
  302 |     m_hATR = INVALID_HANDLE;
  303 |     m_hMACD = INVALID_HANDLE;
  304 |     m_hStochastic = INVALID_HANDLE;
  305 |     m_hBollinger = INVALID_HANDLE;
  306 |

  309 |     m_hH4_EMA = INVALID_HANDLE;

  311 |     m_hH4_RSI = INVALID_HANDLE;

  314 |     m_CurrentSignal.Clear();
  315 |     m_SignalQuality.Clear();
  316 |     m_Statistics.Clear();
  317 |

  319 |     m_dtLastSignalTime = 0;
  320 |     m_LastSignalType = SIGNAL_NONE;
  321 |     m_iSignalCount = 0;
  322 |     m_MinConfidenceThreshold = 0.6;
  323 |     m_CurrentStrategy = STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND;
  324 |     m_UseAssetDNA = true;
  325 | }

  333 | 
  334 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  335 | //| Enhanced Initialize Signal Engine (v14)                         |
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | bool CSignalEngine::Initialize(EAContext* pContext)
  338 | {
  339 |     if (m_bInitialized) return true;
  340 |     if (pContext == NULL)
  341 |     {
  342 |         PrintFormat("%s: EAContext is null", __FUNCTION__);
  343 |         return false;
  344 |     }
  345 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  346 |     
  347 |     // Enhanced validation with more robust null pointer checks
  348 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger == NULL || m_pContext->pErrorHandler == NULL || 
  349 |         m_pContext->pSymbolManager == NULL || m_pContext->pTimeManager == NULL) {
  350 |         string errorMsg = "Critical context pointer is NULL: ";
  351 |         if(m_pContext->pLogger == NULL) errorMsg += "Logger ";
  352 |         if(m_pContext->pErrorHandler == NULL) errorMsg += "ErrorHandler ";
  353 |         if(m_pContext->pSymbolManager == NULL) errorMsg += "SymbolManager ";
  354 |         if(m_pContext->pTimeManager == NULL) errorMsg += "TimeManager ";
  355 |         
  356 |         Print("[SignalEngine] ERROR: " + errorMsg);
  357 |         
  358 |         if(m_pContext->pErrorHandler != NULL) {
  359 |             m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INVALID_POINTER, __FUNCTION__, errorMsg);
  360 |         }
  361 |         return false;
  362 |     }
  363 |     
  364 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Initializing Enhanced SignalEngine v14...", __FUNCTION__);
  365 |     
  366 |     // Create enhanced indicators
  367 |     if (!CreateIndicators()) {
  368 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create indicators", __FUNCTION__);
  369 |         return false;
  370 |     }
  371 |     
  372 |     // Create multi-timeframe indicators
  373 |     if (!CreateMultiTimeframeIndicators()) {
  374 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create multi-timeframe indicators", __FUNCTION__);
  375 |         return false;
  376 |     }
  377 |     
  378 |     // Initialize enhanced signal management
  379 |     m_CurrentSignal.Clear();
  380 |     m_SignalQuality.Clear();
  381 |     m_Statistics.Clear();
  382 |     
  383 |     m_dtLastSignalTime = 0;
  384 |     m_LastSignalType = SIGNAL_NONE;
  385 |     m_iSignalCount = 0;
  386 |     
  387 |     // Set configuration from inputs
  388 |     m_MinConfidenceThreshold = 0.6; // Default, can be adjusted
  389 |     m_CurrentStrategy = STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND; // Default strategy
  390 |     m_UseAssetDNA = true; // Enable AssetDNA integration
  391 |     
  392 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  393 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Enhanced SignalEngine v14 initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  394 |     
  395 |     return true;
  396 | }
  397 | 
  398 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  399 | //| Deinitialize Signal Engine                                       |
  400 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  401 | void CSignalEngine::Deinitialize() {
  402 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  403 |         return;
  404 |     }
  405 |     
  406 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  407 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Deinitializing Enhanced SignalEngine...", __FUNCTION__);
  408 |     }
  409 |     
  410 |     ReleaseIndicators();
  411 |     
  412 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  413 |     
  414 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  415 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Enhanced SignalEngine deinitialized", __FUNCTION__);
  416 |     }
  417 |     
  418 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  419 | }
  420 | 
  421 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  422 | //| Enhanced Generate Signal (v14 Main Method)                      |
  423 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  424 | SSignalContext CSignalEngine::GenerateSignal() {
  425 |     SSignalContext signal;
  426 |     signal.Clear();
  427 |     
  428 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_pContext) {
  429 |         return signal;
  430 |     }
  431 |     
  432 |     // Check timing constraints
  433 |     if (!CheckSignalTiming()) {
  434 |         return signal;
  435 |     }
  436 |     
  437 |     // Select optimal strategy based on market conditions and AssetDNA
  438 |     if (m_UseAssetDNA && m_pContext->pAssetDNA != NULL) {
  439 |         m_CurrentStrategy = m_pContext->pAssetDNA->GetOptimalStrategy();
  440 |     }
  441 |     
  442 |     if (m_CurrentStrategy == STRATEGY_UNDEFINED) {
  443 |         m_CurrentStrategy = SelectOptimalStrategy();
  444 |     }
  445 |     
  446 |     // Generate signal based on current strategy
  447 |     bool signalFound = false;
  448 |     
  449 |     switch (m_CurrentStrategy) {
  450 |         case STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND:
  451 |         case STRATEGY_SHALLOW_PULLBACK:
  452 |             signalFound = CheckPullbackSignal(signal);
  453 |             break;
  454 |             
  455 |         case STRATEGY_MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT:
  456 |             signalFound = CheckMomentumSignal(signal);
  457 |             break;
  458 |             
  459 |         case STRATEGY_MEAN_REVERSION:
  460 |             signalFound = CheckReversalSignal(signal);
  461 |             break;
  462 |             
  463 |         case STRATEGY_BREAKOUT:
  464 |             signalFound = CheckBreakoutSignal(signal);
  465 |             break;
  466 |             
  467 |         default:
  468 |             signalFound = CheckPullbackSignal(signal); // Default to pullback
  469 |             break;
  470 |     }
  471 |     
  472 |     if (!signalFound || signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
  473 |         return signal;
  474 |     }
  475 |     
  476 |     // Set strategy and basic info
  477 |     signal.strategy = m_CurrentStrategy;
  478 |     signal.signalTime = TimeCurrent();
  479 |     signal.expiryTime = signal.signalTime + 300; // 5 minutes expiry
  480 |     
  481 |     // Analyze multi-timeframe alignment
  482 |     AnalyzeMultiTimeframe(signal);
  483 |     
  484 |     // Calculate signal quality and confidence
  485 |     m_SignalQuality = CalculateSignalQuality(signal);
  486 |     signal.confidenceScore = CalculateConfidenceScore(signal);
  487 |     
  488 |     // Process and optimize signal
  489 |     ProcessSignal(signal);
  490 |     
  491 |     // Validate signal
  492 |     if (ValidateSignal(signal)) {
  493 |         signal.isValidated = true;
  494 |         m_CurrentSignal = signal;
  495 |         
  496 |         // Update statistics
  497 |         UpdateSignalStatistics(signal);
  498 |         
  499 |         // Log signal details
  500 |         LogSignalDetails(signal);
  501 |         LogSignalQuality(m_SignalQuality);
  502 |         
  503 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Enhanced signal generated: %s %s (Confidence: %.2f)", 
  504 |             SignalTypeToString(signal.signalType), StrategyToString(signal.strategy), signal.confidenceScore), __FUNCTION__);
  505 |     } else {
  506 |         signal.Clear(); // Clear invalid signal
  507 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Signal failed validation", __FUNCTION__);
  508 |     }
  509 |     
  510 |     return signal;
  511 | }
  512 | 
  513 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  514 | //| Check for Trading Signal (Backward Compatibility)               |
  515 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  516 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE CSignalEngine::CheckForSignal() {
  517 |     SSignalContext signal = GenerateSignal();
  518 |     return signal.signalType;
  519 | }
  520 | 
  521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  522 | //| Create Indicators                                                |
  523 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  524 | bool CSignalEngine::CreateIndicators() {
  525 |     string symbol = _Symbol;
  526 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = m_pContext->Inputs.MainTimeframe;
  527 |     
  528 |     // Create Trend EMA
  529 |     m_hTrendEMA = iMA(symbol, timeframe, m_pContext->Inputs.EMA_Slow, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  530 |     if (m_hTrendEMA == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  531 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create Trend EMA", __FUNCTION__);
  532 |         return false;
  533 |     }
  534 |     
  535 |     // Create Pullback EMA
  536 |     m_hPullbackEMA = iMA(symbol, timeframe, m_pContext->Inputs.EMA_Fast, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  537 |     if (m_hPullbackEMA == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  538 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create Pullback EMA", __FUNCTION__);
  539 |         return false;
  540 |     }
  541 |     
  542 |     // Create RSI
  543 |     m_hRSI = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, 14, PRICE_CLOSE);
  544 |     if (m_hRSI == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  545 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create RSI", __FUNCTION__);
  546 |         return false;
  547 |     }
  548 |     
  549 |     // Create ATR
  550 |     m_hATR = iATR(symbol, timeframe, 14);
  551 |     if (m_hATR == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  552 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create ATR", __FUNCTION__);
  553 |         return false;
  554 |     }
  555 |     
  556 |     return true;
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | //| Create Multi-timeframe Indicators                                |
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | bool CSignalEngine::CreateMultiTimeframeIndicators() {
  563 |     string symbol = _Symbol;
  564 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = m_pContext->Inputs.MainTimeframe;
  565 |     
  566 |     // Create H1 EMA
  567 |     m_hH1_EMA = iMA(symbol, timeframe, 100, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  568 |     if (m_hH1_EMA == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  569 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create H1 EMA", __FUNCTION__);
  570 |         return false;
  571 |     }
  572 |     
  573 |     // Create H4 EMA
  574 |     m_hH4_EMA = iMA(symbol, timeframe, 200, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  575 |     if (m_hH4_EMA == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  576 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create H4 EMA", __FUNCTION__);
  577 |         return false;
  578 |     }
  579 |     
  580 |     // Create H1 RSI
  581 |     m_hH1_RSI = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, 14, PRICE_CLOSE);
  582 |     if (m_hH1_RSI == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  583 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create H1 RSI", __FUNCTION__);
  584 |         return false;
  585 |     }
  586 |     
  587 |     // Create H4 RSI
  588 |     m_hH4_RSI = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, 14, PRICE_CLOSE);
  589 |     if (m_hH4_RSI == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  590 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to create H4 RSI", __FUNCTION__);
  591 |         return false;
  592 |     }
  593 |     
  594 |     return true;
  595 | }
  596 | 
  597 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  598 | //| Release Indicators                                               |
  599 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  600 | void CSignalEngine::ReleaseIndicators() {
  601 |     if (m_hTrendEMA != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  602 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hTrendEMA);
  603 |         m_hTrendEMA = INVALID_HANDLE;
  604 |     }
  605 |     
  606 |     if (m_hPullbackEMA != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  607 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hPullbackEMA);
  608 |         m_hPullbackEMA = INVALID_HANDLE;
  609 |     }
  610 |     
  611 |     if (m_hRSI != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  612 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hRSI);
  613 |         m_hRSI = INVALID_HANDLE;
  614 |     }
  615 |     
  616 |     if (m_hATR != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  617 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hATR);
  618 |         m_hATR = INVALID_HANDLE;
  619 |     }
  620 |     
  621 |     if (m_hH1_EMA != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  622 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hH1_EMA);
  623 |         m_hH1_EMA = INVALID_HANDLE;
  624 |     }
  625 |     
  626 |     if (m_hH4_EMA != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  627 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hH4_EMA);
  628 |         m_hH4_EMA = INVALID_HANDLE;
  629 |     }
  630 |     
  631 |     if (m_hH1_RSI != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  632 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hH1_RSI);
  633 |         m_hH1_RSI = INVALID_HANDLE;
  634 |     }
  635 |     
  636 |     if (m_hH4_RSI != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  637 |         IndicatorRelease(m_hH4_RSI);
  638 |         m_hH4_RSI = INVALID_HANDLE;
  639 |     }
  640 | }
  641 | 
  642 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  643 | //| Get Indicator Values                                             |
  644 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  645 | bool CSignalEngine::GetIndicatorValues(double& trend_ema, double& pullback_ema, double& rsi_value, double& atr_value) {
  646 |     double trend_buffer[1], pullback_buffer[1], rsi_buffer[1], atr_buffer[1];
  647 |     
  648 |     // Get Trend EMA
  649 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hTrendEMA, 0, 1, 1, trend_buffer) <= 0) {
  650 |         return false;
  651 |     }
  652 |     trend_ema = trend_buffer[0];
  653 |     
  654 |     // Get Pullback EMA
  655 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hPullbackEMA, 0, 1, 1, pullback_buffer) <= 0) {
  656 |         return false;
  657 |     }
  658 |     pullback_ema = pullback_buffer[0];
  659 |     
  660 |     // Get RSI
  661 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hRSI, 0, 1, 1, rsi_buffer) <= 0) {
  662 |         return false;
  663 |     }
  664 |     rsi_value = rsi_buffer[0];
  665 |     
  666 |     // Get ATR
  667 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hATR, 0, 1, 1, atr_buffer) <= 0) {
  668 |         return false;
  669 |     }
  670 |     atr_value = atr_buffer[0];
  671 |     
  672 |     return true;
  673 | }
  674 | 
  675 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  676 | //| Check Signal Timing                                              |
  677 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  678 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckSignalTiming() {
  679 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  680 |     
  681 |     // Avoid signals too close together (minimum 1 minute)
  682 |     if (current_time - m_dtLastSignalTime < 60) {
  683 |         return false;
  684 |     }
  685 |     
  686 |     return true;
  687 | }
  688 | 
  689 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  690 | //| Update Signal Statistics                                         |
  691 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  692 | void CSignalEngine::UpdateSignalStatistics(const SSignalContext& signal) {
  693 |     m_dtLastSignalTime = TimeCurrent();
  694 |     m_LastSignalType = signal.signalType;
  695 |     m_iSignalCount++;
  696 | }
  697 | 
  698 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  699 | //| Log Signal Details                                               |
  700 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  701 | void CSignalEngine::LogSignalDetails(const SSignalContext& signal) {
  702 |     string signal_str = (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) ? "BUY" : "SELL";
  703 |     string message = StringFormat("%s SIGNAL: TrendEMA=%.5f, PullbackEMA=%.5f, RSI=%.2f", 
  704 |                                  signal_str, signal.trendEMA, signal.pullbackEMA, signal.rsiValue);
  705 |     
  706 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(message, __FUNCTION__);
  707 | }
  708 | 
  709 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  710 | //| Get Signal Strength                                              |
  711 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  712 | ENUM_SIGNAL_STRENGTH CSignalEngine::GetSignalStrength(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal_type) {
  713 |     if (!m_bInitialized || signal_type == SIGNAL_NONE) {
  714 |         return SIGNAL_STRENGTH_WEAK;
  715 |     }
  716 |     
  717 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
  718 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
  719 |         return SIGNAL_STRENGTH_WEAK;
  720 |     }
  721 |     
  722 |     double current_price = (signal_type == SIGNAL_BUY) ? 
  723 |                           SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : 
  724 |                           SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  725 |     
  726 |     // Calculate strength factors
  727 |     double ema_distance = MathAbs(pullback_ema - trend_ema) / trend_ema * 100;
  728 |     double price_distance = MathAbs(current_price - pullback_ema) / pullback_ema * 100;
  729 |     
  730 |     // Strong signal criteria
  731 |     if (ema_distance > 0.5 && price_distance < 0.2) {
  732 |         if ((signal_type == SIGNAL_BUY && rsi_value < 40) ||
  733 |             (signal_type == SIGNAL_SELL && rsi_value > 60)) {
  734 |             return SIGNAL_STRENGTH_STRONG;
  735 |         }
  736 |     }
  737 |     
  738 |     // Medium signal criteria
  739 |     if (ema_distance > 0.2 && price_distance < 0.5) {
  740 |         return SIGNAL_STRENGTH_MEDIUM;
  741 |     }
  742 |     
  743 |     return SIGNAL_STRENGTH_WEAK;
  744 | }
  745 | 
  746 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  747 | //| Check Higher Timeframe Alignment                                 |
  748 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  749 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckHigherTimeframeAlignment(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal_type) {
  750 |     // This is a simplified implementation
  751 |     // In a full implementation, you would check the trend on higher timeframes
  752 |     return true;
  753 | }
  754 | 
  755 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  756 | //| Validate Signal                                                  |
  757 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  758 | bool CSignalEngine::ValidateSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
  759 |     if (!m_bInitialized || signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
  760 |         return false;
  761 |     }
  762 |     
  763 |     // Check allowed direction
  764 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.AllowedDirection == DIRECTION_LONG_ONLY && signal.signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  765 |         return false;
  766 |     }
  767 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.AllowedDirection == DIRECTION_SHORT_ONLY && signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
  768 |         return false;
  769 |     }
  770 |     
  771 |     // Check higher timeframe alignment if enabled
  772 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.UseMultiTimeframe) {
  773 |         if (!CheckHigherTimeframeAlignment(signal.signalType)) {
  774 |             return false;
  775 |         }
  776 |     }
  777 |     
  778 |     return true;
  779 | }
  780 | 
  781 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  782 | //| Analyze Multi-timeframe Alignment                                |
  783 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  784 | bool CSignalEngine::AnalyzeMultiTimeframe(SSignalContext& signal) {
  785 |     // This is a simplified implementation
  786 |     // In a full implementation, you would analyze the trend on higher timeframes
  787 |     signal.mtfAlignment = true;
  788 |     signal.mtfStrength = 0.8; // Placeholder value
  789 |     return true;
  790 | }
  791 | 
  792 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  793 | //| Get Trend Direction                                              |
  794 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  795 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION CSignalEngine::GetTrendDirection(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe) {
  796 |     // This is a simplified implementation
  797 |     // In a full implementation, you would analyze the trend on the specified timeframe
  798 |     return TREND_UNKNOWN;
  799 | }
  800 | 
  801 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  900 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  901 | //| Check Pullback Signal                                           |
  902 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  903 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckPullbackSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
  904 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
  905 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
  906 |         return false;
  907 |     }
  908 |     
  909 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
  910 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
  911 |     
  912 |     if (current_bid == 0 || current_ask == 0) {
  913 |         return false;
  914 |     }
  915 |     
  916 |     // Enhanced pullback logic with better trend detection
  917 |     bool is_uptrend = (pullback_ema > trend_ema);
  918 |     bool is_downtrend = (pullback_ema < trend_ema);
  919 |     
  920 |     const double RSI_OVERBOUGHT = 70.0;
  921 |     const double RSI_OVERSOLD = 30.0;
  922 |     
  923 |     // Buy Signal: Pullback in uptrend
  924 |     if (is_uptrend && 
  925 |         current_bid <= pullback_ema && 
  926 |         current_bid > trend_ema &&  // Above long-term trend
  927 |         rsi_value > RSI_OVERSOLD && 
  928 |         rsi_value < 60.0) {  // Not overbought
  929 |         
  930 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
  931 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
  932 |         signal.stopLoss = trend_ema - (atr_value * 0.5);
  933 |         signal.takeProfit = current_ask + (current_ask - signal.stopLoss) * 2.0; // 1:2 RR
  934 |         signal.signalReason = "Pullback to EMA in uptrend";
  935 |         
  936 |         return true;
  937 |     }
  938 |     // Sell Signal: Pullback in downtrend
  939 |     else if (is_downtrend && 
  940 |              current_ask >= pullback_ema && 
  941 |              current_ask < trend_ema &&  // Below long-term trend
  942 |              rsi_value < RSI_OVERBOUGHT && 
  943 |              rsi_value > 40.0) {  // Not oversold
  944 |         
  945 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
  946 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
  947 |         signal.stopLoss = trend_ema + (atr_value * 0.5);
  948 |         signal.takeProfit = current_bid - (signal.stopLoss - current_bid) * 2.0; // 1:2 RR
  949 |         signal.signalReason = "Pullback to EMA in downtrend";
  950 |         
  951 |         return true;
  952 |     }
  953 |     
  954 |     return false;
  955 | }
  956 | 
  957 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  958 | //| Check Momentum Signal                                            |
  959 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  960 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckMomentumSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
  961 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
  962 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
  963 |         return false;
  964 |     }
  965 |     
  966 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
  967 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
  968 |     
  969 |     // Momentum signals require strong RSI momentum
  970 |     if (rsi_value > 70.0 && pullback_ema > trend_ema) {
  971 |         // Strong bullish momentum
  972 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
  973 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
  974 |         signal.stopLoss = pullback_ema;
  975 |         signal.takeProfit = current_ask + (atr_value * 3.0);
  976 |         signal.signalReason = "Strong bullish momentum breakout";
  977 |         return true;
  978 |     }
  979 |     else if (rsi_value < 30.0 && pullback_ema < trend_ema) {
  980 |         // Strong bearish momentum
  981 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
  982 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
  983 |         signal.stopLoss = pullback_ema;
  984 |         signal.takeProfit = current_bid - (atr_value * 3.0);
  985 |         signal.signalReason = "Strong bearish momentum breakout";
  986 |         return true;
  987 |     }
  988 |     
  989 |     return false;
  990 | }
  991 | 
  992 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  993 | //| Check Reversal Signal                                            |
  994 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  995 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckReversalSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
  996 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
  997 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
  998 |         return false;
  999 |     }
 1000 |     
 1001 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
 1002 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
 1003 |     
 1004 |     // Look for reversal signals at extreme RSI levels
 1005 |     if (rsi_value > 80.0 && current_ask > pullback_ema) {
 1006 |         // Potential bearish reversal
 1007 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1008 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
 1009 |         signal.stopLoss = current_ask + (atr_value * 1.0);
 1010 |         signal.takeProfit = pullback_ema;
 1011 |         signal.signalReason = "Overbought reversal signal";
 1012 |         return true;
 1013 |     }
 1014 |     else if (rsi_value < 20.0 && current_bid < pullback_ema) {
 1015 |         // Potential bullish reversal
 1016 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1017 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
 1018 |         signal.stopLoss = current_bid - (atr_value * 1.0);
 1019 |         signal.takeProfit = pullback_ema;
 1020 |         signal.signalReason = "Oversold reversal signal";
 1021 |         return true;
 1022 |     }
 1023 |     
 1024 |     return false;
 1025 | }
 1026 | 
 1027 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1028 | //| Check Breakout Signal                                            |
 1029 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1030 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckBreakoutSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1031 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1032 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1033 |         return false;
 1034 |     }
 1035 |     
 1036 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
 1037 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
 1038 |     
 1039 |     // Check for breakout above resistance or below support
 1040 |     double resistance = MathMax(trend_ema, pullback_ema);
 1041 |     double support = MathMin(trend_ema, pullback_ema);
 1042 |     
 1043 |     if (current_ask > resistance + (atr_value * 0.2) && rsi_value > 50.0) {
 1044 |         // Bullish breakout
 1045 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1046 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
 1047 |         signal.stopLoss = resistance;
 1048 |         signal.takeProfit = current_ask + (atr_value * 2.0);
 1049 |         signal.signalReason = "Bullish breakout above resistance";
 1050 |         return true;
 1051 |     }
 1052 |     else if (current_bid < support - (atr_value * 0.2) && rsi_value < 50.0) {
 1053 |         // Bearish breakout
 1054 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1055 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
 1056 |         signal.stopLoss = support;
 1057 |         signal.takeProfit = current_bid - (atr_value * 2.0);
 1058 |         signal.signalReason = "Bearish breakout below support";
 1059 |         return true;
 1060 |     }
 1061 |     
 1062 |     return false;
 1063 | }
 1064 | 
 1065 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1066 | //| Calculate Signal Quality                                         |
 1067 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1068 | SSignalQuality CSignalEngine::CalculateSignalQuality(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1069 |     SSignalQuality quality;
 1070 |     quality.Clear();
 1071 |     
 1072 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
 1073 |         return quality;
 1074 |     }
 1075 |     
 1076 |     // Calculate individual quality components
 1077 |     quality.technicalScore = CalculateTechnicalScore(signal);
 1078 |     quality.timingScore = CalculateTimingScore(signal);
 1079 |     quality.marketConditionScore = CalculateMarketConditionScore(signal);
 1080 |     quality.riskScore = (signal.riskRewardRatio >= 2.0) ? 1.0 : signal.riskRewardRatio / 2.0;
 1081 |     quality.consistencyScore = 0.8; // Placeholder - would need historical consistency data
 1082 |     
 1083 |     // Calculate overall score (weighted average)
 1084 |     double weights[] = {0.3, 0.2, 0.25, 0.15, 0.1};
 1085 |     double scores[] = {
 1086 |         quality.technicalScore,
 1087 |         quality.timingScore,
 1088 |         quality.marketConditionScore,
 1089 |         quality.riskScore,
 1090 |         quality.consistencyScore
 1091 |     };
 1092 |     
 1093 |     quality.overallScore = 0.0;
 1094 |     for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
 1095 |         quality.overallScore += scores[i] * weights[i];
 1096 |     }
 1097 |     
 1098 |     return quality;
 1099 | }
 1100 | 
 1101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1102 | //| Calculate Confidence Score                                       |
 1103 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1104 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateConfidenceScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1105 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
 1106 |         return 0.0;
 1107 |     }
 1108 |     
 1109 |     double confidence = 0.0;
 1110 |     
 1111 |     // Base confidence from signal quality
 1112 |     confidence += m_SignalQuality.overallScore * 0.5;
 1113 |     
 1114 |     // Multi-timeframe alignment bonus
 1115 |     if (signal.mtfAlignment) {
 1116 |         confidence += signal.mtfStrength * 0.2;
 1117 |     }
 1118 |     
 1119 |     // Risk/reward ratio contribution
 1120 |     if (signal.riskRewardRatio >= 2.0) {
 1121 |         confidence += 0.15;
 1122 |     } else if (signal.riskRewardRatio >= 1.5) {
 1123 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1124 |     }
 1125 |     
 1126 |     // Market regime bonus
 1127 |     if (signal.marketRegime != REGIME_UNKNOWN) {
 1128 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1129 |     }
 1130 |     
 1131 |     // AssetDNA integration bonus
 1132 |     if (m_UseAssetDNA && m_pContext->pAssetDNA != NULL) {
 1133 |         if (m_pContext->pAssetDNA->IsStrategyRecommended(signal.strategy)) {
 1134 |             confidence += 0.05;
 1135 |         }
 1136 |     }
 1137 |     
 1138 |     return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
 1139 | }
 1140 | 
 1141 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1142 | //| Calculate Technical Score                                        |
 1143 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1144 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateTechnicalScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1145 |     double score = 0.0;
 1146 |     
 1147 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1148 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1149 |         return 0.0;
 1150 |     }
 1151 |     
 1152 |     // EMA alignment score
 1153 |     double ema_separation = MathAbs(pullback_ema - trend_ema) / trend_ema;
 1154 |     if (ema_separation > 0.005) score += 0.3; // 0.5% separation minimum
 1155 |     
 1156 |     // RSI score based on signal type
 1157 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1158 |         if (rsi_value >= 30 && rsi_value <= 60) score += 0.4;
 1159 |         else if (rsi_value > 60 && rsi_value <= 70) score += 0.2;
 1160 |     } else if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
 1161 |         if (rsi_value >= 40 && rsi_value <= 70) score += 0.4;
 1162 |         else if (rsi_value >= 30 && rsi_value < 40) score += 0.2;
 1163 |     }
 1164 |     
 1165 |     // Volatility score (moderate volatility is preferred)
 1166 |     double atr_percent = (atr_value / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) * 100;
 1167 |     if (atr_percent >= 0.1 && atr_percent <= 0.5) score += 0.3;
 1168 |     else if (atr_percent > 0.5 && atr_percent <= 1.0) score += 0.15;
 1169 |     
 1170 |     return MathMin(score, 1.0);
 1171 | }
 1172 | 
 1173 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1174 | //| Calculate Timing Score                                           |
 1175 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1176 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateTimingScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1177 |     double score = 0.0;
 1178 |     
 1179 |     // Check if signal is during optimal trading hours
 1180 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1181 |     MqlDateTime dt;
 1182 |     TimeToStruct(current_time, dt);
 1183 |     
 1184 |     // Prefer signals during major trading sessions
 1185 |     if ((dt.hour >= 8 && dt.hour <= 12) ||   // London session
 1186 |         (dt.hour >= 13 && dt.hour <= 17)) {   // New York session
 1187 |         score += 0.5;
 1188 |     } else if (dt.hour >= 1 && dt.hour <= 7) {  // Asian session
 1189 |         score += 0.3;
 1190 |     } else {
 1191 |         score += 0.1; // Off-hours
 1192 |     }
 1193 |     
 1194 |     // Prefer signals at beginning of new bars
 1195 |     if (m_pContext->pTimeManager != NULL) {
 1196 |         if (m_pContext->pTimeManager->IsNewBar()) {
 1197 |             score += 0.3;
 1198 |         }
 1199 |     }
 1200 |     
 1201 |     // Avoid signals too close to previous signals
 1202 |     if (current_time - m_dtLastSignalTime > 300) { // 5 minutes minimum
 1203 |         score += 0.2;
 1204 |     }
 1205 |     
 1206 |     return MathMin(score, 1.0);
 1207 | }
 1208 | 
 1209 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1210 | //| Calculate Market Condition Score                                 |
 1211 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1212 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateMarketConditionScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1213 |     double score = 0.0;
 1214 |     
 1215 |     // Check spread conditions
 1216 |     double spread = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1217 |     double typical_spread = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID) * 0.0001; // Rough estimate
 1218 |     
 1219 |     if (spread <= typical_spread * 1.5) {
 1220 |         score += 0.4; // Good spread
 1221 |     } else if (spread <= typical_spread * 2.0) {
 1222 |         score += 0.2; // Acceptable spread
 1223 |     }
 1224 |     
 1225 |     // Check liquidity (simplified)
 1226 |     double tick_volume = (double)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME);
 1227 |     if (tick_volume > 100) {
 1228 |         score += 0.3; // Good liquidity
 1229 |     } else if (tick_volume > 50) {
 1230 |         score += 0.15; // Moderate liquidity
 1231 |     }
 1232 |     
 1233 |     // Market hours bonus
 1234 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1235 |     MqlDateTime dt;
 1236 |     TimeToStruct(current_time, dt);
 1237 |     
 1238 |     if (dt.day_of_week >= 1 && dt.day_of_week <= 5) { // Weekdays
 1239 |         if (dt.hour >= 8 && dt.hour <= 17) {
 1240 |             score += 0.3; // Prime trading hours
 1241 |         } else {
 1242 |             score += 0.1; // Off-hours
 1243 |         }
 1244 |     }
 1245 |     
 1246 |     return MathMin(score, 1.0);
 1247 | }
 1248 | 
 1249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1250 | //| Process Signal                                                   |
 1251 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1252 | void CSignalEngine::ProcessSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1253 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
 1254 |         return;
 1255 |     }
 1256 |     
 1257 |     // Calculate signal parameters
 1258 |     CalculateSignalParameters(signal);
 1259 |     
 1260 |     // Apply risk management
 1261 |     ApplyRiskManagement(signal);
 1262 |     
 1263 |     // Optimize entry timing
 1264 |     OptimizeEntryTiming(signal);
 1265 |     
 1266 |     // Set market context
 1267 |     signal.marketRegime = DetectMarketRegime();
 1268 |     signal.volatility = CalculateVolatilityIndex();
 1269 |     signal.spread = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1270 |     
 1271 |     // Calculate risk/reward ratio
 1272 |     if (signal.stopLoss != 0) {
 1273 |         double risk = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss);
 1274 |         double reward = MathAbs(signal.takeProfit - signal.entryPrice);
 1275 |         signal.riskRewardRatio = (risk > 0) ? reward / risk : 0.0;
 1276 |     }
 1277 |     
 1278 |     // Calculate expected pips
 1279 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1280 |     int digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
 1281 |     double pip_size = (digits == 5 || digits == 3) ? point * 10 : point;
 1282 |     
 1283 |     signal.expectedPips = MathAbs(signal.takeProfit - signal.entryPrice) / pip_size;
 1284 |     signal.maxRiskPips = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss) / pip_size;
 1285 |     
 1286 |     // Set urgency level based on signal strength and market conditions
 1287 |     if (signal.confidenceScore > 0.8) {
 1288 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 5;
 1289 |     } else if (signal.confidenceScore > 0.6) {
 1290 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 4;
 1291 |     } else if (signal.confidenceScore > 0.4) {
 1292 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 3;
 1293 |     } else {
 1294 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 2;
 1295 |     }
 1296 | }
 1297 | 
 1298 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1299 | //| Calculate Signal Parameters                                      |
 1300 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1301 | void CSignalEngine::CalculateSignalParameters(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1302 |     // Basic parameter calculation - already done in signal detection
 1303 |     // This method can be enhanced with more sophisticated calculations
 1304 | }
 1305 | 
 1306 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1307 | //| Apply Risk Management                                            |
 1308 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1309 | void CSignalEngine::ApplyRiskManagement(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1310 |     // Ensure minimum risk/reward ratio
 1311 |     if (signal.riskRewardRatio < 1.5) {
 1312 |         double risk = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss);
 1313 |         if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1314 |             signal.takeProfit = signal.entryPrice + (risk * 2.0);
 1315 |         } else {
 1316 |             signal.takeProfit = signal.entryPrice - (risk * 2.0);
 1317 |         }
 1318 |     }
 1319 |     
 1320 |     // Apply maximum risk limits
 1321 |     double max_risk_pips = 50.0; // Maximum 50 pips risk
 1322 |     double pip_size = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1323 |     if ((int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 5 || (int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 3) {
 1324 |         pip_size *= 10;
 1325 |     }
 1326 |     
 1327 |     double current_risk_pips = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss) / pip_size;
 1328 |     if (current_risk_pips > max_risk_pips) {
 1329 |         if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1330 |             signal.stopLoss = signal.entryPrice - (max_risk_pips * pip_size);
 1331 |         } else {
 1332 |             signal.stopLoss = signal.entryPrice + (max_risk_pips * pip_size);
 1333 |         }
 1334 |     }
 1335 | }
 1336 | 
 1337 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1338 | //| Optimize Entry Timing                                            |
 1339 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1340 | void CSignalEngine::OptimizeEntryTiming(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1341 |     // This could include more sophisticated timing optimization
 1342 |     // For now, we'll just set a reasonable expiry time
 1343 |     signal.expiryTime = signal.signalTime + 300; // 5 minutes
 1344 | }
 1345 | 
 1346 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1347 | //| Enhanced Validation Methods                                      |
 1348 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1349 | bool CSignalEngine::ValidateMarketConditions(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1350 |     // Check spread
 1351 |     double spread = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1352 |     double max_spread = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID) * 0.0005; // 0.05%
 1353 |     
 1354 |     if (spread > max_spread) {
 1355 |         return false;
 1356 |     }
 1357 |     
 1358 |     // Check trading hours
 1359 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1360 |     MqlDateTime dt;
 1361 |     TimeToStruct(current_time, dt);
 1362 |     
 1363 |     if (dt.day_of_week == 0 || dt.day_of_week == 6) {
 1364 |         return false; // No weekend trading
 1365 |     }
 1366 |     
 1367 |     return true;
 1368 | }
 1369 | 
 1370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

 1372 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1373 | bool CSignalEngine::ValidateRiskParameters(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1374 |     // Check minimum risk/reward ratio
 1375 |     if (signal.riskRewardRatio < 1.0) {
 1376 |         return false;
 1377 |     }
 1378 |     
 1379 |     // Check maximum risk
 1380 |     if (signal.maxRiskPips > 100.0) {
 1381 |         return false;
 1382 |     }
 1383 |     
 1384 |     return true;
 1385 | }

 1405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1406 | //| Utility Methods                                                  |
 1407 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1408 | double CSignalEngine::NormalizeScore(double value, double min_val, double max_val) {
 1409 |     if (max_val <= min_val) return 0.0;
 1410 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, (value - min_val) / (max_val - min_val)));
 1411 | }

 1416 | string CSignalEngine::SignalTypeToString(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal_type) {
 1417 |     switch (signal_type) {
 1418 |         case SIGNAL_BUY: return "BUY";
 1419 |         case SIGNAL_SELL: return "SELL";
 1420 |         default: return "NONE";
 1421 |     }
 1422 | }

 1425 | //| Strategy to String                                               |
 1426 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1427 | string CSignalEngine::StrategyToString(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy) {
 1428 |     switch (strategy) {
 1429 |         case STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND: return "PULLBACK_TREND";
 1430 |         case STRATEGY_SHALLOW_PULLBACK: return "SHALLOW_PULLBACK";
 1431 |         case STRATEGY_MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT: return "MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT";
 1432 |         case STRATEGY_MEAN_REVERSION: return "MEAN_REVERSION";
 1433 |         case STRATEGY_BREAKOUT: return "BREAKOUT";
 1434 |         default: return "UNDEFINED";
 1435 |     }
 1436 | }

 1441 | void CSignalEngine::LogSignalQuality(const SSignalQuality& quality) {
 1442 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1443 |         string message = StringFormat("Signal Quality - Overall: %.2f, Technical: %.2f, Timing: %.2f, Market: %.2f, Risk: %.2f",
 1444 |             quality.overallScore, quality.technicalScore, quality.timingScore, 
 1445 |             quality.marketConditionScore, quality.riskScore);
 1446 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(message, __FUNCTION__);
 1447 |     }
 1448 | }

 1454 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1455 | //| Is Uptrend                                                       |
 1456 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1457 | bool CSignalEngine::IsUptrend() {
 1458 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1459 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1460 |         return false;
 1461 |     }
 1462 |     
 1463 |     m_trendEMA = trend_ema;
 1464 |     m_pullbackEMA = pullback_ema;
 1465 |     m_rsiValue = rsi_value;
 1466 |     
 1467 |     return (pullback_ema > trend_ema);
 1468 | }
 1469 | 
 1470 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1471 | //| Is Downtrend                                                     |
 1472 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1473 | bool CSignalEngine::IsDowntrend() {
 1474 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1475 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1476 |         return false;
 1477 |     }
 1478 |     
 1479 |     m_trendEMA = trend_ema;
 1480 |     m_pullbackEMA = pullback_ema;
 1481 |     m_rsiValue = rsi_value;
 1482 |     
 1483 |     return (pullback_ema < trend_ema);
 1484 | }
 1485 | 
 1486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1487 | //| Is Pullback Condition                                            |
 1488 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1489 | bool CSignalEngine::IsPullbackCondition() {
 1490 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
 1491 |         return false;
 1492 |     }
 1493 |     
 1494 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
 1495 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
 1496 |     
 1497 |     // Check if price is near EMAs (pullback condition)
 1498 |     double ema_zone = MathAbs(m_pullbackEMA - m_trendEMA) * 0.5;
 1499 |     
 1500 |     return (MathAbs(current_bid - m_pullbackEMA) <= ema_zone || 
 1501 |             MathAbs(current_ask - m_pullbackEMA) <= ema_zone);
 1502 | }
 1503 | 
 1504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1505 | //| Is RSI Valid                                                     |
 1506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1507 | bool CSignalEngine::IsRSIValid(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal_type) {
 1508 |     if (signal_type == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1509 |         return (m_rsiValue > 30.0 && m_rsiValue < 70.0);
 1510 |     } else if (signal_type == SIGNAL_SELL) {
 1511 |         return (m_rsiValue > 30.0 && m_rsiValue < 70.0);
 1512 |     }
 1513 |     
 1514 |     return false;
 1515 | }
 1516 | 
 1517 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1518 | //| Get Enhanced Indicator Values                                    |
 1519 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1520 | bool CSignalEngine::GetEnhancedIndicatorValues(double values[]) {
 1521 |     ArrayResize(values, 10);
 1522 |     ArrayInitialize(values, 0.0);
 1523 |     
 1524 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1525 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1526 |         return false;
 1527 |     }
 1528 |     
 1529 |     values[0] = trend_ema;
 1530 |     values[1] = pullback_ema;
 1531 |     values[2] = rsi_value;
 1532 |     values[3] = atr_value;
 1533 |     values[4] = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 1534 |     values[5] = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
 1535 |     values[6] = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1536 |     values[7] = (double)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME);
 1537 |     values[8] = 0.0; // Placeholder for additional indicator
 1538 |     values[9] = 0.0; // Placeholder for additional indicator
 1539 |     
 1540 |     return true;
 1541 | }
 1542 | 
 1543 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1544 | //| Get Multi-Timeframe Values                                       |
 1545 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1546 | bool CSignalEngine::GetMultiTimeframeValues(double h1_values[], double h4_values[]) {
 1547 |     ArrayResize(h1_values, 5);
 1548 |     ArrayResize(h4_values, 5);
 1549 |     ArrayInitialize(h1_values, 0.0);
 1550 |     ArrayInitialize(h4_values, 0.0);
 1551 |     
 1552 |     // Get H1 values
 1553 |     double h1_ema_buffer[1], h1_rsi_buffer[1];
 1554 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hH1_EMA, 0, 1, 1, h1_ema_buffer) > 0) {
 1555 |         h1_values[0] = h1_ema_buffer[0];
 1556 |     }
 1557 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hH1_RSI, 0, 1, 1, h1_rsi_buffer) > 0) {
 1558 |         h1_values[1] = h1_rsi_buffer[0];
 1559 |     }
 1560 |     
 1561 |     // Get H4 values
 1562 |     double h4_ema_buffer[1], h4_rsi_buffer[1];
 1563 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hH4_EMA, 0, 1, 1, h4_ema_buffer) > 0) {
 1564 |         h4_values[0] = h4_ema_buffer[0];
 1565 |     }
 1566 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_hH4_RSI, 0, 1, 1, h4_rsi_buffer) > 0) {
 1567 |         h4_values[1] = h4_rsi_buffer[0];
 1568 |     }
 1569 |     
 1570 |     return true;
 1571 | }
