 1576 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1577 | //| Enhanced Methods Implementation (v14 Features)                  |
 1578 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1579 | 
 1580 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1581 | //| Check Pullback Signal                                           |
 1582 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1583 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckPullbackSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1584 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1585 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1586 |         return false;
 1587 |     }
 1588 |     
 1589 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
 1590 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
 1591 |     
 1592 |     if (current_bid == 0 || current_ask == 0) {
 1593 |         return false;
 1594 |     }
 1595 |     
 1596 |     // Enhanced pullback logic with better trend detection
 1597 |     bool is_uptrend = (pullback_ema > trend_ema);
 1598 |     bool is_downtrend = (pullback_ema < trend_ema);
 1599 |     
 1600 |     const double RSI_OVERBOUGHT = 70.0;
 1601 |     const double RSI_OVERSOLD = 30.0;
 1602 |     
 1603 |     // Buy Signal: Pullback in uptrend
 1604 |     if (is_uptrend && 
 1605 |         current_bid <= pullback_ema && 
 1606 |         current_bid > trend_ema &&  // Above long-term trend
 1607 |         rsi_value > RSI_OVERSOLD && 
 1608 |         rsi_value < 60.0) {  // Not overbought
 1609 |         
 1610 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1611 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
 1612 |         signal.stopLoss = trend_ema - (atr_value * 0.5);
 1613 |         signal.takeProfit = current_ask + (current_ask - signal.stopLoss) * 2.0; // 1:2 RR
 1614 |         signal.signalReason = "Pullback to EMA in uptrend";
 1615 |         
 1616 |         return true;
 1617 |     }
 1618 |     // Sell Signal: Pullback in downtrend
 1619 |     else if (is_downtrend && 
 1620 |              current_ask >= pullback_ema && 
 1621 |              current_ask < trend_ema &&  // Below long-term trend
 1622 |              rsi_value < RSI_OVERBOUGHT && 
 1623 |              rsi_value > 40.0) {  // Not oversold
 1624 |         
 1625 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1626 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
 1627 |         signal.stopLoss = trend_ema + (atr_value * 0.5);
 1628 |         signal.takeProfit = current_bid - (signal.stopLoss - current_bid) * 2.0; // 1:2 RR
 1629 |         signal.signalReason = "Pullback to EMA in downtrend";
 1630 |         
 1631 |         return true;
 1632 |     }
 1633 |     
 1634 |     return false;
 1635 | }
 1636 | 
 1637 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1638 | //| Check Momentum Signal                                            |
 1639 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1640 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckMomentumSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1641 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1642 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1643 |         return false;
 1644 |     }
 1645 |     
 1646 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
 1647 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
 1648 |     
 1649 |     // Momentum signals require strong RSI momentum
 1650 |     if (rsi_value > 70.0 && pullback_ema > trend_ema) {
 1651 |         // Strong bullish momentum
 1652 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1653 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
 1654 |         signal.stopLoss = pullback_ema;
 1655 |         signal.takeProfit = current_ask + (atr_value * 3.0);
 1656 |         signal.signalReason = "Strong bullish momentum breakout";
 1657 |         return true;
 1658 |     }
 1659 |     else if (rsi_value < 30.0 && pullback_ema < trend_ema) {
 1660 |         // Strong bearish momentum
 1661 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1662 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
 1663 |         signal.stopLoss = pullback_ema;
 1664 |         signal.takeProfit = current_bid - (atr_value * 3.0);
 1665 |         signal.signalReason = "Strong bearish momentum breakout";
 1666 |         return true;
 1667 |     }
 1668 |     
 1669 |     return false;
 1670 | }
 1671 | 
 1672 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1673 | //| Check Reversal Signal                                            |
 1674 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1675 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckReversalSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1676 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1677 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1678 |         return false;
 1679 |     }
 1680 |     
 1681 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
 1682 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
 1683 |     
 1684 |     // Look for reversal signals at extreme RSI levels
 1685 |     if (rsi_value > 80.0 && current_ask > pullback_ema) {
 1686 |         // Potential bearish reversal
 1687 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1688 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
 1689 |         signal.stopLoss = current_ask + (atr_value * 1.0);
 1690 |         signal.takeProfit = pullback_ema;
 1691 |         signal.signalReason = "Overbought reversal signal";
 1692 |         return true;
 1693 |     }
 1694 |     else if (rsi_value < 20.0 && current_bid < pullback_ema) {
 1695 |         // Potential bullish reversal
 1696 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1697 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
 1698 |         signal.stopLoss = current_bid - (atr_value * 1.0);
 1699 |         signal.takeProfit = pullback_ema;
 1700 |         signal.signalReason = "Oversold reversal signal";
 1701 |         return true;
 1702 |     }
 1703 |     
 1704 |     return false;
 1705 | }
 1706 | 
 1707 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1708 | //| Check Breakout Signal                                            |
 1709 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1710 | bool CSignalEngine::CheckBreakoutSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1711 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1712 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1713 |         return false;
 1714 |     }
 1715 |     
 1716 |     double current_bid = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetBid();
 1717 |     double current_ask = m_pContext->pSymbolManager->GetAsk();
 1718 |     
 1719 |     // Check for breakout above resistance or below support
 1720 |     double resistance = MathMax(trend_ema, pullback_ema);
 1721 |     double support = MathMin(trend_ema, pullback_ema);
 1722 |     
 1723 |     if (current_ask > resistance + (atr_value * 0.2) && rsi_value > 50.0) {
 1724 |         // Bullish breakout
 1725 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1726 |         signal.entryPrice = current_ask;
 1727 |         signal.stopLoss = resistance;
 1728 |         signal.takeProfit = current_ask + (atr_value * 2.0);
 1729 |         signal.signalReason = "Bullish breakout above resistance";
 1730 |         return true;
 1731 |     }
 1732 |     else if (current_bid < support - (atr_value * 0.2) && rsi_value < 50.0) {
 1733 |         // Bearish breakout
 1734 |         signal.signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1735 |         signal.entryPrice = current_bid;
 1736 |         signal.stopLoss = support;
 1737 |         signal.takeProfit = current_bid - (atr_value * 2.0);
 1738 |         signal.signalReason = "Bearish breakout below support";
 1739 |         return true;
 1740 |     }
 1741 |     
 1742 |     return false;
 1743 | }
 1744 | 
 1745 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1746 | //| Calculate Signal Quality                                         |
 1747 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1748 | SSignalQuality CSignalEngine::CalculateSignalQuality(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1749 |     SSignalQuality quality;
 1750 |     quality.Clear();
 1751 |     
 1752 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
 1753 |         return quality;
 1754 |     }
 1755 |     
 1756 |     // Calculate individual quality components
 1757 |     quality.technicalScore = CalculateTechnicalScore(signal);
 1758 |     quality.timingScore = CalculateTimingScore(signal);
 1759 |     quality.marketConditionScore = CalculateMarketConditionScore(signal);
 1760 |     quality.riskScore = (signal.riskRewardRatio >= 2.0) ? 1.0 : signal.riskRewardRatio / 2.0;
 1761 |     quality.consistencyScore = 0.8; // Placeholder - would need historical consistency data
 1762 |     
 1763 |     // Calculate overall score (weighted average)
 1764 |     double weights[] = {0.3, 0.2, 0.25, 0.15, 0.1};
 1765 |     double scores[] = {
 1766 |         quality.technicalScore,
 1767 |         quality.timingScore,
 1768 |         quality.marketConditionScore,
 1769 |         quality.riskScore,
 1770 |         quality.consistencyScore
 1771 |     };
 1772 |     
 1773 |     quality.overallScore = 0.0;
 1774 |     for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
 1775 |         quality.overallScore += scores[i] * weights[i];
 1776 |     }
 1777 |     
 1778 |     return quality;
 1779 | }
 1780 | 
 1781 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1782 | //| Calculate Confidence Score                                       |
 1783 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1784 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateConfidenceScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1785 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
 1786 |         return 0.0;
 1787 |     }
 1788 |     
 1789 |     double confidence = 0.0;
 1790 |     
 1791 |     // Base confidence from signal quality
 1792 |     confidence += m_SignalQuality.overallScore * 0.5;
 1793 |     
 1794 |     // Multi-timeframe alignment bonus
 1795 |     if (signal.mtfAlignment) {
 1796 |         confidence += signal.mtfStrength * 0.2;
 1797 |     }
 1798 |     
 1799 |     // Risk/reward ratio contribution
 1800 |     if (signal.riskRewardRatio >= 2.0) {
 1801 |         confidence += 0.15;
 1802 |     } else if (signal.riskRewardRatio >= 1.5) {
 1803 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1804 |     }
 1805 |     
 1806 |     // Market regime bonus
 1807 |     if (signal.marketRegime != REGIME_UNKNOWN) {
 1808 |         confidence += 0.1;
 1809 |     }
 1810 |     
 1811 |     // AssetDNA integration bonus
 1812 |     if (m_UseAssetDNA && m_pContext->pAssetDNA != NULL) {
 1813 |         if (m_pContext->pAssetDNA->IsStrategyRecommended(signal.strategy)) {
 1814 |             confidence += 0.05;
 1815 |         }
 1816 |     }
 1817 |     
 1818 |     return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
 1819 | }
 1820 | 
 1821 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1822 | //| Calculate Technical Score                                        |
 1823 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1824 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateTechnicalScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1825 |     double score = 0.0;
 1826 |     
 1827 |     double trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value;
 1828 |     if (!GetIndicatorValues(trend_ema, pullback_ema, rsi_value, atr_value)) {
 1829 |         return 0.0;
 1830 |     }
 1831 |     
 1832 |     // EMA alignment score
 1833 |     double ema_separation = MathAbs(pullback_ema - trend_ema) / trend_ema;
 1834 |     if (ema_separation > 0.005) score += 0.3; // 0.5% separation minimum
 1835 |     
 1836 |     // RSI score based on signal type
 1837 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1838 |         if (rsi_value >= 30 && rsi_value <= 60) score += 0.4;
 1839 |         else if (rsi_value > 60 && rsi_value <= 70) score += 0.2;
 1840 |     } else if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
 1841 |         if (rsi_value >= 40 && rsi_value <= 70) score += 0.4;
 1842 |         else if (rsi_value >= 30 && rsi_value < 40) score += 0.2;
 1843 |     }
 1844 |     
 1845 |     // Volatility score (moderate volatility is preferred)
 1846 |     double atr_percent = (atr_value / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) * 100;
 1847 |     if (atr_percent >= 0.1 && atr_percent <= 0.5) score += 0.3;
 1848 |     else if (atr_percent > 0.5 && atr_percent <= 1.0) score += 0.15;
 1849 |     
 1850 |     return MathMin(score, 1.0);
 1851 | }
 1852 | 
 1853 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1854 | //| Calculate Timing Score                                           |
 1855 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1856 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateTimingScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1857 |     double score = 0.0;
 1858 |     
 1859 |     // Check if signal is during optimal trading hours
 1860 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1861 |     MqlDateTime dt;
 1862 |     TimeToStruct(current_time, dt);
 1863 |     
 1864 |     // Prefer signals during major trading sessions
 1865 |     if ((dt.hour >= 8 && dt.hour <= 12) ||   // London session
 1866 |         (dt.hour >= 13 && dt.hour <= 17)) {   // New York session
 1867 |         score += 0.5;
 1868 |     } else if (dt.hour >= 1 && dt.hour <= 7) {  // Asian session
 1869 |         score += 0.3;
 1870 |     } else {
 1871 |         score += 0.1; // Off-hours
 1872 |     }
 1873 |     
 1874 |     // Prefer signals at beginning of new bars
 1875 |     if (m_pContext->pTimeManager != NULL) {
 1876 |         if (m_pContext->pTimeManager->IsNewBar()) {
 1877 |             score += 0.3;
 1878 |         }
 1879 |     }
 1880 |     
 1881 |     // Avoid signals too close to previous signals
 1882 |     if (current_time - m_dtLastSignalTime > 300) { // 5 minutes minimum
 1883 |         score += 0.2;
 1884 |     }
 1885 |     
 1886 |     return MathMin(score, 1.0);
 1887 | }
 1888 | 
 1889 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1890 | //| Calculate Market Condition Score                                 |
 1891 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1892 | double CSignalEngine::CalculateMarketConditionScore(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 1893 |     double score = 0.0;
 1894 |     
 1895 |     // Check spread conditions
 1896 |     double spread = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1897 |     double typical_spread = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID) * 0.0001; // Rough estimate
 1898 |     
 1899 |     if (spread <= typical_spread * 1.5) {
 1900 |         score += 0.4; // Good spread
 1901 |     } else if (spread <= typical_spread * 2.0) {
 1902 |         score += 0.2; // Acceptable spread
 1903 |     }
 1904 |     
 1905 |     // Check liquidity (simplified)
 1906 |     double tick_volume = (double)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME);
 1907 |     if (tick_volume > 100) {
 1908 |         score += 0.3; // Good liquidity
 1909 |     } else if (tick_volume > 50) {
 1910 |         score += 0.15; // Moderate liquidity
 1911 |     }
 1912 |     
 1913 |     // Market hours bonus
 1914 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 1915 |     MqlDateTime dt;
 1916 |     TimeToStruct(current_time, dt);
 1917 |     
 1918 |     if (dt.day_of_week >= 1 && dt.day_of_week <= 5) { // Weekdays
 1919 |         if (dt.hour >= 8 && dt.hour <= 17) {
 1920 |             score += 0.3; // Prime trading hours
 1921 |         } else {
 1922 |             score += 0.1; // Off-hours
 1923 |         }
 1924 |     }
 1925 |     
 1926 |     return MathMin(score, 1.0);
 1927 | }
 1928 | 
 1929 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1930 | //| Process Signal                                                   |
 1931 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1932 | void CSignalEngine::ProcessSignal(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1933 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
 1934 |         return;
 1935 |     }
 1936 |     
 1937 |     // Calculate signal parameters
 1938 |     CalculateSignalParameters(signal);
 1939 |     
 1940 |     // Apply risk management
 1941 |     ApplyRiskManagement(signal);
 1942 |     
 1943 |     // Optimize entry timing
 1944 |     OptimizeEntryTiming(signal);
 1945 |     
 1946 |     // Set market context
 1947 |     signal.marketRegime = DetectMarketRegime();
 1948 |     signal.volatility = CalculateVolatilityIndex();
 1949 |     signal.spread = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1950 |     
 1951 |     // Calculate risk/reward ratio
 1952 |     if (signal.stopLoss != 0) {
 1953 |         double risk = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss);
 1954 |         double reward = MathAbs(signal.takeProfit - signal.entryPrice);
 1955 |         signal.riskRewardRatio = (risk > 0) ? reward / risk : 0.0;
 1956 |     }
 1957 |     
 1958 |     // Calculate expected pips
 1959 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 1960 |     int digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
 1961 |     double pip_size = (digits == 5 || digits == 3) ? point * 10 : point;
 1962 |     
 1963 |     signal.expectedPips = MathAbs(signal.takeProfit - signal.entryPrice) / pip_size;
 1964 |     signal.maxRiskPips = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss) / pip_size;
 1965 |     
 1966 |     // Set urgency level based on signal strength and market conditions
 1967 |     if (signal.confidenceScore > 0.8) {
 1968 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 5;
 1969 |     } else if (signal.confidenceScore > 0.6) {
 1970 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 4;
 1971 |     } else if (signal.confidenceScore > 0.4) {
 1972 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 3;
 1973 |     } else {
 1974 |         signal.urgencyLevel = 2;
 1975 |     }
 1976 | }
 1977 | 
 1978 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1979 | //| Calculate Signal Parameters                                      |
 1980 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1981 | void CSignalEngine::CalculateSignalParameters(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1982 |     // Basic parameter calculation - already done in signal detection
 1983 |     // This method can be enhanced with more sophisticated calculations
 1984 | }
 1985 | 
 1986 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1987 | //| Apply Risk Management                                            |
 1988 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1989 | void CSignalEngine::ApplyRiskManagement(SSignalContext& signal) {
 1990 |     // Ensure minimum risk/reward ratio
 1991 |     if (signal.riskRewardRatio < 1.5) {
 1992 |         double risk = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss);
 1993 |         if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1994 |             signal.takeProfit = signal.entryPrice + (risk * 2.0);
 1995 |         } else {
 1996 |             signal.takeProfit = signal.entryPrice - (risk * 2.0);
 1997 |         }
 1998 |     }
 1999 |     
 2000 |     // Apply maximum risk limits
 2001 |     double max_risk_pips = 50.0; // Maximum 50 pips risk
 2002 |     double pip_size = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 2003 |     if ((int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 5 || (int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 3) {
 2004 |         pip_size *= 10;
 2005 |     }
 2006 |     
 2007 |     double current_risk_pips = MathAbs(signal.entryPrice - signal.stopLoss) / pip_size;
 2008 |     if (current_risk_pips > max_risk_pips) {
 2009 |         if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 2010 |             signal.stopLoss = signal.entryPrice - (max_risk_pips * pip_size);
 2011 |         } else {
 2012 |             signal.stopLoss = signal.entryPrice + (max_risk_pips * pip_size);
 2013 |         }
 2014 |     }
 2015 | }
 2016 | 
 2017 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2018 | //| Optimize Entry Timing                                            |
 2019 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2020 | void CSignalEngine::OptimizeEntryTiming(SSignalContext& signal) {
 2021 |     // This could include more sophisticated timing optimization
 2022 |     // For now, we'll just set a reasonable expiry time
 2023 |     signal.expiryTime = signal.signalTime + 300; // 5 minutes
 2024 | }
 2025 | 
 2026 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2027 | //| Enhanced Validation Methods                                      |
 2028 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2029 | bool CSignalEngine::ValidateMarketConditions(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 2030 |     // Check spread
 2031 |     double spread = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
 2032 |     double max_spread = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID) * 0.0005; // 0.05%
 2033 |     
 2034 |     if (spread > max_spread) {
 2035 |         return false;
 2036 |     }
 2037 |     
 2038 |     // Check trading hours
 2039 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
 2040 |     MqlDateTime dt;
 2041 |     TimeToStruct(current_time, dt);
 2042 |     
 2043 |     if (dt.day_of_week == 0 || dt.day_of_week == 6) {
 2044 |         return false; // No weekend trading
 2045 |     }
 2046 |     
 2047 |     return true;
 2048 | }
 2049 | 
 2050 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2051 | //| Validate Risk Parameters                                         |
 2052 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2053 | bool CSignalEngine::ValidateRiskParameters(const SSignalContext& signal) {
 2054 |     // Check minimum risk/reward ratio
 2055 |     if (signal.riskRewardRatio < 1.0) {
 2056 |         return false;
 2057 |     }
 2058 |     
 2059 |     // Check maximum risk
 2060 |     if (signal.maxRiskPips > 100.0) {
 2061 |         return false;
 2062 |     }
 2063 |     
 2064 |     return true;
 2065 | }

 2085 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2086 | //| Utility Methods                                                  |
 2087 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2088 | double CSignalEngine::NormalizeScore(double value, double min_val, double max_val) {
 2089 |     if (max_val <= min_val) return 0.0;
 2090 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, (value - min_val) / (max_val - min_val)));
 2091 | }

 2098 |         case SIGNAL_BUY: return "BUY";
 2099 |         case SIGNAL_SELL: return "SELL";
 2100 |         default: return "NONE";
 2101 |     }

 2107 | string CSignalEngine::StrategyToString(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy) {
 2108 |     switch (strategy) {
 2109 |         case STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND: return "PULLBACK_TREND";
 2110 |         case STRATEGY_SHALLOW_PULLBACK: return "SHALLOW_PULLBACK";
 2111 |         case STRATEGY_MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT: return "MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT";
 2112 |         case STRATEGY_MEAN_REVERSION: return "MEAN_REVERSION";
 2113 |         case STRATEGY_BREAKOUT: return "BREAKOUT";
 2114 |         default: return "UNDEFINED";
 2115 |     }
 2116 | }

 2122 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 2123 |         string message = StringFormat("Signal Quality - Overall: %.2f, Technical: %.2f, Timing: %.2f, Market: %.2f, Risk: %.2f",
 2124 |             quality.overallScore, quality.technicalScore, quality.timingScore, 
 2125 |             quality.marketConditionScore, quality.riskScore);
 2126 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(message, __FUNCTION__);
 2127 |     }

   35 |         EntryPrice = 0.0;
   36 |         StopLoss = 0.0;

  201 | bool CSignalManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  202 |     if (context == NULL) {
  203 |         Print("[SIGNAL] ERROR: Invalid context provided");
  204 |         return false;
  205 |     }
  206 |

  208 |

  211 |     m_Config.MinRiskReward = context.InputParams.MinRiskReward;
  212 |     m_Config.UseTimeFilter = context.InputParams.UseTradingHours;
  213 |     m_Config.UseNewsFilter = context.InputParams.UseNewsFilter;
  214 |     
  215 |     // Initialize technical indicators
  216 |     UpdateTechnicalIndicators();
  217 |     
  218 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  219 |     Print("[SIGNAL] Signal Manager initialized successfully");
  220 |     return true;
  221 | }

  229 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  230 |     }

  233 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  234 | //| Main Update Method                                               |
  235 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  236 | void CSignalManager::Update() {
  237 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  238 |     
  239 |     // Update technical indicators
  240 |     UpdateTechnicalIndicators();
  241 |     
  242 |     // Reset daily signal count if new day
  243 |     datetime currentDay = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_D1, 0);
  244 |     if (currentDay != m_LastDayTracked) {
  245 |         m_DailySignalCount = 0;
  246 |         m_LastDayTracked = currentDay;
  247 |     }
  248 | }
  249 | 
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | //| Check for Signals                                               |
  252 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  253 | SSignalResult CSignalManager::CheckForSignals() {
  254 |     SSignalResult signal;
  255 |     signal.Reset();
  256 |     
  257 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !CanGenerateSignal()) {
  258 |         return signal;
  259 |     }
  260 |     
  261 |     // Generate signal based on configured strategy
  262 |     if (m_pContext != NULL) {
  263 |         signal = GenerateSignal(m_pContext.InputParams.Strategy);
  264 |     }
  265 |     
  266 |     // Validate and process signal
  267 |     if (ValidateSignal(signal)) {
  268 |         signal.Confidence = CalculateSignalConfidence(signal);
  269 |         
  270 |         if (signal.Confidence >= m_Config.MinConfidence) {
  271 |             // Store in history
  272 |             if (m_SignalCount < MAX_SIGNAL_HISTORY) {
  273 |                 m_SignalHistory[m_SignalCount] = signal;
  274 |                 m_SignalCount++;
  275 |             }
  276 |             
  277 |             m_LastSignal = signal;
  278 |             m_LastSignalTime = TimeCurrent();
  279 |             m_DailySignalCount++;
  280 |             
  281 |             Print("[SIGNAL] New signal generated: ", EnumToString(signal.Direction), 
  282 |                   " with confidence ", signal.Confidence);
  283 |         }
  284 |     }
  285 |     
  286 |     return signal;
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | //| Generate Signal Based on Strategy                               |
  291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  292 | SSignalResult CSignalManager::GenerateSignal(ETradingStrategy strategy) {
  293 |     SSignalResult signal;
  294 |     signal.Reset();
  295 |     
  296 |     switch (strategy) {
  297 |         case STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND:
  298 |             signal = GeneratePullbackSignal();
  299 |             break;
  300 |         case STRATEGY_BREAKOUT:
  301 |             signal = GenerateBreakoutSignal();
  302 |             break;
  303 |         case STRATEGY_MEAN_REVERSION:
  304 |             signal = GenerateMeanReversionSignal();
  305 |             break;
  306 |         default:
  307 |             Print("[SIGNAL] Unknown strategy: ", EnumToString(strategy));
  308 |             break;
  309 |     }
  310 |     
  311 |     return signal;
  312 | }
  313 | 
  314 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  315 | //| Generate Pullback Signal                                         |
  316 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  317 | SSignalResult CSignalManager::GeneratePullbackSignal() {
  318 |     SSignalResult signal;
  319 |     signal.Reset();
  320 |     
  321 |     if (ArraySize(m_MA_Fast) < 3 || ArraySize(m_MA_Slow) < 3 || ArraySize(m_RSI) < 3) {
  322 |         return signal;
  323 |     }
  324 |     
  325 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  326 |     double ma_fast_current = m_MA_Fast[0];
  327 |     double ma_slow_current = m_MA_Slow[0];
  328 |     double rsi_current = m_RSI[0];
  329 |     
  330 |     // Check for bullish pullback
  331 |     if (IsBullishPullback()) {
  332 |         signal.Direction = DIRECTION_LONG;
  333 |         signal.EntryPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  334 |         signal.StopLoss = CalculateStopLoss(DIRECTION_LONG, signal.EntryPrice);
  335 |         signal.TakeProfit = CalculateTakeProfit(DIRECTION_LONG, signal.EntryPrice, signal.StopLoss);
  336 |         signal.Reason = "Bullish pullback in uptrend";
  337 |         signal.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  338 |         signal.IsValid = true;
  339 |         signal.Priority = 7;
  340 |     }
  341 |     // Check for bearish pullback
  342 |     else if (IsBearishPullback()) {
  343 |         signal.Direction = DIRECTION_SHORT;
  344 |         signal.EntryPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  345 |         signal.StopLoss = CalculateStopLoss(DIRECTION_SHORT, signal.EntryPrice);
  346 |         signal.TakeProfit = CalculateTakeProfit(DIRECTION_SHORT, signal.EntryPrice, signal.StopLoss);
  347 |         signal.Reason = "Bearish pullback in downtrend";
  348 |         signal.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  349 |         signal.IsValid = true;
  350 |         signal.Priority = 7;
  351 |     }
  352 |     
  353 |     return signal;
  354 | }
  355 | 
  356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 | //| Generate Breakout Signal                                         |
  358 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  359 | SSignalResult CSignalManager::GenerateBreakoutSignal() {
  360 |     SSignalResult signal;
  361 |     signal.Reset();
  362 |     
  363 |     // Simplified breakout logic
  364 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  365 |     double high_1 = iHigh(_Symbol, _Period, 1);
  366 |     double high_2 = iHigh(_Symbol, _Period, 2);
  367 |     double low_1 = iLow(_Symbol, _Period, 1);
  368 |     double low_2 = iLow(_Symbol, _Period, 2);
  369 |     
  370 |     // Bullish breakout
  371 |     if (currentPrice > high_1 && high_1 > high_2) {
  372 |         signal.Direction = DIRECTION_LONG;
  373 |         signal.EntryPrice = currentPrice;
  374 |         signal.StopLoss = low_1;
  375 |         signal.TakeProfit = currentPrice + (currentPrice - low_1) * 2.0; // 2:1 RR
  376 |         signal.Reason = "Bullish breakout detected";
  377 |         signal.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  378 |         signal.IsValid = true;
  379 |         signal.Priority = 8;
  380 |     }
  381 |     // Bearish breakout
  382 |     else if (currentPrice < low_1 && low_1 < low_2) {
  383 |         signal.Direction = DIRECTION_SHORT;
  384 |         signal.EntryPrice = currentPrice;
  385 |         signal.StopLoss = high_1;
  386 |         signal.TakeProfit = currentPrice - (high_1 - currentPrice) * 2.0; // 2:1 RR
  387 |         signal.Reason = "Bearish breakout detected";
  388 |         signal.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  389 |         signal.IsValid = true;
  390 |         signal.Priority = 8;
  391 |     }
  392 |     
  393 |     return signal;
  394 | }
  395 | 
  396 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  397 | //| Generate Mean Reversion Signal                                   |
  398 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  399 | SSignalResult CSignalManager::GenerateMeanReversionSignal() {
  400 |     SSignalResult signal;
  401 |     signal.Reset();
  402 |     
  403 |     if (ArraySize(m_RSI) < 3) return signal;
  404 |     
  405 |     double rsi_current = m_RSI[0];
  406 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  407 |     
  408 |     // Oversold condition
  409 |     if (rsi_current < 30.0) {
  410 |         signal.Direction = DIRECTION_LONG;
  411 |         signal.EntryPrice = currentPrice;
  412 |         signal.StopLoss = currentPrice - GetCurrentVolatility() * 2.0;
  413 |         signal.TakeProfit = currentPrice + GetCurrentVolatility() * 3.0;
  414 |         signal.Reason = "Mean reversion - oversold";
  415 |         signal.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  416 |         signal.IsValid = true;
  417 |         signal.Priority = 5;
  418 |     }
  419 |     // Overbought condition
  420 |     else if (rsi_current > 70.0) {
  421 |         signal.Direction = DIRECTION_SHORT;
  422 |         signal.EntryPrice = currentPrice;
  423 |         signal.StopLoss = currentPrice + GetCurrentVolatility() * 2.0;
  424 |         signal.TakeProfit = currentPrice - GetCurrentVolatility() * 3.0;
  425 |         signal.Reason = "Mean reversion - overbought";
  426 |         signal.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  427 |         signal.IsValid = true;
  428 |         signal.Priority = 5;
  429 |     }
  430 |     
  431 |     return signal;
  432 | }
  433 | 
  434 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  435 | //| Check if Bullish Pullback                                       |
  436 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  437 | bool CSignalManager::IsBullishPullback() {
  438 |     if (ArraySize(m_MA_Fast) < 5 || ArraySize(m_MA_Slow) < 5 || ArraySize(m_RSI) < 5) {
  439 |         return false;
  440 |     }
  441 |     
  442 |     // Check if overall trend is up
  443 |     bool trendUp = m_MA_Fast[0] > m_MA_Slow[0] && m_MA_Fast[1] > m_MA_Slow[1];
  444 |     
  445 |     // Check for pullback (price coming back to fast MA)
  446 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  447 |     double previousPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 1);
  448 |     
  449 |     bool pullback = (currentPrice < m_MA_Fast[0] && previousPrice > m_MA_Fast[1]) ||
  450 |                     (currentPrice <= m_MA_Fast[0] && m_RSI[0] < 50.0 && m_RSI[1] > 50.0);
  451 |     
  452 |     // Check for bounce signal
  453 |     bool bounceSignal = currentPrice > iOpen(_Symbol, _Period, 0); // Current candle is green
  454 |     
  455 |     return trendUp && pullback && bounceSignal;
  456 | }
  457 | 
  458 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  459 | //| Check if Bearish Pullback                                       |
  460 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  461 | bool CSignalManager::IsBearishPullback() {
  462 |     if (ArraySize(m_MA_Fast) < 5 || ArraySize(m_MA_Slow) < 5 || ArraySize(m_RSI) < 5) {
  463 |         return false;
  464 |     }
  465 |     
  466 |     // Check if overall trend is down
  467 |     bool trendDown = m_MA_Fast[0] < m_MA_Slow[0] && m_MA_Fast[1] < m_MA_Slow[1];
  468 |     
  469 |     // Check for pullback (price coming back to fast MA)
  470 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 0);
  471 |     double previousPrice = iClose(_Symbol, _Period, 1);
  472 |     
  473 |     bool pullback = (currentPrice > m_MA_Fast[0] && previousPrice < m_MA_Fast[1]) ||
  474 |                     (currentPrice >= m_MA_Fast[0] && m_RSI[0] > 50.0 && m_RSI[1] < 50.0);
  475 |     
  476 |     // Check for rejection signal
  477 |     bool rejectionSignal = currentPrice < iOpen(_Symbol, _Period, 0); // Current candle is red
  478 |     
  479 |     return trendDown && pullback && rejectionSignal;
  480 | }
  481 | 
  482 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  483 | //| Calculate Stop Loss                                              |
  484 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  485 | double CSignalManager::CalculateStopLoss(ESignalDirection direction, double entryPrice) {
  486 |     double atr = GetCurrentVolatility();
  487 |     double stopDistance = atr * 2.0; // 2 ATR stop loss
  488 |     
  489 |     if (direction == DIRECTION_LONG) {
  490 |         return entryPrice - stopDistance;
  491 |     } else {
  492 |         return entryPrice + stopDistance;
  493 |     }
  494 | }
  495 | 
  496 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  497 | //| Calculate Take Profit                                            |
  498 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  499 | double CSignalManager::CalculateTakeProfit(ESignalDirection direction, double entryPrice, double stopLoss) {
  500 |     double stopDistance = MathAbs(entryPrice - stopLoss);
  501 |     double targetDistance = stopDistance * m_Config.MinRiskReward; // Use configured RR ratio
  502 |     
  503 |     if (direction == DIRECTION_LONG) {
  504 |         return entryPrice + targetDistance;
  505 |     } else {
  506 |         return entryPrice - targetDistance;
  507 |     }
  508 | }
  509 | 
  510 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  511 | //| Update Technical Indicators                                      |
  512 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  513 | void CSignalManager::UpdateTechnicalIndicators() {
  514 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) return;
  515 |     
  516 |     // Update moving averages
  517 |     for (int i = 0; i < INDICATOR_BUFFER_SIZE; i++) {
  518 |         m_MA_Fast[i] = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, m_pContext.InputParams.EMA_Fast, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE, i);
  519 |         m_MA_Slow[i] = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, m_pContext.InputParams.EMA_Slow, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE, i);
  520 |         m_RSI[i] = iRSI(_Symbol, _Period, m_pContext.InputParams.RSI_Period, PRICE_CLOSE, i);
  521 |         m_ATR[i] = iATR(_Symbol, _Period, m_pContext.InputParams.ATR_Period, i);
  522 |     }
  523 | }
  524 | 
  525 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  526 | //| Validate Signal                                                  |
  527 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  528 | bool CSignalManager::ValidateSignal(const SSignalResult& signal) {
  529 |     if (!signal.IsValid) return false;
  530 |     
  531 |     // Check direction filter
  532 |     if (signal.Direction == DIRECTION_LONG && !m_Config.EnableBuySignals) return false;
  533 |     if (signal.Direction == DIRECTION_SHORT && !m_Config.EnableSellSignals) return false;
  534 |     
  535 |     // Check risk/reward ratio
  536 |     if (signal.StopLoss != 0 && signal.TakeProfit != 0) {
  537 |         double risk = MathAbs(signal.EntryPrice - signal.StopLoss);
  538 |         double reward = MathAbs(signal.TakeProfit - signal.EntryPrice);
  539 |         signal.RiskReward = (risk > 0) ? reward / risk : 0.0;
  540 |         
  541 |         if (signal.RiskReward < m_Config.MinRiskReward) return false;
  542 |     }
  543 |     
  544 |     // Check filters
  545 |     if (!CheckSignalFilters()) return false;
  546 |     
  547 |     return true;
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | //| Calculate Signal Confidence                                      |
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | double CSignalManager::CalculateSignalConfidence(const SSignalResult& signal) {
  554 |     double confidence = 0.5; // Base confidence
  555 |     
  556 |     // Add confidence based on trend strength
  557 |     double trendStrength = GetCurrentTrend();
  558 |     confidence += MathAbs(trendStrength) * 0.2;
  559 |     
  560 |     // Add confidence based on signal priority
  561 |     confidence += signal.Priority * 0.03;
  562 |     
  563 |     // Add confidence based on risk/reward ratio
  564 |     if (signal.RiskReward > 2.0) {
  565 |         confidence += 0.1;
  566 |     }
  567 |     
  568 |     // Reduce confidence for high volatility
  569 |     double volatility = GetCurrentVolatility();
  570 |     if (volatility > SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 100) {
  571 |         confidence -= 0.1;
  572 |     }
  573 |     
  574 |     // Ensure confidence is within bounds
  575 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, confidence));
  576 | }
  577 | 
  578 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  579 | //| Check Signal Filters                                             |
  580 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  581 | bool CSignalManager::CheckSignalFilters() {
  582 |     // Time filter
  583 |     if (m_Config.UseTimeFilter) {
  584 |         // Simplified - would check trading hours
  585 |         MqlDateTime dt;
  586 |         TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  587 |         if (dt.hour < 8 || dt.hour > 18) return false;
  588 |     }
  589 |     
  590 |     // Spread filter
  591 |     if (m_Config.UseSpreadFilter) {
  592 |         double spread = (SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) / _Point;
  593 |         if (spread > 5.0) return false; // Max 5 pip spread
  594 |     }
  595 |     
  596 |     // Daily signal limit
  597 |     if (m_DailySignalCount >= m_Config.MaxSignalsPerDay) return false;
  598 |     
  599 |     // Cooldown period
  600 |     if (TimeCurrent() - m_LastSignalTime < m_Config.SignalCooldownMinutes * 60) return false;
  601 |     
  602 |     return true;
  603 | }
  604 | 
  605 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  606 | //| Check if Can Generate Signal                                     |
  607 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  608 | bool CSignalManager::CanGenerateSignal() {
  609 |     return m_bInitialized && CheckSignalFilters();
  610 | }
  611 | 
  612 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  613 | //| Get Current Trend                                                |
  614 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  615 | double CSignalManager::GetCurrentTrend() {
  616 |     if (ArraySize(m_MA_Fast) < 2 || ArraySize(m_MA_Slow) < 2) return 0.0;
  617 |     
  618 |     double fastMA = m_MA_Fast[0];
  619 |     double slowMA = m_MA_Slow[0];
  620 |     
  621 |     if (fastMA > slowMA) return 1.0;  // Uptrend
  622 |     if (fastMA < slowMA) return -1.0; // Downtrend
  623 |     return 0.0; // Sideways
  624 | }
  625 | 
  626 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  627 | //| Get Current Volatility                                           |
  628 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  629 | double CSignalManager::GetCurrentVolatility() {
  630 |     if (ArraySize(m_ATR) < 1) {
  631 |         return SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 50; // Default 50 points
  632 |     }
  633 |     return m_ATR[0];
  634 | }
  635 | 
  636 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  637 | //| Run Diagnostics                                                  |
  638 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  639 | void CSignalManager::RunDiagnostics() {
  640 |     Print("=== SIGNAL MANAGER DIAGNOSTICS ===");
  641 |     Print("Initialized: ", m_bInitialized ? "YES" : "NO");
  642 |     Print("Total Signals Generated: ", m_SignalCount);
  643 |     Print("Daily Signal Count: ", m_DailySignalCount);
  644 |     Print("Last Signal Direction: ", EnumToString(m_LastSignal.Direction));
  645 |     Print("Last Signal Confidence: ", m_LastSignal.Confidence);
  646 |     Print("Current Trend: ", GetCurrentTrend());
  647 |     Print("Current Volatility: ", GetCurrentVolatility());
  648 |     Print("Can Generate Signal: ", CanGenerateSignal() ? "YES" : "NO");
  649 |     Print("Buy Signals Enabled: ", m_Config.EnableBuySignals ? "YES" : "NO");
  650 |     Print("Sell Signals Enabled: ", m_Config.EnableSellSignals ? "YES" : "NO");
  651 |     Print("Min Confidence: ", m_Config.MinConfidence);
  652 |     Print("Min Risk/Reward: ", m_Config.MinRiskReward);
  653 |     Print("===================================");
  654 | }
  655 | 
  656 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  657 | //| Update Configuration                                             |
  658 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  659 | bool CSignalManager::UpdateConfiguration(EAContext* context) {
  660 |     if (context == NULL) return false;
  661 |     
  662 |     // Update configuration from context
  663 |     m_Config.MinConfidence = context.InputParams.ConfidenceThreshold;
  664 |     m_Config.MinRiskReward = context.InputParams.MinRiskReward;
  665 |     m_Config.UseTimeFilter = context.InputParams.UseTradingHours;
  666 |     m_Config.UseNewsFilter = context.InputParams.UseNewsFilter;
  667 |     
  668 |     return true;
  669 | }
  670 | 
  671 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  672 | //| Get Signal Report                                                |
  673 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  674 | string CSignalManager::GetSignalReport() {
  675 |     string report = "=== SIGNAL MANAGER REPORT ===\n";
  676 |     report += StringFormat("Total Signals: %d\n", m_SignalCount);
  677 |     report += StringFormat("Daily Signal Count: %d/%d\n", m_DailySignalCount, m_Config.MaxSignalsPerDay);
  678 |     report += StringFormat("Last Signal: %s\n", EnumToString(m_LastSignal.Direction));
  679 |     report += StringFormat("Last Signal Confidence: %.2f\n", m_LastSignal.Confidence);
  680 |     report += StringFormat("Current Trend: %.1f\n", GetCurrentTrend());
  681 |     report += StringFormat("Current Volatility: %.5f\n", GetCurrentVolatility());
  682 |     report += StringFormat("Can Generate Signal: %s\n", CanGenerateSignal() ? "YES" : "NO");
  683 |     
  684 |     if (m_LastSignal.IsValid) {
  685 |         report += StringFormat("\n=== LAST SIGNAL DETAILS ===\n");
  686 |         report += StringFormat("Direction: %s\n", EnumToString(m_LastSignal.Direction));
  687 |         report += StringFormat("Entry: %.5f\n", m_LastSignal.EntryPrice);
  688 |         report += StringFormat("Stop Loss: %.5f\n", m_LastSignal.StopLoss);
  689 |         report += StringFormat("Take Profit: %.5f\n", m_LastSignal.TakeProfit);
  690 |         report += StringFormat("Risk/Reward: %.2f\n", m_LastSignal.RiskReward);
  691 |         report += StringFormat("Reason: %s\n", m_LastSignal.Reason);
  692 |     }
  693 |     
  694 |     return report;
  695 | }
  696 | 
  697 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  698 | //| Reset Signal History                                             |
  699 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  700 | void CSignalManager::ResetSignalHistory() {
  701 |     m_SignalCount = 0;
  702 |     m_DailySignalCount = 0;
  703 |     m_LastSignalTime = 0;
  704 |     m_LastSignal.Reset();
  705 |     Print("[SIGNAL] Signal history reset");
  706 | }

   16 | struct SSpreadFilterConfig {
   17 |     bool                 enabled;              // Enable spread filtering
   18 |     double               maxSpreadPoints;      // Maximum acceptable spread (points)
   19 |     double               maxSpreadMultiplier;  // Max spread as multiple of average
   20 |     bool                 adaptiveThreshold;    // Use adaptive spread thresholds
   21 |     double               historicalAverage;    // Historical average spread
   22 |     
   23 |     void SetDefaults() {
   24 |         enabled = true;
   25 |         maxSpreadPoints = 3.0;
   26 |         maxSpreadMultiplier = 2.0;
   27 |         adaptiveThreshold = true;
   28 |         historicalAverage = 1.5;
   29 |     }
   30 | };
   31 | 
   32 | struct SVolatilityFilterConfig {
   33 |     bool                 enabled;              // Enable volatility filtering
   34 |     double               minATRMultiplier;     // Minimum ATR as multiple of average
   35 |     double               maxATRMultiplier;     // Maximum ATR as multiple of average
   36 |     int                  atrPeriod;            // ATR calculation period
   37 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES      atrTimeframe;         // ATR timeframe
   38 |     bool                 useVolatilityRegime;  // Use regime-based filtering
   39 |     
   40 |     void SetDefaults() {
   41 |         enabled = true;
   42 |         minATRMultiplier = 0.5;
   43 |         maxATRMultiplier = 2.5;
   44 |         atrPeriod = 14;
   45 |         atrTimeframe = PERIOD_H1;
   46 |         useVolatilityRegime = true;
   47 |     }
   48 | };

   51 |     bool                 enabled;              // Enable news filtering
   52 |     ENUM_NEWS_FILTER_LEVEL filterLevel;       // News filter level
   53 |     int                  minutesBeforeNews;   // Minutes before news to stop
   54 |     int                  minutesAfterNews;    // Minutes after news to wait
   55 |     bool                 highImpactOnly;      // Filter only high impact news
   56 |     bool                 useNewsCalendar;     // Use external news calendar
   57 |     
   58 |     void SetDefaults() {
   59 |         enabled = true;
   60 |         filterLevel = NEWS_FILTER_HIGH;
   61 |         minutesBeforeNews = 30;
   62 |         minutesAfterNews = 15;
   63 |         highImpactOnly = true;
   64 |         useNewsCalendar = false; // MT5 doesn't have built-in calendar
   65 |     }

   69 |     bool                 enabled;              // Enable correlation filtering
   70 |     double               maxCorrelation;       // Maximum allowed correlation
   71 |     int                  lookbackPeriod;       // Correlation calculation period
   72 |     string               correlatedSymbols[10]; // Symbols to check correlation with
   73 |     int                  symbolCount;          // Number of symbols to check
   74 |     bool                 useDynamicCorrelation; // Use dynamic correlation calculation
   75 |

   77 |         enabled = true;

   79 |         lookbackPeriod = 100;
   80 |         symbolCount = 0;
   81 |         useDynamicCorrelation = true;
   82 |         
   83 |         // Initialize array
   84 |         for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
   85 |             correlatedSymbols[i] = "";
   86 |         }

   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | //| Filter Result Structure                                          |
   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | struct SFilterResult {
   94 |     bool                 passed;               // Overall filter result
   95 |     double               confidence;           // Confidence score (0-1)
   96 |     string               rejectionReason;      // Reason for rejection
   97 |     
   98 |     // Individual filter results
   99 |     bool                 spreadFilterPassed;
  100 |     bool                 volatilityFilterPassed;
  101 |     bool                 newsFilterPassed;
  102 |     bool                 correlationFilterPassed;
  103 |     bool                 timeFilterPassed;
  104 |     bool                 marketConditionPassed;
  105 |     
  106 |     // Filter values
  107 |     double               currentSpread;
  108 |     double               currentVolatility;
  109 |     double               correlationRisk;
  110 |     double               marketQuality;
  111 |     
  112 |     void Clear() {
  113 |         passed = false;
  114 |         confidence = 0.0;
  115 |         rejectionReason = "";
  116 |         
  117 |         spreadFilterPassed = false;
  118 |         volatilityFilterPassed = false;
  119 |         newsFilterPassed = false;
  120 |         correlationFilterPassed = false;
  121 |         timeFilterPassed = false;
  122 |         marketConditionPassed = false;
  123 |         
  124 |         currentSpread = 0.0;
  125 |         currentVolatility = 0.0;
  126 |         correlationRisk = 0.0;
  127 |         marketQuality = 0.0;
  128 |     }
  129 |     
  130 |     double GetOverallScore() {
  131 |         int passedFilters = 0;
  132 |         int totalFilters = 6;
  133 |         
  134 |         if (spreadFilterPassed) passedFilters++;
  135 |         if (volatilityFilterPassed) passedFilters++;
  136 |         if (newsFilterPassed) passedFilters++;
  137 |         if (correlationFilterPassed) passedFilters++;
  138 |         if (timeFilterPassed) passedFilters++;
  139 |         if (marketConditionPassed) passedFilters++;
  140 |         
  141 |         return (double)passedFilters / totalFilters;
  142 |     }
  143 | };

  248 |     void                    AdaptFilterThresholds();
  249 |     double                  GetAdaptiveSpreadThreshold();
  250 |     double                  GetAdaptiveVolatilityThreshold();
  251 |     
  252 |     //--- Utility Methods ---
  253 |     void                    RecordSpread(double spread);
  254 |     void                    RecordVolatility(double volatility);
  255 |     void                    UpdateStatistics(bool passed, const string& rejectionReason);
  256 |     void                    LogFilterEvent(const string& message, ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  257 | };
  258 | 
  259 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  260 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  261 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  262 | CSignalFilters::CSignalFilters() {
  263 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  264 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  265 |     
  266 |     m_dtLastUpdate = 0;
  267 |     m_dtLastNewsCheck = 0;
  268 |     
  269 |     m_HistoryIndex = 0;
  270 |     m_HistoryCount = 0;
  271 |     
  272 |     m_iTotalSignals = 0;
  273 |     m_iPassedSignals = 0;
  274 |     m_iRejectedBySpread = 0;
  275 |     m_iRejectedByVolatility = 0;
  276 |     m_iRejectedByNews = 0;
  277 |     m_iRejectedByCorrelation = 0;
  278 |     
  279 |     // Initialize configurations
  280 |     m_SpreadConfig.SetDefaults();
  281 |     m_VolatilityConfig.SetDefaults();
  282 |     m_NewsConfig.SetDefaults();
  283 |     m_CorrelationConfig.SetDefaults();
  284 |     
  285 |     // Initialize history arrays
  286 |     ArrayInitialize(m_SpreadHistory, 0.0);
  287 |     ArrayInitialize(m_VolatilityHistory, 0.0);
  288 | }
  289 | 
  290 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  295 | }
  296 | 
  297 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  298 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  299 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  300 | bool CSignalFilters::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  301 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  302 |         return true;
  303 |     }
  304 |     
  305 |     m_pContext = context;
  306 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  307 |         Print("[SIGNAL_FILTERS] Context is NULL");
  308 |         return false;
  309 |     }
  310 |     
  311 |     // Load configuration from inputs
  312 |     if (m_pContext->InputParams.UseNewsFilter) {
  313 |         m_NewsConfig.enabled = true;
  314 |         m_NewsConfig.filterLevel = m_pContext->InputParams.NewsFilterLevel;
  315 |     }
  316 |     
  317 |     m_SpreadConfig.maxSpreadPoints = m_pContext->InputParams.MaxSpreadPoints;
  318 |     m_CorrelationConfig.enabled = m_pContext->InputParams.UseCorrelationFilter;
  319 |     
  320 |     // Initialize adaptive filtering
  321 |     if (m_SpreadConfig.adaptiveThreshold) {
  322 |         UpdateSpreadHistory();
  323 |     }
  324 |     
  325 |     if (m_VolatilityConfig.useVolatilityRegime) {
  326 |         UpdateVolatilityHistory();
  327 |     }
  328 |     
  329 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  330 |     
  331 |     LogFilterEvent("SignalFilters initialized with comprehensive filtering");
  332 |     
  333 |     return true;
  334 | }
  335 | 
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  338 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | void CSignalFilters::Deinitialize() {
  340 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  341 |         return;
  342 |     }
  343 |     
  344 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  345 |         string stats = GetFilterStatistics();
  346 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("SignalFilters final statistics: " + stats, __FUNCTION__);
  347 |     }
  348 |     
  349 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  350 | }
  351 | 
  352 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  353 | //| Main Signal Filtering Method                                     |
  354 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  355 | SFilterResult CSignalFilters::FilterSignal(const SSignalContext& signal) {
  356 |     SFilterResult result;
  357 |     result.Clear();
  358 |     
  359 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  360 |         result.rejectionReason = "Filters not initialized";
  361 |         return result;
  362 |     }
  363 |     
  364 |     m_iTotalSignals++;
  365 |     string rejectionReason = "";
  366 |     
  367 |     // 1. Spread Filter
  368 |     if (m_SpreadConfig.enabled) {
  369 |         result.spreadFilterPassed = CheckSpreadFilter(result.currentSpread, rejectionReason);
  370 |         if (!result.spreadFilterPassed) {
  371 |             result.rejectionReason = "Spread: " + rejectionReason;
  372 |             m_iRejectedBySpread++;
  373 |             UpdateStatistics(false, result.rejectionReason);
  374 |             return result;
  375 |         }
  376 |     } else {
  377 |         result.spreadFilterPassed = true;
  378 |         result.currentSpread = GetCurrentSpread();
  379 |     }
  380 |     
  381 |     // 2. Volatility Filter
  382 |     if (m_VolatilityConfig.enabled) {
  383 |         result.volatilityFilterPassed = CheckVolatilityFilter(result.currentVolatility, rejectionReason);
  384 |         if (!result.volatilityFilterPassed) {
  385 |             result.rejectionReason = "Volatility: " + rejectionReason;
  386 |             m_iRejectedByVolatility++;
  387 |             UpdateStatistics(false, result.rejectionReason);
  388 |             return result;
  389 |         }
  390 |     } else {
  391 |         result.volatilityFilterPassed = true;
  392 |         result.currentVolatility = GetCurrentVolatility();
  393 |     }
  394 |     
  395 |     // 3. News Filter
  396 |     if (m_NewsConfig.enabled) {
  397 |         result.newsFilterPassed = CheckNewsFilter(rejectionReason);
  398 |         if (!result.newsFilterPassed) {
  399 |             result.rejectionReason = "News: " + rejectionReason;
  400 |             m_iRejectedByNews++;
  401 |             UpdateStatistics(false, result.rejectionReason);
  402 |             return result;
  403 |         }
  404 |     } else {
  405 |         result.newsFilterPassed = true;
  406 |     }
  407 |     
  408 |     // 4. Time Filter
  409 |     if (m_pContext->pTimeManager != NULL) {
  410 |         result.timeFilterPassed = CheckTimeFilter(rejectionReason);
  411 |         if (!result.timeFilterPassed) {
  412 |             result.rejectionReason = "Time: " + rejectionReason;
  413 |             UpdateStatistics(false, result.rejectionReason);
  414 |             return result;
  415 |         }
  416 |     } else {
  417 |         result.timeFilterPassed = true;
  418 |     }
  419 |     
  420 |     // 5. Correlation Filter
  421 |     if (m_CorrelationConfig.enabled) {
  422 |         result.correlationFilterPassed = CheckCorrelationFilter(signal, result.correlationRisk, rejectionReason);
  423 |         if (!result.correlationFilterPassed) {
  424 |             result.rejectionReason = "Correlation: " + rejectionReason;
  425 |             m_iRejectedByCorrelation++;
  426 |             UpdateStatistics(false, result.rejectionReason);
  427 |             return result;
  428 |         }
  429 |     } else {
  430 |         result.correlationFilterPassed = true;
  431 |         result.correlationRisk = 0.0;
  432 |     }
  433 |     
  434 |     // 6. Market Condition Filter
  435 |     result.marketConditionPassed = CheckMarketCondition(result.marketQuality, rejectionReason);
  436 |     if (!result.marketConditionPassed) {
  437 |         result.rejectionReason = "Market: " + rejectionReason;
  438 |         UpdateStatistics(false, result.rejectionReason);
  439 |         return result;
  440 |     }
  441 |     
  442 |     // All filters passed
  443 |     result.passed = true;
  444 |     result.confidence = result.GetOverallScore();
  445 |     m_iPassedSignals++;
  446 |     
  447 |     UpdateStatistics(true, "All filters passed");
  448 |     
  449 |     LogFilterEvent(StringFormat("Signal passed all filters. Quality: %.2f", result.confidence));
  450 |     
  451 |     return result;
  452 | }
  453 | 
  454 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  455 | //| Individual Filter Implementations                               |
  456 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 | bool CSignalFilters::CheckSpreadFilter(double& currentSpread, string& reason) {
  458 |     currentSpread = GetCurrentSpread();
  459 |     
  460 |     // Check absolute spread limit
  461 |     if (currentSpread > m_SpreadConfig.maxSpreadPoints) {
  462 |         reason = StringFormat("Spread %.2f > limit %.2f", currentSpread, m_SpreadConfig.maxSpreadPoints);
  463 |         return false;
  464 |     }
  465 |     
  466 |     // Check adaptive threshold if enabled
  467 |     if (m_SpreadConfig.adaptiveThreshold) {
  468 |         double avgSpread = GetAverageSpread();
  469 |         double threshold = avgSpread * m_SpreadConfig.maxSpreadMultiplier;
  470 |         
  471 |         if (currentSpread > threshold) {
  472 |             reason = StringFormat("Spread %.2f > adaptive threshold %.2f", currentSpread, threshold);
  473 |             return false;
  474 |         }
  475 |     }
  476 |     
  477 |     // Record spread for history
  478 |     RecordSpread(currentSpread);
  479 |     
  480 |     return true;
  481 | }
  482 | 
  483 | bool CSignalFilters::CheckVolatilityFilter(double& currentVolatility, string& reason) {
  484 |     currentVolatility = GetCurrentVolatility();
  485 |     
  486 |     if (currentVolatility <= 0) {
  487 |         reason = "Invalid volatility data";
  488 |         return false;
  489 |     }
  490 |     
  491 |     double avgVolatility = GetAverageVolatility();
  492 |     if (avgVolatility <= 0) {
  493 |         // No historical data yet, use current as baseline
  494 |         RecordVolatility(currentVolatility);
  495 |         return true;
  496 |     }
  497 |     
  498 |     double minThreshold = avgVolatility * m_VolatilityConfig.minATRMultiplier;
  499 |     double maxThreshold = avgVolatility * m_VolatilityConfig.maxATRMultiplier;
  500 |     
  501 |     if (currentVolatility < minThreshold) {
  502 |         reason = StringFormat("Volatility %.5f too low (min: %.5f)", currentVolatility, minThreshold);
  503 |         return false;
  504 |     }
  505 |     
  506 |     if (currentVolatility > maxThreshold) {
  507 |         reason = StringFormat("Volatility %.5f too high (max: %.5f)", currentVolatility, maxThreshold);
  508 |         return false;
  509 |     }
  510 |     
  511 |     // Record volatility for history
  512 |     RecordVolatility(currentVolatility);
  513 |     
  514 |     return true;
  515 | }
  516 | 
  517 | bool CSignalFilters::CheckNewsFilter(string& reason) {
  518 |     // Simple implementation - can be enhanced with real news calendar
  519 |     if (m_NewsConfig.highImpactOnly && IsHighImpactNewsTime()) {
  520 |         reason = "High impact news time";
  521 |         return false;
  522 |     }
  523 |     
  524 |     return true;
  525 | }
  526 | 
  527 | bool CSignalFilters::CheckTimeFilter(string& reason) {
  528 |     if (m_pContext->pTimeManager == NULL) {
  529 |         return true;
  530 |     }
  531 |     
  532 |     if (!m_pContext->pTimeManager->IsInTradingWindow()) {
  533 |         reason = "Outside trading hours";
  534 |         return false;
  535 |     }
  536 |     
  537 |     if (!m_pContext->pTimeManager->IsOptimalTradingTime()) {
  538 |         reason = "Suboptimal trading time";
  539 |         return false;
  540 |     }
  541 |     
  542 |     return true;
  543 | }
  544 | 
  545 | bool CSignalFilters::CheckCorrelationFilter(const SSignalContext& signal, double& correlationRisk, string& reason) {
  546 |     // Placeholder implementation
  547 |     correlationRisk = 0.0;
  548 |     
  549 |     // In a real implementation, this would check correlation with other open positions
  550 |     // or with major currency pairs/indices
  551 |     
  552 |     return true;
  553 | }
  554 | 
  555 | bool CSignalFilters::CheckMarketCondition(double& marketQuality, string& reason) {
  556 |     marketQuality = 1.0;
  557 |     
  558 |     // Check if market is liquid
  559 |     if (!IsMarketLiquid()) {
  560 |         marketQuality *= 0.5;
  561 |         reason = "Low market liquidity";
  562 |     }
  563 |     
  564 |     // Check spread conditions
  565 |     if (!IsSpreadAcceptable()) {
  566 |         marketQuality *= 0.7;
  567 |         if (reason != "") reason += "; ";
  568 |         reason += "Poor spread conditions";
  569 |     }
  570 |     
  571 |     // Minimum market quality threshold
  572 |     if (marketQuality < 0.6) {
  573 |         return false;
  574 |     }
  575 |     
  576 |     return true;
  577 | }
  578 | 
  579 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  580 | //| Utility Methods                                                 |
  581 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  582 | double CSignalFilters::GetCurrentSpread() {
  583 |     double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  584 |     double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  585 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  586 |     
  587 |     return (ask - bid) / point;
  588 | }
  589 | 
  590 | double CSignalFilters::GetCurrentVolatility() {
  591 |     return CalculateATR(m_VolatilityConfig.atrTimeframe, m_VolatilityConfig.atrPeriod);
  592 | }
  593 | 
  594 | double CSignalFilters::CalculateATR(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = PERIOD_H1, int period = 14) {
  595 |     int handle = iATR(_Symbol, timeframe, period);
  596 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  597 |         return 0.0;
  598 |     }
  599 |     
  600 |     double buffer[1];
  601 |     if (CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 1, 1, buffer) <= 0) {
  602 |         IndicatorRelease(handle);
  603 |         return 0.0;
  604 |     }
  605 |     
  606 |     double result = buffer[0];
  607 |     IndicatorRelease(handle);
  608 |     return result;
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | void CSignalFilters::RecordSpread(double spread) {
  612 |     m_SpreadHistory[m_HistoryIndex] = spread;
  613 |     m_HistoryIndex = (m_HistoryIndex + 1) % 100;
  614 |     if (m_HistoryCount < 100) m_HistoryCount++;
  615 | }
  616 | 
  617 | void CSignalFilters::RecordVolatility(double volatility) {
  618 |     m_VolatilityHistory[m_HistoryIndex] = volatility;
  619 | }
  620 | 
  621 | double CSignalFilters::GetAverageSpread() {
  622 |     if (m_HistoryCount == 0) return 0.0;
  623 |     
  624 |     double sum = 0.0;
  625 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_HistoryCount; i++) {
  626 |         sum += m_SpreadHistory[i];
  627 |     }
  628 |     return sum / m_HistoryCount;
  629 | }
  630 | 
  631 | double CSignalFilters::GetAverageVolatility() {
  632 |     if (m_HistoryCount == 0) return 0.0;
  633 |     
  634 |     double sum = 0.0;
  635 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_HistoryCount; i++) {
  636 |         sum += m_VolatilityHistory[i];
  637 |     }
  638 |     return sum / m_HistoryCount;
  639 | }
  640 | 
  641 | bool CSignalFilters::IsMarketLiquid() {
  642 |     double spread = GetCurrentSpread();
  643 |     double avgSpread = GetAverageSpread();
  644 |     
  645 |     // Market is considered liquid if spread is not significantly above average
  646 |     return (avgSpread > 0) ? (spread <= avgSpread * 1.5) : true;
  647 | }
  648 | 
  649 | bool CSignalFilters::IsSpreadAcceptable() {
  650 |     double spread = GetCurrentSpread();
  651 |     return (spread <= m_SpreadConfig.maxSpreadPoints);
  652 | }
  653 | 
  654 | double CSignalFilters::GetFilterSuccessRate() {
  655 |     if (m_iTotalSignals == 0) return 0.0;
  656 |     return (double)m_iPassedSignals / m_iTotalSignals * 100.0;
  657 | }
  658 | 
  659 | string CSignalFilters::GetFilterStatistics() {
  660 |     return StringFormat("Filters: Total=%d, Passed=%d (%.1f%%), Rejected: Spread=%d, Vol=%d, News=%d, Corr=%d",
  661 |                         m_iTotalSignals, m_iPassedSignals, GetFilterSuccessRate(),
  662 |                         m_iRejectedBySpread, m_iRejectedByVolatility, m_iRejectedByNews, m_iRejectedByCorrelation);
  663 | }
  664 | 
  665 | void CSignalFilters::UpdateStatistics(bool passed, const string& rejectionReason) {
  666 |     // Statistics are updated in the main FilterSignal method
  667 | }
  668 | 
  669 | void CSignalFilters::LogFilterEvent(const string& message, ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  670 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  671 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("SignalFilters: " + message, __FUNCTION__);
  672 |     }
  673 | }

  677 |     return FilterSignal(signal).passed; 
  678 | }
  679 | 
  680 | double CSignalFilters::GetSignalQuality(const SSignalContext& signal) { 
  681 |     return FilterSignal(signal).confidence;

  683 |

  685 |     UpdateSpreadHistory(); 
  686 |     UpdateVolatilityHistory(); 
  687 | }

  690 |     m_SpreadConfig.enabled = enabled;
  691 |     m_SpreadConfig.maxSpreadPoints = maxPoints;
  692 |     m_SpreadConfig.maxSpreadMultiplier = maxMultiplier;
  693 | }

  696 |     m_VolatilityConfig.enabled = enabled;

  698 |     m_VolatilityConfig.maxATRMultiplier = maxMultiplier;

  702 |     m_NewsConfig.enabled = enabled;
  703 |     m_NewsConfig.filterLevel = level;

  705 |     m_NewsConfig.minutesAfterNews = afterMinutes;
  706 | }

  708 | void CSignalFilters::SetCorrelationFilter(bool enabled, double maxCorrelation) {

  710 |     m_CorrelationConfig.maxCorrelation = maxCorrelation;
  711 | }
  712 | 
  713 | void CSignalFilters::AddCorrelatedSymbol(const string& symbol) {
  714 |     if (m_CorrelationConfig.symbolCount < 10) {
  715 |         m_CorrelationConfig.correlatedSymbols[m_CorrelationConfig.symbolCount] = symbol;
  716 |         m_CorrelationConfig.symbolCount++;
  717 |     }
  718 | }
  719 | 
  720 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME CSignalFilters::GetMarketRegime() { return REGIME_UNKNOWN; }
  721 | bool CSignalFilters::IsVolatilityNormal() { return true; }
  722 | double CSignalFilters::EstimateSlippage() { return GetCurrentSpread() * 0.5; }
  723 | double CSignalFilters::GetMarketImpactScore() { return 0.8; }
  724 | void CSignalFilters::UpdateSpreadHistory() { RecordSpread(GetCurrentSpread()); }
  725 | void CSignalFilters::UpdateVolatilityHistory() { RecordVolatility(GetCurrentVolatility()); }
  726 | void CSignalFilters::ResetStatistics() { 
  727 |     m_iTotalSignals = m_iPassedSignals = 0;
  728 |     m_iRejectedBySpread = m_iRejectedByVolatility = m_iRejectedByNews = m_iRejectedByCorrelation = 0;
  729 | }
  730 | bool CSignalFilters::IsHighImpactNewsTime() { return false; }
