  122 | struct SBrokerHealthReport {
  123 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH_STATUS OverallHealth;
  124 |     double HealthScore;             // 0-100
  125 |     SExecutionStats ExecutionStats;
  126 |     SConnectionStats ConnectionStats;
  127 |     SSpreadAnalysis SpreadAnalysis[10];  // Top 10 symbols
  128 |     int SpreadAnalysisCount;
  129 |     SBrokerAlert ActiveAlerts[20];
  130 |     int ActiveAlertCount;
  131 |     datetime ReportTime;
  132 |     string BrokerName;
  133 |     string ServerName;
  134 |     int AccountNumber;
  135 | };
  136 | 
  137 | struct SBrokerConfiguration {
  138 |     double SpreadThreshold;         // points
  139 |     double ExecutionTimeThreshold;  // milliseconds
  140 |     double SlippageThreshold;       // points
  141 |     double LatencyThreshold;        // milliseconds
  142 |     int RequoteThreshold;           // count per hour
  143 |     double UptimeThreshold;         // percentage
  144 |     bool EnableAlerts;
  145 |     bool EnableLogging;
  146 |     int MonitoringInterval;         // seconds
  147 |     int HistoryDepth;              // number of records to keep
  148 |     string MonitoredSymbols[20];
  149 |     int MonitoredSymbolCount;
  150 | };
  151 | 
  152 | struct SBrokerStatistics {
  153 |     int TotalMonitoringCycles;
  154 |     int HealthyPeriods;
  155 |     int UnhealthyPeriods;
  156 |     double AverageHealthScore;
  157 |     double BestHealthScore;
  158 |     double WorstHealthScore;
  159 |     datetime FirstMonitoring;
  160 |     datetime LastMonitoring;
  161 |     int AlertsGenerated;
  162 |     int CriticalAlertsGenerated;
  163 |     datetime LastAlert;
  164 |     string LastAlertMessage;
  165 | };
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| Broker Health Monitor Class                                     |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | class CBrokerHealthMonitor {
  171 | private:
  172 |     EAContext* m_pContext;
  173 |     
  174 |     // Configuration
  175 |     SBrokerConfiguration m_Config;
  176 |     
  177 |     // Metrics
  178 |     SBrokerMetric m_Metrics[12];  // All broker metrics
  179 |     int m_MetricCount;
  180 |     
  181 |     // Statistics
  182 |     SExecutionStats m_ExecutionStats;
  183 |     SConnectionStats m_ConnectionStats;
  184 |     SSpreadAnalysis m_SpreadAnalysis[20];
  185 |     int m_SpreadAnalysisCount;
  186 |     
  187 |     // Alerts
  188 |     SBrokerAlert m_Alerts[50];
  189 |     int m_AlertCount;
  190 |     
  191 |     // Overall statistics
  192 |     SBrokerStatistics m_Statistics;
  193 |     
  194 |     // Internal state
  195 |     bool m_bInitialized;
  196 |     bool m_bMonitoring;
  197 |     datetime m_LastMonitoring;
  198 |     datetime m_LastHealthCheck;
  199 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH_STATUS m_CurrentHealth;
  200 |     double m_CurrentHealthScore;
  201 |     
  202 |     // Helper methods
  203 |     bool InitializeMetrics();
  204 |     bool UpdateMetrics();
  205 |     bool AnalyzeSpreads();
  206 |     bool MonitorExecution();
  207 |     bool CheckConnection();
  208 |     bool EvaluateHealth();
  209 |     bool GenerateAlerts();
  210 |     bool UpdateStatistics();
  211 |     double CalculateHealthScore();
  212 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH_STATUS DetermineHealthStatus(double score);
  213 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_QUALITY DetermineExecutionQuality();
  214 |     bool IsSpreadAcceptable(const string symbol, double spread);
  215 |     void LogError(const string message);
  216 |     void LogActivity(const string message);
  217 |     void LogAlert(const SBrokerAlert& alert);
  218 |     
  219 | public:
  220 |     // Constructor/Destructor
  221 |     CBrokerHealthMonitor();
  222 |     ~CBrokerHealthMonitor();
  223 |     
  224 |     // Initialization
  225 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* context);
  226 |     bool Deinitialize();
  227 |     bool Configure(const SBrokerConfiguration& config);
  228 |     
  229 |     // Main operations
  230 |     bool StartMonitoring();
  231 |     bool StopMonitoring();
  232 |     bool UpdateHealth();
  233 |     bool PerformHealthCheck();
  234 |     
  235 |     // Metrics
  236 |     bool GetMetric(ENUM_BROKER_METRIC_TYPE type, SBrokerMetric& metric);
  237 |     bool GetAllMetrics(SBrokerMetric& metrics[]);
  238 |     double GetMetricValue(ENUM_BROKER_METRIC_TYPE type);
  239 |     bool IsMetricHealthy(ENUM_BROKER_METRIC_TYPE type);
  240 |     
  241 |     // Execution monitoring
  242 |     bool RecordExecution(double executionTime, double slippage, bool success);
  243 |     bool RecordRequote();
  244 |     SExecutionStats GetExecutionStats() const { return m_ExecutionStats; }
  245 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_QUALITY GetExecutionQuality() const;
  246 |     
  247 |     // Connection monitoring
  248 |     bool RecordDisconnection();
  249 |     bool RecordReconnection();
  250 |     SConnectionStats GetConnectionStats() const { return m_ConnectionStats; }
  251 |     bool IsConnectionHealthy() const;
  252 |     
  253 |     // Spread analysis
  254 |     bool UpdateSpreadAnalysis(const string symbol);
  255 |     bool GetSpreadAnalysis(const string symbol, SSpreadAnalysis& analysis);
  256 |     bool IsSpreadHealthy(const string symbol);
  257 |     double GetAverageSpread(const string symbol);
  258 |     
  259 |     // Health assessment
  260 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH_STATUS GetCurrentHealth() const { return m_CurrentHealth; }
  261 |     double GetCurrentHealthScore() const { return m_CurrentHealthScore; }
  262 |     bool IsHealthy() const;
  263 |     bool GenerateHealthReport(SBrokerHealthReport& report);
  264 |     
  265 |     // Alerts
  266 |     bool GetActiveAlerts(SBrokerAlert& alerts[]);
  267 |     int GetActiveAlertCount() const { return m_AlertCount; }
  268 |     bool AcknowledgeAlert(int alertIndex);
  269 |     bool ClearAlert(int alertIndex);
  270 |     bool ClearAllAlerts();
  271 |     
  272 |     // Configuration
  273 |     bool SetConfiguration(const SBrokerConfiguration& config);
  274 |     SBrokerConfiguration GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  275 |     bool AddMonitoredSymbol(const string symbol);
  276 |     bool RemoveMonitoredSymbol(const string symbol);
  277 |     
  278 |     // Statistics
  279 |     SBrokerStatistics GetStatistics() const { return m_Statistics; }
  280 |     bool ResetStatistics();
  281 |     
  282 |     // Utility
  283 |     string GetHealthStatusName(ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH_STATUS status);
  284 |     string GetExecutionQualityName(ENUM_EXECUTION_QUALITY quality);
  285 |     string GetMetricName(ENUM_BROKER_METRIC_TYPE type);
  286 |     string GetAlertLevelName(ENUM_ALERT_LEVEL level);
  287 |     
  288 |     // Status
  289 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  290 |     bool IsMonitoring() const { return m_bMonitoring; }
  291 |     datetime GetLastMonitoring() const { return m_LastMonitoring; }
  292 | };
  293 | 
  294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  296 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  297 | CBrokerHealthMonitor::CBrokerHealthMonitor() {
  298 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  299 |     m_MetricCount = 0;
  300 |     m_SpreadAnalysisCount = 0;
  301 |     m_AlertCount = 0;
  302 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  303 |     m_bMonitoring = false;
  304 |     m_LastMonitoring = 0;
  305 |     m_LastHealthCheck = 0;
  306 |     m_CurrentHealth = BROKER_HEALTH_UNKNOWN;
  307 |     m_CurrentHealthScore = 0.0;
  308 |     
  309 |     // Set default configuration
  310 |     m_Config.SpreadThreshold = 3.0;           // 3 points
  311 |     m_Config.ExecutionTimeThreshold = 200.0;  // 200ms
  312 |     m_Config.SlippageThreshold = 2.0;         // 2 points
  313 |     m_Config.LatencyThreshold = 100.0;        // 100ms
  314 |     m_Config.RequoteThreshold = 5;            // 5 per hour
  315 |     m_Config.UptimeThreshold = 99.0;          // 99%
  316 |     m_Config.EnableAlerts = true;
  317 |     m_Config.EnableLogging = true;
  318 |     m_Config.MonitoringInterval = 60;         // 1 minute
  319 |     m_Config.HistoryDepth = 1000;
  320 |     m_Config.MonitoredSymbolCount = 0;
  321 |     
  322 |     ZeroMemory(m_ExecutionStats);
  323 |     ZeroMemory(m_ConnectionStats);
  324 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  325 | }
  326 | 
  327 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  328 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  329 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  330 | CBrokerHealthMonitor::~CBrokerHealthMonitor() {
  331 |     Deinitialize();
  332 | }
  333 | 
  334 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  335 | //| Initialize broker health monitor                                |
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  338 |     if (context == NULL) {
  339 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  340 |         return false;
  341 |     }
  342 |     
  343 |     m_pContext = context;
  344 |     
  345 |     // Initialize metrics
  346 |     if (!InitializeMetrics()) {
  347 |         LogError("Failed to initialize metrics");
  348 |         return false;
  349 |     }
  350 |     
  351 |     // Initialize connection stats
  352 |     m_ConnectionStats.IsConnected = TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  353 |     m_ConnectionStats.TotalConnections = 1;
  354 |     m_ConnectionStats.UptimePercentage = 100.0;
  355 |     
  356 |     // Add default monitored symbols
  357 |     if (m_Config.MonitoredSymbolCount == 0) {
  358 |         AddMonitoredSymbol(Symbol());
  359 |     }
  360 |     
  361 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  362 |     m_Statistics.FirstMonitoring = TimeCurrent();
  363 |     
  364 |     LogActivity("Broker health monitor initialized successfully");
  365 |     return true;
  366 | }
  367 | 
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | //| Deinitialize broker health monitor                              |
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::Deinitialize() {
  372 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  373 |         StopMonitoring();
  374 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  375 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  376 |         LogActivity("Broker health monitor deinitialized");
  377 |     }
  378 |     
  379 |     return true;
  380 | }
  381 | 
  382 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  383 | //| Configure broker health monitor                                 |
  384 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::Configure(const SBrokerConfiguration& config) {
  386 |     m_Config = config;
  387 |     
  388 |     // Validate configuration
  389 |     if (m_Config.SpreadThreshold < 0.1) m_Config.SpreadThreshold = 0.1;
  390 |     if (m_Config.ExecutionTimeThreshold < 10.0) m_Config.ExecutionTimeThreshold = 10.0;
  391 |     if (m_Config.SlippageThreshold < 0.1) m_Config.SlippageThreshold = 0.1;
  392 |     if (m_Config.LatencyThreshold < 10.0) m_Config.LatencyThreshold = 10.0;
  393 |     if (m_Config.RequoteThreshold < 1) m_Config.RequoteThreshold = 1;
  394 |     if (m_Config.UptimeThreshold < 50.0) m_Config.UptimeThreshold = 50.0;
  395 |     if (m_Config.UptimeThreshold > 100.0) m_Config.UptimeThreshold = 100.0;
  396 |     if (m_Config.MonitoringInterval < 10) m_Config.MonitoringInterval = 10;
  397 |     if (m_Config.HistoryDepth < 100) m_Config.HistoryDepth = 100;
  398 |     
  399 |     LogActivity("Broker health monitor configured successfully");
  400 |     return true;
  401 | }
  402 | 
  403 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  404 | //| Start monitoring                                                |
  405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::StartMonitoring() {
  407 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  408 |         LogError("Broker health monitor not initialized");
  409 |         return false;
  410 |     }
  411 |     
  412 |     m_bMonitoring = true;
  413 |     m_LastMonitoring = TimeCurrent();
  414 |     
  415 |     LogActivity("Broker health monitoring started");
  416 |     return true;
  417 | }
  418 | 
  419 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  420 | //| Stop monitoring                                                 |
  421 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  422 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::StopMonitoring() {
  423 |     if (m_bMonitoring) {
  424 |         m_bMonitoring = false;
  425 |         LogActivity("Broker health monitoring stopped");
  426 |     }
  427 |     
  428 |     return true;
  429 | }
  430 | 
  431 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  432 | //| Update health status                                            |
  433 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  434 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateHealth() {
  435 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bMonitoring) {
  436 |         return false;
  437 |     }
  438 |     
  439 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  440 |     
  441 |     // Check if it's time for monitoring
  442 |     if ((currentTime - m_LastMonitoring) < m_Config.MonitoringInterval) {
  443 |         return true;
  444 |     }
  445 |     
  446 |     // Update all metrics
  447 |     UpdateMetrics();
  448 |     
  449 |     // Analyze spreads
  450 |     AnalyzeSpreads();
  451 |     
  452 |     // Check connection
  453 |     CheckConnection();
  454 |     
  455 |     // Evaluate overall health
  456 |     EvaluateHealth();
  457 |     
  458 |     // Generate alerts if needed
  459 |     if (m_Config.EnableAlerts) {
  460 |         GenerateAlerts();
  461 |     }
  462 |     
  463 |     // Update statistics
  464 |     UpdateStatistics();
  465 |     
  466 |     m_LastMonitoring = currentTime;
  467 |     m_Statistics.TotalMonitoringCycles++;
  468 |     m_Statistics.LastMonitoring = currentTime;
  469 |     
  470 |     return true;
  471 | }
  472 | 
  473 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  474 | //| Perform comprehensive health check                              |
  475 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  476 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::PerformHealthCheck() {
  477 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  478 |         return false;
  479 |     }
  480 |     
  481 |     // Force update regardless of timing
  482 |     UpdateMetrics();
  483 |     AnalyzeSpreads();
  484 |     CheckConnection();
  485 |     EvaluateHealth();
  486 |     
  487 |     if (m_Config.EnableAlerts) {
  488 |         GenerateAlerts();
  489 |     }
  490 |     
  491 |     UpdateStatistics();
  492 |     
  493 |     m_LastHealthCheck = TimeCurrent();
  494 |     
  495 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Health check completed - Status: %s, Score: %.1f", 
  496 |                 GetHealthStatusName(m_CurrentHealth), m_CurrentHealthScore));
  497 |     
  498 |     return true;
  499 | }
  500 | 
  501 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  502 | //| Initialize metrics                                              |
  503 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  504 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::InitializeMetrics() {
  505 |     m_MetricCount = 0;
  506 |     
  507 |     // Define all metrics
  508 |     string metricNames[] = {
  509 |         "Spread", "Execution Speed", "Slippage", "Requotes", "Disconnections",
  510 |         "Latency", "Liquidity", "Swap Rates", "Margin Call", "Stop Out",
  511 |         "Trading Hours", "Server Load"
  512 |     };
  513 |     
  514 |     string metricUnits[] = {
  515 |         "points", "ms", "points", "count", "count",
  516 |         "ms", "score", "rate", "level", "level",
  517 |         "hours", "percent"
  518 |     };
  519 |     
  520 |     double thresholds[] = {
  521 |         3.0, 200.0, 2.0, 5.0, 1.0,
  522 |         100.0, 0.8, 0.05, 50.0, 20.0,
  523 |         24.0, 80.0
  524 |     };
  525 |     
  526 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(metricNames) && i < ArraySize(m_Metrics); i++) {
  527 |         m_Metrics[i].Type = (ENUM_BROKER_METRIC_TYPE)i;
  528 |         m_Metrics[i].Name = metricNames[i];
  529 |         m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue = 0.0;
  530 |         m_Metrics[i].AverageValue = 0.0;
  531 |         m_Metrics[i].MinValue = DBL_MAX;
  532 |         m_Metrics[i].MaxValue = -DBL_MAX;
  533 |         m_Metrics[i].Threshold = thresholds[i];
  534 |         m_Metrics[i].CriticalThreshold = thresholds[i] * 2.0;
  535 |         m_Metrics[i].LastUpdate = 0;
  536 |         m_Metrics[i].IsHealthy = true;
  537 |         m_Metrics[i].Unit = metricUnits[i];
  538 |         m_Metrics[i].Description = "";
  539 |         
  540 |         m_MetricCount++;
  541 |     }
  542 |     
  543 |     return true;
  544 | }
  545 | 
  546 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  547 | //| Update all metrics                                              |
  548 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  549 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateMetrics() {
  550 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  551 |     
  552 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_MetricCount; i++) {
  553 |         double newValue = 0.0;
  554 |         
  555 |         switch (m_Metrics[i].Type) {
  556 |             case BROKER_METRIC_SPREAD:
  557 |                 // Average spread across monitored symbols
  558 |                 {
  559 |                     double totalSpread = 0.0;
  560 |                     int validSymbols = 0;
  561 |                     for (int j = 0; j < m_Config.MonitoredSymbolCount; j++) {
  562 |                         double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Config.MonitoredSymbols[j], SYMBOL_ASK);
  563 |                         double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Config.MonitoredSymbols[j], SYMBOL_BID);
  564 |                         if (ask > 0 && bid > 0) {
  565 |                             totalSpread += (ask - bid) / SymbolInfoDouble(m_Config.MonitoredSymbols[j], SYMBOL_POINT);
  566 |                             validSymbols++;
  567 |                         }
  568 |                     }
  569 |                     if (validSymbols > 0) {
  570 |                         newValue = totalSpread / validSymbols;
  571 |                     }
  572 |                 }
  573 |                 break;
  574 |                 
  575 |             case BROKER_METRIC_EXECUTION_SPEED:
  576 |                 newValue = m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime;
  577 |                 break;
  578 |                 
  579 |             case BROKER_METRIC_SLIPPAGE:
  580 |                 newValue = m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage;
  581 |                 break;
  582 |                 
  583 |             case BROKER_METRIC_REQUOTES:
  584 |                 newValue = m_ExecutionStats.RequoteCount;
  585 |                 break;
  586 |                 
  587 |             case BROKER_METRIC_DISCONNECTIONS:
  588 |                 newValue = m_ConnectionStats.Disconnections;
  589 |                 break;
  590 |                 
  591 |             case BROKER_METRIC_LATENCY:
  592 |                 newValue = m_ConnectionStats.AverageLatency;
  593 |                 break;
  594 |                 
  595 |             case BROKER_METRIC_LIQUIDITY:
  596 |                 // Simple liquidity score based on spread and volume
  597 |                 newValue = 0.8;  // Placeholder
  598 |                 break;
  599 |                 
  600 |             case BROKER_METRIC_TRADING_HOURS:
  601 |                 // Check if market is open
  602 |                 newValue = SymbolInfoInteger(Symbol(), SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE) == SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE_FULL ? 1.0 : 0.0;
  603 |                 break;
  604 |                 
  605 |             default:
  606 |                 newValue = 0.0;
  607 |                 break;
  608 |         }
  609 |         
  610 |         // Update metric values
  611 |         m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue = newValue;
  612 |         m_Metrics[i].LastUpdate = currentTime;
  613 |         
  614 |         // Update min/max
  615 |         if (newValue < m_Metrics[i].MinValue) {
  616 |             m_Metrics[i].MinValue = newValue;
  617 |         }
  618 |         if (newValue > m_Metrics[i].MaxValue) {
  619 |             m_Metrics[i].MaxValue = newValue;
  620 |         }
  621 |         
  622 |         // Update average (simple moving average)
  623 |         if (m_Metrics[i].AverageValue == 0.0) {
  624 |             m_Metrics[i].AverageValue = newValue;
  625 |         } else {
  626 |             m_Metrics[i].AverageValue = (m_Metrics[i].AverageValue * 0.9) + (newValue * 0.1);
  627 |         }
  628 |         
  629 |         // Check if healthy
  630 |         m_Metrics[i].IsHealthy = (newValue <= m_Metrics[i].Threshold);
  631 |     }
  632 |     
  633 |     return true;
  634 | }
  635 | 
  636 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  637 | //| Analyze spreads                                                 |
  638 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  639 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::AnalyzeSpreads() {
  640 |     m_SpreadAnalysisCount = 0;
  641 |     
  642 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_Config.MonitoredSymbolCount && i < ArraySize(m_SpreadAnalysis); i++) {
  643 |         string symbol = m_Config.MonitoredSymbols[i];
  644 |         
  645 |         double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  646 |         double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  647 |         
  648 |         if (ask > 0 && bid > 0) {
  649 |             SSpreadAnalysis analysis;
  650 |             ZeroMemory(analysis);
  651 |             
  652 |             analysis.Symbol = symbol;
  653 |             analysis.CurrentSpread = (ask - bid) / SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  654 |             analysis.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  655 |             analysis.AcceptableThreshold = m_Config.SpreadThreshold;
  656 |             analysis.IsAcceptable = (analysis.CurrentSpread <= analysis.AcceptableThreshold);
  657 |             
  658 |             // Update average (simple implementation)
  659 |             if (m_SpreadAnalysisCount < ArraySize(m_SpreadAnalysis)) {
  660 |                 // Find existing analysis for this symbol
  661 |                 bool found = false;
  662 |                 for (int j = 0; j < m_SpreadAnalysisCount; j++) {
  663 |                     if (m_SpreadAnalysis[j].Symbol == symbol) {
  664 |                         // Update existing
  665 |                         if (m_SpreadAnalysis[j].AverageSpread == 0.0) {
  666 |                             m_SpreadAnalysis[j].AverageSpread = analysis.CurrentSpread;
  667 |                         } else {
  668 |                             m_SpreadAnalysis[j].AverageSpread = (m_SpreadAnalysis[j].AverageSpread * 0.9) + (analysis.CurrentSpread * 0.1);
  669 |                         }
  670 |                         
  671 |                         m_SpreadAnalysis[j].CurrentSpread = analysis.CurrentSpread;
  672 |                         m_SpreadAnalysis[j].LastUpdate = analysis.LastUpdate;
  673 |                         m_SpreadAnalysis[j].IsAcceptable = analysis.IsAcceptable;
  674 |                         
  675 |                         if (analysis.CurrentSpread < m_SpreadAnalysis[j].MinSpread || m_SpreadAnalysis[j].MinSpread == 0.0) {
  676 |                             m_SpreadAnalysis[j].MinSpread = analysis.CurrentSpread;
  677 |                         }
  678 |                         if (analysis.CurrentSpread > m_SpreadAnalysis[j].MaxSpread) {
  679 |                             m_SpreadAnalysis[j].MaxSpread = analysis.CurrentSpread;
  680 |                         }
  681 |                         
  682 |                         found = true;
  683 |                         break;
  684 |                     }
  685 |                 }
  686 |                 
  687 |                 if (!found) {
  688 |                     // Add new analysis
  689 |                     analysis.AverageSpread = analysis.CurrentSpread;
  690 |                     analysis.MinSpread = analysis.CurrentSpread;
  691 |                     analysis.MaxSpread = analysis.CurrentSpread;
  692 |                     m_SpreadAnalysis[m_SpreadAnalysisCount] = analysis;
  693 |                     m_SpreadAnalysisCount++;
  694 |                 }
  695 |             }
  696 |         }
  697 |     }
  698 |     
  699 |     return true;
  700 | }
  701 | 
  702 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  703 | //| Check connection status                                          |
  704 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  705 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::CheckConnection() {
  706 |     bool currentlyConnected = TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  707 |     
  708 |     if (currentlyConnected != m_ConnectionStats.IsConnected) {
  709 |         if (currentlyConnected) {
  710 |             // Reconnected
  711 |             RecordReconnection();
  712 |         } else {
  713 |             // Disconnected
  714 |             RecordDisconnection();
  715 |         }
  716 |         
  717 |         m_ConnectionStats.IsConnected = currentlyConnected;
  718 |     }
  719 |     
  720 |     // Update uptime percentage
  721 |     if (m_ConnectionStats.TotalConnections > 0) {
  722 |         double uptime = (double)(m_ConnectionStats.TotalConnections - m_ConnectionStats.Disconnections) / m_ConnectionStats.TotalConnections;
  723 |         m_ConnectionStats.UptimePercentage = uptime * 100.0;
  724 |     }
  725 |     
  726 |     return true;
  727 | }
  728 | 
  729 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  730 | //| Evaluate overall health                                         |
  731 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  732 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::EvaluateHealth() {
  733 |     m_CurrentHealthScore = CalculateHealthScore();
  734 |     m_CurrentHealth = DetermineHealthStatus(m_CurrentHealthScore);
  735 |     
  736 |     // Update statistics
  737 |     if (m_CurrentHealth == BROKER_HEALTH_EXCELLENT || m_CurrentHealth == BROKER_HEALTH_GOOD) {
  738 |         m_Statistics.HealthyPeriods++;
  739 |     } else {
  740 |         m_Statistics.UnhealthyPeriods++;
  741 |     }
  742 |     
  743 |     // Update average health score
  744 |     if (m_Statistics.AverageHealthScore == 0.0) {
  745 |         m_Statistics.AverageHealthScore = m_CurrentHealthScore;
  746 |     } else {
  747 |         m_Statistics.AverageHealthScore = (m_Statistics.AverageHealthScore * 0.95) + (m_CurrentHealthScore * 0.05);
  748 |     }
  749 |     
  750 |     // Update best/worst scores
  751 |     if (m_CurrentHealthScore > m_Statistics.BestHealthScore) {
  752 |         m_Statistics.BestHealthScore = m_CurrentHealthScore;
  753 |     }
  754 |     if (m_CurrentHealthScore < m_Statistics.WorstHealthScore || m_Statistics.WorstHealthScore == 0.0) {
  755 |         m_Statistics.WorstHealthScore = m_CurrentHealthScore;
  756 |     }
  757 |     
  758 |     return true;
  759 | }
  760 | 
  761 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  762 | //| Calculate health score                                          |
  763 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  764 | double CBrokerHealthMonitor::CalculateHealthScore() {
  765 |     double totalScore = 0.0;
  766 |     double totalWeight = 0.0;
  767 |     
  768 |     // Weight factors for different metrics
  769 |     double weights[] = {
  770 |         0.20,  // Spread
  771 |         0.25,  // Execution Speed
  772 |         0.15,  // Slippage
  773 |         0.10,  // Requotes
  774 |         0.15,  // Disconnections
  775 |         0.10,  // Latency
  776 |         0.05   // Others
  777 |     };
  778 |     
  779 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_MetricCount && i < ArraySize(weights); i++) {
  780 |         double score = 0.0;
  781 |         
  782 |         // Calculate score based on threshold
  783 |         if (m_Metrics[i].Threshold > 0) {
  784 |             if (m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue <= m_Metrics[i].Threshold) {
  785 |                 score = 100.0;  // Perfect score
  786 |             } else if (m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue <= m_Metrics[i].CriticalThreshold) {
  787 |                 // Linear degradation between threshold and critical
  788 |                 double ratio = (m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue - m_Metrics[i].Threshold) / 
  789 |                               (m_Metrics[i].CriticalThreshold - m_Metrics[i].Threshold);
  790 |                 score = 100.0 * (1.0 - ratio);
  791 |             } else {
  792 |                 score = 0.0;  // Critical failure
  793 |             }
  794 |         }
  795 |         
  796 |         totalScore += score * weights[i];
  797 |         totalWeight += weights[i];
  798 |     }
  799 |     
  800 |     // Add connection uptime score
  801 |     totalScore += m_ConnectionStats.UptimePercentage * 0.1;
  802 |     totalWeight += 0.1;
  803 |     
  804 |     if (totalWeight > 0) {
  805 |         return totalScore / totalWeight;
  806 |     }
  807 |     
  808 |     return 0.0;
  809 | }
  810 | 
  811 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  812 | //| Determine health status from score                              |
  813 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  814 | ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH_STATUS CBrokerHealthMonitor::DetermineHealthStatus(double score) {
  815 |     if (score >= 90.0) return BROKER_HEALTH_EXCELLENT;
  816 |     if (score >= 75.0) return BROKER_HEALTH_GOOD;
  817 |     if (score >= 60.0) return BROKER_HEALTH_FAIR;
  818 |     if (score >= 40.0) return BROKER_HEALTH_POOR;
  819 |     if (score >= 0.0)  return BROKER_HEALTH_CRITICAL;
  820 |     
  821 |     return BROKER_HEALTH_UNKNOWN;
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  825 | //| Record execution statistics                                     |
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::RecordExecution(double executionTime, double slippage, bool success) {
  828 |     m_ExecutionStats.TotalOrders++;
  829 |     
  830 |     if (success) {
  831 |         m_ExecutionStats.SuccessfulOrders++;
  832 |     } else {
  833 |         m_ExecutionStats.FailedOrders++;
  834 |     }
  835 |     
  836 |     // Update execution time average
  837 |     if (m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime == 0.0) {
  838 |         m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime = executionTime;
  839 |     } else {
  840 |         m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime = (m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime * 0.9) + (executionTime * 0.1);
  841 |     }
  842 |     
  843 |     // Update slippage statistics
  844 |     if (m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage == 0.0) {
  845 |         m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage = slippage;
  846 |     } else {
  847 |         m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage = (m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage * 0.9) + (slippage * 0.1);
  848 |     }
  849 |     
  850 |     if (slippage > m_ExecutionStats.MaxSlippage) {
  851 |         m_ExecutionStats.MaxSlippage = slippage;
  852 |     }
  853 |     
  854 |     m_ExecutionStats.TotalSlippage += slippage;
  855 |     m_ExecutionStats.LastExecution = TimeCurrent();
  856 |     
  857 |     if (m_ExecutionStats.FirstExecution == 0) {
  858 |         m_ExecutionStats.FirstExecution = TimeCurrent();
  859 |     }
  860 |     
  861 |     // Update execution quality
  862 |     m_ExecutionStats.Quality = DetermineExecutionQuality();
  863 |     
  864 |     return true;
  865 | }
  866 | 
  867 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  868 | //| Record requote                                                  |
  869 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  870 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::RecordRequote() {
  871 |     m_ExecutionStats.RequoteCount++;
  872 |     return true;
  873 | }
  874 | 
  875 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  876 | //| Record disconnection                                            |
  877 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  878 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::RecordDisconnection() {
  879 |     m_ConnectionStats.Disconnections++;
  880 |     m_ConnectionStats.LastDisconnection = TimeCurrent();
  881 |     
  882 |     LogActivity("Broker disconnection recorded");
  883 |     return true;
  884 | }
  885 |

  891 |     m_ConnectionStats.LastReconnection = TimeCurrent();
  892 |     
  893 |     LogActivity("Broker reconnection recorded");
  894 |     return true;
  895 | }
  896 | 
  897 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  898 | //| Determine execution quality                                     |
  899 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  900 | ENUM_EXECUTION_QUALITY CBrokerHealthMonitor::DetermineExecutionQuality() {
  901 |     double avgTime = m_ExecutionStats.AverageExecutionTime;
  902 |     double avgSlippage = m_ExecutionStats.AverageSlippage;
  903 |     
  904 |     if (avgTime < 50.0 && avgSlippage < 0.5) return EXECUTION_EXCELLENT;
  905 |     if (avgTime < 100.0 && avgSlippage < 1.0) return EXECUTION_GOOD;
  906 |     if (avgTime < 200.0 && avgSlippage < 2.0) return EXECUTION_FAIR;
  907 |     if (avgTime < 500.0 && avgSlippage < 5.0) return EXECUTION_POOR;
  908 |     
  909 |     return EXECUTION_CRITICAL;
  910 | }
  911 | 
  912 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  913 | //| Generate alerts                                                 |
  914 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  915 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::GenerateAlerts() {
  916 |     // Clear old alerts
  917 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AlertCount; i++) {
  918 |         if (!m_Alerts[i].IsActive) {
  919 |             // Remove inactive alert
  920 |             for (int j = i; j < m_AlertCount - 1; j++) {
  921 |                 m_Alerts[j] = m_Alerts[j + 1];
  922 |             }
  923 |             m_AlertCount--;
  924 |             i--;
  925 |         }
  926 |     }
  927 |     
  928 |     // Check for new alerts
  929 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_MetricCount; i++) {
  930 |         if (!m_Metrics[i].IsHealthy && m_AlertCount < ArraySize(m_Alerts)) {
  931 |             // Check if alert already exists
  932 |             bool alertExists = false;
  933 |             for (int j = 0; j < m_AlertCount; j++) {
  934 |                 if (m_Alerts[j].MetricType == m_Metrics[i].Type && m_Alerts[j].IsActive) {
  935 |                     alertExists = true;
  936 |                     break;
  937 |                 }
  938 |             }
  939 |             
  940 |             if (!alertExists) {
  941 |                 // Create new alert
  942 |                 SBrokerAlert alert;
  943 |                 ZeroMemory(alert);
  944 |                 
  945 |                 alert.MetricType = m_Metrics[i].Type;
  946 |                 alert.Value = m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue;
  947 |                 alert.Threshold = m_Metrics[i].Threshold;
  948 |                 alert.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  949 |                 alert.IsActive = true;
  950 |                 alert.IsAcknowledged = false;
  951 |                 
  952 |                 if (m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue >= m_Metrics[i].CriticalThreshold) {
  953 |                     alert.Level = ALERT_LEVEL_CRITICAL;
  954 |                     alert.Message = StringFormat("CRITICAL: %s exceeded critical threshold (%.2f >= %.2f)", 
  955 |                                                m_Metrics[i].Name, m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue, m_Metrics[i].CriticalThreshold);
  956 |                 } else {
  957 |                     alert.Level = ALERT_LEVEL_WARNING;
  958 |                     alert.Message = StringFormat("WARNING: %s exceeded threshold (%.2f >= %.2f)", 
  959 |                                                m_Metrics[i].Name, m_Metrics[i].CurrentValue, m_Metrics[i].Threshold);
  960 |                 }
  961 |                 
  962 |                 m_Alerts[m_AlertCount] = alert;
  963 |                 m_AlertCount++;
  964 |                 
  965 |                 m_Statistics.AlertsGenerated++;
  966 |                 if (alert.Level == ALERT_LEVEL_CRITICAL) {
  967 |                     m_Statistics.CriticalAlertsGenerated++;
  968 |                 }
  969 |                 
  970 |                 m_Statistics.LastAlert = alert.Timestamp;
  971 |                 m_Statistics.LastAlertMessage = alert.Message;
  972 |                 
  973 |                 LogAlert(alert);
  974 |             }
  975 |         }
  976 |     }
  977 |     
  978 |     return true;
  979 | }
  980 | 
  981 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  982 | //| Update statistics                                               |
  983 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  984 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateStatistics() {
  985 |     m_Statistics.LastMonitoring = TimeCurrent();
  986 |     return true;
  987 | }
  988 |

  994 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("BrokerHealthMonitor: " + message);
  995 |     } else {
  996 |         Print("BrokerHealthMonitor ERROR: ", message);
  997 |     }
  998 | }

 1006 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("BrokerHealthMonitor: " + message);

 1010 |     }
 1011 | }

 1018 |     string message = StringFormat("[%s] %s", levelName, alert.Message);
 1019 |     
 1020 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1021 |         if (alert.Level == ALERT_LEVEL_CRITICAL || alert.Level == ALERT_LEVEL_EMERGENCY) {
 1022 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("BrokerHealthMonitor: " + message);
 1023 |         } else {
 1024 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning("BrokerHealthMonitor: " + message);
 1025 |         }
 1026 |     } else {
 1027 |         Print("BrokerHealthMonitor ALERT: ", message);
 1028 |     }
 1029 | }

📄 File: 05_RiskManagement\Core\AdvancedRiskAnalytics.mqh
🔗 Đường dẫn đầy đủ: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Roaming\MetaQuotes\Terminal\D0E8209F77C8CF37AD8BF550E51FF075\MQL5\Experts\PullBack EA_Trending\APEX_PULLBACK_EA_v2\05_RiskManagement\Core\AdvancedRiskAnalytics.mqh

📊 Thống kê: 651 dòng, 24546 ký tự, encoding: utf-8

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                        AdvancedRiskAnalytics.mqh |
    3 | //|                                  Copyright 2024, MetaQuotes Ltd. |
    4 | //|                                             https://www.mql5.com |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #ifndef ADVANCEDRISKANALYTICS_MQH_
    7 | #define ADVANCEDRISKANALYTICS_MQH_
    8 | 
    9 | #include "IRiskEngine.mqh"
   10 | #include "../../00_Core/CommonStructs.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | namespace ApexPullback::v5 {
   13 | 
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| Advanced Risk Analytics Implementation                           |
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | class CAdvancedRiskAnalytics : public IRiskAnalytics
   18 | {
   19 | private:
   20 |     EAContext* m_context;
   21 |     bool m_initialized;
   22 |     
   23 |     // Statistical calculation helpers
   24 |     double CalculateMean(const double &data[], int count);
   25 |     double CalculateStandardDeviation(const double &data[], int count);
   26 |     double CalculateSkewness(const double &data[], int count);
   27 |     double CalculateKurtosis(const double &data[], int count);
   28 |     void   SortArray(double &array[], int count);
   29 |     double GetPercentile(const double &sortedData[], int count, double percentile);
   30 |     
   31 | public:
   32 |     CAdvancedRiskAnalytics() : m_context(NULL), m_initialized(false) {}
   33 |     ~CAdvancedRiskAnalytics() {}
   34 |     
   35 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* context) {
   36 |         if (!context) return false;
   37 |         m_context = context;
   38 |         m_initialized = true;
   39 |         return true;
   40 |     }
   41 |     
   42 |     void Deinitialize() {
   43 |         m_initialized = false;
   44 |         m_context = NULL;
   45 |     }
   46 |     
   47 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   48 |     //| Performance Metrics Implementation                              |
   49 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   50 |     virtual double CalculateSharpeRatio(const double &returns[], int count) override {
   51 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
   52 |         
   53 |         double meanReturn = CalculateMean(returns, count);
   54 |         double stdDev = CalculateStandardDeviation(returns, count);
   55 |         
   56 |         if (stdDev == 0) return 0.0;
   57 |         
   58 |         // Assuming risk-free rate = 0 for simplicity
   59 |         return (meanReturn - 0.0) / stdDev;
   60 |     }
   61 |     
   62 |     virtual double CalculateSortinoRatio(const double &returns[], int count) override {
   63 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
   64 |         
   65 |         double meanReturn = CalculateMean(returns, count);
   66 |         double downsideDeviation = CalculateDownsideDeviation(returns, count, 0.0);
   67 |         
   68 |         if (downsideDeviation == 0) return 0.0;
   69 |         
   70 |         return (meanReturn - 0.0) / downsideDeviation;
   71 |     }
   72 |     
   73 |     virtual double CalculateCalmarRatio(const double &returns[], int count) override {
   74 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
   75 |         
   76 |         double annualizedReturn = CalculateAnnualizedReturn(returns, count);
   77 |         double maxDrawdown = CalculateMaxDrawdownFromReturns(returns, count);
   78 |         
   79 |         if (maxDrawdown == 0) return 0.0;
   80 |         
   81 |         return annualizedReturn / maxDrawdown;
   82 |     }
   83 |     
   84 |     virtual double CalculateUlcerIndex(const double &returns[], int count) override {
   85 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
   86 |         
   87 |         double sumSquaredDrawdowns = 0.0;
   88 |         double peak = 0.0;
   89 |         double runningValue = 1.0;
   90 |         
   91 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   92 |             runningValue *= (1.0 + returns[i]);
   93 |             if (runningValue > peak) peak = runningValue;
   94 |             
   95 |             double drawdown = (peak - runningValue) / peak;
   96 |             sumSquaredDrawdowns += drawdown * drawdown;
   97 |         }
   98 |         
   99 |         return MathSqrt(sumSquaredDrawdowns / count) * 100.0;
  100 |     }
  101 |     
  102 |     virtual double CalculateMaxDrawdown(const double &equity[], int count) override {
  103 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  104 |         
  105 |         double maxDrawdown = 0.0;
  106 |         double peak = equity[0];
  107 |         
  108 |         for (int i = 1; i < count; i++) {
  109 |             if (equity[i] > peak) {
  110 |                 peak = equity[i];
  111 |             } else {
  112 |                 double drawdown = (peak - equity[i]) / peak;
  113 |                 if (drawdown > maxDrawdown) {
  114 |                     maxDrawdown = drawdown;
  115 |                 }
  116 |             }
  117 |         }
  118 |         
  119 |         return maxDrawdown * 100.0;
  120 |     }
  121 |     
  122 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  123 |     //| VaR Calculations Implementation                                  |
  124 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  125 |     virtual double CalculateVaR(const double &returns[], int count, double confidence) override {
  126 |         if (count <= 0 || confidence <= 0 || confidence >= 1) return 0.0;
  127 |         
  128 |         double sortedReturns[];
  129 |         ArrayResize(sortedReturns, count);
  130 |         ArrayCopy(sortedReturns, returns, 0, 0, count);
  131 |         SortArray(sortedReturns, count);
  132 |         
  133 |         int percentileIndex = (int)(count * (1.0 - confidence));
  134 |         if (percentileIndex >= count) percentileIndex = count - 1;
  135 |         if (percentileIndex < 0) percentileIndex = 0;
  136 |         
  137 |         return -sortedReturns[percentileIndex]; // VaR is positive for losses
  138 |     }
  139 |     
  140 |     virtual double CalculateExpectedShortfall(const double &returns[], int count, double confidence) override {
  141 |         if (count <= 0 || confidence <= 0 || confidence >= 1) return 0.0;
  142 |         
  143 |         double var = CalculateVaR(returns, count, confidence);
  144 |         double sum = 0.0;
  145 |         int exceedanceCount = 0;
  146 |         
  147 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  148 |             if (returns[i] <= -var) {
  149 |                 sum += returns[i];
  150 |                 exceedanceCount++;
  151 |             }
  152 |         }
  153 |         
  154 |         if (exceedanceCount == 0) return var;
  155 |         
  156 |         return -sum / exceedanceCount; // ES is positive for losses
  157 |     }
  158 |     
  159 |     virtual double CalculateConditionalVaR(const double &returns[], int count, double confidence) override {
  160 |         // Conditional VaR is the same as Expected Shortfall
  161 |         return CalculateExpectedShortfall(returns, count, confidence);
  162 |     }
  163 |     
  164 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  165 |     //| Risk-Adjusted Returns Implementation                            |
  166 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  167 |     virtual double CalculateRiskAdjustedReturn(const double &returns[], int count) override {
  168 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  169 |         
  170 |         double meanReturn = CalculateMean(returns, count);
  171 |         double stdDev = CalculateStandardDeviation(returns, count);
  172 |         
  173 |         if (stdDev == 0) return 0.0;
  174 |         
  175 |         return meanReturn / stdDev;
  176 |     }
  177 |     
  178 |     virtual double CalculateAnnualizedReturn(const double &returns[], int count) override {
  179 |         if (count <= 0) return 0.0;
  180 |         
  181 |         double cumulativeReturn = 1.0;
  182 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  183 |             cumulativeReturn *= (1.0 + returns[i]);
  184 |         }
  185 |         
  186 |         double periodsPerYear = 252.0; // Trading days per year
  187 |         double yearsOfData = count / periodsPerYear;
  188 |         
  189 |         if (yearsOfData <= 0) return 0.0;
  190 |         
  191 |         return (MathPow(cumulativeReturn, 1.0 / yearsOfData) - 1.0) * 100.0;
  192 |     }
  193 |     
  194 |     virtual double CalculateAnnualizedVolatility(const double &returns[], int count) override {
  195 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  196 |         
  197 |         double stdDev = CalculateStandardDeviation(returns, count);
  198 |         return stdDev * MathSqrt(252.0) * 100.0; // Annualized volatility
  199 |     }
  200 |     
  201 |     virtual double CalculateInformationRatio(const double &returns[], const double &benchmark[], int count) override {
  202 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  203 |         
  204 |         double excessReturns[];
  205 |         ArrayResize(excessReturns, count);
  206 |         
  207 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  208 |             excessReturns[i] = returns[i] - benchmark[i];
  209 |         }
  210 |         
  211 |         double meanExcess = CalculateMean(excessReturns, count);
  212 |         double trackingError = CalculateStandardDeviation(excessReturns, count);
  213 |         
  214 |         if (trackingError == 0) return 0.0;
  215 |         
  216 |         return meanExcess / trackingError;
  217 |     }
  218 |     
  219 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  220 |     //| Portfolio Metrics Implementation                                |
  221 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  222 |     virtual double CalculatePortfolioBeta(const double &returns[], const double &market[], int count) override {
  223 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  224 |         
  225 |         double meanPortfolio = CalculateMean(returns, count);
  226 |         double meanMarket = CalculateMean(market, count);
  227 |         
  228 |         double covariance = 0.0;
  229 |         double marketVariance = 0.0;
  230 |         
  231 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  232 |             double portfolioDeviation = returns[i] - meanPortfolio;
  233 |             double marketDeviation = market[i] - meanMarket;
  234 |             
  235 |             covariance += portfolioDeviation * marketDeviation;
  236 |             marketVariance += marketDeviation * marketDeviation;
  237 |         }
  238 |         
  239 |         if (marketVariance == 0) return 0.0;
  240 |         
  241 |         return covariance / marketVariance;
  242 |     }
  243 |     
  244 |     virtual double CalculatePortfolioAlpha(const double &returns[], const double &market[], int count) override {
  245 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  246 |         
  247 |         double beta = CalculatePortfolioBeta(returns, market, count);
  248 |         double meanPortfolio = CalculateMean(returns, count);
  249 |         double meanMarket = CalculateMean(market, count);
  250 |         
  251 |         // Alpha = Portfolio Return - (Risk-free rate + Beta * (Market Return - Risk-free rate))
  252 |         // Assuming risk-free rate = 0
  253 |         return meanPortfolio - (beta * meanMarket);
  254 |     }
  255 |     
  256 |     virtual double CalculateTrackingError(const double &returns[], const double &benchmark[], int count) override {
  257 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  258 |         
  259 |         double excessReturns[];
  260 |         ArrayResize(excessReturns, count);
  261 |         
  262 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  263 |             excessReturns[i] = returns[i] - benchmark[i];
  264 |         }
  265 |         
  266 |         return CalculateStandardDeviation(excessReturns, count) * MathSqrt(252.0) * 100.0;
  267 |     }
  268 |     
  269 |     virtual double CalculateCorrelation(const double &series1[], const double &series2[], int count) override {
  270 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  271 |         
  272 |         double mean1 = CalculateMean(series1, count);
  273 |         double mean2 = CalculateMean(series2, count);
  274 |         
  275 |         double covariance = 0.0;
  276 |         double variance1 = 0.0;
  277 |         double variance2 = 0.0;
  278 |         
  279 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  280 |             double dev1 = series1[i] - mean1;
  281 |             double dev2 = series2[i] - mean2;
  282 |             
  283 |             covariance += dev1 * dev2;
  284 |             variance1 += dev1 * dev1;
  285 |             variance2 += dev2 * dev2;
  286 |         }
  287 |         
  288 |         double denominator = MathSqrt(variance1 * variance2);
  289 |         if (denominator == 0) return 0.0;
  290 |         
  291 |         return covariance / denominator;
  292 |     }
  293 |     
  294 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 |     //| Risk Decomposition Implementation                               |
  296 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  297 |     virtual double CalculateSystematicRisk(const double &returns[], const double &market[], int count) override {
  298 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  299 |         
  300 |         double beta = CalculatePortfolioBeta(returns, market, count);
  301 |         double marketVariance = 0.0;
  302 |         double meanMarket = CalculateMean(market, count);
  303 |         
  304 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  305 |             double deviation = market[i] - meanMarket;
  306 |             marketVariance += deviation * deviation;
  307 |         }
  308 |         marketVariance /= count;
  309 |         
  310 |         return beta * beta * marketVariance;
  311 |     }
  312 |     
  313 |     virtual double CalculateIdiosyncraticRisk(const double &returns[], const double &market[], int count) override {
  314 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  315 |         
  316 |         double totalVariance = 0.0;
  317 |         double meanReturn = CalculateMean(returns, count);
  318 |         
  319 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  320 |             double deviation = returns[i] - meanReturn;
  321 |             totalVariance += deviation * deviation;
  322 |         }
  323 |         totalVariance /= count;
  324 |         
  325 |         double systematicRisk = CalculateSystematicRisk(returns, market, count);
  326 |         
  327 |         return totalVariance - systematicRisk;
  328 |     }
  329 |     
  330 |     virtual double CalculateDownsideDeviation(const double &returns[], int count, double threshold) override {
  331 |         if (count <= 0) return 0.0;
  332 |         
  333 |         double sumSquaredDownsideDeviations = 0.0;
  334 |         int downsideCount = 0;
  335 |         
  336 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  337 |             if (returns[i] < threshold) {
  338 |                 double deviation = returns[i] - threshold;
  339 |                 sumSquaredDownsideDeviations += deviation * deviation;
  340 |                 downsideCount++;
  341 |             }
  342 |         }
  343 |         
  344 |         if (downsideCount == 0) return 0.0;
  345 |         
  346 |         return MathSqrt(sumSquaredDownsideDeviations / downsideCount);
  347 |     }
  348 |     
  349 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  350 |     //| Advanced Metrics Implementation                                 |
  351 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  352 |     virtual double CalculateOmegaRatio(const double &returns[], int count, double threshold) override {
  353 |         if (count <= 0) return 0.0;
  354 |         
  355 |         double gainsSum = 0.0;
  356 |         double lossesSum = 0.0;
  357 |         
  358 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  359 |             double excessReturn = returns[i] - threshold;
  360 |             if (excessReturn > 0) {
  361 |                 gainsSum += excessReturn;
  362 |             } else {
  363 |                 lossesSum += MathAbs(excessReturn);
  364 |             }
  365 |         }
  366 |         
  367 |         if (lossesSum == 0) return gainsSum > 0 ? 999.0 : 1.0;
  368 |         
  369 |         return gainsSum / lossesSum;
  370 |     }
  371 |     
  372 |     virtual double CalculateKappaRatio(const double &returns[], int count, int order) override {
  373 |         if (count <= 0 || order <= 0) return 0.0;
  374 |         
  375 |         double meanReturn = CalculateMean(returns, count);
  376 |         double lowerPartialMoment = 0.0;
  377 |         int belowMeanCount = 0;
  378 |         
  379 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  380 |             if (returns[i] < meanReturn) {
  381 |                 double deviation = meanReturn - returns[i];
  382 |                 lowerPartialMoment += MathPow(deviation, order);
  383 |                 belowMeanCount++;
  384 |             }
  385 |         }
  386 |         
  387 |         if (belowMeanCount == 0) return meanReturn > 0 ? 999.0 : 0.0;
  388 |         
  389 |         lowerPartialMoment = MathPow(lowerPartialMoment / belowMeanCount, 1.0 / order);
  390 |         
  391 |         if (lowerPartialMoment == 0) return 0.0;
  392 |         
  393 |         return meanReturn / lowerPartialMoment;
  394 |     }
  395 |     
  396 |     virtual double CalculatePainIndex(const double &equity[], int count) override {
  397 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  398 |         
  399 |         double sumDrawdowns = 0.0;
  400 |         double peak = equity[0];
  401 |         
  402 |         for (int i = 1; i < count; i++) {
  403 |             if (equity[i] > peak) {
  404 |                 peak = equity[i];
  405 |             } else {
  406 |                 double drawdown = (peak - equity[i]) / peak;
  407 |                 sumDrawdowns += drawdown;
  408 |             }
  409 |         }
  410 |         
  411 |         return (sumDrawdowns / count) * 100.0;
  412 |     }
  413 |     
  414 |     virtual double CalculateUlcerPerformanceIndex(const double &equity[], int count) override {
  415 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  416 |         
  417 |         double totalReturn = (equity[count-1] - equity[0]) / equity[0];
  418 |         double ulcerIndex = CalculateUlcerIndexFromEquity(equity, count);
  419 |         
  420 |         if (ulcerIndex == 0) return totalReturn > 0 ? 999.0 : 0.0;
  421 |         
  422 |         return (totalReturn * 100.0) / ulcerIndex;
  423 |     }
  424 |     
  425 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  426 |     //| Monte Carlo Simulation Methods                                  |
  427 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  428 |     void RunMonteCarloVaR(const double &historicalReturns[], int historyCount, 
  429 |                          int simulations, int periods, double confidence,
  430 |                          double &var95, double &var99, double &expectedShortfall) {
  431 |         
  432 |         if (historyCount <= 0 || simulations <= 0 || periods <= 0) return;
  433 |         
  434 |         double simulatedResults[];
  435 |         ArrayResize(simulatedResults, simulations);
  436 |         
  437 |         // Run Monte Carlo simulations
  438 |         for (int sim = 0; sim < simulations; sim++) {
  439 |             double cumulativeReturn = 0.0;
  440 |             
  441 |             for (int period = 0; period < periods; period++) {
  442 |                 int randomIndex = MathRand() % historyCount;
  443 |                 cumulativeReturn += historicalReturns[randomIndex];
  444 |             }
  445 |             
  446 |             simulatedResults[sim] = cumulativeReturn;
  447 |         }
  448 |         
  449 |         // Calculate VaR and ES from simulation results
  450 |         var95 = CalculateVaR(simulatedResults, simulations, 0.95);
  451 |         var99 = CalculateVaR(simulatedResults, simulations, 0.99);
  452 |         expectedShortfall = CalculateExpectedShortfall(simulatedResults, simulations, confidence);
  453 |     }
  454 |     
  455 |     void RunStressTestScenario(const double &baseReturns[], int count, 
  456 |                               double stressMultiplier, double &worstCase, 
  457 |                               double &averageCase, double &bestCase) {
  458 |         
  459 |         if (count <= 0) return;
  460 |         
  461 |         double stressedReturns[];
  462 |         ArrayResize(stressedReturns, count);
  463 |         
  464 |         // Apply stress multiplier to historical returns
  465 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  466 |             stressedReturns[i] = baseReturns[i] * stressMultiplier;
  467 |         }
  468 |         
  469 |         SortArray(stressedReturns, count);
  470 |         
  471 |         worstCase = stressedReturns[0];
  472 |         bestCase = stressedReturns[count-1];
  473 |         averageCase = CalculateMean(stressedReturns, count);
  474 |     }
  475 |     
  476 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 |     //| Tail Risk Analysis                                              |
  478 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  479 |     double CalculateTailRatio(const double &returns[], int count, double percentile) {
  480 |         if (count <= 0 || percentile <= 0 || percentile >= 0.5) return 0.0;
  481 |         
  482 |         double sortedReturns[];
  483 |         ArrayResize(sortedReturns, count);
  484 |         ArrayCopy(sortedReturns, returns, 0, 0, count);
  485 |         SortArray(sortedReturns, count);
  486 |         
  487 |         double upperTail = GetPercentile(sortedReturns, count, 1.0 - percentile);
  488 |         double lowerTail = GetPercentile(sortedReturns, count, percentile);
  489 |         
  490 |         if (lowerTail == 0) return 0.0;
  491 |         
  492 |         return MathAbs(upperTail / lowerTail);
  493 |     }
  494 |     
  495 |     double CalculateExpectedTailLoss(const double &returns[], int count, double confidence) {
  496 |         return CalculateExpectedShortfall(returns, count, confidence);
  497 |     }
  498 |     
  499 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  500 |     //| Risk Attribution Methods                                        |
  501 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  502 |     void CalculateRiskAttribution(const double &returns[], int count,
  503 |                                  const double &factors[][10], int factorCount,
  504 |                                  double &attributions[]) {
  505 |         
  506 |         if (count <= 0 || factorCount <= 0) return;
  507 |         
  508 |         ArrayResize(attributions, factorCount);
  509 |         ArrayInitialize(attributions, 0.0);
  510 |         
  511 |         // Simple linear attribution model
  512 |         for (int f = 0; f < factorCount; f++) {
  513 |             double correlation = CalculateCorrelation(returns, factors[f], count);
  514 |             double factorVolatility = CalculateStandardDeviation(factors[f], count);
  515 |             double portfolioVolatility = CalculateStandardDeviation(returns, count);
  516 |             
  517 |             attributions[f] = correlation * factorVolatility * portfolioVolatility;
  518 |         }
  519 |     }
  520 |     
  521 | private:
  522 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  523 |     //| Helper Methods Implementation                                    |
  524 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  525 |     double CalculateMean(const double &data[], int count) {
  526 |         if (count <= 0) return 0.0;
  527 |         
  528 |         double sum = 0.0;
  529 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  530 |             sum += data[i];
  531 |         }
  532 |         return sum / count;
  533 |     }
  534 |     
  535 |     double CalculateStandardDeviation(const double &data[], int count) {
  536 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  537 |         
  538 |         double mean = CalculateMean(data, count);
  539 |         double sumSquaredDeviations = 0.0;
  540 |         
  541 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  542 |             double deviation = data[i] - mean;
  543 |             sumSquaredDeviations += deviation * deviation;
  544 |         }
  545 |         
  546 |         return MathSqrt(sumSquaredDeviations / (count - 1));
  547 |     }
  548 |     
  549 |     double CalculateSkewness(const double &data[], int count) {
  550 |         if (count <= 2) return 0.0;
  551 |         
  552 |         double mean = CalculateMean(data, count);
  553 |         double stdDev = CalculateStandardDeviation(data, count);
  554 |         
  555 |         if (stdDev == 0) return 0.0;
  556 |         
  557 |         double sumCubedDeviations = 0.0;
  558 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  559 |             double standardizedDeviation = (data[i] - mean) / stdDev;
  560 |             sumCubedDeviations += standardizedDeviation * standardizedDeviation * standardizedDeviation;
  561 |         }
  562 |         
  563 |         return sumCubedDeviations / count;
  564 |     }
  565 |     
  566 |     double CalculateKurtosis(const double &data[], int count) {
  567 |         if (count <= 3) return 0.0;
  568 |         
  569 |         double mean = CalculateMean(data, count);
  570 |         double stdDev = CalculateStandardDeviation(data, count);
  571 |         
  572 |         if (stdDev == 0) return 0.0;
  573 |         
  574 |         double sumFourthPowerDeviations = 0.0;
  575 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  576 |             double standardizedDeviation = (data[i] - mean) / stdDev;
  577 |             double fourthPower = standardizedDeviation * standardizedDeviation * 
  578 |                                standardizedDeviation * standardizedDeviation;
  579 |             sumFourthPowerDeviations += fourthPower;
  580 |         }
  581 |         
  582 |         return (sumFourthPowerDeviations / count) - 3.0; // Excess kurtosis
  583 |     }
  584 |     
  585 |     void SortArray(double &array[], int count) {
  586 |         for (int i = 0; i < count - 1; i++) {
  587 |             for (int j = i + 1; j < count; j++) {
  588 |                 if (array[i] > array[j]) {
  589 |                     double temp = array[i];
  590 |                     array[i] = array[j];
  591 |                     array[j] = temp;
  592 |                 }
  593 |             }
  594 |         }
  595 |     }
  596 |     
  597 |     double GetPercentile(const double &sortedData[], int count, double percentile) {
  598 |         if (count <= 0 || percentile < 0 || percentile > 1) return 0.0;
  599 |         
  600 |         double index = percentile * (count - 1);
  601 |         int lowerIndex = (int)MathFloor(index);
  602 |         int upperIndex = (int)MathCeil(index);
  603 |         
  604 |         if (lowerIndex == upperIndex || upperIndex >= count) {
  605 |             return sortedData[MathMin(lowerIndex, count - 1)];
  606 |         }
  607 |         
  608 |         double weight = index - lowerIndex;
  609 |         return sortedData[lowerIndex] * (1.0 - weight) + sortedData[upperIndex] * weight;
  610 |     }
  611 |     
  612 |     double CalculateMaxDrawdownFromReturns(const double &returns[], int count) {
  613 |         if (count <= 0) return 0.0;
  614 |         
  615 |         double maxDrawdown = 0.0;
  616 |         double peak = 1.0;
  617 |         double runningValue = 1.0;
  618 |         
  619 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  620 |             runningValue *= (1.0 + returns[i]);
  621 |             if (runningValue > peak) peak = runningValue;
  622 |             
  623 |             double drawdown = (peak - runningValue) / peak;
  624 |             if (drawdown > maxDrawdown) {
  625 |                 maxDrawdown = drawdown;
  626 |             }
  627 |         }
  628 |         
  629 |         return maxDrawdown * 100.0;
  630 |     }
  631 |     
  632 |     double CalculateUlcerIndexFromEquity(const double &equity[], int count) {
  633 |         if (count <= 1) return 0.0;
  634 |         
  635 |         double sumSquaredDrawdowns = 0.0;
  636 |         double peak = equity[0];
  637 |         
  638 |         for (int i = 1; i < count; i++) {
  639 |             if (equity[i] > peak) peak = equity[i];
  640 |             
  641 |             double drawdown = (peak - equity[i]) / peak;
  642 |             sumSquaredDrawdowns += drawdown * drawdown;
  643 |         }
  644 |         
  645 |         return MathSqrt(sumSquaredDrawdowns / count) * 100.0;
  646 |     }
  647 | };
  648 | 
  649 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5
  650 | 
  651 | #endif // ADVANCEDRISKANALYTICS_MQH_

   16 | interface IRiskEngine
   17 | {
   18 |     // Core Risk Management
   19 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* context);
   20 |     void Deinitialize();
   21 |     
   22 |     // Position Sizing
   23 |     double CalculatePositionSize(double stopLossPips, string &details);
   24 |     double CalculateOptimalSize(double stopLossPips, double confidenceLevel);
   25 |     double CalculateConstrainedSize(double stopLossPips);
   26 |     
   27 |     // Risk Validation
   28 |     bool CanOpenNewPosition();
   29 |     bool ValidateRiskLimits(double positionSize, double stopLoss);
   30 |     bool CheckPortfolioLimits();
   31 |     bool CheckVaRLimits();
   32 |     
   33 |     // Risk Metrics

   42 |     double GetMarketRegimeRiskFactor();
   43 |     double GetSessionRiskFactor();
   44 |     double GetNewsRiskFactor();

   46 |

   49 |     double CalculateMaxDrawdownProbability();
   50 |     double CalculateKellyPercentage();
   51 |     double CalculateSharpeRatio();
   52 |     double CalculateSortinoRatio();
   53 |     
   54 |     // Stress Testing

   56 |     void RunMonteCarloSimulation(int iterations);
   57 |     void PerformScenarioAnalysis();
   58 |     
   59 |     // Emergency Controls

   61 |     void CheckEmergencyConditions();
   62 |     bool IsEmergencyCondition();
   63 |     
   64 |     // Event Handling
   65 |     void OnDealExecuted(long dealTicket);
   66 |     void OnPositionOpened(ulong positionTicket);
   67 |     void OnPositionClosed(ulong positionTicket);
   68 |     void Update();
   69 | };

  204 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  205 | //| Risk Alert Types                                                |
  206 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  207 | enum ENUM_RISK_ALERT_TYPE
  208 | {
  209 |     ALERT_DRAWDOWN_WARNING,
  210 |     ALERT_DRAWDOWN_CRITICAL,
  211 |     ALERT_DAILY_LOSS_WARNING,
  212 |     ALERT_DAILY_LOSS_CRITICAL,
  213 |     ALERT_CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES,
  214 |     ALERT_VAR_EXCEEDED,
  215 |     ALERT_PORTFOLIO_LIMIT,
  216 |     ALERT_CORRELATION_HIGH,
  217 |     ALERT_VOLATILITY_SPIKE,
  218 |     ALERT_NEWS_RISK,
  219 |     ALERT_MARGIN_CALL_RISK,
  220 |     ALERT_EMERGENCY_STOP
  221 | };
  222 | 
  223 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  224 | //| Risk Alert Thresholds Structure                                 |
  225 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  226 | struct SRiskAlertThresholds
  227 | {
  228 |     double DrawdownWarning;      // % of max drawdown for warning
  229 |     double DrawdownCritical;     // % of max drawdown for critical alert
  230 |     double DailyLossWarning;     // % of daily loss for warning
  231 |     double DailyLossCritical;    // % of daily loss for critical alert
  232 |     int    ConsecutiveLossLimit; // Number of consecutive losses
  233 |     double VaRWarningLevel;      // VaR threshold for warning
  234 |     double CorrelationLimit;     // Maximum correlation threshold
  235 |     double VolatilityMultiple;   // Volatility spike multiple
  236 |     int    NewsRiskMinutes;      // Minutes before news to alert
  237 |     double MarginUtilization;    // Margin utilization warning level
  238 |     
  239 |     SRiskAlertThresholds() {
  240 |         DrawdownWarning = 0.75;      // 75% of max drawdown
  241 |         DrawdownCritical = 0.9;      // 90% of max drawdown
  242 |         DailyLossWarning = 0.75;     // 75% of daily loss limit
  243 |         DailyLossCritical = 0.9;     // 90% of daily loss limit
  244 |         ConsecutiveLossLimit = 5;    // 5 consecutive losses
  245 |         VaRWarningLevel = 0.04;      // 4% VaR warning
  246 |         CorrelationLimit = 0.8;      // 80% correlation limit
  247 |         VolatilityMultiple = 2.0;    // 2x normal volatility
  248 |         NewsRiskMinutes = 30;        // 30 minutes before news
  249 |         MarginUtilization = 0.8;     // 80% margin utilization
  250 |     }
  251 | };
  252 | 
  253 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5

  319 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  320 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 | CPortfolioManager::CPortfolioManager() {
  323 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  324 |     m_AssetCount = 0;
  325 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  326 |     m_Status = PORTFOLIO_STATUS_INACTIVE;
  327 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  328 |     m_LastRebalance = 0;
  329 |     m_HistoryDepth = 0;
  330 |     
  331 |     ZeroMemory(m_Metrics);
  332 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  333 |     ZeroMemory(m_CorrelationMatrix);
  334 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  335 |     
  336 |     // Set default configuration
  337 |     m_Config.Name = "Default Portfolio";
  338 |     m_Config.RiskLevel = RISK_LEVEL_MODERATE;
  339 |     m_Config.AllocationMethod = ALLOCATION_EQUAL_WEIGHT;
  340 |     m_Config.TargetVolatility = 15.0;  // 15% annual volatility
  341 |     m_Config.TargetReturn = 10.0;      // 10% annual return
  342 |     m_Config.EnableRiskManagement = true;
  343 |     m_Config.EnableRebalancing = true;
  344 |     m_Config.EnableCorrelationControl = true;
  345 |     
  346 |     // Set default constraints
  347 |     m_Config.Constraints.MaxPositionSize = 20.0;      // 20% max per position
  348 |     m_Config.Constraints.MaxSectorExposure = 30.0;    // 30% max per sector
  349 |     m_Config.Constraints.MaxCorrelation = 0.7;        // 70% max correlation
  350 |     m_Config.Constraints.MinDiversification = 0.5;    // 50% min diversification
  351 |     m_Config.Constraints.MaxLeverage = 2.0;           // 2x max leverage
  352 |     m_Config.Constraints.MaxDrawdownLimit = 15.0;     // 15% max drawdown
  353 |     m_Config.Constraints.MinLiquidity = 0.8;          // 80% min liquidity
  354 |     m_Config.Constraints.MaxPositions = 20;           // 20 max positions
  355 |     m_Config.Constraints.EnforceConstraints = true;
  356 |     
  357 |     // Set default rebalance config
  358 |     m_Config.RebalanceConfig.TriggerType = REBALANCE_THRESHOLD_BASED;
  359 |     m_Config.RebalanceConfig.RebalanceInterval = 168;  // Weekly
  360 |     m_Config.RebalanceConfig.ThresholdPercent = 5.0;   // 5% threshold
  361 |     m_Config.RebalanceConfig.AutoRebalance = true;
  362 |     
  363 |     // Set default risk budget
  364 |     m_Config.RiskBudget.TotalRiskBudget = 100.0;
  365 |     m_Config.RiskBudget.MaxRiskPerAsset = 25.0;        // 25% max risk per asset
  366 |     m_Config.RiskBudget.ConcentrationLimit = 30.0;     // 30% concentration limit
  367 | }
  368 |
