  376 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  377 | //| Initialize portfolio manager                                    |
  378 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  379 | bool CPortfolioManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  380 |     if (context == NULL) {
  381 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  382 |         return false;
  383 |     }
  384 |     
  385 |     m_pContext = context;
  386 |     
  387 |     // Initialize correlation matrix
  388 |     m_CorrelationMatrix.SymbolCount = 0;
  389 |     m_CorrelationMatrix.LastUpdate = 0;
  390 |     
  391 |     // Initialize statistics
  392 |     m_Statistics.FirstTrade = 0;
  393 |     m_Statistics.LastTrade = 0;
  394 |     
  395 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  396 |     m_Status = PORTFOLIO_STATUS_ACTIVE;
  397 |     m_Config.CreationTime = TimeCurrent();
  398 |     
  399 |     LogActivity("Portfolio manager initialized successfully");
  400 |     return true;
  401 | }
  402 | 
  403 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  404 | //| Deinitialize portfolio manager                                  |
  405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 | bool CPortfolioManager::Deinitialize() {
  407 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  408 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  409 |         m_Status = PORTFOLIO_STATUS_CLOSED;
  410 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  411 |         LogActivity("Portfolio manager deinitialized");
  412 |     }
  413 |     
  414 |     return true;
  415 | }
  416 | 
  417 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  418 | //| Configure portfolio manager                                     |
  419 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  420 | bool CPortfolioManager::Configure(const SPortfolioConfiguration& config) {
  421 |     m_Config = config;
  422 |     m_Config.LastModified = TimeCurrent();
  423 |     
  424 |     // Validate configuration
  425 |     if (m_Config.TargetVolatility < 1.0) m_Config.TargetVolatility = 1.0;
  426 |     if (m_Config.TargetVolatility > 100.0) m_Config.TargetVolatility = 100.0;
  427 |     if (m_Config.TargetReturn < -50.0) m_Config.TargetReturn = -50.0;
  428 |     if (m_Config.TargetReturn > 200.0) m_Config.TargetReturn = 200.0;
  429 |     
  430 |     LogActivity("Portfolio manager configured successfully");
  431 |     return true;
  432 | }
  433 | 
  434 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  435 | //| Add asset to portfolio                                          |
  436 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  437 | bool CPortfolioManager::AddAsset(const string symbol, double targetWeight) {
  438 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  439 |         LogError("Portfolio manager not initialized");
  440 |         return false;
  441 |     }
  442 |     
  443 |     if (m_AssetCount >= ArraySize(m_Assets)) {
  444 |         LogError("Maximum number of assets reached");
  445 |         return false;
  446 |     }
  447 |     
  448 |     // Check if asset already exists
  449 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  450 |         if (m_Assets[i].Symbol == symbol) {
  451 |             LogError("Asset already exists in portfolio: " + symbol);
  452 |             return false;
  453 |         }
  454 |     }
  455 |     
  456 |     // Validate target weight
  457 |     if (targetWeight < 0.0 || targetWeight > 100.0) {
  458 |         LogError("Invalid target weight: " + DoubleToString(targetWeight, 2));
  459 |         return false;
  460 |     }
  461 |     
  462 |     // Add new asset
  463 |     SPortfolioAsset asset;
  464 |     ZeroMemory(asset);
  465 |     
  466 |     asset.Symbol = symbol;
  467 |     asset.TargetWeight = targetWeight;
  468 |     asset.CurrentWeight = 0.0;
  469 |     asset.CurrentValue = 0.0;
  470 |     asset.AveragePrice = 0.0;
  471 |     asset.UnrealizedPnL = 0.0;
  472 |     asset.RealizedPnL = 0.0;
  473 |     asset.Volume = 0.0;
  474 |     asset.PositionType = POSITION_TYPE_NEUTRAL;
  475 |     asset.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  476 |     asset.IsActive = true;
  477 |     asset.Beta = 1.0;
  478 |     asset.Volatility = 0.0;
  479 |     asset.Sharpe = 0.0;
  480 |     asset.MaxDrawdown = 0.0;
  481 |     
  482 |     m_Assets[m_AssetCount] = asset;
  483 |     m_AssetCount++;
  484 |     
  485 |     LogActivity("Asset added to portfolio: " + symbol + " (Target: " + DoubleToString(targetWeight, 2) + "%)");
  486 |     return true;
  487 | }
  488 | 
  489 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 | //| Remove asset from portfolio                                     |
  491 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  492 | bool CPortfolioManager::RemoveAsset(const string symbol) {
  493 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  494 |         LogError("Portfolio manager not initialized");
  495 |         return false;
  496 |     }
  497 |     
  498 |     // Find asset
  499 |     int assetIndex = -1;
  500 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  501 |         if (m_Assets[i].Symbol == symbol) {
  502 |             assetIndex = i;
  503 |             break;
  504 |         }
  505 |     }
  506 |     
  507 |     if (assetIndex == -1) {
  508 |         LogError("Asset not found in portfolio: " + symbol);
  509 |         return false;
  510 |     }
  511 |     
  512 |     // Close any open positions first
  513 |     if (m_Assets[assetIndex].Volume != 0.0) {
  514 |         ClosePosition(symbol);
  515 |     }
  516 |     
  517 |     // Remove asset by shifting array
  518 |     for (int i = assetIndex; i < m_AssetCount - 1; i++) {
  519 |         m_Assets[i] = m_Assets[i + 1];
  520 |     }
  521 |     
  522 |     m_AssetCount--;
  523 |     
  524 |     LogActivity("Asset removed from portfolio: " + symbol);
  525 |     return true;
  526 | }
  527 | 
  528 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  529 | //| Update asset weight                                             |
  530 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  531 | bool CPortfolioManager::UpdateAssetWeight(const string symbol, double newWeight) {
  532 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  533 |         LogError("Portfolio manager not initialized");
  534 |         return false;
  535 |     }
  536 |     
  537 |     // Find asset
  538 |     int assetIndex = -1;
  539 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  540 |         if (m_Assets[i].Symbol == symbol) {
  541 |             assetIndex = i;
  542 |             break;
  543 |         }
  544 |     }
  545 |     
  546 |     if (assetIndex == -1) {
  547 |         LogError("Asset not found in portfolio: " + symbol);
  548 |         return false;
  549 |     }
  550 |     
  551 |     // Validate new weight
  552 |     if (newWeight < 0.0 || newWeight > 100.0) {
  553 |         LogError("Invalid weight: " + DoubleToString(newWeight, 2));
  554 |         return false;
  555 |     }
  556 |     
  557 |     double oldWeight = m_Assets[assetIndex].TargetWeight;
  558 |     m_Assets[assetIndex].TargetWeight = newWeight;
  559 |     m_Assets[assetIndex].LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  560 |     
  561 |     LogActivity("Asset weight updated: " + symbol + " (" + DoubleToString(oldWeight, 2) + "% -> " + DoubleToString(newWeight, 2) + "%)");
  562 |     return true;
  563 | }
  564 | 
  565 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  566 | //| Update portfolio                                                |
  567 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  568 | bool CPortfolioManager::UpdatePortfolio() {
  569 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_Status != PORTFOLIO_STATUS_ACTIVE) {
  570 |         return false;
  571 |     }
  572 |     
  573 |     // Update asset metrics
  574 |     UpdateAssetMetrics();
  575 |     
  576 |     // Calculate portfolio metrics
  577 |     CalculatePortfolioMetrics();
  578 |     
  579 |     // Update correlation matrix
  580 |     UpdateCorrelationMatrix();
  581 |     
  582 |     // Calculate risk metrics
  583 |     CalculateRiskMetrics();
  584 |     
  585 |     // Check constraints
  586 |     if (m_Config.Constraints.EnforceConstraints) {
  587 |         CheckConstraints();
  588 |     }
  589 |     
  590 |     // Check if rebalancing is needed
  591 |     if (m_Config.EnableRebalancing && IsRebalanceNeeded()) {
  592 |         if (m_Config.RebalanceConfig.AutoRebalance) {
  593 |             PerformRebalance();
  594 |         }
  595 |     }
  596 |     
  597 |     // Update statistics
  598 |     UpdateStatistics();
  599 |     
  600 |     m_LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  601 |     m_Metrics.LastUpdate = m_LastUpdate;
  602 |     
  603 |     return true;
  604 | }
  605 | 
  606 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  607 | //| Update asset metrics                                            |
  608 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  609 | bool CPortfolioManager::UpdateAssetMetrics() {
  610 |     double totalValue = 0.0;
  611 |     
  612 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  613 |         if (!m_Assets[i].IsActive) continue;
  614 |         
  615 |         string symbol = m_Assets[i].Symbol;
  616 |         
  617 |         // Get current price
  618 |         double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  619 |         if (currentPrice <= 0.0) {
  620 |             currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_LAST);
  621 |         }
  622 |         
  623 |         if (currentPrice > 0.0) {
  624 |             // Calculate current value
  625 |             m_Assets[i].CurrentValue = m_Assets[i].Volume * currentPrice;
  626 |             totalValue += m_Assets[i].CurrentValue;
  627 |             
  628 |             // Calculate unrealized PnL
  629 |             if (m_Assets[i].AveragePrice > 0.0) {
  630 |                 m_Assets[i].UnrealizedPnL = (currentPrice - m_Assets[i].AveragePrice) * m_Assets[i].Volume;
  631 |             }
  632 |             
  633 |             m_Assets[i].LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  634 |         }
  635 |     }
  636 |     
  637 |     // Calculate current weights
  638 |     if (totalValue > 0.0) {
  639 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  640 |             if (m_Assets[i].IsActive) {
  641 |                 m_Assets[i].CurrentWeight = (m_Assets[i].CurrentValue / totalValue) * 100.0;
  642 |             }
  643 |         }
  644 |     }
  645 |     
  646 |     return true;
  647 | }
  648 | 
  649 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  650 | //| Calculate portfolio metrics                                     |
  651 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  652 | bool CPortfolioManager::CalculatePortfolioMetrics() {
  653 |     // Reset metrics
  654 |     m_Metrics.TotalValue = 0.0;
  655 |     m_Metrics.UnrealizedPnL = 0.0;
  656 |     m_Metrics.RealizedPnL = 0.0;
  657 |     
  658 |     // Sum up asset values and PnL
  659 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  660 |         if (m_Assets[i].IsActive) {
  661 |             m_Metrics.TotalValue += m_Assets[i].CurrentValue;
  662 |             m_Metrics.UnrealizedPnL += m_Assets[i].UnrealizedPnL;
  663 |             m_Metrics.RealizedPnL += m_Assets[i].RealizedPnL;
  664 |         }
  665 |     }
  666 |     
  667 |     m_Metrics.TotalPnL = m_Metrics.UnrealizedPnL + m_Metrics.RealizedPnL;
  668 |     
  669 |     // Calculate returns (simplified)
  670 |     static double previousValue = 0.0;
  671 |     if (previousValue > 0.0 && m_Metrics.TotalValue > 0.0) {
  672 |         m_Metrics.DailyReturn = ((m_Metrics.TotalValue - previousValue) / previousValue) * 100.0;
  673 |     }
  674 |     previousValue = m_Metrics.TotalValue;
  675 |     
  676 |     // Calculate portfolio volatility
  677 |     m_Metrics.Volatility = CalculatePortfolioVolatility();
  678 |     
  679 |     // Calculate Sharpe ratio
  680 |     m_Metrics.SharpeRatio = CalculateSharpeRatio();
  681 |     
  682 |     // Calculate VaR
  683 |     m_Metrics.VaR95 = CalculateVaR(0.95);
  684 |     m_Metrics.VaR99 = CalculateVaR(0.99);
  685 |     
  686 |     // Calculate portfolio beta
  687 |     m_Metrics.Beta = CalculatePortfolioBeta();
  688 |     
  689 |     return true;
  690 | }
  691 | 
  692 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  693 | //| Calculate portfolio volatility                                  |
  694 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  695 | double CPortfolioManager::CalculatePortfolioVolatility() {
  696 |     if (m_AssetCount == 0) return 0.0;
  697 |     
  698 |     double portfolioVariance = 0.0;
  699 |     
  700 |     // Calculate weighted variance
  701 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  702 |         if (!m_Assets[i].IsActive) continue;
  703 |         
  704 |         double weight_i = m_Assets[i].CurrentWeight / 100.0;
  705 |         double variance_i = m_Assets[i].Volatility * m_Assets[i].Volatility;
  706 |         
  707 |         portfolioVariance += weight_i * weight_i * variance_i;
  708 |         
  709 |         // Add covariance terms
  710 |         for (int j = i + 1; j < m_AssetCount; j++) {
  711 |             if (!m_Assets[j].IsActive) continue;
  712 |             
  713 |             double weight_j = m_Assets[j].CurrentWeight / 100.0;
  714 |             double correlation = CalculateCorrelation(i, j);
  715 |             double covariance = correlation * m_Assets[i].Volatility * m_Assets[j].Volatility;
  716 |             
  717 |             portfolioVariance += 2.0 * weight_i * weight_j * covariance;
  718 |         }
  719 |     }
  720 |     
  721 |     return MathSqrt(portfolioVariance);
  722 | }
  723 | 
  724 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  725 | //| Calculate Sharpe ratio                                          |
  726 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  727 | double CPortfolioManager::CalculateSharpeRatio() {
  728 |     if (m_Metrics.Volatility == 0.0) return 0.0;
  729 |     
  730 |     double riskFreeRate = 2.0;  // Assume 2% risk-free rate
  731 |     double excessReturn = m_Metrics.YearlyReturn - riskFreeRate;
  732 |     
  733 |     return excessReturn / m_Metrics.Volatility;
  734 | }
  735 | 
  736 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  737 | //| Calculate Value at Risk                                         |
  738 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  739 | double CPortfolioManager::CalculateVaR(double confidence) {
  740 |     if (m_Metrics.TotalValue == 0.0 || m_Metrics.Volatility == 0.0) return 0.0;
  741 |     
  742 |     // Use normal distribution approximation
  743 |     double z_score = (confidence == 0.95) ? 1.645 : 2.326;  // 95% or 99%
  744 |     
  745 |     double dailyVol = m_Metrics.Volatility / MathSqrt(252.0);  // Annualized to daily
  746 |     double var = m_Metrics.TotalValue * z_score * dailyVol;
  747 |     
  748 |     return var;
  749 | }
  750 | 
  751 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  752 | //| Calculate correlation between two assets                        |
  753 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  754 | double CPortfolioManager::CalculateCorrelation(int asset1, int asset2) {
  755 |     if (asset1 >= m_AssetCount || asset2 >= m_AssetCount || asset1 == asset2) {
  756 |         return 0.0;
  757 |     }
  758 |     
  759 |     // Simplified correlation calculation
  760 |     // In practice, this would use historical price data
  761 |     return 0.3;  // Placeholder value
  762 | }
  763 | 
  764 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  765 | //| Check if rebalancing is needed                                  |
  766 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  767 | bool CPortfolioManager::IsRebalanceNeeded() {
  768 |     if (!m_Config.EnableRebalancing) return false;
  769 |     
  770 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  771 |     
  772 |     switch (m_Config.RebalanceConfig.TriggerType) {
  773 |         case REBALANCE_TIME_BASED:
  774 |             return (currentTime - m_LastRebalance) >= (m_Config.RebalanceConfig.RebalanceInterval * 3600);
  775 |             
  776 |         case REBALANCE_THRESHOLD_BASED:
  777 |             {
  778 |                 // Check if any asset deviates from target by threshold
  779 |                 for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  780 |                     if (m_Assets[i].IsActive) {
  781 |                         double deviation = MathAbs(m_Assets[i].CurrentWeight - m_Assets[i].TargetWeight);
  782 |                         if (deviation >= m_Config.RebalanceConfig.ThresholdPercent) {
  783 |                             return true;
  784 |                         }
  785 |                     }
  786 |                 }
  787 |                 return false;
  788 |             }
  789 |             
  790 |         case REBALANCE_VOLATILITY_BASED:
  791 |             return m_Metrics.Volatility > m_Config.RebalanceConfig.VolatilityThreshold;
  792 |             
  793 |         case REBALANCE_PERFORMANCE_BASED:
  794 |             return MathAbs(m_Metrics.DailyReturn) > m_Config.RebalanceConfig.PerformanceThreshold;
  795 |             
  796 |         default:
  797 |             return false;
  798 |     }
  799 | }
  800 | 
  801 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  802 | //| Perform portfolio rebalancing                                   |
  803 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  804 | bool CPortfolioManager::PerformRebalance() {
  805 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_Status != PORTFOLIO_STATUS_ACTIVE) {
  806 |         return false;
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     LogActivity("Starting portfolio rebalancing");
  810 |     
  811 |     // Calculate target values based on current total value
  812 |     double totalValue = m_Metrics.TotalValue;
  813 |     if (totalValue <= 0.0) {
  814 |         LogError("Cannot rebalance: total portfolio value is zero");
  815 |         return false;
  816 |     }
  817 |     
  818 |     // Calculate required trades
  819 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_AssetCount; i++) {
  820 |         if (!m_Assets[i].IsActive) continue;
  821 |         
  822 |         double targetValue = (m_Assets[i].TargetWeight / 100.0) * totalValue;
  823 |         double currentValue = m_Assets[i].CurrentValue;
  824 |         double difference = targetValue - currentValue;
  825 |         
  826 |         if (MathAbs(difference) > (totalValue * 0.01)) {  // 1% minimum trade size
  827 |             // Calculate required volume change
  828 |             double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Assets[i].Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  829 |             if (currentPrice > 0.0) {
  830 |                 double volumeChange = difference / currentPrice;
  831 |                 
  832 |                 // Execute trade (simplified)
  833 |                 if (volumeChange > 0) {
  834 |                     // Buy more
  835 |                     LogActivity("Rebalance: Buy " + DoubleToString(volumeChange, 2) + " of " + m_Assets[i].Symbol);
  836 |                 } else {
  837 |                     // Sell some
  838 |                     LogActivity("Rebalance: Sell " + DoubleToString(-volumeChange, 2) + " of " + m_Assets[i].Symbol);
  839 |                 }
  840 |                 
  841 |                 // Update volume (in practice, this would be done after successful trade execution)
  842 |                 m_Assets[i].Volume += volumeChange;
  843 |             }
  844 |         }
  845 |     }
  846 |     
  847 |     m_LastRebalance = TimeCurrent();
  848 |     m_Config.RebalanceConfig.LastRebalance = m_LastRebalance;
  849 |     
  850 |     LogActivity("Portfolio rebalancing completed");
  851 |     return true;
  852 | }
  853 | 
  854 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  855 | //| Log error message                                               |
  856 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  857 | void CPortfolioManager::LogError(const string message) {
  858 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  859 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("PortfolioManager: " + message);
  860 |     } else {
  861 |         Print("PortfolioManager ERROR: ", message);
  862 |     }
  863 | }
  864 | 
  865 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  866 | //| Log activity message                                            |
  867 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  868 | void CPortfolioManager::LogActivity(const string message) {
  869 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  870 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("PortfolioManager: " + message);
  871 |     } else {
  872 |         Print("PortfolioManager: ", message);
  873 |     }
  874 | }

  876 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  877 | //| Get status name                                                 |
  878 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  879 | string CPortfolioManager::GetStatusName(ENUM_PORTFOLIO_STATUS status) {
  880 |     switch (status) {
  881 |         case PORTFOLIO_STATUS_ACTIVE: return "Active";
  882 |         case PORTFOLIO_STATUS_INACTIVE: return "Inactive";
  883 |         case PORTFOLIO_STATUS_SUSPENDED: return "Suspended";
  884 |         case PORTFOLIO_STATUS_LIQUIDATING: return "Liquidating";
  885 |         case PORTFOLIO_STATUS_CLOSED: return "Closed";
  886 |         default: return "Unknown";
  887 |     }
  888 | }
  889 | 
  890 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  891 | //| Get risk level name                                             |
  892 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  893 | string CPortfolioManager::GetRiskLevelName(ENUM_RISK_LEVEL level) {
  894 |     switch (level) {
  895 |         case RISK_LEVEL_CONSERVATIVE: return "Conservative";
  896 |         case RISK_LEVEL_MODERATE: return "Moderate";
  897 |         case RISK_LEVEL_AGGRESSIVE: return "Aggressive";
  898 |         case RISK_LEVEL_SPECULATIVE: return "Speculative";
  899 |         default: return "Unknown";
  900 |     }
  901 | }
  902 | 
  903 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  904 | //| Get allocation method name                                      |
  905 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  906 | string CPortfolioManager::GetAllocationMethodName(ENUM_ALLOCATION_METHOD method) {
  907 |     switch (method) {
  908 |         case ALLOCATION_EQUAL_WEIGHT: return "Equal Weight";
  909 |         case ALLOCATION_RISK_PARITY: return "Risk Parity";
  910 |         case ALLOCATION_MARKET_CAP: return "Market Cap";
  911 |         case ALLOCATION_VOLATILITY_TARGET: return "Volatility Target";
  912 |         case ALLOCATION_CUSTOM: return "Custom";
  913 |         default: return "Unknown";
  914 |     }
  915 | }

   19 | // Risk metrics structure
   20 | struct SRiskMetrics {
   21 |     double AccountBalance;               // Current account balance
   22 |     double AccountEquity;                // Current account equity
   23 |     double FreeMargin;                   // Available free margin
   24 |     double UsedMargin;                   // Currently used margin
   25 |     double MarginLevel;                  // Margin level percentage
   26 |     double MaxDrawdown;                  // Maximum drawdown
   27 |     double CurrentDrawdown;              // Current drawdown
   28 |     double VaR95;                        // Value at Risk (95% confidence)
   29 |     double VaR99;                        // Value at Risk (99% confidence)
   30 |     double PortfolioRisk;                // Total portfolio risk
   31 |     double DailyRisk;                    // Daily risk exposure
   32 |     double WeeklyRisk;                   // Weekly risk exposure
   33 |     double MonthlyRisk;                  // Monthly risk exposure
   34 |     datetime LastUpdate;                 // Last update time
   35 |     
   36 |     void Reset() {
   37 |         AccountBalance = 0.0;
   38 |         AccountEquity = 0.0;
   39 |         FreeMargin = 0.0;
   40 |         UsedMargin = 0.0;
   41 |         MarginLevel = 0.0;
   42 |         MaxDrawdown = 0.0;
   43 |         CurrentDrawdown = 0.0;
   44 |         VaR95 = 0.0;
   45 |         VaR99 = 0.0;
   46 |         PortfolioRisk = 0.0;
   47 |         DailyRisk = 0.0;
   48 |         WeeklyRisk = 0.0;
   49 |         MonthlyRisk = 0.0;
   50 |         LastUpdate = 0;
   51 |     }
   52 | };
   53 | 
   54 | // Position sizing configuration
   55 | struct SPositionSizing {
   56 |     bool UseFixedLot;                    // Use fixed lot size
   57 |     double FixedLotSize;                 // Fixed lot size
   58 |     bool UsePercentRisk;                 // Use percentage-based risk
   59 |     double RiskPercent;                  // Risk percentage per trade
   60 |     bool UseVolatilityAdjustment;        // Adjust size based on volatility
   61 |     double MinLotSize;                   // Minimum lot size
   62 |     double MaxLotSize;                   // Maximum lot size
   63 |     bool UseEquityCurve;                 // Adjust based on equity curve
   64 |     double EquityCurveFilter;            // Equity curve filter level
   65 |     
   66 |     void Reset() {
   67 |         UseFixedLot = false;
   68 |         FixedLotSize = 0.1;
   69 |         UsePercentRisk = true;
   70 |         RiskPercent = 2.0;
   71 |         UseVolatilityAdjustment = true;
   72 |         MinLotSize = 0.01;
   73 |         MaxLotSize = 10.0;
   74 |         UseEquityCurve = false;
   75 |         EquityCurveFilter = 0.8;
   76 |     }
   77 | };
   78 | 
   79 | // Risk limits configuration
   80 | struct SRiskLimits {
   81 |     double MaxDailyLoss;                 // Maximum daily loss
   82 |     double MaxWeeklyLoss;                // Maximum weekly loss
   83 |     double MaxMonthlyLoss;               // Maximum monthly loss
   84 |     double MaxDrawdownPercent;           // Maximum drawdown percentage
   85 |     double MaxRiskPerTrade;              // Maximum risk per trade
   86 |     double MaxPortfolioRisk;             // Maximum total portfolio risk
   87 |     int MaxConcurrentTrades;             // Maximum concurrent trades
   88 |     double MaxCorrelationRisk;           // Maximum correlation risk
   89 |     bool EnableEmergencyStop;            // Enable emergency stop
   90 |     double EmergencyStopLevel;           // Emergency stop trigger level
   91 |     
   92 |     void Reset() {
   93 |         MaxDailyLoss = 500.0;
   94 |         MaxWeeklyLoss = 1500.0;
   95 |         MaxMonthlyLoss = 5000.0;
   96 |         MaxDrawdownPercent = 15.0;
   97 |         MaxRiskPerTrade = 2.0;
   98 |         MaxPortfolioRisk = 10.0;
   99 |         MaxConcurrentTrades = 5;
  100 |         MaxCorrelationRisk = 0.7;
  101 |         EnableEmergencyStop = true;
  102 |         EmergencyStopLevel = 20.0;
  103 |     }
  104 | };
  105 | 
  106 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  107 | //| Risk Manager Class                                               |
  108 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 | class CRiskManager {
  110 | private:
  111 |     // Core references
  112 |     EAContext*                    m_pContext;
  113 |     bool                         m_bInitialized;
  114 |     
  115 |     // Risk tracking
  116 |     SRiskMetrics                 m_CurrentMetrics;
  117 |     SPositionSizing              m_PositionSizing;
  118 |     SRiskLimits                  m_RiskLimits;
  119 |     
  120 |     // Risk state management
  121 |     bool                         m_TradingEnabled;
  122 |     bool                         m_EmergencyStopTriggered;
  123 |     string                       m_DisableReason;
  124 |     datetime                     m_LastRiskCheck;
  125 |     
  126 |     // Performance tracking
  127 |     double                       m_DailyPnL[];
  128 |     double                       m_WeeklyPnL[];
  129 |     double                       m_MonthlyPnL[];
  130 |     static const int             HISTORY_SIZE = 365;
  131 |     
  132 |     // Risk calculation helpers
  133 |     double                       m_PeakEquity;
  134 |     double                       m_TroughEquity;
  135 |     datetime                     m_StartTime;
  136 |     
  137 |     // Internal methods
  138 |     void                         UpdateRiskMetrics();
  139 |     double                       CalculatePositionSize(double riskAmount, double stopLossPips);
  140 |     double                       CalculateVaR(double confidence);
  141 |     bool                         CheckRiskLimits();
  142 |     void                         UpdateDrawdownTracking();
  143 |     void                         UpdatePerformanceHistory();
  144 |     bool                         ValidateTradeRisk(const STradeInfo& trade);
  145 |     
  146 | public:
  147 |     // Constructor and destructor
  148 |                                  CRiskManager();
  149 |                                 ~CRiskManager();
  150 |     
  151 |     // Initialization and cleanup
  152 |     bool                         Initialize(EAContext* context);
  153 |     void                         Cleanup();
  154 |     
  155 |     // Core risk management methods
  156 |     void                         Update();
  157 |     bool                         CanOpenNewPosition();
  158 |     double                       CalculateOptimalLotSize(string symbol, double riskPercent, double stopLossPips);
  159 |     bool                         ValidateNewTrade(const STradeInfo& tradeInfo);
  160 |     void                         OnTradeOpened(const STradeInfo& trade);
  161 |     void                         OnTradeClosed(const STradeInfo& trade);
  162 |     
  163 |     // Risk metrics and monitoring
  164 |     SRiskMetrics                 GetRiskMetrics() { return m_CurrentMetrics; }
  165 |     double                       GetCurrentDrawdown();
  166 |     double                       GetMaxDrawdown() { return m_CurrentMetrics.MaxDrawdown; }
  167 |     double                       GetVaR(double confidence = 0.95);
  168 |     double                       GetPortfolioRisk();
  169 |     
  170 |     // Trading control
  171 |     bool                         IsTradingEnabled() { return m_TradingEnabled; }
  172 |     bool                         IsTradingDisabled() { return !m_TradingEnabled; }
  173 |     void                         EnableTrading(string reason = "Manual enable");
  174 |     void                         DisableTrading(string reason = "Manual disable");
  175 |     string                       GetStatus();
  176 |     string                       GetDisableReason() { return m_DisableReason; }
  177 |     
  178 |     // Position sizing
  179 |     void                         ConfigurePositionSizing(bool useFixed, double lotSize, 
  180 |                                                         double riskPercent, double minLot, double maxLot);
  181 |     double                       GetRecommendedLotSize(string symbol, double stopLossPips);
  182 |     double                       AdjustLotSizeForVolatility(double baseLotSize, string symbol);
  183 |     
  184 |     // Risk limits management
  185 |     void                         SetRiskLimits(double dailyLoss, double weeklyLoss, double monthlyLoss, 
  186 |                                              double maxDrawdown, double maxRiskPerTrade);
  187 |     bool                         IsWithinRiskLimits();
  188 |     void                         TriggerEmergencyStop(string reason);
  189 |     void                         ResetEmergencyStop();
  190 |     
  191 |     // Performance analysis
  192 |     double                       GetDailyPnL();
  193 |     double                       GetWeeklyPnL();
  194 |     double                       GetMonthlyPnL();
  195 |     double                       GetSharpeRatio();
  196 |     double                       GetSortinoRatio();
  197 |     
  198 |     // Configuration and control
  199 |     bool                         UpdateConfiguration(EAContext* context);
  200 |     void                         ResetRiskMetrics();
  201 |     
  202 |     // Diagnostics and reporting
  203 |     void                         RunDiagnostics();
  204 |     string                       GetRiskReport();
  205 |     string                       GetPerformanceReport();
  206 |     
  207 |     // Stress testing
  208 |     double                       StressTestDrawdown(double stressLevel);
  209 |     double                       WorstCaseScenario();
  210 |     double                       BestCaseScenario();
  211 | };
  212 | 
  213 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  214 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 | CRiskManager::CRiskManager() {
  217 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  218 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  219 |     m_TradingEnabled = true;
  220 |     m_EmergencyStopTriggered = false;
  221 |     m_DisableReason = "";
  222 |     m_LastRiskCheck = 0;
  223 |     m_PeakEquity = 0.0;
  224 |     m_TroughEquity = 0.0;
  225 |     m_StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  226 |     
  227 |     // Initialize arrays
  228 |     ArrayResize(m_DailyPnL, HISTORY_SIZE);
  229 |     ArrayResize(m_WeeklyPnL, 52); // 52 weeks
  230 |     ArrayResize(m_MonthlyPnL, 12); // 12 months
  231 |     ArrayInitialize(m_DailyPnL, 0.0);
  232 |     ArrayInitialize(m_WeeklyPnL, 0.0);
  233 |     ArrayInitialize(m_MonthlyPnL, 0.0);
  234 |     
  235 |     // Reset configurations
  236 |     m_CurrentMetrics.Reset();
  237 |     m_PositionSizing.Reset();
  238 |     m_RiskLimits.Reset();
  239 | }
  240 | 
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  243 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  244 | CRiskManager::~CRiskManager() {
  245 |     Cleanup();
  246 | }
  247 | 
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | //| Initialize Risk Manager                                          |
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | bool CRiskManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  252 |     if (context == NULL) {
  253 |         Print("[RISK] ERROR: Invalid context provided");
  254 |         return false;
  255 |     }
  256 |     
  257 |     m_pContext = context;
  258 |     
  259 |     // Initialize risk metrics
  260 |     m_CurrentMetrics.AccountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  261 |     m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  262 |     m_PeakEquity = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity;
  263 |     m_TroughEquity = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity;
  264 |     
  265 |     // Set initial position sizing from context
  266 |     if (context.InputParams.UsePositionSizing) {
  267 |         m_PositionSizing.UsePercentRisk = true;
  268 |         m_PositionSizing.RiskPercent = context.InputParams.MaxRiskPercent;
  269 |     }
  270 |     
  271 |     // Set risk limits from context
  272 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxDailyLoss = context.InputParams.MaxDailyRisk * m_CurrentMetrics.AccountBalance / 100.0;
  273 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxDrawdownPercent = context.InputParams.MaxDrawdownPercent;
  274 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxConcurrentTrades = context.InputParams.MaxConcurrentTrades;
  275 |     
  276 |     UpdateRiskMetrics();
  277 |     
  278 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  279 |     Print("[RISK] Risk Manager initialized successfully");
  280 |     return true;
  281 | }
  282 | 
  283 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  284 | //| Cleanup                                                          |
  285 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  286 | void CRiskManager::Cleanup() {
  287 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  288 |         Print("[RISK] Risk Manager cleaned up");
  289 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  290 |     }
  291 | }
  292 | 
  293 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  294 | //| Main Update Method                                               |
  295 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  296 | void CRiskManager::Update() {
  297 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  298 |     
  299 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  300 |     
  301 |     // Update risk metrics periodically
  302 |     if (currentTime - m_LastRiskCheck >= 60) { // Check every minute
  303 |         UpdateRiskMetrics();
  304 |         UpdateDrawdownTracking();
  305 |         UpdatePerformanceHistory();
  306 |         
  307 |         // Check risk limits
  308 |         if (!CheckRiskLimits()) {
  309 |             if (m_RiskLimits.EnableEmergencyStop && !m_EmergencyStopTriggered) {
  310 |                 TriggerEmergencyStop("Risk limits exceeded");
  311 |             }
  312 |         }
  313 |         
  314 |         m_LastRiskCheck = currentTime;
  315 |     }
  316 | }
  317 | 
  318 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  319 | //| Check if New Position Can Be Opened                             |
  320 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  321 | bool CRiskManager::CanOpenNewPosition() {
  322 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_TradingEnabled || m_EmergencyStopTriggered) {
  323 |         return false;
  324 |     }
  325 |     
  326 |     // Check margin requirements
  327 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.FreeMargin < 100.0) { // Minimum free margin
  328 |         return false;
  329 |     }
  330 |     
  331 |     // Check maximum concurrent trades
  332 |     if (PositionsTotal() >= m_RiskLimits.MaxConcurrentTrades) {
  333 |         return false;
  334 |     }
  335 |     
  336 |     // Check risk limits
  337 |     return IsWithinRiskLimits();
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  341 | //| Calculate Optimal Lot Size                                      |
  342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  343 | double CRiskManager::CalculateOptimalLotSize(string symbol, double riskPercent, double stopLossPips) {
  344 |     if (!m_bInitialized || stopLossPips <= 0) return 0.0;
  345 |     
  346 |     double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  347 |     double riskAmount = accountBalance * riskPercent / 100.0;
  348 |     
  349 |     return CalculatePositionSize(riskAmount, stopLossPips);
  350 | }
  351 | 
  352 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  353 | //| Calculate Position Size Based on Risk                           |
  354 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  355 | double CRiskManager::CalculatePositionSize(double riskAmount, double stopLossPips) {
  356 |     if (stopLossPips <= 0 || riskAmount <= 0) return 0.0;
  357 |     
  358 |     string symbol = _Symbol;
  359 |     double tickSize = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
  360 |     double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  361 |     double pointValue = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  362 |     
  363 |     if (tickValue == 0 || pointValue == 0) return 0.0;
  364 |     
  365 |     // Calculate pip value
  366 |     double pipValue = tickValue * (pointValue / tickSize);
  367 |     
  368 |     // Calculate position size
  369 |     double lotSize = riskAmount / (stopLossPips * pipValue);
  370 |     
  371 |     // Apply lot size constraints
  372 |     double minLot = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  373 |     double maxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  374 |     double lotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  375 |     
  376 |     // Ensure minimum lot size
  377 |     lotSize = MathMax(lotSize, minLot);
  378 |     
  379 |     // Apply configured limits
  380 |     lotSize = MathMax(lotSize, m_PositionSizing.MinLotSize);
  381 |     lotSize = MathMin(lotSize, m_PositionSizing.MaxLotSize);
  382 |     lotSize = MathMin(lotSize, maxLot);
  383 |     
  384 |     // Round to lot step
  385 |     lotSize = MathFloor(lotSize / lotStep) * lotStep;
  386 |     
  387 |     return lotSize;
  388 | }
  389 | 
  390 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  391 | //| Validate New Trade                                              |
  392 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  393 | bool CRiskManager::ValidateNewTrade(const STradeInfo& tradeInfo) {
  394 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_TradingEnabled) return false;
  395 |     
  396 |     return ValidateTradeRisk(tradeInfo);
  397 | }
  398 | 
  399 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  400 | //| Validate Trade Risk                                              |
  401 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  402 | bool CRiskManager::ValidateTradeRisk(const STradeInfo& trade) {
  403 |     // Calculate trade risk
  404 |     double stopLossPips = MathAbs(trade.EntryPrice - trade.StopLoss) / _Point;
  405 |     double tradeRisk = trade.Volume * stopLossPips * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  406 |     
  407 |     // Check if trade risk exceeds limits
  408 |     double maxTradeRisk = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountBalance * m_RiskLimits.MaxRiskPerTrade / 100.0;
  409 |     
  410 |     if (tradeRisk > maxTradeRisk) {
  411 |         Print("[RISK] Trade risk (", tradeRisk, ") exceeds maximum (", maxTradeRisk, ")");
  412 |         return false;
  413 |     }
  414 |     
  415 |     return true;
  416 | }
  417 | 
  418 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  419 | //| Update Risk Metrics                                             |
  420 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  421 | void CRiskManager::UpdateRiskMetrics() {
  422 |     m_CurrentMetrics.AccountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  423 |     m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  424 |     m_CurrentMetrics.FreeMargin = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE);
  425 |     m_CurrentMetrics.UsedMargin = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN);
  426 |     
  427 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.UsedMargin > 0) {
  428 |         m_CurrentMetrics.MarginLevel = (m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity / m_CurrentMetrics.UsedMargin) * 100.0;
  429 |     } else {
  430 |         m_CurrentMetrics.MarginLevel = 0.0;
  431 |     }
  432 |     
  433 |     m_CurrentMetrics.VaR95 = CalculateVaR(0.95);
  434 |     m_CurrentMetrics.VaR99 = CalculateVaR(0.99);
  435 |     m_CurrentMetrics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  436 | }
  437 | 
  438 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  439 | //| Update Drawdown Tracking                                        |
  440 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  441 | void CRiskManager::UpdateDrawdownTracking() {
  442 |     double currentEquity = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity;
  443 |     
  444 |     // Update peak equity
  445 |     if (currentEquity > m_PeakEquity) {
  446 |         m_PeakEquity = currentEquity;
  447 |         m_TroughEquity = currentEquity;
  448 |     }
  449 |     
  450 |     // Update trough equity
  451 |     if (currentEquity < m_TroughEquity) {
  452 |         m_TroughEquity = currentEquity;
  453 |     }
  454 |     
  455 |     // Calculate current drawdown
  456 |     double drawdown = m_PeakEquity - currentEquity;
  457 |     double drawdownPercent = (m_PeakEquity > 0) ? (drawdown / m_PeakEquity) * 100.0 : 0.0;
  458 |     
  459 |     m_CurrentMetrics.CurrentDrawdown = drawdownPercent;
  460 |     
  461 |     // Update maximum drawdown
  462 |     if (drawdownPercent > m_CurrentMetrics.MaxDrawdown) {
  463 |         m_CurrentMetrics.MaxDrawdown = drawdownPercent;
  464 |     }
  465 | }
  466 | 
  467 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  468 | //| Update Performance History                                       |
  469 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  470 | void CRiskManager::UpdatePerformanceHistory() {
  471 |     // This is simplified - in reality would track daily PnL properly
  472 |     static double lastEquity = 0.0;
  473 |     
  474 |     if (lastEquity == 0.0) {
  475 |         lastEquity = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity;
  476 |         return;
  477 |     }
  478 |     
  479 |     double dailyPnL = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity - lastEquity;
  480 |     
  481 |     // Shift array and add new value
  482 |     for (int i = HISTORY_SIZE - 1; i > 0; i--) {
  483 |         m_DailyPnL[i] = m_DailyPnL[i-1];
  484 |     }
  485 |     m_DailyPnL[0] = dailyPnL;
  486 |     
  487 |     lastEquity = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity;
  488 | }
  489 | 
  490 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  491 | //| Calculate Value at Risk                                          |
  492 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  493 | double CRiskManager::CalculateVaR(double confidence) {
  494 |     // Simplified VaR calculation
  495 |     // In reality, this would use historical returns and proper statistical methods
  496 |     
  497 |     double volatility = 0.02; // Assume 2% daily volatility
  498 |     double portfolioValue = m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity;
  499 |     
  500 |     // Use normal distribution approximation
  501 |     double zScore = (confidence == 0.95) ? 1.645 : 2.326; // 95% or 99%
  502 |     
  503 |     return portfolioValue * volatility * zScore;
  504 | }
  505 | 
  506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 | //| Check Risk Limits                                               |
  508 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  509 | bool CRiskManager::CheckRiskLimits() {
  510 |     // Check drawdown limit
  511 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.CurrentDrawdown > m_RiskLimits.MaxDrawdownPercent) {
  512 |         DisableTrading("Maximum drawdown exceeded");
  513 |         return false;
  514 |     }
  515 |     
  516 |     // Check daily loss limit
  517 |     double dailyPnL = GetDailyPnL();
  518 |     if (dailyPnL < -m_RiskLimits.MaxDailyLoss) {
  519 |         DisableTrading("Daily loss limit exceeded");
  520 |         return false;
  521 |     }
  522 |     
  523 |     // Check margin level
  524 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.MarginLevel < 200.0 && m_CurrentMetrics.MarginLevel > 0) {
  525 |         Print("[RISK] WARNING: Low margin level: ", m_CurrentMetrics.MarginLevel, "%");
  526 |     }
  527 |     
  528 |     return true;
  529 | }
  530 | 
  531 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  532 | //| Get Current Drawdown                                            |
  533 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  534 | double CRiskManager::GetCurrentDrawdown() {
  535 |     return m_CurrentMetrics.CurrentDrawdown;
  536 | }
  537 | 
  538 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 | //| Enable Trading                                                   |
  540 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  541 | void CRiskManager::EnableTrading(string reason) {
  542 |     m_TradingEnabled = true;
  543 |     m_EmergencyStopTriggered = false;
  544 |     m_DisableReason = "";
  545 |     Print("[RISK] Trading enabled: ", reason);
  546 | }
  547 | 
  548 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  549 | //| Disable Trading                                                  |
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | void CRiskManager::DisableTrading(string reason) {
  552 |     m_TradingEnabled = false;
  553 |     m_DisableReason = reason;
  554 |     Print("[RISK] Trading disabled: ", reason);
  555 | }
  556 | 
  557 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  558 | //| Get Status                                                       |
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | string CRiskManager::GetStatus() {
  561 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return "NOT_INITIALIZED";
  562 |     if (m_EmergencyStopTriggered) return "EMERGENCY_STOP";
  563 |     if (!m_TradingEnabled) return "DISABLED: " + m_DisableReason;
  564 |     return "ACTIVE";
  565 | }
  566 | 
  567 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  568 | //| Trigger Emergency Stop                                           |
  569 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  570 | void CRiskManager::TriggerEmergencyStop(string reason) {
  571 |     m_EmergencyStopTriggered = true;
  572 |     DisableTrading("EMERGENCY: " + reason);
  573 |     
  574 |     // Close all open positions
  575 |     for (int i = PositionsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  576 |         ulong ticket = PositionGetTicket(i);
  577 |         if (ticket > 0) {
  578 |             // This would normally close the position
  579 |             Print("[RISK] EMERGENCY: Would close position ", ticket);
  580 |         }
  581 |     }
  582 | }
  583 | 
  584 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  585 | //| Get Daily PnL                                                   |
  586 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  587 | double CRiskManager::GetDailyPnL() {
  588 |     return (ArraySize(m_DailyPnL) > 0) ? m_DailyPnL[0] : 0.0;
  589 | }
  590 | 
  591 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  592 | //| Run Diagnostics                                                  |
  593 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  594 | void CRiskManager::RunDiagnostics() {
  595 |     Print("=== RISK MANAGER DIAGNOSTICS ===");
  596 |     Print("Initialized: ", m_bInitialized ? "YES" : "NO");
  597 |     Print("Trading Enabled: ", m_TradingEnabled ? "YES" : "NO");
  598 |     Print("Emergency Stop: ", m_EmergencyStopTriggered ? "YES" : "NO");
  599 |     Print("Account Balance: ", m_CurrentMetrics.AccountBalance);
  600 |     Print("Account Equity: ", m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity);
  601 |     Print("Current Drawdown: ", m_CurrentMetrics.CurrentDrawdown, "%");
  602 |     Print("Max Drawdown: ", m_CurrentMetrics.MaxDrawdown, "%");
  603 |     Print("Margin Level: ", m_CurrentMetrics.MarginLevel, "%");
  604 |     Print("Free Margin: ", m_CurrentMetrics.FreeMargin);
  605 |     Print("Open Positions: ", PositionsTotal());
  606 |     if (!m_TradingEnabled) {
  607 |         Print("Disable Reason: ", m_DisableReason);
  608 |     }
  609 |     Print("=================================");
  610 | }
  611 | 
  612 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  613 | //| Update Configuration                                             |
  614 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  615 | bool CRiskManager::UpdateConfiguration(EAContext* context) {
  616 |     if (context == NULL) return false;
  617 |     
  618 |     // Update risk configuration from context
  619 |     m_PositionSizing.RiskPercent = context.InputParams.MaxRiskPercent;
  620 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxDailyLoss = context.InputParams.MaxDailyRisk * m_CurrentMetrics.AccountBalance / 100.0;
  621 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxDrawdownPercent = context.InputParams.MaxDrawdownPercent;
  622 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxConcurrentTrades = context.InputParams.MaxConcurrentTrades;
  623 |     
  624 |     return true;
  625 | }
  626 | 
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | //| Get Risk Report                                                  |
  629 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  630 | string CRiskManager::GetRiskReport() {
  631 |     string report = "=== RISK MANAGEMENT REPORT ===\n";
  632 |     report += StringFormat("Status: %s\n", GetStatus());
  633 |     report += StringFormat("Account Balance: %.2f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.AccountBalance);
  634 |     report += StringFormat("Account Equity: %.2f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.AccountEquity);
  635 |     report += StringFormat("Free Margin: %.2f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.FreeMargin);
  636 |     report += StringFormat("Margin Level: %.1f%%\n", m_CurrentMetrics.MarginLevel);
  637 |     report += StringFormat("Current Drawdown: %.2f%%\n", m_CurrentMetrics.CurrentDrawdown);
  638 |     report += StringFormat("Maximum Drawdown: %.2f%%\n", m_CurrentMetrics.MaxDrawdown);
  639 |     report += StringFormat("VaR (95%%): %.2f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.VaR95);
  640 |     report += StringFormat("VaR (99%%): %.2f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.VaR99);
  641 |     report += StringFormat("Open Positions: %d\n", PositionsTotal());
  642 |     report += StringFormat("Daily PnL: %.2f\n", GetDailyPnL());
  643 |     
  644 |     return report;
  645 | }
  646 | 
  647 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  648 | //| Reset Risk Metrics                                              |
  649 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  650 | void CRiskManager::ResetRiskMetrics() {
  651 |     m_CurrentMetrics.Reset();
  652 |     m_PeakEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  653 |     m_TroughEquity = m_PeakEquity;
  654 |     ArrayInitialize(m_DailyPnL, 0.0);
  655 |     ArrayInitialize(m_WeeklyPnL, 0.0);
  656 |     ArrayInitialize(m_MonthlyPnL, 0.0);
  657 |     Print("[RISK] Risk metrics reset");
  658 | }
  659 | 
  660 | #endif // RISK_MANAGER_MQH

  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  338 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | CRiskOptimizer::CRiskOptimizer(EAContext* context) {
  340 |     m_pContext = context;
  341 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  342 |     m_ATR_Handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  343 |     m_ScalingCount = 0;
  344 |     m_TradingAllowed = true;
  345 |     
  346 |     // Initialize structures
  347 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  348 |     ZeroMemory(m_Metrics);
  349 |     ZeroMemory(m_Volatility);
  350 |     ZeroMemory(m_PauseState);
  351 |     
  352 |     // Set default configuration
  353 |     ResetToDefaults();
  354 |     
  355 |     // Initialize times
  356 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  357 |     m_LastMetricsUpdate = 0;
  358 |     m_LastStrategyUpdate = 0;
  359 |     m_LastATRUpdate = 0;
  360 |     m_LastTradeTime = 0;
  361 |     
  362 |     // Initialize multipliers
  363 |     m_PerformanceMultiplier = 1.0;
  364 |     m_VolatilityMultiplier = 1.0;
  365 |     m_MarketMultiplier = 1.0;
  366 |     m_FinalRiskMultiplier = 1.0;
  367 |     
  368 |     // Initialize balance tracking
  369 |     m_DayStartBalance = 0.0;
  370 |     m_WeekStartBalance = 0.0;
  371 |     m_MonthStartBalance = 0.0;
  372 |     m_LastDayStart = 0;
  373 |     m_LastWeekStart = 0;
  374 |     m_LastMonthStart = 0;
  375 | }
  376 | 
  377 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  378 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  379 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  380 | CRiskOptimizer::~CRiskOptimizer() {
  381 |     Deinitialize();
  382 | }
  383 | 
  384 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  386 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  387 | bool CRiskOptimizer::Initialize(const SRiskOptimizerConfig& config) {
  388 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  389 |         return true;
  390 |     }
  391 |     
  392 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  393 |         Print("[RISK_OPTIMIZER] Context is NULL");
  394 |         return false;
  395 |     }
  396 |     
  397 |     // Set configuration
  398 |     m_Config = config;
  399 |     ValidateConfiguration();
  400 |     
  401 |     // Initialize ATR indicator
  402 |     if (!InitializeATR()) {
  403 |         LogRiskEvent("Failed to initialize ATR indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  404 |         return false;
  405 |     }
  406 |     
  407 |     // Initialize balance tracking
  408 |     double current_balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  409 |     m_DayStartBalance = current_balance;
  410 |     m_WeekStartBalance = current_balance;
  411 |     m_MonthStartBalance = current_balance;
  412 |     
  413 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  414 |     m_LastDayStart = GetStartOfDay(current_time);
  415 |     m_LastWeekStart = GetStartOfWeek(current_time);
  416 |     m_LastMonthStart = GetStartOfMonth(current_time);
  417 |     
  418 |     // Initialize metrics
  419 |     m_Metrics.EquityPeak = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  420 |     m_Metrics.LastUpdateTime = current_time;
  421 |     
  422 |     // Set initial strategy
  423 |     m_CurrentStrategy = STRATEGY_BALANCED;
  424 |     
  425 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  426 |     
  427 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  428 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("RiskOptimizer initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  429 |         LogRiskEvent(GetRiskReport(), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  430 |     }
  431 |     
  432 |     return true;
  433 | }
  434 | 
  435 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  436 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  437 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  438 | void CRiskOptimizer::Deinitialize() {
  439 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  440 |         return;
  441 |     }
  442 |     
  443 |     // Log final performance report
  444 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  445 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetPerformanceReport(), __FUNCTION__);
  446 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("RiskOptimizer shutting down", __FUNCTION__);
  447 |     }
  448 |     
  449 |     // Cleanup resources
  450 |     CleanupResources();
  451 |     
  452 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  453 | }
  454 | 
  455 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  456 | //| Update                                                           |
  457 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  458 | void CRiskOptimizer::Update() {
  459 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  460 |         return;
  461 |     }
  462 |     
  463 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  464 |     
  465 |     // Update metrics periodically
  466 |     if (current_time - m_LastMetricsUpdate >= m_Config.CacheTimeSeconds) {
  467 |         UpdateRiskMetrics();
  468 |         UpdateVolatilityMetrics();
  469 |         UpdatePerformanceMultipliers();
  470 |         m_LastMetricsUpdate = current_time;
  471 |     }
  472 |     
  473 |     // Update daily/weekly/monthly tracking
  474 |     UpdateDailyWeeklyMonthly();
  475 |     
  476 |     // Update market strategy
  477 |     if (m_Config.EnableStrategyAdaptation && 
  478 |         current_time - m_LastStrategyUpdate >= m_Config.StrategyUpdateInterval * 60) {
  479 |         UpdateMarketStrategy();
  480 |         m_LastStrategyUpdate = current_time;
  481 |     }
  482 |     
  483 |     // Check pause conditions
  484 |     if (m_Config.EnableAutoPause && !m_PauseState.ShouldPause) {
  485 |         SPauseState pause_check = CheckAutoPause();
  486 |         if (pause_check.ShouldPause) {
  487 |             m_PauseState = pause_check;
  488 |             LogRiskEvent("Auto-pause triggered: " + pause_check.Message, LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  489 |         }
  490 |     }
  491 |     
  492 |     // Check resume conditions
  493 |     if (m_PauseState.ShouldPause && m_Config.EnableAutoResume) {
  494 |         if (ShouldResumeTrading()) {
  495 |             ResumeTrading();
  496 |         }
  497 |     }
  498 |     
  499 |     m_LastUpdate = current_time;
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  503 | //| Calculate Trade Parameters                                       |
  504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 | bool CRiskOptimizer::CalculateTradeParameters(const double entry_price,
  506 |                                               const double initial_sl,
  507 |                                               const ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type,
  508 |                                               STradeParameters& params) {
  509 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  510 |         params.IsValid = false;
  511 |         params.ValidationMessage = "RiskOptimizer not initialized";
  512 |         return false;
  513 |     }
  514 |     
  515 |     // Check if trading is allowed
  516 |     if (!IsTradingAllowed()) {
  517 |         params.IsValid = false;
  518 |         params.ValidationMessage = "Trading is paused: " + m_PauseState.Message;
  519 |         return false;
  520 |     }
  521 |     
  522 |     // Get current risk multiplier
  523 |     double risk_multiplier = GetCurrentRiskMultiplier();
  524 |     if (risk_multiplier <= 0) {
  525 |         params.IsValid = false;
  526 |         params.ValidationMessage = "Risk multiplier is zero or negative";
  527 |         return false;
  528 |     }
  529 |     
  530 |     // Calculate stop loss distance
  531 |     double current_atr = GetCurrentATR();
  532 |     if (current_atr <= 0) {
  533 |         params.IsValid = false;
  534 |         params.ValidationMessage = "Invalid ATR value";
  535 |         return false;
  536 |     }
  537 |     
  538 |     double sl_distance = initial_sl * m_Config.SL_ATR_Multiplier * current_atr;
  539 |     
  540 |     // Calculate stop loss price
  541 |     double sl_price;
  542 |     if (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  543 |         sl_price = entry_price - sl_distance;
  544 |     } else {
  545 |         sl_price = entry_price + sl_distance;
  546 |     }
  547 |     
  548 |     // Calculate take profit price
  549 |     double tp_distance = sl_distance * m_Config.TP_RR_Ratio;
  550 |     double tp_price;
  551 |     if (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  552 |         tp_price = entry_price + tp_distance;
  553 |     } else {
  554 |         tp_price = entry_price - tp_distance;
  555 |     }
  556 |     
  557 |     // Calculate risk amount
  558 |     double account_balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  559 |     double base_risk_amount = account_balance * (m_Config.BaseRiskPercent / 100.0);
  560 |     double adjusted_risk_amount = base_risk_amount * risk_multiplier;
  561 |     
  562 |     // Apply risk limits
  563 |     double max_risk_amount = account_balance * (m_Config.MaxRiskPercent / 100.0);
  564 |     if (adjusted_risk_amount > max_risk_amount) {
  565 |         adjusted_risk_amount = max_risk_amount;
  566 |     }
  567 |     
  568 |     if (m_Config.UseFixedMaxRiskUSD && adjusted_risk_amount > m_Config.MaxRiskUSD) {
  569 |         adjusted_risk_amount = m_Config.MaxRiskUSD;
  570 |     }
  571 |     
  572 |     // Calculate lot size
  573 |     double lot_size = CalculateOptimalLotSize(adjusted_risk_amount, sl_distance / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT));
  574 |     
  575 |     // Fill parameters structure
  576 |     params.LotSize = lot_size;
  577 |     params.StopLoss = sl_price;
  578 |     params.TakeProfit = tp_price;
  579 |     params.RiskAmount = adjusted_risk_amount;
  580 |     params.RiskMultiplier = risk_multiplier;
  581 |     params.IsValid = true;
  582 |     params.ValidationMessage = "Parameters calculated successfully";
  583 |     
  584 |     // Validate parameters
  585 |     if (!ValidateTradeParameters(params)) {
  586 |         return false;
  587 |     }
  588 |     
  589 |     if (m_Config.EnableDetailedLogging && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  590 |         string log_msg = StringFormat("Trade parameters: Lot=%.2f, SL=%.5f, TP=%.5f, Risk=%.2f, Multiplier=%.2f",
  591 |                                      params.LotSize, params.StopLoss, params.TakeProfit, 
  592 |                                      params.RiskAmount, params.RiskMultiplier);
  593 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug(log_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  594 |     }
  595 |     
  596 |     return true;
  597 | }
  598 | 
  599 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  600 | //| Reset To Defaults                                                |
  601 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  602 | void CRiskOptimizer::ResetToDefaults() {
  603 |     // Basic Risk Settings
  604 |     m_Config.BaseRiskPercent = DEFAULT_RISK_PERCENT;
  605 |     m_Config.MaxRiskPercent = 5.0;
  606 |     m_Config.MinRiskPercent = 0.5;
  607 |     m_Config.MaxRiskUSD = 1000.0;
  608 |     m_Config.UseFixedMaxRiskUSD = false;
  609 |     
  610 |     // Stop Loss & Take Profit
  611 |     m_Config.SL_ATR_Multiplier = 2.0;
  612 |     m_Config.TP_RR_Ratio = 2.0;
  613 |     m_Config.MinSL_Points = 10.0;
  614 |     m_Config.MaxSL_Points = 200.0;
  615 |     
  616 |     // Performance-based Adjustment
  617 |     m_Config.EnablePerformanceAdjustment = true;
  618 |     m_Config.WinRateThreshold = 60.0;
  619 |     m_Config.LossRateThreshold = 30.0;
  620 |     m_Config.PerformanceBonus = 1.2;
  621 |     m_Config.PerformancePenalty = 0.8;
  622 |     
  623 |     // Volatility Adjustment
  624 |     m_Config.EnableVolatilityAdjustment = true;
  625 |     m_Config.VolatilityThreshold = 1.5;
  626 |     m_Config.VolatilityMultiplier = 0.7;
  627 |     m_Config.ATR_Period = DEFAULT_ATR_PERIOD;
  628 |     
  629 |     // Auto Pause Settings
  630 |     m_Config.EnableAutoPause = true;
  631 |     m_Config.ConsecutiveLossLimit = MAX_CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES;
  632 |     m_Config.DailyLossLimit = 5.0;
  633 |     m_Config.DrawdownLimit = 10.0;
  634 |     m_Config.PauseMinutes = 60;
  635 |     m_Config.EnableAutoResume = true;
  636 |     
  637 |     // Trailing Stop Settings
  638 |     m_Config.EnableSmartTrailing = true;
  639 |     m_Config.BreakevenRMultiple = 0.5;
  640 |     m_Config.FirstLockRMultiple = 1.0;
  641 |     m_Config.SecondLockRMultiple = 2.0;
  642 |     m_Config.ThirdLockRMultiple = 3.0;
  643 |     m_Config.LockPercentageFirst = 50.0;
  644 |     m_Config.LockPercentageSecond = 70.0;
  645 |     m_Config.LockPercentageThird = 80.0;
  646 |     
  647 |     // Scaling Settings
  648 |     m_Config.EnableScaling = false;
  649 |     m_Config.MaxScalingCount = 2;
  650 |     m_Config.MinRMultipleForScaling = 0.5;
  651 |     m_Config.RequireBreakevenForScaling = true;
  652 |     m_Config.ScalingRequiresTrend = true;
  653 |     
  654 |     // Market Strategy
  655 |     m_Config.EnableStrategyAdaptation = true;
  656 |     m_Config.StrategyUpdateInterval = 15;
  657 |     m_Config.UseMarketRegimeFilter = true;
  658 |     
  659 |     // Cache & Performance
  660 |     m_Config.CacheTimeSeconds = 10;
  661 |     m_Config.EnableDetailedLogging = false;
  662 |     m_Config.EnablePerformanceStats = true;
  663 | }

  665 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  666 | //| Internal Methods - Portfolio of advanced risk management logic  |
  667 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  668 | 
  669 | void CRiskOptimizer::UpdateRiskMetrics() {
  670 |     double current_equity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  671 |     double current_balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  672 |     
  673 |     // Update equity peak
  674 |     if (current_equity > m_Metrics.EquityPeak) {
  675 |         m_Metrics.EquityPeak = current_equity;
  676 |     }
  677 |     
  678 |     // Calculate current drawdown
  679 |     if (m_Metrics.EquityPeak > 0) {
  680 |         m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent = (m_Metrics.EquityPeak - current_equity) / m_Metrics.EquityPeak * 100.0;
  681 |     }
  682 |     
  683 |     // Calculate daily loss percentage
  684 |     if (m_DayStartBalance > 0) {
  685 |         m_Metrics.DailyLossPercent = (m_DayStartBalance - current_balance) / m_DayStartBalance * 100.0;
  686 |     }
  687 |     
  688 |     // Update PnL calculations
  689 |     m_Metrics.WeeklyPnL = current_balance - m_WeekStartBalance;
  690 |     m_Metrics.MonthlyPnL = current_balance - m_MonthStartBalance;
  691 |     
  692 |     m_Metrics.LastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  693 | }
  694 | 
  695 | double CRiskOptimizer::CalculateOptimalLotSize(const double risk_amount, const double sl_points) {
  696 |     if (sl_points <= 0 || risk_amount <= 0) {
  697 |         return 0.0;
  698 |     }
  699 |     
  700 |     double tick_value = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  701 |     double tick_size = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
  702 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  703 |     
  704 |     if (tick_value <= 0 || tick_size <= 0 || point <= 0) {
  705 |         return 0.0;
  706 |     }
  707 |     
  708 |     // Calculate lot size
  709 |     double pip_value = tick_value * point / tick_size;
  710 |     double lot_size = risk_amount / (sl_points * pip_value);
  711 |     
  712 |     // Normalize lot size
  713 |     double min_lot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  714 |     double max_lot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  715 |     double lot_step = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  716 |     
  717 |     if (lot_step > 0) {
  718 |         lot_size = MathRound(lot_size / lot_step) * lot_step;
  719 |     }
  720 |     
  721 |     lot_size = MathMax(lot_size, min_lot);
  722 |     lot_size = MathMin(lot_size, max_lot);
  723 |     
  724 |     return lot_size;
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | SPauseState CRiskOptimizer::CheckAutoPause() {
  728 |     SPauseState pause_state;
  729 |     ZeroMemory(pause_state);
  730 |     
  731 |     if (!m_Config.EnableAutoPause) {
  732 |         return pause_state;
  733 |     }
  734 |     
  735 |     // Check consecutive losses
  736 |     if (CheckConsecutiveLosses()) {
  737 |         pause_state.ShouldPause = true;
  738 |         pause_state.Reason = PAUSE_CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES;
  739 |         pause_state.PauseMinutes = m_Config.PauseMinutes;
  740 |         pause_state.Message = StringFormat("Consecutive losses limit reached: %d", m_Metrics.ConsecutiveLosses);
  741 |         pause_state.PauseUntil = TimeCurrent() + pause_state.PauseMinutes * 60;
  742 |         return pause_state;
  743 |     }
  744 |     
  745 |     // Check daily loss limit
  746 |     if (CheckDailyLossLimit()) {
  747 |         pause_state.ShouldPause = true;
  748 |         pause_state.Reason = PAUSE_DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT;
  749 |         pause_state.PauseMinutes = 1440; // Rest of the day
  750 |         pause_state.Message = StringFormat("Daily loss limit reached: %.2f%%", m_Metrics.DailyLossPercent);
  751 |         pause_state.PauseUntil = GetStartOfDay(TimeCurrent() + 86400); // Next day start
  752 |         return pause_state;
  753 |     }
  754 |     
  755 |     // Check drawdown limit
  756 |     if (CheckDrawdownLimit()) {
  757 |         pause_state.ShouldPause = true;
  758 |         pause_state.Reason = PAUSE_DRAWDOWN_LIMIT;
  759 |         pause_state.PauseMinutes = m_Config.PauseMinutes * 2; // Longer pause for drawdown
  760 |         pause_state.Message = StringFormat("Drawdown limit reached: %.2f%%", m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent);
  761 |         pause_state.PauseUntil = TimeCurrent() + pause_state.PauseMinutes * 60;
  762 |         return pause_state;
  763 |     }
  764 |     
  765 |     // Check volatility spike
  766 |     if (CheckVolatilitySpike()) {
  767 |         pause_state.ShouldPause = true;
  768 |         pause_state.Reason = PAUSE_VOLATILITY_SPIKE;
  769 |         pause_state.PauseMinutes = 15; // Short pause for volatility
  770 |         pause_state.Message = StringFormat("Volatility spike detected: %.2f", m_Volatility.VolatilityRatio);
  771 |         pause_state.PauseUntil = TimeCurrent() + pause_state.PauseMinutes * 60;
  772 |         return pause_state;
  773 |     }
  774 |     
  775 |     return pause_state;
  776 | }
  777 | 
  778 | void CRiskOptimizer::LogRiskEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  779 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  780 |         switch(level) {
  781 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  782 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  783 |                 break;
  784 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  785 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  786 |                 break;
  787 |             default:
  788 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  789 |         }
  790 |     }
  791 | }
