  270 |     bool IsSpreadAcceptable(const string symbol);
  271 |     bool IsMarketConditionSuitable(const string symbol);
  272 |     
  273 |     // Risk assessment
  274 |     double CalculateTradeRisk(const string symbol, double volume, double stopLoss);
  275 |     double CalculatePositionExposure(const string symbol, double volume);
  276 |     double CalculateCorrelationRisk(const string symbol);
  277 |     double CalculateDrawdownRisk();
  278 |     
  279 |     // Override and exception handling
  280 |     bool RequestOverride(ENUM_VALIDATION_TYPE type, const string reason);
  281 |     bool GrantOverride(ENUM_VALIDATION_TYPE type, const string approver);
  282 |     bool IsOverrideActive(ENUM_VALIDATION_TYPE type);
  283 |     
  284 |     // Reporting and statistics
  285 |     SValidationStatistics GetStatistics() const { return m_Statistics; }
  286 |     bool GenerateValidationReport(string& report);
  287 |     bool GenerateRiskReport(string& report);
  288 |     bool ResetStatistics();
  289 |     
  290 |     // Configuration
  291 |     bool EnableValidation(bool enable = true);
  292 |     bool SetStrictMode(bool strict = true);
  293 |     bool AllowOverrides(bool allow = true);
  294 |     
  295 |     // Utility methods
  296 |     string GetValidationResultName(ENUM_VALIDATION_RESULT result);
  297 |     string GetValidationTypeName(ENUM_VALIDATION_TYPE type);
  298 |     string GetSeverityName(ENUM_VALIDATION_SEVERITY severity);
  299 |     string GetActionName(ENUM_VALIDATION_ACTION action);
  300 |     
  301 |     // Status
  302 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  303 |     bool IsValidationEnabled() const { return m_bValidationEnabled; }
  304 |     datetime GetLastValidation() const { return m_LastValidation; }
  305 | };
  306 | 
  307 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  308 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 | CRiskValidator::CRiskValidator() {
  311 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  312 |     m_RuleCount = 0;
  313 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  314 |     m_bValidationEnabled = true;
  315 |     m_LastValidation = 0;
  316 |     
  317 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  318 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  319 |     ZeroMemory(m_RiskLimits);
  320 |     
  321 |     // Set default configuration
  322 |     m_Config.EnableValidation = true;
  323 |     m_Config.EnableWarnings = true;
  324 |     m_Config.EnableBlocking = true;
  325 |     m_Config.EnableLogging = true;
  326 |     m_Config.EnableStatistics = true;
  327 |     m_Config.StrictMode = false;
  328 |     m_Config.AllowOverrides = true;
  329 |     m_Config.MaxWarningsPerDay = 50;
  330 |     m_Config.MaxViolationsPerDay = 10;
  331 |     m_Config.ToleranceLevel = 0.05;  // 5% tolerance
  332 |     m_Config.SendEmailAlerts = false;
  333 |     m_Config.SendPushNotifications = false;
  334 |     
  335 |     // Set default risk limits
  336 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxPositionSize = 10.0;        // 10 lots
  337 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxPositionValue = 100000.0;   // $100,000
  338 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxRiskPerTrade = 2.0;         // 2%
  339 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxDailyRisk = 5.0;            // 5%
  340 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxWeeklyRisk = 10.0;          // 10%
  341 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxMonthlyRisk = 20.0;         // 20%
  342 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxDrawdown = 15.0;            // 15%
  343 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxCorrelation = 0.7;          // 70%
  344 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxExposure = 25.0;            // 25%
  345 |     m_RiskLimits.MinRiskReward = 1.5;           // 1:1.5
  346 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxSpread = 5.0;               // 5 points
  347 |     m_RiskLimits.MinStopLoss = 10.0;            // 10 points
  348 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxStopLoss = 500.0;           // 500 points
  349 |     m_RiskLimits.MinTakeProfit = 15.0;          // 15 points
  350 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxPositions = 10;             // 10 positions
  351 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxOrdersPerSymbol = 3;        // 3 orders per symbol
  352 |     m_RiskLimits.MinAccountBalance = 1000.0;    // $1,000
  353 |     m_RiskLimits.MaxLeverage = 100.0;           // 1:100
  354 |     m_RiskLimits.MinMarginLevel = 200.0;        // 200%
  355 | }
  356 | 
  357 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  358 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  359 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  360 | CRiskValidator::~CRiskValidator() {
  361 |     Deinitialize();
  362 | }
  363 | 
  364 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  365 | //| Initialize risk validator                                       |
  366 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 | bool CRiskValidator::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  368 |     if (context == NULL) {
  369 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  370 |         return false;
  371 |     }
  372 |     
  373 |     m_pContext = context;
  374 |     
  375 |     // Initialize validation rules
  376 |     if (!InitializeRules()) {
  377 |         LogError("Failed to initialize validation rules");
  378 |         return false;
  379 |     }
  380 |     
  381 |     // Initialize statistics
  382 |     m_Statistics.FirstValidation = TimeCurrent();
  383 |     
  384 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  385 |     m_bValidationEnabled = m_Config.EnableValidation;
  386 |     
  387 |     LogActivity("Risk validator initialized successfully");
  388 |     return true;
  389 | }
  390 | 
  391 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  392 | //| Deinitialize risk validator                                     |
  393 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  394 | bool CRiskValidator::Deinitialize() {
  395 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  396 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  397 |         m_bValidationEnabled = false;
  398 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  399 |         LogActivity("Risk validator deinitialized");
  400 |     }
  401 |     
  402 |     return true;
  403 | }
  404 | 
  405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 | //| Configure risk validator                                        |
  407 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  408 | bool CRiskValidator::Configure(const SValidationConfiguration& config) {
  409 |     m_Config = config;
  410 |     m_bValidationEnabled = m_Config.EnableValidation;
  411 |     
  412 |     LogActivity("Risk validator configured successfully");
  413 |     return true;
  414 | }
  415 | 
  416 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  417 | //| Initialize validation rules                                     |
  418 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  419 | bool CRiskValidator::InitializeRules() {
  420 |     m_RuleCount = 0;
  421 |     
  422 |     // Define default validation rules
  423 |     string ruleNames[] = {
  424 |         "Position Size", "Stop Loss", "Take Profit", "Risk/Reward", "Correlation",
  425 |         "Exposure", "Drawdown", "Margin", "Spread", "Volatility",
  426 |         "Liquidity", "Time Filter", "News Filter"
  427 |     };
  428 |     
  429 |     string ruleDescriptions[] = {
  430 |         "Validates position size limits",
  431 |         "Validates stop loss requirements",
  432 |         "Validates take profit settings",
  433 |         "Validates risk/reward ratio",
  434 |         "Validates correlation limits",
  435 |         "Validates exposure limits",
  436 |         "Validates drawdown limits",
  437 |         "Validates margin requirements",
  438 |         "Validates spread conditions",
  439 |         "Validates volatility conditions",
  440 |         "Validates liquidity conditions",
  441 |         "Validates trading time filters",
  442 |         "Validates news event filters"
  443 |     };
  444 |     
  445 |     ENUM_VALIDATION_SEVERITY severities[] = {
  446 |         SEVERITY_HIGH, SEVERITY_HIGH, SEVERITY_MEDIUM, SEVERITY_MEDIUM, SEVERITY_MEDIUM,
  447 |         SEVERITY_HIGH, SEVERITY_CRITICAL, SEVERITY_HIGH, SEVERITY_LOW, SEVERITY_MEDIUM,
  448 |         SEVERITY_MEDIUM, SEVERITY_LOW, SEVERITY_MEDIUM
  449 |     };
  450 |     
  451 |     ENUM_VALIDATION_ACTION actions[] = {
  452 |         ACTION_REJECT, ACTION_REJECT, ACTION_WARN, ACTION_WARN, ACTION_WARN,
  453 |         ACTION_REJECT, ACTION_BLOCK, ACTION_REJECT, ACTION_WARN, ACTION_WARN,
  454 |         ACTION_WARN, ACTION_WARN, ACTION_WARN
  455 |     };
  456 |     
  457 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(ruleNames) && i < ArraySize(m_Rules); i++) {
  458 |         SValidationRule rule;
  459 |         ZeroMemory(rule);
  460 |         
  461 |         rule.Type = (ENUM_VALIDATION_TYPE)i;
  462 |         rule.Name = ruleNames[i];
  463 |         rule.Description = ruleDescriptions[i];
  464 |         rule.IsEnabled = true;
  465 |         rule.Severity = severities[i];
  466 |         rule.Action = actions[i];
  467 |         rule.MinValue = 0.0;
  468 |         rule.MaxValue = 0.0;
  469 |         rule.WarningThreshold = 0.0;
  470 |         rule.CriticalThreshold = 0.0;
  471 |         rule.Parameters = "";
  472 |         rule.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  473 |         rule.ViolationCount = 0;
  474 |         rule.LastViolation = 0;
  475 |         
  476 |         m_Rules[m_RuleCount] = rule;
  477 |         m_RuleCount++;
  478 |     }
  479 |     
  480 |     return true;
  481 | }
  482 | 
  483 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  484 | //| Validate trade                                                  |
  485 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  486 | bool CRiskValidator::ValidateTrade(const SValidationContext& context, SValidationResult& result) {
  487 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bValidationEnabled) {
  488 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  489 |         result.Message = "Validation disabled";
  490 |         return true;
  491 |     }
  492 |     
  493 |     // Initialize result
  494 |     ZeroMemory(result);
  495 |     result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  496 |     result.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  497 |     result.Symbol = context.Symbol;
  498 |     
  499 |     // Run all enabled validation rules
  500 |     SValidationResult tempResult;
  501 |     ENUM_VALIDATION_RESULT worstResult = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  502 |     
  503 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_RuleCount; i++) {
  504 |         if (!m_Rules[i].IsEnabled) continue;
  505 |         
  506 |         ZeroMemory(tempResult);
  507 |         bool ruleResult = false;
  508 |         
  509 |         switch (m_Rules[i].Type) {
  510 |             case VALIDATION_POSITION_SIZE:
  511 |                 ruleResult = ValidatePositionSize(context, tempResult);
  512 |                 break;
  513 |             case VALIDATION_STOP_LOSS:
  514 |                 ruleResult = ValidateStopLoss(context, tempResult);
  515 |                 break;
  516 |             case VALIDATION_TAKE_PROFIT:
  517 |                 ruleResult = ValidateTakeProfit(context, tempResult);
  518 |                 break;
  519 |             case VALIDATION_RISK_REWARD:
  520 |                 ruleResult = ValidateRiskReward(context, tempResult);
  521 |                 break;
  522 |             case VALIDATION_CORRELATION:
  523 |                 ruleResult = ValidateCorrelation(context, tempResult);
  524 |                 break;
  525 |             case VALIDATION_EXPOSURE:
  526 |                 ruleResult = ValidateExposure(context, tempResult);
  527 |                 break;
  528 |             case VALIDATION_DRAWDOWN:
  529 |                 ruleResult = ValidateDrawdown(context, tempResult);
  530 |                 break;
  531 |             case VALIDATION_MARGIN:
  532 |                 ruleResult = ValidateMargin(context, tempResult);
  533 |                 break;
  534 |             case VALIDATION_SPREAD:
  535 |                 ruleResult = ValidateSpread(context, tempResult);
  536 |                 break;
  537 |             case VALIDATION_VOLATILITY:
  538 |                 ruleResult = ValidateVolatility(context, tempResult);
  539 |                 break;
  540 |             case VALIDATION_LIQUIDITY:
  541 |                 ruleResult = ValidateLiquidity(context, tempResult);
  542 |                 break;
  543 |             case VALIDATION_TIME_FILTER:
  544 |                 ruleResult = ValidateTimeFilter(context, tempResult);
  545 |                 break;
  546 |             case VALIDATION_NEWS_FILTER:
  547 |                 ruleResult = ValidateNewsFilter(context, tempResult);
  548 |                 break;
  549 |             default:
  550 |                 continue;
  551 |         }
  552 |         
  553 |         if (ruleResult && tempResult.Result > worstResult) {
  554 |             worstResult = tempResult.Result;
  555 |             result = tempResult;  // Keep the worst result
  556 |         }
  557 |     }
  558 |     
  559 |     result.Result = worstResult;
  560 |     
  561 |     // Update statistics
  562 |     UpdateStatistics(result);
  563 |     
  564 |     // Log result
  565 |     LogValidationResult(result);
  566 |     
  567 |     m_LastValidation = TimeCurrent();
  568 |     m_Statistics.LastValidation = m_LastValidation;
  569 |     
  570 |     return true;
  571 | }
  572 | 
  573 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  574 | //| Validate position size                                          |
  575 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  576 | bool CRiskValidator::ValidatePositionSize(const SValidationContext& context, SValidationResult& result) {
  577 |     result.Type = VALIDATION_POSITION_SIZE;
  578 |     result.ActualValue = context.Volume;
  579 |     result.Threshold = m_RiskLimits.MaxPositionSize;
  580 |     
  581 |     if (context.Volume > m_RiskLimits.MaxPositionSize) {
  582 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_FAILED;
  583 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_HIGH;
  584 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_REJECT;
  585 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Position size %.2f exceeds maximum allowed %.2f", 
  586 |                                     context.Volume, m_RiskLimits.MaxPositionSize);
  587 |         result.IsBlocking = true;
  588 |         return true;
  589 |     }
  590 |     
  591 |     // Check warning threshold (80% of max)
  592 |     double warningThreshold = m_RiskLimits.MaxPositionSize * 0.8;
  593 |     if (context.Volume > warningThreshold) {
  594 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  595 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_MEDIUM;
  596 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  597 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Position size %.2f approaching maximum limit %.2f", 
  598 |                                     context.Volume, m_RiskLimits.MaxPositionSize);
  599 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  600 |         return true;
  601 |     }
  602 |     
  603 |     result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  604 |     result.Message = "Position size validation passed";
  605 |     return true;
  606 | }
  607 | 
  608 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  609 | //| Validate stop loss                                              |
  610 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  611 | bool CRiskValidator::ValidateStopLoss(const SValidationContext& context, SValidationResult& result) {
  612 |     result.Type = VALIDATION_STOP_LOSS;
  613 |     
  614 |     if (context.StopLoss == 0.0) {
  615 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_FAILED;
  616 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_HIGH;
  617 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_REJECT;
  618 |         result.Message = "Stop loss is required but not set";
  619 |         result.IsBlocking = true;
  620 |         return true;
  621 |     }
  622 |     
  623 |     // Calculate stop loss distance in points
  624 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(context.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  625 |     double stopDistance = 0.0;
  626 |     
  627 |     if (context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY || context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY_LIMIT) {
  628 |         stopDistance = (context.Price - context.StopLoss) / point;
  629 |     } else if (context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL || context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL_LIMIT) {
  630 |         stopDistance = (context.StopLoss - context.Price) / point;
  631 |     }
  632 |     
  633 |     result.ActualValue = stopDistance;
  634 |     
  635 |     // Check minimum stop loss distance
  636 |     if (stopDistance < m_RiskLimits.MinStopLoss) {
  637 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_FAILED;
  638 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_HIGH;
  639 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_REJECT;
  640 |         result.Threshold = m_RiskLimits.MinStopLoss;
  641 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Stop loss distance %.1f points is below minimum %.1f points", 
  642 |                                     stopDistance, m_RiskLimits.MinStopLoss);
  643 |         result.IsBlocking = true;
  644 |         return true;
  645 |     }
  646 |     
  647 |     // Check maximum stop loss distance
  648 |     if (stopDistance > m_RiskLimits.MaxStopLoss) {
  649 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  650 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_MEDIUM;
  651 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  652 |         result.Threshold = m_RiskLimits.MaxStopLoss;
  653 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Stop loss distance %.1f points exceeds recommended maximum %.1f points", 
  654 |                                     stopDistance, m_RiskLimits.MaxStopLoss);
  655 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  656 |         return true;
  657 |     }
  658 |     
  659 |     result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  660 |     result.Message = "Stop loss validation passed";
  661 |     return true;
  662 | }
  663 | 
  664 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  665 | //| Validate take profit                                            |
  666 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  667 | bool CRiskValidator::ValidateTakeProfit(const SValidationContext& context, SValidationResult& result) {
  668 |     result.Type = VALIDATION_TAKE_PROFIT;
  669 |     
  670 |     if (context.TakeProfit == 0.0) {
  671 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  672 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_LOW;
  673 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  674 |         result.Message = "Take profit not set - consider setting a target";
  675 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  676 |         return true;
  677 |     }
  678 |     
  679 |     // Calculate take profit distance in points
  680 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(context.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  681 |     double tpDistance = 0.0;
  682 |     
  683 |     if (context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY || context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY_LIMIT) {
  684 |         tpDistance = (context.TakeProfit - context.Price) / point;
  685 |     } else if (context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL || context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL_LIMIT) {
  686 |         tpDistance = (context.Price - context.TakeProfit) / point;
  687 |     }
  688 |     
  689 |     result.ActualValue = tpDistance;
  690 |     
  691 |     // Check minimum take profit distance
  692 |     if (tpDistance < m_RiskLimits.MinTakeProfit) {
  693 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  694 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_MEDIUM;
  695 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  696 |         result.Threshold = m_RiskLimits.MinTakeProfit;
  697 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Take profit distance %.1f points is below recommended minimum %.1f points", 
  698 |                                     tpDistance, m_RiskLimits.MinTakeProfit);
  699 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  700 |         return true;
  701 |     }
  702 |     
  703 |     result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  704 |     result.Message = "Take profit validation passed";
  705 |     return true;
  706 | }
  707 | 
  708 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  709 | //| Validate risk/reward ratio                                      |
  710 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  711 | bool CRiskValidator::ValidateRiskReward(const SValidationContext& context, SValidationResult& result) {
  712 |     result.Type = VALIDATION_RISK_REWARD;
  713 |     
  714 |     if (context.StopLoss == 0.0 || context.TakeProfit == 0.0) {
  715 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  716 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_LOW;
  717 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  718 |         result.Message = "Cannot calculate risk/reward ratio - stop loss or take profit missing";
  719 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  720 |         return true;
  721 |     }
  722 |     
  723 |     // Calculate risk and reward distances
  724 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(context.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  725 |     double riskDistance = 0.0;
  726 |     double rewardDistance = 0.0;
  727 |     
  728 |     if (context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY || context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY_LIMIT) {
  729 |         riskDistance = (context.Price - context.StopLoss) / point;
  730 |         rewardDistance = (context.TakeProfit - context.Price) / point;
  731 |     } else if (context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL || context.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL_LIMIT) {
  732 |         riskDistance = (context.StopLoss - context.Price) / point;
  733 |         rewardDistance = (context.Price - context.TakeProfit) / point;
  734 |     }
  735 |     
  736 |     if (riskDistance <= 0.0) {
  737 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_FAILED;
  738 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_HIGH;
  739 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_REJECT;
  740 |         result.Message = "Invalid risk distance calculated";
  741 |         result.IsBlocking = true;
  742 |         return true;
  743 |     }
  744 |     
  745 |     double riskRewardRatio = rewardDistance / riskDistance;
  746 |     result.ActualValue = riskRewardRatio;
  747 |     result.Threshold = m_RiskLimits.MinRiskReward;
  748 |     
  749 |     if (riskRewardRatio < m_RiskLimits.MinRiskReward) {
  750 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  751 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_MEDIUM;
  752 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  753 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Risk/reward ratio %.2f is below minimum recommended %.2f", 
  754 |                                     riskRewardRatio, m_RiskLimits.MinRiskReward);
  755 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  756 |         return true;
  757 |     }
  758 |     
  759 |     result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  760 |     result.Message = StringFormat("Risk/reward ratio %.2f validation passed", riskRewardRatio);
  761 |     return true;
  762 | }
  763 | 
  764 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  765 | //| Validate spread conditions                                      |
  766 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  767 | bool CRiskValidator::ValidateSpread(const SValidationContext& context, SValidationResult& result) {
  768 |     result.Type = VALIDATION_SPREAD;
  769 |     
  770 |     double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(context.Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  771 |     double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(context.Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  772 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(context.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  773 |     
  774 |     if (ask <= 0.0 || bid <= 0.0 || point <= 0.0) {
  775 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_FAILED;
  776 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_HIGH;
  777 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_REJECT;
  778 |         result.Message = "Cannot retrieve market data for spread validation";
  779 |         result.IsBlocking = true;
  780 |         return true;
  781 |     }
  782 |     
  783 |     double currentSpread = (ask - bid) / point;
  784 |     result.ActualValue = currentSpread;
  785 |     result.Threshold = m_RiskLimits.MaxSpread;
  786 |     
  787 |     if (currentSpread > m_RiskLimits.MaxSpread) {
  788 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  789 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_MEDIUM;
  790 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  791 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Current spread %.1f points exceeds maximum recommended %.1f points", 
  792 |                                     currentSpread, m_RiskLimits.MaxSpread);
  793 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  794 |         return true;
  795 |     }
  796 |     
  797 |     result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  798 |     result.Message = StringFormat("Spread %.1f points validation passed", currentSpread);
  799 |     return true;
  800 | }
  801 | 
  802 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  803 | //| Validate margin requirements                                    |
  804 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  805 | bool CRiskValidator::ValidateMargin(const SValidationContext& context, SValidationResult& result) {
  806 |     result.Type = VALIDATION_MARGIN;
  807 |     
  808 |     double marginLevel = (context.AccountEquity / context.AccountMargin) * 100.0;
  809 |     result.ActualValue = marginLevel;
  810 |     result.Threshold = m_RiskLimits.MinMarginLevel;
  811 |     
  812 |     if (marginLevel < m_RiskLimits.MinMarginLevel) {
  813 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_FAILED;
  814 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_CRITICAL;
  815 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_BLOCK;
  816 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Margin level %.1f%% is below minimum required %.1f%%", 
  817 |                                     marginLevel, m_RiskLimits.MinMarginLevel);
  818 |         result.IsBlocking = true;
  819 |         return true;
  820 |     }
  821 |     
  822 |     // Warning threshold (120% of minimum)
  823 |     double warningLevel = m_RiskLimits.MinMarginLevel * 1.2;
  824 |     if (marginLevel < warningLevel) {
  825 |         result.Result = VALIDATION_WARNING;
  826 |         result.Severity = SEVERITY_HIGH;
  827 |         result.RecommendedAction = ACTION_WARN;
  828 |         result.Message = StringFormat("Margin level %.1f%% is approaching minimum limit %.1f%%", 
  829 |                                     marginLevel, m_RiskLimits.MinMarginLevel);
  830 |         result.IsBlocking = false;
  831 |         return true;
  832 |     }
  833 |     
  834 |     result.Result = VALIDATION_PASSED;
  835 |     result.Message = StringFormat("Margin level %.1f%% validation passed", marginLevel);
  836 |     return true;
  837 | }
  838 | 
  839 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  840 | //| Update statistics                                               |
  841 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  842 | bool CRiskValidator::UpdateStatistics(const SValidationResult& result) {
  843 |     m_Statistics.TotalValidations++;
  844 |     
  845 |     switch (result.Result) {
  846 |         case VALIDATION_PASSED:
  847 |             m_Statistics.PassedValidations++;
  848 |             break;
  849 |         case VALIDATION_WARNING:
  850 |             m_Statistics.WarningValidations++;
  851 |             break;
  852 |         case VALIDATION_FAILED:
  853 |             m_Statistics.FailedValidations++;
  854 |             break;
  855 |         case VALIDATION_CRITICAL:
  856 |             m_Statistics.CriticalValidations++;
  857 |             break;
  858 |     }
  859 |     
  860 |     if (result.IsBlocking) {
  861 |         m_Statistics.BlockedTrades++;
  862 |     }
  863 |     
  864 |     // Calculate success rate
  865 |     if (m_Statistics.TotalValidations > 0) {
  866 |         m_Statistics.SuccessRate = (double)m_Statistics.PassedValidations / m_Statistics.TotalValidations * 100.0;
  867 |     }
  868 |     
  869 |     return true;
  870 | }
  871 | 
  872 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  873 | //| Log validation result                                           |
  874 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  875 | void CRiskValidator::LogValidationResult(const SValidationResult& result) {
  876 |     if (!m_Config.EnableLogging) return;
  877 |     
  878 |     string message = StringFormat("Validation %s: %s - %s", 
  879 |                                 GetValidationResultName(result.Result),
  880 |                                 GetValidationTypeName(result.Type),
  881 |                                 result.Message);
  882 |     
  883 |     if (result.Result == VALIDATION_FAILED || result.Result == VALIDATION_CRITICAL) {
  884 |         LogError(message);
  885 |     } else {
  886 |         LogActivity(message);
  887 |     }
  888 | }
  889 | 
  890 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  891 | //| Log error message                                               |
  892 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  893 | void CRiskValidator::LogError(const string message) {
  894 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  895 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("RiskValidator: " + message);
  896 |     } else {
  897 |         Print("RiskValidator ERROR: ", message);
  898 |     }
  899 | }
  900 | 
  901 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  902 | //| Log activity message                                            |
  903 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  904 | void CRiskValidator::LogActivity(const string message) {
  905 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  906 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("RiskValidator: " + message);
  907 |     } else {
  908 |         Print("RiskValidator: ", message);
  909 |     }
  910 | }
  911 | 
  912 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  913 | //| Get validation result name                                      |
  914 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  915 | string CRiskValidator::GetValidationResultName(ENUM_VALIDATION_RESULT result) {
  916 |     switch (result) {
  917 |         case VALIDATION_PASSED: return "PASSED";
  918 |         case VALIDATION_WARNING: return "WARNING";
  919 |         case VALIDATION_FAILED: return "FAILED";
  920 |         case VALIDATION_CRITICAL: return "CRITICAL";
  921 |         case VALIDATION_UNKNOWN: return "UNKNOWN";
  922 |         default: return "INVALID";
  923 |     }
  924 | }
  925 | 
  926 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  927 | //| Get validation type name                                        |

  930 |     switch (type) {
  931 |         case VALIDATION_POSITION_SIZE: return "Position Size";
  932 |         case VALIDATION_STOP_LOSS: return "Stop Loss";
  933 |         case VALIDATION_TAKE_PROFIT: return "Take Profit";

  943 |         case VALIDATION_NEWS_FILTER: return "News Filter";
  944 |         case VALIDATION_CUSTOM: return "Custom";
  945 |         default: return "Unknown";
  946 |     }
  947 | }

   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| Enhanced Trade Execution Structures                              |
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | struct STradeExecutionMetrics {
   18 |     // Execution Quality
   19 |     double          AverageSlippage;         // Average slippage in points
   20 |     double          MaxSlippage;             // Maximum recorded slippage
   21 |     double          AverageLatency;          // Average execution time (ms)
   22 |     double          MaxLatency;              // Maximum execution time (ms)
   23 |     
   24 |     // Success Rates
   25 |     double          ExecutionSuccessRate;    // % of successful executions
   26 |     double          FillRate;                // % of orders filled
   27 |     double          RejectionRate;           // % of orders rejected
   28 |     
   29 |     // Volume Analysis
   30 |     double          TotalVolumeExecuted;     // Total volume traded
   31 |     double          AverageVolumePerTrade;   // Average trade size
   32 |     int             PartialFills;            // Number of partial fills
   33 |     
   34 |     // Timing Analysis
   35 |     double          MarketHoursSuccessRate;  // Success rate during market hours
   36 |     double          OffHoursSuccessRate;     // Success rate during off hours
   37 |     ulong           LastExecutionTime;       // Timestamp of last execution
   38 |     
   39 |     STradeExecutionMetrics() { Reset(); }
   40 |     void Reset() {
   41 |         AverageSlippage = MaxSlippage = 0.0;
   42 |         AverageLatency = MaxLatency = 0.0;
   43 |         ExecutionSuccessRate = FillRate = RejectionRate = 0.0;
   44 |         TotalVolumeExecuted = AverageVolumePerTrade = 0.0;
   45 |         PartialFills = 0;
   46 |         MarketHoursSuccessRate = OffHoursSuccessRate = 0.0;
   47 |         LastExecutionTime = 0;
   48 |     }
   49 | };
   50 | 
   51 | struct STradeRequest {
   52 |     ENUM_ORDER_TYPE OrderType;
   53 |     double          Volume;
   54 |     double          Price;
   55 |     double          StopLoss;
   56 |     double          TakeProfit;
   57 |     string          Comment;
   58 |     ulong           RequestTime;
   59 |     
   60 |     STradeRequest() {
   61 |         OrderType = ORDER_TYPE_BUY;
   62 |         Volume = Price = StopLoss = TakeProfit = 0.0;
   63 |         Comment = "";
   64 |         RequestTime = 0;
   65 |     }
   66 | };
   67 | 
   68 | struct SExecutionResult {
   69 |     bool            Success;
   70 |     ulong           ExecutionTime;           // Microseconds
   71 |     double          SlippagePoints;
   72 |     double          ActualPrice;
   73 |     long            DealTicket;
   74 |     uint            ReturnCode;
   75 |     string          ErrorDescription;
   76 |     
   77 |     SExecutionResult() {
   78 |         Success = false;
   79 |         ExecutionTime = SlippagePoints = ActualPrice = 0.0;
   80 |         DealTicket = 0;
   81 |         ReturnCode = 0;
   82 |         ErrorDescription = "";
   83 |     }
   84 | };
   85 | 
   86 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   87 | //| Enhanced CTradeManager - Advanced Trade Execution Engine        |
   88 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   89 | class CTradeManager {
   90 | private:
   91 |     // Core State
   92 |     EAContext*                  m_pContext;
   93 |     bool                        m_bInitialized;
   94 |     
   95 |     // Core Trading Components
   96 |     CTrade                      m_Trade;
   97 |     string                      m_sSymbol;
   98 |     long                        m_lMagicNumber;
   99 |     int                         m_iSlippage;
  100 |     int                         m_iMaxSpreadPoints;
  101 |     
  102 |     // Enhanced Metrics
  103 |     STradeExecutionMetrics      m_ExecutionMetrics;
  104 |     
  105 |     // Trade Statistics
  106 |     int                         m_iTotalTrades;
  107 |     int                         m_iSuccessfulTrades;
  108 |     int                         m_iFailedTrades;
  109 |     double                      m_dTotalSlippage;
  110 |     double                      m_dAverageExecutionTime;
  111 |     
  112 |     // Risk Controls
  113 |     double                      m_dMaxLotSize;
  114 |     int                         m_iMaxPositions;
  115 |     double                      m_dDailyLossLimit;
  116 |     
  117 |     // Advanced Features
  118 |     double                      m_dSlippageTolerance;    // Maximum acceptable slippage
  119 |     int                         m_iMaxRetries;           // Maximum execution retries
  120 |     double                      m_dExecutionTimeout;     // Execution timeout (seconds)
  121 |     bool                        m_bAllowPartialFills;    // Allow partial order fills
  122 |     
  123 |     // Execution Quality Tracking
  124 |     double                      m_SlippageHistory[100];  // Last 100 slippage values
  125 |     int                         m_SlippageIndex;         // Current index in history
  126 |     int                         m_SlippageCount;         // Number of recorded values
  127 |     
  128 |     // Latency Tracking
  129 |     double                      m_LatencyHistory[100];   // Last 100 latency values
  130 |     int                         m_LatencyIndex;          // Current index in history
  131 |     int                         m_LatencyCount;          // Number of recorded values
  132 |     
  133 | public:
  134 |     //--- Constructor/Destructor ---
  135 |     CTradeManager();
  136 |     ~CTradeManager();
  137 |     
  138 |     //--- Initialization ---
  139 |     bool                        Initialize(EAContext* pContext);
  140 |     void                        Deinitialize();
  141 |     bool                        IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  142 |     
  143 |     //--- Core Trading Operations ---
  144 |     bool                        OpenPosition(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume, double sl_price, double tp_price, const string comment = "");
  145 |     SExecutionResult            OpenPositionAdvanced(const STradeRequest &request);
  146 |     bool                        ClosePosition(long ticket, const string reason, double volume_to_close = 0.0);
  147 |     bool                        CloseAllPositions(const string reason);
  148 |     bool                        ModifyPosition(long ticket, double new_sl_price, double new_tp_price);
  149 |     bool                        DeletePendingOrder(long ticket, const string reason);
  150 |     
  151 |     //--- Position Management ---
  152 |     int                         GetOpenPositionsCount(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type = WRONG_VALUE);
  153 |     double                      GetTotalExposure();
  154 |     double                      GetPositionSize(long ticket);
  155 |     bool                        IsPositionOpen(long ticket);
  156 |     double                      GetPositionProfit(long ticket);
  157 |     double                      GetTotalUnrealizedPnL();
  158 |     
  159 |     //--- Risk Management ---
  160 |     bool                        ValidateTradeRequest(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume);
  161 |     double                      CalculateOptimalLotSize(double risk_percent, double sl_pips);
  162 |     bool                        CheckDailyLimits();
  163 |     bool                        CheckRiskLimits(double volume);
  164 |     bool                        IsRiskAcceptable(const STradeRequest &request);
  165 |     
  166 |     //--- Price Calculations ---
  167 |     double                      CalculateStopLossPrice(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double entry_price, double sl_pips);
  168 |     double                      CalculateTakeProfitPrice(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double entry_price, double tp_pips);
  169 |     double                      NormalizeLots(double lots);
  170 |     double                      NormalizePrice(double price);
  171 |     
  172 |     //--- Event Handling ---
  173 |     void                        OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans, const MqlTradeRequest& request, const MqlTradeResult& result);
  174 |     
  175 |     //--- Statistics & Analytics ---
  176 |     int                         GetTotalTrades() const { return m_iTotalTrades; }
  177 |     int                         GetSuccessfulTrades() const { return m_iSuccessfulTrades; }
  178 |     int                         GetFailedTrades() const { return m_iFailedTrades; }
  179 |     double                      GetSuccessRate() const;
  180 |     double                      GetAverageSlippage() const;
  181 |     double                      GetAverageExecutionTime() const { return m_dAverageExecutionTime; }
  182 |     STradeExecutionMetrics      GetExecutionMetrics() const { return m_ExecutionMetrics; }
  183 |     
  184 |     //--- Execution Quality Analysis ---
  185 |     double                      GetCurrentSlippageStats(double &average, double &maximum, double &deviation);
  186 |     double                      GetCurrentLatencyStats(double &average, double &maximum, double &deviation);
  187 |     double                      GetExecutionQualityScore();
  188 |     bool                        IsExecutionQualityAcceptable();
  189 |     
  190 |     //--- Advanced Features ---
  191 |     void                        SetSlippageTolerance(double tolerance) { m_dSlippageTolerance = tolerance; }
  192 |     void                        SetMaxRetries(int retries) { m_iMaxRetries = retries; }
  193 |     void                        SetExecutionTimeout(double timeout) { m_dExecutionTimeout = timeout; }
  194 |     void                        SetAllowPartialFills(bool allow) { m_bAllowPartialFills = allow; }
  195 |     
  196 |     //--- Market Analysis ---
  197 |     double                      GetCurrentSpread();
  198 |     bool                        IsMarketLiquid();
  199 |     bool                        IsVolatilityHigh();
  200 |     ENUM_TRADE_RETCODE          GetLastTradeResult() { return (ENUM_TRADE_RETCODE)m_Trade.ResultRetcode(); }
  201 |     
  202 | private:
  203 |     //--- Validation Methods ---
  204 |     bool                        IsTradeContextValid(const string calling_function);
  205 |     bool                        ValidateSymbolInfo();
  206 |     bool                        CheckMarketConditions();
  207 |     
  208 |     //--- Helper Methods ---
  209 |     void                        UpdateTradeStatistics(bool success, double slippage, double execution_time);
  210 |     void                        UpdateExecutionMetrics(const SExecutionResult &result);
  211 |     void                        LogTradeDetails(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume, double price, const string comment);
  212 |     bool                        CheckSpreadConditions();
  213 |     bool                        CheckTradingHours();
  214 |     
  215 |     //--- Execution Quality Tracking ---
  216 |     void                        RecordSlippage(double slippage);
  217 |     void                        RecordLatency(double latency);
  218 |     double                      CalculateStatistics(const double &history[], int count, double &average, double &maximum, double &deviation);
  219 |     
  220 |     //--- Advanced Execution Methods ---
  221 |     SExecutionResult            ExecuteOrderWithRetry(const STradeRequest &request);
  222 |     bool                        ValidateOrderExecution(const STradeRequest &request, const SExecutionResult &result);
  223 |     double                      CalculateSlippage(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double requested_price, double actual_price);
  224 |     
  225 |     //--- Market Quality Assessment ---
  226 |     bool                        IsMarketConditionOptimal();
  227 |     double                      GetMarketImpactEstimate(double volume);
  228 |     bool                        ShouldDelayExecution();
  229 | };

  232 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  233 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  234 | CTradeManager::CTradeManager() : 
  235 |     m_pContext(NULL),
  236 |     m_bInitialized(false),
  237 |     m_sSymbol(""),
  238 |     m_lMagicNumber(0),
  239 |     m_iSlippage(0),
  240 |     m_iMaxSpreadPoints(0),
  241 |     m_iTotalTrades(0),
  242 |     m_iSuccessfulTrades(0),
  243 |     m_iFailedTrades(0),
  244 |     m_dTotalSlippage(0.0),
  245 |     m_dAverageExecutionTime(0.0),
  246 |     m_dMaxLotSize(0.0),
  247 |     m_iMaxPositions(0),
  248 |     m_dDailyLossLimit(0.0),
  249 |     m_dSlippageTolerance(0.0),
  250 |     m_iMaxRetries(0),
  251 |     m_dExecutionTimeout(0.0),
  252 |     m_bAllowPartialFills(false),
  253 |     m_SlippageIndex(0),
  254 |     m_SlippageCount(0),
  255 |     m_LatencyIndex(0),
  256 |     m_LatencyCount(0)
  257 | {
  258 |     // The constructor should only initialize members to default values.
  259 |     // All logic, especially that depending on external context (like EAInputs),
  260 |     // must be in the Initialize() method.
  261 |     ArrayInitialize(m_SlippageHistory, 0.0);
  262 |     ArrayInitialize(m_LatencyHistory, 0.0);
  263 |     m_ExecutionMetrics.Reset();
  264 | }
