  267 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  268 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  269 | CTradeManager::~CTradeManager() {
  270 |     Deinitialize();
  271 | }
  272 | 
  273 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  274 | //| Initialize Trade Manager                                         |
  275 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  276 | bool CTradeManager::Initialize(EAContext* pContext) {
  277 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  278 |         return true;
  279 |     }
  280 |     
  281 |     if (pContext == NULL) {
  282 |         Print("[TradeManager] ERROR: Context is NULL");
  283 |         return false;
  284 |     }
  285 |     
  286 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  287 |     
  288 |     // Validate required components
  289 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger == NULL) {
  290 |         Print("[TradeManager] ERROR: Logger is NULL");
  291 |         return false;
  292 |     }
  293 |     
  294 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Initializing Enhanced TradeManager v5...", __FUNCTION__);
  295 |     
  296 |     // Set basic parameters
  297 |     m_sSymbol = _Symbol;
  298 |     m_lMagicNumber = m_pContext->Inputs.MagicNumber;
  299 |     m_iSlippage = m_pContext->Inputs.Slippage;
  300 |     m_iMaxSpreadPoints = (int)m_pContext->Inputs.MarketFilters.MaxSpreadPoints;
  301 |     
  302 |     // Configure CTrade object
  303 |     m_Trade.SetExpertMagicNumber(m_lMagicNumber);
  304 |     m_Trade.SetMarginMode();
  305 |     m_Trade.SetTypeFillingBySymbol(m_sSymbol);
  306 |     m_Trade.SetDeviationInPoints(m_iSlippage);
  307 |     
  308 |     // Set risk controls from inputs
  309 |     m_dMaxLotSize = m_pContext->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxLotSize;
  310 |     m_iMaxPositions = m_pContext->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxPositions;
  311 |     m_dDailyLossLimit = m_pContext->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxDailyLossPercent;
  312 |     
  313 |     // Advanced settings from inputs if available
  314 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.TradeManagement.SlippageTolerance > 0) {
  315 |         m_dSlippageTolerance = m_pContext->Inputs.TradeManagement.SlippageTolerance;
  316 |     }
  317 |     
  318 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.TradeManagement.MaxRetries > 0) {
  319 |         m_iMaxRetries = m_pContext->Inputs.TradeManagement.MaxRetries;
  320 |     }
  321 |     
  322 |     // Validate symbol information
  323 |     if (!ValidateSymbolInfo()) {
  324 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to validate symbol information", __FUNCTION__);
  325 |         return false;
  326 |     }
  327 |     
  328 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  329 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Enhanced TradeManager initialized for %s with Magic Number %d", 
  330 |                                            m_sSymbol, m_lMagicNumber), __FUNCTION__);
  331 |     
  332 |     return true;
  333 | }
  334 | 
  335 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  336 | //| Deinitialize Trade Manager                                       |
  337 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  338 | void CTradeManager::Deinitialize() {
  339 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  340 |         return;
  341 |     }
  342 |     
  343 |     if (m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) {
  344 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Deinitializing Enhanced TradeManager...", __FUNCTION__);
  345 |         
  346 |         // Log comprehensive final statistics
  347 |         string stats = StringFormat("Final Enhanced Trade Statistics:\n" +
  348 |                                    "- Total Trades: %d (Success: %d, Failed: %d)\n" +
  349 |                                    "- Success Rate: %.2f%%\n" +
  350 |                                    "- Average Slippage: %.2f points\n" +
  351 |                                    "- Average Latency: %.2f ms\n" +
  352 |                                    "- Execution Quality Score: %.2f%%\n" +
  353 |                                    "- Total Volume: %.2f lots",
  354 |                                    m_iTotalTrades, m_iSuccessfulTrades, m_iFailedTrades, 
  355 |                                    GetSuccessRate(), GetAverageSlippage(), 
  356 |                                    m_dAverageExecutionTime, GetExecutionQualityScore(),
  357 |                                    m_ExecutionMetrics.TotalVolumeExecuted);
  358 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(stats, __FUNCTION__);
  359 |     }
  360 |     
  361 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  362 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  363 | }
  364 | 
  365 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  366 | //| Enhanced Open Position with Advanced Metrics                    |
  367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  368 | bool CTradeManager::OpenPosition(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume, double sl_price, double tp_price, const string comment = "") {
  369 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) {
  370 |         return false;
  371 |     }
  372 |     
  373 |     // Create trade request structure
  374 |     STradeRequest request;
  375 |     request.OrderType = order_type;
  376 |     request.Volume = volume;
  377 |     request.StopLoss = sl_price;
  378 |     request.TakeProfit = tp_price;
  379 |     request.Comment = comment;
  380 |     request.RequestTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  381 |     
  382 |     // Use advanced execution with retry logic
  383 |     SExecutionResult result = OpenPositionAdvanced(request);
  384 |     
  385 |     return result.Success;
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  389 | //| Advanced Position Opening with Retry Logic                      |
  390 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  391 | SExecutionResult CTradeManager::OpenPositionAdvanced(const STradeRequest &request) {
  392 |     SExecutionResult result;
  393 |     
  394 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) {
  395 |         result.ErrorDescription = "Trade context invalid";
  396 |         return result;
  397 |     }
  398 |     
  399 |     // Validate trade request
  400 |     if (!ValidateTradeRequest(request.OrderType, request.Volume)) {
  401 |         result.ErrorDescription = "Trade request validation failed";
  402 |         return result;
  403 |     }
  404 |     
  405 |     // Check market conditions
  406 |     if (!CheckMarketConditions()) {
  407 |         result.ErrorDescription = "Market conditions not suitable";
  408 |         return result;
  409 |     }
  410 |     
  411 |     // Check if risk is acceptable
  412 |     if (!IsRiskAcceptable(request)) {
  413 |         result.ErrorDescription = "Risk not acceptable";
  414 |         return result;
  415 |     }
  416 |     
  417 |     // Execute with retry logic
  418 |     result = ExecuteOrderWithRetry(request);
  419 |     
  420 |     // Update execution metrics
  421 |     UpdateExecutionMetrics(result);
  422 |     
  423 |     return result;
  424 | }
  425 | 
  426 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  427 | //| Execute Order with Retry Logic                                  |
  428 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  429 | SExecutionResult CTradeManager::ExecuteOrderWithRetry(const STradeRequest &request) {
  430 |     SExecutionResult result;
  431 |     ulong start_time = GetMicrosecondCount();
  432 |     
  433 |     // Normalize volume and prices
  434 |     double normalized_volume = NormalizeLots(request.Volume);
  435 |     if (normalized_volume <= 0) {
  436 |         result.ErrorDescription = "Invalid normalized volume";
  437 |         return result;
  438 |     }
  439 |     
  440 |     double price = (request.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  441 |                    SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : 
  442 |                    SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  443 |     
  444 |     if (price <= 0) {
  445 |         result.ErrorDescription = "Invalid market price";
  446 |         return result;
  447 |     }
  448 |     
  449 |     double norm_sl = (request.StopLoss > 0) ? NormalizePrice(request.StopLoss) : 0.0;
  450 |     double norm_tp = (request.TakeProfit > 0) ? NormalizePrice(request.TakeProfit) : 0.0;
  451 |     
  452 |     // Log trade attempt
  453 |     LogTradeDetails(request.OrderType, normalized_volume, price, request.Comment);
  454 |     
  455 |     // Attempt execution with retries
  456 |     for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= m_iMaxRetries; attempt++) {
  457 |         if (attempt > 1) {
  458 |             Sleep(100 * attempt); // Progressive delay
  459 |             
  460 |             // Update price for retry
  461 |             price = (request.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  462 |                     SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : 
  463 |                     SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  464 |         }
  465 |         
  466 |         // Execute trade
  467 |         bool success = m_Trade.PositionOpen(m_sSymbol, request.OrderType, normalized_volume, price, norm_sl, norm_tp, request.Comment);
  468 |         
  469 |         result.ExecutionTime = GetMicrosecondCount() - start_time;
  470 |         result.ReturnCode = m_Trade.ResultRetcode();
  471 |         result.ErrorDescription = m_Trade.ResultRetcodeDescription();
  472 |         
  473 |         if (success) {
  474 |             result.Success = true;
  475 |             result.DealTicket = m_Trade.ResultDeal();
  476 |             result.ActualPrice = price; // Will be updated in OnTradeTransaction
  477 |             result.SlippagePoints = 0.0; // Will be calculated in OnTradeTransaction
  478 |             
  479 |             // Record execution time
  480 |             RecordLatency(result.ExecutionTime / 1000.0); // Convert to milliseconds
  481 |             
  482 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Position opened successfully on attempt %d. Deal: #%d, Execution time: %.2f ms", 
  483 |                                                    attempt, result.DealTicket, result.ExecutionTime / 1000.0), __FUNCTION__);
  484 |             break;
  485 |         } else {
  486 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Execution attempt %d failed. Error: %d - %s", 
  487 |                                                       attempt, result.ReturnCode, result.ErrorDescription), __FUNCTION__);
  488 |             
  489 |             // Check if we should retry
  490 |             if (attempt >= m_iMaxRetries || 
  491 |                 result.ReturnCode == TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_VOLUME ||
  492 |                 result.ReturnCode == TRADE_RETCODE_NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY) {
  493 |                 break; // Don't retry for these errors
  494 |             }
  495 |         }
  496 |     }
  497 |     
  498 |     // Update statistics
  499 |     UpdateTradeStatistics(result.Success, result.SlippagePoints, result.ExecutionTime / 1000.0);
  500 |     
  501 |     return result;
  502 | }
  503 | 
  504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 | //| Enhanced Close Position with Better Tracking                    |
  506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 | bool CTradeManager::ClosePosition(long ticket, const string reason, double volume_to_close = 0.0) {
  508 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) {
  509 |         return false;
  510 |     }
  511 |     
  512 |     if (!PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  513 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Position #%d not found", ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  514 |         return false;
  515 |     }
  516 |     
  517 |     // Verify it's our position
  518 |     if (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) != m_lMagicNumber) {
  519 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Position #%d has different magic number", ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  520 |         return false;
  521 |     }
  522 |     
  523 |     double position_volume = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  524 |     double close_volume = (volume_to_close > 0) ? NormalizeLots(volume_to_close) : position_volume;
  525 |     
  526 |     if (close_volume > position_volume) {
  527 |         close_volume = position_volume;
  528 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Adjusted close volume from %.6f to %.6f", 
  529 |                                                   volume_to_close, close_volume), __FUNCTION__);
  530 |     }
  531 |     
  532 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Closing %.6f lots of position #%d. Reason: %s", 
  533 |                                            close_volume, ticket, reason), __FUNCTION__);
  534 |     
  535 |     ulong start_time = GetMicrosecondCount();
  536 |     
  537 |     // Execute close with retry logic
  538 |     bool result = false;
  539 |     for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= m_iMaxRetries; attempt++) {
  540 |         if (attempt > 1) {
  541 |             Sleep(100 * attempt);
  542 |         }
  543 |         
  544 |         result = m_Trade.PositionClose(ticket, close_volume);
  545 |         
  546 |         if (result) {
  547 |             double execution_time = (GetMicrosecondCount() - start_time) / 1000.0;
  548 |             RecordLatency(execution_time);
  549 |             
  550 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Position #%d closed successfully on attempt %d. Deal: #%d, Execution time: %.2f ms", 
  551 |                                                    ticket, attempt, m_Trade.ResultDeal(), execution_time), __FUNCTION__);
  552 |             break;
  553 |         } else {
  554 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Close attempt %d failed. Error: %d - %s", 
  555 |                                                       attempt, m_Trade.ResultRetcode(), m_Trade.ResultRetcodeDescription()), __FUNCTION__);
  556 |             
  557 |             if (attempt >= m_iMaxRetries) {
  558 |                 string error_msg = StringFormat("Failed to close position #%d after %d attempts. Final error: %d - %s", 
  559 |                                                ticket, m_iMaxRetries, m_Trade.ResultRetcode(), m_Trade.ResultRetcodeDescription());
  560 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(error_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  561 |                 
  562 |                 if (m_pContext->pErrorHandler != NULL) {
  563 |                     m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(m_Trade.ResultRetcode(), __FUNCTION__, error_msg);
  564 |                 }
  565 |             }
  566 |         }
  567 |     }
  568 |     
  569 |     return result;
  570 | }
  571 | 
  572 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  573 | //| Get Position Profit                                             |
  574 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  575 | double CTradeManager::GetPositionProfit(long ticket) {
  576 |     if (PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  577 |         if (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_lMagicNumber) {
  578 |             return PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PROFIT) + PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SWAP);
  579 |         }
  580 |     }
  581 |     return 0.0;
  582 | }
  583 | 
  584 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  585 | //| Get Total Unrealized PnL                                        |
  586 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  587 | double CTradeManager::GetTotalUnrealizedPnL() {
  588 |     double total_pnl = 0.0;
  589 |     int total = PositionsTotal();
  590 |     
  591 |     for (int i = 0; i < total; i++) {
  592 |         if (PositionGetTicket(i) > 0) {
  593 |             if (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_lMagicNumber && 
  594 |                 PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL) == m_sSymbol) {
  595 |                 total_pnl += PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PROFIT) + PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SWAP);
  596 |             }
  597 |         }
  598 |     }
  599 |     
  600 |     return total_pnl;
  601 | }
  602 | 
  603 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  604 | //| Check Risk Limits                                               |
  605 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  606 | bool CTradeManager::CheckRiskLimits(double volume) {
  607 |     // Check volume against maximum lot size
  608 |     if (volume > m_dMaxLotSize) {
  609 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Volume %.6f exceeds maximum %.6f", 
  610 |                                                 volume, m_dMaxLotSize), __FUNCTION__);
  611 |         return false;
  612 |     }
  613 |     
  614 |     // Check against total exposure
  615 |     double current_exposure = GetTotalExposure();
  616 |     double new_exposure = current_exposure + (volume * SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_ASK));
  617 |     double max_exposure = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY) * 2.0; // 200% of equity max
  618 |     
  619 |     if (new_exposure > max_exposure) {
  620 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("New exposure %.2f would exceed maximum %.2f", 
  621 |                                                 new_exposure, max_exposure), __FUNCTION__);
  622 |         return false;
  623 |     }
  624 |     
  625 |     return true;
  626 | }
  627 | 
  628 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  629 | //| Is Risk Acceptable                                              |
  630 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  631 | bool CTradeManager::IsRiskAcceptable(const STradeRequest &request) {
  632 |     // Basic risk checks
  633 |     if (!CheckRiskLimits(request.Volume)) {
  634 |         return false;
  635 |     }
  636 |     
  637 |     // Check execution quality
  638 |     if (!IsExecutionQualityAcceptable()) {
  639 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning("Execution quality below acceptable threshold", __FUNCTION__);
  640 |         return false;
  641 |     }
  642 |     
  643 |     // Check market liquidity
  644 |     if (!IsMarketLiquid()) {
  645 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning("Market liquidity insufficient", __FUNCTION__);
  646 |         return false;
  647 |     }
  648 |     
  649 |     return true;
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  653 | //| Get Total Exposure                                              |
  654 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  655 | double CTradeManager::GetTotalExposure() {
  656 |     double total_exposure = 0.0;
  657 |     int total = PositionsTotal();
  658 |     
  659 |     for (int i = 0; i < total; i++) {
  660 |         if (PositionGetTicket(i) > 0) {
  661 |             if (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_lMagicNumber && 
  662 |                 PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL) == m_sSymbol) {
  663 |                 double volume = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  664 |                 double price = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PRICE_OPEN);
  665 |                 total_exposure += volume * price;
  666 |             }
  667 |         }
  668 |     }
  669 |     
  670 |     return total_exposure;
  671 | }
  672 | 
  673 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  674 | //| Get Position Size                                               |
  675 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  676 | double CTradeManager::GetPositionSize(long ticket) {
  677 |     if (PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  678 |         if (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_lMagicNumber) {
  679 |             return PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  680 |         }
  681 |     }
  682 |     return 0.0;
  683 | }
  684 | 
  685 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  686 | //| Is Position Open                                                |
  687 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  688 | bool CTradeManager::IsPositionOpen(long ticket) {
  689 |     if (PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  690 |         return PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_lMagicNumber;
  691 |     }
  692 |     return false;
  693 | }
  694 | 
  695 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  696 | //| Record Slippage                                                 |
  697 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  698 | void CTradeManager::RecordSlippage(double slippage) {
  699 |     m_SlippageHistory[m_SlippageIndex] = MathAbs(slippage);
  700 |     m_SlippageIndex = (m_SlippageIndex + 1) % 100;
  701 |     if (m_SlippageCount < 100) m_SlippageCount++;
  702 |     
  703 |     // Update metrics
  704 |     if (MathAbs(slippage) > m_ExecutionMetrics.MaxSlippage) {
  705 |         m_ExecutionMetrics.MaxSlippage = MathAbs(slippage);
  706 |     }
  707 | }
  708 | 
  709 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  710 | //| Record Latency                                                  |
  711 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  712 | void CTradeManager::RecordLatency(double latency) {
  713 |     m_LatencyHistory[m_LatencyIndex] = latency;
  714 |     m_LatencyIndex = (m_LatencyIndex + 1) % 100;
  715 |     if (m_LatencyCount < 100) m_LatencyCount++;
  716 |     
  717 |     // Update metrics
  718 |     if (latency > m_ExecutionMetrics.MaxLatency) {
  719 |         m_ExecutionMetrics.MaxLatency = latency;
  720 |     }
  721 | }
  722 | 
  723 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  724 | //| Get Current Slippage Statistics                                 |
  725 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  726 | double CTradeManager::GetCurrentSlippageStats(double &average, double &maximum, double &deviation) {
  727 |     return CalculateStatistics(m_SlippageHistory, m_SlippageCount, average, maximum, deviation);
  728 | }
  729 | 
  730 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  731 | //| Get Current Latency Statistics                                  |
  732 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  733 | double CTradeManager::GetCurrentLatencyStats(double &average, double &maximum, double &deviation) {
  734 |     return CalculateStatistics(m_LatencyHistory, m_LatencyCount, average, maximum, deviation);
  735 | }
  736 | 
  737 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  738 | //| Calculate Statistics                                             |
  739 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  740 | double CTradeManager::CalculateStatistics(const double &history[], int count, double &average, double &maximum, double &deviation) {
  741 |     if (count <= 0) {
  742 |         average = maximum = deviation = 0.0;
  743 |         return 0.0;
  744 |     }
  745 |     
  746 |     // Calculate average
  747 |     double sum = 0.0;
  748 |     maximum = history[0];
  749 |     
  750 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  751 |         sum += history[i];
  752 |         if (history[i] > maximum) maximum = history[i];
  753 |     }
  754 |     
  755 |     average = sum / count;
  756 |     
  757 |     // Calculate standard deviation
  758 |     double variance = 0.0;
  759 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  760 |         variance += MathPow(history[i] - average, 2);
  761 |     }
  762 |     
  763 |     deviation = MathSqrt(variance / count);
  764 |     
  765 |     return average;
  766 | }
  767 | 
  768 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  769 | //| Get Execution Quality Score                                     |
  770 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  771 | double CTradeManager::GetExecutionQualityScore() {
  772 |     if (m_iTotalTrades == 0) return 100.0;
  773 |     
  774 |     double success_score = GetSuccessRate();
  775 |     double slippage_score = 100.0;
  776 |     double latency_score = 100.0;
  777 |     
  778 |     // Slippage score (lower is better)
  779 |     if (m_SlippageCount > 0) {
  780 |         double avg_slippage = 0.0, max_slippage = 0.0, dev_slippage = 0.0;
  781 |         GetCurrentSlippageStats(avg_slippage, max_slippage, dev_slippage);
  782 |         
  783 |         slippage_score = MathMax(0.0, 100.0 - (avg_slippage * 10.0)); // 10 points per pip slippage
  784 |     }
  785 |     
  786 |     // Latency score (lower is better)
  787 |     if (m_LatencyCount > 0) {
  788 |         double avg_latency = 0.0, max_latency = 0.0, dev_latency = 0.0;
  789 |         GetCurrentLatencyStats(avg_latency, max_latency, dev_latency);
  790 |         
  791 |         latency_score = MathMax(0.0, 100.0 - (avg_latency / 10.0)); // 1 point per 10ms latency
  792 |     }
  793 |     
  794 |     // Weighted average
  795 |     return (success_score * 0.5) + (slippage_score * 0.3) + (latency_score * 0.2);
  796 | }
  797 | 
  798 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  799 | //| Is Execution Quality Acceptable                                 |
  800 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  801 | bool CTradeManager::IsExecutionQualityAcceptable() {
  802 |     if (m_iTotalTrades < 10) return true; // Not enough data
  803 |     
  804 |     double quality_score = GetExecutionQualityScore();
  805 |     return quality_score >= 70.0; // Minimum 70% quality score
  806 | }
  807 | 
  808 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  809 | //| Get Current Spread                                              |
  810 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  811 | double CTradeManager::GetCurrentSpread() {
  812 |     return SymbolInfoInteger(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  813 | }
  814 | 
  815 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  816 | //| Is Market Liquid                                                |
  817 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  818 | bool CTradeManager::IsMarketLiquid() {
  819 |     double spread = GetCurrentSpread();
  820 |     double avg_spread = spread; // In a full implementation, you'd calculate average spread
  821 |     
  822 |     // Market is considered liquid if current spread is not too far from average
  823 |     return spread <= avg_spread * 2.0;
  824 | }
  825 | 
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | //| Is Volatility High                                              |
  828 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  829 | bool CTradeManager::IsVolatilityHigh() {
  830 |     if (!m_pContext->pMarketData) return false;
  831 |     
  832 |     double current_atr = m_pContext->pMarketData->GetATR(14, 0);
  833 |     double avg_atr = m_pContext->pMarketData->GetATR(50, 0);
  834 |     
  835 |     return current_atr > avg_atr * 1.5; // High volatility if ATR is 50% above average
  836 | }
  837 | 
  838 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  839 | //| Calculate Slippage                                              |
  840 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  841 | double CTradeManager::CalculateSlippage(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double requested_price, double actual_price) {
  842 |     double slippage = 0.0;
  843 |     
  844 |     if (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  845 |         slippage = actual_price - requested_price;
  846 |     } else {
  847 |         slippage = requested_price - actual_price;
  848 |     }
  849 |     
  850 |     return slippage / SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  851 | }
  852 | 
  853 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  854 | //| Validate Order Execution                                        |
  855 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  856 | bool CTradeManager::ValidateOrderExecution(const STradeRequest &request, const SExecutionResult &result) {
  857 |     if (!result.Success) return false;
  858 |     
  859 |     // Check slippage tolerance
  860 |     if (MathAbs(result.SlippagePoints) > m_dSlippageTolerance) {
  861 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Slippage %.2f exceeds tolerance %.2f", 
  862 |                                                   result.SlippagePoints, m_dSlippageTolerance), __FUNCTION__);
  863 |         return false;
  864 |     }
  865 |     
  866 |     // Check execution time
  867 |     double execution_time_ms = result.ExecutionTime / 1000.0;
  868 |     if (execution_time_ms > m_dExecutionTimeout * 1000.0) {
  869 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Execution time %.2f ms exceeds timeout %.2f ms", 
  870 |                                                   execution_time_ms, m_dExecutionTimeout * 1000.0), __FUNCTION__);
  871 |         return false;
  872 |     }
  873 |     
  874 |     return true;
  875 | }
  876 | 
  877 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  878 | //| Update Execution Metrics                                        |
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | void CTradeManager::UpdateExecutionMetrics(const SExecutionResult &result) {
  881 |     m_ExecutionMetrics.LastExecutionTime = TimeCurrent();
  882 |     m_ExecutionMetrics.TotalVolumeExecuted += NormalizeLots(result.Success ? 1.0 : 0.0); // Simplified
  883 |     
  884 |     if (result.Success) {
  885 |         m_ExecutionMetrics.ExecutionSuccessRate = (double)m_iSuccessfulTrades / m_iTotalTrades * 100.0;
  886 |         m_ExecutionMetrics.FillRate = m_ExecutionMetrics.ExecutionSuccessRate; // Simplified
  887 |         
  888 |         // Record slippage
  889 |         RecordSlippage(result.SlippagePoints);
  890 |         
  891 |         // Update average slippage using exponential moving average
  892 |         if (m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageSlippage == 0.0) {
  893 |             m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageSlippage = MathAbs(result.SlippagePoints);
  894 |         } else {
  895 |             m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageSlippage = (m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageSlippage * 0.9) + (MathAbs(result.SlippagePoints) * 0.1);
  896 |         }
  897 |         
  898 |         // Update average latency
  899 |         double latency_ms = result.ExecutionTime / 1000.0;
  900 |         if (m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageLatency == 0.0) {
  901 |             m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageLatency = latency_ms;
  902 |         } else {
  903 |             m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageLatency = (m_ExecutionMetrics.AverageLatency * 0.9) + (latency_ms * 0.1);
  904 |         }
  905 |     }
  906 |     
  907 |     m_ExecutionMetrics.RejectionRate = (double)m_iFailedTrades / m_iTotalTrades * 100.0;
  908 | }
  909 | 
  910 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  911 | //| Is Market Condition Optimal                                     |
  912 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  913 | bool CTradeManager::IsMarketConditionOptimal() {
  914 |     return CheckSpreadConditions() && 
  915 |            CheckTradingHours() && 
  916 |            IsMarketLiquid() && 
  917 |            !IsVolatilityHigh();
  918 | }
  919 | 
  920 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  921 | //| Get Market Impact Estimate                                      |
  922 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  923 | double CTradeManager::GetMarketImpactEstimate(double volume) {
  924 |     // Simplified market impact estimation
  925 |     double normal_volume = 1.0; // Standard lot
  926 |     double volume_ratio = volume / normal_volume;
  927 |     
  928 |     // Impact increases with volume^0.5 (square root law)
  929 |     return MathSqrt(volume_ratio) * GetCurrentSpread() * 0.1;
  930 | }
  931 | 
  932 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  933 | //| Should Delay Execution                                          |
  934 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  935 | bool CTradeManager::ShouldDelayExecution() {
  936 |     // Check if execution quality is poor
  937 |     if (!IsExecutionQualityAcceptable()) {
  938 |         return true;
  939 |     }
  940 |     
  941 |     // Check if volatility is too high
  942 |     if (IsVolatilityHigh()) {
  943 |         return true;
  944 |     }
  945 |     
  946 |     // Check if spread is too wide
  947 |     if (!CheckSpreadConditions()) {
  948 |         return true;
  949 |     }
  950 |     
  951 |     return false;
  952 | }
  953 | 
  954 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  955 | //| Validate Trade Request                                           |
  956 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  957 | bool CTradeManager::ValidateTradeRequest(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume) {
  958 |     // Check volume limits
  959 |     if (volume > m_dMaxLotSize) {
  960 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Volume %.6f exceeds maximum %.6f", 
  961 |                                                 volume, m_dMaxLotSize), __FUNCTION__);
  962 |         return false;
  963 |     }
  964 |     
  965 |     // Check position limits
  966 |     if (GetOpenPositionsCount() >= m_iMaxPositions) {
  967 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Maximum positions (%d) reached", m_iMaxPositions), __FUNCTION__);
  968 |         return false;
  969 |     }
  970 |     
  971 |     // Check daily limits
  972 |     if (!CheckDailyLimits()) {
  973 |         return false;
  974 |     }
  975 |     
  976 |     return true;
  977 | }
  978 |

  988 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  989 | //| Validate Symbol Information                                      |
  990 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  991 | bool CTradeManager::ValidateSymbolInfo() {
  992 |     if (!SymbolSelect(m_sSymbol, true)) {
  993 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to select symbol %s", m_sSymbol), __FUNCTION__);
  994 |         return false;
  995 |     }
  996 |     
  997 |     double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  998 |     double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  999 |     
 1000 |     if (bid <= 0 || ask <= 0) {
 1001 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Invalid symbol prices", __FUNCTION__);
 1002 |         return false;
 1003 |     }
 1004 |     
 1005 |     return true;
 1006 | }

 1008 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

 1011 | bool CTradeManager::CheckMarketConditions() {
 1012 |     return CheckSpreadConditions() && CheckTradingHours();

 1015 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1016 | //| Check Spread Conditions                                          |
 1017 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1018 | bool CTradeManager::CheckSpreadConditions() {
 1019 |     if (m_iMaxSpreadPoints <= 0) return true; // No spread limit
 1020 |     
 1021 |     int current_spread = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(m_sSymbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
 1022 |     if (current_spread > m_iMaxSpreadPoints) {
 1023 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Spread (%d) exceeds maximum (%d)", 
 1024 |                                                   current_spread, m_iMaxSpreadPoints), __FUNCTION__);
 1025 |         return false;
 1026 |     }
 1027 |     
 1028 |     return true;
 1029 | }

 1040 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1041 | //| Update Trade Statistics                                          |
 1042 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1043 | void CTradeManager::UpdateTradeStatistics(bool success, double slippage, double execution_time) {
 1044 |     m_iTotalTrades++;
 1045 |     
 1046 |     if (success) {
 1047 |         m_iSuccessfulTrades++;
 1048 |     } else {
 1049 |         m_iFailedTrades++;
 1050 |     }
 1051 |     
 1052 |     m_dTotalSlippage += MathAbs(slippage);
 1053 |     
 1054 |     // Update average execution time using exponential moving average
 1055 |     if (m_iTotalTrades == 1) {
 1056 |         m_dAverageExecutionTime = execution_time;
 1057 |     } else {
 1058 |         m_dAverageExecutionTime = (m_dAverageExecutionTime * 0.9) + (execution_time * 0.1);
 1059 |     }
 1060 | }
 1061 | 
 1062 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1063 | //| Get Success Rate                                                 |
 1064 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1065 | double CTradeManager::GetSuccessRate() const {
 1066 |     if (m_iTotalTrades == 0) return 0.0;
 1067 |     return (double)m_iSuccessfulTrades / m_iTotalTrades * 100.0;
 1068 | }
 1069 | 
 1070 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1071 | //| Get Average Slippage                                             |
 1072 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1073 | double CTradeManager::GetAverageSlippage() const {
 1074 |     if (m_iTotalTrades == 0) return 0.0;
 1075 |     return m_dTotalSlippage / m_iTotalTrades;
 1076 | }

 1078 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1079 | //| Log Trade Details                                                |
 1080 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1081 | void CTradeManager::LogTradeDetails(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume, double price, const string comment) {
 1082 |     string order_str = (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? "BUY" : "SELL";
 1083 |     string message = StringFormat("Opening %s position: Volume=%.6f, Price=%.5f, Comment=%s", 
 1084 |                                  order_str, volume, price, comment);
 1085 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(message, __FUNCTION__);
 1086 | }

 1088 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1089 | //| On Trade Transaction Event                                       |
 1090 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1091 | void CTradeManager::OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans, const MqlTradeRequest& request, const MqlTradeResult& result) {
 1092 |     if (!m_bInitialized || trans.magic != m_lMagicNumber) {
 1093 |         return;
 1094 |     }
 1095 |     
 1096 |     if (trans.type == TRADE_TRANSACTION_DEAL_ADD) {
 1097 |         long deal_ticket = trans.deal;
 1098 |         if (HistoryDealSelect(deal_ticket)) {
 1099 |             double deal_price = HistoryDealGetDouble(deal_ticket, DEAL_PRICE);
 1100 |             double deal_volume = HistoryDealGetDouble(deal_ticket, DEAL_VOLUME);
 1101 |             ENUM_DEAL_TYPE deal_type = (ENUM_DEAL_TYPE)HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_TYPE);
 1102 |             
 1103 |             string deal_str = (deal_type == DEAL_TYPE_BUY) ? "BUY" : "SELL";
 1104 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Deal executed: #%d, Type=%s, Volume=%.6f, Price=%.5f", 
 1105 |                                                    deal_ticket, deal_str, deal_volume, deal_price), __FUNCTION__);
 1106 |             
 1107 |             // Update broker health monitor if available
 1108 |             if (m_pContext->pBrokerHealthMonitor != NULL) {
 1109 |                 // Calculate slippage and update monitor
 1110 |                 // This is a simplified implementation
 1111 |                 m_pContext->pBrokerHealthMonitor->UpdateWithNewDataPoint(0.0, 0.0);
 1112 |             }
 1113 |         }
 1114 |     }
 1115 | }

   75 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   76 | //| Execution structures                                            |

   78 | struct SExecutionRequest {
   79 |     ulong RequestID;            // Unique request ID
   80 |     string Symbol;              // Trading symbol
   81 |     ENUM_ORDER_TYPE OrderType;  // Order type
   82 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_MODE ExecutionMode; // Execution mode
   83 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_PRIORITY Priority;  // Execution priority
   84 |     
   85 |     double Volume;              // Order volume
   86 |     double Price;               // Requested price
   87 |     double StopLoss;            // Stop loss level
   88 |     double TakeProfit;          // Take profit level
   89 |     double Slippage;            // Maximum slippage
   90 |     
   91 |     datetime RequestTime;       // Request timestamp
   92 |     datetime ExpirationTime;    // Expiration time
   93 |     int Magic;                  // Magic number
   94 |     string Comment;             // Order comment
   95 |     
   96 |     // Advanced settings
   97 |     bool PartialFill;           // Allow partial fills
   98 |     double MinVolume;           // Minimum fill volume
   99 |     int MaxRetries;             // Maximum retry attempts
  100 |     int RetryDelay;             // Retry delay (ms)
  101 |     
  102 |     // Risk controls
  103 |     double MaxSlippage;         // Maximum allowed slippage
  104 |     double MaxSpread;           // Maximum allowed spread
  105 |     bool ValidateMargin;        // Validate margin requirements
  106 |     bool ValidateStops;         // Validate stop levels
  107 |     
  108 |     // Execution constraints
  109 |     datetime StartTime;         // Execution start time
  110 |     datetime EndTime;           // Execution end time
  111 |     bool MarketHoursOnly;       // Execute only during market hours
  112 |     double MinLiquidity;        // Minimum liquidity requirement
  113 | };
  114 | 
  115 | struct SExecutionResult {
  116 |     ulong RequestID;            // Original request ID
  117 |     ulong OrderTicket;          // Executed order ticket
  118 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_STATUS Status; // Execution status
  119 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_QUALITY Quality; // Execution quality
  120 |     
  121 |     double ExecutedVolume;      // Actually executed volume
  122 |     double ExecutedPrice;       // Actually executed price
  123 |     double ActualSlippage;      // Actual slippage
  124 |     double ActualSpread;        // Actual spread at execution
  125 |     
  126 |     datetime ExecutionTime;     // Execution timestamp
  127 |     int ExecutionDelay;         // Execution delay (ms)
  128 |     int RetryCount;             // Number of retries
  129 |     
  130 |     double Commission;          // Commission charged
  131 |     double Swap;                // Swap charged
  132 |     double Profit;              // Current profit/loss
  133 |     
  134 |     string ErrorMessage;        // Error message if any
  135 |     int ErrorCode;              // Error code
  136 |     string BrokerResponse;      // Broker response
  137 |     
  138 |     // Quality metrics
  139 |     double PriceImprovement;    // Price improvement
  140 |     double ImplementationShortfall; // Implementation shortfall
  141 |     double MarketImpact;        // Market impact
  142 |     double TimingCost;          // Timing cost
  143 | };
  144 | 
  145 | struct SExecutionConfig {
  146 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_MODE DefaultMode;     // Default execution mode
  147 |     ENUM_SLIPPAGE_CONTROL SlippageControl; // Slippage control method
  148 |     ENUM_RETRY_STRATEGY RetryStrategy;   // Retry strategy
  149 |     
  150 |     // Timing settings
  151 |     int MaxExecutionTime;       // Maximum execution time (ms)
  152 |     int RetryDelay;             // Default retry delay (ms)
  153 |     int MaxRetries;             // Maximum retry attempts
  154 |     
  155 |     // Slippage settings
  156 |     double MaxSlippage;         // Maximum allowed slippage
  157 |     double SlippageBuffer;      // Slippage buffer
  158 |     bool AdaptiveSlippage;      // Enable adaptive slippage
  159 |     
  160 |     // Quality settings
  161 |     bool EnableQualityCheck;    // Enable execution quality check
  162 |     double MinQualityScore;     // Minimum quality score
  163 |     bool RejectPoorExecution;   // Reject poor quality executions
  164 |     
  165 |     // Risk controls
  166 |     bool EnablePreTradeChecks;  // Enable pre-trade risk checks
  167 |     bool EnablePostTradeChecks; // Enable post-trade checks
  168 |     double MaxOrderSize;        // Maximum order size
  169 |     double MaxDailyVolume;      // Maximum daily volume
  170 |     
  171 |     // Market conditions
  172 |     bool CheckMarketHours;      // Check market hours
  173 |     bool CheckLiquidity;        // Check liquidity
  174 |     double MinLiquidity;        // Minimum liquidity requirement
  175 |     bool CheckVolatility;       // Check volatility
  176 |     double MaxVolatility;       // Maximum volatility threshold
  177 |     
  178 |     // Advanced features
  179 |     bool EnableSmartRouting;    // Enable smart order routing
  180 |     bool EnableIcebergOrders;   // Enable iceberg orders
  181 |     bool EnableTWAP;            // Enable TWAP execution
  182 |     bool EnableVWAP;            // Enable VWAP execution
  183 |     
  184 |     // Monitoring
  185 |     bool EnableRealTimeMonitoring; // Enable real-time monitoring
  186 |     bool EnableAlerts;          // Enable execution alerts
  187 |     bool EnableReporting;       // Enable execution reporting
  188 | };
  189 | 
  190 | struct SExecutionStatistics {
  191 |     int TotalRequests;          // Total execution requests
  192 |     int SuccessfulExecutions;   // Successful executions
  193 |     int FailedExecutions;       // Failed executions
  194 |     int PartialExecutions;      // Partial executions
  195 |     int RejectedRequests;       // Rejected requests
  196 |     int TimeoutExecutions;      // Timeout executions
  197 |     
  198 |     double TotalVolume;         // Total executed volume
  199 |     double AverageExecutionTime; // Average execution time
  200 |     double AverageSlippage;     // Average slippage
  201 |     double AverageSpread;       // Average spread
  202 |     double SuccessRate;         // Success rate percentage
  203 |     
  204 |     double TotalSlippage;       // Total slippage cost
  205 |     double TotalCommission;     // Total commission
  206 |     double TotalSwap;           // Total swap
  207 |     double TotalProfit;         // Total profit/loss
  208 |     
  209 |     // Quality metrics
  210 |     double AverageQualityScore; // Average execution quality
  211 |     double BestExecutionTime;   // Best execution time
  212 |     double WorstExecutionTime;  // Worst execution time
  213 |     double AveragePriceImprovement; // Average price improvement
  214 |     
  215 |     datetime FirstExecution;    // First execution time
  216 |     datetime LastExecution;     // Last execution time
  217 |     
  218 |     // Performance by time
  219 |     double MorningPerformance;  // Morning execution performance
  220 |     double AfternoonPerformance; // Afternoon execution performance
  221 |     double EveningPerformance;  // Evening execution performance
  222 |     double NightPerformance;    // Night execution performance
  223 | };
  224 |

  226 |     ulong RequestID;
  227 |     string Symbol;
  228 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_STATUS Status;
  229 |     string Message;
  230 |     datetime Timestamp;
  231 |     double Price;
  232 |     double Volume;
  233 |     bool IsUrgent;
  234 |     string Details;
  235 | };

  237 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  238 | //| Execution Engine Class                                          |
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | class CExecutionEngine {
  241 | private:
  242 |     EAContext* m_pContext;
  243 |     
  244 |     // Configuration
  245 |     SExecutionConfig m_Config;
  246 |     
  247 |     // Active requests
  248 |     SExecutionRequest m_ActiveRequests[];
  249 |     SExecutionResult m_ExecutionResults[];
  250 |     int m_RequestCount;
  251 |     int m_ResultCount;
  252 |     
  253 |     // Statistics
  254 |     SExecutionStatistics m_Statistics;
  255 |     
  256 |     // Internal state
  257 |     bool m_bInitialized;
  258 |     bool m_bEnabled;
  259 |     ulong m_NextRequestID;
  260 |     datetime m_LastUpdate;
  261 |     
  262 |     // Request queue
  263 |     SExecutionRequest m_RequestQueue[];
  264 |     int m_QueueSize;
  265 |     
  266 |     // Helper methods
  267 |     bool ProcessExecutionRequest(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result);
  268 |     bool ExecuteMarketOrder(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result);
  269 |     bool ExecutePendingOrder(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result);
  270 |     bool ExecuteSmartOrder(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result);
  271 |     bool ExecuteIcebergOrder(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result);
  272 |     bool ExecuteTWAPOrder(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result);
  273 |     bool ExecuteVWAPOrder(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result);
  274 |     
  275 |     // Validation methods
  276 |     bool ValidateExecutionRequest(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  277 |     bool ValidateMarketConditions(const string symbol);
  278 |     bool ValidateRiskLimits(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  279 |     bool ValidateStopLevels(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  280 |     bool ValidateMarginRequirements(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  281 |     
  282 |     // Slippage control
  283 |     double CalculateMaxSlippage(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  284 |     bool CheckSlippageLimit(const SExecutionRequest& request, double actualPrice);
  285 |     double AdjustPriceForSlippage(const SExecutionRequest& request, double marketPrice);
  286 |     
  287 |     // Quality assessment
  288 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_QUALITY AssessExecutionQuality(const SExecutionResult& result);
  289 |     double CalculateQualityScore(const SExecutionResult& result);
  290 |     double CalculatePriceImprovement(const SExecutionRequest& request, const SExecutionResult& result);
  291 |     double CalculateImplementationShortfall(const SExecutionRequest& request, const SExecutionResult& result);
  292 |     
  293 |     // Retry logic
  294 |     bool ShouldRetryExecution(const SExecutionRequest& request, const SExecutionResult& result);
  295 |     int CalculateRetryDelay(const SExecutionRequest& request, int retryCount);
  296 |     bool RetryExecution(SExecutionRequest& request);
  297 |     
  298 |     // Utility methods
  299 |     ulong GenerateRequestID();
  300 |     bool AddExecutionRequest(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  301 |     bool AddExecutionResult(const SExecutionResult& result);
  302 |     int FindRequestIndex(ulong requestID);
  303 |     int FindResultIndex(ulong requestID);
  304 |     bool UpdateStatistics(const SExecutionResult& result);
  305 |     void SendExecutionAlert(const SExecutionAlert& alert);
  306 |     void LogError(const string message);
  307 |     void LogActivity(const string message);
  308 |     
  309 | public:
  310 |     // Constructor/Destructor
  311 |     CExecutionEngine();
  312 |     ~CExecutionEngine();
  313 |     
  314 |     // Initialization
  315 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* context);
  316 |     bool Deinitialize();
  317 |     bool Configure(const SExecutionConfig& config);
  318 |     
  319 |     // Main execution methods
  320 |     ulong ExecuteOrder(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  321 |     bool ExecuteOrderAsync(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  322 |     bool CancelExecution(ulong requestID);
  323 |     bool ModifyExecution(ulong requestID, const SExecutionRequest& newRequest);
  324 |     
  325 |     // Batch operations
  326 |     bool ExecuteBatch(const SExecutionRequest& requests[], ulong& requestIDs[]);
  327 |     bool CancelBatch(const ulong& requestIDs[]);
  328 |     
  329 |     // Queue management
  330 |     bool AddToQueue(const SExecutionRequest& request);
  331 |     bool ProcessQueue();
  332 |     bool ClearQueue();
  333 |     int GetQueueSize() const { return m_QueueSize; }
  334 |     
  335 |     // Status and monitoring
  336 |     bool GetExecutionStatus(ulong requestID, SExecutionResult& result);
  337 |     bool GetExecutionResult(ulong requestID, SExecutionResult& result);
  338 |     bool IsExecutionComplete(ulong requestID);
  339 |     bool IsExecutionPending(ulong requestID);
  340 |     
  341 |     // Configuration management
  342 |     bool SetExecutionMode(ENUM_EXECUTION_MODE mode);
  343 |     bool SetSlippageControl(ENUM_SLIPPAGE_CONTROL control, double maxSlippage);
  344 |     bool SetRetryStrategy(ENUM_RETRY_STRATEGY strategy, int maxRetries, int delay);
  345 |     bool SetQualityThreshold(double minQuality);
  346 |     
  347 |     // Risk controls
  348 |     bool EnablePreTradeChecks(bool enable);
  349 |     bool EnablePostTradeChecks(bool enable);
  350 |     bool SetMaxOrderSize(double maxSize);
  351 |     bool SetMaxDailyVolume(double maxVolume);
  352 |     
  353 |     // Market condition checks
  354 |     bool CheckMarketHours(const string symbol);
  355 |     bool CheckLiquidity(const string symbol);
  356 |     bool CheckVolatility(const string symbol);
  357 |     bool CheckSpread(const string symbol);
  358 |     
  359 |     // Advanced execution
  360 |     ulong ExecuteIceberg(const string symbol, double totalVolume, double sliceSize, 
  361 |                         ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType, double price = 0.0);
  362 |     ulong ExecuteTWAP(const string symbol, double volume, int duration, 
  363 |                      ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType);
  364 |     ulong ExecuteVWAP(const string symbol, double volume, int duration, 
  365 |                      ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType);
  366 |     
  367 |     // Smart routing
  368 |     bool EnableSmartRouting(bool enable);
  369 |     bool SetRoutingPreferences(const string preferences);
  370 |     
  371 |     // Information retrieval
  372 |     SExecutionConfig GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  373 |     SExecutionStatistics GetStatistics() const { return m_Statistics; }
  374 |     bool GetActiveRequests(ulong& requestIDs[]);
  375 |     bool GetExecutionHistory(SExecutionResult& results[]);
  376 |     
  377 |     // Analysis and reporting
  378 |     bool GenerateExecutionReport(string& report);
  379 |     bool GenerateQualityReport(string& report);
  380 |     bool GeneratePerformanceReport(string& report);
  381 |     double CalculateExecutionCost(ulong requestID);
  382 |     double CalculateAverageExecutionTime();
  383 |     
  384 |     // Optimization
  385 |     bool OptimizeExecutionParameters(const string symbol);
  386 |     bool CalibrateSlippageModel(const string symbol);
  387 |     bool UpdateQualityModel();
  388 |     
  389 |     // Alerts and notifications
  390 |     bool SetExecutionAlert(ENUM_EXECUTION_STATUS status, bool enable);
  391 |     bool SetQualityAlert(double threshold, bool enable);
  392 |     bool SetSlippageAlert(double threshold, bool enable);
  393 |     
  394 |     // Utility methods
  395 |     string GetExecutionModeName(ENUM_EXECUTION_MODE mode);
  396 |     string GetExecutionStatusName(ENUM_EXECUTION_STATUS status);
  397 |     string GetExecutionQualityName(ENUM_EXECUTION_QUALITY quality);
  398 |     string GetSlippageControlName(ENUM_SLIPPAGE_CONTROL control);
  399 |     string GetRetryStrategyName(ENUM_RETRY_STRATEGY strategy);
  400 |     
  401 |     // Status
  402 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  403 |     bool IsEnabled() const { return m_bEnabled; }
  404 |     datetime GetLastUpdate() const { return m_LastUpdate; }
  405 |     
  406 |     // Control
  407 |     bool Enable(bool enable = true);
  408 |     bool Reset();
  409 |     bool ResetStatistics();
  410 | };
  411 | 
  412 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  413 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  414 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  415 | CExecutionEngine::CExecutionEngine() {
  416 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  417 |     m_RequestCount = 0;
  418 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  419 |     m_QueueSize = 0;
  420 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  421 |     m_bEnabled = true;
  422 |     m_NextRequestID = 1;
  423 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  424 |     
  425 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  426 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  427 |     
  428 |     // Set default configuration
  429 |     m_Config.DefaultMode = EXECUTION_MARKET;
  430 |     m_Config.SlippageControl = SLIPPAGE_FIXED;
  431 |     m_Config.RetryStrategy = RETRY_DELAYED;
  432 |     
  433 |     m_Config.MaxExecutionTime = 5000;      // 5 seconds
  434 |     m_Config.RetryDelay = 1000;            // 1 second
  435 |     m_Config.MaxRetries = 3;
  436 |     
  437 |     m_Config.MaxSlippage = 3.0;            // 3 points
  438 |     m_Config.SlippageBuffer = 1.0;         // 1 point buffer
  439 |     m_Config.AdaptiveSlippage = true;
  440 |     
  441 |     m_Config.EnableQualityCheck = true;
  442 |     m_Config.MinQualityScore = 0.7;        // 70% minimum quality
  443 |     m_Config.RejectPoorExecution = false;
  444 |     
  445 |     m_Config.EnablePreTradeChecks = true;
  446 |     m_Config.EnablePostTradeChecks = true;
  447 |     m_Config.MaxOrderSize = 10.0;          // 10 lots max
  448 |     m_Config.MaxDailyVolume = 100.0;       // 100 lots daily max
  449 |     
  450 |     m_Config.CheckMarketHours = true;
  451 |     m_Config.CheckLiquidity = true;
  452 |     m_Config.MinLiquidity = 0.5;           // Minimum liquidity
  453 |     m_Config.CheckVolatility = true;
  454 |     m_Config.MaxVolatility = 0.05;         // 5% max volatility
  455 |     
  456 |     m_Config.EnableSmartRouting = false;
  457 |     m_Config.EnableIcebergOrders = false;
  458 |     m_Config.EnableTWAP = false;
  459 |     m_Config.EnableVWAP = false;
  460 |     
  461 |     m_Config.EnableRealTimeMonitoring = true;
  462 |     m_Config.EnableAlerts = true;
  463 |     m_Config.EnableReporting = true;
  464 | }
  465 | 
  466 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  467 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  468 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  469 | CExecutionEngine::~CExecutionEngine() {
  470 |     Deinitialize();
  471 | }
  472 | 
  473 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  474 | //| Initialize execution engine                                     |
  475 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  476 | bool CExecutionEngine::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  477 |     if (context == NULL) {
  478 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  479 |         return false;
  480 |     }
  481 |     
  482 |     m_pContext = context;
  483 |     
  484 |     // Initialize arrays
  485 |     ArrayResize(m_ActiveRequests, 100);    // Initial capacity
  486 |     ArrayResize(m_ExecutionResults, 1000); // Results history
  487 |     ArrayResize(m_RequestQueue, 50);       // Queue capacity
  488 |     
  489 |     m_RequestCount = 0;
  490 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  491 |     m_QueueSize = 0;
  492 |     
  493 |     // Initialize statistics
  494 |     m_Statistics.FirstExecution = TimeCurrent();
  495 |     
  496 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  497 |     m_bEnabled = true;
  498 |     
  499 |     LogActivity("Execution engine initialized successfully");
  500 |     return true;
  501 | }
  502 | 
  503 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  504 | //| Deinitialize execution engine                                   |
  505 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  506 | bool CExecutionEngine::Deinitialize() {
  507 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  508 |         // Cancel all pending requests
  509 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_RequestCount; i++) {
  510 |             if (m_ActiveRequests[i].RequestID > 0) {
  511 |                 CancelExecution(m_ActiveRequests[i].RequestID);
  512 |             }
  513 |         }
  514 |         
  515 |         // Clear arrays
  516 |         ArrayFree(m_ActiveRequests);
  517 |         ArrayFree(m_ExecutionResults);
  518 |         ArrayFree(m_RequestQueue);
  519 |         
  520 |         m_RequestCount = 0;
  521 |         m_ResultCount = 0;
  522 |         m_QueueSize = 0;
  523 |         
  524 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  525 |         m_bEnabled = false;
  526 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  527 |         
  528 |         LogActivity("Execution engine deinitialized");
  529 |     }
  530 |     
  531 |     return true;
  532 | }
  533 | 
  534 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  535 | //| Configure execution engine                                      |
  536 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  537 | bool CExecutionEngine::Configure(const SExecutionConfig& config) {
  538 |     m_Config = config;
  539 |     
  540 |     // Validate configuration
  541 |     if (m_Config.MaxExecutionTime <= 0) {
  542 |         LogError("Invalid maximum execution time");
  543 |         return false;
  544 |     }
  545 |     
  546 |     if (m_Config.MaxSlippage < 0) {
  547 |         LogError("Invalid maximum slippage");
  548 |         return false;
  549 |     }
  550 |     
  551 |     if (m_Config.MaxRetries < 0) {
  552 |         LogError("Invalid maximum retries");
  553 |         return false;
  554 |     }
  555 |     
  556 |     LogActivity("Execution engine configured successfully");
  557 |     return true;
  558 | }
  559 | 
  560 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  561 | //| Execute order                                                   |
  562 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  563 | ulong CExecutionEngine::ExecuteOrder(const SExecutionRequest& request) {
  564 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bEnabled) {
  565 |         LogError("Execution engine not initialized or disabled");
  566 |         return 0;
  567 |     }
  568 |     
  569 |     // Validate request
  570 |     if (!ValidateExecutionRequest(request)) {
  571 |         LogError("Invalid execution request");
  572 |         return 0;
  573 |     }
  574 |     
  575 |     // Create mutable copy of request
  576 |     SExecutionRequest execRequest = request;
  577 |     execRequest.RequestID = GenerateRequestID();
  578 |     execRequest.RequestTime = TimeCurrent();
  579 |     
  580 |     // Create result structure
  581 |     SExecutionResult result;
  582 |     ZeroMemory(result);
  583 |     result.RequestID = execRequest.RequestID;
  584 |     result.Status = EXECUTION_PROCESSING;
  585 |     
  586 |     // Add to active requests
  587 |     if (!AddExecutionRequest(execRequest)) {
  588 |         LogError("Failed to add execution request");
  589 |         return 0;
  590 |     }
  591 |     
  592 |     // Process execution
  593 |     if (ProcessExecutionRequest(execRequest, result)) {
  594 |         // Add result to history
  595 |         AddExecutionResult(result);
  596 |         
  597 |         // Update statistics
  598 |         UpdateStatistics(result);
  599 |         
  600 |         // Send alert if needed
  601 |         if (m_Config.EnableAlerts) {
  602 |             SExecutionAlert alert;
  603 |             alert.RequestID = result.RequestID;
  604 |             alert.Symbol = execRequest.Symbol;
  605 |             alert.Status = result.Status;
  606 |             alert.Message = "Order executed";
  607 |             alert.Timestamp = result.ExecutionTime;
  608 |             alert.Price = result.ExecutedPrice;
  609 |             alert.Volume = result.ExecutedVolume;
  610 |             alert.IsUrgent = (result.Quality == QUALITY_POOR || result.Quality == QUALITY_TERRIBLE);
  611 |             alert.Details = StringFormat("Ticket: %I64u, Slippage: %.2f", result.OrderTicket, result.ActualSlippage);
  612 |             SendExecutionAlert(alert);
  613 |         }
  614 |         
  615 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Order executed: Request #%I64u, Ticket #%I64u", 
  616 |                                 execRequest.RequestID, result.OrderTicket));
  617 |         
  618 |         return execRequest.RequestID;
  619 |     }
  620 |     
  621 |     LogError(StringFormat("Failed to execute order: Request #%I64u", execRequest.RequestID));
  622 |     return 0;
  623 | }
  624 | 
  625 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  626 | //| Process execution request                                       |
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | bool CExecutionEngine::ProcessExecutionRequest(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result) {
  629 |     datetime startTime = GetMicrosecondCount() / 1000;
  630 |     
  631 |     // Pre-trade checks
  632 |     if (m_Config.EnablePreTradeChecks) {
  633 |         if (!ValidateMarketConditions(request.Symbol) ||
  634 |             !ValidateRiskLimits(request) ||
  635 |             !ValidateStopLevels(request) ||
  636 |             !ValidateMarginRequirements(request)) {
  637 |             result.Status = EXECUTION_REJECTED;
  638 |             result.ErrorMessage = "Pre-trade validation failed";
  639 |             return false;
  640 |         }
  641 |     }
  642 |     
  643 |     bool success = false;
  644 |     
  645 |     // Execute based on mode
  646 |     switch (request.ExecutionMode) {
  647 |         case EXECUTION_MARKET:
  648 |         case EXECUTION_INSTANT:
  649 |             success = ExecuteMarketOrder(request, result);
  650 |             break;
  651 |             
  652 |         case EXECUTION_PENDING:
  653 |             success = ExecutePendingOrder(request, result);
  654 |             break;
  655 |             
  656 |         case EXECUTION_SMART:
  657 |             success = ExecuteSmartOrder(request, result);
  658 |             break;
  659 |             
  660 |         case EXECUTION_ICEBERG:
  661 |             success = ExecuteIcebergOrder(request, result);
  662 |             break;
  663 |             
  664 |         case EXECUTION_TWAP:
  665 |             success = ExecuteTWAPOrder(request, result);
  666 |             break;
  667 |             
  668 |         case EXECUTION_VWAP:
  669 |             success = ExecuteVWAPOrder(request, result);
  670 |             break;
  671 |             
  672 |         default:
  673 |             success = ExecuteMarketOrder(request, result);
  674 |             break;
  675 |     }
  676 |     
  677 |     // Calculate execution time
  678 |     datetime endTime = GetMicrosecondCount() / 1000;
  679 |     result.ExecutionDelay = (int)(endTime - startTime);
  680 |     
  681 |     // Post-trade checks
  682 |     if (success && m_Config.EnablePostTradeChecks) {
  683 |         // Assess execution quality
  684 |         result.Quality = AssessExecutionQuality(result);
  685 |         
  686 |         // Check if quality meets minimum threshold
  687 |         if (m_Config.RejectPoorExecution && result.Quality == QUALITY_POOR) {
  688 |             // Could implement order cancellation logic here
  689 |             LogActivity(StringFormat("Poor execution quality detected for request #%I64u", request.RequestID));
  690 |         }
  691 |     }
  692 |     
  693 |     return success;
  694 | }
  695 | 
  696 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  697 | //| Execute market order                                            |
  698 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  699 | bool CExecutionEngine::ExecuteMarketOrder(SExecutionRequest& request, SExecutionResult& result) {
  700 |     MqlTradeRequest tradeRequest;
  701 |     MqlTradeResult tradeResult;
  702 |     
  703 |     ZeroMemory(tradeRequest);
  704 |     ZeroMemory(tradeResult);
  705 |     
  706 |     // Prepare trade request
  707 |     tradeRequest.action = TRADE_ACTION_DEAL;
  708 |     tradeRequest.symbol = request.Symbol;
  709 |     tradeRequest.volume = request.Volume;
  710 |     tradeRequest.type = request.OrderType;
  711 |     tradeRequest.price = (request.Price > 0) ? request.Price : 
  712 |                         ((request.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  713 |                          SymbolInfoDouble(request.Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : 
  714 |                          SymbolInfoDouble(request.Symbol, SYMBOL_BID));
  715 |     tradeRequest.sl = request.StopLoss;
  716 |     tradeRequest.tp = request.TakeProfit;
  717 |     tradeRequest.deviation = (ulong)request.Slippage;
  718 |     tradeRequest.magic = request.Magic;
  719 |     tradeRequest.comment = request.Comment;
  720 |     
  721 |     // Execute the trade
  722 |     bool success = OrderSend(tradeRequest, tradeResult);
  723 |     
  724 |     // Fill result structure
  725 |     result.ExecutionTime = TimeCurrent();
  726 |     result.OrderTicket = tradeResult.order;
  727 |     result.ExecutedVolume = tradeResult.volume;
  728 |     result.ExecutedPrice = tradeResult.price;
  729 |     result.ActualSlippage = MathAbs(tradeResult.price - tradeRequest.price) / SymbolInfoDouble(request.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  730 |     result.ActualSpread = SymbolInfoInteger(request.Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
  731 |     result.ErrorCode = tradeResult.retcode;
  732 |     result.BrokerResponse = tradeResult.comment;
  733 |     
  734 |     if (success && tradeResult.retcode == TRADE_RETCODE_DONE) {
  735 |         result.Status = EXECUTION_EXECUTED;
  736 |         result.ErrorMessage = "";
  737 |         
  738 |         // Calculate price improvement
  739 |         result.PriceImprovement = CalculatePriceImprovement(request, result);
  740 |         
  741 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Market order executed: %s %.2f lots at %.5f", 
  742 |                                 request.Symbol, result.ExecutedVolume, result.ExecutedPrice));
  743 |         return true;
  744 |     } else {
  745 |         result.Status = EXECUTION_REJECTED;
  746 |         result.ErrorMessage = StringFormat("Order failed: %s (Code: %d)", tradeResult.comment, tradeResult.retcode);
  747 |         
  748 |         LogError(StringFormat("Market order failed: %s", result.ErrorMessage));
  749 |         
  750 |         // Check if retry is needed
  751 |         if (ShouldRetryExecution(request, result)) {
  752 |             return RetryExecution(request);
  753 |         }
  754 |         
  755 |         return false;
  756 |     }
  757 | }
  758 | 
  759 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  760 | //| Validate execution request                                      |
  761 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  762 | bool CExecutionEngine::ValidateExecutionRequest(const SExecutionRequest& request) {
  763 |     // Check symbol
  764 |     if (request.Symbol == "") {
  765 |         LogError("Empty symbol in execution request");
  766 |         return false;
  767 |     }
  768 |     
  769 |     // Check volume
  770 |     if (request.Volume <= 0) {
  771 |         LogError("Invalid volume in execution request");
  772 |         return false;
  773 |     }
  774 |     
  775 |     double minVolume = SymbolInfoDouble(request.Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  776 |     double maxVolume = SymbolInfoDouble(request.Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  777 |     double stepVolume = SymbolInfoDouble(request.Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  778 |     
  779 |     if (request.Volume < minVolume || request.Volume > maxVolume) {
  780 |         LogError(StringFormat("Volume %.2f outside allowed range [%.2f, %.2f]", 
  781 |                             request.Volume, minVolume, maxVolume));
  782 |         return false;
  783 |     }
  784 |     
  785 |     // Check volume step
  786 |     double remainder = fmod(request.Volume, stepVolume);
  787 |     if (remainder > 0.0001) {
  788 |         LogError(StringFormat("Volume %.2f not aligned with step %.2f", 
  789 |                             request.Volume, stepVolume));
  790 |         return false;
  791 |     }
  792 |     
  793 |     // Check order type
  794 |     if (request.OrderType < ORDER_TYPE_BUY || request.OrderType > ORDER_TYPE_SELL_STOP_LIMIT) {
  795 |         LogError("Invalid order type in execution request");
  796 |         return false;
  797 |     }
  798 |     
  799 |     // Check slippage
  800 |     if (request.Slippage < 0) {
  801 |         LogError("Negative slippage in execution request");
  802 |         return false;
  803 |     }
  804 |     
  805 |     return true;
  806 | }
  807 | 
  808 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  809 | //| Generate unique request ID                                      |
  810 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  811 | ulong CExecutionEngine::GenerateRequestID() {
  812 |     return m_NextRequestID++;
  813 | }
  814 | 
  815 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  816 | //| Add execution request to active list                            |
  817 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  818 | bool CExecutionEngine::AddExecutionRequest(const SExecutionRequest& request) {
  819 |     if (m_RequestCount >= ArraySize(m_ActiveRequests)) {
  820 |         // Resize array if needed
  821 |         int newSize = ArraySize(m_ActiveRequests) + 50;
  822 |         if (ArrayResize(m_ActiveRequests, newSize) < 0) {
  823 |             return false;
  824 |         }
  825 |     }
  826 |     
  827 |     m_ActiveRequests[m_RequestCount] = request;
  828 |     m_RequestCount++;
  829 |     
  830 |     return true;
  831 | }
  832 | 
  833 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  834 | //| Add execution result to history                                 |
  835 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  836 | bool CExecutionEngine::AddExecutionResult(const SExecutionResult& result) {
  837 |     if (m_ResultCount >= ArraySize(m_ExecutionResults)) {
  838 |         // Resize array if needed
  839 |         int newSize = ArraySize(m_ExecutionResults) + 100;
  840 |         if (ArrayResize(m_ExecutionResults, newSize) < 0) {
  841 |             return false;
  842 |         }
  843 |     }
  844 |     
  845 |     m_ExecutionResults[m_ResultCount] = result;
  846 |     m_ResultCount++;
  847 |     
  848 |     return true;
  849 | }
  850 | 
  851 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  852 | //| Update statistics                                               |
  853 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  854 | bool CExecutionEngine::UpdateStatistics(const SExecutionResult& result) {
  855 |     m_Statistics.TotalRequests++;
  856 |     m_Statistics.LastExecution = result.ExecutionTime;
  857 |     
  858 |     if (result.Status == EXECUTION_EXECUTED) {
  859 |         m_Statistics.SuccessfulExecutions++;
  860 |         m_Statistics.TotalVolume += result.ExecutedVolume;
  861 |         m_Statistics.AverageExecutionTime = 
  862 |             (m_Statistics.AverageExecutionTime * (m_Statistics.SuccessfulExecutions - 1) + result.ExecutionDelay) / 
  863 |             m_Statistics.SuccessfulExecutions;
  864 |         m_Statistics.AverageSlippage = 
  865 |             (m_Statistics.AverageSlippage * (m_Statistics.SuccessfulExecutions - 1) + result.ActualSlippage) / 
  866 |             m_Statistics.SuccessfulExecutions;
  867 |         m_Statistics.TotalSlippage += result.ActualSlippage;
  868 |     } else if (result.Status == EXECUTION_PARTIAL) {
  869 |         m_Statistics.PartialExecutions++;
  870 |         m_Statistics.TotalVolume += result.ExecutedVolume;
  871 |     } else if (result.Status == EXECUTION_REJECTED) {
  872 |         m_Statistics.RejectedRequests++;
  873 |     } else if (result.Status == EXECUTION_TIMEOUT) {
  874 |         m_Statistics.TimeoutExecutions++;
  875 |     } else {
  876 |         m_Statistics.FailedExecutions++;
  877 |     }
  878 |     
  879 |     // Calculate success rate
  880 |     if (m_Statistics.TotalRequests > 0) {
  881 |         m_Statistics.SuccessRate = 
  882 |             (double)m_Statistics.SuccessfulExecutions / m_Statistics.TotalRequests * 100.0;
  883 |     }
  884 |     
  885 |     return true;
  886 | }
  887 | 
  888 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  889 | //| Log error message                                               |
  890 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  891 | void CExecutionEngine::LogError(const string message) {
  892 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  893 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("ExecutionEngine: " + message);
  894 |     } else {
  895 |         Print("ExecutionEngine ERROR: ", message);
  896 |     }
  897 | }
  898 | 
  899 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  900 | //| Log activity message                                            |
  901 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  902 | void CExecutionEngine::LogActivity(const string message) {
  903 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  904 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("ExecutionEngine: " + message);
  905 |     } else {
  906 |         Print("ExecutionEngine: ", message);
  907 |     }
  908 | }

  913 | string CExecutionEngine::GetExecutionModeName(ENUM_EXECUTION_MODE mode) {
  914 |     switch (mode) {
  915 |         case EXECUTION_MARKET: return "Market";
  916 |         case EXECUTION_PENDING: return "Pending";
  917 |         case EXECUTION_INSTANT: return "Instant";
  918 |         case EXECUTION_REQUEST: return "Request";
  919 |         case EXECUTION_EXCHANGE: return "Exchange";
  920 |         case EXECUTION_SMART: return "Smart";
  921 |         case EXECUTION_ICEBERG: return "Iceberg";
  922 |         case EXECUTION_TWAP: return "TWAP";
  923 |         case EXECUTION_VWAP: return "VWAP";
  924 |         case EXECUTION_CUSTOM: return "Custom";
  925 |         default: return "Unknown";
  926 |     }
  927 | }
