  231 |     // Alert thresholds
  232 |     double SpreadAlertThreshold;    // Spread alert threshold
  233 |     double DepthAlertThreshold;     // Depth alert threshold
  234 |     double VolumeAlertThreshold;    // Volume alert threshold
  235 |     double SlippageAlertThreshold;  // Slippage alert threshold
  236 |     
  237 |     // Advanced features
  238 |     bool EnableVolumeProfile;       // Enable volume profile
  239 |     bool EnableOrderFlow;           // Enable order flow analysis
  240 |     bool EnablePriceImpactModel;    // Enable price impact modeling
  241 |     bool EnableLatencyOptimization; // Enable latency optimization
  242 |     
  243 |     // Data retention
  244 |     int HistoryRetentionDays;       // History retention (days)
  245 |     bool EnableDataCompression;     // Enable data compression
  246 |     bool EnableBackup;              // Enable data backup
  247 | };
  248 | 
  249 | struct SLiquidityStatistics {
  250 |     // General statistics
  251 |     int TotalUpdates;               // Total updates
  252 |     int ValidUpdates;               // Valid updates
  253 |     int FailedUpdates;              // Failed updates
  254 |     double UpdateSuccessRate;       // Update success rate
  255 |     
  256 |     // Provider statistics
  257 |     int ActiveProviders;            // Active providers
  258 |     int ConnectedProviders;         // Connected providers
  259 |     double AverageProviderQuality;  // Average provider quality
  260 |     double ProviderReliability;     // Provider reliability
  261 |     
  262 |     // Market statistics
  263 |     double AverageSpread;           // Average spread
  264 |     double AverageDepth;            // Average depth
  265 |     double AverageVolume;           // Average volume
  266 |     double AverageLiquidity;        // Average liquidity score
  267 |     
  268 |     // Execution statistics
  269 |     int TotalExecutions;            // Total executions
  270 |     int SuccessfulExecutions;       // Successful executions
  271 |     double ExecutionSuccessRate;    // Execution success rate
  272 |     double AverageExecutionTime;    // Average execution time
  273 |     
  274 |     // Alert statistics
  275 |     int TotalAlerts;                // Total alerts
  276 |     int CriticalAlerts;             // Critical alerts
  277 |     int ResolvedAlerts;             // Resolved alerts
  278 |     datetime LastAlert;             // Last alert time
  279 |     
  280 |     // Performance statistics
  281 |     double BestLiquidityScore;      // Best liquidity score
  282 |     double WorstLiquidityScore;     // Worst liquidity score
  283 |     double AverageLatency;          // Average latency
  284 |     double UptimePercent;           // Uptime percentage
  285 |     
  286 |     // Time-based statistics
  287 |     datetime FirstUpdate;           // First update
  288 |     datetime LastUpdate;            // Last update
  289 |     datetime LastReset;             // Last statistics reset
  290 | };

  526 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  527 | //| Initialize liquidity manager                                   |
  528 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  529 | bool CLiquidityManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  530 |     if (context == NULL) {
  531 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  532 |         return false;
  533 |     }
  534 |     
  535 |     m_pContext = context;
  536 |     
  537 |     // Initialize arrays
  538 |     ArrayResize(m_MarketDepth, 50);        // Support 50 symbols
  539 |     ArrayResize(m_Providers, 20);          // Support 20 providers
  540 |     ArrayResize(m_Metrics, 50);            // Metrics for 50 symbols
  541 |     
  542 |     m_SymbolCount = 0;
  543 |     m_ProviderCount = 0;
  544 |     
  545 |     // Initialize statistics
  546 |     m_Statistics.FirstUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  547 |     m_Statistics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  548 |     m_Statistics.LastReset = TimeCurrent();
  549 |     
  550 |     // Add default providers (placeholder)
  551 |     SLiquidityProvider defaultProvider;
  552 |     ZeroMemory(defaultProvider);
  553 |     defaultProvider.Name = "Default";
  554 |     defaultProvider.Type = PROVIDER_MARKET_MAKER;
  555 |     defaultProvider.IsActive = true;
  556 |     defaultProvider.IsConnected = true;
  557 |     defaultProvider.ContributionPercent = 100.0;
  558 |     defaultProvider.QualityScore = 0.8;
  559 |     defaultProvider.ReliabilityScore = 0.9;
  560 |     defaultProvider.LatencyMs = 50.0;
  561 |     defaultProvider.LastConnection = TimeCurrent();
  562 |     
  563 |     AddProvider(defaultProvider);
  564 |     
  565 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  566 |     
  567 |     LogActivity("Liquidity manager initialized successfully");
  568 |     return true;
  569 | }
  570 | 
  571 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  572 | //| Deinitialize liquidity manager                                 |
  573 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  574 | bool CLiquidityManager::Deinitialize() {
  575 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  576 |         StopMonitoring();
  577 |         
  578 |         // Clear arrays
  579 |         ArrayFree(m_MarketDepth);
  580 |         ArrayFree(m_Providers);
  581 |         ArrayFree(m_Metrics);
  582 |         
  583 |         m_SymbolCount = 0;
  584 |         m_ProviderCount = 0;
  585 |         
  586 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  587 |         m_bMonitoring = false;
  588 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  589 |         
  590 |         LogActivity("Liquidity manager deinitialized");
  591 |     }
  592 |     
  593 |     return true;
  594 | }
  595 | 
  596 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  597 | //| Configure liquidity manager                                    |
  598 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  599 | bool CLiquidityManager::Configure(const SLiquidityConfig& config) {
  600 |     m_Config = config;
  601 |     
  602 |     // Validate configuration
  603 |     if (m_Config.UpdateInterval < 100) {
  604 |         LogError("Update interval too small (minimum 100ms)");
  605 |         return false;
  606 |     }
  607 |     
  608 |     if (m_Config.MinLiquidityScore < 0 || m_Config.MinLiquidityScore > 1) {
  609 |         LogError("Invalid minimum liquidity score (must be 0-1)");
  610 |         return false;
  611 |     }
  612 |     
  613 |     if (m_Config.MaxProviders <= 0) {
  614 |         LogError("Invalid maximum providers");
  615 |         return false;
  616 |     }
  617 |     
  618 |     LogActivity("Liquidity manager configured successfully");
  619 |     return true;
  620 | }
  621 | 
  622 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  623 | //| Start monitoring                                               |
  624 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  625 | bool CLiquidityManager::StartMonitoring() {
  626 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  627 |         LogError("Liquidity manager not initialized");
  628 |         return false;
  629 |     }
  630 |     
  631 |     if (m_bMonitoring) {
  632 |         LogActivity("Monitoring already started");
  633 |         return true;
  634 |     }
  635 |     
  636 |     m_bMonitoring = true;
  637 |     m_LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  638 |     
  639 |     LogActivity("Liquidity monitoring started");
  640 |     return true;
  641 | }
  642 | 
  643 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  644 | //| Stop monitoring                                                |
  645 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  646 | bool CLiquidityManager::StopMonitoring() {
  647 |     if (!m_bMonitoring) {
  648 |         return true;
  649 |     }
  650 |     
  651 |     m_bMonitoring = false;
  652 |     
  653 |     LogActivity("Liquidity monitoring stopped");
  654 |     return true;
  655 | }
  656 | 
  657 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  658 | //| Update liquidity data                                          |
  659 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 | bool CLiquidityManager::UpdateLiquidity() {
  661 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bMonitoring) {
  662 |         return false;
  663 |     }
  664 |     
  665 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  666 |     int updatedSymbols = 0;
  667 |     
  668 |     // Update market depth for all monitored symbols
  669 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_SymbolCount; i++) {
  670 |         string symbol = "";
  671 |         // Get symbol name from market depth array (placeholder)
  672 |         
  673 |         if (UpdateMarketDepth(symbol)) {
  674 |             CalculateLiquidityMetrics(symbol);
  675 |             CheckLiquidityThresholds(symbol);
  676 |             updatedSymbols++;
  677 |         }
  678 |     }
  679 |     
  680 |     // Update provider status
  681 |     UpdateProviderStatus();
  682 |     
  683 |     // Update statistics
  684 |     UpdateStatistics();
  685 |     
  686 |     m_LastUpdate = currentTime;
  687 |     m_Statistics.TotalUpdates++;
  688 |     m_Statistics.ValidUpdates += updatedSymbols;
  689 |     
  690 |     if (updatedSymbols > 0) {
  691 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Updated liquidity for %d symbols", updatedSymbols));
  692 |     }
  693 |     
  694 |     return true;
  695 | }
  696 | 
  697 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  698 | //| Add liquidity provider                                         |
  699 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  700 | bool CLiquidityManager::AddProvider(const SLiquidityProvider& provider) {
  701 |     if (m_ProviderCount >= ArraySize(m_Providers)) {
  702 |         // Resize array if needed
  703 |         int newSize = ArraySize(m_Providers) + 10;
  704 |         if (ArrayResize(m_Providers, newSize) < 0) {
  705 |             LogError("Failed to resize providers array");
  706 |             return false;
  707 |         }
  708 |     }
  709 |     
  710 |     // Check if provider already exists
  711 |     if (FindProviderIndex(provider.Name) >= 0) {
  712 |         LogError("Provider already exists: " + provider.Name);
  713 |         return false;
  714 |     }
  715 |     
  716 |     // Validate provider
  717 |     if (!ValidateProvider(provider)) {
  718 |         LogError("Provider validation failed: " + provider.Name);
  719 |         return false;
  720 |     }
  721 |     
  722 |     m_Providers[m_ProviderCount] = provider;
  723 |     m_ProviderCount++;
  724 |     
  725 |     LogActivity("Added liquidity provider: " + provider.Name);
  726 |     return true;
  727 | }
  728 | 
  729 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  730 | //| Get liquidity score for symbol                                 |
  731 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  732 | double CLiquidityManager::GetLiquidityScore(const string symbol) {
  733 |     int index = FindSymbolIndex(symbol);
  734 |     if (index < 0) {
  735 |         return 0.0;
  736 |     }
  737 |     
  738 |     return CalculateLiquidityScore(m_MarketDepth[index]);
  739 | }
  740 | 
  741 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  742 | //| Calculate liquidity score                                      |
  743 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  744 | double CLiquidityManager::CalculateLiquidityScore(const SMarketDepth& depth) {
  745 |     if (depth.Status == LIQUIDITY_STATUS_UNAVAILABLE) {
  746 |         return 0.0;
  747 |     }
  748 |     
  749 |     double spreadScore = 0.0;
  750 |     double depthScore = 0.0;
  751 |     double volumeScore = 0.0;
  752 |     
  753 |     // Calculate spread score (lower spread = higher score)
  754 |     if (depth.Spread > 0) {
  755 |         spreadScore = 1.0 / (1.0 + depth.Spread / 10.0);  // Normalize to 0-1
  756 |     }
  757 |     
  758 |     // Calculate depth score
  759 |     double totalDepth = depth.TotalBidVolume + depth.TotalAskVolume;
  760 |     if (totalDepth > 0) {
  761 |         depthScore = MathMin(totalDepth / 100.0, 1.0);  // Normalize to 0-1
  762 |     }
  763 |     
  764 |     // Calculate volume score
  765 |     double avgVolume = (depth.TotalBidVolume + depth.TotalAskVolume) / 2.0;
  766 |     if (avgVolume > 0) {
  767 |         volumeScore = MathMin(avgVolume / 50.0, 1.0);  // Normalize to 0-1
  768 |     }
  769 |     
  770 |     // Weighted average
  771 |     double liquidityScore = (spreadScore * 0.4) + (depthScore * 0.3) + (volumeScore * 0.3);
  772 |     
  773 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, liquidityScore));
  774 | }
  775 | 
  776 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  777 | //| Find symbol index                                              |
  778 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  779 | int CLiquidityManager::FindSymbolIndex(const string symbol) {
  780 |     // Placeholder implementation
  781 |     // In real implementation, would search through m_MarketDepth array
  782 |     return -1;
  783 | }
  784 | 
  785 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  786 | //| Find provider index                                            |
  787 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  788 | int CLiquidityManager::FindProviderIndex(const string providerName) {
  789 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ProviderCount; i++) {
  790 |         if (m_Providers[i].Name == providerName) {
  791 |             return i;
  792 |         }
  793 |     }
  794 |     return -1;
  795 | }
  796 | 
  797 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  798 | //| Validate provider                                              |
  799 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  800 | bool CLiquidityManager::ValidateProvider(const SLiquidityProvider& provider) {
  801 |     if (provider.Name == "") {
  802 |         return false;
  803 |     }
  804 |     
  805 |     if (provider.QualityScore < 0 || provider.QualityScore > 1) {
  806 |         return false;
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     if (provider.ReliabilityScore < 0 || provider.ReliabilityScore > 1) {
  810 |         return false;
  811 |     }
  812 |     
  813 |     if (provider.ContributionPercent < 0 || provider.ContributionPercent > 100) {
  814 |         return false;
  815 |     }
  816 |     
  817 |     return true;
  818 | }
  819 | 
  820 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  821 | //| Update statistics                                              |
  822 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  823 | bool CLiquidityManager::UpdateStatistics() {
  824 |     m_Statistics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  825 |     
  826 |     // Count active and connected providers
  827 |     m_Statistics.ActiveProviders = 0;
  828 |     m_Statistics.ConnectedProviders = 0;
  829 |     double totalQuality = 0.0;
  830 |     
  831 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ProviderCount; i++) {
  832 |         if (m_Providers[i].IsActive) {
  833 |             m_Statistics.ActiveProviders++;
  834 |             totalQuality += m_Providers[i].QualityScore;
  835 |         }
  836 |         
  837 |         if (m_Providers[i].IsConnected) {
  838 |             m_Statistics.ConnectedProviders++;
  839 |         }
  840 |     }
  841 |     
  842 |     // Calculate average provider quality
  843 |     if (m_Statistics.ActiveProviders > 0) {
  844 |         m_Statistics.AverageProviderQuality = totalQuality / m_Statistics.ActiveProviders;
  845 |     }
  846 |     
  847 |     // Calculate update success rate
  848 |     if (m_Statistics.TotalUpdates > 0) {
  849 |         m_Statistics.UpdateSuccessRate = (double)m_Statistics.ValidUpdates / m_Statistics.TotalUpdates * 100.0;
  850 |     }
  851 |     
  852 |     return true;
  853 | }
  854 | 
  855 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  856 | //| Log error message                                              |
  857 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  858 | void CLiquidityManager::LogError(const string message) {
  859 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  860 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("LiquidityManager: " + message);
  861 |     } else {
  862 |         Print("LiquidityManager ERROR: ", message);
  863 |     }
  864 | }
  865 | 
  866 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  867 | //| Log activity message                                           |
  868 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  869 | void CLiquidityManager::LogActivity(const string message) {
  870 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  871 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("LiquidityManager: " + message);
  872 |     } else {
  873 |         Print("LiquidityManager: ", message);
  874 |     }
  875 | }

  877 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  878 | //| Get liquidity status name                                      |
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | string CLiquidityManager::GetLiquidityStatusName(ENUM_LIQUIDITY_STATUS status) {
  881 |     switch (status) {
  882 |         case LIQUIDITY_STATUS_UNKNOWN: return "Unknown";
  883 |         case LIQUIDITY_STATUS_EXCELLENT: return "Excellent";
  884 |         case LIQUIDITY_STATUS_GOOD: return "Good";
  885 |         case LIQUIDITY_STATUS_FAIR: return "Fair";
  886 |         case LIQUIDITY_STATUS_POOR: return "Poor";
  887 |         case LIQUIDITY_STATUS_CRITICAL: return "Critical";
  888 |         case LIQUIDITY_STATUS_UNAVAILABLE: return "Unavailable";
  889 |         default: return "Unknown";
  890 |     }
  891 | }

  900 |         case PROVIDER_ECN: return "ECN";

  905 |         case PROVIDER_INSTITUTIONAL: return "Institutional";
  906 |         case PROVIDER_AGGREGATED: return "Aggregated";
  907 |         default: return "Unknown";
  908 |     }

  449 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  450 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  451 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  452 | COrderManager::COrderManager() {
  453 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  454 |     m_OrderCount = 0;
  455 |     m_GroupCount = 0;
  456 |     m_bInitialized = false;

  459 |     
  460 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  461 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  462 |     
  463 |     // Set default configuration
  464 |     m_Config.DefaultSlippage = 3;          // 3 points default slippage
  465 |     m_Config.MaxSlippage = 10;             // 10 points max slippage
  466 |     m_Config.MaxRetries = 3;               // 3 retry attempts
  467 |     m_Config.RetryDelay = 1000;            // 1 second retry delay
  468 |     
  469 |     m_Config.MaxPendingOrders = 20;        // 20 max pending orders
  470 |     m_Config.MaxOrdersPerSymbol = 5;       // 5 max orders per symbol
  471 |     m_Config.MaxOrderSize = 10.0;          // 10 lots max order size
  472 |     m_Config.MinOrderSize = 0.01;          // 0.01 lots min order size
  473 |     
  474 |     m_Config.MaxRiskPerOrder = 1000.0;     // $1000 max risk per order
  475 |     m_Config.MaxTotalRisk = 5000.0;        // $5000 max total risk
  476 |     m_Config.RequireStopLoss = true;       // Require stop loss
  477 |     m_Config.RequireTakeProfit = false;    // Don't require take profit
  478 |     
  479 |     m_Config.DefaultExpiration = 1440;     // 24 hours default expiration
  480 |     m_Config.MaxOrderLifetime = 10080;     // 7 days max lifetime
  481 |     m_Config.AutoCancelExpired = true;     // Auto-cancel expired orders
  482 |     
  483 |     m_Config.DefaultFillPolicy = FILL_POLICY_RETURN; // Return remainder
  484 |     m_Config.AllowPartialFills = true;     // Allow partial fills
  485 |     m_Config.MinFillPercent = 50.0;        // 50% minimum fill
  486 |     
  487 |     m_Config.MaxSpreadForEntry = 5.0;      // 5 points max spread
  488 |     m_Config.MinLiquidityScore = 0.7;      // 70% minimum liquidity
  489 |     m_Config.CheckMarketHours = true;      // Check market hours
  490 |     
  491 |     m_Config.EnableIcebergOrders = false;
  492 |     m_Config.EnableConditionalOrders = false;
  493 |     m_Config.EnableSmartRouting = false;
  494 |     m_Config.EnableOrderGrouping = false;
  495 |     
  496 |     m_Config.EnableRealTimeTracking = true;
  497 |     m_Config.EnableAlerts = true;
  498 |     m_Config.EnableReporting = true;
  499 |     m_Config.UpdateInterval = 1;           // 1 second update
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  503 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 | COrderManager::~COrderManager() {
  506 |     Deinitialize();
  507 | }
  508 | 
  509 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  510 | //| Initialize order manager                                        |
  511 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  512 | bool COrderManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  513 |     if (context == NULL) {
  514 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  515 |         return false;
  516 |     }
  517 |     
  518 |     m_pContext = context;
  519 |     
  520 |     // Initialize arrays
  521 |     ArrayResize(m_Orders, 100);            // Initial capacity
  522 |     ArrayResize(m_OrderGroups, 20);        // Group capacity
  523 |     
  524 |     m_OrderCount = 0;
  525 |     m_GroupCount = 0;
  526 |     
  527 |     // Initialize statistics
  528 |     m_Statistics.FirstOrder = TimeCurrent();
  529 |     m_Statistics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  530 |     
  531 |     // Load existing orders
  532 |     for (int i = 0; i < OrdersTotal(); i++) {
  533 |         ulong ticket = OrderGetTicket(i);
  534 |         if (ticket > 0) {
  535 |             SOrderInfo orderInfo;
  536 |             ZeroMemory(orderInfo);
  537 |             
  538 |             orderInfo.Ticket = ticket;
  539 |             orderInfo.Symbol = OrderGetString(ORDER_SYMBOL);
  540 |             orderInfo.Type = (ENUM_ORDER_TYPE)OrderGetInteger(ORDER_TYPE);
  541 |             orderInfo.Status = ORDER_STATUS_PENDING;
  542 |             orderInfo.Reason = ORDER_REASON_MANUAL;  // Assume manual for existing
  543 |             orderInfo.Priority = ORDER_PRIORITY_NORMAL;
  544 |             
  545 |             orderInfo.Volume = OrderGetDouble(ORDER_VOLUME_INITIAL);
  546 |             orderInfo.Price = OrderGetDouble(ORDER_PRICE_OPEN);
  547 |             orderInfo.StopLoss = OrderGetDouble(ORDER_SL);
  548 |             orderInfo.TakeProfit = OrderGetDouble(ORDER_TP);
  549 |             orderInfo.StopLimit = OrderGetDouble(ORDER_PRICE_STOPLIMIT);
  550 |             
  551 |             orderInfo.TimeSetup = (datetime)OrderGetInteger(ORDER_TIME_SETUP);
  552 |             orderInfo.TimeExpiration = (datetime)OrderGetInteger(ORDER_TIME_EXPIRATION);
  553 |             orderInfo.TimeFilled = 0;
  554 |             orderInfo.LastModified = orderInfo.TimeSetup;
  555 |             
  556 |             orderInfo.FilledVolume = OrderGetDouble(ORDER_VOLUME_CURRENT);
  557 |             orderInfo.RemainingVolume = orderInfo.Volume - orderInfo.FilledVolume;
  558 |             orderInfo.AveragePrice = 0.0;
  559 |             orderInfo.Commission = 0.0;
  560 |             orderInfo.Slippage = 0.0;
  561 |             
  562 |             orderInfo.Magic = (int)OrderGetInteger(ORDER_MAGIC);
  563 |             orderInfo.Comment = OrderGetString(ORDER_COMMENT);
  564 |             orderInfo.Strategy = "Unknown";
  565 |             
  566 |             orderInfo.FillPolicy = FILL_POLICY_RETURN;
  567 |             orderInfo.MaxRetries = m_Config.MaxRetries;
  568 |             orderInfo.RetryCount = 0;
  569 |             orderInfo.ExecutionDelay = 0;
  570 |             
  571 |             orderInfo.Spread = SymbolInfoInteger(orderInfo.Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
  572 |             orderInfo.Volatility = 0.0;
  573 |             orderInfo.LiquidityScore = 1.0;
  574 |             
  575 |             orderInfo.IsPartialFill = (orderInfo.FilledVolume > 0 && orderInfo.RemainingVolume > 0);
  576 |             orderInfo.IsModified = false;
  577 |             orderInfo.IsConditional = false;
  578 |             orderInfo.IsHidden = false;
  579 |             orderInfo.IsIceberg = false;
  580 |             orderInfo.IcebergVolume = 0.0;
  581 |             
  582 |             AddOrder(orderInfo);
  583 |         }
  584 |     }
  585 |     
  586 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  587 |     m_bEnabled = true;
  588 |     
  589 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Order manager initialized with %d existing orders", m_OrderCount));
  590 |     return true;
  591 | }
  592 | 
  593 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  594 | //| Deinitialize order manager                                      |
  595 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  596 | bool COrderManager::Deinitialize() {
  597 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  598 |         // Clear arrays
  599 |         ArrayFree(m_Orders);
  600 |         ArrayFree(m_OrderGroups);
  601 |         
  602 |         m_OrderCount = 0;
  603 |         m_GroupCount = 0;
  604 |         
  605 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  606 |         m_bEnabled = false;
  607 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  608 |         
  609 |         LogActivity("Order manager deinitialized");
  610 |     }
  611 |     
  612 |     return true;
  613 | }
  614 | 
  615 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  616 | //| Configure order manager                                         |
  617 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  618 | bool COrderManager::Configure(const SOrderConfig& config) {
  619 |     m_Config = config;
  620 |     
  621 |     // Validate configuration
  622 |     if (m_Config.MaxSlippage < m_Config.DefaultSlippage) {
  623 |         LogError("Maximum slippage cannot be less than default slippage");
  624 |         return false;
  625 |     }
  626 |     
  627 |     if (m_Config.MaxPendingOrders <= 0) {
  628 |         LogError("Invalid maximum pending orders");
  629 |         return false;
  630 |     }
  631 |     
  632 |     if (m_Config.MaxOrderSize <= m_Config.MinOrderSize) {
  633 |         LogError("Maximum order size must be greater than minimum order size");
  634 |         return false;
  635 |     }
  636 |     
  637 |     if (m_Config.MaxRiskPerOrder <= 0) {
  638 |         LogError("Invalid maximum risk per order");
  639 |         return false;
  640 |     }
  641 |     
  642 |     LogActivity("Order manager configured successfully");
  643 |     return true;
  644 | }
  645 | 
  646 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  647 | //| Place market order                                              |
  648 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  649 | ulong COrderManager::PlaceMarketOrder(const string symbol, ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType, double volume,
  650 |                                       double stopLoss, double takeProfit, ENUM_ORDER_REASON reason,
  651 |                                       const string comment) {
  652 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bEnabled) {
  653 |         LogError("Order manager not initialized or disabled");
  654 |         return 0;
  655 |     }
  656 |     
  657 |     // Validate order type
  658 |     if (orderType != ORDER_TYPE_BUY && orderType != ORDER_TYPE_SELL) {
  659 |         LogError("Invalid market order type");
  660 |         return 0;
  661 |     }
  662 |     
  663 |     // Check order limits
  664 |     if (!CheckOrderLimits(symbol, volume)) {
  665 |         LogError("Order limits exceeded");
  666 |         return 0;
  667 |     }
  668 |     
  669 |     // Check market conditions
  670 |     if (!CheckMarketConditions(symbol)) {
  671 |         LogError("Market conditions not suitable for order");
  672 |         return 0;
  673 |     }
  674 |     
  675 |     // Create order info
  676 |     SOrderInfo orderInfo;
  677 |     ZeroMemory(orderInfo);
  678 |     
  679 |     orderInfo.Symbol = symbol;
  680 |     orderInfo.Type = orderType;
  681 |     orderInfo.Status = ORDER_STATUS_PENDING;
  682 |     orderInfo.Reason = reason;
  683 |     orderInfo.Priority = ORDER_PRIORITY_NORMAL;
  684 |     
  685 |     orderInfo.Volume = volume;
  686 |     orderInfo.Price = (orderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  687 |                      SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : 
  688 |                      SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  689 |     orderInfo.StopLoss = stopLoss;
  690 |     orderInfo.TakeProfit = takeProfit;
  691 |     
  692 |     orderInfo.TimeSetup = TimeCurrent();
  693 |     orderInfo.TimeExpiration = 0;  // Market orders don't expire
  694 |     orderInfo.LastModified = orderInfo.TimeSetup;
  695 |     
  696 |     orderInfo.FilledVolume = 0.0;
  697 |     orderInfo.RemainingVolume = volume;
  698 |     orderInfo.AveragePrice = 0.0;
  699 |     orderInfo.Commission = 0.0;
  700 |     orderInfo.Slippage = 0.0;
  701 |     
  702 |     if (m_pContext != NULL) {
  703 |         orderInfo.Magic = m_pContext.Magic;
  704 |     }
  705 |     orderInfo.Comment = comment;
  706 |     orderInfo.Strategy = "";
  707 |     
  708 |     // Calculate risk
  709 |     if (stopLoss > 0) {
  710 |         double point = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  711 |         double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  712 |         
  713 |         if (orderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  714 |             orderInfo.RiskAmount = (orderInfo.Price - stopLoss) / point * tickValue * volume;
  715 |         } else {
  716 |             orderInfo.RiskAmount = (stopLoss - orderInfo.Price) / point * tickValue * volume;
  717 |         }
  718 |         
  719 |         double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  720 |         if (accountBalance > 0) {
  721 |             orderInfo.RiskPercent = (orderInfo.RiskAmount / accountBalance) * 100.0;
  722 |         }
  723 |     }
  724 |     
  725 |     orderInfo.MaxSlippage = m_Config.MaxSlippage;
  726 |     orderInfo.FillPolicy = m_Config.DefaultFillPolicy;
  727 |     orderInfo.MaxRetries = m_Config.MaxRetries;
  728 |     orderInfo.RetryCount = 0;
  729 |     orderInfo.ExecutionDelay = 0;
  730 |     
  731 |     orderInfo.Spread = SymbolInfoInteger(symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
  732 |     orderInfo.Volatility = 0.0;  // Will be calculated
  733 |     orderInfo.LiquidityScore = 1.0;  // Will be calculated
  734 |     
  735 |     // Validate order
  736 |     if (!ValidateOrderRequest(orderInfo)) {
  737 |         LogError("Order validation failed");
  738 |         return 0;
  739 |     }
  740 |     
  741 |     // Execute the order
  742 |     if (ExecuteMarketOrder(orderInfo)) {
  743 |         // Add to tracking
  744 |         if (AddOrder(orderInfo)) {
  745 |             m_Statistics.TotalOrders++;
  746 |             m_Statistics.MarketOrders++;
  747 |             
  748 |             // Send alert
  749 |             if (m_Config.EnableAlerts) {
  750 |                 SOrderAlert alert;
  751 |                 alert.Ticket = orderInfo.Ticket;
  752 |                 alert.Symbol = orderInfo.Symbol;
  753 |                 alert.Status = orderInfo.Status;
  754 |                 alert.Message = "Market order placed";
  755 |                 alert.Timestamp = orderInfo.TimeSetup;
  756 |                 alert.Price = orderInfo.Price;
  757 |                 alert.Volume = orderInfo.Volume;
  758 |                 alert.IsUrgent = false;
  759 |                 alert.Details = StringFormat("Type: %s, Volume: %.2f, SL: %.5f, TP: %.5f", 
  760 |                                            EnumToString(orderType), volume, stopLoss, takeProfit);
  761 |                 SendOrderAlert(alert);
  762 |             }
  763 |             
  764 |             LogActivity(StringFormat("Market order placed: #%I64u %s %.2f lots at %.5f", 
  765 |                                    orderInfo.Ticket, symbol, volume, orderInfo.Price));
  766 |             return orderInfo.Ticket;
  767 |         }
  768 |     }
  769 |     
  770 |     LogError("Failed to place market order");
  771 |     return 0;
  772 | }
  773 | 
  774 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  775 | //| Execute market order                                            |
  776 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  777 | bool COrderManager::ExecuteMarketOrder(SOrderInfo& orderInfo) {
  778 |     MqlTradeRequest request;
  779 |     MqlTradeResult result;
  780 |     
  781 |     ZeroMemory(request);
  782 |     ZeroMemory(result);
  783 |     
  784 |     request.action = TRADE_ACTION_DEAL;
  785 |     request.symbol = orderInfo.Symbol;
  786 |     request.volume = orderInfo.Volume;
  787 |     request.type = orderInfo.Type;
  788 |     request.price = orderInfo.Price;
  789 |     request.sl = orderInfo.StopLoss;
  790 |     request.tp = orderInfo.TakeProfit;
  791 |     request.deviation = orderInfo.MaxSlippage;
  792 |     request.magic = orderInfo.Magic;
  793 |     request.comment = orderInfo.Comment;
  794 |     
  795 |     bool success = OrderSend(request, result);
  796 |     
  797 |     if (success && result.retcode == TRADE_RETCODE_DONE) {
  798 |         orderInfo.Ticket = result.order;
  799 |         orderInfo.Status = ORDER_STATUS_FILLED;
  800 |         orderInfo.TimeFilled = TimeCurrent();
  801 |         orderInfo.FilledVolume = result.volume;
  802 |         orderInfo.RemainingVolume = orderInfo.Volume - result.volume;
  803 |         orderInfo.AveragePrice = result.price;
  804 |         orderInfo.Slippage = MathAbs(result.price - request.price) / SymbolInfoDouble(orderInfo.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  805 |         orderInfo.SetupToFillTime = (int)((orderInfo.TimeFilled - orderInfo.TimeSetup) * 1000);
  806 |         orderInfo.PriceDeviation = MathAbs(result.price - orderInfo.Price);
  807 |         orderInfo.IsPartialFill = (orderInfo.RemainingVolume > 0);
  808 |         
  809 |         return true;
  810 |     } else {
  811 |         // Handle retry logic
  812 |         if (orderInfo.RetryCount < orderInfo.MaxRetries) {
  813 |             orderInfo.RetryCount++;
  814 |             Sleep(m_Config.RetryDelay);
  815 |             return RetryOrderExecution(orderInfo);
  816 |         } else {
  817 |             orderInfo.Status = ORDER_STATUS_REJECTED;
  818 |             HandleOrderRejection(orderInfo, result.retcode);
  819 |             return false;
  820 |         }
  821 |     }
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  825 | //| Validate order request                                          |
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | bool COrderManager::ValidateOrderRequest(const SOrderInfo& orderInfo) {
  828 |     // Check volume limits
  829 |     if (orderInfo.Volume < m_Config.MinOrderSize || orderInfo.Volume > m_Config.MaxOrderSize) {
  830 |         LogError(StringFormat("Invalid order volume: %.2f (Min: %.2f, Max: %.2f)", 
  831 |                             orderInfo.Volume, m_Config.MinOrderSize, m_Config.MaxOrderSize));
  832 |         return false;
  833 |     }
  834 |     
  835 |     // Check risk limits
  836 |     if (!CheckRiskLimits(orderInfo.RiskAmount)) {
  837 |         LogError("Risk limits exceeded");
  838 |         return false;
  839 |     }
  840 |     
  841 |     // Check stop loss requirement
  842 |     if (m_Config.RequireStopLoss && orderInfo.StopLoss <= 0) {
  843 |         LogError("Stop loss is required but not provided");
  844 |         return false;
  845 |     }
  846 |     
  847 |     // Check take profit requirement
  848 |     if (m_Config.RequireTakeProfit && orderInfo.TakeProfit <= 0) {
  849 |         LogError("Take profit is required but not provided");
  850 |         return false;
  851 |     }
  852 |     
  853 |     // Check symbol validity
  854 |     if (!SymbolSelect(orderInfo.Symbol, true)) {
  855 |         LogError("Invalid or unavailable symbol: " + orderInfo.Symbol);
  856 |         return false;
  857 |     }
  858 |     
  859 |     return true;
  860 | }
  861 | 
  862 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  863 | //| Check order limits                                              |
  864 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  865 | bool COrderManager::CheckOrderLimits(const string symbol, double volume) {
  866 |     // Check maximum pending orders
  867 |     int pendingCount = GetPendingOrderCount();
  868 |     if (pendingCount >= m_Config.MaxPendingOrders) {
  869 |         return false;
  870 |     }
  871 |     
  872 |     // Check orders per symbol
  873 |     ulong symbolTickets[];
  874 |     if (GetOrdersBySymbol(symbol, symbolTickets)) {
  875 |         if (ArraySize(symbolTickets) >= m_Config.MaxOrdersPerSymbol) {
  876 |             return false;
  877 |         }
  878 |     }
  879 |     
  880 |     return true;
  881 | }
  882 | 
  883 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  884 | //| Check risk limits                                               |
  885 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  886 | bool COrderManager::CheckRiskLimits(double riskAmount) {
  887 |     if (riskAmount > m_Config.MaxRiskPerOrder) {
  888 |         return false;
  889 |     }
  890 |     
  891 |     double totalRisk = CalculateTotalRisk();
  892 |     if (totalRisk + riskAmount > m_Config.MaxTotalRisk) {
  893 |         return false;
  894 |     }
  895 |     
  896 |     return true;
  897 | }
  898 | 
  899 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  900 | //| Check market conditions                                         |
  901 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  902 | bool COrderManager::CheckMarketConditions(const string symbol) {
  903 |     // Check spread
  904 |     double spread = SymbolInfoInteger(symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  905 |     if (spread > m_Config.MaxSpreadForEntry) {
  906 |         return false;
  907 |     }
  908 |     
  909 |     // Check market hours
  910 |     if (m_Config.CheckMarketHours) {
  911 |         if (!SymbolInfoInteger(symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE)) {
  912 |             return false;
  913 |         }
  914 |     }
  915 |     
  916 |     return true;
  917 | }
  918 | 
  919 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  920 | //| Find order index by ticket                                      |
  921 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  922 | int COrderManager::FindOrderIndex(ulong ticket) {
  923 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_OrderCount; i++) {
  924 |         if (m_Orders[i].Ticket == ticket) {
  925 |             return i;
  926 |         }
  927 |     }
  928 |     return -1;
  929 | }
  930 | 
  931 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  932 | //| Add order to tracking                                           |
  933 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  934 | bool COrderManager::AddOrder(const SOrderInfo& orderInfo) {
  935 |     if (m_OrderCount >= ArraySize(m_Orders)) {
  936 |         // Resize array if needed
  937 |         int newSize = ArraySize(m_Orders) + 50;
  938 |         if (ArrayResize(m_Orders, newSize) < 0) {
  939 |             return false;
  940 |         }
  941 |     }
  942 |     
  943 |     m_Orders[m_OrderCount] = orderInfo;
  944 |     m_OrderCount++;
  945 |     
  946 |     return true;
  947 | }
  948 | 
  949 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  950 | //| Get pending order count                                         |
  951 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  952 | int COrderManager::GetPendingOrderCount() {
  953 |     int count = 0;
  954 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_OrderCount; i++) {
  955 |         if (m_Orders[i].Status == ORDER_STATUS_PENDING) {
  956 |             count++;
  957 |         }
  958 |     }
  959 |     return count;
  960 | }
  961 | 
  962 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  963 | //| Update all orders                                               |
  964 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  965 | bool COrderManager::UpdateAllOrders() {
  966 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bEnabled) {
  967 |         return false;
  968 |     }
  969 |     
  970 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  971 |     int updatedCount = 0;
  972 |     
  973 |     for (int i = m_OrderCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  974 |         SOrderInfo& orderInfo = m_Orders[i];
  975 |         
  976 |         if (orderInfo.Status == ORDER_STATUS_FILLED || 
  977 |             orderInfo.Status == ORDER_STATUS_CANCELLED ||
  978 |             orderInfo.Status == ORDER_STATUS_REJECTED) {
  979 |             continue;
  980 |         }
  981 |         
  982 |         // Update order status
  983 |         if (UpdateOrderStatus(orderInfo)) {
  984 |             updatedCount++;
  985 |         }
  986 |         
  987 |         // Check expiration
  988 |         if (CheckOrderExpiration(orderInfo)) {
  989 |             CancelOrder(orderInfo.Ticket, CANCEL_EXPIRED);
  990 |             continue;
  991 |         }
  992 |         
  993 |         orderInfo.LastModified = currentTime;
  994 |     }
  995 |     
  996 |     m_LastUpdate = currentTime;
  997 |     
  998 |     // Update statistics
  999 |     UpdateStatistics();
 1000 |     
 1001 |     if (updatedCount > 0) {
 1002 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Updated %d orders", updatedCount));
 1003 |     }
 1004 |     
 1005 |     return true;
 1006 | }
 1007 | 
 1008 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1009 | //| Update statistics                                               |
 1010 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1011 | bool COrderManager::UpdateStatistics() {
 1012 |     m_Statistics.PendingOrders = GetPendingOrderCount();
 1013 |     m_Statistics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
 1014 |     
 1015 |     // Calculate fill rate
 1016 |     if (m_Statistics.TotalOrders > 0) {
 1017 |         m_Statistics.FillRate = (double)m_Statistics.FilledOrders / m_Statistics.TotalOrders * 100.0;
 1018 |         m_Statistics.CancellationRate = (double)m_Statistics.CancelledOrders / m_Statistics.TotalOrders * 100.0;
 1019 |         m_Statistics.RejectionRate = (double)m_Statistics.RejectedOrders / m_Statistics.TotalOrders * 100.0;
 1020 |     }
 1021 |     
 1022 |     // Calculate average order size
 1023 |     if (m_Statistics.TotalOrders > 0) {
 1024 |         m_Statistics.AverageOrderSize = m_Statistics.TotalVolume / m_Statistics.TotalOrders;
 1025 |     }
 1026 |     
 1027 |     return true;
 1028 | }
 1029 | 
 1030 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1031 | //| Log error message                                               |
 1032 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1033 | void COrderManager::LogError(const string message) {
 1034 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1035 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("OrderManager: " + message);
 1036 |     } else {
 1037 |         Print("OrderManager ERROR: ", message);
 1038 |     }
 1039 | }
 1040 | 
 1041 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1042 | //| Log activity message                                            |
 1043 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1044 | void COrderManager::LogActivity(const string message) {
 1045 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1046 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("OrderManager: " + message);
 1047 |     } else {
 1048 |         Print("OrderManager: ", message);
 1049 |     }
 1050 | }
 1051 | 
 1052 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1053 | //| Get order status name                                           |
 1054 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1055 | string COrderManager::GetOrderStatusName(ENUM_ORDER_STATUS status) {
 1056 |     switch (status) {
 1057 |         case ORDER_STATUS_UNKNOWN: return "Unknown";
 1058 |         case ORDER_STATUS_PENDING: return "Pending";
 1059 |         case ORDER_STATUS_FILLED: return "Filled";
 1060 |         case ORDER_STATUS_CANCELLED: return "Cancelled";
 1061 |         case ORDER_STATUS_REJECTED: return "Rejected";
 1062 |         case ORDER_STATUS_EXPIRED: return "Expired";
 1063 |         case ORDER_STATUS_PARTIAL: return "Partial";
 1064 |         case ORDER_STATUS_MODIFYING: return "Modifying";
 1065 |         case ORDER_STATUS_ERROR: return "Error";
 1066 |         default: return "Unknown";
 1067 |     }

  106 |         Stage = POSITION_STAGE_OPENING;
  107 |         ExitReason = EXIT_REASON_NONE;
  108 |         Confidence = 0.0;
  109 |         EntrySlippage = ExitSlippage = EntryLatency = ExitLatency = 0.0;
  110 |         EntrySpread = ExitSpread = MarketVolatility = 0.0;
  111 |         EntrySession = ExitSession = SESSION_UNKNOWN;
  112 |         PipsPnL = RMultiple = HoldingPeriod = DrawdownPercent = 0.0;
  113 |     }
  114 | };

  303 |

  305 |     ArrayResize(m_Positions, 100);  // Initial capacity
  306 |     m_iPositionCount = 0;
  307 |     m_iMaxPositions = 100;
  308 |     
  309 |     // Initialize tracking arrays
  310 |     ArrayInitialize(m_DailyReturns, 0.0);
  311 |     m_iReturnsIndex = 0;
  312 |     m_iReturnsCount = 0;

  318 |

  321 |     m_StartTime = 0;
  322 |     m_dPeakEquity = 0.0;
  323 |     m_dMaxDrawdown = 0.0;
  324 |

  335 | 
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | //| Initialize Position Manager                                      |
  338 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | bool CPositionManager::Initialize(EAContext* pContext) {
  340 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  341 |         return true;
  342 |     }
  343 |     
  344 |     if (pContext == NULL) {
  345 |         Print("[PositionManager] ERROR: Context is NULL");
  346 |         return false;
  347 |     }
  348 |     
  349 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  350 |     
  351 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger == NULL) {
  352 |         Print("[PositionManager] ERROR: Logger is NULL");
  353 |         return false;
  354 |     }
  355 |     
  356 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Initializing Enhanced PositionManager v5...", __FUNCTION__);
  357 |     
  358 |     // Set basic parameters
  359 |     m_sSymbol = _Symbol;
  360 |     m_lMagicNumber = m_pContext->Inputs.MagicNumber;
  361 |     
  362 |     // Set risk management parameters
  363 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxTotalRisk > 0) {
  364 |         m_dMaxTotalRisk = m_pContext->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxTotalRisk;
  365 |     }
  366 |     
  367 |     if (m_pContext->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxPositions > 0) {
  368 |         m_iMaxPositions = m_pContext->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxPositions;
  369 |         ResizePositionArray();
  370 |     }
  371 |     
  372 |     // Initialize performance tracking
  373 |     m_dStartingEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  374 |     m_dPeakEquity = m_dStartingEquity;
  375 |     m_StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  376 |     
  377 |     // Scan existing positions
  378 |     UpdateAllPositions();
  379 |     
  380 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  381 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Enhanced PositionManager initialized for %s with Magic Number %d", 
  382 |                                            m_sSymbol, m_lMagicNumber), __FUNCTION__);
  383 |     
  384 |     return true;
  385 | }
  386 | 
  387 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  388 | //| Deinitialize Position Manager                                    |
  389 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  390 | void CPositionManager::Deinitialize() {
  391 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  392 |         return;
  393 |     }
  394 |     
  395 |     if (m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) {
  396 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Deinitializing Enhanced PositionManager...", __FUNCTION__);
  397 |         
  398 |         // Generate final report
  399 |         string final_report = GeneratePortfolioReport();
  400 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Final Portfolio Report:\n" + final_report, __FUNCTION__);
  401 |     }
  402 |     
  403 |     // Clear position array
  404 |     ArrayFree(m_Positions);
  405 |     m_iPositionCount = 0;
  406 |     
  407 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  408 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  409 | }
  410 | 
  411 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  412 | //| Add Position to Tracking                                        |
  413 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  414 | bool CPositionManager::AddPosition(long ticket, const string strategy_id, const string pattern_id, double confidence = 0.0) {
  415 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return false;
  416 |     
  417 |     // Check if position already tracked
  418 |     if (IsPositionTracked(ticket)) {
  419 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Position #%d already tracked", ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  420 |         return false;
  421 |     }
  422 |     
  423 |     // Check if we have capacity
  424 |     if (m_iPositionCount >= m_iMaxPositions) {
  425 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Maximum positions (%d) reached", m_iMaxPositions), __FUNCTION__);
  426 |         return false;
  427 |     }
  428 |     
  429 |     // Create position info
  430 |     SPositionInfo position;
  431 |     position.Reset();
  432 |     position.Ticket = ticket;
  433 |     position.StrategyId = strategy_id;
  434 |     position.PatternId = pattern_id;
  435 |     position.Confidence = confidence;
  436 |     position.Stage = POSITION_STAGE_OPENING;
  437 |     
  438 |     // Update position data from terminal
  439 |     if (!UpdatePositionInfo(position)) {
  440 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to get position data for #%d", ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  441 |         return false;
  442 |     }
  443 |     
  444 |     // Add to array
  445 |     if (!AddPositionToArray(position)) {
  446 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to add position #%d to array", ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  447 |         return false;
  448 |     }
  449 |     
  450 |     // Update portfolio metrics
  451 |     CalculatePortfolioMetrics();
  452 |     
  453 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Position #%d added to tracking (Strategy: %s, Pattern: %s, Confidence: %.1f%%)", 
  454 |                                            ticket, strategy_id, pattern_id, confidence * 100.0), __FUNCTION__);
  455 |     
  456 |     return true;
  457 | }
  458 | 
  459 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  460 | //| Update Position Data                                             |
  461 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  462 | bool CPositionManager::UpdatePosition(long ticket) {
  463 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return false;
  464 |     
  465 |     int index = FindPositionIndex(ticket);
  466 |     if (index < 0) {
  467 |         return false; // Position not found
  468 |     }
  469 |     
  470 |     SPositionInfo &position = m_Positions[index];
  471 |     
  472 |     // Update position data
  473 |     bool success = UpdatePositionInfo(position);
  474 |     if (success) {
  475 |         CalculatePositionMetrics(position);
  476 |         UpdatePositionStage(position);
  477 |     }
  478 |     
  479 |     return success;
  480 | }
  481 | 
  482 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  483 | //| Update All Positions                                            |
  484 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  485 | void CPositionManager::UpdateAllPositions() {
  486 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  487 |     
  488 |     // Mark all positions as not found
  489 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_iPositionCount; i++) {
  490 |         m_Positions[i].Stage = POSITION_STAGE_CLOSED;
  491 |     }
  492 |     
  493 |     // Scan terminal positions
  494 |     int total = PositionsTotal();
  495 |     for (int i = 0; i < total; i++) {
  496 |         if (PositionGetTicket(i) > 0) {
  497 |             long ticket = PositionGetTicket(i);
  498 |             if (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_lMagicNumber && 
  499 |                 PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL) == m_sSymbol) {
  500 |                 
  501 |                 int index = FindPositionIndex(ticket);
  502 |                 if (index >= 0) {
  503 |                     // Update existing position
  504 |                     UpdatePositionInfo(m_Positions[index]);
  505 |                     CalculatePositionMetrics(m_Positions[index]);
  506 |                     UpdatePositionStage(m_Positions[index]);
  507 |                 }
  508 |                 // Note: We don't auto-add unknown positions - they must be explicitly added
  509 |             }
  510 |         }
  511 |     }
  512 |     
  513 |     // Remove closed positions
  514 |     for (int i = m_iPositionCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  515 |         if (m_Positions[i].Stage == POSITION_STAGE_CLOSED) {
  516 |             OnPositionClosed(m_Positions[i].Ticket, EXIT_REASON_MANUAL);
  517 |             RemovePositionFromArray(i);
  518 |         }
  519 |     }
  520 |     
  521 |     // Update portfolio metrics
  522 |     CalculatePortfolioMetrics();
  523 |     UpdatePerformanceMetrics();
  524 | }
  525 | 
  526 | // Continue with remaining methods...
  527 | // ... existing code ...
  528 | 
  529 | } // namespace ApexPullback::v5
  530 | 
  531 | #endif // APEX_POSITIONMANAGER_MQH_

   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| Trailing stop enumerations                                      |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | enum ENUM_TRAILING_TYPE {
   17 |     TRAILING_FIXED,              // Fixed distance trailing
   18 |     TRAILING_PERCENTAGE,         // Percentage-based trailing
   19 |     TRAILING_ATR,               // ATR-based trailing
   20 |     TRAILING_PARABOLIC_SAR,     // Parabolic SAR trailing
   21 |     TRAILING_MOVING_AVERAGE,    // Moving average trailing
   22 |     TRAILING_SUPPORT_RESISTANCE, // Support/resistance trailing
   23 |     TRAILING_VOLATILITY,        // Volatility-based trailing
   24 |     TRAILING_BREAKEVEN,         // Break-even trailing
   25 |     TRAILING_STEP,              // Step trailing
   26 |     TRAILING_ADAPTIVE,          // Adaptive trailing
   27 |     TRAILING_CUSTOM             // Custom trailing logic
   28 | };
   29 | 
   30 | enum ENUM_TRAILING_STATUS {
   31 |     TRAILING_INACTIVE,
   32 |     TRAILING_ACTIVE,
   33 |     TRAILING_PAUSED,
   34 |     TRAILING_TRIGGERED,
   35 |     TRAILING_COMPLETED,
   36 |     TRAILING_ERROR
   37 | };
   38 | 
   39 | enum ENUM_TRAILING_MODE {
   40 |     TRAILING_MODE_CONSERVATIVE,  // Conservative trailing
   41 |     TRAILING_MODE_MODERATE,      // Moderate trailing
   42 |     TRAILING_MODE_AGGRESSIVE,    // Aggressive trailing
   43 |     TRAILING_MODE_CUSTOM         // Custom mode
   44 | };
   45 | 
   46 | enum ENUM_BREAKEVEN_TYPE {
   47 |     BREAKEVEN_IMMEDIATE,         // Move to breakeven immediately
   48 |     BREAKEVEN_AFTER_DISTANCE,   // Move after certain distance
   49 |     BREAKEVEN_AFTER_PROFIT,     // Move after certain profit
   50 |     BREAKEVEN_NEVER             // Never move to breakeven
   51 | };
   52 | 
   53 | enum ENUM_TRAILING_TRIGGER {
   54 |     TRIGGER_IMMEDIATE,           // Start trailing immediately
   55 |     TRIGGER_AFTER_PROFIT,       // Start after profit threshold
   56 |     TRIGGER_AFTER_DISTANCE,     // Start after distance threshold
   57 |     TRIGGER_MANUAL              // Manual trigger
   58 | };
   59 | 
   60 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   61 | //| Trailing stop structures                                        |
   62 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   63 | struct STrailingConfig {
   64 |     ENUM_TRAILING_TYPE Type;
   65 |     ENUM_TRAILING_MODE Mode;
   66 |     ENUM_TRAILING_TRIGGER Trigger;
   67 |     ENUM_BREAKEVEN_TYPE BreakevenType;
   68 |     
   69 |     // Distance settings
   70 |     double TrailingDistance;     // Trailing distance (points/percentage)
   71 |     double MinTrailingDistance;  // Minimum trailing distance
   72 |     double MaxTrailingDistance;  // Maximum trailing distance
   73 |     double TrailingStep;         // Step size for trailing
   74 |     
   75 |     // Trigger settings
   76 |     double TriggerProfit;        // Profit threshold to start trailing
   77 |     double TriggerDistance;      // Distance threshold to start trailing
   78 |     double BreakevenDistance;    // Distance to move to breakeven
   79 |     double BreakevenProfit;      // Profit to move to breakeven
   80 |     
   81 |     // ATR settings
   82 |     int ATRPeriod;              // ATR period
   83 |     double ATRMultiplier;       // ATR multiplier
   84 |     
   85 |     // Moving average settings
   86 |     int MAPeriod;               // MA period
   87 |     ENUM_MA_METHOD MAMethod;    // MA method
   88 |     ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE MAPrice; // MA applied price
   89 |     
   90 |     // Parabolic SAR settings
   91 |     double SARStep;             // SAR step
   92 |     double SARMaximum;          // SAR maximum
   93 |     
   94 |     // Advanced settings
   95 |     bool EnablePartialClose;     // Enable partial position closing
   96 |     double PartialClosePercent;  // Percentage to close partially
   97 |     bool EnableTimeExit;         // Enable time-based exit
   98 |     int MaxHoldingTime;         // Maximum holding time (minutes)
   99 |     bool EnableVolatilityFilter; // Enable volatility filter
  100 |     double VolatilityThreshold; // Volatility threshold
  101 |     
  102 |     // Risk management
  103 |     double MaxLoss;             // Maximum allowed loss
  104 |     double MaxProfit;           // Maximum profit target
  105 |     bool EnableEmergencyStop;   // Enable emergency stop
  106 |     double EmergencyStopLevel;  // Emergency stop level
  107 | };
  108 | 
  109 | struct STrailingState {
  110 |     ulong PositionTicket;
  111 |     string Symbol;
  112 |     ENUM_POSITION_TYPE PositionType;
  113 |     ENUM_TRAILING_STATUS Status;
  114 |     
  115 |     double OpenPrice;
  116 |     double CurrentPrice;
  117 |     double CurrentStopLoss;
  118 |     double CurrentTakeProfit;
  119 |     double Volume;
  120 |     
  121 |     double LastTrailingPrice;    // Last price when trailing was updated
  122 |     double BestPrice;           // Best price achieved
  123 |     double TrailingLevel;       // Current trailing level
  124 |     double BreakevenLevel;      // Breakeven level
  125 |     
  126 |     datetime StartTime;
  127 |     datetime LastUpdateTime;
  128 |     datetime TriggerTime;       // When trailing was triggered
  129 |     
  130 |     bool IsTriggered;           // Whether trailing has been triggered
  131 |     bool IsBreakevenSet;        // Whether breakeven has been set
  132 |     bool IsPartialClosed;       // Whether partial close occurred
  133 |     
  134 |     int UpdateCount;            // Number of updates
  135 |     double TotalProfit;         // Total profit/loss
  136 |     double MaxProfit;           // Maximum profit achieved
  137 |     double MaxDrawdown;         // Maximum drawdown from peak
  138 |     
  139 |     string LastError;           // Last error message
  140 | };
  141 | 
  142 | struct STrailingStatistics {
  143 |     int TotalPositions;         // Total positions managed
  144 |     int ActiveTrailings;        // Currently active trailings
  145 |     int TriggeredTrailings;     // Triggered trailings
  146 |     int CompletedTrailings;     // Completed trailings
  147 |     int BreakevenHits;          // Breakeven hits
  148 |     int PartialCloses;          // Partial closes
  149 |     int EmergencyStops;         // Emergency stops
  150 |     
  151 |     double TotalProfit;         // Total profit from trailing
  152 |     double AverageProfit;       // Average profit per position
  153 |     double MaxProfit;           // Maximum profit achieved
  154 |     double MaxLoss;             // Maximum loss incurred
  155 |     double SuccessRate;         // Success rate percentage
  156 |     
  157 |     datetime FirstTrailing;     // First trailing start time
  158 |     datetime LastTrailing;      // Last trailing update time
  159 |     
  160 |     // Performance metrics
  161 |     double AverageHoldingTime;  // Average holding time
  162 |     double ProfitFactor;        // Profit factor
  163 |     double SharpeRatio;         // Sharpe ratio
  164 |     double MaxDrawdown;         // Maximum drawdown
  165 | };
  166 | 
  167 | struct STrailingAlert {
  168 |     ulong PositionTicket;
  169 |     string Symbol;
  170 |     ENUM_TRAILING_STATUS Status;
  171 |     string Message;
  172 |     datetime Timestamp;
  173 |     double Price;
  174 |     double StopLoss;
  175 |     bool IsUrgent;
  176 | };
