  179 | //| Trailing Stop Manager Class                                     |
  180 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  181 | class CTrailingStopManager {
  182 | private:
  183 |     EAContext* m_pContext;
  184 |     
  185 |     // Configuration
  186 |     STrailingConfig m_Config;
  187 |     
  188 |     // Active trailing states
  189 |     STrailingState m_TrailingStates[];
  190 |     int m_StateCount;
  191 |     
  192 |     // Statistics
  193 |     STrailingStatistics m_Statistics;
  194 |     
  195 |     // Internal state
  196 |     bool m_bInitialized;
  197 |     bool m_bEnabled;
  198 |     datetime m_LastUpdate;
  199 |     
  200 |     // Helper methods
  201 |     bool UpdateTrailingStop(STrailingState& state);
  202 |     bool CalculateTrailingLevel(STrailingState& state, double& newLevel);
  203 |     bool CheckTriggerCondition(STrailingState& state);
  204 |     bool SetBreakeven(STrailingState& state);
  205 |     bool ExecutePartialClose(STrailingState& state);
  206 |     bool ModifyStopLoss(ulong ticket, double newStopLoss);
  207 |     bool CheckEmergencyConditions(STrailingState& state);
  208 |     bool ValidateTrailingLevel(const STrailingState& state, double level);
  209 |     
  210 |     // Calculation methods
  211 |     double CalculateFixedTrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  212 |     double CalculatePercentageTrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  213 |     double CalculateATRTrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  214 |     double CalculateParabolicSARTrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  215 |     double CalculateMATrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  216 |     double CalculateSupportResistanceTrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  217 |     double CalculateVolatilityTrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  218 |     double CalculateAdaptiveTrailing(const STrailingState& state);
  219 |     
  220 |     // Utility methods
  221 |     int FindStateIndex(ulong ticket);
  222 |     bool AddTrailingState(const STrailingState& state);
  223 |     bool RemoveTrailingState(ulong ticket);
  224 |     bool UpdateStatistics(const STrailingState& state);
  225 |     void SendAlert(const STrailingAlert& alert);
  226 |     void LogError(const string message);
  227 |     void LogActivity(const string message);
  228 |     
  229 | public:
  230 |     // Constructor/Destructor
  231 |     CTrailingStopManager();
  232 |     ~CTrailingStopManager();
  233 |     
  234 |     // Initialization
  235 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* context);
  236 |     bool Deinitialize();
  237 |     bool Configure(const STrailingConfig& config);
  238 |     
  239 |     // Main operations
  240 |     bool StartTrailing(ulong ticket);
  241 |     bool StopTrailing(ulong ticket);
  242 |     bool PauseTrailing(ulong ticket);
  243 |     bool ResumeTrailing(ulong ticket);
  244 |     bool UpdateAllTrailings();
  245 |     bool UpdateTrailing(ulong ticket);
  246 |     
  247 |     // Position management
  248 |     bool AddPosition(ulong ticket);
  249 |     bool RemovePosition(ulong ticket);
  250 |     bool IsPositionTracked(ulong ticket);
  251 |     int GetTrackedPositionCount();
  252 |     
  253 |     // Configuration management
  254 |     bool SetTrailingType(ENUM_TRAILING_TYPE type);
  255 |     bool SetTrailingDistance(double distance);
  256 |     bool SetTrailingMode(ENUM_TRAILING_MODE mode);
  257 |     bool SetBreakevenType(ENUM_BREAKEVEN_TYPE type);
  258 |     bool SetTriggerCondition(ENUM_TRAILING_TRIGGER trigger, double value);
  259 |     
  260 |     // Advanced features
  261 |     bool EnablePartialClose(bool enable, double percentage = 50.0);
  262 |     bool EnableTimeExit(bool enable, int maxTime = 1440);
  263 |     bool EnableVolatilityFilter(bool enable, double threshold = 0.02);
  264 |     bool EnableEmergencyStop(bool enable, double level = -100.0);
  265 |     
  266 |     // Manual operations
  267 |     bool TriggerTrailing(ulong ticket);
  268 |     bool SetManualBreakeven(ulong ticket);
  269 |     bool ExecuteManualPartialClose(ulong ticket, double percentage);
  270 |     bool SetManualStopLoss(ulong ticket, double stopLoss);
  271 |     
  272 |     // Information retrieval
  273 |     bool GetTrailingState(ulong ticket, STrailingState& state);
  274 |     STrailingConfig GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  275 |     STrailingStatistics GetStatistics() const { return m_Statistics; }
  276 |     bool GetActiveTrailings(ulong& tickets[]);
  277 |     
  278 |     // Analysis and reporting
  279 |     bool GenerateTrailingReport(string& report);
  280 |     bool GeneratePerformanceReport(string& report);
  281 |     double CalculateTrailingEfficiency();
  282 |     double CalculateAverageHoldingTime();
  283 |     
  284 |     // Optimization
  285 |     bool OptimizeTrailingParameters(const string symbol, int bars = 1000);
  286 |     bool BacktestTrailingStrategy(const string symbol, datetime from, datetime to);
  287 |     bool FindOptimalTrailingDistance(const string symbol);
  288 |     
  289 |     // Risk management
  290 |     bool CheckRiskLimits();
  291 |     bool ApplyRiskControls();
  292 |     bool ValidateTrailingSettings();
  293 |     
  294 |     // Alerts and notifications
  295 |     bool SetAlertLevel(ENUM_TRAILING_STATUS status, bool enable);
  296 |     bool SendTrailingAlert(ulong ticket, const string message);
  297 |     
  298 |     // Utility methods
  299 |     string GetTrailingTypeName(ENUM_TRAILING_TYPE type);
  300 |     string GetTrailingStatusName(ENUM_TRAILING_STATUS status);
  301 |     string GetTrailingModeName(ENUM_TRAILING_MODE mode);
  302 |     string GetBreakevenTypeName(ENUM_BREAKEVEN_TYPE type);
  303 |     
  304 |     // Status
  305 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  306 |     bool IsEnabled() const { return m_bEnabled; }
  307 |     datetime GetLastUpdate() const { return m_LastUpdate; }
  308 |     
  309 |     // Control
  310 |     bool Enable(bool enable = true);
  311 |     bool Reset();
  312 |     bool ResetStatistics();
  313 | };
  314 | 
  315 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  316 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  317 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  318 | CTrailingStopManager::CTrailingStopManager() {
  319 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  320 |     m_StateCount = 0;
  321 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  322 |     m_bEnabled = true;
  323 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  324 |     
  325 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  326 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  327 |     
  328 |     // Set default configuration
  329 |     m_Config.Type = TRAILING_FIXED;
  330 |     m_Config.Mode = TRAILING_MODE_MODERATE;
  331 |     m_Config.Trigger = TRIGGER_IMMEDIATE;
  332 |     m_Config.BreakevenType = BREAKEVEN_AFTER_DISTANCE;
  333 |     
  334 |     m_Config.TrailingDistance = 50.0;      // 50 points
  335 |     m_Config.MinTrailingDistance = 10.0;   // 10 points
  336 |     m_Config.MaxTrailingDistance = 200.0;  // 200 points
  337 |     m_Config.TrailingStep = 10.0;          // 10 points
  338 |     
  339 |     m_Config.TriggerProfit = 30.0;         // 30 points profit
  340 |     m_Config.TriggerDistance = 20.0;       // 20 points distance
  341 |     m_Config.BreakevenDistance = 25.0;     // 25 points to breakeven
  342 |     m_Config.BreakevenProfit = 15.0;       // 15 points profit for breakeven
  343 |     
  344 |     m_Config.ATRPeriod = 14;
  345 |     m_Config.ATRMultiplier = 2.0;
  346 |     
  347 |     m_Config.MAPeriod = 20;
  348 |     m_Config.MAMethod = MODE_SMA;
  349 |     m_Config.MAPrice = PRICE_CLOSE;
  350 |     
  351 |     m_Config.SARStep = 0.02;
  352 |     m_Config.SARMaximum = 0.2;
  353 |     
  354 |     m_Config.EnablePartialClose = false;
  355 |     m_Config.PartialClosePercent = 50.0;
  356 |     m_Config.EnableTimeExit = false;
  357 |     m_Config.MaxHoldingTime = 1440;        // 24 hours
  358 |     m_Config.EnableVolatilityFilter = false;
  359 |     m_Config.VolatilityThreshold = 0.02;   // 2%
  360 |     
  361 |     m_Config.MaxLoss = -100.0;             // $100 max loss
  362 |     m_Config.MaxProfit = 500.0;            // $500 max profit
  363 |     m_Config.EnableEmergencyStop = true;
  364 |     m_Config.EmergencyStopLevel = -200.0;  // $200 emergency stop
  365 | }
  366 | 
  367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  368 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  369 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  370 | CTrailingStopManager::~CTrailingStopManager() {
  371 |     Deinitialize();
  372 | }
  373 | 
  374 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  375 | //| Initialize trailing stop manager                                |
  376 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  377 | bool CTrailingStopManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  378 |     if (context == NULL) {
  379 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  380 |         return false;
  381 |     }
  382 |     
  383 |     m_pContext = context;
  384 |     
  385 |     // Initialize arrays
  386 |     ArrayResize(m_TrailingStates, 100);  // Initial capacity for 100 positions
  387 |     m_StateCount = 0;
  388 |     
  389 |     // Initialize statistics
  390 |     m_Statistics.FirstTrailing = TimeCurrent();
  391 |     
  392 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  393 |     m_bEnabled = true;
  394 |     
  395 |     LogActivity("Trailing stop manager initialized successfully");
  396 |     return true;
  397 | }
  398 | 
  399 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  400 | //| Deinitialize trailing stop manager                              |
  401 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  402 | bool CTrailingStopManager::Deinitialize() {
  403 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  404 |         // Stop all active trailings
  405 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_StateCount; i++) {
  406 |             if (m_TrailingStates[i].Status == TRAILING_ACTIVE) {
  407 |                 m_TrailingStates[i].Status = TRAILING_INACTIVE;
  408 |             }
  409 |         }
  410 |         
  411 |         ArrayFree(m_TrailingStates);
  412 |         m_StateCount = 0;
  413 |         
  414 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  415 |         m_bEnabled = false;
  416 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  417 |         
  418 |         LogActivity("Trailing stop manager deinitialized");
  419 |     }
  420 |     
  421 |     return true;
  422 | }
  423 | 
  424 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  425 | //| Configure trailing stop manager                                 |
  426 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  427 | bool CTrailingStopManager::Configure(const STrailingConfig& config) {
  428 |     m_Config = config;
  429 |     
  430 |     // Validate configuration
  431 |     if (!ValidateTrailingSettings()) {
  432 |         LogError("Invalid trailing configuration provided");
  433 |         return false;
  434 |     }
  435 |     
  436 |     LogActivity("Trailing stop manager configured successfully");
  437 |     return true;
  438 | }
  439 | 
  440 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  441 | //| Start trailing for a position                                   |
  442 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  443 | bool CTrailingStopManager::StartTrailing(ulong ticket) {
  444 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bEnabled) {
  445 |         LogError("Trailing stop manager not initialized or disabled");
  446 |         return false;
  447 |     }
  448 |     
  449 |     // Check if position exists
  450 |     if (!PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  451 |         LogError(StringFormat("Position #%I64u not found", ticket));
  452 |         return false;
  453 |     }
  454 |     
  455 |     // Check if already tracking this position
  456 |     int index = FindStateIndex(ticket);
  457 |     if (index >= 0) {
  458 |         // Update existing state
  459 |         m_TrailingStates[index].Status = TRAILING_ACTIVE;
  460 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Resumed trailing for position #%I64u", ticket));
  461 |         return true;
  462 |     }
  463 |     
  464 |     // Create new trailing state
  465 |     STrailingState state;
  466 |     ZeroMemory(state);
  467 |     
  468 |     state.PositionTicket = ticket;
  469 |     state.Symbol = PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL);
  470 |     state.PositionType = (ENUM_POSITION_TYPE)PositionGetInteger(POSITION_TYPE);
  471 |     state.Status = TRAILING_ACTIVE;
  472 |     
  473 |     state.OpenPrice = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PRICE_OPEN);
  474 |     state.CurrentPrice = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PRICE_CURRENT);
  475 |     state.CurrentStopLoss = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SL);
  476 |     state.CurrentTakeProfit = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_TP);
  477 |     state.Volume = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  478 |     
  479 |     state.LastTrailingPrice = state.CurrentPrice;
  480 |     state.BestPrice = state.CurrentPrice;
  481 |     state.TrailingLevel = state.CurrentStopLoss;
  482 |     
  483 |     state.StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  484 |     state.LastUpdateTime = state.StartTime;
  485 |     state.TriggerTime = 0;
  486 |     
  487 |     state.IsTriggered = (m_Config.Trigger == TRIGGER_IMMEDIATE);
  488 |     state.IsBreakevenSet = false;
  489 |     state.IsPartialClosed = false;
  490 |     
  491 |     state.UpdateCount = 0;
  492 |     state.TotalProfit = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PROFIT);
  493 |     state.MaxProfit = state.TotalProfit;
  494 |     state.MaxDrawdown = 0.0;
  495 |     
  496 |     // Add to tracking array
  497 |     if (!AddTrailingState(state)) {
  498 |         LogError(StringFormat("Failed to add trailing state for position #%I64u", ticket));
  499 |         return false;
  500 |     }
  501 |     
  502 |     m_Statistics.TotalPositions++;
  503 |     m_Statistics.ActiveTrailings++;
  504 |     
  505 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Started trailing for position #%I64u (%s)", ticket, state.Symbol));
  506 |     return true;
  507 | }
  508 | 
  509 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  510 | //| Update all trailing stops                                       |
  511 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  512 | bool CTrailingStopManager::UpdateAllTrailings() {
  513 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bEnabled) {
  514 |         return false;
  515 |     }
  516 |     
  517 |     int updatedCount = 0;
  518 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  519 |     
  520 |     for (int i = m_StateCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  521 |         STrailingState& state = m_TrailingStates[i];
  522 |         
  523 |         if (state.Status != TRAILING_ACTIVE) {
  524 |             continue;
  525 |         }
  526 |         
  527 |         // Check if position still exists
  528 |         if (!PositionSelectByTicket(state.PositionTicket)) {
  529 |             // Position closed, remove from tracking
  530 |             state.Status = TRAILING_COMPLETED;
  531 |             m_Statistics.ActiveTrailings--;
  532 |             m_Statistics.CompletedTrailings++;
  533 |             continue;
  534 |         }
  535 |         
  536 |         // Update current market data
  537 |         state.CurrentPrice = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PRICE_CURRENT);
  538 |         state.CurrentStopLoss = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SL);
  539 |         state.TotalProfit = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PROFIT);
  540 |         
  541 |         // Update best price and drawdown
  542 |         if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  543 |             if (state.CurrentPrice > state.BestPrice) {
  544 |                 state.BestPrice = state.CurrentPrice;
  545 |             }
  546 |         } else {
  547 |             if (state.CurrentPrice < state.BestPrice) {
  548 |                 state.BestPrice = state.CurrentPrice;
  549 |             }
  550 |         }
  551 |         
  552 |         if (state.TotalProfit > state.MaxProfit) {
  553 |             state.MaxProfit = state.TotalProfit;
  554 |         }
  555 |         
  556 |         double currentDrawdown = state.MaxProfit - state.TotalProfit;
  557 |         if (currentDrawdown > state.MaxDrawdown) {
  558 |             state.MaxDrawdown = currentDrawdown;
  559 |         }
  560 |         
  561 |         // Check emergency conditions
  562 |         if (CheckEmergencyConditions(state)) {
  563 |             continue;
  564 |         }
  565 |         
  566 |         // Check trigger condition
  567 |         if (!state.IsTriggered && CheckTriggerCondition(state)) {
  568 |             state.IsTriggered = true;
  569 |             state.TriggerTime = currentTime;
  570 |             m_Statistics.TriggeredTrailings++;
  571 |             
  572 |             STrailingAlert alert;
  573 |             alert.PositionTicket = state.PositionTicket;
  574 |             alert.Symbol = state.Symbol;
  575 |             alert.Status = TRAILING_TRIGGERED;
  576 |             alert.Message = "Trailing stop triggered";
  577 |             alert.Timestamp = currentTime;
  578 |             alert.Price = state.CurrentPrice;
  579 |             alert.StopLoss = state.CurrentStopLoss;
  580 |             alert.IsUrgent = false;
  581 |             SendAlert(alert);
  582 |         }
  583 |         
  584 |         // Update trailing stop if triggered
  585 |         if (state.IsTriggered) {
  586 |             if (UpdateTrailingStop(state)) {
  587 |                 updatedCount++;
  588 |             }
  589 |         }
  590 |         
  591 |         // Check breakeven condition
  592 |         if (!state.IsBreakevenSet && m_Config.BreakevenType != BREAKEVEN_NEVER) {
  593 |             SetBreakeven(state);
  594 |         }
  595 |         
  596 |         // Check partial close condition
  597 |         if (!state.IsPartialClosed && m_Config.EnablePartialClose) {
  598 |             ExecutePartialClose(state);
  599 |         }
  600 |         
  601 |         state.LastUpdateTime = currentTime;
  602 |         state.UpdateCount++;
  603 |     }
  604 |     
  605 |     m_LastUpdate = currentTime;
  606 |     m_Statistics.LastTrailing = currentTime;
  607 |     
  608 |     if (updatedCount > 0) {
  609 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Updated %d trailing stops", updatedCount));
  610 |     }
  611 |     
  612 |     return true;
  613 | }
  614 | 
  615 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  616 | //| Update trailing stop for a specific position                    |
  617 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  618 | bool CTrailingStopManager::UpdateTrailingStop(STrailingState& state) {
  619 |     double newTrailingLevel = 0.0;
  620 |     
  621 |     // Calculate new trailing level
  622 |     if (!CalculateTrailingLevel(state, newTrailingLevel)) {
  623 |         return false;
  624 |     }
  625 |     
  626 |     // Validate new level
  627 |     if (!ValidateTrailingLevel(state, newTrailingLevel)) {
  628 |         return false;
  629 |     }
  630 |     
  631 |     // Check if we need to update
  632 |     bool shouldUpdate = false;
  633 |     
  634 |     if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  635 |         // For buy positions, only move stop loss up
  636 |         if (newTrailingLevel > state.CurrentStopLoss) {
  637 |             shouldUpdate = true;
  638 |         }
  639 |     } else {
  640 |         // For sell positions, only move stop loss down
  641 |         if (newTrailingLevel < state.CurrentStopLoss || state.CurrentStopLoss == 0.0) {
  642 |             shouldUpdate = true;
  643 |         }
  644 |     }
  645 |     
  646 |     if (!shouldUpdate) {
  647 |         return false;
  648 |     }
  649 |     
  650 |     // Execute the modification
  651 |     if (ModifyStopLoss(state.PositionTicket, newTrailingLevel)) {
  652 |         state.TrailingLevel = newTrailingLevel;
  653 |         state.CurrentStopLoss = newTrailingLevel;
  654 |         state.LastTrailingPrice = state.CurrentPrice;
  655 |         
  656 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Updated trailing stop for #%I64u: %.5f", 
  657 |                                 state.PositionTicket, newTrailingLevel));
  658 |         return true;
  659 |     }
  660 |     
  661 |     return false;
  662 | }
  663 | 
  664 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  665 | //| Calculate trailing level based on configuration                 |
  666 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  667 | bool CTrailingStopManager::CalculateTrailingLevel(STrailingState& state, double& newLevel) {
  668 |     switch (m_Config.Type) {
  669 |         case TRAILING_FIXED:
  670 |             newLevel = CalculateFixedTrailing(state);
  671 |             break;
  672 |         case TRAILING_PERCENTAGE:
  673 |             newLevel = CalculatePercentageTrailing(state);
  674 |             break;
  675 |         case TRAILING_ATR:
  676 |             newLevel = CalculateATRTrailing(state);
  677 |             break;
  678 |         case TRAILING_PARABOLIC_SAR:
  679 |             newLevel = CalculateParabolicSARTrailing(state);
  680 |             break;
  681 |         case TRAILING_MOVING_AVERAGE:
  682 |             newLevel = CalculateMATrailing(state);
  683 |             break;
  684 |         case TRAILING_SUPPORT_RESISTANCE:
  685 |             newLevel = CalculateSupportResistanceTrailing(state);
  686 |             break;
  687 |         case TRAILING_VOLATILITY:
  688 |             newLevel = CalculateVolatilityTrailing(state);
  689 |             break;
  690 |         case TRAILING_ADAPTIVE:
  691 |             newLevel = CalculateAdaptiveTrailing(state);
  692 |             break;
  693 |         default:
  694 |             newLevel = CalculateFixedTrailing(state);
  695 |             break;
  696 |     }
  697 |     
  698 |     return (newLevel > 0.0);
  699 | }
  700 | 
  701 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  702 | //| Calculate fixed distance trailing                               |
  703 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  704 | double CTrailingStopManager::CalculateFixedTrailing(const STrailingState& state) {
  705 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(state.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  706 |     double distance = m_Config.TrailingDistance * point;
  707 |     
  708 |     if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  709 |         return state.CurrentPrice - distance;
  710 |     } else {
  711 |         return state.CurrentPrice + distance;
  712 |     }
  713 | }
  714 | 
  715 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  716 | //| Calculate percentage-based trailing                             |
  717 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  718 | double CTrailingStopManager::CalculatePercentageTrailing(const STrailingState& state) {
  719 |     double percentage = m_Config.TrailingDistance / 100.0;
  720 |     
  721 |     if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  722 |         return state.CurrentPrice * (1.0 - percentage);
  723 |     } else {
  724 |         return state.CurrentPrice * (1.0 + percentage);
  725 |     }
  726 | }
  727 | 
  728 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  729 | //| Calculate ATR-based trailing                                    |
  730 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  731 | double CTrailingStopManager::CalculateATRTrailing(const STrailingState& state) {
  732 |     int atrHandle = iATR(state.Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, m_Config.ATRPeriod);
  733 |     if (atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  734 |         return CalculateFixedTrailing(state);  // Fallback to fixed
  735 |     }
  736 |     
  737 |     double atrValues[1];
  738 |     if (CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrValues) <= 0) {
  739 |         IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  740 |         return CalculateFixedTrailing(state);
  741 |     }
  742 |     
  743 |     double atrDistance = atrValues[0] * m_Config.ATRMultiplier;
  744 |     
  745 |     IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  746 |     
  747 |     if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  748 |         return state.CurrentPrice - atrDistance;
  749 |     } else {
  750 |         return state.CurrentPrice + atrDistance;
  751 |     }
  752 | }
  753 | 
  754 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  755 | //| Calculate Parabolic SAR trailing                                |
  756 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  757 | double CTrailingStopManager::CalculateParabolicSARTrailing(const STrailingState& state) {
  758 |     int sarHandle = iSAR(state.Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, m_Config.SARStep, m_Config.SARMaximum);
  759 |     if (sarHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  760 |         return CalculateFixedTrailing(state);
  761 |     }
  762 |     
  763 |     double sarValues[1];
  764 |     if (CopyBuffer(sarHandle, 0, 0, 1, sarValues) <= 0) {
  765 |         IndicatorRelease(sarHandle);
  766 |         return CalculateFixedTrailing(state);
  767 |     }
  768 |     
  769 |     double sarLevel = sarValues[0];
  770 |     IndicatorRelease(sarHandle);
  771 |     
  772 |     return sarLevel;
  773 | }
  774 | 
  775 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  776 | //| Calculate moving average trailing                               |
  777 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  778 | double CTrailingStopManager::CalculateMATrailing(const STrailingState& state) {
  779 |     int maHandle = iMA(state.Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, m_Config.MAPeriod, 
  780 |                       0, m_Config.MAMethod, m_Config.MAPrice);
  781 |     if (maHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  782 |         return CalculateFixedTrailing(state);
  783 |     }
  784 |     
  785 |     double maValues[1];
  786 |     if (CopyBuffer(maHandle, 0, 0, 1, maValues) <= 0) {
  787 |         IndicatorRelease(maHandle);
  788 |         return CalculateFixedTrailing(state);
  789 |     }
  790 |     
  791 |     double maLevel = maValues[0];
  792 |     IndicatorRelease(maHandle);
  793 |     
  794 |     return maLevel;
  795 | }
  796 | 
  797 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  798 | //| Validate trailing level                                         |
  799 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  800 | bool CTrailingStopManager::ValidateTrailingLevel(const STrailingState& state, double level) {
  801 |     if (level <= 0.0) {
  802 |         return false;
  803 |     }
  804 |     
  805 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(state.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  806 |     double minDistance = m_Config.MinTrailingDistance * point;
  807 |     double maxDistance = m_Config.MaxTrailingDistance * point;
  808 |     
  809 |     double distance = 0.0;
  810 |     if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  811 |         distance = state.CurrentPrice - level;
  812 |     } else {
  813 |         distance = level - state.CurrentPrice;
  814 |     }
  815 |     
  816 |     if (distance < minDistance || distance > maxDistance) {
  817 |         return false;
  818 |     }
  819 |     
  820 |     return true;
  821 | }
  822 | 
  823 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  824 | //| Modify stop loss for position                                   |
  825 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  826 | bool CTrailingStopManager::ModifyStopLoss(ulong ticket, double newStopLoss) {
  827 |     if (!PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  828 |         return false;
  829 |     }
  830 |     
  831 |     string symbol = PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL);
  832 |     double currentTP = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_TP);
  833 |     
  834 |     MqlTradeRequest request;
  835 |     MqlTradeResult result;
  836 |     
  837 |     ZeroMemory(request);
  838 |     ZeroMemory(result);
  839 |     
  840 |     request.action = TRADE_ACTION_SLTP;
  841 |     request.position = ticket;
  842 |     request.symbol = symbol;
  843 |     request.sl = newStopLoss;
  844 |     request.tp = currentTP;
  845 |     
  846 |     if (!OrderSend(request, result)) {
  847 |         LogError(StringFormat("Failed to modify stop loss for #%I64u: %s", 
  848 |                             ticket, result.comment));
  849 |         return false;
  850 |     }
  851 |     
  852 |     return (result.retcode == TRADE_RETCODE_DONE);
  853 | }
  854 | 
  855 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  856 | //| Check trigger condition                                         |
  857 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  858 | bool CTrailingStopManager::CheckTriggerCondition(STrailingState& state) {
  859 |     switch (m_Config.Trigger) {
  860 |         case TRIGGER_IMMEDIATE:
  861 |             return true;
  862 |             
  863 |         case TRIGGER_AFTER_PROFIT: {
  864 |             double point = SymbolInfoDouble(state.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  865 |             double profitDistance = 0.0;
  866 |             
  867 |             if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  868 |                 profitDistance = (state.CurrentPrice - state.OpenPrice) / point;
  869 |             } else {
  870 |                 profitDistance = (state.OpenPrice - state.CurrentPrice) / point;
  871 |             }
  872 |             
  873 |             return (profitDistance >= m_Config.TriggerProfit);
  874 |         }
  875 |         
  876 |         case TRIGGER_AFTER_DISTANCE: {
  877 |             double point = SymbolInfoDouble(state.Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  878 |             double moveDistance = 0.0;
  879 |             
  880 |             if (state.PositionType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  881 |                 moveDistance = (state.CurrentPrice - state.LastTrailingPrice) / point;
  882 |             } else {
  883 |                 moveDistance = (state.LastTrailingPrice - state.CurrentPrice) / point;
  884 |             }
  885 |             
  886 |             return (moveDistance >= m_Config.TriggerDistance);
  887 |         }
  888 |         
  889 |         case TRIGGER_MANUAL:
  890 |             return false;  // Must be triggered manually
  891 |             
  892 |         default:
  893 |             return true;
  894 |     }
  895 | }
  896 | 
  897 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  898 | //| Find state index by ticket                                      |
  899 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  900 | int CTrailingStopManager::FindStateIndex(ulong ticket) {
  901 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_StateCount; i++) {
  902 |         if (m_TrailingStates[i].PositionTicket == ticket) {
  903 |             return i;
  904 |         }
  905 |     }
  906 |     return -1;
  907 | }
  908 | 
  909 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  910 | //| Add trailing state                                              |
  911 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  912 | bool CTrailingStopManager::AddTrailingState(const STrailingState& state) {
  913 |     if (m_StateCount >= ArraySize(m_TrailingStates)) {
  914 |         // Resize array if needed
  915 |         int newSize = ArraySize(m_TrailingStates) + 50;
  916 |         if (ArrayResize(m_TrailingStates, newSize) < 0) {
  917 |             return false;
  918 |         }
  919 |     }
  920 |     
  921 |     m_TrailingStates[m_StateCount] = state;
  922 |     m_StateCount++;
  923 |     
  924 |     return true;
  925 | }
  926 | 
  927 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  928 | //| Validate trailing settings                                      |
  929 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  930 | bool CTrailingStopManager::ValidateTrailingSettings() {
  931 |     if (m_Config.TrailingDistance <= 0.0) {
  932 |         LogError("Invalid trailing distance");
  933 |         return false;
  934 |     }
  935 |     
  936 |     if (m_Config.MinTrailingDistance >= m_Config.MaxTrailingDistance) {
  937 |         LogError("Invalid trailing distance range");
  938 |         return false;
  939 |     }
  940 |     
  941 |     if (m_Config.ATRPeriod <= 0) {
  942 |         LogError("Invalid ATR period");
  943 |         return false;
  944 |     }
  945 |     
  946 |     if (m_Config.MAPeriod <= 0) {
  947 |         LogError("Invalid MA period");
  948 |         return false;
  949 |     }
  950 |     
  951 |     return true;
  952 | }
  953 | 
  954 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  955 | //| Log error message                                               |
  956 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  957 | void CTrailingStopManager::LogError(const string message) {
  958 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  959 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("TrailingStopManager: " + message);
  960 |     } else {
  961 |         Print("TrailingStopManager ERROR: ", message);
  962 |     }
  963 | }
  964 | 
  965 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  966 | //| Log activity message                                            |
  967 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  968 | void CTrailingStopManager::LogActivity(const string message) {
  969 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  970 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("TrailingStopManager: " + message);
  971 |     } else {
  972 |         Print("TrailingStopManager: ", message);
  973 |     }
  974 | }

   17 |     BACKTEST_MODE_SINGLE,           // Single symbol backtest

   21 |     BACKTEST_MODE_STRESS_TEST,      // Stress testing

   23 |     BACKTEST_MODE_ROBUSTNESS,       // Robustness testing
   24 |     BACKTEST_MODE_OPTIMIZATION      // Parameter optimization

   93 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   94 | //| Backtest engine structures                                     |
   95 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   96 | struct SBacktestConfig {
   97 |     // Basic settings
   98 |     ENUM_BACKTEST_MODE Mode;        // Backtest mode
   99 |     string Symbol;                  // Symbol to test
  100 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES Timeframe;      // Timeframe
  101 |     datetime StartDate;             // Start date
  102 |     datetime EndDate;               // End date
  103 |     
  104 |     // Execution settings
  105 |     ENUM_EXECUTION_MODEL ExecutionModel; // Execution model
  106 |     ENUM_SPREAD_MODEL SpreadModel;  // Spread model
  107 |     ENUM_SLIPPAGE_MODEL SlippageModel; // Slippage model
  108 |     ENUM_COMMISSION_MODEL CommissionModel; // Commission model
  109 |     
  110 |     // Trading settings
  111 |     double InitialDeposit;          // Initial deposit
  112 |     ENUM_ACCOUNT_MARGIN_MODE MarginMode; // Margin mode
  113 |     double Leverage;                // Leverage
  114 |     string Currency;                // Account currency
  115 |     
  116 |     // Spread/Slippage settings
  117 |     double FixedSpread;             // Fixed spread (points)
  118 |     double VariableSpreadMin;       // Variable spread minimum
  119 |     double VariableSpreadMax;       // Variable spread maximum
  120 |     double FixedSlippage;           // Fixed slippage (points)
  121 |     double SlippagePercent;         // Slippage percentage
  122 |     
  123 |     // Commission settings
  124 |     double FixedCommission;         // Fixed commission
  125 |     double CommissionPercent;       // Commission percentage
  126 |     double CommissionPerLot;        // Commission per lot
  127 |     
  128 |     // Data quality settings
  129 |     bool RequireMinDataQuality;     // Require minimum data quality
  130 |     ENUM_DATA_QUALITY MinDataQuality; // Minimum data quality
  131 |     bool FillDataGaps;              // Fill data gaps
  132 |     bool ValidateData;              // Validate data integrity
  133 |     
  134 |     // Portfolio settings (for portfolio mode)
  135 |     string Symbols[];               // Multiple symbols
  136 |     double SymbolWeights[];         // Symbol weights
  137 |     bool EnableCorrelationAnalysis; // Enable correlation analysis
  138 |     
  139 |     // Walk-forward settings
  140 |     int WalkForwardSteps;           // Walk-forward steps
  141 |     double InSampleRatio;           // In-sample ratio (0-1)
  142 |     bool EnableReoptimization;      // Enable reoptimization
  143 |     int ReoptimizationPeriod;       // Reoptimization period
  144 |     
  145 |     // Monte Carlo settings
  146 |     int MonteCarloRuns;             // Monte Carlo runs
  147 |     double NoiseLevel;              // Noise level
  148 |     bool RandomizeEntries;          // Randomize entry points
  149 |     bool RandomizeExits;            // Randomize exit points
  150 |     
  151 |     // Validation settings
  152 |     ENUM_VALIDATION_TYPE ValidationType; // Validation type
  153 |     double ValidationRatio;         // Validation data ratio
  154 |     int CrossValidationFolds;       // Cross validation folds
  155 |     
  156 |     // Output settings
  157 |     bool GenerateReport;            // Generate detailed report
  158 |     bool SaveTrades;                // Save individual trades
  159 |     bool SaveEquityCurve;           // Save equity curve
  160 |     bool SaveDrawdownCurve;         // Save drawdown curve
  161 |     string OutputPath;              // Output file path
  162 |     
  163 |     // Advanced settings
  164 |     bool EnableMultithreading;      // Enable multithreading
  165 |     int MaxThreads;                 // Maximum threads
  166 |     bool EnableCaching;             // Enable result caching
  167 |     bool EnableLogging;             // Enable detailed logging
  168 |     
  169 |     // Risk settings
  170 |     double MaxDrawdownPercent;      // Maximum drawdown percentage
  171 |     double MaxLossPercent;          // Maximum loss percentage
  172 |     bool StopOnMaxDrawdown;         // Stop on maximum drawdown
  173 |     bool StopOnMaxLoss;             // Stop on maximum loss
  174 | };
  175 | 
  176 | struct SBacktestResult {
  177 |     // Basic information
  178 |     string TestId;                  // Test identifier
  179 |     datetime StartTime;             // Test start time
  180 |     datetime EndTime;               // Test end time
  181 |     int Duration;                   // Test duration (seconds)
  182 |     
  183 |     // Test parameters
  184 |     SBacktestConfig Config;         // Test configuration
  185 |     string ParameterSet;            // Parameter set (JSON)
  186 |     
  187 |     // Performance metrics
  188 |     double InitialDeposit;          // Initial deposit
  189 |     double FinalBalance;            // Final balance
  190 |     double MaxBalance;              // Maximum balance
  191 |     double MinBalance;              // Minimum balance
  192 |     
  193 |     double TotalProfit;             // Total profit
  194 |     double TotalLoss;               // Total loss
  195 |     double NetProfit;               // Net profit
  196 |     double ProfitFactor;            // Profit factor
  197 |     
  198 |     double MaxDrawdown;             // Maximum drawdown
  199 |     double MaxDrawdownPercent;      // Maximum drawdown percentage
  200 |     double RelativeDrawdown;        // Relative drawdown
  201 |     double RecoveryFactor;          // Recovery factor
  202 |     
  203 |     // Trade statistics
  204 |     int TotalTrades;                // Total trades
  205 |     int WinningTrades;              // Winning trades
  206 |     int LosingTrades;               // Losing trades
  207 |     double WinRate;                 // Win rate percentage
  208 |     
  209 |     double AverageWin;              // Average winning trade
  210 |     double AverageLoss;             // Average losing trade
  211 |     double LargestWin;              // Largest winning trade
  212 |     double LargestLoss;             // Largest losing trade
  213 |     
  214 |     double AverageTradeLength;      // Average trade length (bars)
  215 |     double AverageWinLength;        // Average winning trade length
  216 |     double AverageLossLength;       // Average losing trade length
  217 |     
  218 |     // Risk metrics
  219 |     double SharpeRatio;             // Sharpe ratio
  220 |     double SortinoRatio;            // Sortino ratio
  221 |     double CalmarRatio;             // Calmar ratio
  222 |     double MarRatio;                // MAR ratio
  223 |     double VaR95;                   // Value at Risk (95%)
  224 |     double CVaR95;                  // Conditional VaR (95%)
  225 |     
  226 |     // Consistency metrics
  227 |     double ProfitabilityRatio;      // Profitability ratio
  228 |     double ConsistencyIndex;        // Consistency index
  229 |     double StabilityCoefficient;    // Stability coefficient
  230 |     double VolatilityIndex;         // Volatility index
  231 |     
  232 |     // Monthly/Yearly statistics
  233 |     double MonthlyReturns[];        // Monthly returns
  234 |     double YearlyReturns[];         // Yearly returns
  235 |     double BestMonth;               // Best monthly return
  236 |     double WorstMonth;              // Worst monthly return
  237 |     double BestYear;                // Best yearly return
  238 |     double WorstYear;               // Worst yearly return
  239 |     
  240 |     // Data quality
  241 |     ENUM_DATA_QUALITY DataQuality;  // Overall data quality
  242 |     int DataGaps;                   // Number of data gaps
  243 |     int SuspiciousTicks;            // Suspicious ticks
  244 |     double DataCoverage;            // Data coverage percentage
  245 |     
  246 |     // Validation results
  247 |     double InSampleFitness;         // In-sample fitness
  248 |     double OutSampleFitness;        // Out-of-sample fitness
  249 |     double ValidationScore;         // Validation score
  250 |     double OverfittingRisk;         // Overfitting risk
  251 |     
  252 |     // Additional metrics
  253 |     double ExpectedPayoff;          // Expected payoff
  254 |     double ProfitPerTrade;          // Profit per trade
  255 |     double TradesPerDay;            // Trades per day
  256 |     double ExposurePercent;         // Market exposure percentage
  257 |     
  258 |     // Equity curve data
  259 |     datetime EquityTimes[];         // Equity curve timestamps
  260 |     double EquityValues[];          // Equity curve values
  261 |     double DrawdownValues[];        // Drawdown curve values
  262 |     
  263 |     // Trade details
  264 |     string TradeDetails;            // Trade details (JSON)
  265 |     
  266 |     // Status and validation
  267 |     bool IsValid;                   // Is result valid
  268 |     bool IsCompleted;               // Is test completed
  269 |     string ErrorMessage;            // Error message (if any)
  270 |     string Warnings[];              // Warning messages
  271 |     
  272 |     // Comparison data
  273 |     double BenchmarkReturn;         // Benchmark return
  274 |     double Alpha;                   // Alpha (excess return)
  275 |     double Beta;                    // Beta (market correlation)
  276 |     double TrackingError;           // Tracking error
  277 |     double InformationRatio;        // Information ratio
  278 | };
  279 | 
  280 | struct SBacktestStatistics {
  281 |     // General statistics
  282 |     int TotalTests;                 // Total tests run
  283 |     int CompletedTests;             // Completed tests
  284 |     int FailedTests;                // Failed tests
  285 |     int CancelledTests;             // Cancelled tests
  286 |     
  287 |     // Performance statistics
  288 |     datetime TotalTestTime;         // Total testing time
  289 |     double AverageTestTime;         // Average test time
  290 |     double FastestTest;             // Fastest test time
  291 |     double SlowestTest;             // Slowest test time
  292 |     
  293 |     // Best results
  294 |     double BestProfitFactor;        // Best profit factor
  295 |     double BestSharpeRatio;         // Best Sharpe ratio
  296 |     double BestNetProfit;           // Best net profit
  297 |     double LowestDrawdown;          // Lowest drawdown
  298 |     
  299 |     // Resource usage
  300 |     double MemoryUsage;             // Memory usage (MB)
  301 |     double CpuUsage;                // CPU usage percentage
  302 |     int ActiveThreads;              // Active threads
  303 |     
  304 |     // Error statistics
  305 |     int TotalErrors;                // Total errors
  306 |     int CriticalErrors;             // Critical errors
  307 |     string LastError;               // Last error message
  308 |     datetime LastErrorTime;         // Last error time
  309 |     
  310 |     // Progress tracking
  311 |     double ProgressPercent;         // Progress percentage
  312 |     string CurrentStatus;           // Current status
  313 |     int EstimatedTimeRemaining;     // Estimated time remaining
  314 | };
  315 | 
  316 | struct SBacktestAlert {

  322 |     bool IsUrgent;                  // Is urgent alert
  323 |     string TestId;                  // Related test ID
  324 |     string Details;                 // Additional details
  325 | };

  414 |     bool ExportResults(const string filename, const string format);

  416 |     void LogError(const string message);
  417 |     void LogActivity(const string message);
  418 |

  503 |

  515 |

  529 |     string GetValidationTypeName(ENUM_VALIDATION_TYPE type);
  530 |     
  531 |     // Status
  532 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  533 |     ENUM_BACKTEST_STATUS GetStatus() const { return m_Status; }
  534 |     bool IsRunning() const { return m_Status == BACKTEST_STATUS_RUNNING; }
  535 |     bool IsCompleted() const { return m_Status == BACKTEST_STATUS_COMPLETED; }
  536 |     datetime GetStartTime() const { return m_StartTime; }
  537 |     datetime GetLastUpdate() const { return m_LastUpdate; }

  540 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  541 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  542 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  543 | CBacktestEngine::CBacktestEngine() {
  544 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  545 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  546 |     m_RateCount = 0;
  547 |     m_TickCount = 0;
  548 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  549 |     m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_IDLE;
  550 |     m_StartTime = 0;
  551 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  552 |     
  553 |     m_Balance = 0;
  554 |     m_Equity = 0;
  555 |     m_Margin = 0;
  556 |     m_FreeMargin = 0;
  557 |     m_MaxDrawdown = 0;
  558 |     m_CurrentDrawdown = 0;
  559 |     
  560 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  561 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  562 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentResult);
  563 |     
  564 |     // Set default configuration
  565 |     m_Config.Mode = BACKTEST_MODE_SINGLE;
  566 |     m_Config.Symbol = Symbol();
  567 |     m_Config.Timeframe = PERIOD_H1;
  568 |     m_Config.StartDate = TimeCurrent() - 365 * 24 * 3600; // 1 year ago
  569 |     m_Config.EndDate = TimeCurrent();
  570 |     
  571 |     m_Config.ExecutionModel = EXECUTION_MODEL_OHLC;
  572 |     m_Config.SpreadModel = SPREAD_MODEL_FIXED;
  573 |     m_Config.SlippageModel = SLIPPAGE_MODEL_FIXED;
  574 |     m_Config.CommissionModel = COMMISSION_MODEL_NONE;
  575 |     
  576 |     m_Config.InitialDeposit = 10000.0;
  577 |     m_Config.MarginMode = ACCOUNT_MARGIN_MODE_RETAIL_NETTING;
  578 |     m_Config.Leverage = 100.0;
  579 |     m_Config.Currency = "USD";
  580 |     
  581 |     m_Config.FixedSpread = 20.0;           // 2 pips
  582 |     m_Config.VariableSpreadMin = 10.0;     // 1 pip
  583 |     m_Config.VariableSpreadMax = 50.0;     // 5 pips
  584 |     m_Config.FixedSlippage = 10.0;         // 1 pip
  585 |     m_Config.SlippagePercent = 0.1;        // 0.1%
  586 |     
  587 |     m_Config.FixedCommission = 0.0;
  588 |     m_Config.CommissionPercent = 0.0;
  589 |     m_Config.CommissionPerLot = 0.0;
  590 |     
  591 |     m_Config.RequireMinDataQuality = true;
  592 |     m_Config.MinDataQuality = DATA_QUALITY_GOOD;
  593 |     m_Config.FillDataGaps = true;
  594 |     m_Config.ValidateData = true;
  595 |     
  596 |     m_Config.WalkForwardSteps = 10;
  597 |     m_Config.InSampleRatio = 0.7;          // 70% in-sample
  598 |     m_Config.EnableReoptimization = false;
  599 |     m_Config.ReoptimizationPeriod = 252;   // 1 year
  600 |     
  601 |     m_Config.MonteCarloRuns = 1000;
  602 |     m_Config.NoiseLevel = 0.05;            // 5% noise
  603 |     m_Config.RandomizeEntries = false;
  604 |     m_Config.RandomizeExits = false;
  605 |     
  606 |     m_Config.ValidationType = VALIDATION_TYPE_OUT_SAMPLE;
  607 |     m_Config.ValidationRatio = 0.3;        // 30% validation
  608 |     m_Config.CrossValidationFolds = 5;
  609 |     
  610 |     m_Config.GenerateReport = true;
  611 |     m_Config.SaveTrades = true;
  612 |     m_Config.SaveEquityCurve = true;
  613 |     m_Config.SaveDrawdownCurve = true;
  614 |     m_Config.OutputPath = "";
  615 |     
  616 |     m_Config.EnableMultithreading = false;
  617 |     m_Config.MaxThreads = 4;
  618 |     m_Config.EnableCaching = true;
  619 |     m_Config.EnableLogging = true;
  620 |     
  621 |     m_Config.MaxDrawdownPercent = 20.0;    // 20%
  622 |     m_Config.MaxLossPercent = 50.0;        // 50%
  623 |     m_Config.StopOnMaxDrawdown = true;
  624 |     m_Config.StopOnMaxLoss = true;
  625 | }
  626 | 
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  629 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  630 | CBacktestEngine::~CBacktestEngine() {
  631 |     Deinitialize();
  632 | }
  633 | 
  634 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  635 | //| Initialize backtest engine                                     |
  636 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  637 | bool CBacktestEngine::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  638 |     if (context == NULL) {
  639 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  640 |         return false;
  641 |     }
  642 |     
  643 |     m_pContext = context;
  644 |     
  645 |     // Initialize arrays
  646 |     ArrayResize(m_Results, 100);           // Support 100 test results
  647 |     ArrayResize(m_Rates, 100000);          // Support 100k bars
  648 |     ArrayResize(m_Ticks, 1000000);         // Support 1M ticks
  649 |     
  650 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  651 |     m_RateCount = 0;
  652 |     m_TickCount = 0;
  653 |     
  654 |     // Initialize statistics
  655 |     m_Statistics.TotalTests = 0;
  656 |     m_Statistics.CompletedTests = 0;
  657 |     m_Statistics.FailedTests = 0;
  658 |     m_Statistics.CancelledTests = 0;
  659 |     m_Statistics.LastErrorTime = 0;
  660 |     m_Statistics.BestProfitFactor = 0;
  661 |     m_Statistics.BestSharpeRatio = -DBL_MAX;
  662 |     m_Statistics.BestNetProfit = -DBL_MAX;
  663 |     m_Statistics.LowestDrawdown = DBL_MAX;
  664 |     
  665 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  666 |     m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_IDLE;
  667 |     
  668 |     LogActivity("Backtest engine initialized successfully");
  669 |     return true;
  670 | }
  671 | 
  672 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  673 | //| Deinitialize backtest engine                                   |
  674 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  675 | bool CBacktestEngine::Deinitialize() {
  676 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  677 |         StopBacktest();
  678 |         
  679 |         // Clear arrays
  680 |         ArrayFree(m_Results);
  681 |         ArrayFree(m_Rates);
  682 |         ArrayFree(m_Ticks);
  683 |         
  684 |         m_ResultCount = 0;
  685 |         m_RateCount = 0;
  686 |         m_TickCount = 0;
  687 |         
  688 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  689 |         m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_IDLE;
  690 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  691 |         
  692 |         LogActivity("Backtest engine deinitialized");
  693 |     }
  694 |     
  695 |     return true;
  696 | }
  697 | 
  698 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  699 | //| Configure backtest engine                                      |
  700 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  701 | bool CBacktestEngine::Configure(const SBacktestConfig& config) {
  702 |     m_Config = config;
  703 |     
  704 |     // Validate configuration
  705 |     if (m_Config.StartDate >= m_Config.EndDate) {
  706 |         LogError("Invalid date range: start date must be before end date");
  707 |         return false;
  708 |     }
  709 |     
  710 |     if (m_Config.InitialDeposit <= 0) {
  711 |         LogError("Invalid initial deposit: must be positive");
  712 |         return false;
  713 |     }
  714 |     
  715 |     if (m_Config.Leverage <= 0) {
  716 |         LogError("Invalid leverage: must be positive");
  717 |         return false;
  718 |     }
  719 |     
  720 |     if (m_Config.Mode == BACKTEST_MODE_WALK_FORWARD) {
  721 |         if (m_Config.WalkForwardSteps <= 0) {
  722 |             LogError("Invalid walk-forward steps: must be positive");
  723 |             return false;
  724 |         }
  725 |         
  726 |         if (m_Config.InSampleRatio <= 0 || m_Config.InSampleRatio >= 1) {
  727 |             LogError("Invalid in-sample ratio: must be between 0 and 1");
  728 |             return false;
  729 |         }
  730 |     }
  731 |     
  732 |     if (m_Config.Mode == BACKTEST_MODE_MONTE_CARLO) {
  733 |         if (m_Config.MonteCarloRuns <= 0) {
  734 |             LogError("Invalid Monte Carlo runs: must be positive");
  735 |             return false;
  736 |         }
  737 |     }
  738 |     
  739 |     LogActivity("Backtest engine configured successfully");
  740 |     return true;
  741 | }
  742 | 
  743 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  744 | //| Start backtest                                                 |
  745 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  746 | bool CBacktestEngine::StartBacktest() {
  747 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  748 |         LogError("Backtest engine not initialized");
  749 |         return false;
  750 |     }
  751 |     
  752 |     if (m_Status == BACKTEST_STATUS_RUNNING) {
  753 |         LogActivity("Backtest already running");
  754 |         return true;
  755 |     }
  756 |     
  757 |     // Initialize current result
  758 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentResult);
  759 |     m_CurrentResult.TestId = StringFormat("BT_%d_%d", GetTickCount(), MathRand());
  760 |     m_CurrentResult.StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  761 |     m_CurrentResult.Config = m_Config;
  762 |     m_CurrentResult.InitialDeposit = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  763 |     
  764 |     m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_INITIALIZING;
  765 |     m_StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  766 |     m_Statistics.TotalTests++;
  767 |     
  768 |     // Load historical data
  769 |     if (!LoadHistoricalData()) {
  770 |         LogError("Failed to load historical data");
  771 |         m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_ERROR;
  772 |         m_Statistics.FailedTests++;
  773 |         return false;
  774 |     }
  775 |     
  776 |     // Validate data quality
  777 |     if (m_Config.ValidateData && !ValidateData()) {
  778 |         LogError("Data validation failed");
  779 |         m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_ERROR;
  780 |         m_Statistics.FailedTests++;
  781 |         return false;
  782 |     }
  783 |     
  784 |     // Initialize account
  785 |     if (!InitializeAccount()) {
  786 |         LogError("Failed to initialize account");
  787 |         m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_ERROR;
  788 |         m_Statistics.FailedTests++;
  789 |         return false;
  790 |     }
  791 |     
  792 |     m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_RUNNING;
  793 |     
  794 |     // Run backtest based on mode
  795 |     bool success = false;
  796 |     switch (m_Config.Mode) {
  797 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_SINGLE:
  798 |             success = ExecuteOHLC();  // Default execution
  799 |             break;
  800 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_PORTFOLIO:
  801 |             success = RunPortfolioBacktest();
  802 |             break;
  803 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_WALK_FORWARD:
  804 |             success = RunWalkForwardAnalysis();
  805 |             break;
  806 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_MONTE_CARLO:
  807 |             success = RunMonteCarloSimulation();
  808 |             break;
  809 |         default:
  810 |             LogError("Backtest mode not implemented: " + GetBacktestModeName(m_Config.Mode));
  811 |             success = false;
  812 |             break;
  813 |     }
  814 |     
  815 |     if (success) {
  816 |         // Calculate final metrics
  817 |         CalculateMetrics();
  818 |         
  819 |         // Generate report if requested
  820 |         if (m_Config.GenerateReport) {
  821 |             GenerateReport();
  822 |         }
  823 |         
  824 |         m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_COMPLETED;
  825 |         m_Statistics.CompletedTests++;
  826 |         
  827 |         // Store result
  828 |         if (m_ResultCount < ArraySize(m_Results)) {
  829 |             m_Results[m_ResultCount] = m_CurrentResult;
  830 |             m_ResultCount++;
  831 |         }
  832 |         
  833 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Backtest completed successfully. Net profit: %.2f", 
  834 |                                 m_CurrentResult.NetProfit));
  835 |     } else {
  836 |         m_Status = BACKTEST_STATUS_ERROR;
  837 |         m_Statistics.FailedTests++;
  838 |         LogError("Backtest execution failed");
  839 |     }
  840 |     
  841 |     m_CurrentResult.EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  842 |     m_CurrentResult.Duration = (int)(m_CurrentResult.EndTime - m_CurrentResult.StartTime);
  843 |     m_CurrentResult.IsCompleted = success;
  844 |     
  845 |     return success;
  846 | }
  847 | 
  848 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  849 | //| Load historical data                                           |
  850 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  851 | bool CBacktestEngine::LoadHistoricalData() {
  852 |     // Copy rates for the specified period
  853 |     m_RateCount = CopyRates(m_Config.Symbol, m_Config.Timeframe, 
  854 |                            m_Config.StartDate, m_Config.EndDate, m_Rates);
  855 |     
  856 |     if (m_RateCount <= 0) {
  857 |         LogError(StringFormat("Failed to load rates for %s %s", 
  858 |                              m_Config.Symbol, EnumToString(m_Config.Timeframe)));
  859 |         return false;
  860 |     }
  861 |     
  862 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Loaded %d bars for %s %s", 
  863 |                             m_RateCount, m_Config.Symbol, EnumToString(m_Config.Timeframe)));
  864 |     
  865 |     // Load ticks if using real tick execution
  866 |     if (m_Config.ExecutionModel == EXECUTION_MODEL_REAL_TICKS) {
  867 |         m_TickCount = CopyTicks(m_Config.Symbol, m_Ticks, COPY_TICKS_ALL, 
  868 |                                m_Config.StartDate * 1000, m_Config.EndDate * 1000);
  869 |         
  870 |         if (m_TickCount <= 0) {
  871 |             LogActivity("No tick data available, falling back to OHLC execution");
  872 |             m_Config.ExecutionModel = EXECUTION_MODEL_OHLC;
  873 |         } else {
  874 |             LogActivity(StringFormat("Loaded %d ticks for %s", m_TickCount, m_Config.Symbol));
  875 |         }
  876 |     }
  877 |     
  878 |     return true;
  879 | }
  880 | 
  881 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  882 | //| Validate data                                                  |
  883 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  884 | bool CBacktestEngine::ValidateData() {
  885 |     if (m_RateCount == 0) {
  886 |         LogError("No data to validate");
  887 |         return false;
  888 |     }
  889 |     
  890 |     // Assess data quality
  891 |     ENUM_DATA_QUALITY quality = AssessDataQuality();
  892 |     m_CurrentResult.DataQuality = quality;
  893 |     
  894 |     if (m_Config.RequireMinDataQuality && quality < m_Config.MinDataQuality) {
  895 |         LogError(StringFormat("Data quality %s is below minimum required %s", 
  896 |                              GetDataQualityName(quality), 
  897 |                              GetDataQualityName(m_Config.MinDataQuality)));
  898 |         return false;
  899 |     }
  900 |     
  901 |     // Fill data gaps if requested
  902 |     if (m_Config.FillDataGaps) {
  903 |         FillDataGaps();
  904 |     }
  905 |     
  906 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Data validation completed. Quality: %s", 
  907 |                             GetDataQualityName(quality)));
  908 |     return true;
  909 | }
  910 | 
  911 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  912 | //| Initialize account                                             |
  913 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  914 | bool CBacktestEngine::InitializeAccount() {
  915 |     m_Balance = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  916 |     m_Equity = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  917 |     m_Margin = 0;
  918 |     m_FreeMargin = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  919 |     m_MaxDrawdown = 0;
  920 |     m_CurrentDrawdown = 0;
  921 |     
  922 |     m_CurrentResult.InitialDeposit = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  923 |     m_CurrentResult.FinalBalance = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  924 |     m_CurrentResult.MaxBalance = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  925 |     m_CurrentResult.MinBalance = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  926 |     
  927 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Account initialized with balance: %.2f %s", 
  928 |                             m_Balance, m_Config.Currency));
  929 |     return true;
  930 | }
  931 | 
  932 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  933 | //| Assess data quality                                            |
  934 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  935 | ENUM_DATA_QUALITY CBacktestEngine::AssessDataQuality() {
  936 |     if (m_RateCount == 0) {
  937 |         return DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT;
  938 |     }
  939 |     
  940 |     int gaps = 0;
  941 |     int suspicious = 0;
  942 |     
  943 |     // Check for data gaps and suspicious values
  944 |     for (int i = 1; i < m_RateCount; i++) {
  945 |         // Check for time gaps
  946 |         int expectedInterval = PeriodSeconds(m_Config.Timeframe);
  947 |         int actualInterval = (int)(m_Rates[i].time - m_Rates[i-1].time);
  948 |         
  949 |         if (actualInterval > expectedInterval * 1.5) {
  950 |             gaps++;
  951 |         }
  952 |         
  953 |         // Check for suspicious price movements
  954 |         double priceChange = MathAbs(m_Rates[i].close - m_Rates[i-1].close) / m_Rates[i-1].close;
  955 |         if (priceChange > 0.1) {  // 10% price change
  956 |             suspicious++;
  957 |         }
  958 |         
  959 |         // Check for zero spreads or invalid OHLC
  960 |         if (m_Rates[i].high < m_Rates[i].low || 
  961 |             m_Rates[i].open < m_Rates[i].low || m_Rates[i].open > m_Rates[i].high ||
  962 |             m_Rates[i].close < m_Rates[i].low || m_Rates[i].close > m_Rates[i].high) {
  963 |             suspicious++;
  964 |         }
  965 |     }
  966 |     
  967 |     m_CurrentResult.DataGaps = gaps;
  968 |     m_CurrentResult.SuspiciousTicks = suspicious;
  969 |     m_CurrentResult.DataCoverage = (double)(m_RateCount - gaps) / m_RateCount * 100.0;
  970 |     
  971 |     // Determine quality based on gaps and suspicious data
  972 |     double gapRatio = (double)gaps / m_RateCount;
  973 |     double suspiciousRatio = (double)suspicious / m_RateCount;
  974 |     
  975 |     if (gapRatio < 0.01 && suspiciousRatio < 0.001) {
  976 |         return DATA_QUALITY_EXCELLENT;
  977 |     } else if (gapRatio < 0.05 && suspiciousRatio < 0.01) {
  978 |         return DATA_QUALITY_GOOD;
  979 |     } else if (gapRatio < 0.1 && suspiciousRatio < 0.05) {
  980 |         return DATA_QUALITY_FAIR;
  981 |     } else if (gapRatio < 0.2 && suspiciousRatio < 0.1) {
  982 |         return DATA_QUALITY_POOR;
  983 |     } else {
  984 |         return DATA_QUALITY_CORRUPTED;
  985 |     }
  986 | }
  987 |

  993 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("BacktestEngine: " + message);
  994 |     } else {
  995 |         Print("BacktestEngine ERROR: ", message);
  996 |     }
  997 |     
  998 |     m_Statistics.TotalErrors++;
  999 |     m_Statistics.LastError = message;
 1000 |     m_Statistics.LastErrorTime = TimeCurrent();
 1001 | }

 1064 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1065 | //| Placeholder implementations for remaining methods              |
 1066 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1067 | bool CBacktestEngine::ExecuteOHLC() {
 1068 |     // Placeholder implementation for OHLC execution
 1069 |     LogActivity("Executing backtest using OHLC prices");
 1070 |     
 1071 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_RateCount; i++) {
 1072 |         // Simulate processing each bar
 1073 |         if (i % 1000 == 0) {
 1074 |             double progress = (double)i / m_RateCount * 100.0;
 1075 |             m_Statistics.ProgressPercent = progress;
 1076 |         }
 1077 |         
 1078 |         // Update account equity (placeholder)
 1079 |         UpdateAccount();
 1080 |         
 1081 |         // Check stop conditions
 1082 |         if (m_Config.StopOnMaxDrawdown && m_CurrentDrawdown > m_Config.MaxDrawdownPercent) {
 1083 |             LogActivity("Stopped due to maximum drawdown exceeded");
 1084 |             break;
 1085 |         }
 1086 |         
 1087 |         if (m_Config.StopOnMaxLoss && (m_Balance / m_Config.InitialDeposit - 1) * 100 < -m_Config.MaxLossPercent) {
 1088 |             LogActivity("Stopped due to maximum loss exceeded");
 1089 |             break;
 1090 |         }
 1091 |     }
 1092 |     
 1093 |     return true;
 1094 | }
 1095 | 
 1096 | bool CBacktestEngine::UpdateAccount() {
 1097 |     // Placeholder implementation
 1098 |     // In real implementation, this would update balance, equity, margin, etc.
 1099 |     // based on open positions and current prices
 1100 |     
 1101 |     m_CurrentResult.FinalBalance = m_Balance;
 1102 |     if (m_Balance > m_CurrentResult.MaxBalance) {
 1103 |         m_CurrentResult.MaxBalance = m_Balance;
 1104 |     }
 1105 |     if (m_Balance < m_CurrentResult.MinBalance) {
 1106 |         m_CurrentResult.MinBalance = m_Balance;
 1107 |     }
 1108 |     
 1109 |     // Calculate drawdown
 1110 |     m_CurrentDrawdown = (m_CurrentResult.MaxBalance - m_Balance) / m_CurrentResult.MaxBalance * 100.0;
 1111 |     if (m_CurrentDrawdown > m_MaxDrawdown) {
 1112 |         m_MaxDrawdown = m_CurrentDrawdown;
 1113 |         m_CurrentResult.MaxDrawdown = m_MaxDrawdown;
 1114 |         m_CurrentResult.MaxDrawdownPercent = m_MaxDrawdown;
 1115 |     }
 1116 |     
 1117 |     return true;
 1118 | }
 1119 | 
 1120 | bool CBacktestEngine::CalculateMetrics() {
 1121 |     // Placeholder implementation for calculating performance metrics
 1122 |     m_CurrentResult.NetProfit = m_CurrentResult.FinalBalance - m_CurrentResult.InitialDeposit;
 1123 |     m_CurrentResult.TotalProfit = MathMax(0, m_CurrentResult.NetProfit);
 1124 |     m_CurrentResult.TotalLoss = MathMin(0, m_CurrentResult.NetProfit);
 1125 |     
 1126 |     if (MathAbs(m_CurrentResult.TotalLoss) > 0) {
 1127 |         m_CurrentResult.ProfitFactor = m_CurrentResult.TotalProfit / MathAbs(m_CurrentResult.TotalLoss);
 1128 |     } else {
 1129 |         m_CurrentResult.ProfitFactor = (m_CurrentResult.TotalProfit > 0) ? 1000.0 : 1.0;
 1130 |     }
 1131 |     
 1132 |     if (m_CurrentResult.MaxDrawdown > 0) {
 1133 |         m_CurrentResult.RecoveryFactor = m_CurrentResult.NetProfit / m_CurrentResult.MaxDrawdown;
 1134 |     } else {
 1135 |         m_CurrentResult.RecoveryFactor = (m_CurrentResult.NetProfit > 0) ? 1000.0 : 0.0;
 1136 |     }
 1137 |     
 1138 |     // Update statistics
 1139 |     if (m_CurrentResult.ProfitFactor > m_Statistics.BestProfitFactor) {
 1140 |         m_Statistics.BestProfitFactor = m_CurrentResult.ProfitFactor;
 1141 |     }
 1142 |     
 1143 |     if (m_CurrentResult.NetProfit > m_Statistics.BestNetProfit) {
 1144 |         m_Statistics.BestNetProfit = m_CurrentResult.NetProfit;
 1145 |     }
 1146 |     
 1147 |     if (m_CurrentResult.MaxDrawdown < m_Statistics.LowestDrawdown) {
 1148 |         m_Statistics.LowestDrawdown = m_CurrentResult.MaxDrawdown;
 1149 |     }
 1150 |     
 1151 |     m_CurrentResult.IsValid = true;
 1152 |     return true;
 1153 | }

   57 | struct STradeScenario {

   59 |     double                AvgWin;               // Average winning trade
   60 |     double                AvgLoss;              // Average losing trade
   61 |     double                WinStdDev;            // Win standard deviation
   62 |     double                LossStdDev;           // Loss standard deviation
