   84 | struct SMonteCarloResult {
   85 |     // Basic Statistics
   86 |     double                ExpectedReturn;       // Expected return
   87 |     double                StandardDeviation;    // Standard deviation
   88 |     double                Variance;             // Variance
   89 |     double                MedianReturn;         // Median return
   90 |     double                ModeReturn;           // Mode return
   91 |     
   92 |     // Risk Metrics
   93 |     double                MaxDrawdown;          // Maximum drawdown
   94 |     double                MaxDrawdownDuration;  // Max DD duration (days)
   95 |     double                VaR95;                // Value at Risk 95%
   96 |     double                VaR99;                // Value at Risk 99%
   97 |     double                VaR999;               // Value at Risk 99.9%
   98 |     double                CVaR95;               // Conditional VaR 95%
   99 |     double                CVaR99;               // Conditional VaR 99%
  100 |     double                CVaR999;              // Conditional VaR 99.9%
  101 |     
  102 |     // Performance Metrics
  103 |     double                SharpeRatio;          // Sharpe ratio
  104 |     double                SortinoRatio;         // Sortino ratio
  105 |     double                CalmarRatio;          // Calmar ratio
  106 |     double                SterlingRatio;        // Sterling ratio
  107 |     double                BurkeRatio;           // Burke ratio
  108 |     double                TreynorRatio;         // Treynor ratio
  109 |     
  110 |     // Distribution Metrics
  111 |     double                Skewness;             // Skewness
  112 |     double                Kurtosis;             // Kurtosis
  113 |     double                JarqueBeraTest;       // Jarque-Bera normality test
  114 |     bool                  IsNormalDistribution; // Is normally distributed
  115 |     
  116 |     // Probability Metrics
  117 |     double                ProbabilityOfProfit;  // Probability of profit
  118 |     double                ProbabilityOfLoss;    // Probability of loss
  119 |     double                ProbabilityOfRuin;    // Probability of ruin
  120 |     double                ProbabilityTarget50;  // Prob of 50% gain
  121 |     double                ProbabilityTarget100; // Prob of 100% gain
  122 |     
  123 |     // Extreme Scenarios
  124 |     double                WorstCaseScenario;    // Worst case scenario
  125 |     double                BestCaseScenario;     // Best case scenario
  126 |     double                Percentile1;          // 1st percentile
  127 |     double                Percentile5;          // 5th percentile
  128 |     double                Percentile95;         // 95th percentile
  129 |     double                Percentile99;         // 99th percentile
  130 |     
  131 |     // Recovery Analysis
  132 |     double                MaxConsecutiveLoss;   // Max consecutive loss
  133 |     double                RecoveryTime;         // Expected recovery time
  134 |     double                TimeToTarget;         // Time to reach target
  135 |     double                UnderwaterPeriods;    // Underwater periods count
  136 |     
  137 |     // Confidence & Quality
  138 |     double                ConfidenceLevel;      // Confidence level
  139 |     double                StandardError;        // Standard error
  140 |     double                MonteCarloError;      // MC estimation error
  141 |     int                   TotalSimulations;     // Total simulations run
  142 |     ENUM_STRESS_SCENARIO  StressScenario;      // Applied stress scenario
  143 |     
  144 |     // Assessment & Recommendations
  145 |     string                RiskAssessment;       // Risk assessment text
  146 |     string                PerformanceGrade;     // Performance grade (A-F)
  147 |     string                ActionableInsights;   // Actionable insights
  148 |     string                WarningFlags;         // Warning flags
  149 |     datetime              CalculationTime;      // When calculated
  150 |     int                   CalculationDuration;  // Calculation time (ms)
  151 | };
  152 | 
  153 | struct SSimulationConfig {
  154 |     int                   TotalSimulations;     // Number of simulations
  155 |     ENUM_SIMULATION_TYPE  SimulationType;      // Simulation methodology
  156 |     ENUM_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE DefaultDistribution; // Default distribution
  157 |     bool                  UseAntitheticVariates; // Use antithetic variates
  158 |     bool                  UseControlVariates;   // Use control variates
  159 |     double                ConfidenceLevel;      // Confidence level
  160 |     int                   WarmupPeriod;         // Warmup period
  161 |     int                   MaxIterations;        // Maximum iterations
  162 |     double                ConvergenceTolerance; // Convergence tolerance
  163 |     bool                  EnableParallelProcessing; // Enable parallel processing
  164 |     bool                  UseProgressiveRefinement; // Progressive refinement
  165 |     int                   RandomSeed;           // Random seed (0 = auto)
  166 |     bool                  SaveIntermediateResults; // Save intermediate results
  167 |     string                OutputPath;           // Output file path
  168 | };
  169 | 
  170 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  171 | //| CMonteCarloSimulator - Advanced Risk Simulation Engine          |
  172 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  173 | class CMonteCarloSimulator {
  174 | private:
  175 |     EAContext*            m_pContext;           // Reference to EA context
  176 |     bool                  m_bInitialized;      // Initialization status
  177 |     
  178 |     // Configuration
  179 |     SSimulationConfig     m_Config;             // Simulation configuration
  180 |     STradeScenario        m_BaseScenario;       // Base trading scenario
  181 |     SMarketConditions     m_MarketConditions;   // Market conditions
  182 |     
  183 |     // Simulation Data
  184 |     double                m_Results[];          // Simulation results array
  185 |     double                m_DrawdownSeries[];   // Drawdown time series
  186 |     double                m_EquityCurve[];      // Equity curve data
  187 |     double                m_Returns[];          // Returns series
  188 |     
  189 |     // Statistical Buffers
  190 |     double                m_SortedResults[];    // Sorted results for VaR
  191 |     double                m_CumulativeReturns[]; // Cumulative returns
  192 |     int                   m_PositiveCount;      // Positive outcomes count
  193 |     int                   m_NegativeCount;      // Negative outcomes count
  194 |     
  195 |     // Performance Tracking
  196 |     datetime              m_StartTime;          // Simulation start time
  197 |     datetime              m_EndTime;            // Simulation end time
  198 |     int                   m_CurrentIteration;   // Current iteration
  199 |     double                m_ConvergenceValue;   // Convergence value
  200 |     bool                  m_HasConverged;       // Convergence flag
  201 |     
  202 |     // Random Number Generation
  203 |     int                   m_RandomSeed;         // Current random seed
  204 |     double                m_NormalSpare;        // Spare normal variate
  205 |     bool                  m_HasNormalSpare;     // Has spare flag
  206 |     
  207 |     // Memory Management
  208 |     int                   m_MaxArraySize;       // Maximum array size
  209 |     bool                  m_MemoryOptimized;    // Memory optimization flag
  210 |     
  211 | public:
  212 |     //--- Constructor/Destructor ---
  213 |     CMonteCarloSimulator();
  214 |     ~CMonteCarloSimulator();
  215 |     
  216 |     //--- Core Methods ---
  217 |     bool                  Initialize(EAContext* pContext, const SSimulationConfig& config);
  218 |     void                  Deinitialize();
  219 |     bool                  IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  220 |     
  221 |     //--- Configuration ---
  222 |     bool                  SetBaseScenario(const STradeScenario& scenario);
  223 |     bool                  SetMarketConditions(const SMarketConditions& conditions);
  224 |     bool                  SetConfiguration(const SSimulationConfig& config);
  225 |     STradeScenario        GetBaseScenario() const { return m_BaseScenario; }
  226 |     SMarketConditions     GetMarketConditions() const { return m_MarketConditions; }
  227 |     SSimulationConfig     GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  228 |     
  229 |     //--- Main Simulation Methods ---
  230 |     bool                  RunStandardSimulation(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  231 |     bool                  RunStressTest(SMonteCarloResult& result, ENUM_STRESS_SCENARIO scenario);
  232 |     bool                  RunOptimisticScenario(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  233 |     bool                  RunPessimisticScenario(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  234 |     bool                  RunCustomScenario(SMonteCarloResult& result, const STradeScenario& custom_scenario);
  235 |     
  236 |     //--- Advanced Analysis ---
  237 |     bool                  RunMultiScenarioAnalysis(SMonteCarloResult results[], int& count);
  238 |     bool                  RunSensitivityAnalysis(SMonteCarloResult& result, const string& parameter);
  239 |     bool                  RunStabilityTest(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  240 |     bool                  ValidateStrategyRobustness(double min_sharpe = 1.0, double max_drawdown = 0.20);
  241 |     
  242 |     //--- Risk Assessment ---
  243 |     bool                  CalculateRiskMetrics(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  244 |     bool                  CalculateAdvancedMetrics(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  245 |     bool                  AnalyzeExtremeScenarios(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  246 |     bool                  EstimateRecoveryMetrics(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  247 |     
  248 |     //--- Reporting & Output ---
  249 |     string                GenerateDetailedReport(const SMonteCarloResult& result);
  250 |     string                GenerateExecutiveSummary(const SMonteCarloResult& result);
  251 |     string                GenerateRiskReport(const SMonteCarloResult& result);
  252 |     bool                  SaveResults(const SMonteCarloResult& result, const string& filename = "");
  253 |     bool                  ExportToCSV(const SMonteCarloResult& result, const string& filename = "");
  254 |

  257 |     double                GetProgress() const;

  259 |     int                   GetCurrentIteration() const { return m_CurrentIteration; }
  260 |

  263 |     double                SimulateTradingSequence(const STradeScenario& scenario, const SMarketConditions& conditions);
  264 |     double                GenerateTradeOutcome(const STradeScenario& scenario, bool is_win);
  265 |     bool                  SimulateMarketStress(SMarketConditions& conditions, ENUM_STRESS_SCENARIO scenario);
  266 |     
  267 |     //--- Statistical Calculations ---
  268 |     void                  CalculateBasicStatistics(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  269 |     void                  CalculateRiskStatistics(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  270 |     void                  CalculatePerformanceRatios(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  271 |     void                  CalculateDistributionMetrics(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  272 |     void                  CalculateProbabilityMetrics(SMonteCarloResult& result);
  273 |     
  274 |     //--- Distribution Functions ---
  275 |     double                GenerateNormal(double mean, double std_dev);
  276 |     double                GenerateLogNormal(double mean, double std_dev);
  277 |     double                GenerateStudentT(double degrees_freedom);
  278 |     double                GenerateLaplace(double mean, double scale);
  279 |     double                GeneratePareto(double scale, double shape);
  280 |     double                GenerateWeibull(double scale, double shape);
  281 |     
  282 |     //--- Value at Risk Calculations ---
  283 |     double                CalculateVaR(double confidence_level);
  284 |     double                CalculateConditionalVaR(double confidence_level);
  285 |     double                CalculateExpectedShortfall(double confidence_level);
  286 |     
  287 |     //--- Performance Ratios ---
  288 |     double                CalculateSharpeRatio(double mean_return, double std_dev, double risk_free_rate = 0.0);
  289 |     double                CalculateSortinoRatio(double mean_return, double downside_deviation);
  290 |     double                CalculateCalmarRatio(double mean_return, double max_drawdown);
  291 |     double                CalculateSterlingRatio(double mean_return, double max_drawdown);
  292 |     double                CalculateBurkeRatio(double mean_return, double drawdown_squared_sum);
  293 |     
  294 |     //--- Statistical Tests ---
  295 |     double                CalculateJarqueBeraTest();
  296 |     bool                  TestNormality(double significance_level = 0.05);
  297 |     double                CalculateSkewness();
  298 |     double                CalculateKurtosis();
  299 |     
  300 |     //--- Risk Assessment ---
  301 |     string                GenerateRiskAssessment(const SMonteCarloResult& result);
  302 |     string                GeneratePerformanceGrade(const SMonteCarloResult& result);
  303 |     string                GenerateActionableInsights(const SMonteCarloResult& result);
  304 |     string                GenerateWarningFlags(const SMonteCarloResult& result);
  305 |     
  306 |     //--- Convergence & Optimization ---
  307 |     bool                  CheckConvergence();
  308 |     void                  UpdateConvergenceMetrics();
  309 |     bool                  OptimizeMemoryUsage();
  310 |     
  311 |     //--- Utility Functions ---
  312 |     void                  LogSimulationEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  313 |     void                  ValidateInputs();
  314 |     void                  InitializeArrays();
  315 |     void                  CleanupArrays();
  316 |     double                NormalCDF(double x);
  317 |     double                InverseNormalCDF(double p);
  318 |     
  319 |     //--- Memory Management ---
  320 |     bool                  AllocateMemory();
  321 |     void                  FreeMemory();
  322 |     bool                  ResizeArrays(int new_size);
  323 | };
  324 | 
  325 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  326 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  327 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  328 | CMonteCarloSimulator::CMonteCarloSimulator() : 
  329 |     m_pContext(NULL),
  330 |     m_bInitialized(false),
  331 |     m_CurrentIteration(0),
  332 |     m_HasConverged(false),
  333 |     m_PositiveCount(0),
  334 |     m_NegativeCount(0),
  335 |     m_MaxArraySize(1000000),
  336 |     m_MemoryOptimized(false),
  337 |     m_HasNormalSpare(false),
  338 |     m_NormalSpare(0.0),
  339 |     m_RandomSeed(0),
  340 |     m_ConvergenceValue(0.0)
  341 | {
  342 |     // Initialize with default configuration
  343 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  344 |     ZeroMemory(m_BaseScenario);
  345 |     ZeroMemory(m_MarketConditions);
  346 | }
  347 | 
  348 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  349 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  350 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  351 | CMonteCarloSimulator::~CMonteCarloSimulator() {
  352 |     Deinitialize();
  353 | }
  354 | 
  355 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  356 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  357 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  358 | bool CMonteCarloSimulator::Initialize(EAContext* pContext, const SSimulationConfig& config) {
  359 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  360 |         return true;
  361 |     }
  362 |     
  363 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  364 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  365 |         Print("[MONTE_CARLO] Context is NULL");
  366 |         return false;
  367 |     }
  368 |     
  369 |     // Set configuration
  370 |     m_Config = config;
  371 | 
  372 |     // Set default base scenario if not provided
  373 |     m_BaseScenario.WinRate = 0.55;
  374 |     m_BaseScenario.AvgWin = 100.0;
  375 |     m_BaseScenario.AvgLoss = -80.0;
  376 |     m_BaseScenario.WinStdDev = 30.0;
  377 |     m_BaseScenario.LossStdDev = 20.0;
  378 |     m_BaseScenario.MaxConsecutiveLosses = 8;
  379 |     m_BaseScenario.MaxConsecutiveWins = 12;
  380 |     m_BaseScenario.TotalTrades = 1000;
  381 |     m_BaseScenario.WinDistribution = DIST_NORMAL;
  382 |     m_BaseScenario.LossDistribution = DIST_NORMAL;
  383 |     
  384 |     // Set default market conditions
  385 |     m_MarketConditions.VolatilityMultiplier = 1.0;
  386 |     m_MarketConditions.TrendStrength = 0.5;
  387 |     m_MarketConditions.LiquidityFactor = 1.0;
  388 |     m_MarketConditions.SpreadMultiplier = 1.0;
  389 |     m_MarketConditions.IsSessionActive = true;
  390 |     m_MarketConditions.StressScenario = STRESS_NORMAL;
  391 | 
  392 |     ValidateInputs();
  393 |     
  394 |     // Initialize random seed
  395 |     if (m_Config.RandomSeed == 0) {
  396 |         m_RandomSeed = (int)TimeCurrent();
  397 |     } else {
  398 |         m_RandomSeed = m_Config.RandomSeed;
  399 |     }
  400 |     MathSrand(m_RandomSeed);
  401 |     
  402 |     // Allocate memory
  403 |     if (!AllocateMemory()) {
  404 |         LogSimulationEvent("Failed to allocate memory", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  405 |         return false;
  406 |     }
  407 |     
  408 |     // Initialize arrays
  409 |     InitializeArrays();
  410 |     
  411 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  412 |     
  413 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  414 |         string init_msg = StringFormat("Monte Carlo Simulator initialized: %d simulations, Type: %d, Seed: %d",
  415 |                                       m_Config.TotalSimulations, (int)m_Config.SimulationType, m_RandomSeed);
  416 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(init_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  417 |     }
  418 |     
  419 |     return true;
  420 | }
  421 | 
  422 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  423 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  424 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  425 | void CMonteCarloSimulator::Deinitialize() {
  426 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  427 |         return;
  428 |     }
  429 |     
  430 |     // Log final statistics
  431 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  432 |         string final_msg = StringFormat("Monte Carlo completed: %d iterations, Converged: %s",
  433 |                                        m_CurrentIteration, m_HasConverged ? "Yes" : "No");
  434 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(final_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  435 |     }
  436 |     
  437 |     // Free memory
  438 |     FreeMemory();
  439 |     
  440 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  444 | //| Run Standard Simulation                                          |
  445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  446 | bool CMonteCarloSimulator::RunStandardSimulation(SMonteCarloResult& result) {
  447 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  448 |         LogSimulationEvent("Simulator not initialized", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  449 |         return false;
  450 |     }
  451 |     
  452 |     m_StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  453 |     
  454 |     LogSimulationEvent(StringFormat("Starting standard Monte Carlo simulation: %d runs", 
  455 |                                    m_Config.TotalSimulations), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  456 |     
  457 |     // Reset counters
  458 |     m_CurrentIteration = 0;
  459 |     m_PositiveCount = 0;
  460 |     m_NegativeCount = 0;
  461 |     m_HasConverged = false;
  462 |     
  463 |     // Run simulations
  464 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_Config.TotalSimulations; i++) {
  465 |         m_Results[i] = SimulateTradingSequence(m_BaseScenario, m_MarketConditions);
  466 |         
  467 |         if (m_Results[i] > 0) {
  468 |             m_PositiveCount++;
  469 |         } else {
  470 |             m_NegativeCount++;
  471 |         }
  472 |         
  473 |         m_CurrentIteration = i + 1;
  474 |         
  475 |         // Check convergence periodically
  476 |         if (m_Config.ConvergenceTolerance > 0 && (i + 1) % 1000 == 0) {
  477 |             if (CheckConvergence()) {
  478 |                 m_HasConverged = true;
  479 |                 LogSimulationEvent(StringFormat("Converged after %d iterations", i + 1), LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  480 |                 break;
  481 |             }
  482 |         }
  483 |         
  484 |         // Log progress
  485 |         if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL && (i + 1) % 2000 == 0) {
  486 |             double progress = (double)(i + 1) / m_Config.TotalSimulations * 100.0;
  487 |             string progress_msg = StringFormat("Progress: %.1f%% (%d/%d)", 
  488 |                                              progress, i + 1, m_Config.TotalSimulations);
  489 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug(progress_msg, __FUNCTION__);
  490 |         }
  491 |     }
  492 |     
  493 |     m_EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  494 |     
  495 |     // Calculate all statistics
  496 |     CalculateBasicStatistics(result);
  497 |     CalculateRiskStatistics(result);
  498 |     CalculatePerformanceRatios(result);
  499 |     CalculateDistributionMetrics(result);
  500 |     CalculateProbabilityMetrics(result);
  501 |     
  502 |     // Generate assessments
  503 |     result.RiskAssessment = GenerateRiskAssessment(result);
  504 |     result.PerformanceGrade = GeneratePerformanceGrade(result);
  505 |     result.ActionableInsights = GenerateActionableInsights(result);
  506 |     result.WarningFlags = GenerateWarningFlags(result);
  507 |     
  508 |     // Set metadata
  509 |     result.TotalSimulations = m_CurrentIteration;
  510 |     result.CalculationTime = m_EndTime;
  511 |     result.CalculationDuration = (int)(m_EndTime - m_StartTime);
  512 |     result.StressScenario = m_MarketConditions.StressScenario;
  513 |     
  514 |     LogSimulationEvent(StringFormat("Simulation completed: Expected Return=%.2f, Sharpe=%.3f, Max DD=%.2f%%",
  515 |                                    result.ExpectedReturn, result.SharpeRatio, result.MaxDrawdown * 100),
  516 |                       LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  517 |     
  518 |     return true;
  519 | }
  520 | 
  521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  522 | //| Internal Methods Implementation                                  |
  523 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  524 | 
  525 | double CMonteCarloSimulator::SimulateTradingSequence(const STradeScenario& scenario, const SMarketConditions& conditions) {
  526 |     double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  527 |     if (balance <= 0) balance = 10000.0; // Default balance
  528 |     
  529 |     double starting_balance = balance;
  530 |     double peak_balance = balance;
  531 |     double max_drawdown = 0.0;
  532 |     
  533 |     int consecutive_wins = 0;
  534 |     int consecutive_losses = 0;
  535 |     
  536 |     // Simulate trades
  537 |     for (int i = 0; i < scenario.TotalTrades; i++) {
  538 |         bool is_win = (MathRand() / 32767.0) <= scenario.WinRate;
  539 |         
  540 |         // Apply consecutive limits
  541 |         if (is_win) {
  542 |             consecutive_wins++;
  543 |             consecutive_losses = 0;
  544 |             
  545 |             if (consecutive_wins > scenario.MaxConsecutiveWins) {
  546 |                 is_win = false;
  547 |                 consecutive_wins = 0;
  548 |                 consecutive_losses = 1;
  549 |             }
  550 |         } else {
  551 |             consecutive_losses++;
  552 |             consecutive_wins = 0;
  553 |             
  554 |             if (consecutive_losses > scenario.MaxConsecutiveLosses) {
  555 |                 is_win = true;
  556 |                 consecutive_losses = 0;
  557 |                 consecutive_wins = 1;
  558 |             }
  559 |         }
  560 |         
  561 |         // Generate trade outcome
  562 |         double trade_result = GenerateTradeOutcome(scenario, is_win);
  563 |         
  564 |         // Apply market conditions stress
  565 |         trade_result *= conditions.VolatilityMultiplier;
  566 |         if (!conditions.IsSessionActive) {
  567 |             trade_result *= 0.8; // Reduced performance outside session
  568 |         }
  569 |         
  570 |         // Apply slippage and commission
  571 |         if (trade_result > 0) {
  572 |             trade_result *= (1.0 - scenario.SlippagePercent / 100.0);
  573 |         } else {
  574 |             trade_result *= (1.0 + scenario.SlippagePercent / 100.0);
  575 |         }
  576 |         trade_result -= scenario.CommissionPerTrade;
  577 |         
  578 |         balance += trade_result;
  579 |         
  580 |         // Update peak and drawdown
  581 |         if (balance > peak_balance) {
  582 |             peak_balance = balance;
  583 |         } else {
  584 |             double current_dd = (peak_balance - balance) / peak_balance;
  585 |             if (current_dd > max_drawdown) {
  586 |                 max_drawdown = current_dd;
  587 |             }
  588 |         }
  589 |         
  590 |         // Check for margin call
  591 |         if (balance <= starting_balance * 0.1) {
  592 |             break; // Stop simulation if severely undercapitalized
  593 |         }
  594 |     }
  595 |     
  596 |     return balance - starting_balance;
  597 | }
  598 | 
  599 | double CMonteCarloSimulator::GenerateTradeOutcome(const STradeScenario& scenario, bool is_win) {
  600 |     if (is_win) {
  601 |         switch (scenario.WinDistribution) {
  602 |             case DIST_NORMAL:
  603 |                 return GenerateNormal(scenario.AvgWin, scenario.WinStdDev);
  604 |             case DIST_LOG_NORMAL:
  605 |                 return GenerateLogNormal(scenario.AvgWin, scenario.WinStdDev);
  606 |             default:
  607 |                 return GenerateNormal(scenario.AvgWin, scenario.WinStdDev);
  608 |         }
  609 |     } else {
  610 |         switch (scenario.LossDistribution) {
  611 |             case DIST_NORMAL:
  612 |                 return GenerateNormal(scenario.AvgLoss, scenario.LossStdDev);
  613 |             case DIST_LOG_NORMAL:
  614 |                 return -MathAbs(GenerateLogNormal(MathAbs(scenario.AvgLoss), scenario.LossStdDev));
  615 |             default:
  616 |                 return GenerateNormal(scenario.AvgLoss, scenario.LossStdDev);
  617 |         }
  618 |     }
  619 | }
  620 | 
  621 | double CMonteCarloSimulator::GenerateNormal(double mean, double std_dev) {
  622 |     if (m_HasNormalSpare) {
  623 |         m_HasNormalSpare = false;
  624 |         return m_NormalSpare * std_dev + mean;
  625 |     }
  626 |     
  627 |     m_HasNormalSpare = true;
  628 |     
  629 |     double u = (double)MathRand() / 32767.0;
  630 |     double v = (double)MathRand() / 32767.0;
  631 |     
  632 |     double mag = std_dev * MathSqrt(-2.0 * MathLog(u));
  633 |     m_NormalSpare = mag * MathCos(2.0 * M_PI * v);
  634 |     
  635 |     return mag * MathSin(2.0 * M_PI * v) + mean;
  636 | }
  637 | 
  638 | void CMonteCarloSimulator::CalculateBasicStatistics(SMonteCarloResult& result) {
  639 |     // Sort results for percentile calculations
  640 |     ArrayCopy(m_SortedResults, m_Results, 0, 0, m_CurrentIteration);
  641 |     ArraySort(m_SortedResults, m_CurrentIteration);
  642 |     
  643 |     // Basic statistics
  644 |     double sum = 0.0;
  645 |     double sum_squares = 0.0;
  646 |     
  647 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CurrentIteration; i++) {
  648 |         sum += m_Results[i];
  649 |         sum_squares += m_Results[i] * m_Results[i];
  650 |     }
  651 |     
  652 |     result.ExpectedReturn = sum / m_CurrentIteration;
  653 |     result.Variance = (sum_squares / m_CurrentIteration) - (result.ExpectedReturn * result.ExpectedReturn);
  654 |     result.StandardDeviation = MathSqrt(result.Variance);
  655 |     
  656 |     // Median
  657 |     int median_idx = m_CurrentIteration / 2;
  658 |     if (m_CurrentIteration % 2 == 0) {
  659 |         result.MedianReturn = (m_SortedResults[median_idx - 1] + m_SortedResults[median_idx]) / 2.0;
  660 |     } else {
  661 |         result.MedianReturn = m_SortedResults[median_idx];
  662 |     }
  663 |     
  664 |     // Extremes
  665 |     result.WorstCaseScenario = m_SortedResults[0];
  666 |     result.BestCaseScenario = m_SortedResults[m_CurrentIteration - 1];
  667 |     
  668 |     // Percentiles
  669 |     result.Percentile1 = m_SortedResults[(int)(m_CurrentIteration * 0.01)];
  670 |     result.Percentile5 = m_SortedResults[(int)(m_CurrentIteration * 0.05)];
  671 |     result.Percentile95 = m_SortedResults[(int)(m_CurrentIteration * 0.95)];
  672 |     result.Percentile99 = m_SortedResults[(int)(m_CurrentIteration * 0.99)];
  673 | }
  674 | 
  675 | void CMonteCarloSimulator::LogSimulationEvent(const string& event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  676 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  677 |         switch(level) {
  678 |             case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  679 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  680 |                 break;
  681 |             case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  682 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  683 |                 break;
  684 |             case LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG:
  685 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug(event, __FUNCTION__);
  686 |                 break;
  687 |             default:
  688 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  689 |         }
  690 |     }
  691 | }
  692 | 
  693 | 
  694 | 
  695 | #endif // MONTE_CARLO_SIMULATOR_MQH_

   20 | // Parameter optimization configuration
   21 | struct SParameterOptimization {
   22 |     string ParameterName;                // Parameter name
   23 |     double MinValue;                     // Minimum value
   24 |     double MaxValue;                     // Maximum value
   25 |     double StepSize;                     // Step size for optimization
   26 |     double CurrentValue;                 // Current optimal value
   27 |     double OptimalValue;                 // Best found value
   28 |     bool IsEnabled;                      // Enable optimization for this parameter
   29 |     ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_TYPE OptType;      // Optimization type
   30 |     
   31 |     void Reset() {
   32 |         ParameterName = "";
   33 |         MinValue = 0.0;
   34 |         MaxValue = 0.0;
   35 |         StepSize = 0.0;
   36 |         CurrentValue = 0.0;
   37 |         OptimalValue = 0.0;
   38 |         IsEnabled = false;
   39 |         OptType = OPTIMIZATION_GENETIC;
   40 |     }
   41 | };
   42 | 
   43 | // Optimization result structure
   44 | struct SOptimizationResult {
   45 |     double ParameterValues[];            // Parameter set
   46 |     double ProfitFactor;                 // Profit factor achieved
   47 |     double SharpeRatio;                  // Sharpe ratio achieved
   48 |     double MaxDrawdown;                  // Maximum drawdown
   49 |     double WinRate;                      // Win rate percentage
   50 |     double TotalTrades;                  // Number of trades
   51 |     double NetProfit;                    // Net profit
   52 |     double Score;                        // Combined optimization score
   53 |     datetime TestPeriodStart;            // Test period start
   54 |     datetime TestPeriodEnd;              // Test period end
   55 |     bool IsValid;                        // Result validity
   56 |     
   57 |     void Reset() {
   58 |         ArrayFree(ParameterValues);
   59 |         ProfitFactor = 0.0;
   60 |         SharpeRatio = 0.0;
   61 |         MaxDrawdown = 0.0;
   62 |         WinRate = 0.0;
   63 |         TotalTrades = 0.0;
   64 |         NetProfit = 0.0;
   65 |         Score = 0.0;
   66 |         TestPeriodStart = 0;
   67 |         TestPeriodEnd = 0;
   68 |         IsValid = false;
   69 |     }
   70 | };
   71 | 
   72 | // Walk-forward analysis configuration
   73 | struct SWalkForwardConfig {
   74 |     int InSampleBars;                    // In-sample period size
   75 |     int OutSampleBars;                   // Out-of-sample period size
   76 |     int WindowStep;                      // Window step size
   77 |     double OutSampleWeight;              // Out-of-sample weight in scoring
   78 |     bool EnableReoptimization;           // Enable periodic reoptimization
   79 |     int ReoptimizationPeriod;            // Reoptimization frequency (bars)
   80 |     
   81 |     void Reset() {
   82 |         InSampleBars = 1000;
   83 |         OutSampleBars = 250;
   84 |         WindowStep = 100;
   85 |         OutSampleWeight = 0.7;
   86 |         EnableReoptimization = true;
   87 |         ReoptimizationPeriod = 500;
   88 |     }
   89 | };
   90 | 
   91 | // Monte Carlo simulation configuration
   92 | struct SMonteCarloConfig {
   93 |     int SimulationRuns;                  // Number of simulation runs
   94 |     double ConfidenceLevel;              // Confidence level (0.95 = 95%)
   95 |     bool RandomizeTradeOrder;            // Randomize trade order
   96 |     bool RandomizeTradeResults;          // Randomize trade results
   97 |     double NoiseLevel;                   // Noise level for randomization
   98 |     int MinTradesRequired;               // Minimum trades for valid simulation
   99 |     
  100 |     void Reset() {
  101 |         SimulationRuns = 1000;
  102 |         ConfidenceLevel = 0.95;
  103 |         RandomizeTradeOrder = true;
  104 |         RandomizeTradeResults = false;
  105 |         NoiseLevel = 0.1;
  106 |         MinTradesRequired = 30;
  107 |     }
  108 | };
  109 | 
  110 | // Strategy adaptation configuration
  111 | struct SStrategyAdaptation {
  112 |     bool EnableAdaptation;               // Enable strategy adaptation
  113 |     int AdaptationPeriod;                // Adaptation check period (bars)
  114 |     double PerformanceThreshold;         // Performance threshold for adaptation
  115 |     double MarketRegimeChangeThreshold;  // Market regime change threshold
  116 |     ENUM_ADAPTATION_METHOD Method;       // Adaptation method
  117 |     double AdaptationSensitivity;        // Adaptation sensitivity
  118 |     
  119 |     void Reset() {
  120 |         EnableAdaptation = true;
  121 |         AdaptationPeriod = 200;
  122 |         PerformanceThreshold = 0.8;
  123 |         MarketRegimeChangeThreshold = 0.7;
  124 |         Method = ADAPTATION_GRADUAL;
  125 |         AdaptationSensitivity = 0.5;
  126 |     }
  127 | };

  279 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  280 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  281 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  282 | COptimizationManager::COptimizationManager() {
  283 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  284 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  285 |     m_pStrategyOptimizer = NULL;
  286 |     m_pMonteCarloSimulator = NULL;
  287 |     m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer = NULL;
  288 |     m_EnableOptimization = true;
  289 |     m_EnableMonteCarlo = true;
  290 |     m_EnableStabilityAnalysis = true;
  291 |     m_ParameterCount = 0;
  292 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  293 |     m_WalkForwardCount = 0;
  294 |     m_OptimizationInProgress = false;
  295 |     m_OptimizationStartTime = 0;
  296 |     m_LastOptimization = 0;
  297 |     m_CurrentGeneration = 0;
  298 |     m_MaxGenerations = 100;
  299 |     m_BaselinePerformance = 0.0;
  300 |     m_CurrentPerformance = 0.0;
  301 |     m_OptimizationProgress = 0.0;
  302 |     m_LastAdaptationCheck = 0;
  303 |     
  304 |     // Initialize arrays
  305 |     ArrayResize(m_Parameters, MAX_PARAMETERS);
  306 |     ArrayResize(m_OptimizationResults, MAX_RESULTS);
  307 |     ArrayResize(m_WalkForwardResults, MAX_RESULTS);
  308 |     ArrayResize(m_MonteCarloResults, 1000);
  309 |     ArrayResize(m_ConfidenceIntervals, 21); // 0%, 5%, 10%, ..., 95%, 100%
  310 |     ArrayResize(m_AdaptationMetrics, 10);
  311 |     
  312 |     // Reset configurations
  313 |     m_WalkForwardConfig.Reset();
  314 |     m_MonteCarloConfig.Reset();
  315 |     m_AdaptationConfig.Reset();
  316 |     m_BestResult.Reset();
  317 | }

  319 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  320 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 | COptimizationManager::~COptimizationManager() {
  323 |     Deinitialize();
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  327 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  328 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  329 | bool COptimizationManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  330 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  331 |         return true;
  332 |     }
  333 |     
  334 |     m_pContext = context;
  335 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) {
  336 |         return false;
  337 |     }
  338 |     
  339 |     // Only initialize if optimization is enabled
  340 |     if (!m_EnableOptimization) {
  341 |         m_bInitialized = true;
  342 |         return true;
  343 |     }
  344 |     
  345 |     // Initialize strategy optimizer
  346 |     if (m_EnableOptimization) {
  347 |         m_pStrategyOptimizer = new CStrategyOptimizer();
  348 |         if (!m_pStrategyOptimizer || !m_pStrategyOptimizer->Initialize(m_pContext)) {
  349 |             delete m_pStrategyOptimizer;
  350 |             m_pStrategyOptimizer = NULL;
  351 |             return false;
  352 |         }
  353 |     }
  354 |     
  355 |     // Initialize Monte Carlo simulator
  356 |     if (m_EnableMonteCarlo) {
  357 |         m_pMonteCarloSimulator = new CMonteCarloSimulator();
  358 |         if (!m_pMonteCarloSimulator || !m_pMonteCarloSimulator->Initialize(m_pContext)) {
  359 |             delete m_pMonteCarloSimulator;
  360 |             m_pMonteCarloSimulator = NULL;
  361 |             return false;
  362 |         }
  363 |     }
  364 |     
  365 |     // Initialize parameter stability analyzer
  366 |     if (m_EnableStabilityAnalysis) {
  367 |         m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer = new CParameterStabilityAnalyzer();
  368 |         if (!m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer || !m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer->Initialize(m_pContext)) {
  369 |             delete m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer;
  370 |             m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer = NULL;
  371 |             return false;
  372 |         }
  373 |     }
  374 |     
  375 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  376 |     return true;
  377 | }
  378 | 
  379 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  380 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  381 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  382 | void COptimizationManager::Deinitialize() {
  383 |     if (m_pStrategyOptimizer != NULL) {
  384 |         m_pStrategyOptimizer->Deinitialize();
  385 |         delete m_pStrategyOptimizer;
  386 |         m_pStrategyOptimizer = NULL;
  387 |     }
  388 |     
  389 |     if (m_pMonteCarloSimulator != NULL) {
  390 |         m_pMonteCarloSimulator->Deinitialize();
  391 |         delete m_pMonteCarloSimulator;
  392 |         m_pMonteCarloSimulator = NULL;
  393 |     }
  394 |     
  395 |     if (m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer != NULL) {
  396 |         m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer->Deinitialize();
  397 |         delete m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer;
  398 |         m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer = NULL;
  399 |     }
  400 |     
  401 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  402 | }
  403 | 
  404 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  405 | //| Update                                                           |
  406 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  407 | void COptimizationManager::Update() {
  408 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  409 |         return;
  410 |     }
  411 |     
  412 |     // Update optimization components
  413 |     if (m_pStrategyOptimizer != NULL) {
  414 |         m_pStrategyOptimizer->Update();
  415 |     }
  416 |     
  417 |     if (m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer != NULL) {
  418 |         m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer->Update();
  419 |     }
  420 |     
  421 |     // Check for strategy adaptation
  422 |     if (m_AdaptationConfig.EnableAdaptation) {
  423 |         CheckStrategyAdaptation();
  424 |     }
  425 |     
  426 |     // Update optimization progress if running
  427 |     if (m_OptimizationInProgress) {
  428 |         m_OptimizationProgress = (double)m_CurrentGeneration / m_MaxGenerations;
  429 |     }
  430 | }
  431 | 
  432 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  433 | //| OnTimer                                                          |
  434 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  435 | void COptimizationManager::OnTimer() {
  436 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  437 |         return;
  438 |     }
  439 |     
  440 |     // Perform periodic optimization tasks
  441 |     if (m_pStrategyOptimizer != NULL) {
  442 |         m_pStrategyOptimizer->OnTimer();
  443 |     }
  444 |     
  445 |     if (m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer != NULL) {
  446 |         m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer->OnTimer();
  447 |     }
  448 |     
  449 |     Update();
  450 | }
  451 | 
  452 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  453 | //| Run Optimization                                                 |
  454 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  455 | bool COptimizationManager::RunOptimization() {
  456 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pStrategyOptimizer == NULL) {
  457 |         return false;
  458 |     }
  459 |     
  460 |     return m_pStrategyOptimizer->RunOptimization();
  461 | }
  462 | 
  463 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  464 | //| Run Monte Carlo                                                  |
  465 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  466 | bool COptimizationManager::RunMonteCarlo() {
  467 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pMonteCarloSimulator == NULL) {
  468 |         return false;
  469 |     }
  470 |     
  471 |     return m_pMonteCarloSimulator->RunSimulation();
  472 | }
  473 | 
  474 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 | //| Analyze Parameter Stability                                      |
  476 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 | bool COptimizationManager::AnalyzeParameterStability() {
  478 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer == NULL) {
  479 |         return false;
  480 |     }
  481 |     
  482 |     return m_pParameterStabilityAnalyzer->AnalyzeStability();
  483 | }
  484 | 
  485 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  486 | //| Add Parameter for Optimization                                   |
  487 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 | bool COptimizationManager::AddParameter(string name, double minVal, double maxVal, 
  489 |                                        double step, ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_TYPE type) {
  490 |     if (m_ParameterCount >= MAX_PARAMETERS) {
  491 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Maximum parameters reached");
  492 |         return false;
  493 |     }
  494 |     
  495 |     if (minVal >= maxVal || step <= 0) {
  496 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Invalid parameter range for ", name);
  497 |         return false;
  498 |     }
  499 |     
  500 |     SParameterOptimization param;
  501 |     param.Reset();
  502 |     param.ParameterName = name;
  503 |     param.MinValue = minVal;
  504 |     param.MaxValue = maxVal;
  505 |     param.StepSize = step;
  506 |     param.CurrentValue = (minVal + maxVal) / 2.0; // Start with middle value
  507 |     param.OptimalValue = param.CurrentValue;
  508 |     param.IsEnabled = true;
  509 |     param.OptType = type;
  510 |     
  511 |     m_Parameters[m_ParameterCount] = param;
  512 |     m_ParameterCount++;
  513 |     
  514 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Added parameter: ", name, " [", minVal, " - ", maxVal, "]");
  515 |     return true;
  516 | }
  517 | 
  518 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  519 | //| Set Parameter Value                                              |
  520 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  521 | bool COptimizationManager::SetParameterValue(string name, double value) {
  522 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  523 |         if (m_Parameters[i].ParameterName == name) {
  524 |             if (value >= m_Parameters[i].MinValue && value <= m_Parameters[i].MaxValue) {
  525 |                 m_Parameters[i].CurrentValue = value;
  526 |                 return true;
  527 |             } else {
  528 |                 Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Value out of range for parameter ", name);
  529 |                 return false;
  530 |             }
  531 |         }
  532 |     }
  533 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Parameter not found: ", name);
  534 |     return false;
  535 | }
  536 | 
  537 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  538 | //| Get Parameter Value                                              |
  539 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  540 | double COptimizationManager::GetParameterValue(string name) {
  541 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  542 |         if (m_Parameters[i].ParameterName == name) {
  543 |             return m_Parameters[i].CurrentValue;
  544 |         }
  545 |     }
  546 |     return 0.0;
  547 | }
  548 | 
  549 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  550 | //| Enable/Disable Parameter                                         |
  551 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  552 | bool COptimizationManager::EnableParameter(string name, bool enable) {
  553 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  554 |         if (m_Parameters[i].ParameterName == name) {
  555 |             m_Parameters[i].IsEnabled = enable;
  556 |             return true;
  557 |         }
  558 |     }
  559 |     return false;
  560 | }
  561 | 
  562 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  563 | //| Start Optimization                                               |
  564 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  565 | bool COptimizationManager::StartOptimization(ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_TYPE type) {
  566 |     if (m_OptimizationInProgress) {
  567 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Optimization already in progress");
  568 |         return false;
  569 |     }
  570 |     
  571 |     if (!ValidateParameterSetup()) {
  572 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Invalid parameter setup");
  573 |         return false;
  574 |     }
  575 |     
  576 |     m_OptimizationInProgress = true;
  577 |     m_OptimizationStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  578 |     m_CurrentGeneration = 0;
  579 |     m_OptimizationProgress = 0.0;
  580 |     
  581 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Starting optimization using method: ", EnumToString(type));
  582 |     
  583 |     bool result = false;
  584 |     switch (type) {
  585 |         case OPTIMIZATION_GENETIC:
  586 |             result = RunGeneticOptimization();
  587 |             break;
  588 |         case OPTIMIZATION_GRID:
  589 |             result = RunGridOptimization();
  590 |             break;
  591 |         case OPTIMIZATION_SWEEP:
  592 |             result = RunParameterSweep();
  593 |             break;
  594 |         default:
  595 |             Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Unknown optimization type");
  596 |             break;
  597 |     }
  598 |     
  599 |     m_OptimizationInProgress = false;
  600 |     m_LastOptimization = TimeCurrent();
  601 |     
  602 |     if (result) {
  603 |         AnalyzeOptimizationResults();
  604 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Optimization completed successfully");
  605 |     } else {
  606 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Optimization failed");
  607 |     }
  608 |     
  609 |     return result;
  610 | }
  611 | 
  612 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  613 | //| Stop Optimization                                                |
  614 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  615 | bool COptimizationManager::StopOptimization() {
  616 |     if (!m_OptimizationInProgress) return false;
  617 |     
  618 |     m_OptimizationInProgress = false;
  619 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Optimization stopped by user");
  620 |     return true;
  621 | }
  622 | 
  623 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  624 | //| Validate Parameter Setup                                         |
  625 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  626 | bool COptimizationManager::ValidateParameterSetup() {
  627 |     if (m_ParameterCount == 0) {
  628 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: No parameters configured for optimization");
  629 |         return false;
  630 |     }
  631 |     
  632 |     int enabledCount = 0;
  633 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  634 |         if (m_Parameters[i].IsEnabled) {
  635 |             enabledCount++;
  636 |             
  637 |             // Validate parameter ranges
  638 |             if (m_Parameters[i].MinValue >= m_Parameters[i].MaxValue) {
  639 |                 Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Invalid range for parameter: ", m_Parameters[i].ParameterName);
  640 |                 return false;
  641 |             }
  642 |             
  643 |             if (m_Parameters[i].StepSize <= 0) {
  644 |                 Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: Invalid step size for parameter: ", m_Parameters[i].ParameterName);
  645 |                 return false;
  646 |             }
  647 |         }
  648 |     }
  649 |     
  650 |     if (enabledCount == 0) {
  651 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] ERROR: No parameters enabled for optimization");
  652 |         return false;
  653 |     }
  654 |     
  655 |     return true;
  656 | }
  657 | 
  658 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  659 | //| Run Genetic Optimization                                         |
  660 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  661 | bool COptimizationManager::RunGeneticOptimization() {
  662 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Running genetic optimization...");
  663 |     
  664 |     // Simplified genetic optimization implementation
  665 |     // In a real implementation, this would include:
  666 |     // - Population initialization
  667 |     // - Fitness evaluation
  668 |     // - Selection, crossover, and mutation
  669 |     // - Multiple generations
  670 |     
  671 |     for (m_CurrentGeneration = 0; m_CurrentGeneration < m_MaxGenerations && m_OptimizationInProgress; m_CurrentGeneration++) {
  672 |         // Simulate optimization progress
  673 |         Sleep(10); // Prevent freezing
  674 |         
  675 |         // Generate random parameter combinations and evaluate
  676 |         SOptimizationResult result;
  677 |         result.Reset();
  678 |         
  679 |         // Simulate test results
  680 |         result.ProfitFactor = 1.0 + MathRand() / 32767.0; // Random between 1.0 and 2.0
  681 |         result.SharpeRatio = MathRand() / 32767.0 * 2.0 - 0.5; // Random between -0.5 and 1.5
  682 |         result.MaxDrawdown = MathRand() / 32767.0 * 20.0; // Random between 0 and 20%
  683 |         result.WinRate = 30.0 + MathRand() / 32767.0 * 40.0; // Random between 30% and 70%
  684 |         result.NetProfit = (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 1000.0; // Random between -500 and 500
  685 |         result.IsValid = true;
  686 |         
  687 |         result.Score = CalculateOptimizationScore(result);
  688 |         
  689 |         // Store result if it's good enough
  690 |         if (result.Score > 0.5 && m_ResultCount < MAX_RESULTS) {
  691 |             m_OptimizationResults[m_ResultCount] = result;
  692 |             m_ResultCount++;
  693 |             
  694 |             UpdateBestResult(result);
  695 |         }
  696 |         
  697 |         // Update progress
  698 |         m_OptimizationProgress = (double)(m_CurrentGeneration + 1) / m_MaxGenerations;
  699 |     }
  700 |     
  701 |     return true;
  702 | }
  703 | 
  704 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  705 | //| Run Grid Optimization                                            |
  706 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  707 | bool COptimizationManager::RunGridOptimization() {
  708 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Running grid optimization...");
  709 |     
  710 |     // Simplified grid optimization implementation
  711 |     // This would systematically test all parameter combinations
  712 |     
  713 |     int totalCombinations = 1;
  714 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  715 |         if (m_Parameters[i].IsEnabled) {
  716 |             int steps = (int)((m_Parameters[i].MaxValue - m_Parameters[i].MinValue) / m_Parameters[i].StepSize) + 1;
  717 |             totalCombinations *= steps;
  718 |         }
  719 |     }
  720 |     
  721 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Testing ", totalCombinations, " parameter combinations");
  722 |     
  723 |     // Simulate grid search
  724 |     for (int combo = 0; combo < MathMin(totalCombinations, 1000) && m_OptimizationInProgress; combo++) {
  725 |         Sleep(5); // Prevent freezing
  726 |         
  727 |         SOptimizationResult result;
  728 |         result.Reset();
  729 |         
  730 |         // Simulate test results
  731 |         result.ProfitFactor = 0.5 + MathRand() / 32767.0 * 2.0;
  732 |         result.SharpeRatio = MathRand() / 32767.0 * 2.0 - 0.5;
  733 |         result.MaxDrawdown = MathRand() / 32767.0 * 25.0;
  734 |         result.WinRate = 25.0 + MathRand() / 32767.0 * 50.0;
  735 |         result.NetProfit = (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 2000.0;
  736 |         result.IsValid = true;
  737 |         
  738 |         result.Score = CalculateOptimizationScore(result);
  739 |         
  740 |         if (result.Score > 0.3 && m_ResultCount < MAX_RESULTS) {
  741 |             m_OptimizationResults[m_ResultCount] = result;
  742 |             m_ResultCount++;
  743 |             
  744 |             UpdateBestResult(result);
  745 |         }
  746 |         
  747 |         // Update progress
  748 |         m_OptimizationProgress = (double)(combo + 1) / MathMin(totalCombinations, 1000);
  749 |     }
  750 |     
  751 |     return true;
  752 | }
  753 | 
  754 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  755 | //| Run Parameter Sweep                                              |
  756 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  757 | bool COptimizationManager::RunParameterSweep() {
  758 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Running parameter sweep optimization...");
  759 |     
  760 |     // Simple parameter sweep - test each parameter individually
  761 |     for (int paramIndex = 0; paramIndex < m_ParameterCount && m_OptimizationInProgress; paramIndex++) {
  762 |         if (!m_Parameters[paramIndex].IsEnabled) continue;
  763 |         
  764 |         SParameterOptimization& param = m_Parameters[paramIndex];
  765 |         double bestValue = param.CurrentValue;
  766 |         double bestScore = 0.0;
  767 |         
  768 |         // Test different values for this parameter
  769 |         for (double value = param.MinValue; value <= param.MaxValue; value += param.StepSize) {
  770 |             Sleep(2); // Prevent freezing
  771 |             
  772 |             // Simulate setting parameter and testing
  773 |             SOptimizationResult result;
  774 |             result.Reset();
  775 |             
  776 |             // Simulate test results (better results for middle values)
  777 |             double normalizedValue = (value - param.MinValue) / (param.MaxValue - param.MinValue);
  778 |             double scoreFactor = 1.0 - MathAbs(normalizedValue - 0.5) * 2.0; // Peak at middle
  779 |             
  780 |             result.ProfitFactor = 0.8 + scoreFactor * 1.5 + (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 0.3;
  781 |             result.SharpeRatio = scoreFactor * 1.5 + (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 0.5;
  782 |             result.MaxDrawdown = (1.0 - scoreFactor) * 20.0 + MathRand() / 32767.0 * 5.0;
  783 |             result.WinRate = 40.0 + scoreFactor * 30.0 + (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 10.0;
  784 |             result.NetProfit = scoreFactor * 1000.0 + (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 500.0;
  785 |             result.IsValid = true;
  786 |             
  787 |             result.Score = CalculateOptimizationScore(result);
  788 |             
  789 |             if (result.Score > bestScore) {
  790 |                 bestScore = result.Score;
  791 |                 bestValue = value;
  792 |             }
  793 |             
  794 |             if (m_ResultCount < MAX_RESULTS) {
  795 |                 m_OptimizationResults[m_ResultCount] = result;
  796 |                 m_ResultCount++;
  797 |                 
  798 |                 UpdateBestResult(result);
  799 |             }
  800 |         }
  801 |         
  802 |         // Update parameter with best found value
  803 |         param.OptimalValue = bestValue;
  804 |         
  805 |         // Update progress
  806 |         m_OptimizationProgress = (double)(paramIndex + 1) / m_ParameterCount;
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     return true;
  810 | }
  811 | 
  812 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  813 | //| Calculate Optimization Score                                     |
  814 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  815 | double COptimizationManager::CalculateOptimizationScore(const SOptimizationResult& result) {
  816 |     double score = 0.0;
  817 |     
  818 |     // Profit factor component (weight: 0.3)
  819 |     if (result.ProfitFactor > 1.0) {
  820 |         score += MathMin((result.ProfitFactor - 1.0) * 0.5, 0.3);
  821 |     }
  822 |     
  823 |     // Sharpe ratio component (weight: 0.25)
  824 |     if (result.SharpeRatio > 0) {
  825 |         score += MathMin(result.SharpeRatio * 0.25, 0.25);
  826 |     }
  827 |     
  828 |     // Drawdown component (weight: 0.25, inverted)
  829 |     if (result.MaxDrawdown < 50.0) {
  830 |         score += (50.0 - result.MaxDrawdown) / 50.0 * 0.25;
  831 |     }
  832 |     
  833 |     // Win rate component (weight: 0.2)
  834 |     if (result.WinRate > 30.0) {
  835 |         score += MathMin((result.WinRate - 30.0) / 70.0 * 0.2, 0.2);
  836 |     }
  837 |     
  838 |     // Ensure score is between 0 and 1
  839 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, score));
  840 | }
  841 | 
  842 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  843 | //| Update Best Result                                               |
  844 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  845 | void COptimizationManager::UpdateBestResult(const SOptimizationResult& result) {
  846 |     if (!m_BestResult.IsValid || result.Score > m_BestResult.Score) {
  847 |         m_BestResult = result;
  848 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] New best result found - Score: ", result.Score);
  849 |     }
  850 | }
  851 | 
  852 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  853 | //| Analyze Optimization Results                                     |
  854 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  855 | void COptimizationManager::AnalyzeOptimizationResults() {
  856 |     if (m_ResultCount == 0) return;
  857 |     
  858 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Analyzing ", m_ResultCount, " optimization results...");
  859 |     
  860 |     // Find best results
  861 |     double maxScore = 0.0;
  862 |     double avgScore = 0.0;
  863 |     int validResults = 0;
  864 |     
  865 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ResultCount; i++) {
  866 |         if (m_OptimizationResults[i].IsValid) {
  867 |             avgScore += m_OptimizationResults[i].Score;
  868 |             if (m_OptimizationResults[i].Score > maxScore) {
  869 |                 maxScore = m_OptimizationResults[i].Score;
  870 |             }
  871 |             validResults++;
  872 |         }
  873 |     }
  874 |     
  875 |     if (validResults > 0) {
  876 |         avgScore /= validResults;
  877 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Best score: ", maxScore, ", Average score: ", avgScore);
  878 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Valid results: ", validResults, " out of ", m_ResultCount);
  879 |     }
  880 | }
  881 | 
  882 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  883 | //| Check Strategy Adaptation                                        |
  884 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  885 | void COptimizationManager::CheckStrategyAdaptation() {
  886 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  887 |     
  888 |     if (currentTime - m_LastAdaptationCheck < m_AdaptationConfig.AdaptationPeriod * 60) {
  889 |         return; // Not time for adaptation check yet
  890 |     }
  891 |     
  892 |     m_LastAdaptationCheck = currentTime;
  893 |     
  894 |     // Evaluate current performance vs baseline
  895 |     double performanceRatio = (m_BaselinePerformance > 0) ? 
  896 |                               m_CurrentPerformance / m_BaselinePerformance : 1.0;
  897 |     
  898 |     if (performanceRatio < m_AdaptationConfig.PerformanceThreshold) {
  899 |         Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Performance below threshold - considering adaptation");
  900 |         
  901 |         // Check market regime change
  902 |         double regimeScore = EvaluateMarketRegime();
  903 |         
  904 |         if (regimeScore < m_AdaptationConfig.MarketRegimeChangeThreshold) {
  905 |             Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Market regime change detected - triggering adaptation");
  906 |             AdaptStrategyParameters();
  907 |         }
  908 |     }
  909 | }
  910 | 
  911 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  912 | //| Evaluate Market Regime                                           |
  913 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  914 | double COptimizationManager::EvaluateMarketRegime() {
  915 |     // Simplified market regime evaluation
  916 |     // In reality, this would analyze volatility, trend strength, etc.
  917 |     
  918 |     double regimeScore = 0.5 + (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 0.4;
  919 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, regimeScore));
  920 | }
  921 | 
  922 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  923 | //| Adapt Strategy Parameters                                        |
  924 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  925 | void COptimizationManager::AdaptStrategyParameters() {
  926 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Adapting strategy parameters...");
  927 |     
  928 |     // Simplified adaptation - adjust parameters slightly toward optimal values
  929 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  930 |         if (m_Parameters[i].IsEnabled && m_BestResult.IsValid) {
  931 |             double currentValue = m_Parameters[i].CurrentValue;
  932 |             double optimalValue = m_Parameters[i].OptimalValue;
  933 |             double adaptationStep = (optimalValue - currentValue) * m_AdaptationConfig.AdaptationSensitivity;
  934 |             
  935 |             double newValue = currentValue + adaptationStep;
  936 |             
  937 |             // Ensure new value is within bounds
  938 |             newValue = MathMax(m_Parameters[i].MinValue, MathMin(m_Parameters[i].MaxValue, newValue));
  939 |             
  940 |             m_Parameters[i].CurrentValue = newValue;
  941 |             
  942 |             Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Adapted ", m_Parameters[i].ParameterName, 
  943 |                   " from ", currentValue, " to ", newValue);
  944 |         }
  945 |     }
  946 | }
  947 | 
  948 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  949 | //| Get Optimization Report                                          |
  950 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  951 | string COptimizationManager::GetOptimizationReport() {
  952 |     string report = "=== OPTIMIZATION REPORT ===\n";
  953 |     
  954 |     report += StringFormat("Total Results: %d\n", m_ResultCount);
  955 |     report += StringFormat("Optimization In Progress: %s\n", m_OptimizationInProgress ? "YES" : "NO");
  956 |     
  957 |     if (m_OptimizationInProgress) {
  958 |         report += StringFormat("Progress: %.1f%%\n", m_OptimizationProgress * 100.0);
  959 |         report += StringFormat("Current Generation: %d/%d\n", m_CurrentGeneration, m_MaxGenerations);
  960 |     }
  961 |     
  962 |     if (m_BestResult.IsValid) {
  963 |         report += "\n=== BEST RESULT ===\n";
  964 |         report += StringFormat("Score: %.3f\n", m_BestResult.Score);
  965 |         report += StringFormat("Profit Factor: %.2f\n", m_BestResult.ProfitFactor);
  966 |         report += StringFormat("Sharpe Ratio: %.3f\n", m_BestResult.SharpeRatio);
  967 |         report += StringFormat("Max Drawdown: %.1f%%\n", m_BestResult.MaxDrawdown);
  968 |         report += StringFormat("Win Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_BestResult.WinRate);
  969 |         report += StringFormat("Net Profit: %.2f\n", m_BestResult.NetProfit);
  970 |     }
  971 |     
  972 |     report += "\n=== PARAMETER STATUS ===\n";
  973 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  974 |         report += StringFormat("%s: Current=%.2f, Optimal=%.2f, Enabled=%s\n",
  975 |                   m_Parameters[i].ParameterName,
  976 |                   m_Parameters[i].CurrentValue,
  977 |                   m_Parameters[i].OptimalValue,
  978 |                   m_Parameters[i].IsEnabled ? "YES" : "NO");
  979 |     }
  980 |     
  981 |     return report;
  982 | }
  983 | 
  984 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  985 | //| Get Status                                                       |
  986 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  987 | string COptimizationManager::GetStatus() {
  988 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return "NOT_INITIALIZED";
  989 |     if (m_OptimizationInProgress) return "OPTIMIZING";
  990 |     if (m_AdaptationConfig.EnableAdaptation) return "ADAPTIVE";
  991 |     return "READY";
  992 | }

 1000 |     Print("Parameters Configured: ", m_ParameterCount);
 1001 |     Print("Optimization Results: ", m_ResultCount);
 1002 |     Print("Best Score: ", m_BestResult.IsValid ? m_BestResult.Score : 0.0);
 1003 |     Print("Status: ", GetStatus());
 1004 |     Print("Adaptation Enabled: ", m_AdaptationConfig.EnableAdaptation ? "YES" : "NO");
 1005 |     Print("========================================");
 1006 | }

 1020 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1021 | //| Reset Optimization                                               |
 1022 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1023 | void COptimizationManager::ResetOptimization() {
 1024 |     if (m_OptimizationInProgress) {
 1025 |         StopOptimization();
 1026 |     }
 1027 |     
 1028 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
 1029 |     m_WalkForwardCount = 0;
 1030 |     m_CurrentGeneration = 0;
 1031 |     m_OptimizationProgress = 0.0;
 1032 |     m_BestResult.Reset();
 1033 |     
 1034 |     Print("[OPTIMIZATION] Optimization data reset");
 1035 | }
