   73 | 
   74 | enum ENUM_SELECTION_METHOD {
   75 |     SELECT_TOURNAMENT,              // Tournament selection
   76 |     SELECT_ROULETTE,                // Roulette wheel selection
   77 |     SELECT_RANK,                    // Rank-based selection
   78 |     SELECT_ELITIST,                 // Elitist selection
   79 |     SELECT_RANDOM,                  // Random selection
   80 |     SELECT_BEST                     // Best selection
   81 | };
   82 | 
   83 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   84 | //| Parameter optimization structures                              |
   85 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   86 | struct SOptimizationParameter {
   87 |     string Name;                    // Parameter name
   88 |     ENUM_PARAMETER_TYPE Type;       // Parameter type
   89 |     
   90 |     // Value ranges
   91 |     double MinValue;                // Minimum value
   92 |     double MaxValue;                // Maximum value
   93 |     double StepSize;                // Step size
   94 |     double CurrentValue;            // Current value
   95 |     double BestValue;               // Best value found
   96 |     
   97 |     // Integer specific
   98 |     int MinInt;                     // Minimum integer value
   99 |     int MaxInt;                     // Maximum integer value
  100 |     int StepInt;                    // Integer step size
  101 |     int CurrentInt;                 // Current integer value
  102 |     int BestInt;                    // Best integer value
  103 |     
  104 |     // Boolean specific
  105 |     bool CurrentBool;               // Current boolean value
  106 |     bool BestBool;                  // Best boolean value
  107 |     
  108 |     // String/Enum specific
  109 |     string PossibleValues[];        // Possible string/enum values
  110 |     string CurrentString;           // Current string value
  111 |     string BestString;              // Best string value
  112 |     
  113 |     // Optimization settings
  114 |     bool IsEnabled;                 // Is parameter enabled for optimization
  115 |     bool IsFixed;                   // Is parameter fixed
  116 |     double Weight;                  // Parameter weight in optimization
  117 |     double Sensitivity;             // Parameter sensitivity
  118 |     
  119 |     // Statistics
  120 |     double AverageValue;            // Average value during optimization
  121 |     double StandardDeviation;      // Standard deviation
  122 |     int TimesChanged;               // Number of times changed
  123 |     double ImpactOnFitness;         // Impact on fitness function
  124 |     
  125 |     // Constraints
  126 |     string Constraints;             // Parameter constraints (JSON format)
  127 |     bool HasDependencies;           // Has dependencies on other parameters
  128 |     string Dependencies[];          // Dependent parameter names
  129 |     
  130 |     // Metadata
  131 |     string Description;             // Parameter description
  132 |     string Category;                // Parameter category
  133 |     string Units;                   // Parameter units
  134 |     datetime LastModified;          // Last modification time
  135 | };
  136 | 
  137 | struct SOptimizationResult {
  138 |     int Generation;                 // Generation number
  139 |     int Individual;                 // Individual number
  140 |     
  141 |     // Parameter values
  142 |     SOptimizationParameter Parameters[]; // Parameter set
  143 |     
  144 |     // Fitness metrics
  145 |     double FitnessValue;            // Primary fitness value
  146 |     double SecondaryFitness[];      // Secondary fitness values
  147 |     double WeightedFitness;         // Weighted fitness
  148 |     
  149 |     // Performance metrics
  150 |     double ProfitFactor;            // Profit factor
  151 |     double SharpeRatio;             // Sharpe ratio
  152 |     double MaxDrawdown;             // Maximum drawdown
  153 |     double WinRate;                 // Win rate
  154 |     double TotalTrades;             // Total trades
  155 |     double ProfitPerTrade;          // Profit per trade
  156 |     
  157 |     // Validation metrics
  158 |     double InSampleFitness;         // In-sample fitness
  159 |     double OutSampleFitness;        // Out-of-sample fitness
  160 |     double ValidationScore;         // Validation score
  161 |     double RobustnessScore;         // Robustness score
  162 |     
  163 |     // Execution info
  164 |     datetime StartTime;             // Start time
  165 |     datetime EndTime;               // End time
  166 |     int ExecutionTime;              // Execution time (ms)
  167 |     bool IsValid;                   // Is result valid
  168 |     
  169 |     // Ranking
  170 |     int Rank;                       // Result rank
  171 |     double Score;                   // Overall score
  172 |     bool IsElite;                   // Is elite individual
  173 |     bool IsPareto;                  // Is Pareto optimal
  174 |     
  175 |     // Additional data
  176 |     string Notes;                   // Additional notes
  177 |     string ExtraData;               // Extra data (JSON format)
  178 | };
  179 | 
  180 | struct SOptimizationConfig {
  181 |     // Method settings
  182 |     ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_METHOD Method; // Optimization method
  183 |     ENUM_FITNESS_FUNCTION FitnessFunction; // Fitness function
  184 |     ENUM_SELECTION_METHOD SelectionMethod; // Selection method
  185 |     
  186 |     // Population settings
  187 |     int PopulationSize;             // Population size
  188 |     int MaxGenerations;             // Maximum generations
  189 |     int EliteSize;                  // Elite size
  190 |     double MutationRate;            // Mutation rate
  191 |     double CrossoverRate;           // Crossover rate
  192 |     
  193 |     // Convergence settings
  194 |     ENUM_CONVERGENCE_CRITERIA ConvergenceCriteria; // Convergence criteria
  195 |     double FitnessThreshold;        // Fitness threshold
  196 |     int NoImprovementLimit;         // No improvement limit
  197 |     int TimeLimit;                  // Time limit (seconds)
  198 |     double RelativeChangeThreshold; // Relative change threshold
  199 |     double AbsoluteChangeThreshold; // Absolute change threshold
  200 |     
  201 |     // Validation settings
  202 |     bool EnableValidation;          // Enable out-of-sample validation
  203 |     double ValidationRatio;         // Validation data ratio (0-1)
  204 |     bool EnableWalkForward;         // Enable walk-forward analysis
  205 |     int WalkForwardSteps;           // Walk-forward steps
  206 |     
  207 |     // Robustness settings
  208 |     bool EnableRobustnessTest;      // Enable robustness testing
  209 |     double NoiseLevel;              // Noise level for robustness
  210 |     int RobustnessIterations;       // Robustness test iterations
  211 |     
  212 |     // Multi-objective settings
  213 |     bool IsMultiObjective;          // Is multi-objective optimization
  214 |     double ObjectiveWeights[];      // Objective weights
  215 |     bool UseParetoFront;            // Use Pareto front
  216 |     
  217 |     // Advanced settings
  218 |     bool EnableParallelProcessing;  // Enable parallel processing
  219 |     int MaxThreads;                 // Maximum threads
  220 |     bool EnableCaching;             // Enable result caching
  221 |     bool EnableLogging;             // Enable detailed logging
  222 |     
  223 |     // Constraints
  224 |     bool EnableConstraints;         // Enable parameter constraints
  225 |     double PenaltyFactor;           // Constraint penalty factor
  226 |     
  227 |     // Output settings
  228 |     bool SaveAllResults;            // Save all results
  229 |     bool SaveBestOnly;              // Save best results only
  230 |     string OutputPath;              // Output file path
  231 |     bool EnableReporting;           // Enable optimization reporting
  232 | };
  233 | 
  234 | struct SOptimizationStatistics {
  235 |     // General statistics
  236 |     int TotalGenerations;           // Total generations completed
  237 |     int TotalEvaluations;           // Total fitness evaluations
  238 |     int ValidEvaluations;           // Valid fitness evaluations
  239 |     int InvalidEvaluations;         // Invalid fitness evaluations
  240 |     
  241 |     // Best results
  242 |     double BestFitness;             // Best fitness found
  243 |     double AverageFitness;          // Average fitness
  244 |     double WorstFitness;            // Worst fitness
  245 |     SOptimizationResult BestResult; // Best result
  246 |     
  247 |     // Convergence statistics
  248 |     int GenerationsToConvergence;   // Generations to convergence
  249 |     double ConvergenceRate;         // Convergence rate
  250 |     bool HasConverged;              // Has optimization converged
  251 |     
  252 |     // Performance statistics
  253 |     datetime StartTime;             // Optimization start time
  254 |     datetime EndTime;               // Optimization end time
  255 |     int TotalTime;                  // Total optimization time (seconds)
  256 |     double AverageEvaluationTime;   // Average evaluation time (ms)
  257 |     
  258 |     // Population statistics
  259 |     double PopulationDiversity;     // Population diversity
  260 |     double SelectionPressure;       // Selection pressure
  261 |     double MutationSuccess;         // Mutation success rate
  262 |     double CrossoverSuccess;        // Crossover success rate
  263 |     
  264 |     // Validation statistics
  265 |     double ValidationAccuracy;      // Validation accuracy
  266 |     double OverfittingRisk;         // Overfitting risk score
  267 |     double RobustnessScore;         // Robustness score
  268 |     
  269 |     // Progress tracking
  270 |     double ProgressPercent;         // Progress percentage
  271 |     string CurrentStatus;           // Current status description
  272 |     int EstimatedTimeRemaining;     // Estimated time remaining (seconds)
  273 |     
  274 |     // Error statistics
  275 |     int TotalErrors;                // Total errors
  276 |     int CriticalErrors;             // Critical errors
  277 |     string LastError;               // Last error message
  278 |     datetime LastErrorTime;         // Last error time
  279 | };
  280 | 
  281 | struct SOptimizationAlert {
  282 |     string Type;                    // Alert type
  283 |     string Message;                 // Alert message
  284 |     datetime Timestamp;             // Alert timestamp
  285 |     double Value;                   // Alert value
  286 |     double Threshold;               // Alert threshold
  287 |     bool IsUrgent;                  // Is urgent alert
  288 |     string Details;                 // Additional details
  289 | };

  291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  293 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  294 | class CParameterOptimizer {
  295 | private:
  296 |     EAContext* m_pContext;
  297 |     
  298 |     // Configuration
  299 |     SOptimizationConfig m_Config;
  300 |     
  301 |     // Parameters
  302 |     SOptimizationParameter m_Parameters[];
  303 |     int m_ParameterCount;
  304 |     
  305 |     // Results
  306 |     SOptimizationResult m_Results[];
  307 |     int m_ResultCount;
  308 |     SOptimizationResult m_BestResult;
  309 |     
  310 |     // Population (for genetic algorithms)
  311 |     SOptimizationResult m_Population[];
  312 |     int m_PopulationSize;
  313 |     int m_CurrentGeneration;
  314 |     
  315 |     // Statistics
  316 |     SOptimizationStatistics m_Statistics;
  317 |     
  318 |     // Internal state
  319 |     bool m_bInitialized;
  320 |     ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_STATUS m_Status;
  321 |     datetime m_StartTime;
  322 |     datetime m_LastUpdate;
  323 |     
  324 |     // Helper methods

  328 |     bool SelectParents(SOptimizationResult& parent1, SOptimizationResult& parent2);
  329 |     bool Crossover(const SOptimizationResult& parent1, const SOptimizationResult& parent2, SOptimizationResult& offspring);
  330 |     bool Mutate(SOptimizationResult& individual);
  331 |     bool ReplacePopulation(const SOptimizationResult& newIndividuals[]);
  332 |     
  333 |     // Optimization methods

  335 |     bool RunGridSearch();
  336 |     bool RunRandomSearch();
  337 |     bool RunBayesianOptimization();
  338 |     bool RunParticleSwarm();
  339 |     bool RunSimulatedAnnealing();

  341 |     // Fitness functions

  343 |     double CalculateSharpeRatio(const SOptimizationResult& result);
  344 |     double CalculateCustomFitness(const SOptimizationResult& result);
  345 |     double CalculateMultiObjectiveFitness(const SOptimizationResult& result);
  346 |     
  347 |     // Validation methods
  348 |     bool ValidateResult(SOptimizationResult& result);
  349 |     bool PerformWalkForwardAnalysis(SOptimizationResult& result);
  350 |     bool TestRobustness(SOptimizationResult& result);
  351 |     
  352 |     // Convergence checking
  353 |     bool CheckConvergence();
  354 |     bool HasImproved();
  355 |     bool IsTimeExpired();
  356 |     
  357 |     // Utility methods
  358 |     bool GenerateRandomParameters(SOptimizationResult& result);
  359 |     bool CopyParameters(const SOptimizationResult& source, SOptimizationResult& target);
  360 |     bool CompareResults(const SOptimizationResult& result1, const SOptimizationResult& result2);
  361 |     int FindParameterIndex(const string parameterName);
  362 |     bool UpdateStatistics();
  363 |     void SendOptimizationAlert(const SOptimizationAlert& alert);
  364 |     void LogError(const string message);
  365 |     void LogActivity(const string message);
  366 |     
  367 | public:
  368 |     // Constructor/Destructor
  369 |     CParameterOptimizer();
  370 |     ~CParameterOptimizer();
  371 |     
  372 |     // Initialization
  373 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* context);
  374 |     bool Deinitialize();
  375 |     bool Configure(const SOptimizationConfig& config);
  376 |     
  377 |     // Parameter management
  378 |     bool AddParameter(const SOptimizationParameter& parameter);
  379 |     bool RemoveParameter(const string parameterName);
  380 |     bool UpdateParameter(const string parameterName, const SOptimizationParameter& parameter);
  381 |     bool GetParameter(const string parameterName, SOptimizationParameter& parameter);
  382 |     bool GetAllParameters(SOptimizationParameter& parameters[]);
  383 |     bool SetParameterValue(const string parameterName, double value);
  384 |     bool SetParameterRange(const string parameterName, double minValue, double maxValue, double stepSize);
  385 |     bool EnableParameter(const string parameterName, bool enable = true);
  386 |     bool FixParameter(const string parameterName, bool fix = true);
  387 |     
  388 |     // Optimization control
  389 |     bool StartOptimization();
  390 |     bool StopOptimization();
  391 |     bool PauseOptimization();
  392 |     bool ResumeOptimization();
  393 |     bool ResetOptimization();
  394 |     bool RunSingleIteration();
  395 |     
  396 |     // Results management
  397 |     bool GetBestResult(SOptimizationResult& result);
  398 |     bool GetAllResults(SOptimizationResult& results[]);
  399 |     bool GetTopResults(int count, SOptimizationResult& results[]);
  400 |     bool GetResultsByGeneration(int generation, SOptimizationResult& results[]);
  401 |     bool SaveResults(const string filename);
  402 |     bool LoadResults(const string filename);
  403 |     
  404 |     // Analysis methods
  405 |     bool AnalyzeParameterSensitivity(const string parameterName, double& sensitivity);
  406 |     bool AnalyzeParameterCorrelation(const string param1, const string param2, double& correlation);
  407 |     bool AnalyzeConvergence(string& analysis);
  408 |     bool AnalyzeRobustness(string& analysis);
  409 |     bool GenerateOptimizationReport(string& report);
  410 |

  412 |     bool ValidateBestResult();
  413 |     bool PerformOutOfSampleTest(double& accuracy);
  414 |     bool PerformWalkForwardTest(double& accuracy);
  415 |     bool PerformRobustnessTest(double& robustness);
  416 |     
  417 |     // Configuration methods
  418 |     bool SetOptimizationMethod(ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_METHOD method);
  419 |     bool SetFitnessFunction(ENUM_FITNESS_FUNCTION function);
  420 |     bool SetPopulationSize(int size);
  421 |     bool SetMaxGenerations(int generations);
  422 |     bool SetMutationRate(double rate);
  423 |     bool SetCrossoverRate(double rate);
  424 |     bool SetConvergenceCriteria(ENUM_CONVERGENCE_CRITERIA criteria, double threshold);
  425 |     
  426 |     // Multi-objective optimization
  427 |     bool EnableMultiObjective(bool enable = true);
  428 |     bool SetObjectiveWeights(const double weights[]);
  429 |     bool GetParetoFront(SOptimizationResult& paretoResults[]);
  430 |     
  431 |     // Advanced features
  432 |     bool EnableParallelProcessing(bool enable = true, int maxThreads = 0);
  433 |     bool EnableCaching(bool enable = true);
  434 |     bool SetCustomFitnessFunction(const string functionName);
  435 |     bool AddConstraint(const string constraint);
  436 |     bool RemoveConstraint(const string constraint);
  437 |     
  438 |     // Monitoring and alerts
  439 |     bool SetProgressCallback(const string callbackFunction);
  440 |     bool EnableAlert(const string alertType, double threshold, bool enable = true);
  441 |     bool GetOptimizationProgress(double& progress);
  442 |     bool GetEstimatedTimeRemaining(int& seconds);
  443 |     
  444 |     // Import/Export
  445 |     bool ExportParameters(const string filename);
  446 |     bool ImportParameters(const string filename);
  447 |     bool ExportResults(const string filename, const string format = "CSV");
  448 |     bool ExportConfiguration(const string filename);
  449 |     bool ImportConfiguration(const string filename);
  450 |     
  451 |     // Information getters
  452 |     SOptimizationConfig GetConfiguration() const { return m_Config; }
  453 |     SOptimizationStatistics GetStatistics() const { return m_Statistics; }
  454 |     int GetParameterCount() const { return m_ParameterCount; }
  455 |     int GetResultCount() const { return m_ResultCount; }
  456 |     int GetCurrentGeneration() const { return m_CurrentGeneration; }
  457 |     
  458 |     // Utility methods
  459 |     string GetOptimizationMethodName(ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_METHOD method);
  460 |     string GetParameterTypeName(ENUM_PARAMETER_TYPE type);
  461 |     string GetStatusName(ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_STATUS status);
  462 |     string GetFitnessFunctionName(ENUM_FITNESS_FUNCTION function);
  463 |     string GetSelectionMethodName(ENUM_SELECTION_METHOD method);
  464 |     
  465 |     // Status
  466 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  467 |     ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_STATUS GetStatus() const { return m_Status; }
  468 |     bool IsRunning() const { return m_Status == OPT_STATUS_RUNNING; }
  469 |     bool IsCompleted() const { return m_Status == OPT_STATUS_COMPLETED; }
  470 |     datetime GetStartTime() const { return m_StartTime; }
  471 |     datetime GetLastUpdate() const { return m_LastUpdate; }
  472 | };
  473 | 
  474 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  476 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 | CParameterOptimizer::CParameterOptimizer() {
  478 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  479 |     m_ParameterCount = 0;
  480 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  481 |     m_PopulationSize = 0;
  482 |     m_CurrentGeneration = 0;
  483 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  484 |     m_Status = OPT_STATUS_IDLE;
  485 |     m_StartTime = 0;
  486 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  487 |     
  488 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  489 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  490 |     ZeroMemory(m_BestResult);
  491 |     
  492 |     // Set default configuration
  493 |     m_Config.Method = OPT_METHOD_GENETIC;
  494 |     m_Config.FitnessFunction = FITNESS_PROFIT_FACTOR;
  495 |     m_Config.SelectionMethod = SELECT_TOURNAMENT;
  496 |     
  497 |     m_Config.PopulationSize = 50;
  498 |     m_Config.MaxGenerations = 100;
  499 |     m_Config.EliteSize = 5;
  500 |     m_Config.MutationRate = 0.1;
  501 |     m_Config.CrossoverRate = 0.8;
  502 |     
  503 |     m_Config.ConvergenceCriteria = CONV_NO_IMPROVEMENT;
  504 |     m_Config.FitnessThreshold = 2.0;       // Profit factor >= 2.0
  505 |     m_Config.NoImprovementLimit = 20;      // 20 generations
  506 |     m_Config.TimeLimit = 3600;             // 1 hour
  507 |     m_Config.RelativeChangeThreshold = 0.01; // 1%
  508 |     m_Config.AbsoluteChangeThreshold = 0.1;
  509 |     
  510 |     m_Config.EnableValidation = true;
  511 |     m_Config.ValidationRatio = 0.3;        // 30% for validation
  512 |     m_Config.EnableWalkForward = false;
  513 |     m_Config.WalkForwardSteps = 10;
  514 |     
  515 |     m_Config.EnableRobustnessTest = true;
  516 |     m_Config.NoiseLevel = 0.05;            // 5% noise
  517 |     m_Config.RobustnessIterations = 10;
  518 |     
  519 |     m_Config.IsMultiObjective = false;
  520 |     m_Config.UseParetoFront = false;
  521 |     
  522 |     m_Config.EnableParallelProcessing = false;
  523 |     m_Config.MaxThreads = 4;
  524 |     m_Config.EnableCaching = true;
  525 |     m_Config.EnableLogging = true;
  526 |     
  527 |     m_Config.EnableConstraints = false;
  528 |     m_Config.PenaltyFactor = 1000.0;
  529 |     
  530 |     m_Config.SaveAllResults = false;
  531 |     m_Config.SaveBestOnly = true;
  532 |     m_Config.OutputPath = "";
  533 |     m_Config.EnableReporting = true;
  534 | }
  535 | 
  536 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  537 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  538 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 | CParameterOptimizer::~CParameterOptimizer() {
  540 |     Deinitialize();
  541 | }
  542 | 
  543 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  544 | //| Initialize parameter optimizer                                  |
  545 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  546 | bool CParameterOptimizer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  547 |     if (context == NULL) {
  548 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  549 |         return false;
  550 |     }
  551 |     
  552 |     m_pContext = context;
  553 |     
  554 |     // Initialize arrays
  555 |     ArrayResize(m_Parameters, 50);         // Support 50 parameters
  556 |     ArrayResize(m_Results, 1000);          // Store 1000 results
  557 |     ArrayResize(m_Population, m_Config.PopulationSize);
  558 |     
  559 |     m_ParameterCount = 0;
  560 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  561 |     m_PopulationSize = 0;
  562 |     m_CurrentGeneration = 0;
  563 |     
  564 |     // Initialize statistics
  565 |     m_Statistics.StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  566 |     m_Statistics.LastErrorTime = 0;
  567 |     m_Statistics.BestFitness = -DBL_MAX;
  568 |     m_Statistics.WorstFitness = DBL_MAX;
  569 |     
  570 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  571 |     m_Status = OPT_STATUS_IDLE;
  572 |     
  573 |     LogActivity("Parameter optimizer initialized successfully");
  574 |     return true;
  575 | }
  576 | 
  577 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  578 | //| Deinitialize parameter optimizer                                |
  579 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  580 | bool CParameterOptimizer::Deinitialize() {
  581 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  582 |         StopOptimization();
  583 |         
  584 |         // Clear arrays
  585 |         ArrayFree(m_Parameters);
  586 |         ArrayFree(m_Results);
  587 |         ArrayFree(m_Population);
  588 |         
  589 |         m_ParameterCount = 0;
  590 |         m_ResultCount = 0;
  591 |         m_PopulationSize = 0;
  592 |         m_CurrentGeneration = 0;
  593 |         
  594 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  595 |         m_Status = OPT_STATUS_IDLE;
  596 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  597 |         
  598 |         LogActivity("Parameter optimizer deinitialized");
  599 |     }
  600 |     
  601 |     return true;
  602 | }
  603 | 
  604 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  605 | //| Configure parameter optimizer                                   |
  606 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  607 | bool CParameterOptimizer::Configure(const SOptimizationConfig& config) {
  608 |     m_Config = config;
  609 |     
  610 |     // Validate configuration
  611 |     if (m_Config.PopulationSize <= 0) {
  612 |         LogError("Invalid population size");
  613 |         return false;
  614 |     }
  615 |     
  616 |     if (m_Config.MaxGenerations <= 0) {
  617 |         LogError("Invalid maximum generations");
  618 |         return false;
  619 |     }
  620 |     
  621 |     if (m_Config.MutationRate < 0 || m_Config.MutationRate > 1) {
  622 |         LogError("Invalid mutation rate (must be 0-1)");
  623 |         return false;
  624 |     }
  625 |     
  626 |     if (m_Config.CrossoverRate < 0 || m_Config.CrossoverRate > 1) {
  627 |         LogError("Invalid crossover rate (must be 0-1)");
  628 |         return false;
  629 |     }
  630 |     
  631 |     // Resize population array if needed
  632 |     if (m_bInitialized && ArraySize(m_Population) != m_Config.PopulationSize) {
  633 |         ArrayResize(m_Population, m_Config.PopulationSize);
  634 |     }
  635 |     
  636 |     LogActivity("Parameter optimizer configured successfully");
  637 |     return true;
  638 | }
  639 | 
  640 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  641 | //| Add optimization parameter                                      |
  642 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  643 | bool CParameterOptimizer::AddParameter(const SOptimizationParameter& parameter) {
  644 |     if (m_ParameterCount >= ArraySize(m_Parameters)) {
  645 |         // Resize array if needed
  646 |         int newSize = ArraySize(m_Parameters) + 20;
  647 |         if (ArrayResize(m_Parameters, newSize) < 0) {
  648 |             LogError("Failed to resize parameters array");
  649 |             return false;
  650 |         }
  651 |     }
  652 |     
  653 |     // Check if parameter already exists
  654 |     if (FindParameterIndex(parameter.Name) >= 0) {
  655 |         LogError("Parameter already exists: " + parameter.Name);
  656 |         return false;
  657 |     }
  658 |     
  659 |     // Validate parameter
  660 |     if (parameter.Name == "") {
  661 |         LogError("Parameter name cannot be empty");
  662 |         return false;
  663 |     }
  664 |     
  665 |     if (parameter.Type == PARAM_TYPE_DOUBLE || parameter.Type == PARAM_TYPE_INTEGER) {
  666 |         if (parameter.MaxValue <= parameter.MinValue) {
  667 |             LogError("Invalid parameter range for " + parameter.Name);
  668 |             return false;
  669 |         }
  670 |         
  671 |         if (parameter.StepSize <= 0) {
  672 |             LogError("Invalid step size for " + parameter.Name);
  673 |             return false;
  674 |         }
  675 |     }
  676 |     
  677 |     m_Parameters[m_ParameterCount] = parameter;
  678 |     m_Parameters[m_ParameterCount].LastModified = TimeCurrent();
  679 |     m_ParameterCount++;
  680 |     
  681 |     LogActivity("Added optimization parameter: " + parameter.Name);
  682 |     return true;
  683 | }
  684 | 
  685 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  686 | //| Start optimization                                              |
  687 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  688 | bool CParameterOptimizer::StartOptimization() {
  689 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  690 |         LogError("Parameter optimizer not initialized");
  691 |         return false;
  692 |     }
  693 |     
  694 |     if (m_Status == OPT_STATUS_RUNNING) {
  695 |         LogActivity("Optimization already running");
  696 |         return true;
  697 |     }
  698 |     
  699 |     if (m_ParameterCount == 0) {
  700 |         LogError("No parameters defined for optimization");
  701 |         return false;
  702 |     }
  703 |     
  704 |     // Validate parameters
  705 |     if (!ValidateParameters()) {
  706 |         LogError("Parameter validation failed");
  707 |         return false;
  708 |     }
  709 |     
  710 |     // Reset statistics
  711 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  712 |     m_Statistics.StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  713 |     m_Statistics.BestFitness = -DBL_MAX;
  714 |     m_Statistics.WorstFitness = DBL_MAX;
  715 |     
  716 |     m_Status = OPT_STATUS_INITIALIZING;
  717 |     m_StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  718 |     m_CurrentGeneration = 0;
  719 |     
  720 |     // Initialize population
  721 |     if (!InitializePopulation()) {
  722 |         LogError("Failed to initialize population");
  723 |         m_Status = OPT_STATUS_ERROR;
  724 |         return false;
  725 |     }
  726 |     
  727 |     m_Status = OPT_STATUS_RUNNING;
  728 |     
  729 |     // Run optimization based on selected method
  730 |     bool success = false;
  731 |     switch (m_Config.Method) {
  732 |         case OPT_METHOD_GENETIC:
  733 |             success = RunGeneticAlgorithm();
  734 |             break;
  735 |         case OPT_METHOD_GRID_SEARCH:
  736 |             success = RunGridSearch();
  737 |             break;
  738 |         case OPT_METHOD_RANDOM_SEARCH:
  739 |             success = RunRandomSearch();
  740 |             break;
  741 |         case OPT_METHOD_BAYESIAN:
  742 |             success = RunBayesianOptimization();
  743 |             break;
  744 |         default:
  745 |             LogError("Optimization method not implemented: " + GetOptimizationMethodName(m_Config.Method));
  746 |             success = false;
  747 |             break;
  748 |     }
  749 |     
  750 |     if (success) {
  751 |         m_Status = OPT_STATUS_COMPLETED;
  752 |         m_Statistics.EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  753 |         m_Statistics.TotalTime = (int)(m_Statistics.EndTime - m_Statistics.StartTime);
  754 |         m_Statistics.HasConverged = CheckConvergence();
  755 |         
  756 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Optimization completed in %d seconds with %d evaluations", 
  757 |                                 m_Statistics.TotalTime, m_Statistics.TotalEvaluations));
  758 |     } else {
  759 |         m_Status = OPT_STATUS_ERROR;
  760 |         LogError("Optimization failed");
  761 |     }
  762 |     
  763 |     return success;
  764 | }
  765 | 
  766 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  767 | //| Validate parameters                                             |
  768 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  769 | bool CParameterOptimizer::ValidateParameters() {
  770 |     int enabledCount = 0;
  771 |     
  772 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  773 |         if (m_Parameters[i].IsEnabled && !m_Parameters[i].IsFixed) {
  774 |             enabledCount++;
  775 |         }
  776 |     }
  777 |     
  778 |     if (enabledCount == 0) {
  779 |         LogError("No parameters enabled for optimization");
  780 |         return false;
  781 |     }
  782 |     
  783 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Validated %d parameters (%d enabled)", m_ParameterCount, enabledCount));
  784 |     return true;
  785 | }
  786 | 
  787 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  788 | //| Initialize population                                           |
  789 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  790 | bool CParameterOptimizer::InitializePopulation() {
  791 |     m_PopulationSize = m_Config.PopulationSize;
  792 |     
  793 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_PopulationSize; i++) {
  794 |         ZeroMemory(m_Population[i]);
  795 |         
  796 |         // Generate random parameters
  797 |         if (!GenerateRandomParameters(m_Population[i])) {
  798 |             LogError(StringFormat("Failed to generate random parameters for individual %d", i));
  799 |             return false;
  800 |         }
  801 |         
  802 |         m_Population[i].Generation = 0;
  803 |         m_Population[i].Individual = i;
  804 |         m_Population[i].StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  805 |         
  806 |         // Evaluate fitness
  807 |         if (!EvaluateFitness(m_Population[i])) {
  808 |             LogError(StringFormat("Failed to evaluate fitness for individual %d", i));
  809 |             return false;
  810 |         }
  811 |     }
  812 |     
  813 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Initialized population with %d individuals", m_PopulationSize));
  814 |     return true;
  815 | }
  816 | 
  817 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  818 | //| Generate random parameters                                      |
  819 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  820 | bool CParameterOptimizer::GenerateRandomParameters(SOptimizationResult& result) {
  821 |     ArrayResize(result.Parameters, m_ParameterCount);
  822 |     
  823 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  824 |         result.Parameters[i] = m_Parameters[i];
  825 |         
  826 |         if (!m_Parameters[i].IsEnabled || m_Parameters[i].IsFixed) {
  827 |             // Use current value for fixed parameters
  828 |             continue;
  829 |         }
  830 |         
  831 |         switch (m_Parameters[i].Type) {
  832 |             case PARAM_TYPE_DOUBLE: {
  833 |                 double range = m_Parameters[i].MaxValue - m_Parameters[i].MinValue;
  834 |                 result.Parameters[i].CurrentValue = m_Parameters[i].MinValue + 
  835 |                     (MathRand() / 32767.0) * range;
  836 |                 break;
  837 |             }
  838 |             
  839 |             case PARAM_TYPE_INTEGER: {
  840 |                 int range = m_Parameters[i].MaxInt - m_Parameters[i].MinInt;
  841 |                 result.Parameters[i].CurrentInt = m_Parameters[i].MinInt + 
  842 |                     (MathRand() % (range + 1));
  843 |                 break;
  844 |             }
  845 |             
  846 |             case PARAM_TYPE_BOOLEAN: {
  847 |                 result.Parameters[i].CurrentBool = (MathRand() % 2) == 1;
  848 |                 break;
  849 |             }
  850 |             
  851 |             case PARAM_TYPE_ENUM: {
  852 |                 int count = ArraySize(m_Parameters[i].PossibleValues);
  853 |                 if (count > 0) {
  854 |                     int index = MathRand() % count;
  855 |                     result.Parameters[i].CurrentString = m_Parameters[i].PossibleValues[index];
  856 |                 }
  857 |                 break;
  858 |             }
  859 |         }
  860 |     }
  861 |     
  862 |     return true;
  863 | }
  864 | 
  865 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  866 | //| Find parameter index                                           |
  867 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  868 | int CParameterOptimizer::FindParameterIndex(const string parameterName) {
  869 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ParameterCount; i++) {
  870 |         if (m_Parameters[i].Name == parameterName) {
  871 |             return i;
  872 |         }
  873 |     }
  874 |     return -1;
  875 | }
  876 | 
  877 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  878 | //| Log error message                                              |
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | void CParameterOptimizer::LogError(const string message) {
  881 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  882 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("ParameterOptimizer: " + message);
  883 |     } else {
  884 |         Print("ParameterOptimizer ERROR: ", message);
  885 |     }
  886 |     
  887 |     m_Statistics.TotalErrors++;
  888 |     m_Statistics.LastError = message;
  889 |     m_Statistics.LastErrorTime = TimeCurrent();
  890 | }
  891 | 
  892 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  893 | //| Log activity message                                           |
  894 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  895 | void CParameterOptimizer::LogActivity(const string message) {
  896 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  897 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("ParameterOptimizer: " + message);
  898 |     } else {
  899 |         Print("ParameterOptimizer: ", message);
  900 |     }
  901 | }
  902 | 
  903 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  904 | //| Get optimization method name                                    |
  905 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  906 | string CParameterOptimizer::GetOptimizationMethodName(ENUM_OPTIMIZATION_METHOD method) {
  907 |     switch (method) {
  908 |         case OPT_METHOD_GENETIC: return "Genetic Algorithm";
  909 |         case OPT_METHOD_GRID_SEARCH: return "Grid Search";
  910 |         case OPT_METHOD_RANDOM_SEARCH: return "Random Search";
  911 |         case OPT_METHOD_BAYESIAN: return "Bayesian Optimization";
  912 |         case OPT_METHOD_PARTICLE_SWARM: return "Particle Swarm";
  913 |         case OPT_METHOD_SIMULATED_ANNEALING: return "Simulated Annealing";
  914 |         case OPT_METHOD_DIFFERENTIAL_EVOLUTION: return "Differential Evolution";
  915 |         case OPT_METHOD_GRADIENT_DESCENT: return "Gradient Descent";
  916 |         case OPT_METHOD_NELDER_MEAD: return "Nelder-Mead";
  917 |         case OPT_METHOD_HYBRID: return "Hybrid";
  918 |         default: return "Unknown";
  919 |     }
  920 | }
  921 | 
  922 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  923 | //| Get parameter type name                                        |
  924 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  925 | string CParameterOptimizer::GetParameterTypeName(ENUM_PARAMETER_TYPE type) {
  926 |     switch (type) {
  927 |         case PARAM_TYPE_INTEGER: return "Integer";
  928 |         case PARAM_TYPE_DOUBLE: return "Double";
  929 |         case PARAM_TYPE_BOOLEAN: return "Boolean";
  930 |         case PARAM_TYPE_ENUM: return "Enumeration";
  931 |         case PARAM_TYPE_STRING: return "String";
  932 |         case PARAM_TYPE_DATETIME: return "DateTime";
  933 |         case PARAM_TYPE_COLOR: return "Color";
  934 |         case PARAM_TYPE_ARRAY: return "Array";
  935 |         default: return "Unknown";
  936 |     }
  937 | }

  939 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  940 | //| Placeholder implementations for remaining methods              |
  941 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  942 | bool CParameterOptimizer::EvaluateFitness(SOptimizationResult& result) {
  943 |     // Placeholder implementation
  944 |     result.FitnessValue = 1.0 + (MathRand() / 32767.0);  // Random fitness 1.0-2.0
  945 |     result.IsValid = true;
  946 |     result.EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  947 |     result.ExecutionTime = (int)((result.EndTime - result.StartTime) * 1000);
  948 |     
  949 |     m_Statistics.TotalEvaluations++;
  950 |     m_Statistics.ValidEvaluations++;
  951 |     
  952 |     // Update best fitness
  953 |     if (result.FitnessValue > m_Statistics.BestFitness) {
  954 |         m_Statistics.BestFitness = result.FitnessValue;
  955 |         m_BestResult = result;
  956 |     }
  957 |     
  958 |     return true;
  959 | }
  960 | 
  961 | bool CParameterOptimizer::RunGeneticAlgorithm() {
  962 |     // Placeholder implementation
  963 |     LogActivity("Running genetic algorithm optimization");
  964 |     
  965 |     for (int gen = 0; gen < m_Config.MaxGenerations; gen++) {
  966 |         m_CurrentGeneration = gen;
  967 |         
  968 |         // Check convergence
  969 |         if (CheckConvergence()) {
  970 |             LogActivity(StringFormat("Converged at generation %d", gen));
  971 |             break;
  972 |         }
  973 |         
  974 |         // Update progress
  975 |         m_Statistics.ProgressPercent = (double)gen / m_Config.MaxGenerations * 100.0;
  976 |         
  977 |         // Simulate generation processing
  978 |         Sleep(10);  // Simulate processing time
  979 |     }
  980 |     
  981 |     m_Statistics.TotalGenerations = m_CurrentGeneration;
  982 |     return true;
  983 | }
  984 | 
  985 | bool CParameterOptimizer::RunGridSearch() {
  986 |     // Placeholder implementation
  987 |     LogActivity("Running grid search optimization");
  988 |     return true;
  989 | }
  990 | 
  991 | bool CParameterOptimizer::RunRandomSearch() {
  992 |     // Placeholder implementation
  993 |     LogActivity("Running random search optimization");
  994 |     return true;
  995 | }
  996 | 
  997 | bool CParameterOptimizer::RunBayesianOptimization() {
  998 |     // Placeholder implementation
  999 |     LogActivity("Running Bayesian optimization");
 1000 |     return true;
 1001 | }
 1002 | 
 1003 | bool CParameterOptimizer::CheckConvergence() {
 1004 |     // Placeholder implementation
 1005 |     return m_CurrentGeneration >= m_Config.MaxGenerations;
 1006 | }
 1007 | 
 1008 | bool CParameterOptimizer::UpdateStatistics() {
 1009 |     // Placeholder implementation
 1010 |     m_Statistics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
 1011 |     return true;
 1012 | }

   21 | struct ParameterSnapshot {
   22 |     datetime Timestamp;          // Thời gian snapshot
   23 |     double RiskPercent;          // Risk percentage
   24 |     int ATRPeriod;              // ATR period
   25 |     double ATRMultiplier;        // ATR multiplier
   26 |     int EMAPeriod1;             // EMA period 1
   27 |     int EMAPeriod2;             // EMA period 2
   28 |     int EMAPeriod3;             // EMA period 3
   29 |     double PullbackThreshold;    // Pullback threshold
   30 |     double TrendStrength;        // Trend strength threshold
   31 |     double VolatilityFilter;     // Volatility filter
   32 |     double CorrelationThreshold; // Correlation threshold
   33 |     
   34 |     // Performance metrics at time of snapshot
   35 |     double WinRate;             // Win rate at snapshot time
   36 |     double ProfitFactor;        // Profit factor at snapshot time
   37 |     double Expectancy;          // Expectancy at snapshot time
   38 |     double MaxDrawdown;         // Max drawdown at snapshot time
   39 |     
   40 |     // Constructor
   41 |     ParameterSnapshot() {
   42 |         Timestamp = 0;
   43 |         RiskPercent = 0.0;
   44 |         ATRPeriod = 0;
   45 |         ATRMultiplier = 0.0;
   46 |         EMAPeriod1 = 0;
   47 |         EMAPeriod2 = 0;
   48 |         EMAPeriod3 = 0;
   49 |         PullbackThreshold = 0.0;
   50 |         TrendStrength = 0.0;
   51 |         VolatilityFilter = 0.0;
   52 |         CorrelationThreshold = 0.0;
   53 |         WinRate = 0.0;
   54 |         ProfitFactor = 0.0;
   55 |         Expectancy = 0.0;
   56 |         MaxDrawdown = 0.0;
   57 |     ;

   59 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   60 | //| Parameter Stability Metrics                                      |
   61 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   62 | struct StabilityMetrics {
   63 |     double InstabilityIndex;     // Overall instability index (0-1)
   64 |     double ParameterVariance;    // Normalized parameter variance
   65 |     double PerformanceCorrelation; // Correlation between param changes and performance
   66 |     double TrendStability;       // Stability of parameter trends
   67 |     
   68 |     // Individual parameter instabilities
   69 |     double RiskInstability;
   70 |     double ATRInstability;
   71 |     double EMAInstability;
   72 |     double ThresholdInstability;
   73 |     
   74 |     // Alert levels
   75 |     bool IsUnstable;            // Overall instability flag
   76 |     bool RequiresAttention;     // Moderate instability flag
   77 |     bool ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker; // Critical instability flag
   78 |     
   79 |     datetime LastUpdate;
   80 |     
   81 |     // Constructor
   82 |     StabilityMetrics() {
   83 |         InstabilityIndex = 0.0;
   84 |         ParameterVariance = 0.0;
   85 |         PerformanceCorrelation = 0.0;
   86 |         TrendStability = 0.0;
   87 |         RiskInstability = 0.0;
   88 |         ATRInstability = 0.0;
   89 |         EMAInstability = 0.0;
   90 |         ThresholdInstability = 0.0;
   91 |         IsUnstable = false;
   92 |         RequiresAttention = false;
   93 |         ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker = false;
   94 |         LastUpdate = 0;
   95 |     }
   96 | };

  206 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::Initialize(EAContext* pContext) {
  207 |     if (pContext == NULL) {
  208 |         Print("[ParameterStabilityAnalyzer] ERROR: Context is NULL");
  209 |         return false;
  210 |     }
  211 |     
  212 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  213 |     
  214 |     // Resize array here, after context is confirmed valid
  215 |     ArrayResize(m_ParameterHistory, m_iMaxHistorySize);
  216 | 
  217 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  218 |     
  219 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  220 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("ParameterStabilityAnalyzer initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  221 |     }
  222 |     
  223 |     return true;

  231 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("ParameterStabilityAnalyzer deinitialized", __FUNCTION__);
  232 |     }
  233 |     
  234 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  235 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  236 | }

  238 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  239 | //| Set Custom Thresholds                                           |
  240 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  241 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::SetThresholds(double unstable, double critical, double attention) {
  242 |     m_dUnstableThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, unstable));
  243 |     m_dCriticalThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, critical));
  244 |     m_dAttentionThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, attention));
  245 |     
  246 |     if (m_bInitialized && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  247 |         string msg = StringFormat("Stability thresholds updated: Attention=%.2f, Unstable=%.2f, Critical=%.2f",
  248 |                                 m_dAttentionThreshold, m_dUnstableThreshold, m_dCriticalThreshold);
  249 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  250 |     }
  251 | }

  257 |     m_iMinSamplesForAnalysis = MathMax(5, minSamples);
  258 |     m_iAnalysisLookbackPeriod = MathMax(10, lookbackPeriod);
  259 |     
  260 |     if (m_bInitialized && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {

  262 |                                 m_iMinSamplesForAnalysis, m_iAnalysisLookbackPeriod);
  263 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  264 |     }
  265 | }
  266 | 
  267 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  268 | //| Record Parameter Snapshot                                        |
  269 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  270 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::RecordParameterSnapshot() {
  271 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) return;
  272 |     
  273 |     ParameterSnapshot snapshot;
  274 |     CaptureCurrentParameters(snapshot);
  275 |     
  276 |     // Add to history
  277 |     int index = m_iHistorySize % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  278 |     m_ParameterHistory[index] = snapshot;
  279 |     
  280 |     if (m_iHistorySize < m_iMaxHistorySize) {
  281 |         m_iHistorySize++;
  282 |     }
  283 |     
  284 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  285 |         string msg = StringFormat("Parameter snapshot recorded: Risk=%.2f%%, ATR=%d, EMA=%d/%d/%d",
  286 |                                 snapshot.RiskPercent, snapshot.ATRPeriod,
  287 |                                 snapshot.EMAPeriod1, snapshot.EMAPeriod2, snapshot.EMAPeriod3);
  288 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogDebug(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  289 |     }
  290 | }
  291 | 
  292 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  293 | //| Capture Current Parameters                                       |
  294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CaptureCurrentParameters(ParameterSnapshot& snapshot) {
  296 |     snapshot.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  297 |     
  298 |     // Capture current parameters from context
  299 |     if (m_pContext != NULL) {
  300 |         snapshot.RiskPercent = m_pContext.RiskPercent;
  301 |         snapshot.ATRPeriod = m_pContext.ATRPeriod;
  302 |         snapshot.ATRMultiplier = m_pContext.ATRMultiplier;
  303 |         snapshot.EMAPeriod1 = m_pContext.EMAPeriod1;
  304 |         snapshot.EMAPeriod2 = m_pContext.EMAPeriod2;
  305 |         snapshot.EMAPeriod3 = m_pContext.EMAPeriod3;
  306 |         snapshot.PullbackThreshold = m_pContext.PullbackThreshold;
  307 |         snapshot.TrendStrength = m_pContext.TrendStrength;
  308 |         snapshot.VolatilityFilter = m_pContext.VolatilityFilter;
  309 |         snapshot.CorrelationThreshold = m_pContext.CorrelationThreshold;
  310 |         
  311 |         // Capture performance metrics if PerformanceTracker is available
  312 |         if (m_pContext.pPerformanceTracker != NULL) {
  313 |             snapshot.WinRate = m_pContext.pPerformanceTracker.GetWinRate();
  314 |             snapshot.ProfitFactor = m_pContext.pPerformanceTracker.GetProfitFactor();
  315 |             snapshot.Expectancy = m_pContext.pPerformanceTracker.GetExpectancy();
  316 |             snapshot.MaxDrawdown = m_pContext.pPerformanceTracker.GetMaxDrawdown();
  317 |         }
  318 |     }
  319 | }
  320 | 
  321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 | //| Analyze Stability                                                |
  323 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  324 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::AnalyzeStability() {
  325 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_iHistorySize < m_iMinSamplesForAnalysis) {
  326 |         m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex = 0.0;
  327 |         return;
  328 |     }
  329 |     
  330 |     // Calculate individual components
  331 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance = CalculateParameterVariance();
  332 |     m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation = CalculatePerformanceCorrelation();
  333 |     m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability = CalculateTrendStability();
  334 |     
  335 |     // Calculate overall instability index (weighted average)
  336 |     double weights[] = {0.4, 0.3, 0.3}; // Variance, Correlation, Trend
  337 |     double components[] = {
  338 |         m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance,
  339 |         MathAbs(m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation), // Use absolute value
  340 |         1.0 - m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability // Invert trend stability
  341 |     };
  342 |     
  343 |     double weightedSum = 0.0;
  344 |     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
  345 |         weightedSum += components[i] * weights[i];
  346 |     }
  347 |     
  348 |     m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, weightedSum));
  349 |     
  350 |     // Update flags
  351 |     UpdateStabilityFlags();
  352 |     
  353 |     // Update timestamp
  354 |     m_CurrentMetrics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  355 |     
  356 |     // Check for alerts
  357 |     CheckAndTriggerAlerts();
  358 |     
  359 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  360 |         string msg = StringFormat("Stability Analysis: Index=%.3f, Variance=%.3f, Correlation=%.3f, Trend=%.3f",
  361 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex,
  362 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance,
  363 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation,
  364 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability);
  365 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  366 |     }
  367 | }
  368 | 
  369 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  370 | //| Calculate Parameter Variance                                     |
  371 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  372 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateParameterVariance() {
  373 |     int lookback = MathMin(m_iAnalysisLookbackPeriod, m_iHistorySize);
  374 |     if (lookback < 2) return 0.0;
  375 |     
  376 |     // Extract parameter arrays for analysis
  377 |     double riskValues[];
  378 |     double atrValues[];
  379 |     double emaValues[];
  380 |     double thresholdValues[];
  381 |     
  382 |     ArrayResize(riskValues, lookback);
  383 |     ArrayResize(atrValues, lookback);
  384 |     ArrayResize(emaValues, lookback);
  385 |     ArrayResize(thresholdValues, lookback);
  386 |     
  387 |     for (int i = 0; i < lookback; i++) {
  388 |         int index = (m_iHistorySize - lookback + i) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  389 |         riskValues[i] = m_ParameterHistory[index].RiskPercent;
  390 |         atrValues[i] = m_ParameterHistory[index].ATRPeriod;
  391 |         emaValues[i] = (m_ParameterHistory[index].EMAPeriod1 + 
  392 |                        m_ParameterHistory[index].EMAPeriod2 + 
  393 |                        m_ParameterHistory[index].EMAPeriod3) / 3.0;
  394 |         thresholdValues[i] = m_ParameterHistory[index].PullbackThreshold;
  395 |     }
  396 |     
  397 |     // Calculate individual instabilities
  398 |     m_CurrentMetrics.RiskInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(riskValues, lookback, 5.0); // 5% range
  399 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ATRInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(atrValues, lookback, 50.0); // 50 period range
  400 |     m_CurrentMetrics.EMAInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(emaValues, lookback, 100.0); // 100 period range
  401 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ThresholdInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(thresholdValues, lookback, 1.0); // 1.0 range
  402 |     
  403 |     // Return weighted average
  404 |     double weights[] = {0.3, 0.25, 0.25, 0.2};
  405 |     double instabilities[] = {
  406 |         m_CurrentMetrics.RiskInstability,
  407 |         m_CurrentMetrics.ATRInstability,
  408 |         m_CurrentMetrics.EMAInstability,
  409 |         m_CurrentMetrics.ThresholdInstability
  410 |     };
  411 |     
  412 |     double weightedVariance = 0.0;
  413 |     for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  414 |         weightedVariance += instabilities[i] * weights[i];
  415 |     }
  416 |     
  417 |     return weightedVariance;
  418 | }
  419 | 
  420 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  421 | //| Calculate Individual Parameter Instability                       |
  422 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  423 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateIndividualInstability(const double values[], int count, double normalizeRange) {
  424 |     if (count < 2) return 0.0;
  425 |     
  426 |     // Calculate mean
  427 |     double sum = 0.0;
  428 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  429 |         sum += values[i];
  430 |     }
  431 |     double mean = sum / count;
  432 |     
  433 |     // Calculate variance
  434 |     double variance = 0.0;
  435 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  436 |         double diff = values[i] - mean;
  437 |         variance += diff * diff;
  438 |     }
  439 |     variance /= count;
  440 |     
  441 |     // Normalize by range and return as instability score (0-1)
  442 |     double normalizedVariance = MathSqrt(variance) / normalizeRange;
  443 |     return MathMin(1.0, normalizedVariance);
  444 | }
  445 | 
  446 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  447 | //| Calculate Performance Correlation                                |
  448 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  449 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculatePerformanceCorrelation() {
  450 |     int lookback = MathMin(m_iAnalysisLookbackPeriod, m_iHistorySize);
  451 |     if (lookback < 5) return 0.0;
  452 |     
  453 |     // Calculate correlation between parameter changes and performance changes
  454 |     double paramChanges[];
  455 |     double perfChanges[];
  456 |     
  457 |     ArrayResize(paramChanges, lookback - 1);
  458 |     ArrayResize(perfChanges, lookback - 1);
  459 |     
  460 |     for (int i = 1; i < lookback; i++) {
  461 |         int currentIndex = (m_iHistorySize - lookback + i) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  462 |         int previousIndex = (m_iHistorySize - lookback + i - 1) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  463 |         
  464 |         // Calculate parameter change magnitude
  465 |         double riskChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].RiskPercent - 
  466 |                                   m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].RiskPercent);
  467 |         double atrChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  468 |                                  m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].ATRPeriod);
  469 |         
  470 |         paramChanges[i-1] = riskChange + atrChange / 10.0; // Normalize ATR change
  471 |         
  472 |         // Calculate performance change
  473 |         double perfChange = m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].WinRate - 
  474 |                           m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].WinRate;
  475 |         perfChanges[i-1] = perfChange;
  476 |     }
  477 |     
  478 |     // Calculate correlation coefficient
  479 |     double correlation = 0.0;
  480 |     if (lookback > 5) {
  481 |         // Simple correlation calculation
  482 |         double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0, sumY2 = 0;
  483 |         int n = lookback - 1;
  484 |         
  485 |         for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
  486 |             sumX += paramChanges[i];
  487 |             sumY += perfChanges[i];
  488 |             sumXY += paramChanges[i] * perfChanges[i];
  489 |             sumX2 += paramChanges[i] * paramChanges[i];
  490 |             sumY2 += perfChanges[i] * perfChanges[i];
  491 |         }
  492 |         
  493 |         double denominator = MathSqrt((n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX) * (n * sumY2 - sumY * sumY));
  494 |         if (denominator > 0) {
  495 |             correlation = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / denominator;
  496 |         }
  497 |     }
  498 |     
  499 |     return correlation;
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  503 | //| Calculate Trend Stability                                        |
  504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateTrendStability() {
  506 |     int lookback = MathMin(m_iAnalysisLookbackPeriod, m_iHistorySize);
  507 |     if (lookback < 5) return 1.0; // Assume stable if not enough data
  508 |     
  509 |     // Calculate trend consistency for key parameters
  510 |     double riskTrend = 0.0;
  511 |     double atrTrend = 0.0;
  512 |     
  513 |     // Simple trend calculation using first and last values
  514 |     int firstIndex = (m_iHistorySize - lookback) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  515 |     int lastIndex = (m_iHistorySize - 1) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  516 |     
  517 |     double riskChange = m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].RiskPercent - 
  518 |                        m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent;
  519 |     double atrChange = m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  520 |                       m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod;
  521 |     
  522 |     // Calculate trend consistency (how much parameters oscillate around trend)
  523 |     double riskOscillation = 0.0;
  524 |     double atrOscillation = 0.0;
  525 |     
  526 |     for (int i = 1; i < lookback - 1; i++) {
  527 |         int index = (m_iHistorySize - lookback + i) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  528 |         
  529 |         // Expected value based on linear trend
  530 |         double progress = (double)i / (lookback - 1);
  531 |         double expectedRisk = m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent + riskChange * progress;
  532 |         double expectedATR = m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod + atrChange * progress;
  533 |         
  534 |         // Actual oscillation from trend
  535 |         riskOscillation += MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[index].RiskPercent - expectedRisk);
  536 |         atrOscillation += MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[index].ATRPeriod - expectedATR);
  537 |     }
  538 |     
  539 |     // Normalize oscillations
  540 |     riskOscillation /= (lookback - 2);
  541 |     atrOscillation /= (lookback - 2);
  542 |     
  543 |     // Convert to stability score (lower oscillation = higher stability)
  544 |     double riskStability = MathMax(0.0, 1.0 - riskOscillation / 2.0); // Normalize by 2%
  545 |     double atrStability = MathMax(0.0, 1.0 - atrOscillation / 10.0); // Normalize by 10 periods
  546 |     
  547 |     return (riskStability + atrStability) / 2.0;
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | //| Update Stability Flags                                          |
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::UpdateStabilityFlags() {
  554 |     m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention = (m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex >= m_dAttentionThreshold);
  555 |     m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable = (m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex >= m_dUnstableThreshold);
  556 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker = (m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex >= m_dCriticalThreshold);
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | //| Check and Trigger Alerts                                        |
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CheckAndTriggerAlerts() {
  563 |     bool shouldAlert = false;
  564 |     string alertLevel = "";
  565 |     
  566 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker) {
  567 |         shouldAlert = true;
  568 |         alertLevel = "CRITICAL";
  569 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable) {
  570 |         shouldAlert = true;
  571 |         alertLevel = "WARNING";
  572 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention) {
  573 |         shouldAlert = true;
  574 |         alertLevel = "INFO";
  575 |     }
  576 |     
  577 |     // Check cooldown
  578 |     if (shouldAlert && (TimeCurrent() - m_LastAlertTime) >= (m_iAlertCooldownMinutes * 60)) {
  579 |         string alertMsg = StringFormat("PARAMETER STABILITY ALERT [%s]: Instability Index=%.3f",
  580 |                                      alertLevel, m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex);
  581 |         
  582 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  583 |             if (alertLevel == "CRITICAL") {
  584 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogError(alertMsg, __FUNCTION__);
  585 |             } else if (alertLevel == "WARNING") {
  586 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning(alertMsg, __FUNCTION__);
  587 |             } else {
  588 |                 m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(alertMsg, __FUNCTION__);
  589 |             }
  590 |         }
  591 |         
  592 |         // Trigger circuit breaker for critical alerts
  593 |         if (alertLevel == "CRITICAL" && m_pContext.pCircuitBreaker != NULL) {
  594 |             m_pContext.pCircuitBreaker.TriggerBreaker(TRIP_STABILITY_DEGRADATION, alertMsg);
  595 |         }
  596 |         
  597 |         m_LastAlertTime = TimeCurrent();
  598 |     }
  599 | }
  600 | 
  601 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  602 | //| Calculate Stability Index (Enhanced v14 method)                 |
  603 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  604 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateStabilityIndex() {
  605 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_iHistorySize < 2) return 1.0;
  606 |     
  607 |     AnalyzeStability();
  608 |     return 1.0 - m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex; // Convert instability to stability
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  612 | //| Calculate Normalized Change                                      |
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateNormalizedChange(double oldValue, double newValue, double maxRange, double minRange) {
  615 |     if (maxRange <= minRange || oldValue == 0) return 0.0;
  616 |     
  617 |     double change = MathAbs(newValue - oldValue);
  618 |     double range = maxRange - minRange;
  619 |     
  620 |     return MathMin(1.0, change / range);
  621 | }
  622 | 
  623 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  624 | //| Update Parameter Instability Index                              |
  625 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  626 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::UpdateParameterInstabilityIndex() {
  627 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  628 |     
  629 |     AnalyzeStability();
  630 |     
  631 |     // Update context with current stability status
  632 |     if (m_pContext != NULL) {
  633 |         m_pContext.ParameterStabilityIndex = 1.0 - m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex;
  634 |         m_pContext.IsParameterStabilityDegraded = m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable;
  635 |     }
  636 | }
  637 | 
  638 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  639 | //| Check if Strategy is Stable                                     |
  640 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  641 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::IsStrategyStable(double threshold = 0.6) {
  642 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return true;
  643 |     
  644 |     double currentStability = CalculateStabilityIndex();
  645 |     return currentStability >= threshold;
  646 | }
  647 | 
  648 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  649 | //| Get Risk Reduction Factor                                        |
  650 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  651 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GetRiskReductionFactor() {
  652 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return 1.0;
  653 |     
  654 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker) {
  655 |         return 0.1; // Reduce to 10% of normal risk
  656 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable) {
  657 |         return 0.5; // Reduce to 50% of normal risk
  658 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention) {
  659 |         return 0.8; // Reduce to 80% of normal risk
  660 |     }
  661 |     
  662 |     return 1.0; // No reduction
  663 | }
  664 | 
  665 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  666 | //| Should Reduce Trading                                            |
  667 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  668 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::ShouldReduceTrading() {
  669 |     return m_bInitialized && m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable;
  670 | }
  671 | 
  672 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  673 | //| Should Pause Optimization                                        |
  674 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  675 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::ShouldPauseOptimization() {
  676 |     return m_bInitialized && m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker;
  677 | }
  678 | 
  679 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  680 | //| Generate Stability Report                                        |
  681 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  682 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GenerateStabilityReport(string& report) {
  683 |     report = "\n=== PARAMETER STABILITY REPORT ===\n";
  684 |     report += StringFormat("Instability Index: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex);
  685 |     report += StringFormat("Parameter Variance: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance);
  686 |     report += StringFormat("Performance Correlation: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation);
  687 |     report += StringFormat("Trend Stability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability);
  688 |     
  689 |     report += "\n--- Individual Parameter Instabilities ---\n";
  690 |     report += StringFormat("Risk Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.RiskInstability);
  691 |     report += StringFormat("ATR Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ATRInstability);
  692 |     report += StringFormat("EMA Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.EMAInstability);
  693 |     report += StringFormat("Threshold Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ThresholdInstability);
  694 |     
  695 |     report += "\n--- Status Flags ---\n";
  696 |     report += StringFormat("Requires Attention: %s\n", m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention ? "YES" : "NO");
  697 |     report += StringFormat("Is Unstable: %s\n", m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable ? "YES" : "NO");
  698 |     report += StringFormat("Circuit Breaker: %s\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker ? "YES" : "NO");
  699 |     
  700 |     report += "\n--- Risk Management ---\n";
  701 |     report += StringFormat("Risk Reduction Factor: %.2f\n", GetRiskReductionFactor());
  702 |     report += StringFormat("Should Reduce Trading: %s\n", ShouldReduceTrading() ? "YES" : "NO");
  703 |     report += StringFormat("Should Pause Optimization: %s\n", ShouldPauseOptimization() ? "YES" : "NO");
  704 |     
  705 |     report += StringFormat("\nSamples in History: %d/%d\n", m_iHistorySize, m_iMaxHistorySize);
  706 |     report += StringFormat("Last Update: %s\n", TimeToString(m_CurrentMetrics.LastUpdate));
  707 | }
  708 | 
  709 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  710 | //| Reset                                                            |
  711 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  712 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::Reset() {
  713 |     m_CurrentMetrics = StabilityMetrics();
  714 |     m_iHistorySize = 0;
  715 |     m_LastAlertTime = 0;
  716 |     
  717 |     // Clear history array
  718 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_iMaxHistorySize; i++) {
  719 |         m_ParameterHistory[i] = ParameterSnapshot();
  720 |     }
  721 |     
  722 |     if (m_bInitialized && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  723 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("ParameterStabilityAnalyzer reset completed", __FUNCTION__);
  724 |     }
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  728 | //| Get Parameter Trends                                             |
  729 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  730 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GetParameterTrends(double& riskTrend, double& atrTrend, double& emaTrend) {
  731 |     riskTrend = 0.0;
  732 |     atrTrend = 0.0;
  733 |     emaTrend = 0.0;
  734 |     
  735 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_iHistorySize < 5) return;
  736 |     
  737 |     int lookback = MathMin(20, m_iHistorySize);
  738 |     int firstIndex = (m_iHistorySize - lookback) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  739 |     int lastIndex = (m_iHistorySize - 1) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  740 |     
  741 |     // Calculate trends as percentage change
  742 |     if (m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent > 0) {
  743 |         riskTrend = (m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].RiskPercent - 
  744 |                     m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent) / 
  745 |                     m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent * 100.0;
  746 |     }
  747 |     
  748 |     if (m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod > 0) {
  749 |         atrTrend = (m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  750 |                    m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod) / 
  751 |                    (double)m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod * 100.0;
  752 |     }
  753 |     
  754 |     double firstEMA = (m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].EMAPeriod1 + 
  755 |                       m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].EMAPeriod2 + 
  756 |                       m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].EMAPeriod3) / 3.0;
  757 |     double lastEMA = (m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].EMAPeriod1 + 
  758 |                      m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].EMAPeriod2 + 
  759 |                      m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].EMAPeriod3) / 3.0;
  760 |     
  761 |     if (firstEMA > 0) {
  762 |         emaTrend = (lastEMA - firstEMA) / firstEMA * 100.0;
  763 |     }
  764 | }
  765 | 
  766 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  767 | //| Get Recent Changes                                               |
  768 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  769 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GetRecentChanges(int lookbackBars, double& avgChange, double& maxChange) {
  770 |     avgChange = 0.0;
  771 |     maxChange = 0.0;
  772 |     
  773 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_iHistorySize < 2) return;
  774 |     
  775 |     int lookback = MathMin(lookbackBars, m_iHistorySize - 1);
  776 |     double totalChange = 0.0;
  777 |     
  778 |     for (int i = 1; i <= lookback; i++) {
  779 |         int currentIndex = (m_iHistorySize - i) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  780 |         int previousIndex = (m_iHistorySize - i - 1) % m_iMaxHistorySize;
  781 |         
  782 |         // Calculate total parameter change magnitude
  783 |         double riskChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].RiskPercent - 
  784 |                                   m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].RiskPercent);
  785 |         double atrChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  786 |                                  m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].ATRPeriod) / 10.0; // Normalize
  787 |         
  788 |         double totalParamChange = riskChange + atrChange;
  789 |         totalChange += totalParamChange;
  790 |         maxChange = MathMax(maxChange, totalParamChange);
  791 |     }
  792 |     
  793 |     avgChange = totalChange / lookback;
  794 | }
  795 | 
  796 | } // namespace v5
  797 | } // namespace ApexPullback
  798 | 
  799 | #endif // APEX_PARAMETER_STABILITY_ANALYZER_MQH_

   19 | //| Walk-Forward Analysis Period Structure                           |
   20 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   21 | struct WalkForwardPeriod {
   22 |     datetime StartTime;              // Period start time
   23 |     datetime EndTime;                // Period end time
   24 |     int TotalTrades;                 // Total trades in period
   25 |     int WinningTrades;               // Winning trades count
   26 |     double TotalProfit;              // Total profit/loss
   27 |     double MaxDrawdown;              // Maximum drawdown
   28 |     double ProfitFactor;             // Profit factor
   29 |     double WinRate;                  // Win rate percentage
   30 |     double SharpeRatio;              // Sharpe ratio
   31 |     double SortinoRatio;             // Sortino ratio
   32 |     double CalmarRatio;              // Calmar ratio
   33 |     double AverageWin;               // Average winning trade
   34 |     double AverageLoss;              // Average losing trade
   35 |     double LargestWin;               // Largest winning trade
   36 |     double LargestLoss;              // Largest losing trade
   37 |     double ConsecutiveWins;          // Max consecutive wins
   38 |     double ConsecutiveLosses;        // Max consecutive losses
   39 |     bool IsStable;                   // Period stability flag
   40 |     double StabilityScore;           // Calculated stability score
   41 |     
   42 |     WalkForwardPeriod() {
   43 |         StartTime = 0;
   44 |         EndTime = 0;
   45 |         TotalTrades = 0;
   46 |         WinningTrades = 0;
   47 |         TotalProfit = 0.0;
   48 |         MaxDrawdown = 0.0;
   49 |         ProfitFactor = 0.0;
   50 |         WinRate = 0.0;
   51 |         SharpeRatio = 0.0;
   52 |         SortinoRatio = 0.0;
   53 |         CalmarRatio = 0.0;
   54 |         AverageWin = 0.0;
   55 |         AverageLoss = 0.0;
   56 |         LargestWin = 0.0;
   57 |         LargestLoss = 0.0;
   58 |         ConsecutiveWins = 0;
   59 |         ConsecutiveLosses = 0;
   60 |         IsStable = false;
   61 |         StabilityScore = 0.0;
   62 |     }
   63 | };

  174 | struct WalkForwardWindow {
  175 |     datetime InSampleStart;          // In-sample period start
  176 |     datetime InSampleEnd;            // In-sample period end
  177 |     datetime OutOfSampleStart;       // Out-of-sample period start
  178 |     datetime OutOfSampleEnd;         // Out-of-sample period end

  180 |     double InSampleReturn;           // In-sample return
  181 |     double OutOfSampleReturn;        // Out-of-sample return
  182 |     double Efficiency;               // Walk-forward efficiency
  183 |     int InSampleTrades;              // Number of in-sample trades
  184 |     int OutOfSampleTrades;           // Number of out-of-sample trades
  185 |     bool IsValid;                    // Window validity
  186 |

  192 |         InSampleReturn = 0.0;
  193 |         OutOfSampleReturn = 0.0;

  196 |         OutOfSampleTrades = 0;
  197 |         IsValid = false;
