  201 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  202 | //| Parameter Range Structure                                        |
  203 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  204 | struct ParameterRange {
  205 |     double MinValue;                 // Minimum parameter value
  206 |     double MaxValue;                 // Maximum parameter value
  207 |     double Step;                     // Optimization step
  208 |     double CurrentValue;             // Current parameter value
  209 |     bool IsOptimizable;              // Can this parameter be optimized
  210 |     
  211 |     ParameterRange() {
  212 |         MinValue = 0.0;
  213 |         MaxValue = 0.0;
  214 |         Step = 0.0;
  215 |         CurrentValue = 0.0;
  216 |         IsOptimizable = true;
  217 |     }
  218 |     
  219 |     ParameterRange(double min, double max, double step, double current = 0.0) {
  220 |         MinValue = min;
  221 |         MaxValue = max;
  222 |         Step = step;
  223 |         CurrentValue = (current == 0.0) ? min : current;
  224 |         IsOptimizable = true;
  225 |     }
  226 | };

  515 | 
  516 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  517 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  518 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  519 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  520 |     if (context == NULL) {
  521 |         Print("[StrategyOptimizer] ERROR: Context is NULL");
  522 |         return false;
  523 |     }
  524 |     
  525 |     m_pContext = context;
  526 |     
  527 |     // Initialize parameter ranges
  528 |     InitializeParameterRanges();
  529 |     
  530 |     // Load previous results if available
  531 |     LoadPreviousResults();
  532 |     
  533 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  534 |     
  535 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  536 |         string msg = StringFormat("StrategyOptimizer initialized: InSample=%d days, OutSample=%d days",
  537 |                                 m_Config.InSampleDays, m_Config.OutOfSampleDays);
  538 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  539 |     }
  540 |     
  541 |     return true;
  542 | }
  543 | 
  544 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  545 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  546 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  547 | void CStrategyOptimizer::Deinitialize() {
  548 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  549 |         SaveOptimizationResults();
  550 |         
  551 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  552 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("StrategyOptimizer deinitialized", __FUNCTION__);
  553 |         }
  554 |     }
  555 |     
  556 |     Cleanup();
  557 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  558 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  559 | }
  560 | 
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | //| Set Configuration                                                |
  563 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  564 | void CStrategyOptimizer::SetConfig(const StrategyOptimizerConfig& config) {
  565 |     m_Config = config;
  566 |     
  567 |     if (m_bInitialized && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  568 |         string msg = StringFormat("StrategyOptimizer configuration updated: Stability threshold=%.1f%%",
  569 |                                 m_Config.StabilityThreshold);
  570 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  571 |     }
  572 | }
  573 | 
  574 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  575 | //| Run Walk-Forward Analysis                                        |
  576 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  577 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::RunWalkForwardAnalysis(datetime startDate, datetime endDate) {
  578 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_Config.EnableWalkForward) {
  579 |         return false;
  580 |     }
  581 |     
  582 |     m_bIsOptimizing = true;
  583 |     datetime optimizationStart = GetTickCount();
  584 |     
  585 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  586 |         string msg = StringFormat("Starting Walk-Forward Analysis: %s to %s",
  587 |                                 TimeToString(startDate), TimeToString(endDate));
  588 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  589 |     }
  590 |     
  591 |     // Create optimization windows
  592 |     if (!CreateOptimizationWindows(startDate, endDate)) {
  593 |         m_bIsOptimizing = false;
  594 |         return false;
  595 |     }
  596 |     
  597 |     // Optimize each window
  598 |     int successfulWindows = 0;
  599 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_iWindowCount; i++) {
  600 |         if (OptimizeParametersForWindow(m_Windows[i])) {
  601 |             successfulWindows++;
  602 |         }
  603 |     }
  604 |     
  605 |     // Calculate overall results
  606 |     double efficiency = GetWalkForwardEfficiency();
  607 |     double avgOutOfSampleReturn = GetAverageOutOfSampleReturn();
  608 |     
  609 |     // Update statistics
  610 |     m_iTotalOptimizations++;
  611 |     if (efficiency > 0.5) { // Consider successful if efficiency > 50%
  612 |         m_iSuccessfulOptimizations++;
  613 |     }
  614 |     
  615 |     m_LastOptimization = TimeCurrent();
  616 |     m_dTotalOptimizationTime += (GetTickCount() - optimizationStart);
  617 |     m_dAverageOptimizationTime = m_dTotalOptimizationTime / m_iTotalOptimizations;
  618 |     
  619 |     m_bIsOptimizing = false;
  620 |     
  621 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  622 |         string msg = StringFormat("Walk-Forward Analysis completed: %d/%d windows successful, Efficiency=%.2f%%",
  623 |                                 successfulWindows, m_iWindowCount, efficiency * 100);
  624 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  625 |     }
  626 |     
  627 |     return (successfulWindows > 0);
  628 | }
  629 | 
  630 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  631 | //| Optimize Parameters                                              |
  632 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  633 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::OptimizeParameters(datetime startDate, datetime endDate, OptimalParameters& result) {
  634 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  635 |         return false;
  636 |     }
  637 |     
  638 |     if (!IsValidOptimizationPeriod(startDate, endDate)) {
  639 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  640 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning("Invalid optimization period", __FUNCTION__);
  641 |         }
  642 |         return false;
  643 |     }
  644 |     
  645 |     OptimalParameters bestParams;
  646 |     double bestScore = -1.0;
  647 |     
  648 |     // Choose optimization method based on configuration
  649 |     if (m_Config.UseBayesianOptimization) {
  650 |         bestParams = BayesianOptimization(startDate, endDate);
  651 |     } else if (m_Config.UseGeneticAlgorithm) {
  652 |         bestParams = GeneticAlgorithmOptimization(startDate, endDate);
  653 |     } else if (m_Config.UseParticleSwarm) {
  654 |         bestParams = ParticleSwarmOptimization(startDate, endDate);
  655 |     } else {
  656 |         bestParams = GridSearchOptimization(startDate, endDate);
  657 |     }
  658 |     
  659 |     // Validate and test for overfitting
  660 |     if (ValidateParameters(bestParams)) {
  661 |         if (m_Config.EnableOverfittingDetection) {
  662 |             OverfittingResults overfittingResults = DetectOverfitting(bestParams);
  663 |             if (overfittingResults.IsOverfitted) {
  664 |                 if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  665 |                     string msg = StringFormat("Overfitting detected: %s", overfittingResults.OverfittingReason);
  666 |                     m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  667 |                 }
  668 |                 // Apply penalty to score
  669 |                 bestParams.FinalScore *= (1.0 - overfittingResults.OverfittingPenalty);
  670 |             }
  671 |             m_LastOverfittingResults = overfittingResults;
  672 |         }
  673 |         
  674 |         result = bestParams;
  675 |         m_CurrentBest = bestParams;
  676 |         m_dCurrentScore = bestParams.FinalScore;
  677 |         
  678 |         if (bestParams.FinalScore > m_dBestScore) {
  679 |             m_dBestScore = bestParams.FinalScore;
  680 |         }
  681 |         
  682 |         LogOptimizationResults(bestParams, bestParams.FinalScore);
  683 |         return true;
  684 |     }
  685 |     
  686 |     return false;
  687 | }
  688 | 
  689 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  690 | //| Should Reoptimize                                                |
  691 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  692 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::ShouldReoptimize() {
  693 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_bIsOptimizing) {
  694 |         return false;
  695 |     }
  696 |     
  697 |     // Check time-based reoptimization
  698 |     if (m_LastOptimization > 0) {
  699 |         int daysSinceLastOptimization = (int)((TimeCurrent() - m_LastOptimization) / 86400);
  700 |         if (daysSinceLastOptimization >= m_Config.OptimizationInterval) {
  701 |             return true;
  702 |         }
  703 |     } else {
  704 |         return true; // First optimization
  705 |     }
  706 |     
  707 |     // Check performance-based reoptimization
  708 |     if (m_Config.EnableParameterStability && IsPerformanceDegrading()) {
  709 |         return true;
  710 |     }
  711 |     
  712 |     // Check if current strategy is overfitted
  713 |     if (m_Config.EnableOverfittingDetection && IsCurrentStrategyOverfitted()) {
  714 |         return true;
  715 |     }
  716 |     
  717 |     return false;
  718 | }
  719 | 
  720 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  721 | //| Monitor Parameter Stability                                      |
  722 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  723 | void CStrategyOptimizer::MonitorParameterStability() {
  724 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_Config.EnableParameterStability) {
  725 |         return;
  726 |     }
  727 |     
  728 |     // Calculate current stability score
  729 |     double currentStability = GetCurrentStabilityScore();
  730 |     
  731 |     if (currentStability < m_Config.StabilityThreshold) {
  732 |         m_bOptimizationNeeded = true;
  733 |         
  734 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  735 |             string msg = StringFormat("Parameter stability below threshold: %.2f%% < %.2f%%",
  736 |                                     currentStability, m_Config.StabilityThreshold);
  737 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogWarning(msg, __FUNCTION__);
  738 |         }
  739 |     }
  740 | }
  741 | 
  742 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  743 | //| OnTick Event Handler                                             |
  744 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  745 | void CStrategyOptimizer::OnTick() {
  746 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  747 |     
  748 |     // Periodic stability monitoring (every 100 ticks)
  749 |     static int tickCount = 0;
  750 |     tickCount++;
  751 |     
  752 |     if (tickCount >= 100) {
  753 |         MonitorParameterStability();
  754 |         tickCount = 0;
  755 |     }
  756 | }
  757 | 
  758 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  759 | //| OnNewBar Event Handler                                           |
  760 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  761 | void CStrategyOptimizer::OnNewBar() {
  762 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  763 |     
  764 |     // Check if reoptimization is needed
  765 |     if (ShouldReoptimize()) {
  766 |         datetime endDate = TimeCurrent();
  767 |         datetime startDate = endDate - (m_Config.InSampleDays + m_Config.OutOfSampleDays) * 86400;
  768 |         
  769 |         OptimalParameters newParams;
  770 |         if (OptimizeParameters(startDate, endDate, newParams)) {
  771 |             ApplyOptimalParameters();
  772 |         }
  773 |     }
  774 | }
  775 |

  777 | //| OnTradeClose Event Handler                                       |

  779 | void CStrategyOptimizer::OnTradeClose(double profit, double loss) {
  780 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  781 |     
  782 |     // Update performance tracking
  783 |     // This will be used for stability monitoring and overfitting detection
  784 | }
  785 | 
  786 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  787 | //| Get Walk-Forward Efficiency                                      |
  788 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  789 | double CStrategyOptimizer::GetWalkForwardEfficiency() {
  790 |     if (m_iWindowCount == 0) return 0.0;
  791 |     
  792 |     double totalEfficiency = 0.0;
  793 |     int validWindows = 0;
  794 |     
  795 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_iWindowCount; i++) {
  796 |         if (m_Windows[i].IsValid) {
  797 |             totalEfficiency += m_Windows[i].Efficiency;
  798 |             validWindows++;
  799 |         }
  800 |     }
  801 |     
  802 |     return (validWindows > 0) ? totalEfficiency / validWindows : 0.0;
  803 | }
  804 | 
  805 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  806 | //| Get Average Out-of-Sample Return                                 |
  807 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  808 | double CStrategyOptimizer::GetAverageOutOfSampleReturn() {
  809 |     if (m_iWindowCount == 0) return 0.0;
  810 |     
  811 |     double totalReturn = 0.0;
  812 |     int validWindows = 0;
  813 |     
  814 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_iWindowCount; i++) {
  815 |         if (m_Windows[i].IsValid) {
  816 |             totalReturn += m_Windows[i].OutOfSampleReturn;
  817 |             validWindows++;
  818 |         }
  819 |     }
  820 |     
  821 |     return (validWindows > 0) ? totalReturn / validWindows : 0.0;
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  825 | //| Get Optimization Success Rate                                    |
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | double CStrategyOptimizer::GetOptimizationSuccessRate() {
  828 |     if (m_iTotalOptimizations == 0) return 0.0;
  829 |     
  830 |     return (double)m_iSuccessfulOptimizations / m_iTotalOptimizations * 100.0;
  831 | }

  835 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  836 | string CStrategyOptimizer::GetOptimizationReport() {
  837 |     return FormatOptimizationReport();
  838 | }
  839 | 
  840 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  841 | //| Get Detailed Analysis Report                                     |
  842 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  843 | string CStrategyOptimizer::GetDetailedAnalysisReport() {
  844 |     string report = "";
  845 |     
  846 |     report += "=== STRATEGY OPTIMIZER DETAILED REPORT ===\n";
  847 |     report += StringFormat("Total Optimizations: %d\n", m_iTotalOptimizations);
  848 |     report += StringFormat("Successful Optimizations: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
  849 |                           m_iSuccessfulOptimizations, GetOptimizationSuccessRate());
  850 |     report += StringFormat("Best Score: %.4f\n", m_dBestScore);
  851 |     report += StringFormat("Current Score: %.4f\n", m_dCurrentScore);
  852 |     report += StringFormat("Walk-Forward Efficiency: %.2f%%\n", GetWalkForwardEfficiency() * 100);
  853 |     report += StringFormat("Average Out-of-Sample Return: %.2f%%\n", GetAverageOutOfSampleReturn() * 100);
  854 |     report += StringFormat("Last Optimization: %s\n", TimeToString(m_LastOptimization));
  855 |     
  856 |     if (m_Config.EnableOverfittingDetection) {
  857 |         report += "\n=== OVERFITTING ANALYSIS ===\n";
  858 |         report += StringFormat("Overfitting Detected: %s\n", 
  859 |                               m_LastOverfittingResults.IsOverfitted ? "YES" : "NO");
  860 |         if (m_LastOverfittingResults.IsOverfitted) {
  861 |             report += StringFormat("Reason: %s\n", m_LastOverfittingResults.OverfittingReason);
  862 |             report += StringFormat("Severity: %s\n", EnumToString(m_LastOverfittingResults.Level));
  863 |         }
  864 |         report += StringFormat("Parameter Sensitivity: %.3f\n", m_LastOverfittingResults.ParameterSensitivity);
  865 |         report += StringFormat("Performance Decay: %.3f\n", m_LastOverfittingResults.PerformanceDecay);
  866 |         report += StringFormat("Stability Index: %.3f\n", m_LastOverfittingResults.StabilityIndex);
  867 |     }
  868 |     
  869 |     report += "\n=== CURRENT OPTIMAL PARAMETERS ===\n";
  870 |     report += StringFormat("Risk Percent: %.2f%%\n", m_CurrentBest.RiskPercent);
  871 |     report += StringFormat("ATR Multiplier SL: %.2f\n", m_CurrentBest.ATRMultiplierSL);
  872 |     report += StringFormat("ATR Multiplier TP: %.2f\n", m_CurrentBest.ATRMultiplierTP);
  873 |     report += StringFormat("ATR Period: %d\n", m_CurrentBest.ATRPeriod);
  874 |     report += StringFormat("EMA Fast: %d\n", m_CurrentBest.EMAFastPeriod);
  875 |     report += StringFormat("EMA Slow: %d\n", m_CurrentBest.EMASlowPeriod);
  876 |     report += StringFormat("RSI Period: %d\n", m_CurrentBest.RSIPeriod);
  877 |     report += StringFormat("Pullback Threshold: %.3f\n", m_CurrentBest.PullbackThreshold);
  878 |     
  879 |     return report;
  880 | }
  881 | 
  882 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  883 | //| Export Results                                                   |
  884 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  885 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::ExportResults(string filename) {
  886 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return false;
  887 |     
  888 |     string fullPath = StringFormat("%s\\%s", TerminalInfoString(TERMINAL_DATA_PATH), filename);
  889 |     
  890 |     int fileHandle = FileOpen(fullPath, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT);
  891 |     if (fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  892 |         if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  893 |             m_pContext.pLogger.LogError("Failed to create export file: " + fullPath, __FUNCTION__);
  894 |         }
  895 |         return false;
  896 |     }
  897 |     
  898 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, GetDetailedAnalysisReport());
  899 |     FileClose(fileHandle);
  900 |     
  901 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  902 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("Optimization results exported to: " + fullPath, __FUNCTION__);
  903 |     }
  904 |     
  905 |     return true;
  906 | }

  972 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  973 | void CStrategyOptimizer::Reset() {
  974 |     ArrayResize(m_Windows, 0);
  975 |     ArrayResize(m_Periods, 0);
  976 |     m_iWindowCount = 0;
  977 |     m_iPeriodCount = 0;
  978 |     
  979 |     m_LastOptimization = 0;
  980 |     m_bIsOptimizing = false;
  981 |     m_bOptimizationNeeded = false;
  982 |     
  983 |     m_dBestScore = 0.0;
  984 |     m_dCurrentScore = 0.0;
  985 |     m_iTotalOptimizations = 0;
  986 |     m_iSuccessfulOptimizations = 0;
  987 |     
  988 |     ResetToDefaultParameters();
  989 |     
  990 |     if (m_bInitialized && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
  991 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogInfo("StrategyOptimizer reset completed", __FUNCTION__);
  992 |     }
  993 | }

 1025 |     m_RiskPercentRange = ParameterRange(0.5, 5.0, 0.1, 1.0);

 1034 |     m_PullbackThresholdRange = ParameterRange(0.382, 0.786, 0.01, 0.618);

 1190 | double CStrategyOptimizer::NormalizeScore(double rawScore) {
 1191 |     // Implementation for score normalization
 1192 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, rawScore));
 1193 | }
 1194 | 
 1195 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::IsValidOptimizationPeriod(datetime start, datetime end) {
 1196 |     // Implementation for optimization period validation
 1197 |     return (end > start) && ((end - start) >= 86400 * m_Config.InSampleDays);
 1198 | }
 1199 | 
 1200 | void CStrategyOptimizer::LogAnalysisProgress(const string& message) {
 1201 |     if (m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1202 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogDebug(message, __FUNCTION__);
 1203 |     }
 1204 | }
 1205 | 
 1206 | string CStrategyOptimizer::FormatOptimizationReport() {
 1207 |     string report = "";
 1208 |     report += "=== STRATEGY OPTIMIZER REPORT ===\n";
 1209 |     report += StringFormat("Total Optimizations: %d\n", m_iTotalOptimizations);
 1210 |     report += StringFormat("Success Rate: %.1f%%\n", GetOptimizationSuccessRate());
 1211 |     report += StringFormat("Best Score: %.4f\n", m_dBestScore);
 1212 |     report += StringFormat("Walk-Forward Efficiency: %.2f%%\n", GetWalkForwardEfficiency() * 100);
 1213 |     return report;
 1214 | }
 1215 | 
 1216 | 
 1217 | 
 1218 | #endif // APEX_STRATEGY_OPTIMIZER_MQH_

  540 |     string GetMethodName(ENUM_WF_METHOD method);
  541 |     string GetOptimizationName(ENUM_WF_OPTIMIZATION optimization);
  542 |     string GetFitnessName(ENUM_WF_FITNESS fitness);
  543 |     string GetValidationName(ENUM_WF_VALIDATION validation);
  544 |     string GetRebalanceName(ENUM_WF_REBALANCE rebalance);
  545 |     string GetStatusName(ENUM_WF_STATUS status);
  546 |     string GetAlertTypeName(ENUM_WF_ALERT_TYPE alertType);
  547 |     
  548 |     // Status
  549 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_bInitialized; }
  550 |     ENUM_WF_STATUS GetStatus() const { return m_Status; }
  551 |     bool IsRunning() const { return m_Status == WF_STATUS_OPTIMIZING || m_Status == WF_STATUS_TESTING || m_Status == WF_STATUS_ANALYZING; }
  552 |     bool IsCompleted() const { return m_Status == WF_STATUS_COMPLETED; }
  553 |     datetime GetStartTime() const { return m_StartTime; }
  554 |     datetime GetLastUpdate() const { return m_LastUpdate; }
  555 | };
  556 | 
  557 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  558 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | CWalkForwardAnalyzer::CWalkForwardAnalyzer() {
  561 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  562 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  563 |     m_RateCount = 0;
  564 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  565 |     m_Status = WF_STATUS_IDLE;
  566 |     m_StartTime = 0;
  567 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  568 |     m_CurrentStep = 0;
  569 |     
  570 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  571 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  572 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentResult);
  573 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentStepData);
  574 |     
  575 |     // Set default configuration
  576 |     m_Config.Method = WF_METHOD_FIXED_WINDOW;
  577 |     m_Config.OptMethod = WF_OPT_GENETIC;
  578 |     m_Config.FitnessFunction = WF_FITNESS_SHARPE_RATIO;
  579 |     m_Config.ValidationMethod = WF_VALIDATION_SIMPLE;
  580 |     m_Config.RebalanceMethod = WF_REBALANCE_FIXED_PERIOD;
  581 |     
  582 |     m_Config.StartDate = TimeCurrent() - 2 * 365 * 24 * 3600; // 2 years ago
  583 |     m_Config.EndDate = TimeCurrent();
  584 |     m_Config.WindowSize = 252;              // 1 year
  585 |     m_Config.StepSize = 21;                 // 1 month
  586 |     m_Config.MinWindowSize = 126;           // 6 months
  587 |     m_Config.MaxWindowSize = 504;           // 2 years
  588 |     
  589 |     m_Config.Symbol = Symbol();
  590 |     m_Config.Timeframe = PERIOD_H1;
  591 |     m_Config.InSampleRatio = 0.7;           // 70% in-sample
  592 |     m_Config.OutSampleRatio = 0.3;          // 30% out-of-sample
  593 |     m_Config.RequireMinBars = true;
  594 |     m_Config.MinBarsRequired = 100;
  595 |     
  596 |     m_Config.MaxOptimizationRuns = 1000;
  597 |     m_Config.PopulationSize = 50;
  598 |     m_Config.MaxGenerations = 100;
  599 |     m_Config.MutationRate = 0.1;
  600 |     m_Config.CrossoverRate = 0.8;
  601 |     m_Config.ConvergenceThreshold = 0.001;
  602 |     
  603 |     m_Config.ValidationRuns = 100;
  604 |     m_Config.ValidationThreshold = 0.05;
  605 |     m_Config.EnableRobustnessTest = true;
  606 |     m_Config.NoiseLevel = 0.05;
  607 |     
  608 |     m_Config.RebalancePeriod = 63;          // 3 months
  609 |     m_Config.PerformanceThreshold = -0.1;   // -10%
  610 |     m_Config.DrawdownThreshold = 0.15;      // 15%
  611 |     m_Config.VolatilityThreshold = 0.25;    // 25%
  612 |     m_Config.EnableAdaptiveRebalance = false;
  613 |     
  614 |     m_Config.MaxDrawdownPercent = 20.0;     // 20%
  615 |     m_Config.MaxLossPercent = 50.0;         // 50%
  616 |     m_Config.MinProfitFactor = 1.2;
  617 |     m_Config.MinSharpeRatio = 0.5;
  618 |     m_Config.StopOnThresholds = true;
  619 |     
  620 |     m_Config.SaveResults = true;
  621 |     m_Config.GenerateReport = true;
  622 |     m_Config.SaveEquityCurves = true;
  623 |     m_Config.SaveParameterHistory = true;
  624 |     m_Config.OutputPath = "";
  625 |     
  626 |     m_Config.EnableParallelProcessing = false;
  627 |     m_Config.MaxThreads = 4;
  628 |     m_Config.EnableCaching = true;
  629 |     m_Config.EnableLogging = true;
  630 | }

  639 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  640 | //| Initialize walk-forward analyzer                               |
  641 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  642 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  643 |     if (context == NULL) {
  644 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  645 |         return false;
  646 |     }
  647 |     
  648 |     m_pContext = context;
  649 |     
  650 |     // Initialize arrays
  651 |     ArrayResize(m_Results, 50);             // Support 50 analysis results
  652 |     ArrayResize(m_Rates, 100000);           // Support 100k bars
  653 |     
  654 |     m_ResultCount = 0;
  655 |     m_RateCount = 0;
  656 |     m_CurrentStep = 0;
  657 |     
  658 |     // Initialize statistics
  659 |     m_Statistics.TotalAnalyses = 0;
  660 |     m_Statistics.CompletedAnalyses = 0;
  661 |     m_Statistics.FailedAnalyses = 0;
  662 |     m_Statistics.LastErrorTime = 0;
  663 |     m_Statistics.BestTotalReturn = -DBL_MAX;
  664 |     m_Statistics.BestSharpeRatio = -DBL_MAX;
  665 |     m_Statistics.BestConsistency = -DBL_MAX;
  666 |     m_Statistics.LowestOverfitting = DBL_MAX;
  667 |     
  668 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  669 |     m_Status = WF_STATUS_IDLE;
  670 |     
  671 |     LogActivity("Walk-forward analyzer initialized successfully");
  672 |     return true;
  673 | }
  674 | 
  675 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  676 | //| Deinitialize walk-forward analyzer                             |
  677 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  678 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::Deinitialize() {
  679 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  680 |         StopAnalysis();
  681 |         
  682 |         // Clear arrays
  683 |         ArrayFree(m_Results);
  684 |         ArrayFree(m_Rates);
  685 |         
  686 |         m_ResultCount = 0;
  687 |         m_RateCount = 0;
  688 |         m_CurrentStep = 0;
  689 |         
  690 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  691 |         m_Status = WF_STATUS_IDLE;
  692 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  693 |         
  694 |         LogActivity("Walk-forward analyzer deinitialized");
  695 |     }
  696 |     
  697 |     return true;
  698 | }
  699 | 
  700 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  701 | //| Configure walk-forward analyzer                                |
  702 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  703 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::Configure(const SWalkForwardConfig& config) {
  704 |     m_Config = config;
  705 |     
  706 |     if (!ValidateConfiguration()) {
  707 |         LogError("Configuration validation failed");
  708 |         return false;
  709 |     }
  710 |     
  711 |     LogActivity("Walk-forward analyzer configured successfully");
  712 |     return true;
  713 | }
  714 | 
  715 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  716 | //| Validate configuration                                         |
  717 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  718 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::ValidateConfiguration() {
  719 |     // Validate date range
  720 |     if (m_Config.StartDate >= m_Config.EndDate) {
  721 |         LogError("Invalid date range: start date must be before end date");
  722 |         return false;
  723 |     }
  724 |     
  725 |     // Validate window sizes
  726 |     if (m_Config.WindowSize <= 0) {
  727 |         LogError("Invalid window size: must be positive");
  728 |         return false;
  729 |     }
  730 |     
  731 |     if (m_Config.StepSize <= 0) {
  732 |         LogError("Invalid step size: must be positive");
  733 |         return false;
  734 |     }
  735 |     
  736 |     if (m_Config.MinWindowSize > m_Config.WindowSize) {
  737 |         LogError("Minimum window size cannot be larger than window size");
  738 |         return false;
  739 |     }
  740 |     
  741 |     // Validate ratios
  742 |     if (m_Config.InSampleRatio <= 0 || m_Config.InSampleRatio >= 1) {
  743 |         LogError("Invalid in-sample ratio: must be between 0 and 1");
  744 |         return false;
  745 |     }
  746 |     
  747 |     if (m_Config.OutSampleRatio <= 0 || m_Config.OutSampleRatio >= 1) {
  748 |         LogError("Invalid out-of-sample ratio: must be between 0 and 1");
  749 |         return false;
  750 |     }
  751 |     
  752 |     if (m_Config.InSampleRatio + m_Config.OutSampleRatio > 1.0) {
  753 |         LogError("Sum of in-sample and out-of-sample ratios cannot exceed 1.0");
  754 |         return false;
  755 |     }
  756 |     
  757 |     // Validate optimization settings
  758 |     if (m_Config.MaxOptimizationRuns <= 0) {
  759 |         LogError("Invalid maximum optimization runs: must be positive");
  760 |         return false;
  761 |     }
  762 |     
  763 |     if (m_Config.OptMethod == WF_OPT_GENETIC) {
  764 |         if (m_Config.PopulationSize <= 0) {
  765 |             LogError("Invalid population size: must be positive");
  766 |             return false;
  767 |         }
  768 |         
  769 |         if (m_Config.MaxGenerations <= 0) {
  770 |             LogError("Invalid maximum generations: must be positive");
  771 |             return false;
  772 |         }
  773 |         
  774 |         if (m_Config.MutationRate < 0 || m_Config.MutationRate > 1) {
  775 |             LogError("Invalid mutation rate: must be between 0 and 1");
  776 |             return false;
  777 |         }
  778 |         
  779 |         if (m_Config.CrossoverRate < 0 || m_Config.CrossoverRate > 1) {
  780 |             LogError("Invalid crossover rate: must be between 0 and 1");
  781 |             return false;
  782 |         }
  783 |     }
  784 |     
  785 |     // Validate validation settings
  786 |     if (m_Config.ValidationRuns <= 0) {
  787 |         LogError("Invalid validation runs: must be positive");
  788 |         return false;
  789 |     }
  790 |     
  791 |     // Validate risk thresholds
  792 |     if (m_Config.MaxDrawdownPercent <= 0) {
  793 |         LogError("Invalid maximum drawdown: must be positive");
  794 |         return false;
  795 |     }
  796 |     
  797 |     if (m_Config.MaxLossPercent <= 0) {
  798 |         LogError("Invalid maximum loss: must be positive");
  799 |         return false;
  800 |     }
  801 |     
  802 |     return true;
  803 | }
  804 | 
  805 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  806 | //| Start walk-forward analysis                                    |
  807 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  808 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::StartAnalysis() {
  809 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  810 |         LogError("Walk-forward analyzer not initialized");
  811 |         return false;
  812 |     }
  813 |     
  814 |     if (m_Status == WF_STATUS_OPTIMIZING || m_Status == WF_STATUS_TESTING || m_Status == WF_STATUS_ANALYZING) {
  815 |         LogActivity("Analysis already running");
  816 |         return true;
  817 |     }
  818 |     
  819 |     // Initialize current result
  820 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentResult);
  821 |     m_CurrentResult.AnalysisId = StringFormat("WF_%d_%d", GetTickCount(), MathRand());
  822 |     m_CurrentResult.AnalysisStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  823 |     m_CurrentResult.Config = m_Config;
  824 |     
  825 |     m_Status = WF_STATUS_INITIALIZING;
  826 |     m_StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  827 |     m_Statistics.TotalAnalyses++;
  828 |     m_CurrentStep = 0;
  829 |     
  830 |     // Load historical data
  831 |     if (!LoadHistoricalData()) {
  832 |         LogError("Failed to load historical data");
  833 |         m_Status = WF_STATUS_ERROR;
  834 |         m_Statistics.FailedAnalyses++;
  835 |         return false;
  836 |     }
  837 |     
  838 |     // Prepare walk-forward steps
  839 |     if (!PrepareSteps()) {
  840 |         LogError("Failed to prepare walk-forward steps");
  841 |         m_Status = WF_STATUS_ERROR;
  842 |         m_Statistics.FailedAnalyses++;
  843 |         return false;
  844 |     }
  845 |     
  846 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Starting walk-forward analysis with %d steps", m_CurrentResult.StepCount));
  847 |     
  848 |     // Execute all steps
  849 |     bool success = true;
  850 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CurrentResult.StepCount && success; i++) {
  851 |         m_CurrentStep = i;
  852 |         m_Status = WF_STATUS_OPTIMIZING;
  853 |         
  854 |         success = ExecuteStep(i);
  855 |         
  856 |         if (success) {
  857 |             m_CurrentResult.CompletedSteps++;
  858 |         } else {
  859 |             m_CurrentResult.FailedSteps++;
  860 |             LogError(StringFormat("Step %d failed", i + 1));
  861 |         }
  862 |         
  863 |         // Check if should stop on thresholds
  864 |         if (m_Config.StopOnThresholds && success) {
  865 |             SWalkForwardStep step = m_CurrentResult.Steps[i];
  866 |             if (step.OutSampleMaxDrawdown > m_Config.MaxDrawdownPercent) {
  867 |                 LogActivity(StringFormat("Stopping analysis: drawdown %.2f%% exceeds threshold %.2f%%", 
  868 |                                         step.OutSampleMaxDrawdown, m_Config.MaxDrawdownPercent));
  869 |                 break;
  870 |             }
  871 |         }
  872 |     }
  873 |     
  874 |     if (success && m_CurrentResult.CompletedSteps > 0) {
  875 |         m_Status = WF_STATUS_ANALYZING;
  876 |         
  877 |         // Analyze overall results
  878 |         if (!AnalyzeResults()) {
  879 |             LogError("Failed to analyze results");
  880 |             success = false;
  881 |         }
  882 |         
  883 |         // Generate report if requested
  884 |         if (success && m_Config.GenerateReport) {
  885 |             GenerateReport();
  886 |         }
  887 |         
  888 |         m_Status = WF_STATUS_COMPLETED;
  889 |         m_Statistics.CompletedAnalyses++;
  890 |         
  891 |         // Store result
  892 |         if (m_ResultCount < ArraySize(m_Results)) {
  893 |             m_Results[m_ResultCount] = m_CurrentResult;
  894 |             m_ResultCount++;
  895 |         }
  896 |         
  897 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Walk-forward analysis completed. Total return: %.2f%%, Sharpe: %.2f", 
  898 |                                 m_CurrentResult.TotalNetProfit, m_CurrentResult.TotalSharpeRatio));
  899 |     } else {
  900 |         m_Status = WF_STATUS_ERROR;
  901 |         m_Statistics.FailedAnalyses++;
  902 |         LogError("Walk-forward analysis failed");
  903 |     }
  904 |     
  905 |     m_CurrentResult.AnalysisEndTime = TimeCurrent();
  906 |     m_CurrentResult.AnalysisDuration = (int)(m_CurrentResult.AnalysisEndTime - m_CurrentResult.AnalysisStartTime);
  907 |     m_CurrentResult.IsCompleted = success;
  908 |     
  909 |     return success;
  910 | }
  911 | 
  912 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  913 | //| Load historical data                                           |
  914 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  915 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::LoadHistoricalData() {
  916 |     // Copy rates for the specified period
  917 |     m_RateCount = CopyRates(m_Config.Symbol, m_Config.Timeframe, 
  918 |                            m_Config.StartDate, m_Config.EndDate, m_Rates);
  919 |     
  920 |     if (m_RateCount <= 0) {
  921 |         LogError(StringFormat("Failed to load rates for %s %s", 
  922 |                              m_Config.Symbol, EnumToString(m_Config.Timeframe)));
  923 |         return false;
  924 |     }
  925 |     
  926 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Loaded %d bars for %s %s", 
  927 |                             m_RateCount, m_Config.Symbol, EnumToString(m_Config.Timeframe)));
  928 |     
  929 |     return true;
  930 | }
  931 | 
  932 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  933 | //| Prepare walk-forward steps                                     |
  934 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  935 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::PrepareSteps() {
  936 |     if (m_RateCount == 0) {
  937 |         LogError("No data available for step preparation");
  938 |         return false;
  939 |     }
  940 |     
  941 |     // Calculate number of steps
  942 |     int totalPeriod = (int)((m_Config.EndDate - m_Config.StartDate) / (24 * 3600));
  943 |     int maxSteps = (totalPeriod - m_Config.WindowSize) / m_Config.StepSize + 1;
  944 |     
  945 |     if (maxSteps <= 0) {
  946 |         LogError("Invalid step configuration: no steps can be created");
  947 |         return false;
  948 |     }
  949 |     
  950 |     // Resize steps array
  951 |     ArrayResize(m_CurrentResult.Steps, maxSteps);
  952 |     m_CurrentResult.StepCount = 0;
  953 |     
  954 |     // Create steps
  955 |     datetime currentStart = m_Config.StartDate;
  956 |     
  957 |     for (int i = 0; i < maxSteps; i++) {
  958 |         datetime windowEnd = currentStart + m_Config.WindowSize * 24 * 3600;
  959 |         
  960 |         if (windowEnd > m_Config.EndDate) {
  961 |             break;
  962 |         }
  963 |         
  964 |         SWalkForwardStep step;
  965 |         ZeroMemory(step);
  966 |         
  967 |         step.StepNumber = i + 1;
  968 |         
  969 |         // Calculate in-sample period
  970 |         int inSampleDays = (int)(m_Config.WindowSize * m_Config.InSampleRatio);
  971 |         step.InSampleStart = currentStart;
  972 |         step.InSampleEnd = currentStart + inSampleDays * 24 * 3600;
  973 |         
  974 |         // Calculate out-of-sample period
  975 |         step.OutSampleStart = step.InSampleEnd;
  976 |         step.OutSampleEnd = windowEnd;
  977 |         
  978 |         // Count bars for each period
  979 |         step.InSampleBars = Bars(m_Config.Symbol, m_Config.Timeframe, step.InSampleStart, step.InSampleEnd);
  980 |         step.OutSampleBars = Bars(m_Config.Symbol, m_Config.Timeframe, step.OutSampleStart, step.OutSampleEnd);
  981 |         
  982 |         // Check minimum bars requirement
  983 |         if (m_Config.RequireMinBars) {
  984 |             if (step.InSampleBars < m_Config.MinBarsRequired || step.OutSampleBars < m_Config.MinBarsRequired) {
  985 |                 LogActivity(StringFormat("Skipping step %d: insufficient bars (IS: %d, OOS: %d)", 
  986 |                                         i + 1, step.InSampleBars, step.OutSampleBars));
  987 |                 currentStart += m_Config.StepSize * 24 * 3600;
  988 |                 continue;
  989 |             }
  990 |         }
  991 |         
  992 |         step.DataQuality = 1.0; // Placeholder
  993 |         step.IsCompleted = false;
  994 |         step.IsValid = false;
  995 |         
  996 |         m_CurrentResult.Steps[m_CurrentResult.StepCount] = step;
  997 |         m_CurrentResult.StepCount++;
  998 |         
  999 |         currentStart += m_Config.StepSize * 24 * 3600;
 1000 |     }
 1001 |     
 1002 |     if (m_CurrentResult.StepCount == 0) {
 1003 |         LogError("No valid steps could be created");
 1004 |         return false;
 1005 |     }
 1006 |     
 1007 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Prepared %d walk-forward steps", m_CurrentResult.StepCount));
 1008 |     return true;
 1009 | }
 1010 | 
 1011 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1012 | //| Execute a single step                                          |
 1013 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1014 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::ExecuteStep(int stepNumber) {
 1015 |     if (stepNumber < 0 || stepNumber >= m_CurrentResult.StepCount) {
 1016 |         LogError(StringFormat("Invalid step number: %d", stepNumber));
 1017 |         return false;
 1018 |     }
 1019 |     
 1020 |     SWalkForwardStep& step = m_CurrentResult.Steps[stepNumber];
 1021 |     step.StepStartTime = TimeCurrent();
 1022 |     
 1023 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Executing step %d/%d", stepNumber + 1, m_CurrentResult.StepCount));
 1024 |     
 1025 |     // Optimize parameters on in-sample data
 1026 |     string optimalParams;
 1027 |     double inSampleFitness;
 1028 |     
 1029 |     if (!OptimizeParameters(step, optimalParams, inSampleFitness)) {
 1030 |         LogError(StringFormat("Optimization failed for step %d", stepNumber + 1));
 1031 |         step.ErrorMessage = "Optimization failed";
 1032 |         step.StepEndTime = TimeCurrent();
 1033 |         step.StepDuration = (int)(step.StepEndTime - step.StepStartTime);
 1034 |         return false;
 1035 |     }
 1036 |     
 1037 |     step.OptimalParameters = optimalParams;
 1038 |     step.InSampleFitness = inSampleFitness;
 1039 |     
 1040 |     // Test parameters on out-of-sample data
 1041 |     double outSampleFitness = CalculateFitness(optimalParams, step.OutSampleStart, step.OutSampleEnd);
 1042 |     step.OutSampleFitness = outSampleFitness;
 1043 |     
 1044 |     // Calculate step metrics
 1045 |     if (!CalculateStepMetrics(step)) {
 1046 |         LogError(StringFormat("Failed to calculate metrics for step %d", stepNumber + 1));
 1047 |         step.ErrorMessage = "Metrics calculation failed";
 1048 |         step.StepEndTime = TimeCurrent();
 1049 |         step.StepDuration = (int)(step.StepEndTime - step.StepStartTime);
 1050 |         return false;
 1051 |     }
 1052 |     
 1053 |     // Validate step
 1054 |     if (!ValidateStep(step)) {
 1055 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Step %d failed validation", stepNumber + 1));
 1056 |         step.ValidationPassed = false;
 1057 |     } else {
 1058 |         step.ValidationPassed = true;
 1059 |     }
 1060 |     
 1061 |     step.IsCompleted = true;
 1062 |     step.IsValid = step.ValidationPassed;
 1063 |     step.StepEndTime = TimeCurrent();
 1064 |     step.StepDuration = (int)(step.StepEndTime - step.StepStartTime);
 1065 |     
 1066 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Step %d completed. IS Fitness: %.4f, OOS Fitness: %.4f", 
 1067 |                             stepNumber + 1, inSampleFitness, outSampleFitness));
 1068 |     
 1069 |     return true;
 1070 | }
 1071 | 
 1072 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1073 | //| Placeholder implementations for remaining methods              |
 1074 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1075 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::OptimizeParameters(const SWalkForwardStep& step, string& optimalParams, double& fitness) {
 1076 |     // Placeholder implementation
 1077 |     switch (m_Config.OptMethod) {
 1078 |         case WF_OPT_GENETIC:
 1079 |             return RunGeneticOptimization(step, optimalParams, fitness);
 1080 |         case WF_OPT_GRID_SEARCH:
 1081 |             return RunGridSearch(step, optimalParams, fitness);
 1082 |         case WF_OPT_RANDOM_SEARCH:
 1083 |             return RunRandomSearch(step, optimalParams, fitness);
 1084 |         case WF_OPT_BAYESIAN:
 1085 |             return RunBayesianOptimization(step, optimalParams, fitness);
 1086 |         default:
 1087 |             LogError("Optimization method not implemented: " + GetOptimizationName(m_Config.OptMethod));
 1088 |             return false;
 1089 |     }
 1090 | }
 1091 | 
 1092 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::RunGeneticOptimization(const SWalkForwardStep& step, string& params, double& fitness) {
 1093 |     // Placeholder implementation for genetic optimization
 1094 |     LogActivity("Running genetic optimization");
 1095 |     
 1096 |     // Simulate optimization process
 1097 |     params = "{\"param1\": 1.5, \"param2\": 0.8, \"param3\": 10}";
 1098 |     fitness = 1.2 + MathRandom() * 0.5; // Random fitness between 1.2 and 1.7
 1099 |     
 1100 |     return true;
 1101 | }
 1102 | 
 1103 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::CalculateStepMetrics(SWalkForwardStep& step) {
 1104 |     // Placeholder implementation for calculating step metrics
 1105 |     step.OutSampleNetProfit = step.OutSampleFitness * 1000; // Simulate profit
 1106 |     step.OutSampleProfitFactor = step.OutSampleFitness;
 1107 |     step.OutSampleMaxDrawdown = MathRandom() * 10; // Random drawdown 0-10%
 1108 |     step.OutSampleSharpeRatio = step.OutSampleFitness * 0.8;
 1109 |     
 1110 |     step.TotalTrades = 50 + (int)(MathRandom() * 100); // 50-150 trades
 1111 |     step.WinningTrades = (int)(step.TotalTrades * (0.4 + MathRandom() * 0.4)); // 40-80% win rate
 1112 |     step.LosingTrades = step.TotalTrades - step.WinningTrades;
 1113 |     step.WinRate = (double)step.WinningTrades / step.TotalTrades * 100;
 1114 |     
 1115 |     step.AverageWin = 100 + MathRandom() * 200; // $100-300
 1116 |     step.AverageLoss = -(50 + MathRandom() * 100); // -$50-150
 1117 |     
 1118 |     step.MaxDrawdown = step.OutSampleMaxDrawdown;
 1119 |     step.MaxDrawdownPercent = step.OutSampleMaxDrawdown;
 1120 |     step.VaR95 = step.OutSampleNetProfit * 0.05; // 5% VaR
 1121 |     step.CVaR95 = step.VaR95 * 1.5;
 1122 |     
 1123 |     step.ValidationScore = step.OutSampleFitness / MathMax(step.InSampleFitness, 0.1);
 1124 |     step.RobustnessScore = 1.0 - MathAbs(step.InSampleFitness - step.OutSampleFitness) / MathMax(step.InSampleFitness, 0.1);
 1125 |     step.StabilityScore = MathMin(step.RobustnessScore, step.ValidationScore);
 1126 |     
 1127 |     return true;
 1128 | }
 1129 | 
 1130 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::ValidateStep(const SWalkForwardStep& step) {
 1131 |     // Simple validation based on thresholds
 1132 |     if (step.OutSampleFitness < 0) {
 1133 |         return false;
 1134 |     }
 1135 |     
 1136 |     if (step.OutSampleMaxDrawdown > m_Config.MaxDrawdownPercent) {
 1137 |         return false;
 1138 |     }
 1139 |     
 1140 |     if (step.OutSampleProfitFactor < m_Config.MinProfitFactor) {
 1141 |         return false;
 1142 |     }
 1143 |     
 1144 |     if (step.OutSampleSharpeRatio < m_Config.MinSharpeRatio) {
 1145 |         return false;
 1146 |     }
 1147 |     
 1148 |     return true;
 1149 | }
 1150 | 
 1151 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::AnalyzeResults() {
 1152 |     // Placeholder implementation for analyzing overall results
 1153 |     if (m_CurrentResult.CompletedSteps == 0) {
 1154 |         LogError("No completed steps to analyze");
 1155 |         return false;
 1156 |     }
 1157 |     
 1158 |     // Calculate overall metrics
 1159 |     double totalReturn = 0;
 1160 |     double totalDrawdown = 0;
 1161 |     double totalSharpe = 0;
 1162 |     int validSteps = 0;
 1163 |     
 1164 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CurrentResult.StepCount; i++) {
 1165 |         if (m_CurrentResult.Steps[i].IsCompleted && m_CurrentResult.Steps[i].IsValid) {
 1166 |             totalReturn += m_CurrentResult.Steps[i].OutSampleNetProfit;
 1167 |             totalDrawdown += m_CurrentResult.Steps[i].OutSampleMaxDrawdown;
 1168 |             totalSharpe += m_CurrentResult.Steps[i].OutSampleSharpeRatio;
 1169 |             validSteps++;
 1170 |         }
 1171 |     }
 1172 |     
 1173 |     if (validSteps > 0) {
 1174 |         m_CurrentResult.TotalNetProfit = totalReturn;
 1175 |         m_CurrentResult.TotalMaxDrawdown = totalDrawdown / validSteps;
 1176 |         m_CurrentResult.TotalSharpeRatio = totalSharpe / validSteps;
 1177 |         m_CurrentResult.TotalProfitFactor = (totalReturn > 0) ? 1.5 : 0.8; // Placeholder
 1178 |         
 1179 |         // Calculate consistency metrics
 1180 |         m_CurrentResult.PerformanceConsistency = 0.8; // Placeholder
 1181 |         m_CurrentResult.ParameterStability = 0.7; // Placeholder
 1182 |         m_CurrentResult.FitnessCorrelation = 0.6; // Placeholder
 1183 |         m_CurrentResult.OverfittingRisk = 0.3; // Placeholder
 1184 |         
 1185 |         m_CurrentResult.IsValid = true;
 1186 |         m_CurrentResult.PassedValidation = (m_CurrentResult.OverfittingRisk < 0.5);
 1187 |         m_CurrentResult.RecommendForLive = (m_CurrentResult.PassedValidation && 
 1188 |                                            m_CurrentResult.TotalSharpeRatio > m_Config.MinSharpeRatio);
 1189 |     }
 1190 |     
 1191 |     return true;
 1192 | }
 1193 | 
 1194 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::GenerateReport() {
 1195 |     // Placeholder implementation
 1196 |     LogActivity("Generating walk-forward analysis report");
 1197 |     return true;
 1198 | }
 1199 | 
 1200 | double CWalkForwardAnalyzer::CalculateFitness(const string parameters, datetime startDate, datetime endDate) {
 1201 |     // Placeholder implementation for fitness calculation
 1202 |     // In real implementation, this would run a backtest with the given parameters
 1203 |     // and return the fitness value based on the selected fitness function
 1204 |     
 1205 |     double baseFitness = 1.0 + MathRandom() * 0.8; // Random fitness between 1.0 and 1.8
 1206 |     
 1207 |     // Add some time-based variation to simulate market changes
 1208 |     double timeVariation = MathSin((double)(startDate - m_Config.StartDate) / (365 * 24 * 3600) * M_PI) * 0.2;
 1209 |     
 1210 |     return baseFitness + timeVariation;
 1211 | }

 1424 | bool CWalkForwardAnalyzer::GetBestResult(SWalkForwardResult& result) {
 1425 |     if (m_ResultCount == 0) {
 1426 |         return false;
 1427 |     }
 1428 |     
 1429 |     int bestIndex = 0;
 1430 |     double bestFitness = m_Results[0].TotalSharpeRatio;
 1431 |     
 1432 |     for (int i = 1; i < m_ResultCount; i++) {
 1433 |         if (m_Results[i].TotalSharpeRatio > bestFitness) {
 1434 |             bestFitness = m_Results[i].TotalSharpeRatio;
 1435 |             bestIndex = i;
 1436 |         }
 1437 |     }
 1438 |     
 1439 |     result = m_Results[bestIndex];
 1440 |     return true;
 1441 | }

 1446 |     }

 1449 |     return true;
 1450 | }

  150 | double CAnalyticsManager::GetHealthScore()
  151 | {
  152 |     double score = 100.0;
  153 |     int checks = 0;
  154 | 
  155 |     if (m_pRiskAnalyzer && m_bRiskAnalysisEnabled)
  156 |     {
  157 |         // Example: Reduce score based on drawdown
  158 |         // score -= m_pRiskAnalyzer->GetCurrentDrawdown() * 10;
  159 |         checks++;
  160 |     }
  161 | 
  162 |     if (m_pMarketAnalyzer && m_bMarketAnalysisEnabled)
  163 |     {
  164 |         // Example: Reduce score if market conditions are unfavorable
  165 |         // if(m_pMarketAnalyzer->GetVolatility() > SomeThreshold) score -= 10;
  166 |         checks++;
  167 |     }
  168 | 
  169 |     return MathMax(0, score); // Ensure score doesn't go below 0
  170 | }

  298 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  299 |     m_bRunning = false;
  300 |     m_bCompleted = false;
  301 |     m_CurrentTime = 0;
  302 |     m_ProcessedBars = 0;
  303 |     m_ProcessedTicks = 0;
  304 |     m_ProgressPercent = 0.0;
  305 |     m_StartTime = 0;
  306 |     m_EndTime = 0;

  309 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  310 |     m_Config.StartDate = D'2023.01.01';
  311 |     m_Config.EndDate = TimeCurrent();
  312 |     m_Config.Mode = BACKTEST_MODE_EVERY_TICK;
  313 |     m_Config.Speed = SPEED_NORMAL;
  314 |     m_Config.InitialDeposit = 10000.0;
  315 |     m_Config.MarginMode = ACCOUNT_MARGIN_MODE_RETAIL_NETTING;
  316 |     m_Config.Symbol = Symbol();
  317 |     m_Config.Timeframe = Period();
  318 |     m_Config.Spread = 2.0;
  319 |     m_Config.UseVariableSpread = true;
  320 |     m_Config.Commission = 0.0;
  321 |     m_Config.Swap = 0.0;
  322 |     m_Config.OptimizeForSpeed = false;
  323 |     m_Config.SaveDetailedReport = true;
  324 |     m_Config.GenerateImages = false;
  325 |     m_Config.ReportPath = "Backtest_Reports";
  326 |     
  327 |     // Initialize statistics
  328 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  329 |     ZeroMemory(m_ValidationResult);
  330 | }
