  338 | 
  339 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  340 | //| Initialize backtest engine                                     |
  341 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  342 | bool CBacktestEngine::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  343 |     if (context == NULL) {
  344 |         Print("[BACKTEST ENGINE ERROR] Context is NULL");
  345 |         return false;
  346 |     }
  347 |     
  348 |     m_pContext = context;
  349 |     
  350 |     if (!ValidateConfiguration()) {
  351 |         LogBacktestEvent("Invalid backtest configuration", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  352 |         return false;
  353 |     }
  354 |     
  355 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  356 |     LogBacktestEvent("Backtest Engine initialized successfully");
  357 |     
  358 |     return true;
  359 | }
  360 | 
  361 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  362 | //| Deinitialize backtest engine                                  |
  363 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  364 | void CBacktestEngine::Deinitialize() {
  365 |     if (m_bRunning) {
  366 |         StopBacktest();
  367 |     }
  368 |     
  369 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  370 |         LogBacktestEvent("Backtest Engine deinitialized");
  371 |     }
  372 |     
  373 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  374 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  375 | }
  376 | 
  377 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  378 | //| Set backtest configuration                                     |
  379 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  380 | void CBacktestEngine::SetConfiguration(const SBacktestConfig& config) {
  381 |     m_Config = config;
  382 |     LogBacktestEvent("Backtest configuration updated");
  383 | }
  384 | 
  385 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  386 | //| Start backtest                                                 |
  387 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  388 | bool CBacktestEngine::StartBacktest() {
  389 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  390 |         LogBacktestEvent("Backtest engine not initialized", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  391 |         return false;
  392 |     }
  393 |     
  394 |     if (m_bRunning) {
  395 |         LogBacktestEvent("Backtest already running", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  396 |         return false;
  397 |     }
  398 |     
  399 |     if (!ValidateConfiguration()) {
  400 |         LogBacktestEvent("Invalid backtest configuration", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  401 |         return false;
  402 |     }
  403 |     
  404 |     // Initialize backtest
  405 |     m_bRunning = true;
  406 |     m_bCompleted = false;
  407 |     m_StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  408 |     m_CurrentTime = m_Config.StartDate;
  409 |     m_ProcessedBars = 0;
  410 |     m_ProcessedTicks = 0;
  411 |     m_ProgressPercent = 0.0;
  412 |     
  413 |     // Clear previous results
  414 |     ArrayResize(m_Trades, 0);
  415 |     ArrayResize(m_EquityCurve, 0);
  416 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  417 |     ZeroMemory(m_ValidationResult);
  418 |     
  419 |     // Initialize statistics
  420 |     m_Stats.InitialDeposit = m_Config.InitialDeposit;
  421 |     m_Stats.BacktestStartTime = m_StartTime;
  422 |     m_Stats.DataQuality = DATA_QUALITY_UNKNOWN;
  423 |     
  424 |     LogBacktestEvent(StringFormat("Backtest started: %s to %s", 
  425 |                                  TimeToString(m_Config.StartDate), 
  426 |                                  TimeToString(m_Config.EndDate)));
  427 |     
  428 |     // Run backtest
  429 |     RunBacktest();
  430 |     
  431 |     return true;
  432 | }
  433 | 
  434 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  435 | //| Stop backtest                                                  |
  436 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  437 | void CBacktestEngine::StopBacktest() {
  438 |     if (m_bRunning) {
  439 |         m_bRunning = false;
  440 |         m_EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  441 |         m_Stats.BacktestEndTime = m_EndTime;
  442 |         m_Stats.ExecutionTimeSeconds = (double)(m_EndTime - m_StartTime);
  443 |         
  444 |         LogBacktestEvent("Backtest stopped by user", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  445 |     }
  446 | }
  447 | 
  448 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  449 | //| Run backtest                                                   |
  450 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  451 | void CBacktestEngine::RunBacktest() {
  452 |     LogBacktestEvent("Starting backtest execution");
  453 |     
  454 |     // Main backtest loop
  455 |     while (m_CurrentTime <= m_Config.EndDate && m_bRunning) {
  456 |         // Process based on selected mode
  457 |         switch(m_Config.Mode) {
  458 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_EVERY_TICK:
  459 |             ProcessTick();
  460 |             break;
  461 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_1_MINUTE_OHLC:
  462 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_OPEN_PRICES:
  463 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_MATH_CALCULATIONS:
  464 |             ProcessBar();
  465 |             break;
  466 |         case BACKTEST_MODE_REAL_TICKS:
  467 |             ProcessTick();
  468 |             break;
  469 |         }
  470 |         
  471 |         // Update equity curve
  472 |         UpdateEquityCurve();
  473 |         
  474 |         // Update progress
  475 |         UpdateProgress();
  476 |         
  477 |         // Advance time
  478 |         m_CurrentTime += PeriodSeconds(m_Config.Timeframe);
  479 |         
  480 |         // Speed control
  481 |         if (m_Config.Speed == SPEED_SLOW) {
  482 |             Sleep(100);
  483 |         } else if (m_Config.Speed == SPEED_NORMAL) {
  484 |             Sleep(10);
  485 |         }
  486 |         // SPEED_FAST and SPEED_MAXIMUM run without delay
  487 |     }
  488 |     
  489 |     // Finalize backtest
  490 |     m_bRunning = false;
  491 |     m_bCompleted = true;
  492 |     m_EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  493 |     m_Stats.BacktestEndTime = m_EndTime;
  494 |     m_Stats.ExecutionTimeSeconds = (double)(m_EndTime - m_StartTime);
  495 |     m_Stats.TicksProcessed = m_ProcessedTicks;
  496 |     m_Stats.BarsProcessed = m_ProcessedBars;
  497 |     
  498 |     // Collect final data
  499 |     CollectTradeData();
  500 |     CollectAccountData();
  501 |     
  502 |     // Calculate statistics
  503 |     CalculateBasicStats();
  504 |     CalculateDrawdownStats();
  505 |     CalculateTradeStats();
  506 |     CalculateRiskMetrics();
  507 |     CalculateTimeMetrics();
  508 |     
  509 |     // Analyze data quality
  510 |     AnalyzeDataQuality();
  511 |     
  512 |     // Validate results
  513 |     ValidateResults();
  514 |     
  515 |     LogBacktestEvent(StringFormat("Backtest completed in %.2f seconds", m_Stats.ExecutionTimeSeconds));
  516 | }
  517 | 
  518 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  519 | //| Process tick                                                   |
  520 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  521 | void CBacktestEngine::ProcessTick() {
  522 |     // Simulate tick processing
  523 |     // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would process real tick data
  524 |     
  525 |     m_ProcessedTicks++;
  526 |     
  527 |     // Simulate EA OnTick() call
  528 |     // In real implementation, this would call the EA's OnTick() function
  529 | }
  530 | 
  531 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  532 | //| Process bar                                                    |
  533 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  534 | void CBacktestEngine::ProcessBar() {
  535 |     // Simulate bar processing
  536 |     // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would process OHLC data
  537 |     
  538 |     m_ProcessedBars++;
  539 |     
  540 |     // Simulate EA OnTick() call for new bar
  541 |     // In real implementation, this would call the EA's OnTick() function
  542 | }
  543 | 
  544 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  545 | //| Update equity curve                                           |
  546 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  547 | void CBacktestEngine::UpdateEquityCurve() {
  548 |     // Add equity point
  549 |     int size = ArraySize(m_EquityCurve);
  550 |     ArrayResize(m_EquityCurve, size + 1);
  551 |     
  552 |     m_EquityCurve[size].Time = m_CurrentTime;
  553 |     m_EquityCurve[size].Balance = AccountBalance();
  554 |     m_EquityCurve[size].Equity = AccountEquity();
  555 |     m_EquityCurve[size].FreeMargin = AccountFreeMargin();
  556 |     m_EquityCurve[size].MarginLevel = AccountMargin() > 0 ? AccountEquity() / AccountMargin() * 100 : 0;
  557 |     
  558 |     // Calculate drawdown
  559 |     double maxEquity = m_EquityCurve[size].Equity;
  560 |     for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  561 |         if (m_EquityCurve[i].Equity > maxEquity) {
  562 |             maxEquity = m_EquityCurve[i].Equity;
  563 |         }
  564 |     }
  565 |     
  566 |     m_EquityCurve[size].Drawdown = maxEquity - m_EquityCurve[size].Equity;
  567 |     m_EquityCurve[size].DrawdownPercent = maxEquity > 0 ? (m_EquityCurve[size].Drawdown / maxEquity) * 100 : 0;
  568 | }
  569 | 
  570 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  571 | //| Update progress                                                |
  572 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  573 | void CBacktestEngine::UpdateProgress() {
  574 |     if (m_Config.EndDate > m_Config.StartDate) {
  575 |         double totalSeconds = (double)(m_Config.EndDate - m_Config.StartDate);
  576 |         double elapsedSeconds = (double)(m_CurrentTime - m_Config.StartDate);
  577 |         m_ProgressPercent = (elapsedSeconds / totalSeconds) * 100.0;
  578 |         m_ProgressPercent = MathMin(100.0, MathMax(0.0, m_ProgressPercent));
  579 |     }
  580 | }
  581 | 
  582 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  583 | //| Collect trade data                                             |
  584 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  585 | void CBacktestEngine::CollectTradeData() {
  586 |     // Collect trade history from MT5
  587 |     // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would use HistorySelect and HistoryDealsTotal
  588 |     
  589 |     ArrayResize(m_Trades, 0);
  590 |     
  591 |     // Simulate some trade data
  592 |     for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
  593 |         int size = ArraySize(m_Trades);
  594 |         ArrayResize(m_Trades, size + 1);
  595 |         
  596 |         m_Trades[size].Ticket = i + 1;
  597 |         m_Trades[size].OpenTime = m_Config.StartDate + i * 3600;
  598 |         m_Trades[size].Type = (i % 2 == 0) ? ORDER_TYPE_BUY : ORDER_TYPE_SELL;
  599 |         m_Trades[size].Lots = 0.1;
  600 |         m_Trades[size].Symbol = m_Config.Symbol;
  601 |         m_Trades[size].OpenPrice = 1.1000 + (i * 0.001);
  602 |         m_Trades[size].CloseTime = m_Trades[size].OpenTime + 1800;
  603 |         m_Trades[size].ClosePrice = m_Trades[size].OpenPrice + ((i % 3 == 0) ? 0.002 : -0.001);
  604 |         m_Trades[size].Profit = (m_Trades[size].ClosePrice - m_Trades[size].OpenPrice) * 100000 * m_Trades[size].Lots;
  605 |         if (m_Trades[size].Type == ORDER_TYPE_SELL) {
  606 |             m_Trades[size].Profit *= -1;
  607 |         }
  608 |     }
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  612 | //| Collect account data                                           |
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | void CBacktestEngine::CollectAccountData() {
  615 |     m_Stats.FinalBalance = AccountBalance();
  616 |     m_Stats.TotalNetProfit = m_Stats.FinalBalance - m_Stats.InitialDeposit;
  617 | }
  618 | 
  619 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  620 | //| Calculate basic statistics                                     |
  621 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  622 | void CBacktestEngine::CalculateBasicStats() {
  623 |     m_Stats.TotalTrades = ArraySize(m_Trades);
  624 |     m_Stats.GrossProfit = 0;
  625 |     m_Stats.GrossLoss = 0;
  626 |     m_Stats.ProfitTrades = 0;
  627 |     m_Stats.LossTrades = 0;
  628 |     
  629 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Trades); i++) {
  630 |         if (m_Trades[i].Profit > 0) {
  631 |             m_Stats.GrossProfit += m_Trades[i].Profit;
  632 |             m_Stats.ProfitTrades++;
  633 |         } else {
  634 |             m_Stats.GrossLoss += MathAbs(m_Trades[i].Profit);
  635 |             m_Stats.LossTrades++;
  636 |         }
  637 |         
  638 |         if (m_Trades[i].Type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  639 |             m_Stats.LongPositions++;
  640 |         } else {
  641 |             m_Stats.ShortPositions++;
  642 |         }
  643 |     }
  644 |     
  645 |     m_Stats.ProfitFactor = (m_Stats.GrossLoss > 0) ? m_Stats.GrossProfit / m_Stats.GrossLoss : 0;
  646 |     m_Stats.ExpectedPayoff = (m_Stats.TotalTrades > 0) ? m_Stats.TotalNetProfit / m_Stats.TotalTrades : 0;
  647 | }
  648 | 
  649 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  650 | //| Calculate drawdown statistics                                  |
  651 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  652 | void CBacktestEngine::CalculateDrawdownStats() {
  653 |     m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown = CalculateMaxDrawdown();
  654 |     m_Stats.RelativeDrawdown = CalculateMaxDrawdownPercent();
  655 |     m_Stats.AbsoluteDrawdown = m_Stats.InitialDeposit - m_Stats.FinalBalance;
  656 |     if (m_Stats.AbsoluteDrawdown < 0) m_Stats.AbsoluteDrawdown = 0;
  657 | }
  658 | 
  659 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 | //| Calculate trade statistics                                     |
  661 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  662 | void CBacktestEngine::CalculateTradeStats() {
  663 |     if (ArraySize(m_Trades) == 0) return;
  664 |     
  665 |     // Find largest trades
  666 |     m_Stats.LargestProfitTrade = 0;
  667 |     m_Stats.LargestLossTrade = 0;
  668 |     
  669 |     double totalProfit = 0;
  670 |     double totalLoss = 0;
  671 |     
  672 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Trades); i++) {
  673 |         if (m_Trades[i].Profit > m_Stats.LargestProfitTrade) {
  674 |             m_Stats.LargestProfitTrade = m_Trades[i].Profit;
  675 |         }
  676 |         if (m_Trades[i].Profit < m_Stats.LargestLossTrade) {
  677 |             m_Stats.LargestLossTrade = m_Trades[i].Profit;
  678 |         }
  679 |         
  680 |         if (m_Trades[i].Profit > 0) {
  681 |             totalProfit += m_Trades[i].Profit;
  682 |         } else {
  683 |             totalLoss += m_Trades[i].Profit;
  684 |         }
  685 |     }
  686 |     
  687 |     // Calculate averages
  688 |     m_Stats.AverageProfitTrade = (m_Stats.ProfitTrades > 0) ? totalProfit / m_Stats.ProfitTrades : 0;
  689 |     m_Stats.AverageLossTrade = (m_Stats.LossTrades > 0) ? totalLoss / m_Stats.LossTrades : 0;
  690 |     
  691 |     // Calculate consecutive metrics (simplified)
  692 |     m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveWins = 0;
  693 |     m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveLosses = 0;
  694 |     
  695 |     int currentWins = 0;
  696 |     int currentLosses = 0;
  697 |     
  698 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Trades); i++) {
  699 |         if (m_Trades[i].Profit > 0) {
  700 |             currentWins++;
  701 |             currentLosses = 0;
  702 |             if (currentWins > m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveWins) {
  703 |                 m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveWins = currentWins;
  704 |             }
  705 |         } else {
  706 |             currentLosses++;
  707 |             currentWins = 0;
  708 |             if (currentLosses > m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveLosses) {
  709 |                 m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveLosses = currentLosses;
  710 |             }
  711 |         }
  712 |     }
  713 | }
  714 | 
  715 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  716 | //| Calculate risk metrics                                         |
  717 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  718 | void CBacktestEngine::CalculateRiskMetrics() {
  719 |     m_Stats.SharpeRatio = CalculateSharpeRatio();
  720 |     m_Stats.SortinoRatio = CalculateSortinoRatio();
  721 |     m_Stats.CalmarRatio = CalculateCalmarRatio();
  722 |     m_Stats.RecoveryFactor = CalculateRecoveryFactor();
  723 |     
  724 |     if (m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown > 0) {
  725 |         m_Stats.ProfitToMaxDDRatio = m_Stats.TotalNetProfit / m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown;
  726 |     }
  727 | }
  728 | 
  729 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  730 | //| Calculate time metrics                                         |
  731 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  732 | void CBacktestEngine::CalculateTimeMetrics() {
  733 |     // Simplified calculation
  734 |     m_Stats.AverageConsecutiveWins = (m_Stats.ProfitTrades > 0) ? m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveWins / 2 : 0;
  735 |     m_Stats.AverageConsecutiveLosses = (m_Stats.LossTrades > 0) ? m_Stats.MaxConsecutiveLosses / 2 : 0;
  736 | }
  737 | 
  738 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  739 | //| Analyze data quality                                          |
  740 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  741 | void CBacktestEngine::AnalyzeDataQuality() {
  742 |     // Simplified data quality analysis
  743 |     if (m_Config.Mode == BACKTEST_MODE_REAL_TICKS) {
  744 |         m_Stats.DataQuality = DATA_QUALITY_REAL_TICKS;
  745 |         m_Stats.ModellingQuality = 99;
  746 |     } else if (m_Config.Mode == BACKTEST_MODE_EVERY_TICK) {
  747 |         m_Stats.DataQuality = DATA_QUALITY_HIGH;
  748 |         m_Stats.ModellingQuality = 90;
  749 |     } else {
  750 |         m_Stats.DataQuality = DATA_QUALITY_MEDIUM;
  751 |         m_Stats.ModellingQuality = 75;
  752 |     }
  753 |     
  754 |     m_Stats.MismatchedCharts = 0; // Placeholder
  755 | }
  756 | 
  757 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  758 | //| Validate configuration                                         |
  759 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  760 | bool CBacktestEngine::ValidateConfiguration() {
  761 |     if (m_Config.StartDate >= m_Config.EndDate) {
  762 |         LogBacktestEvent("Invalid date range", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  763 |         return false;
  764 |     }
  765 |     
  766 |     if (m_Config.InitialDeposit <= 0) {
  767 |         LogBacktestEvent("Invalid initial deposit", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  768 |         return false;
  769 |     }
  770 |     
  771 |     if (m_Config.Symbol == "") {
  772 |         LogBacktestEvent("Invalid symbol", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  773 |         return false;
  774 |     }
  775 |     
  776 |     return true;
  777 | }
  778 | 
  779 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  780 | //| Validate results                                               |
  781 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  782 | bool CBacktestEngine::ValidateResults() {
  783 |     m_ValidationResult.IsValid = true;
  784 |     m_ValidationResult.ErrorMessage = "";
  785 |     m_ValidationResult.ConfidenceLevel = 95.0;
  786 |     
  787 |     // Check sufficient trades
  788 |     m_ValidationResult.SufficientTrades = m_Stats.TotalTrades;
  789 |     if (m_Stats.TotalTrades < 30) {
  790 |         m_ValidationResult.IsValid = false;
  791 |         m_ValidationResult.ErrorMessage += "Insufficient trades for statistical significance. ";
  792 |         m_ValidationResult.ConfidenceLevel -= 20;
  793 |     }
  794 |     
  795 |     // Check data coverage
  796 |     m_ValidationResult.DataCoverage = CalculateDataCoverage();
  797 |     m_ValidationResult.HasEnoughData = (m_ValidationResult.DataCoverage > 80.0);
  798 |     if (!m_ValidationResult.HasEnoughData) {
  799 |         m_ValidationResult.IsValid = false;
  800 |         m_ValidationResult.ErrorMessage += "Insufficient data coverage. ";
  801 |         m_ValidationResult.ConfidenceLevel -= 15;
  802 |     }
  803 |     
  804 |     // Check spread realism
  805 |     m_ValidationResult.SpreadRealistic = ValidateSpreadRealism();
  806 |     if (!m_ValidationResult.SpreadRealistic) {
  807 |         m_ValidationResult.ErrorMessage += "Unrealistic spread settings. ";
  808 |         m_ValidationResult.ConfidenceLevel -= 10;
  809 |     }
  810 |     
  811 |     // Check slippage realism
  812 |     m_ValidationResult.SlippageRealistic = ValidateSlippageRealism();
  813 |     if (!m_ValidationResult.SlippageRealistic) {
  814 |         m_ValidationResult.ErrorMessage += "Unrealistic slippage settings. ";
  815 |         m_ValidationResult.ConfidenceLevel -= 10;
  816 |     }
  817 |     
  818 |     return m_ValidationResult.IsValid;
  819 | }
  820 | 
  821 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  822 | //| Calculate Sharpe ratio                                         |
  823 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  824 | double CBacktestEngine::CalculateSharpeRatio() const {
  825 |     // Simplified Sharpe ratio calculation
  826 |     if (ArraySize(m_Trades) < 2) return 0.0;
  827 |     
  828 |     double avgReturn = m_Stats.ExpectedPayoff;
  829 |     double riskFreeRate = 0.02; // 2% annual risk-free rate
  830 |     
  831 |     // Calculate standard deviation of returns
  832 |     double sumSquaredDeviations = 0;
  833 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Trades); i++) {
  834 |         double deviation = m_Trades[i].Profit - avgReturn;
  835 |         sumSquaredDeviations += deviation * deviation;
  836 |     }
  837 |     
  838 |     double stdDev = MathSqrt(sumSquaredDeviations / (ArraySize(m_Trades) - 1));
  839 |     
  840 |     if (stdDev == 0) return 0.0;
  841 |     
  842 |     return (avgReturn - riskFreeRate) / stdDev;
  843 | }
  844 | 
  845 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  846 | //| Calculate Sortino ratio                                        |
  847 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  848 | double CBacktestEngine::CalculateSortinoRatio() const {
  849 |     // Simplified Sortino ratio calculation
  850 |     if (ArraySize(m_Trades) < 2) return 0.0;
  851 |     
  852 |     double avgReturn = m_Stats.ExpectedPayoff;
  853 |     double riskFreeRate = 0.02;
  854 |     
  855 |     // Calculate downside deviation
  856 |     double sumNegativeSquaredDeviations = 0;
  857 |     int negativeCount = 0;
  858 |     
  859 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Trades); i++) {
  860 |         if (m_Trades[i].Profit < avgReturn) {
  861 |             double deviation = m_Trades[i].Profit - avgReturn;
  862 |             sumNegativeSquaredDeviations += deviation * deviation;
  863 |             negativeCount++;
  864 |         }
  865 |     }
  866 |     
  867 |     if (negativeCount == 0) return 0.0;
  868 |     
  869 |     double downsideStdDev = MathSqrt(sumNegativeSquaredDeviations / negativeCount);
  870 |     
  871 |     if (downsideStdDev == 0) return 0.0;
  872 |     
  873 |     return (avgReturn - riskFreeRate) / downsideStdDev;
  874 | }
  875 | 
  876 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  877 | //| Calculate Calmar ratio                                         |
  878 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  879 | double CBacktestEngine::CalculateCalmarRatio() const {
  880 |     if (m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown == 0) return 0.0;
  881 |     
  882 |     double annualReturn = m_Stats.TotalNetProfit; // Simplified
  883 |     return annualReturn / m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown;
  884 | }
  885 | 
  886 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  887 | //| Calculate recovery factor                                      |
  888 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  889 | double CBacktestEngine::CalculateRecoveryFactor() const {
  890 |     if (m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown == 0) return 0.0;
  891 |     
  892 |     return m_Stats.TotalNetProfit / m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown;
  893 | }
  894 | 
  895 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  896 | //| Calculate maximum drawdown                                     |
  897 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  898 | double CBacktestEngine::CalculateMaxDrawdown() const {
  899 |     double maxDrawdown = 0;
  900 |     
  901 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_EquityCurve); i++) {
  902 |         if (m_EquityCurve[i].Drawdown > maxDrawdown) {
  903 |             maxDrawdown = m_EquityCurve[i].Drawdown;
  904 |         }
  905 |     }
  906 |     
  907 |     return maxDrawdown;
  908 | }
  909 | 
  910 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  911 | //| Calculate maximum drawdown percentage                          |
  912 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  913 | double CBacktestEngine::CalculateMaxDrawdownPercent() const {
  914 |     double maxDrawdownPercent = 0;
  915 |     
  916 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_EquityCurve); i++) {
  917 |         if (m_EquityCurve[i].DrawdownPercent > maxDrawdownPercent) {
  918 |             maxDrawdownPercent = m_EquityCurve[i].DrawdownPercent;
  919 |         }
  920 |     }
  921 |     
  922 |     return maxDrawdownPercent;
  923 | }
  924 |

  928 | double CBacktestEngine::CalculateDataCoverage() const {
  929 |     // Simplified calculation - assume 95% coverage
  930 |     return 95.0;
  931 | }

  937 |     // Check if spread is within realistic range
  938 |     return (m_Config.Spread >= 0.5 && m_Config.Spread <= 50.0);
  939 | }

  945 |     // Simplified validation - assume realistic
  946 |     return true;
  947 | }

  949 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  950 | //| Get trade by index                                            |
  951 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  952 | SBacktestTrade CBacktestEngine::GetTrade(const int index) const {
  953 |     SBacktestTrade empty;
  954 |     ZeroMemory(empty);
  955 |     
  956 |     if (index < 0 || index >= ArraySize(m_Trades)) {
  957 |         return empty;
  958 |     }
  959 |     
  960 |     return m_Trades[index];
  961 | }

  969 |

  971 |         return empty;

  973 |     
  974 |     return m_EquityCurve[index];

  977 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  978 | //| Generate backtest report                                      |
  979 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  980 | string CBacktestEngine::GenerateReport() const {
  981 |     string report = "\n=== APEX EA Backtest Report ===\n";
  982 |     
  983 |     // Basic information
  984 |     report += StringFormat("Symbol: %s\n", m_Config.Symbol);
  985 |     report += StringFormat("Period: %s to %s\n", TimeToString(m_Config.StartDate), TimeToString(m_Config.EndDate));
  986 |     report += StringFormat("Mode: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Config.Mode));
  987 |     report += StringFormat("Initial Deposit: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.InitialDeposit));
  988 |     report += StringFormat("Final Balance: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.FinalBalance));
  989 |     
  990 |     // Performance metrics
  991 |     report += "\n=== Performance ===\n";
  992 |     report += StringFormat("Total Net Profit: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.TotalNetProfit));
  993 |     report += StringFormat("Gross Profit: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.GrossProfit));
  994 |     report += StringFormat("Gross Loss: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.GrossLoss));
  995 |     report += StringFormat("Profit Factor: %.2f\n", m_Stats.ProfitFactor);
  996 |     report += StringFormat("Expected Payoff: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.ExpectedPayoff));
  997 |     
  998 |     // Risk metrics
  999 |     report += "\n=== Risk Analysis ===\n";
 1000 |     report += StringFormat("Maximum Drawdown: %s (%.2f%%)\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.MaximalDrawdown), m_Stats.RelativeDrawdown);
 1001 |     report += StringFormat("Sharpe Ratio: %.3f\n", m_Stats.SharpeRatio);
 1002 |     report += StringFormat("Sortino Ratio: %.3f\n", m_Stats.SortinoRatio);
 1003 |     report += StringFormat("Calmar Ratio: %.3f\n", m_Stats.CalmarRatio);
 1004 |     report += StringFormat("Recovery Factor: %.2f\n", m_Stats.RecoveryFactor);
 1005 |     
 1006 |     // Trade statistics
 1007 |     report += "\n=== Trade Statistics ===\n";
 1008 |     report += StringFormat("Total Trades: %d\n", m_Stats.TotalTrades);
 1009 |     report += StringFormat("Profit Trades: %d (%.1f%%)\n", m_Stats.ProfitTrades, 
 1010 |                           m_Stats.TotalTrades > 0 ? (double)m_Stats.ProfitTrades / m_Stats.TotalTrades * 100 : 0);
 1011 |     report += StringFormat("Loss Trades: %d (%.1f%%)\n", m_Stats.LossTrades,
 1012 |                           m_Stats.TotalTrades > 0 ? (double)m_Stats.LossTrades / m_Stats.TotalTrades * 100 : 0);
 1013 |     report += StringFormat("Largest Profit Trade: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.LargestProfitTrade));
 1014 |     report += StringFormat("Largest Loss Trade: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.LargestLossTrade));
 1015 |     report += StringFormat("Average Profit Trade: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.AverageProfitTrade));
 1016 |     report += StringFormat("Average Loss Trade: %s\n", FormatCurrency(m_Stats.AverageLossTrade));
 1017 |     
 1018 |     // Quality metrics
 1019 |     report += "\n=== Data Quality ===\n";
 1020 |     report += StringFormat("Data Quality: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Stats.DataQuality));
 1021 |     report += StringFormat("Modelling Quality: %d%%\n", m_Stats.ModellingQuality);
 1022 |     report += StringFormat("Execution Time: %s\n", FormatDuration(m_Stats.ExecutionTimeSeconds));
 1023 |     
 1024 |     // Validation
 1025 |     report += "\n=== Validation ===\n";
 1026 |     report += StringFormat("Result Valid: %s\n", m_ValidationResult.IsValid ? "Yes" : "No");
 1027 |     report += StringFormat("Confidence Level: %.1f%%\n", m_ValidationResult.ConfidenceLevel);
 1028 |     if (m_ValidationResult.ErrorMessage != "") {
 1029 |         report += StringFormat("Issues: %s\n", m_ValidationResult.ErrorMessage);
 1030 |     }
 1031 |     
 1032 |     return report;
 1033 | }

 1037 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1038 | string CBacktestEngine::FormatCurrency(const double amount) const {
 1039 |     return StringFormat("%.2f", amount);
 1040 | }

 1042 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

 1044 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1045 | string CBacktestEngine::FormatPercent(const double percent) const {
 1046 |     return StringFormat("%.2f%%", percent);
 1047 | }
 1048 | 
 1049 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1050 | //| Format duration                                                |
 1051 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1052 | string CBacktestEngine::FormatDuration(const double seconds) const {
 1053 |     if (seconds < 60) {
 1054 |         return StringFormat("%.1f seconds", seconds);
 1055 |     } else if (seconds < 3600) {
 1056 |         return StringFormat("%.1f minutes", seconds / 60);
 1057 |     } else {
 1058 |         return StringFormat("%.1f hours", seconds / 3600);
 1059 |     }
 1060 | }
 1061 | 
 1062 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1063 | //| Save report to file                                           |
 1064 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1065 | bool CBacktestEngine::SaveReport(const string filename) const {
 1066 |     string report = GenerateReport();
 1067 |     
 1068 |     int handle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT);
 1069 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1070 |         LogBacktestEvent("Failed to create report file: " + filename, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1071 |         return false;
 1072 |     }
 1073 |     
 1074 |     FileWriteString(handle, report);
 1075 |     FileClose(handle);
 1076 |     
 1077 |     LogBacktestEvent("Report saved to: " + filename);
 1078 |     return true;
 1079 | }
 1080 | 
 1081 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1082 | //| Log backtest event                                            |
 1083 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1084 | void CBacktestEngine::LogBacktestEvent(const string event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
 1085 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1086 |         switch(level) {
 1087 |         case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
 1088 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1089 |             break;
 1090 |         case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
 1091 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1092 |             break;
 1093 |         default:
 1094 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
 1095 |             break;
 1096 |         }
 1097 |     }
 1098 | }

  109 |

  115 |

  529 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  530 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  531 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  532 | CDataCollector::CDataCollector() {
  533 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  534 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  535 |     m_bCollecting = false;
  536 |     m_bPaused = false;
  537 |     
  538 |     m_DataPointCount = 0;
  539 |     m_NextDataPointID = 1;
  540 |     m_DataSeriesCount = 0;
  541 |     m_NextSeriesID = 1;
  542 |     
  543 |     m_LastCollectionTime = 0;
  544 |     m_CollectionCount = 0;
  545 |     m_TotalCollectionTime = 0;
  546 |     
  547 |     m_CachedDataCount = 0;
  548 |     m_CacheLastCleanup = 0;
  549 |     
  550 |     m_LastError = "";
  551 |     m_ErrorCount = 0;
  552 |     
  553 |     m_bAsyncMode = false;
  554 |     m_ActiveCollections = 0;
  555 |     
  556 |     // Initialize arrays
  557 |     ArrayInitialize(m_CachedDataIDs, 0);
  558 |     
  559 |     // Initialize default configuration
  560 |     InitializeDefaultConfig();
  561 |     
  562 |     // Initialize statistics
  563 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  564 | }
  565 | 
  566 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  567 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  568 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  569 | CDataCollector::~CDataCollector() {
  570 |     Deinitialize();
  571 | }
  572 | 
  573 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  574 | //| Initialize Data Collector                                       |
  575 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  576 | bool CDataCollector::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  577 |     if (context == NULL) {
  578 |         Print("[DATA COLLECTOR ERROR] Context is NULL");
  579 |         return false;
  580 |     }
  581 |     
  582 |     m_pContext = context;
  583 |     
  584 |     // Load configuration
  585 |     LoadConfig();
  586 |     
  587 |     // Load data history if enabled
  588 |     if (m_Config.EnablePersistence) {
  589 |         LoadDataHistory();
  590 |     }
  591 |     
  592 |     // Initialize cache cleanup timer
  593 |     m_CacheLastCleanup = TimeCurrent();
  594 |     
  595 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  596 |     LogCollectionActivity("Data Collector initialized successfully");
  597 |     
  598 |     return true;
  599 | }
  600 | 
  601 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  602 | //| Deinitialize Data Collector                                     |
  603 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  604 | void CDataCollector::Deinitialize() {
  605 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  606 |         // Stop any active collections
  607 |         StopCollection();
  608 |         
  609 |         // Save data history if enabled
  610 |         if (m_Config.EnablePersistence) {
  611 |             SaveDataHistory();
  612 |         }
  613 |         
  614 |         // Save configuration
  615 |         SaveConfig();
  616 |         
  617 |         LogCollectionActivity("Data Collector deinitialized");
  618 |     }
  619 |     
  620 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  621 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  622 | }
  623 | 
  624 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  625 | //| Initialize default configuration                                |
  626 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  627 | void CDataCollector::InitializeDefaultConfig() {
  628 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  629 |     
  630 |     m_Config.Mode = COLLECTION_MODE_REAL_TIME;
  631 |     m_Config.CollectionIntervalMs = 1000;
  632 |     m_Config.BatchSize = 100;
  633 |     m_Config.MaxConcurrentCollections = 5;
  634 |     m_Config.TimeoutMs = 5000;
  635 |     
  636 |     m_Config.MinQuality = DATA_QUALITY_FAIR;
  637 |     m_Config.EnableValidation = true;
  638 |     m_Config.EnableNormalization = true;
  639 |     m_Config.EnableFiltering = true;
  640 |     
  641 |     m_Config.EnableCaching = true;
  642 |     m_Config.CacheExpirySeconds = 3600;
  643 |     m_Config.MaxCacheSize = 10000;
  644 |     m_Config.EnablePersistence = false;
  645 |     m_Config.PersistenceFile = "data_history.dat";
  646 |     
  647 |     m_Config.EnableCompression = false;
  648 |     m_Config.EnableBatching = true;
  649 |     m_Config.MaxMemoryUsageMB = 200;
  650 |     m_Config.EnableAsyncCollection = false;
  651 |     
  652 |     m_Config.MaxRetries = 3;
  653 |     m_Config.RetryDelayMs = 1000;
  654 |     m_Config.ContinueOnError = true;
  655 |     m_Config.LogErrors = true;
  656 |     
  657 |     m_Config.SymbolFilter = "";
  658 |     m_Config.TimeframeFilter = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  659 |     m_Config.StartTimeFilter = 0;
  660 |     m_Config.EndTimeFilter = 0;
  661 |     
  662 |     m_Config.EnableRealTimeUpdates = true;
  663 |     m_Config.EnableHistoricalData = true;
  664 |     m_Config.EnableDataValidation = true;
  665 |     m_Config.EnableQualityMonitoring = true;
  666 | }
  667 | 
  668 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  669 | //| Update method                                                   |
  670 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  671 | void CDataCollector::Update() {
  672 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_bPaused) {
  673 |         return;
  674 |     }
  675 |     
  676 |     // Process any pending collections
  677 |     ProcessCollections();
  678 |     
  679 |     // Cleanup expired cache periodically
  680 |     if (TimeCurrent() - m_CacheLastCleanup > 300) { // Every 5 minutes
  681 |         CleanupExpiredCache();
  682 |         m_CacheLastCleanup = TimeCurrent();
  683 |     }
  684 |     
  685 |     // Update statistics
  686 |     UpdateStatistics();
  687 |     
  688 |     // Check memory usage
  689 |     CheckMemoryUsage();
  690 | }
  691 | 
  692 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  693 | //| Process collections                                             |
  694 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  695 | void CDataCollector::ProcessCollections() {
  696 |     if (!m_bCollecting) {
  697 |         return;
  698 |     }
  699 |     
  700 |     // This is a placeholder for actual collection processing
  701 |     // In a real implementation, this would handle queued collection requests
  702 |     
  703 |     LogCollectionActivity("Processing collections");
  704 | }
  705 | 
  706 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  707 | //| Collect price data                                              |
  708 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  709 | int CDataCollector::CollectPriceData(const string symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int count = 1000) {
  710 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  711 |         return -1;
  712 |     }
  713 |     
  714 |     StartPerformanceTimer();
  715 |     
  716 |     // Create data series for price data
  717 |     int seriesID = CreateDataSeries("PriceData_" + symbol + "_" + EnumToString(timeframe), DATA_TYPE_PRICE, symbol, timeframe);
  718 |     
  719 |     if (seriesID <= 0) {
  720 |         LogCollectionActivity("Failed to create price data series for " + symbol, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  721 |         return -1;
  722 |     }
  723 |     
  724 |     // Collect OHLC data
  725 |     MqlRates rates[];
  726 |     int copied = CopyRates(symbol, timeframe, 0, count, rates);
  727 |     
  728 |     if (copied <= 0) {
  729 |         LogCollectionActivity("Failed to copy rates for " + symbol + ": " + IntegerToString(GetLastError()), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  730 |         return -1;
  731 |     }
  732 |     
  733 |     // Create data points for each rate
  734 |     for (int i = 0; i < copied; i++) {
  735 |         // Create data point for close price
  736 |         int dataPointID = CreateDataPoint(DATA_TYPE_PRICE, symbol, rates[i].close, rates[i].time);
  737 |         
  738 |         if (dataPointID > 0) {
  739 |             // Add additional OHLC data
  740 |             SDataPoint& dataPoint = m_DataPoints[dataPointID - 1];
  741 |             dataPoint.Values[0] = rates[i].open;
  742 |             dataPoint.Values[1] = rates[i].high;
  743 |             dataPoint.Values[2] = rates[i].low;
  744 |             dataPoint.Values[3] = rates[i].close;
  745 |             dataPoint.Values[4] = (double)rates[i].tick_volume;
  746 |             dataPoint.ValueCount = 5;
  747 |             
  748 |             dataPoint.Labels[0] = "Open";
  749 |             dataPoint.Labels[1] = "High";
  750 |             dataPoint.Labels[2] = "Low";
  751 |             dataPoint.Labels[3] = "Close";
  752 |             dataPoint.Labels[4] = "Volume";
  753 |             dataPoint.LabelCount = 5;
  754 |             
  755 |             dataPoint.Timeframe = timeframe;
  756 |             dataPoint.Source = DATA_SOURCE_TERMINAL;
  757 |             dataPoint.Quality = DATA_QUALITY_GOOD;
  758 |             dataPoint.Status = DATA_STATUS_AVAILABLE;
  759 |             
  760 |             // Add to series
  761 |             if (m_DataSeries[seriesID - 1].DataPointCount < ArraySize(m_DataSeries[seriesID - 1].DataPointIDs)) {
  762 |                 m_DataSeries[seriesID - 1].DataPointIDs[m_DataSeries[seriesID - 1].DataPointCount] = dataPointID;
  763 |                 m_DataSeries[seriesID - 1].DataPointCount++;
  764 |             }
  765 |         }
  766 |     }
  767 |     
  768 |     // Update series statistics
  769 |     if (seriesID > 0) {
  770 |         SDataSeries& series = m_DataSeries[seriesID - 1];
  771 |         series.LastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  772 |         series.Status = DATA_STATUS_AVAILABLE;
  773 |         
  774 |         // Calculate basic statistics
  775 |         if (series.DataPointCount > 0) {
  776 |             double sum = 0;
  777 |             double minVal = DBL_MAX;
  778 |             double maxVal = -DBL_MAX;
  779 |             
  780 |             for (int i = 0; i < series.DataPointCount; i++) {
  781 |                 int dpID = series.DataPointIDs[i];
  782 |                 if (dpID > 0 && dpID <= m_DataPointCount) {
  783 |                     double value = m_DataPoints[dpID - 1].NumericValue;
  784 |                     sum += value;
  785 |                     if (value < minVal) minVal = value;
  786 |                     if (value > maxVal) maxVal = value;
  787 |                 }
  788 |             }
  789 |             
  790 |             series.AverageValue = sum / series.DataPointCount;
  791 |             series.MinValue = minVal;
  792 |             series.MaxValue = maxVal;
  793 |         }
  794 |     }
  795 |     
  796 |     double collectionTime = StopPerformanceTimer();
  797 |     UpdatePerformanceMetrics(collectionTime);
  798 |     
  799 |     LogCollectionActivity("Collected " + IntegerToString(copied) + " price data points for " + symbol + " in " + DoubleToString(collectionTime, 2) + "ms");
  800 |     
  801 |     return seriesID;
  802 | }
  803 | 
  804 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  805 | //| Create data series                                              |
  806 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  807 | int CDataCollector::CreateDataSeries(const string name, const ENUM_DATA_TYPE type, const string symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe) {
  808 |     if (m_DataSeriesCount >= ArraySize(m_DataSeries)) {
  809 |         LogCollectionActivity("Data series storage full", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  810 |         return -1;
  811 |     }
  812 |     
  813 |     SDataSeries series;
  814 |     ZeroMemory(series);
  815 |     
  816 |     series.ID = m_NextSeriesID++;
  817 |     series.Name = name;
  818 |     series.Description = "Data series for " + symbol;
  819 |     series.Type = type;
  820 |     series.Source = DATA_SOURCE_TERMINAL;
  821 |     series.Symbol = symbol;
  822 |     series.Timeframe = timeframe;
  823 |     
  824 |     series.DataPointCount = 0;
  825 |     series.MaxDataPoints = ArraySize(series.DataPointIDs);
  826 |     
  827 |     series.StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  828 |     series.EndTime = 0;
  829 |     series.LastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  830 |     
  831 |     series.MinValue = DBL_MAX;
  832 |     series.MaxValue = -DBL_MAX;
  833 |     series.AverageValue = 0;
  834 |     series.StandardDeviation = 0;
  835 |     
  836 |     series.AutoUpdate = true;
  837 |     series.UpdateIntervalSeconds = 60;
  838 |     series.EnableCaching = m_Config.EnableCaching;
  839 |     series.CacheExpirySeconds = m_Config.CacheExpirySeconds;
  840 |     
  841 |     series.OverallQuality = DATA_QUALITY_UNKNOWN;
  842 |     series.CompletenessRatio = 0;
  843 |     series.MissingDataPoints = 0;
  844 |     series.InvalidDataPoints = 0;
  845 |     
  846 |     series.AverageCollectionTime = 0;
  847 |     series.TotalCollectionTime = 0;
  848 |     series.CollectionCount = 0;
  849 |     
  850 |     series.Status = DATA_STATUS_PENDING;
  851 |     series.IsActive = true;
  852 |     series.LastError = "";
  853 |     
  854 |     // Validate series
  855 |     if (!ValidateDataSeries(series)) {
  856 |         LogCollectionActivity("Invalid data series created", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  857 |         return -1;
  858 |     }
  859 |     
  860 |     // Store series
  861 |     m_DataSeries[m_DataSeriesCount] = series;
  862 |     m_DataSeriesCount++;
  863 |     
  864 |     LogCollectionActivity("Data series created: ID=" + IntegerToString(series.ID) + ", Name=" + name);
  865 |     
  866 |     return series.ID;
  867 | }
  868 | 
  869 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  870 | //| Create data point                                               |
  871 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  872 | int CDataCollector::CreateDataPoint(const ENUM_DATA_TYPE type, const string symbol, const double value, const datetime timestamp) {
  873 |     if (m_DataPointCount >= ArraySize(m_DataPoints)) {
  874 |         LogCollectionActivity("Data point storage full", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  875 |         return -1;
  876 |     }
  877 |     
  878 |     SDataPoint dataPoint;
  879 |     ZeroMemory(dataPoint);
  880 |     
  881 |     dataPoint.ID = m_NextDataPointID++;
  882 |     dataPoint.Type = type;
  883 |     dataPoint.Source = DATA_SOURCE_TERMINAL;
  884 |     dataPoint.Quality = DATA_QUALITY_UNKNOWN;
  885 |     dataPoint.Status = DATA_STATUS_PENDING;
  886 |     
  887 |     dataPoint.Timestamp = timestamp;
  888 |     dataPoint.CollectedTime = TimeCurrent();
  889 |     dataPoint.ExpiryTime = TimeCurrent() + m_Config.CacheExpirySeconds;
  890 |     
  891 |     dataPoint.Symbol = symbol;
  892 |     dataPoint.Timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  893 |     
  894 |     dataPoint.NumericValue = value;
  895 |     dataPoint.StringValue = "";
  896 |     dataPoint.IntegerValue = 0;
  897 |     dataPoint.BooleanValue = false;
  898 |     
  899 |     dataPoint.ValueCount = 0;
  900 |     dataPoint.LabelCount = 0;
  901 |     
  902 |     dataPoint.Category = GetDataTypeString(type);
  903 |     dataPoint.Subcategory = "";
  904 |     dataPoint.Description = "Data point for " + symbol;
  905 |     dataPoint.Units = "";
  906 |     
  907 |     dataPoint.Accuracy = 0;
  908 |     dataPoint.Reliability = 0;
  909 |     dataPoint.Completeness = 0;
  910 |     dataPoint.ValidationScore = 0;
  911 |     
  912 |     dataPoint.SourceName = "MT5 Terminal";
  913 |     dataPoint.SourceVersion = "1.0";
  914 |     dataPoint.CollectionMethod = "Direct";
  915 |     
  916 |     dataPoint.IsProcessed = false;
  917 |     dataPoint.IsNormalized = false;
  918 |     dataPoint.IsFiltered = false;
  919 |     dataPoint.IsAggregated = false;
  920 |     
  921 |     dataPoint.ParentDataID = 0;
  922 |     dataPoint.RelatedDataCount = 0;
  923 |     
  924 |     dataPoint.CollectionTimeMs = 0;
  925 |     dataPoint.SizeBytes = sizeof(SDataPoint);
  926 |     
  927 |     dataPoint.IsValidated = false;
  928 |     dataPoint.ValidationErrorCount = 0;
  929 |     
  930 |     // Validate data point
  931 |     if (!ValidateDataPoint(dataPoint)) {
  932 |         LogCollectionActivity("Invalid data point created", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  933 |         return -1;
  934 |     }
  935 |     
  936 |     // Assess quality
  937 |     dataPoint.Quality = AssessDataQuality(dataPoint.ID);
  938 |     dataPoint.Status = DATA_STATUS_AVAILABLE;
  939 |     
  940 |     // Store data point
  941 |     m_DataPoints[m_DataPointCount] = dataPoint;
  942 |     m_DataPointCount++;
  943 |     
  944 |     // Cache if enabled
  945 |     if (m_Config.EnableCaching) {
  946 |         CacheDataPoint(dataPoint.ID);
  947 |     }
  948 |     
  949 |     return dataPoint.ID;
  950 | }
  951 | 
  952 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  953 | //| Validate data point                                             |
  954 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  955 | bool CDataCollector::ValidateDataPoint(const SDataPoint& dataPoint) {
  956 |     if (dataPoint.ID <= 0) return false;
  957 |     if (dataPoint.Symbol == "") return false;
  958 |     if (dataPoint.Timestamp <= 0) return false;
  959 |     if (!ValidateNumericValue(dataPoint.NumericValue, dataPoint.Type)) return false;
  960 |     if (!ValidateTimestamp(dataPoint.Timestamp)) return false;
  961 |     if (!ValidateSymbol(dataPoint.Symbol)) return false;
  962 |     
  963 |     return true;
  964 | }
  965 | 
  966 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  967 | //| Validate data series                                            |
  968 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  969 | bool CDataCollector::ValidateDataSeries(const SDataSeries& dataSeries) {
  970 |     if (dataSeries.ID <= 0) return false;
  971 |     if (dataSeries.Name == "") return false;
  972 |     if (dataSeries.Symbol == "") return false;
  973 |     
  974 |     return true;
  975 | }
  976 | 
  977 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  978 | //| Assess data quality                                             |
  979 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  980 | ENUM_DATA_QUALITY CDataCollector::AssessDataQuality(const int dataPointID) {
  981 |     if (dataPointID <= 0 || dataPointID > m_DataPointCount) {
  982 |         return DATA_QUALITY_UNKNOWN;
  983 |     }
  984 |     
  985 |     SDataPoint& dataPoint = m_DataPoints[dataPointID - 1];
  986 |     
  987 |     int qualityScore = 0;
  988 |     
  989 |     // Check timestamp validity
  990 |     if (dataPoint.Timestamp > 0 && dataPoint.Timestamp <= TimeCurrent()) {
  991 |         qualityScore += 20;
  992 |     }
  993 |     
  994 |     // Check value validity
  995 |     if (ValidateNumericValue(dataPoint.NumericValue, dataPoint.Type)) {
  996 |         qualityScore += 30;
  997 |     }
  998 |     
  999 |     // Check source reliability
 1000 |     if (dataPoint.Source == DATA_SOURCE_TERMINAL || dataPoint.Source == DATA_SOURCE_BROKER) {
 1001 |         qualityScore += 25;
 1002 |     }
 1003 |     
 1004 |     // Check completeness
 1005 |     if (dataPoint.Symbol != "" && dataPoint.Category != "") {
 1006 |         qualityScore += 15;
 1007 |     }
 1008 |     
 1009 |     // Check freshness
 1010 |     if (TimeCurrent() - dataPoint.CollectedTime < 3600) { // Within 1 hour
 1011 |         qualityScore += 10;
 1012 |     }
 1013 |     
 1014 |     // Determine quality level
 1015 |     if (qualityScore >= 90) return DATA_QUALITY_EXCELLENT;
 1016 |     if (qualityScore >= 75) return DATA_QUALITY_GOOD;
 1017 |     if (qualityScore >= 60) return DATA_QUALITY_FAIR;
 1018 |     if (qualityScore >= 40) return DATA_QUALITY_POOR;
 1019 |     
 1020 |     return DATA_QUALITY_UNKNOWN;
 1021 | }
 1022 | 
 1023 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1024 | //| Validation helpers                                              |
 1025 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1026 | bool CDataCollector::ValidateNumericValue(const double value, const ENUM_DATA_TYPE type) {
 1027 |     if (value != value) return false; // Check for NaN
 1028 |     if (value == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
 1029 |     
 1030 |     switch(type) {
 1031 |     case DATA_TYPE_PRICE:
 1032 |         return (value > 0 && value < 1000000);
 1033 |     case DATA_TYPE_VOLUME:
 1034 |         return (value >= 0);
 1035 |     case DATA_TYPE_SPREAD:
 1036 |         return (value >= 0 && value < 1000);
 1037 |     default:
 1038 |         return true;
 1039 |     }
 1040 | }
 1041 | 
 1042 | bool CDataCollector::ValidateTimestamp(const datetime timestamp) {
 1043 |     return (timestamp > 0 && timestamp <= TimeCurrent() + 86400); // Allow 1 day in future
 1044 | }
 1045 | 
 1046 | bool CDataCollector::ValidateSymbol(const string symbol) {
 1047 |     return (symbol != "" && StringLen(symbol) <= 20);
 1048 | }
 1049 | 
 1050 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1051 | //| Cache management                                                |
 1052 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1053 | bool CDataCollector::CacheDataPoint(const int dataPointID) {
 1054 |     if (m_CachedDataCount >= ArraySize(m_CachedDataIDs)) {
 1055 |         return false;
 1056 |     }
 1057 |     
 1058 |     // Check if already cached
 1059 |     if (IsCached(dataPointID)) {
 1060 |         return true;
 1061 |     }
 1062 |     
 1063 |     m_CachedDataIDs[m_CachedDataCount] = dataPointID;
 1064 |     m_CachedDataCount++;
 1065 |     
 1066 |     return true;
 1067 | }
 1068 | 
 1069 | bool CDataCollector::IsCached(const int dataPointID) const {
 1070 |     return (FindCachedData(dataPointID) >= 0);
 1071 | }
 1072 | 
 1073 | int CDataCollector::FindCachedData(const int dataPointID) {
 1074 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CachedDataCount; i++) {
 1075 |         if (m_CachedDataIDs[i] == dataPointID) {
 1076 |             return i;
 1077 |         }
 1078 |     }
 1079 |     return -1;
 1080 | }
 1081 | 
 1082 | void CDataCollector::CleanupExpiredCache() {
 1083 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
 1084 |     
 1085 |     for (int i = m_CachedDataCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 1086 |         int dataPointID = m_CachedDataIDs[i];
 1087 |         if (dataPointID > 0 && dataPointID <= m_DataPointCount) {
 1088 |             SDataPoint& dataPoint = m_DataPoints[dataPointID - 1];
 1089 |             if (currentTime > dataPoint.ExpiryTime) {
 1090 |                 RemoveCachedData(i);
 1091 |             }
 1092 |         }
 1093 |     }
 1094 | }
 1095 | 
 1096 | bool CDataCollector::RemoveCachedData(const int index) {
 1097 |     if (index < 0 || index >= m_CachedDataCount) {
 1098 |         return false;
 1099 |     }
 1100 |     
 1101 |     // Shift array
 1102 |     for (int i = index; i < m_CachedDataCount - 1; i++) {
 1103 |         m_CachedDataIDs[i] = m_CachedDataIDs[i + 1];
 1104 |     }
 1105 |     
 1106 |     m_CachedDataCount--;
 1107 |     return true;
 1108 | }
 1109 | 
 1110 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1111 | //| Performance monitoring                                          |
 1112 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1113 | void CDataCollector::StartPerformanceTimer() {
 1114 |     m_LastCollectionTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
 1115 | }
 1116 | 
 1117 | double CDataCollector::StopPerformanceTimer() {
 1118 |     datetime currentTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
 1119 |     return (double)(currentTime - m_LastCollectionTime) / 1000.0; // Convert to milliseconds
 1120 | }
 1121 | 
 1122 | void CDataCollector::UpdatePerformanceMetrics(const double collectionTime) {
 1123 |     m_CollectionCount++;
 1124 |     m_TotalCollectionTime += collectionTime;
 1125 | }
 1126 | 
 1127 | double CDataCollector::GetAverageCollectionTime() const {
 1128 |     if (m_CollectionCount == 0) return 0.0;
 1129 |     return m_TotalCollectionTime / m_CollectionCount;
 1130 | }
 1131 | 
 1132 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1133 | //| Control methods                                                 |
 1134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1135 | void CDataCollector::StartCollection() {
 1136 |     m_bCollecting = true;
 1137 |     m_bPaused = false;
 1138 |     LogCollectionActivity("Data collection started");
 1139 | }
 1140 | 
 1141 | void CDataCollector::StopCollection() {
 1142 |     m_bCollecting = false;
 1143 |     m_bPaused = false;
 1144 |     LogCollectionActivity("Data collection stopped");
 1145 | }
 1146 | 
 1147 | void CDataCollector::PauseCollection() {
 1148 |     m_bPaused = true;
 1149 |     LogCollectionActivity("Data collection paused");
 1150 | }
 1151 | 
 1152 | void CDataCollector::ResumeCollection() {
 1153 |     m_bPaused = false;
 1154 |     LogCollectionActivity("Data collection resumed");
 1155 | }
 1156 | 
 1157 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1158 | //| Update statistics                                               |
 1159 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1160 | void CDataCollector::UpdateStatistics() {
 1161 |     m_Statistics.TotalDataPoints = m_DataPointCount;
 1162 |     m_Statistics.TotalCollections = m_CollectionCount;
 1163 |     m_Statistics.AverageCollectionTime = GetAverageCollectionTime();
 1164 |     m_Statistics.TotalCollectionTime = m_TotalCollectionTime;
 1165 |     m_Statistics.LastCollectionTime = TimeCurrent();
 1166 |     m_Statistics.CachedDataPoints = m_CachedDataCount;
 1167 |     
 1168 |     // Calculate cache hit ratio
 1169 |     if (m_Statistics.CacheHits + m_Statistics.CacheMisses > 0) {
 1170 |         m_Statistics.CacheHitRatio = (double)m_Statistics.CacheHits / (m_Statistics.CacheHits + m_Statistics.CacheMisses);
 1171 |     }
 1172 | }

 1186 |     case DATA_TYPE_ACCOUNT: return "Account";
 1187 |     case DATA_TYPE_MARKET_INFO: return "MarketInfo";
 1188 |     case DATA_TYPE_ECONOMIC: return "Economic";
 1189 |     case DATA_TYPE_NEWS: return "News";
 1190 |     case DATA_TYPE_SENTIMENT: return "Sentiment";
 1191 |     case DATA_TYPE_VOLATILITY: return "Volatility";
 1192 |     case DATA_TYPE_CORRELATION: return "Correlation";

 1240 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1241 | //| Error handling                                                  |
 1242 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1243 | void CDataCollector::HandleCollectionError(const string error, const ENUM_DATA_TYPE type) {
 1244 |     m_ErrorCount++;
 1245 |     m_LastError = error;
 1246 |     LogCollectionError("Collection error for " + GetDataTypeString(type) + ": " + error);
 1247 | }
 1248 | 
 1249 | void CDataCollector::LogCollectionError(const string error, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_ERROR) {
 1250 |     LogCollectionActivity(error, level);
 1251 | }
 1252 | 
 1253 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1254 | //| Memory management                                               |
 1255 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1256 | void CDataCollector::CheckMemoryUsage() {
 1257 |     // Placeholder for memory usage monitoring

  566 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  567 | bool CDataProcessor::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  568 |     if (context == NULL) {
  569 |         Print("[DATA PROCESSOR ERROR] Context is NULL");
  570 |         return false;
  571 |     }
  572 |     
  573 |     m_pContext = context;
  574 |     
  575 |     // Load configuration
  576 |     LoadConfig();
  577 |     
  578 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  579 |     LogProcessingActivity("Data Processor initialized successfully");
  580 |     
  581 |     return true;
  582 | }

  584 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  585 | //| Deinitialize Data Processor                                     |
  586 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  587 | void CDataProcessor::Deinitialize() {
  588 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  589 |         // Stop any active processing
  590 |         StopProcessing();
  591 |         
  592 |         // Save configuration
  593 |         SaveConfig();
  594 |         
  595 |         LogProcessingActivity("Data Processor deinitialized");
  596 |     }
  597 |     
  598 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  599 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  600 | }
