  650 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  651 | //| Update method                                                   |
  652 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  653 | void CDataProcessor::Update() {
  654 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_bPaused) {
  655 |         return;
  656 |     }
  657 |     
  658 |     // Process queue
  659 |     ProcessQueue();
  660 |     
  661 |     // Update statistics
  662 |     UpdateStatistics();
  663 |     
  664 |     // Check memory usage
  665 |     CheckMemoryUsage();
  666 | }
  667 | 
  668 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  669 | //| Process queue                                                   |
  670 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  671 | void CDataProcessor::ProcessQueue() {
  672 |     if (!m_bProcessing || IsQueueEmpty()) {
  673 |         return;
  674 |     }
  675 |     
  676 |     // Process tasks up to the maximum concurrent limit
  677 |     while (m_ActiveTasks < m_Config.MaxConcurrentTasks && !IsQueueEmpty()) {
  678 |         int taskID = GetNextTaskFromQueue();
  679 |         if (taskID > 0) {
  680 |             if (ExecuteTask(taskID)) {
  681 |                 m_ActiveTasks++;
  682 |             }
  683 |         }
  684 |     }
  685 | }
  686 | 
  687 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  688 | //| Create processing task                                          |
  689 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  690 | int CDataProcessor::CreateTask(const string name, const ENUM_PROCESSING_TYPE type, const ENUM_PROCESSING_METHOD method) {
  691 |     if (m_TaskCount >= ArraySize(m_Tasks)) {
  692 |         LogProcessingActivity("Task storage full", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  693 |         return -1;
  694 |     }
  695 |     
  696 |     SProcessingTask task;
  697 |     ZeroMemory(task);
  698 |     
  699 |     task.ID = m_NextTaskID++;
  700 |     task.Name = name;
  701 |     task.Description = "Processing task: " + name;
  702 |     task.Type = type;
  703 |     task.Method = method;
  704 |     task.Status = PROCESSING_STATUS_PENDING;
  705 |     task.Priority = PROCESSING_PRIORITY_NORMAL;
  706 |     
  707 |     task.InputDataCount = 0;
  708 |     task.OutputDataCount = 0;
  709 |     task.InputDataSource = "";
  710 |     task.OutputDataDestination = "";
  711 |     
  712 |     task.ParameterCount = 0;
  713 |     
  714 |     task.EnableValidation = m_Config.EnableQualityValidation;
  715 |     task.EnableLogging = m_Config.EnableDetailedLogging;
  716 |     task.EnableCaching = m_Config.EnableCaching;
  717 |     task.EnableParallelProcessing = false;
  718 |     
  719 |     task.CreatedTime = TimeCurrent();
  720 |     task.StartTime = 0;
  721 |     task.EndTime = 0;
  722 |     task.EstimatedCompletionTime = 0;
  723 |     
  724 |     task.ProgressPercentage = 0;
  725 |     task.ProcessedItems = 0;
  726 |     task.TotalItems = 0;
  727 |     task.CurrentStep = "Created";
  728 |     
  729 |     task.ProcessingTimeMs = 0;
  730 |     task.MemoryUsageMB = 0;
  731 |     task.CPUUsagePercentage = 0;
  732 |     
  733 |     task.AccuracyScore = 0;
  734 |     task.ReliabilityScore = 0;
  735 |     task.EfficiencyScore = 0;
  736 |     
  737 |     task.LastError = "";
  738 |     task.ErrorCount = 0;
  739 |     
  740 |     task.DependentTaskCount = 0;
  741 |     task.PrerequisiteTaskCount = 0;
  742 |     
  743 |     task.HasResults = false;
  744 |     task.ResultSummary = "";
  745 |     task.ResultMetricCount = 0;
  746 |     
  747 |     task.CreatedBy = "DataProcessor";
  748 |     task.Category = GetProcessingTypeString(type);
  749 |     task.TagCount = 0;
  750 |     
  751 |     // Validate task
  752 |     if (!ValidateProcessingTask(task)) {
  753 |         LogProcessingActivity("Invalid processing task created", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  754 |         return -1;
  755 |     }
  756 |     
  757 |     // Store task
  758 |     m_Tasks[m_TaskCount] = task;
  759 |     m_TaskCount++;
  760 |     
  761 |     LogProcessingActivity("Processing task created: ID=" + IntegerToString(task.ID) + ", Name=" + name);
  762 |     
  763 |     return task.ID;
  764 | }
  765 | 
  766 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  767 | //| Execute task                                                    |
  768 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  769 | bool CDataProcessor::ExecuteTask(const int taskID) {
  770 |     if (!ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
  771 |         return false;
  772 |     }
  773 |     
  774 |     SProcessingTask& task = m_Tasks[taskID - 1];
  775 |     
  776 |     // Check prerequisites
  777 |     for (int i = 0; i < task.PrerequisiteTaskCount; i++) {
  778 |         int prereqID = task.PrerequisiteTaskIDs[i];
  779 |         if (ValidateTaskID(prereqID)) {
  780 |             SProcessingTask& prereqTask = m_Tasks[prereqID - 1];
  781 |             if (prereqTask.Status != PROCESSING_STATUS_COMPLETED) {
  782 |                 LogProcessingActivity("Prerequisite task " + IntegerToString(prereqID) + " not completed for task " + IntegerToString(taskID));
  783 |                 return false;
  784 |             }
  785 |         }
  786 |     }
  787 |     
  788 |     // Start task
  789 |     task.Status = PROCESSING_STATUS_RUNNING;
  790 |     task.StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  791 |     task.CurrentStep = "Starting";
  792 |     
  793 |     StartTaskTimer(taskID);
  794 |     
  795 |     LogProcessingActivity("Starting task: " + task.Name + " (ID=" + IntegerToString(taskID) + ")");
  796 |     
  797 |     // Execute based on type and method
  798 |     bool success = false;
  799 |     
  800 |     switch(task.Type) {
  801 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_NORMALIZATION:
  802 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Normalization");
  803 |         break;
  804 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_SMOOTHING:
  805 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Smoothing");
  806 |         break;
  807 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_FILTERING:
  808 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Filtering");
  809 |         break;
  810 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_AGGREGATION:
  811 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Aggregation");
  812 |         break;
  813 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_TRANSFORMATION:
  814 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Transformation");
  815 |         break;
  816 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_INTERPOLATION:
  817 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Interpolation");
  818 |         break;
  819 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_CORRELATION:
  820 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Correlation");
  821 |         break;
  822 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_REGRESSION:
  823 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Regression");
  824 |         break;
  825 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_CLASSIFICATION:
  826 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Classification");
  827 |         break;
  828 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_CLUSTERING:
  829 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Clustering");
  830 |         break;
  831 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_ANOMALY_DETECTION:
  832 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "AnomalyDetection");
  833 |         break;
  834 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_FEATURE_EXTRACTION:
  835 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "FeatureExtraction");
  836 |         break;
  837 |     case PROCESSING_TYPE_DIMENSIONALITY_REDUCTION:
  838 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "DimensionalityReduction");
  839 |         break;
  840 |     default:
  841 |         success = ProcessTaskStep(taskID, "Custom");
  842 |         break;
  843 |     }
  844 |     
  845 |     // Finalize task
  846 |     FinalizeTask(taskID, success);
  847 |     
  848 |     return success;
  849 | }
  850 | 
  851 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  852 | //| Process task step                                               |
  853 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  854 | bool CDataProcessor::ProcessTaskStep(const int taskID, const string step) {
  855 |     if (!ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
  856 |         return false;
  857 |     }
  858 |     
  859 |     SProcessingTask& task = m_Tasks[taskID - 1];
  860 |     task.CurrentStep = step;
  861 |     
  862 |     // Simulate processing based on step
  863 |     // In a real implementation, this would contain actual processing logic
  864 |     
  865 |     LogProcessingActivity("Processing step: " + step + " for task " + IntegerToString(taskID));
  866 |     
  867 |     // Update progress
  868 |     UpdateTaskProgress(taskID, 50.0); // Simulate 50% progress
  869 |     
  870 |     // Simulate some processing time
  871 |     Sleep(100);
  872 |     
  873 |     // Update progress to completion
  874 |     UpdateTaskProgress(taskID, 100.0);
  875 |     
  876 |     return true;
  877 | }
  878 | 
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | //| Finalize task                                                   |
  881 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  882 | bool CDataProcessor::FinalizeTask(const int taskID, const bool success) {
  883 |     if (!ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
  884 |         return false;
  885 |     }
  886 |     
  887 |     SProcessingTask& task = m_Tasks[taskID - 1];
  888 |     
  889 |     StopTaskTimer(taskID);
  890 |     
  891 |     task.EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  892 |     task.Status = success ? PROCESSING_STATUS_COMPLETED : PROCESSING_STATUS_FAILED;
  893 |     task.CurrentStep = success ? "Completed" : "Failed";
  894 |     
  895 |     if (success) {
  896 |         task.HasResults = true;
  897 |         task.ResultSummary = "Task completed successfully";
  898 |         task.AccuracyScore = 0.95; // Simulated
  899 |         task.ReliabilityScore = 0.98; // Simulated
  900 |         task.EfficiencyScore = 0.92; // Simulated
  901 |         
  902 |         // Cache results if enabled
  903 |         if (task.EnableCaching && m_Config.EnableResultCaching) {
  904 |             CacheResult(taskID, task.OutputDataIDs, task.OutputDataCount);
  905 |         }
  906 |     } else {
  907 |         task.ErrorCount++;
  908 |         task.LastError = "Task execution failed";
  909 |     }
  910 |     
  911 |     m_ActiveTasks--;
  912 |     
  913 |     LogProcessingActivity("Task " + IntegerToString(taskID) + " " + (success ? "completed" : "failed") + " in " + DoubleToString(task.ProcessingTimeMs, 2) + "ms");
  914 |     
  915 |     return true;
  916 | }
  917 | 
  918 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  919 | //| Apply moving average                                            |
  920 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  921 | bool CDataProcessor::ApplyMovingAverage(double& data[], const int dataCount, const int period) {
  922 |     if (dataCount <= 0 || period <= 0 || period > dataCount) {
  923 |         return false;
  924 |     }
  925 |     
  926 |     double result[];
  927 |     ArrayResize(result, dataCount);
  928 |     
  929 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
  930 |         if (i < period - 1) {
  931 |             result[i] = data[i]; // Not enough data for moving average
  932 |         } else {
  933 |             double sum = 0;
  934 |             for (int j = i - period + 1; j <= i; j++) {
  935 |                 sum += data[j];
  936 |             }
  937 |             result[i] = sum / period;
  938 |         }
  939 |     }
  940 |     
  941 |     // Copy result back to original array
  942 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
  943 |         data[i] = result[i];
  944 |     }
  945 |     
  946 |     return true;
  947 | }
  948 | 
  949 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  950 | //| Apply exponential smoothing                                     |
  951 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  952 | bool CDataProcessor::ApplyExponentialSmoothing(double& data[], const int dataCount, const double alpha) {
  953 |     if (dataCount <= 0 || alpha <= 0 || alpha > 1) {
  954 |         return false;
  955 |     }
  956 |     
  957 |     double result[];
  958 |     ArrayResize(result, dataCount);
  959 |     
  960 |     result[0] = data[0]; // First value remains the same
  961 |     
  962 |     for (int i = 1; i < dataCount; i++) {
  963 |         result[i] = alpha * data[i] + (1 - alpha) * result[i - 1];
  964 |     }
  965 |     
  966 |     // Copy result back to original array
  967 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
  968 |         data[i] = result[i];
  969 |     }
  970 |     
  971 |     return true;
  972 | }
  973 | 
  974 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  975 | //| Apply median filter                                             |
  976 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  977 | bool CDataProcessor::ApplyMedianFilter(double& data[], const int dataCount, const int windowSize) {
  978 |     if (dataCount <= 0 || windowSize <= 0 || windowSize > dataCount) {
  979 |         return false;
  980 |     }
  981 |     
  982 |     double result[];
  983 |     ArrayResize(result, dataCount);
  984 |     
  985 |     int halfWindow = windowSize / 2;
  986 |     
  987 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
  988 |         double window[];
  989 |         int windowCount = 0;
  990 |         
  991 |         // Collect window data
  992 |         for (int j = MathMax(0, i - halfWindow); j <= MathMin(dataCount - 1, i + halfWindow); j++) {
  993 |             ArrayResize(window, windowCount + 1);
  994 |             window[windowCount] = data[j];
  995 |             windowCount++;
  996 |         }
  997 |         
  998 |         // Calculate median
  999 |         result[i] = CalculateMedian(window, windowCount);
 1000 |     }
 1001 |     
 1002 |     // Copy result back to original array
 1003 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
 1004 |         data[i] = result[i];
 1005 |     }
 1006 |     
 1007 |     return true;
 1008 | }
 1009 | 
 1010 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1011 | //| Apply linear regression                                         |
 1012 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1013 | bool CDataProcessor::ApplyLinearRegression(const double x[], const double y[], const int dataCount, double& slope, double& intercept, double& rSquared) {
 1014 |     if (dataCount <= 1) {
 1015 |         return false;
 1016 |     }
 1017 |     
 1018 |     double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumXX = 0;
 1019 |     
 1020 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
 1021 |         sumX += x[i];
 1022 |         sumY += y[i];
 1023 |         sumXY += x[i] * y[i];
 1024 |         sumXX += x[i] * x[i];
 1025 |     }
 1026 |     
 1027 |     double meanX = sumX / dataCount;
 1028 |     double meanY = sumY / dataCount;
 1029 |     
 1030 |     double denominator = sumXX - dataCount * meanX * meanX;
 1031 |     if (MathAbs(denominator) < 1e-10) {
 1032 |         return false; // Avoid division by zero
 1033 |     }
 1034 |     
 1035 |     slope = (sumXY - dataCount * meanX * meanY) / denominator;
 1036 |     intercept = meanY - slope * meanX;
 1037 |     
 1038 |     // Calculate R-squared
 1039 |     double ssRes = 0, ssTot = 0;
 1040 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
 1041 |         double predicted = slope * x[i] + intercept;
 1042 |         ssRes += (y[i] - predicted) * (y[i] - predicted);
 1043 |         ssTot += (y[i] - meanY) * (y[i] - meanY);
 1044 |     }
 1045 |     
 1046 |     rSquared = (ssTot > 0) ? 1 - (ssRes / ssTot) : 0;
 1047 |     
 1048 |     return true;
 1049 | }
 1050 | 
 1051 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1052 | //| Calculate statistical measures                                  |
 1053 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1054 | double CDataProcessor::CalculateMean(const double data[], const int dataCount) {
 1055 |     if (dataCount <= 0) return 0;
 1056 |     
 1057 |     double sum = 0;
 1058 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
 1059 |         sum += data[i];
 1060 |     }
 1061 |     return sum / dataCount;
 1062 | }
 1063 | 
 1064 | double CDataProcessor::CalculateStandardDeviation(const double data[], const int dataCount) {
 1065 |     if (dataCount <= 1) return 0;
 1066 |     
 1067 |     double mean = CalculateMean(data, dataCount);
 1068 |     double sumSquaredDiff = 0;
 1069 |     
 1070 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
 1071 |         double diff = data[i] - mean;
 1072 |         sumSquaredDiff += diff * diff;
 1073 |     }
 1074 |     
 1075 |     return MathSqrt(sumSquaredDiff / (dataCount - 1));
 1076 | }
 1077 | 
 1078 | double CDataProcessor::CalculateMedian(const double data[], const int dataCount) {
 1079 |     if (dataCount <= 0) return 0;
 1080 |     
 1081 |     double sortedData[];
 1082 |     ArrayResize(sortedData, dataCount);
 1083 |     ArrayCopy(sortedData, data, 0, 0, dataCount);
 1084 |     
 1085 |     SortArray(sortedData, dataCount);
 1086 |     
 1087 |     if (dataCount % 2 == 1) {
 1088 |         return sortedData[dataCount / 2];
 1089 |     } else {
 1090 |         int mid = dataCount / 2;
 1091 |         return (sortedData[mid - 1] + sortedData[mid]) / 2.0;
 1092 |     }
 1093 | }
 1094 | 
 1095 | double CDataProcessor::CalculateCorrelationCoefficient(const double x[], const double y[], const int dataCount) {
 1096 |     if (dataCount <= 1) return 0;
 1097 |     
 1098 |     double meanX = CalculateMean(x, dataCount);
 1099 |     double meanY = CalculateMean(y, dataCount);
 1100 |     
 1101 |     double numerator = 0, sumXX = 0, sumYY = 0;
 1102 |     
 1103 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
 1104 |         double diffX = x[i] - meanX;
 1105 |         double diffY = y[i] - meanY;
 1106 |         numerator += diffX * diffY;
 1107 |         sumXX += diffX * diffX;
 1108 |         sumYY += diffY * diffY;
 1109 |     }
 1110 |     
 1111 |     double denominator = MathSqrt(sumXX * sumYY);
 1112 |     if (denominator == 0) return 0;
 1113 |     
 1114 |     return numerator / denominator;
 1115 | }
 1116 | 
 1117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1118 | //| Validation methods                                              |
 1119 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1120 | bool CDataProcessor::ValidateProcessingTask(const SProcessingTask& task) {
 1121 |     if (task.ID <= 0) return false;
 1122 |     if (task.Name == "") return false;
 1123 |     
 1124 |     return true;
 1125 | }
 1126 | 
 1127 | bool CDataProcessor::ValidateTaskID(const int taskID) const {
 1128 |     return (taskID > 0 && taskID <= m_TaskCount);
 1129 | }
 1130 | 
 1131 | bool CDataProcessor::ValidateInputData(const int dataIDs[], const int dataCount) {
 1132 |     if (dataCount <= 0) return false;
 1133 |     
 1134 |     for (int i = 0; i < dataCount; i++) {
 1135 |         if (!ValidateDataID(dataIDs[i])) {
 1136 |             return false;
 1137 |         }
 1138 |     }
 1139 |     
 1140 |     return true;
 1141 | }
 1142 | 
 1143 | bool CDataProcessor::ValidateDataID(const int dataID) const {
 1144 |     // Placeholder - would validate against actual data storage
 1145 |     return (dataID > 0);
 1146 | }

 1148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1149 | //| Queue management                                                |
 1150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1151 | bool CDataProcessor::AddToQueue(const int taskID) {
 1152 |     if (IsQueueFull() || !ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
 1153 |         return false;
 1154 |     }
 1155 |     
 1156 |     return EnqueueTask(taskID);
 1157 | }
 1158 | 
 1159 | int CDataProcessor::GetNextTaskFromQueue() {
 1160 |     if (IsQueueEmpty()) {
 1161 |         return -1;
 1162 |     }
 1163 |     
 1164 |     return DequeueTask();
 1165 | }
 1166 | 
 1167 | bool CDataProcessor::EnqueueTask(const int taskID) {
 1168 |     if (IsQueueFull()) {
 1169 |         return false;
 1170 |     }
 1171 |     
 1172 |     m_TaskQueue[m_QueueTail] = taskID;
 1173 |     m_QueueTail = (m_QueueTail + 1) % ArraySize(m_TaskQueue);
 1174 |     m_QueueSize++;
 1175 |     
 1176 |     return true;
 1177 | }
 1178 | 
 1179 | int CDataProcessor::DequeueTask() {
 1180 |     if (IsQueueEmpty()) {
 1181 |         return -1;
 1182 |     }
 1183 |     
 1184 |     int taskID = m_TaskQueue[m_QueueHead];
 1185 |     m_QueueHead = (m_QueueHead + 1) % ArraySize(m_TaskQueue);
 1186 |     m_QueueSize--;
 1187 |     
 1188 |     return taskID;
 1189 | }
 1190 | 
 1191 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1192 | //| Performance monitoring                                          |
 1193 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1194 | void CDataProcessor::StartTaskTimer(const int taskID) {
 1195 |     if (ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
 1196 |         m_LastProcessingTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
 1197 |     }
 1198 | }
 1199 | 
 1200 | void CDataProcessor::StopTaskTimer(const int taskID) {
 1201 |     if (ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
 1202 |         datetime currentTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
 1203 |         double processingTime = (double)(currentTime - m_LastProcessingTime) / 1000.0;
 1204 |         
 1205 |         SProcessingTask& task = m_Tasks[taskID - 1];
 1206 |         task.ProcessingTimeMs = processingTime;
 1207 |         
 1208 |         m_TotalProcessingTime += processingTime;
 1209 |     }
 1210 | }
 1211 | 
 1212 | void CDataProcessor::UpdateTaskProgress(const int taskID, const double progress) {
 1213 |     if (ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
 1214 |         SProcessingTask& task = m_Tasks[taskID - 1];
 1215 |         task.ProgressPercentage = MathMax(0, MathMin(100, progress));
 1216 |     }
 1217 | }
 1218 | 
 1219 | double CDataProcessor::GetAverageProcessingTime() const {
 1220 |     if (m_Statistics.CompletedTasks == 0) return 0.0;
 1221 |     return m_TotalProcessingTime / m_Statistics.CompletedTasks;
 1222 | }
 1223 |

 1249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1250 | //| Update statistics                                               |
 1251 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1252 | void CDataProcessor::UpdateStatistics() {
 1253 |     m_Statistics.TotalTasks = m_TaskCount;
 1254 |     m_Statistics.RunningTasks = m_ActiveTasks;
 1255 |     m_Statistics.QueuedTasks = m_QueueSize;
 1256 |     
 1257 |     // Count tasks by status
 1258 |     int completed = 0, failed = 0, cancelled = 0;
 1259 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_TaskCount; i++) {
 1260 |         switch(m_Tasks[i].Status) {
 1261 |         case PROCESSING_STATUS_COMPLETED:
 1262 |             completed++;
 1263 |             break;
 1264 |         case PROCESSING_STATUS_FAILED:
 1265 |             failed++;
 1266 |             break;
 1267 |         case PROCESSING_STATUS_CANCELLED:
 1268 |             cancelled++;
 1269 |             break;
 1270 |         }
 1271 |     }
 1272 |     
 1273 |     m_Statistics.CompletedTasks = completed;
 1274 |     m_Statistics.FailedTasks = failed;
 1275 |     m_Statistics.CancelledTasks = cancelled;
 1276 |     
 1277 |     m_Statistics.AverageProcessingTime = GetAverageProcessingTime();
 1278 |     m_Statistics.TotalProcessingTime = m_TotalProcessingTime;
 1279 | }

 1355 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1356 | //| Array sorting                                                   |
 1357 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1358 | void CDataProcessor::SortArray(double& array[], const int count) {
 1359 |     if (count > 1) {
 1360 |         QuickSort(array, 0, count - 1);
 1361 |     }
 1362 | }
 1363 | 
 1364 | bool CDataProcessor::QuickSort(double& array[], const int left, const int right) {
 1365 |     if (left < right) {
 1366 |         int pivot = Partition(array, left, right);
 1367 |         QuickSort(array, left, pivot - 1);
 1368 |         QuickSort(array, pivot + 1, right);
 1369 |     }
 1370 |     return true;
 1371 | }
 1372 | 
 1373 | int CDataProcessor::Partition(double& array[], const int left, const int right) {
 1374 |     double pivot = array[right];
 1375 |     int i = left - 1;
 1376 |     
 1377 |     for (int j = left; j < right; j++) {
 1378 |         if (array[j] <= pivot) {
 1379 |             i++;
 1380 |             double temp = array[i];
 1381 |             array[i] = array[j];
 1382 |             array[j] = temp;
 1383 |         }
 1384 |     }
 1385 |     
 1386 |     double temp = array[i + 1];
 1387 |     array[i + 1] = array[right];
 1388 |     array[right] = temp;
 1389 |     
 1390 |     return i + 1;
 1391 | }
 1392 | 
 1393 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1394 | //| Error handling                                                  |
 1395 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1396 | void CDataProcessor::HandleProcessingError(const int taskID, const string error) {
 1397 |     m_ErrorCount++;
 1398 |     m_LastError = error;
 1399 |     
 1400 |     if (ValidateTaskID(taskID)) {
 1401 |         SProcessingTask& task = m_Tasks[taskID - 1];
 1402 |         task.ErrorCount++;
 1403 |         task.LastError = error;
 1404 |         
 1405 |         if (task.ErrorCount < ArraySize(task.ErrorMessages)) {
 1406 |             task.ErrorMessages[task.ErrorCount - 1] = error;
 1407 |         }
 1408 |     }
 1409 |     
 1410 |     LogProcessingError("Processing error for task " + IntegerToString(taskID) + ": " + error);
 1411 | }
 1412 | 
 1413 | void CDataProcessor::LogProcessingError(const string error, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_ERROR) {
 1414 |     LogProcessingActivity(error, level);
 1415 | }

  328 |     int CreateInfoEvent(const string name, const string description);
  329 |     int CreateDebugEvent(const string name, const string description);
  330 |     int CreateUserEvent(const string name, const string description, const string userData);
  331 |     int CreateTimerEvent(const string name, const string description, const datetime triggerTime);
  332 |     
  333 |     // Event processing
  334 |     bool ProcessEvent(const int eventID);
  335 |     bool ProcessEventBatch(const int eventIDs[], const int count);
  336 |     bool CancelEvent(const int eventID);
  337 |     bool RetryEvent(const int eventID);
  338 |     
  339 |     // Event queries
  340 |     SEvent GetEvent(const int eventID) const;
  341 |     int[] GetEventsByType(const ENUM_EVENT_TYPE type) const;
  342 |     int[] GetEventsByPriority(const ENUM_EVENT_PRIORITY priority) const;
  343 |     int[] GetEventsByStatus(const ENUM_EVENT_STATUS status) const;
  344 |     int[] GetEventsBySource(const ENUM_EVENT_SOURCE source) const;
  345 |     int[] GetEventsByCategory(const string category) const;
  346 |     int[] GetEventsByTimeRange(const datetime startTime, const datetime endTime) const;
  347 |     int[] GetPendingEvents() const;
  348 |     int[] GetFailedEvents() const;
  349 |     
  350 |     // Event relationships
  351 |     bool LinkEvents(const int parentID, const int childID);
  352 |     bool UnlinkEvents(const int parentID, const int childID);
  353 |     int[] GetChildEvents(const int parentID) const;
  354 |     int[] GetRelatedEvents(const int eventID) const;
  355 |     
  356 |     // Handler management
  357 |     bool RegisterHandler(const SEventHandler& handler);
  358 |     bool UnregisterHandler(const string handlerName);
  359 |     bool EnableHandler(const string handlerName, const bool enable);
  360 |     SEventHandler GetHandler(const string handlerName) const;
  361 |     string[] GetHandlerNames() const;
  362 |     
  363 |     // Subscription management
  364 |     int Subscribe(const string subscriberName, const ENUM_EVENT_TYPE eventTypes[], const int typeCount);
  365 |     bool Unsubscribe(const int subscriptionID);
  366 |     bool UpdateSubscription(const int subscriptionID, const SEventSubscription& subscription);
  367 |     SEventSubscription GetSubscription(const int subscriptionID) const;
  368 |     int[] GetSubscriptions() const;
  369 |     
  370 |     // Event data manipulation
  371 |     bool SetEventStringData(const int eventID, const int index, const string value);
  372 |     bool SetEventNumericData(const int eventID, const int index, const double value);
  373 |     bool SetEventIntegerData(const int eventID, const int index, const int value);
  374 |     bool SetEventBooleanData(const int eventID, const int index, const bool value);
  375 |     bool AddEventTag(const int eventID, const string tag);
  376 |     bool RemoveEventTag(const int eventID, const string tag);
  377 |     bool SetEventProperty(const int eventID, const string property, const string value);
  378 |     
  379 |     string GetEventStringData(const int eventID, const int index) const;
  380 |     double GetEventNumericData(const int eventID, const int index) const;
  381 |     int GetEventIntegerData(const int eventID, const int index) const;
  382 |     bool GetEventBooleanData(const int eventID, const int index) const;
  383 |     string[] GetEventTags(const int eventID) const;
  384 |     string GetEventProperty(const int eventID, const string property) const;
  385 |     
  386 |     // Queue management
  387 |     bool EnqueueEvent(const int eventID);
  388 |     int DequeueEvent();
  389 |     bool IsQueueEmpty() const;
  390 |     bool IsQueueFull() const;
  391 |     int GetQueueSize() const { return m_QueueSize; }
  392 |     void ClearQueue();
  393 |     
  394 |     // Priority queue management
  395 |     bool EnqueueByPriority(const int eventID);
  396 |     int DequeueByPriority();
  397 |     
  398 |     // Configuration
  399 |     void SetConfig(const SEventQueueConfig& config);
  400 |     SEventQueueConfig GetConfig() const { return m_Config; }
  401 |     void LoadConfig();
  402 |     void SaveConfig();
  403 |     void ResetConfig();
  404 |     
  405 |     // Statistics
  406 |     SEventStatistics GetStatistics() const { return m_Statistics; }
  407 |     void UpdateStatistics();
  408 |     void ResetStatistics();
  409 |     
  410 |     // Utility methods
  411 |     bool IsEventValid(const int eventID) const;
  412 |     int GetEventCount() const { return m_EventCount; }
  413 |     int GetPendingEventCount() const;
  414 |     int GetProcessingEventCount() const;
  415 |     int GetCompletedEventCount() const;
  416 |     int GetFailedEventCount() const;
  417 |     
  418 |     // Performance monitoring
  419 |     double GetAverageProcessingTime() const;
  420 |     int GetEventsPerSecond() const;
  421 |     double GetMemoryUsage() const;
  422 |     
  423 |     // Maintenance
  424 |     void CleanupOldEvents();
  425 |     void CompactEventStorage();
  426 |     bool ExportEvents(const string filePath);
  427 |     bool ImportEvents(const string filePath);
  428 |     
  429 | private:
  430 |     // Internal methods
  431 |     void InitializeDefaultConfig();
  432 |     void InitializeDefaultHandlers();
  433 |     
  434 |     // Event processing helpers
  435 |     bool ExecuteEventHandlers(const int eventID);
  436 |     bool ExecuteHandler(const SEventHandler& handler, const SEvent& event);
  437 |     bool NotifySubscribers(const int eventID);
  438 |     bool DeliverEventToSubscriber(const SEventSubscription& subscription, const SEvent& event);
  439 |     
  440 |     // Queue helpers
  441 |     bool AddToQueue(const int eventID);
  442 |     bool AddToPriorityQueue(const int eventID, const ENUM_EVENT_PRIORITY priority);
  443 |     int GetNextEventFromQueue();
  444 |     
  445 |     // Validation
  446 |     bool ValidateEvent(const SEvent& event);
  447 |     bool ValidateHandler(const SEventHandler& handler);
  448 |     bool ValidateSubscription(const SEventSubscription& subscription);
  449 |     
  450 |     // Performance helpers
  451 |     void StartPerformanceTimer();
  452 |     double StopPerformanceTimer();
  453 |     void UpdatePerformanceMetrics(const double processingTime);
  454 |     
  455 |     // Error handling
  456 |     void HandleEventError(const int eventID, const string error);
  457 |     void LogEventError(const string error, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  458 |     
  459 |     // Utility helpers
  460 |     string GetEventTypeString(const ENUM_EVENT_TYPE type);
  461 |     string GetPriorityString(const ENUM_EVENT_PRIORITY priority);
  462 |     string GetStatusString(const ENUM_EVENT_STATUS status);
  463 |     string GetSourceString(const ENUM_EVENT_SOURCE source);
  464 |     
  465 |     // File operations
  466 |     bool SaveEventHistory();
  467 |     bool LoadEventHistory();
  468 |     
  469 |     // Memory management
  470 |     void CheckMemoryUsage();
  471 |     void FreeUnusedMemory();
  472 |     
  473 |     // Logging
  474 |     void LogEventActivity(const string activity, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO);
  475 | };
  476 | 
  477 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  478 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  479 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  480 | CEventManager::CEventManager() {
  481 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  482 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  483 |     m_bProcessing = false;
  484 |     m_bShuttingDown = false;
  485 |     
  486 |     m_EventCount = 0;
  487 |     m_NextEventID = 1;
  488 |     m_HandlerCount = 0;
  489 |     m_SubscriptionCount = 0;
  490 |     
  491 |     m_QueueHead = 0;
  492 |     m_QueueTail = 0;
  493 |     m_QueueSize = 0;
  494 |     
  495 |     m_CriticalQueueSize = 0;
  496 |     m_UrgentQueueSize = 0;
  497 |     m_HighQueueSize = 0;
  498 |     m_NormalQueueSize = 0;
  499 |     
  500 |     m_LastProcessingTime = 0;
  501 |     m_ProcessingCount = 0;
  502 |     m_TotalProcessingTime = 0;
  503 |     
  504 |     m_LastError = "";
  505 |     m_ErrorCount = 0;
  506 |     
  507 |     // Initialize arrays
  508 |     ArrayInitialize(m_EventQueue, 0);
  509 |     ArrayInitialize(m_CriticalQueue, 0);
  510 |     ArrayInitialize(m_UrgentQueue, 0);
  511 |     ArrayInitialize(m_HighQueue, 0);
  512 |     ArrayInitialize(m_NormalQueue, 0);
  513 |     
  514 |     // Initialize default configuration
  515 |     InitializeDefaultConfig();
  516 |     
  517 |     // Initialize statistics
  518 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  519 | }
  520 | 
  521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  522 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  523 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  524 | CEventManager::~CEventManager() {
  525 |     Deinitialize();
  526 | }
  527 | 
  528 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  529 | //| Initialize Event Manager                                        |
  530 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  531 | bool CEventManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  532 |     if (context == NULL) {
  533 |         Print("[EVENT MANAGER ERROR] Context is NULL");
  534 |         return false;
  535 |     }
  536 |     
  537 |     m_pContext = context;
  538 |     
  539 |     // Load configuration
  540 |     LoadConfig();
  541 |     
  542 |     // Initialize default handlers
  543 |     InitializeDefaultHandlers();
  544 |     
  545 |     // Load event history if enabled
  546 |     if (m_Config.EnableEventPersistence) {
  547 |         LoadEventHistory();
  548 |     }
  549 |     
  550 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  551 |     LogEventActivity("Event Manager initialized successfully");
  552 |     
  553 |     // Create initialization event
  554 |     CreateSystemEvent("EventManagerInitialized", "Event Manager has been initialized successfully", EVENT_PRIORITY_NORMAL);
  555 |     
  556 |     return true;
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | //| Deinitialize Event Manager                                      |
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | void CEventManager::Deinitialize() {
  563 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  564 |         m_bShuttingDown = true;
  565 |         
  566 |         // Process remaining events
  567 |         ProcessEvents();
  568 |         
  569 |         // Save event history if enabled
  570 |         if (m_Config.EnableEventPersistence) {
  571 |             SaveEventHistory();
  572 |         }
  573 |         
  574 |         // Save configuration
  575 |         SaveConfig();
  576 |         
  577 |         LogEventActivity("Event Manager deinitialized");
  578 |     }
  579 |     
  580 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  581 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  582 | }
  583 | 
  584 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  585 | //| Initialize default configuration                                |
  586 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  587 | void CEventManager::InitializeDefaultConfig() {
  588 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  589 |     
  590 |     m_Config.MaxQueueSize = 1000;
  591 |     m_Config.MaxProcessingThreads = 1;
  592 |     m_Config.ProcessingTimeoutMs = 5000;
  593 |     m_Config.RetryDelayMs = 1000;
  594 |     m_Config.MaxRetries = 3;
  595 |     
  596 |     m_Config.EnablePriorityProcessing = true;
  597 |     m_Config.EnableBatchProcessing = false;
  598 |     m_Config.BatchSize = 10;
  599 |     m_Config.BatchTimeoutMs = 1000;
  600 |     
  601 |     m_Config.EnableEventPersistence = false;
  602 |     m_Config.EnableEventCompression = false;
  603 |     m_Config.PersistenceFile = "events.dat";
  604 |     
  605 |     m_Config.EnablePerformanceMonitoring = true;
  606 |     m_Config.EnableDetailedLogging = false;
  607 |     
  608 |     m_Config.MaxMemoryUsageMB = 100;
  609 |     m_Config.EnableAutoCleanup = true;
  610 |     m_Config.CleanupIntervalMinutes = 60;
  611 |     m_Config.EventRetentionDays = 7;
  612 | }
  613 | 
  614 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  615 | //| Initialize default handlers                                     |
  616 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  617 | void CEventManager::InitializeDefaultHandlers() {
  618 |     SEventHandler handler;
  619 |     
  620 |     // System event handler
  621 |     ZeroMemory(handler);
  622 |     handler.Name = "SystemEventHandler";
  623 |     handler.Description = "Handles system events";
  624 |     handler.EventType = EVENT_TYPE_SYSTEM;
  625 |     handler.MinPriority = EVENT_PRIORITY_LOW;
  626 |     handler.IsActive = true;
  627 |     handler.IsAsync = false;
  628 |     handler.HandlerFunction = "HandleSystemEvent";
  629 |     handler.Module = "EventManager";
  630 |     handler.StopOnError = false;
  631 |     handler.MaxRetries = 3;
  632 |     RegisterHandler(handler);
  633 |     
  634 |     // Error event handler
  635 |     ZeroMemory(handler);
  636 |     handler.Name = "ErrorEventHandler";
  637 |     handler.Description = "Handles error events";
  638 |     handler.EventType = EVENT_TYPE_ERROR;
  639 |     handler.MinPriority = EVENT_PRIORITY_LOW;
  640 |     handler.IsActive = true;
  641 |     handler.IsAsync = false;
  642 |     handler.HandlerFunction = "HandleErrorEvent";
  643 |     handler.Module = "EventManager";
  644 |     handler.StopOnError = false;
  645 |     handler.MaxRetries = 1;
  646 |     RegisterHandler(handler);
  647 |     
  648 |     // Trade event handler
  649 |     ZeroMemory(handler);
  650 |     handler.Name = "TradeEventHandler";
  651 |     handler.Description = "Handles trade events";
  652 |     handler.EventType = EVENT_TYPE_TRADE;
  653 |     handler.MinPriority = EVENT_PRIORITY_NORMAL;
  654 |     handler.IsActive = true;
  655 |     handler.IsAsync = false;
  656 |     handler.HandlerFunction = "HandleTradeEvent";
  657 |     handler.Module = "EventManager";
  658 |     handler.StopOnError = false;
  659 |     handler.MaxRetries = 2;
  660 |     RegisterHandler(handler);
  661 | }
  662 | 
  663 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  664 | //| Create event                                                    |
  665 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  666 | int CEventManager::CreateEvent(const ENUM_EVENT_TYPE type, const string name, const string description) {
  667 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  668 |         return -1;
  669 |     }
  670 |     
  671 |     // Check if we have space
  672 |     if (m_EventCount >= ArraySize(m_Events)) {
  673 |         LogEventActivity("Event storage full", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  674 |         return -1;
  675 |     }
  676 |     
  677 |     // Create event
  678 |     SEvent event;
  679 |     ZeroMemory(event);
  680 |     
  681 |     event.ID = m_NextEventID++;
  682 |     event.Type = type;
  683 |     event.Priority = EVENT_PRIORITY_NORMAL;
  684 |     event.Status = EVENT_STATUS_PENDING;
  685 |     event.Source = EVENT_SOURCE_EA;
  686 |     
  687 |     event.CreatedTime = TimeCurrent();
  688 |     event.ProcessedTime = 0;
  689 |     event.CompletedTime = 0;
  690 |     event.ExpiryTime = TimeCurrent() + 24 * 3600; // 24 hours
  691 |     
  692 |     event.Name = name;
  693 |     event.Description = description;
  694 |     event.Category = "General";
  695 |     event.Module = "EventManager";
  696 |     event.Function = "CreateEvent";
  697 |     
  698 |     event.ProcessingAttempts = 0;
  699 |     event.MaxProcessingAttempts = m_Config.MaxRetries;
  700 |     event.LastError = "";
  701 |     
  702 |     event.ParentEventID = 0;
  703 |     event.ChildEventCount = 0;
  704 |     event.RelatedEventCount = 0;
  705 |     
  706 |     event.ProcessingTimeMs = 0;
  707 |     event.MemoryUsageBytes = 0;
  708 |     
  709 |     event.RequiresCallback = false;
  710 |     event.CallbackExecuted = false;
  711 |     
  712 |     // Validate event
  713 |     if (!ValidateEvent(event)) {
  714 |         LogEventActivity("Invalid event created", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  715 |         return -1;
  716 |     }
  717 |     
  718 |     // Store event
  719 |     m_Events[m_EventCount] = event;
  720 |     m_EventCount++;
  721 |     
  722 |     // Enqueue event for processing
  723 |     if (m_Config.EnablePriorityProcessing) {
  724 |         EnqueueByPriority(event.ID);
  725 |     } else {
  726 |         EnqueueEvent(event.ID);
  727 |     }
  728 |     
  729 |     // Update statistics
  730 |     UpdateStatistics();
  731 |     
  732 |     LogEventActivity("Event created: ID=" + IntegerToString(event.ID) + ", Type=" + GetEventTypeString(type) + ", Name=" + name);
  733 |     
  734 |     return event.ID;
  735 | }
  736 | 
  737 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  738 | //| Create system event                                             |
  739 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  740 | int CEventManager::CreateSystemEvent(const string name, const string description, const ENUM_EVENT_PRIORITY priority = EVENT_PRIORITY_NORMAL) {
  741 |     int eventID = CreateEvent(EVENT_TYPE_SYSTEM, name, description);
  742 |     if (eventID > 0) {
  743 |         // Set priority
  744 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
  745 |             if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
  746 |                 m_Events[i].Priority = priority;
  747 |                 m_Events[i].Source = EVENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM;
  748 |                 break;
  749 |             }
  750 |         }
  751 |     }
  752 |     return eventID;
  753 | }
  754 | 
  755 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  756 | //| Create trade event                                              |
  757 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  758 | int CEventManager::CreateTradeEvent(const string name, const string description, const string symbol, const double volume) {
  759 |     int eventID = CreateEvent(EVENT_TYPE_TRADE, name, description);
  760 |     if (eventID > 0) {
  761 |         // Set trade-specific data
  762 |         SetEventStringData(eventID, 0, symbol);
  763 |         SetEventNumericData(eventID, 0, volume);
  764 |         
  765 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
  766 |             if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
  767 |                 m_Events[i].Category = "Trade";
  768 |                 m_Events[i].Priority = EVENT_PRIORITY_HIGH;
  769 |                 break;
  770 |             }
  771 |         }
  772 |     }
  773 |     return eventID;
  774 | }
  775 | 
  776 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  777 | //| Create market event                                             |
  778 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  779 | int CEventManager::CreateMarketEvent(const string name, const string description, const string symbol, const double price) {
  780 |     int eventID = CreateEvent(EVENT_TYPE_MARKET, name, description);
  781 |     if (eventID > 0) {
  782 |         // Set market-specific data
  783 |         SetEventStringData(eventID, 0, symbol);
  784 |         SetEventNumericData(eventID, 0, price);
  785 |         
  786 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
  787 |             if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
  788 |                 m_Events[i].Category = "Market";
  789 |                 m_Events[i].Source = EVENT_SOURCE_MARKET;
  790 |                 break;
  791 |             }
  792 |         }
  793 |     }
  794 |     return eventID;
  795 | }
  796 | 
  797 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  798 | //| Create risk event                                               |
  799 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  800 | int CEventManager::CreateRiskEvent(const string name, const string description, const double riskLevel) {
  801 |     int eventID = CreateEvent(EVENT_TYPE_RISK, name, description);
  802 |     if (eventID > 0) {
  803 |         // Set risk-specific data
  804 |         SetEventNumericData(eventID, 0, riskLevel);
  805 |         
  806 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
  807 |             if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
  808 |                 m_Events[i].Category = "Risk";
  809 |                 m_Events[i].Priority = (riskLevel > 0.8) ? EVENT_PRIORITY_CRITICAL : EVENT_PRIORITY_HIGH;
  810 |                 break;
  811 |             }
  812 |         }
  813 |     }
  814 |     return eventID;
  815 | }
  816 | 
  817 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  818 | //| Create error event                                              |
  819 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  820 | int CEventManager::CreateErrorEvent(const string name, const string description, const string errorCode) {
  821 |     int eventID = CreateEvent(EVENT_TYPE_ERROR, name, description);
  822 |     if (eventID > 0) {
  823 |         // Set error-specific data
  824 |         SetEventStringData(eventID, 0, errorCode);
  825 |         
  826 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
  827 |             if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
  828 |                 m_Events[i].Category = "Error";
  829 |                 m_Events[i].Priority = EVENT_PRIORITY_URGENT;
  830 |                 break;
  831 |             }
  832 |         }
  833 |     }
  834 |     return eventID;
  835 | }
  836 | 
  837 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  838 | //| Process events                                                  |
  839 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  840 | void CEventManager::ProcessEvents() {
  841 |     if (!m_bInitialized || m_bProcessing) {
  842 |         return;
  843 |     }
  844 |     
  845 |     m_bProcessing = true;
  846 |     StartPerformanceTimer();
  847 |     
  848 |     int processedCount = 0;
  849 |     int maxProcessingCount = 100; // Limit processing per call
  850 |     
  851 |     // Process events from priority queues
  852 |     while (processedCount < maxProcessingCount && !IsQueueEmpty()) {
  853 |         int eventID = DequeueByPriority();
  854 |         if (eventID > 0) {
  855 |             if (ProcessEvent(eventID)) {
  856 |                 processedCount++;
  857 |             }
  858 |         } else {
  859 |             break;
  860 |         }
  861 |     }
  862 |     
  863 |     double processingTime = StopPerformanceTimer();
  864 |     UpdatePerformanceMetrics(processingTime);
  865 |     
  866 |     m_bProcessing = false;
  867 |     
  868 |     if (processedCount > 0) {
  869 |         LogEventActivity("Processed " + IntegerToString(processedCount) + " events in " + DoubleToString(processingTime, 2) + "ms");
  870 |     }
  871 | }
  872 | 
  873 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  874 | //| Process single event                                            |
  875 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  876 | bool CEventManager::ProcessEvent(const int eventID) {
  877 |     if (!IsEventValid(eventID)) {
  878 |         return false;
  879 |     }
  880 |     
  881 |     // Find event
  882 |     int index = -1;
  883 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
  884 |         if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
  885 |             index = i;
  886 |             break;
  887 |         }
  888 |     }
  889 |     
  890 |     if (index == -1) {
  891 |         return false;
  892 |     }
  893 |     
  894 |     SEvent& event = m_Events[index];
  895 |     
  896 |     // Check if event can be processed
  897 |     if (event.Status != EVENT_STATUS_PENDING) {
  898 |         return false;
  899 |     }
  900 |     
  901 |     // Check expiry
  902 |     if (event.ExpiryTime > 0 && TimeCurrent() > event.ExpiryTime) {
  903 |         event.Status = EVENT_STATUS_TIMEOUT;
  904 |         LogEventActivity("Event expired: ID=" + IntegerToString(eventID), LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  905 |         return false;
  906 |     }
  907 |     
  908 |     // Update status
  909 |     event.Status = EVENT_STATUS_PROCESSING;
  910 |     event.ProcessedTime = TimeCurrent();
  911 |     event.ProcessingAttempts++;
  912 |     
  913 |     bool success = true;
  914 |     
  915 |     try {
  916 |         // Execute event handlers
  917 |         if (!ExecuteEventHandlers(eventID)) {
  918 |             success = false;
  919 |         }
  920 |         
  921 |         // Notify subscribers
  922 |         if (!NotifySubscribers(eventID)) {
  923 |             // Don't fail the event if notification fails
  924 |         }
  925 |         
  926 |         if (success) {
  927 |             event.Status = EVENT_STATUS_COMPLETED;
  928 |             event.CompletedTime = TimeCurrent();
  929 |             LogEventActivity("Event processed successfully: ID=" + IntegerToString(eventID));
  930 |         } else {
  931 |             event.Status = EVENT_STATUS_FAILED;
  932 |             LogEventActivity("Event processing failed: ID=" + IntegerToString(eventID), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  933 |             
  934 |             // Retry if possible
  935 |             if (event.ProcessingAttempts < event.MaxProcessingAttempts) {
  936 |                 event.Status = EVENT_STATUS_PENDING;
  937 |                 EnqueueEvent(eventID); // Re-queue for retry
  938 |             }
  939 |         }
  940 |     } catch (...) {
  941 |         event.Status = EVENT_STATUS_FAILED;
  942 |         event.LastError = "Exception during event processing";
  943 |         HandleEventError(eventID, event.LastError);
  944 |         success = false;
  945 |     }
  946 |     
  947 |     // Update statistics
  948 |     UpdateStatistics();
  949 |     
  950 |     return success;
  951 | }
  952 | 
  953 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  954 | //| Execute event handlers                                          |
  955 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  956 | bool CEventManager::ExecuteEventHandlers(const int eventID) {
  957 |     SEvent event = GetEvent(eventID);
  958 |     if (event.ID <= 0) {
  959 |         return false;
  960 |     }
  961 |     
  962 |     bool success = true;
  963 |     
  964 |     // Find and execute matching handlers
  965 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_HandlerCount; i++) {
  966 |         SEventHandler& handler = m_Handlers[i];
  967 |         
  968 |         // Check if handler matches event
  969 |         if (!handler.IsActive) continue;
  970 |         if (handler.EventType != event.Type) continue;
  971 |         if (event.Priority < handler.MinPriority) continue;
  972 |         
  973 |         // Check filters
  974 |         if (handler.CategoryFilter != "" && handler.CategoryFilter != event.Category) continue;
  975 |         
  976 |         // Execute handler
  977 |         if (!ExecuteHandler(handler, event)) {
  978 |             success = false;
  979 |             if (handler.StopOnError) {
  980 |                 break;
  981 |             }
  982 |         }
  983 |     }
  984 |     
  985 |     return success;
  986 | }
  987 | 
  988 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  989 | //| Execute single handler                                          |
  990 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  991 | bool CEventManager::ExecuteHandler(const SEventHandler& handler, const SEvent& event) {
  992 |     datetime startTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  993 |     
  994 |     bool success = true;
  995 |     
  996 |     try {
  997 |         // This is a placeholder for actual handler execution
  998 |         // In a real implementation, this would call the actual handler function
  999 |         LogEventActivity("Executing handler: " + handler.Name + " for event: " + IntegerToString(event.ID));
 1000 |         
 1001 |         // Simulate handler execution
 1002 |         Sleep(1); // Minimal delay to simulate processing
 1003 |         
 1004 |     } catch (...) {
 1005 |         success = false;
 1006 |         LogEventActivity("Handler execution failed: " + handler.Name, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1007 |     }
 1008 |     
 1009 |     datetime endTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
 1010 |     double executionTime = (double)(endTime - startTime) / 1000.0; // Convert to milliseconds
 1011 |     
 1012 |     // Update handler statistics (this would need to be implemented properly)
 1013 |     // handler.ExecutionCount++;
 1014 |     // handler.TotalExecutionTime += executionTime;
 1015 |     // handler.AverageExecutionTime = handler.TotalExecutionTime / handler.ExecutionCount;
 1016 |     // handler.LastExecutionTime = TimeCurrent();
 1017 |     
 1018 |     return success;
 1019 | }
 1020 | 
 1021 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1022 | //| Enqueue event by priority                                       |
 1023 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1024 | bool CEventManager::EnqueueByPriority(const int eventID) {
 1025 |     SEvent event = GetEvent(eventID);
 1026 |     if (event.ID <= 0) {
 1027 |         return false;
 1028 |     }
 1029 |     
 1030 |     return AddToPriorityQueue(eventID, event.Priority);
 1031 | }
 1032 | 
 1033 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1034 | //| Add to priority queue                                           |
 1035 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1036 | bool CEventManager::AddToPriorityQueue(const int eventID, const ENUM_EVENT_PRIORITY priority) {
 1037 |     switch(priority) {
 1038 |     case EVENT_PRIORITY_CRITICAL:
 1039 |         if (m_CriticalQueueSize < ArraySize(m_CriticalQueue)) {
 1040 |             m_CriticalQueue[m_CriticalQueueSize] = eventID;
 1041 |             m_CriticalQueueSize++;
 1042 |             return true;
 1043 |         }
 1044 |         break;
 1045 |         
 1046 |     case EVENT_PRIORITY_URGENT:
 1047 |         if (m_UrgentQueueSize < ArraySize(m_UrgentQueue)) {
 1048 |             m_UrgentQueue[m_UrgentQueueSize] = eventID;
 1049 |             m_UrgentQueueSize++;
 1050 |             return true;
 1051 |         }
 1052 |         break;
 1053 |         
 1054 |     case EVENT_PRIORITY_HIGH:
 1055 |         if (m_HighQueueSize < ArraySize(m_HighQueue)) {
 1056 |             m_HighQueue[m_HighQueueSize] = eventID;
 1057 |             m_HighQueueSize++;
 1058 |             return true;
 1059 |         }
 1060 |         break;
 1061 |         
 1062 |     case EVENT_PRIORITY_NORMAL:
 1063 |     case EVENT_PRIORITY_LOW:
 1064 |     default:
 1065 |         if (m_NormalQueueSize < ArraySize(m_NormalQueue)) {
 1066 |             m_NormalQueue[m_NormalQueueSize] = eventID;
 1067 |             m_NormalQueueSize++;
 1068 |             return true;
 1069 |         }
 1070 |         break;
 1071 |     }
 1072 |     
 1073 |     return false;
 1074 | }
 1075 | 
 1076 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1077 | //| Dequeue by priority                                             |
 1078 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1079 | int CEventManager::DequeueByPriority() {
 1080 |     // Check critical queue first
 1081 |     if (m_CriticalQueueSize > 0) {
 1082 |         int eventID = m_CriticalQueue[0];
 1083 |         // Shift array
 1084 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_CriticalQueueSize - 1; i++) {
 1085 |             m_CriticalQueue[i] = m_CriticalQueue[i + 1];
 1086 |         }
 1087 |         m_CriticalQueueSize--;
 1088 |         return eventID;
 1089 |     }
 1090 |     
 1091 |     // Check urgent queue
 1092 |     if (m_UrgentQueueSize > 0) {
 1093 |         int eventID = m_UrgentQueue[0];
 1094 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_UrgentQueueSize - 1; i++) {
 1095 |             m_UrgentQueue[i] = m_UrgentQueue[i + 1];
 1096 |         }
 1097 |         m_UrgentQueueSize--;
 1098 |         return eventID;
 1099 |     }
 1100 |     
 1101 |     // Check high priority queue
 1102 |     if (m_HighQueueSize > 0) {
 1103 |         int eventID = m_HighQueue[0];
 1104 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_HighQueueSize - 1; i++) {
 1105 |             m_HighQueue[i] = m_HighQueue[i + 1];
 1106 |         }
 1107 |         m_HighQueueSize--;
 1108 |         return eventID;
 1109 |     }
 1110 |     
 1111 |     // Check normal priority queue
 1112 |     if (m_NormalQueueSize > 0) {
 1113 |         int eventID = m_NormalQueue[0];
 1114 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_NormalQueueSize - 1; i++) {
 1115 |             m_NormalQueue[i] = m_NormalQueue[i + 1];
 1116 |         }
 1117 |         m_NormalQueueSize--;
 1118 |         return eventID;
 1119 |     }
 1120 |     
 1121 |     return 0; // No events in queue
 1122 | }
 1123 | 
 1124 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1125 | //| Check if queue is empty                                         |
 1126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1127 | bool CEventManager::IsQueueEmpty() const {
 1128 |     return (m_CriticalQueueSize == 0 && m_UrgentQueueSize == 0 && 
 1129 |             m_HighQueueSize == 0 && m_NormalQueueSize == 0);
 1130 | }
 1131 | 
 1132 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1133 | //| Get event                                                       |
 1134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1135 | SEvent CEventManager::GetEvent(const int eventID) const {
 1136 |     SEvent emptyEvent;
 1137 |     ZeroMemory(emptyEvent);
 1138 |     
 1139 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
 1140 |         if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
 1141 |             return m_Events[i];
 1142 |         }
 1143 |     }
 1144 |     
 1145 |     return emptyEvent;
 1146 | }

 1151 | bool CEventManager::SetEventStringData(const int eventID, const int index, const string value) {
 1152 |     if (index < 0 || index >= ArraySize(m_Events[0].StringData)) {
 1153 |         return false;
 1154 |     }
 1155 |     
 1156 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_EventCount; i++) {
 1157 |         if (m_Events[i].ID == eventID) {
 1158 |             m_Events[i].StringData[index] = value;
 1159 |             return true;
 1160 |         }
 1161 |     }
 1162 |     
 1163 |     return false;
 1164 | }

 1180 |

 1182 | }

 1184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1185 | //| Register handler                                                |
 1186 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1187 | bool CEventManager::RegisterHandler(const SEventHandler& handler) {
 1188 |     if (m_HandlerCount >= ArraySize(m_Handlers)) {
 1189 |         return false;
 1190 |     }
 1191 |     
 1192 |     if (!ValidateHandler(handler)) {
 1193 |         return false;
 1194 |     }
 1195 |     
 1196 |     m_Handlers[m_HandlerCount] = handler;
 1197 |     m_HandlerCount++;
 1198 |     
 1199 |     LogEventActivity("Handler registered: " + handler.Name);
 1200 |     
 1201 |     return true;
 1202 | }

 1343 | bool CEventManager::AddToQueue(const int eventID) {
 1344 |     if (m_QueueSize >= ArraySize(m_EventQueue)) {
 1345 |         return false;
 1346 |     }
 1347 |     
 1348 |     m_EventQueue[m_QueueTail] = eventID;
 1349 |     m_QueueTail = (m_QueueTail + 1) % ArraySize(m_EventQueue);
 1350 |     m_QueueSize++;
 1351 |     
 1352 |     return true;
 1353 | }

  174 |     // Regime characteristics
  175 |     double AvgVolatility;
  176 |     double AvgTrendStrength;
  177 |     double AvgRange;
  178 |     
  179 |     // Historical regime data
  180 |     ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION RegimeHistory[100];
  181 |     datetime RegimeChangeHistory[100];
  182 |     int RegimeHistoryCount;
  183 | };
  184 | 
  185 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 | //| Market Analyzer Class                                           |
  187 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  188 | class CMarketAnalyzer {
  189 | private:
  190 |     EAContext* m_pContext;

  193 |     SMarketAnalysis m_CurrentAnalysis;
  194 |     SMarketStats m_Statistics;

  218 |     int m_StochasticD;

  252 |     ENUM_MARKET_STRENGTH CalculateMarketStrength();
  253 |     ENUM_VOLATILITY_LEVEL AssessVolatilityLevel();
  254 |     ENUM_MARKET_SESSION GetCurrentSession();

  260 |     double AssessTrendReliability();
  261 |     
  262 |     // Support and resistance
  263 |     bool IdentifySupportResistance();
  264 |     double FindSupportLevel();
  265 |     double FindResistanceLevel();
  266 |     double CalculateLevelStrength(const double level);
  267 |     
  268 |     // Volatility analysis
  269 |     double CalculateATR();
  270 |     double CalculateVolatilityRatio();
  271 |     double CalculateVolatilityPercentile();
  272 |     ENUM_VOLATILITY_LEVEL ClassifyVolatility(const double volatility);

  275 |     double CalculateRSI();
  276 |     bool CalculateMACD(double& macd, double& signal, double& histogram);

  279 |

  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | CMarketAnalyzer::CMarketAnalyzer() {
  372 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  373 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  374 |     m_bRealTimeAnalysis = false;
  375 |     m_AnalysisInterval = 60;
  376 |     m_LastAnalysisTime = 0;
  377 |     m_HistoryCount = 0;
  378 |     
  379 |     // Initialize indicator handles
  380 |     m_HandleATR = INVALID_HANDLE;
  381 |     m_HandleRSI = INVALID_HANDLE;
  382 |     m_HandleMACD = INVALID_HANDLE;
  383 |     m_HandleStochastic = INVALID_HANDLE;
  384 |     m_HandleWilliams = INVALID_HANDLE;
  385 |     m_HandleMA_Fast = INVALID_HANDLE;
  386 |     m_HandleMA_Slow = INVALID_HANDLE;
  387 |     m_HandleBB = INVALID_HANDLE;
  388 |     
  389 |     // Set default parameters
  390 |     m_ATRPeriod = 14;
  391 |     m_RSIPeriod = 14;
  392 |     m_MACDFast = 12;
  393 |     m_MACDSlow = 26;
  394 |     m_MACDSignal = 9;
  395 |     m_StochasticK = 5;
  396 |     m_StochasticD = 3;
  397 |     m_WilliamsPeriod = 14;
  398 |     m_MAFastPeriod = 20;
  399 |     m_MASlowPeriod = 50;
  400 |     m_BBPeriod = 20;
  401 |     m_BBDeviation = 2.0;
  402 |     
  403 |     // Set default thresholds
  404 |     m_TrendThreshold = 0.6;
  405 |     m_VolatilityThreshold = 1.5;
  406 |     m_StrengthThreshold = 0.7;
  407 |     
  408 |     // Initialize structures
  409 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentAnalysis);
  410 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  411 |     ZeroMemory(m_Regime);
  412 | }
