  414 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  415 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  416 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  417 | CMarketAnalyzer::~CMarketAnalyzer() {
  418 |     Deinitialize();
  419 | }
  420 | 
  421 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  422 | //| Initialize Market Analyzer                                      |
  423 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  424 | bool CMarketAnalyzer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  425 |     if (context == NULL) {
  426 |         Print("[MARKET ANALYZER ERROR] Context is NULL");
  427 |         return false;
  428 |     }
  429 |     
  430 |     m_pContext = context;
  431 |     
  432 |     // Initialize indicators
  433 |     if (!InitializeIndicators()) {
  434 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize indicators", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  435 |         return false;
  436 |     }
  437 |     
  438 |     // Initialize analysis structures
  439 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  440 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Condition = MARKET_CONDITION_UNKNOWN;
  441 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Strength = MARKET_STRENGTH_NEUTRAL;
  442 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Volatility = VOLATILITY_NORMAL;
  443 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisConfidence = 0.0;
  444 |     
  445 |     // Initialize regime
  446 |     m_Regime.CurrentRegime = MARKET_CONDITION_UNKNOWN;
  447 |     m_Regime.RegimeStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  448 |     m_Regime.RegimeHistoryCount = 0;
  449 |     
  450 |     // Perform initial analysis
  451 |     if (!AnalyzeMarket()) {
  452 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Initial market analysis failed", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  453 |     }
  454 |     
  455 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  456 |     LogAnalysisEvent("Market Analyzer initialized successfully");
  457 |     
  458 |     return true;
  459 | }
  460 | 
  461 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  462 | //| Deinitialize Market Analyzer                                    |
  463 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  464 | void CMarketAnalyzer::Deinitialize() {
  465 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  466 |         CleanupIndicators();
  467 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Market Analyzer deinitialized");
  468 |     }
  469 |     
  470 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  471 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  472 | }
  473 | 
  474 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 | //| Initialize indicators                                            |
  476 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 | bool CMarketAnalyzer::InitializeIndicators() {
  478 |     string symbol = Symbol();
  479 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = Period();
  480 |     
  481 |     // Initialize ATR
  482 |     m_HandleATR = iATR(symbol, timeframe, m_ATRPeriod);
  483 |     if (m_HandleATR == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  484 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize ATR indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  485 |         return false;
  486 |     }
  487 |     
  488 |     // Initialize RSI
  489 |     m_HandleRSI = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, m_RSIPeriod, PRICE_CLOSE);
  490 |     if (m_HandleRSI == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  491 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize RSI indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  492 |         return false;
  493 |     }
  494 |     
  495 |     // Initialize MACD
  496 |     m_HandleMACD = iMACD(symbol, timeframe, m_MACDFast, m_MACDSlow, m_MACDSignal, PRICE_CLOSE);
  497 |     if (m_HandleMACD == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  498 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize MACD indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  499 |         return false;
  500 |     }
  501 |     
  502 |     // Initialize Stochastic
  503 |     m_HandleStochastic = iStochastic(symbol, timeframe, m_StochasticK, m_StochasticD, 3, MODE_SMA, STO_LOWHIGH);
  504 |     if (m_HandleStochastic == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  505 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize Stochastic indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  506 |         return false;
  507 |     }
  508 |     
  509 |     // Initialize Williams %R
  510 |     m_HandleWilliams = iWPR(symbol, timeframe, m_WilliamsPeriod);
  511 |     if (m_HandleWilliams == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  512 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize Williams %R indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  513 |         return false;
  514 |     }
  515 |     
  516 |     // Initialize Moving Averages
  517 |     m_HandleMA_Fast = iMA(symbol, timeframe, m_MAFastPeriod, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  518 |     if (m_HandleMA_Fast == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  519 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize Fast MA indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  520 |         return false;
  521 |     }
  522 |     
  523 |     m_HandleMA_Slow = iMA(symbol, timeframe, m_MASlowPeriod, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  524 |     if (m_HandleMA_Slow == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  525 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize Slow MA indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  526 |         return false;
  527 |     }
  528 |     
  529 |     // Initialize Bollinger Bands
  530 |     m_HandleBB = iBands(symbol, timeframe, m_BBPeriod, 0, m_BBDeviation, PRICE_CLOSE);
  531 |     if (m_HandleBB == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  532 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to initialize Bollinger Bands indicator", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  533 |         return false;
  534 |     }
  535 |     
  536 |     LogAnalysisEvent("All indicators initialized successfully");
  537 |     return true;
  538 | }
  539 | 
  540 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  541 | //| Cleanup indicators                                              |
  542 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  543 | void CMarketAnalyzer::CleanupIndicators() {
  544 |     if (m_HandleATR != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  545 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleATR);
  546 |         m_HandleATR = INVALID_HANDLE;
  547 |     }
  548 |     
  549 |     if (m_HandleRSI != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  550 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleRSI);
  551 |         m_HandleRSI = INVALID_HANDLE;
  552 |     }
  553 |     
  554 |     if (m_HandleMACD != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  555 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleMACD);
  556 |         m_HandleMACD = INVALID_HANDLE;
  557 |     }
  558 |     
  559 |     if (m_HandleStochastic != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  560 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleStochastic);
  561 |         m_HandleStochastic = INVALID_HANDLE;
  562 |     }
  563 |     
  564 |     if (m_HandleWilliams != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  565 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleWilliams);
  566 |         m_HandleWilliams = INVALID_HANDLE;
  567 |     }
  568 |     
  569 |     if (m_HandleMA_Fast != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  570 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleMA_Fast);
  571 |         m_HandleMA_Fast = INVALID_HANDLE;
  572 |     }
  573 |     
  574 |     if (m_HandleMA_Slow != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  575 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleMA_Slow);
  576 |         m_HandleMA_Slow = INVALID_HANDLE;
  577 |     }
  578 |     
  579 |     if (m_HandleBB != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  580 |         IndicatorRelease(m_HandleBB);
  581 |         m_HandleBB = INVALID_HANDLE;
  582 |     }
  583 | }
  584 | 
  585 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  586 | //| Analyze market                                                  |
  587 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  588 | bool CMarketAnalyzer::AnalyzeMarket() {
  589 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  590 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Market Analyzer not initialized", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  591 |         return false;
  592 |     }
  593 |     
  594 |     // Check if it's time for analysis
  595 |     if (m_bRealTimeAnalysis && (TimeCurrent() - m_LastAnalysisTime) < m_AnalysisInterval) {
  596 |         return true; // Skip analysis if interval hasn't passed
  597 |     }
  598 |     
  599 |     LogAnalysisEvent("Starting market analysis...");
  600 |     
  601 |     // Update analysis time
  602 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  603 |     m_LastAnalysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  604 |     
  605 |     // Collect market data
  606 |     if (!CollectMarketData()) {
  607 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Failed to collect market data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  608 |         return false;
  609 |     }
  610 |     
  611 |     // Determine market condition
  612 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Condition = DetermineMarketCondition();
  613 |     
  614 |     // Calculate market strength
  615 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Strength = CalculateMarketStrength();
  616 |     
  617 |     // Assess volatility
  618 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Volatility = AssessVolatilityLevel();
  619 |     
  620 |     // Get current session
  621 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Session = GetCurrentSession();
  622 |     
  623 |     // Analyze trend
  624 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  625 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendDirection = CalculateTrendDirection();
  626 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendDuration = EstimateTrendDuration();
  627 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendReliability = AssessTrendReliability();
  628 |     
  629 |     // Identify support and resistance
  630 |     IdentifySupportResistance();
  631 |     
  632 |     // Calculate volatility metrics
  633 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.ATR = CalculateATR();
  634 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.VolatilityRatio = CalculateVolatilityRatio();
  635 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.VolatilityPercentile = CalculateVolatilityPercentile();
  636 |     
  637 |     // Calculate momentum indicators
  638 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.RSI = CalculateRSI();
  639 |     CalculateMACD(m_CurrentAnalysis.MACD, m_CurrentAnalysis.MACDSignal, m_CurrentAnalysis.MACDHistogram);
  640 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Stochastic = CalculateStochastic();
  641 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.Williams = CalculateWilliams();
  642 |     
  643 |     // Analyze volume
  644 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.VolumeRatio = CalculateVolumeRatio();
  645 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.VolumeMA = CalculateVolumeMA();
  646 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.VolumeTrend = AnalyzeVolumeTrend();
  647 |     
  648 |     // Market microstructure
  649 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.BidAskSpread = CalculateBidAskSpread();
  650 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.MarketDepth = AssessMarketDepth();
  651 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.OrderFlow = AnalyzeOrderFlow();
  652 |     
  653 |     // Calculate correlations
  654 |     CalculateCorrelations();
  655 |     
  656 |     // Assess news impact
  657 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.NewsImpactScore = AssessNewsImpact();
  658 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.UpcomingEvents = GetUpcomingEvents();
  659 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.EventRiskLevel = CalculateEventRisk();
  660 |     
  661 |     // Calculate confidence
  662 |     m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisConfidence = CalculateAnalysisConfidence();
  663 |     
  664 |     // Analyze market regime
  665 |     AnalyzeMarketRegime();
  666 |     
  667 |     // Update statistics
  668 |     UpdateStatistics();
  669 |     
  670 |     // Store in history
  671 |     if (m_HistoryCount < ArraySize(m_AnalysisHistory)) {
  672 |         m_AnalysisHistory[m_HistoryCount] = m_CurrentAnalysis;
  673 |         m_HistoryCount++;
  674 |     } else {
  675 |         // Shift array and add new analysis
  676 |         for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_AnalysisHistory) - 1; i++) {
  677 |             m_AnalysisHistory[i] = m_AnalysisHistory[i + 1];
  678 |         }
  679 |         m_AnalysisHistory[ArraySize(m_AnalysisHistory) - 1] = m_CurrentAnalysis;
  680 |     }
  681 |     
  682 |     // Validate analysis
  683 |     if (!ValidateAnalysis(m_CurrentAnalysis)) {
  684 |         LogAnalysisEvent("Analysis validation failed", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  685 |     }
  686 |     
  687 |     LogAnalysisEvent("Market analysis completed successfully");
  688 |     return true;
  689 | }
  690 | 
  691 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  692 | //| Determine market condition                                      |
  693 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  694 | ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION CMarketAnalyzer::DetermineMarketCondition() {
  695 |     double trendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  696 |     double trendDirection = CalculateTrendDirection();
  697 |     double volatility = CalculateVolatilityRatio();
  698 |     
  699 |     // Strong trend conditions
  700 |     if (trendStrength > m_TrendThreshold) {
  701 |         if (trendDirection > 0.3) {
  702 |             return MARKET_CONDITION_TRENDING_UP;
  703 |         } else if (trendDirection < -0.3) {
  704 |             return MARKET_CONDITION_TRENDING_DOWN;
  705 |         }
  706 |     }
  707 |     
  708 |     // High volatility conditions
  709 |     if (volatility > m_VolatilityThreshold) {
  710 |         return MARKET_CONDITION_VOLATILE;
  711 |     }
  712 |     
  713 |     // Range-bound conditions
  714 |     if (trendStrength < 0.3 && volatility < 1.2) {
  715 |         return MARKET_CONDITION_RANGING;
  716 |     }
  717 |     
  718 |     // Consolidation
  719 |     if (volatility < 0.8) {
  720 |         return MARKET_CONDITION_CONSOLIDATING;
  721 |     }
  722 |     
  723 |     // Default to unknown
  724 |     return MARKET_CONDITION_UNKNOWN;
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  728 | //| Calculate market strength                                       |
  729 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  730 | ENUM_MARKET_STRENGTH CMarketAnalyzer::CalculateMarketStrength() {
  731 |     double rsi = CalculateRSI();
  732 |     double trendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  733 |     double volumeRatio = CalculateVolumeRatio();
  734 |     
  735 |     // Combine multiple factors
  736 |     double strength = 0;
  737 |     
  738 |     // RSI contribution
  739 |     if (rsi > 70) strength += 0.3;
  740 |     else if (rsi > 50) strength += 0.1;
  741 |     else if (rsi < 30) strength -= 0.3;
  742 |     else if (rsi < 50) strength -= 0.1;
  743 |     
  744 |     // Trend strength contribution
  745 |     strength += trendStrength * 0.4;
  746 |     
  747 |     // Volume contribution
  748 |     if (volumeRatio > 1.5) strength += 0.2;
  749 |     else if (volumeRatio > 1.0) strength += 0.1;
  750 |     else if (volumeRatio < 0.5) strength -= 0.2;
  751 |     
  752 |     // Normalize to 0-1 range
  753 |     strength = (strength + 1.0) / 2.0;
  754 |     
  755 |     // Classify strength
  756 |     if (strength > 0.8) return MARKET_STRENGTH_VERY_STRONG;
  757 |     else if (strength > 0.6) return MARKET_STRENGTH_STRONG;
  758 |     else if (strength > 0.4) return MARKET_STRENGTH_NEUTRAL;
  759 |     else if (strength > 0.2) return MARKET_STRENGTH_WEAK;
  760 |     else return MARKET_STRENGTH_VERY_WEAK;
  761 | }
  762 | 
  763 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  764 | //| Assess volatility level                                         |
  765 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  766 | ENUM_VOLATILITY_LEVEL CMarketAnalyzer::AssessVolatilityLevel() {
  767 |     double volatilityRatio = CalculateVolatilityRatio();
  768 |     return ClassifyVolatility(volatilityRatio);
  769 | }
  770 | 
  771 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  772 | //| Get current market session                                      |
  773 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  774 | ENUM_MARKET_SESSION CMarketAnalyzer::GetCurrentSession() {
  775 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  776 |     TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  777 |     
  778 |     // Convert to GMT
  779 |     int hour = dt.hour;
  780 |     
  781 |     // Asian session: 22:00 - 08:00 GMT
  782 |     if ((hour >= 22) || (hour < 8)) {
  783 |         return SESSION_ASIAN;
  784 |     }
  785 |     // European session: 08:00 - 16:00 GMT
  786 |     else if (hour >= 8 && hour < 16) {
  787 |         return SESSION_EUROPEAN;
  788 |     }
  789 |     // American session: 13:00 - 22:00 GMT
  790 |     else if (hour >= 13 && hour < 22) {
  791 |         // Check for overlap
  792 |         if (hour >= 13 && hour < 16) {
  793 |             return SESSION_OVERLAP_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN;
  794 |         }
  795 |         return SESSION_AMERICAN;
  796 |     }
  797 |     
  798 |     return SESSION_ASIAN; // Default
  799 | }
  800 | 
  801 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  802 | //| Calculate trend strength                                        |
  803 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  804 | double CMarketAnalyzer::CalculateTrendStrength() {
  805 |     if (m_HandleMA_Fast == INVALID_HANDLE || m_HandleMA_Slow == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  806 |         return 0.0;
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     double maFast[10], maSlow[10];
  810 |     
  811 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleMA_Fast, 0, 0, 10, maFast) <= 0 ||
  812 |         CopyBuffer(m_HandleMA_Slow, 0, 0, 10, maSlow) <= 0) {
  813 |         return 0.0;
  814 |     }
  815 |     
  816 |     // Calculate the separation between fast and slow MA
  817 |     double separation = MathAbs(maFast[0] - maSlow[0]);
  818 |     double avgPrice = (maFast[0] + maSlow[0]) / 2.0;
  819 |     
  820 |     if (avgPrice == 0) return 0.0;
  821 |     
  822 |     // Normalize by average price
  823 |     double strength = separation / avgPrice;
  824 |     
  825 |     // Apply additional factors
  826 |     double atr = CalculateATR();
  827 |     if (atr > 0) {
  828 |         strength = strength / atr; // Normalize by volatility
  829 |     }
  830 |     
  831 |     return MathMin(strength, 1.0); // Cap at 1.0
  832 | }
  833 | 
  834 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  835 | //| Calculate trend direction                                       |
  836 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  837 | double CMarketAnalyzer::CalculateTrendDirection() {
  838 |     if (m_HandleMA_Fast == INVALID_HANDLE || m_HandleMA_Slow == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  839 |         return 0.0;
  840 |     }
  841 |     
  842 |     double maFast[2], maSlow[2];
  843 |     
  844 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleMA_Fast, 0, 0, 2, maFast) <= 0 ||
  845 |         CopyBuffer(m_HandleMA_Slow, 0, 0, 2, maSlow) <= 0) {
  846 |         return 0.0;
  847 |     }
  848 |     
  849 |     // Calculate direction based on MA relationship and slope
  850 |     double direction = 0.0;
  851 |     
  852 |     // MA relationship (50% weight)
  853 |     if (maFast[0] > maSlow[0]) {
  854 |         direction += 0.5;
  855 |     } else {
  856 |         direction -= 0.5;
  857 |     }
  858 |     
  859 |     // MA slope (50% weight)
  860 |     double fastSlope = maFast[0] - maFast[1];
  861 |     double slowSlope = maSlow[0] - maSlow[1];
  862 |     
  863 |     if (fastSlope > 0 && slowSlope > 0) {
  864 |         direction += 0.5;
  865 |     } else if (fastSlope < 0 && slowSlope < 0) {
  866 |         direction -= 0.5;
  867 |     }
  868 |     
  869 |     return MathMax(-1.0, MathMin(1.0, direction));
  870 | }
  871 | 
  872 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  873 | //| Calculate ATR                                                   |
  874 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  875 | double CMarketAnalyzer::CalculateATR() {
  876 |     if (m_HandleATR == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  877 |         return 0.0;
  878 |     }
  879 |     
  880 |     double atr[1];
  881 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleATR, 0, 0, 1, atr) <= 0) {
  882 |         return 0.0;
  883 |     }
  884 |     
  885 |     return atr[0];
  886 | }
  887 | 
  888 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  889 | //| Calculate volatility ratio                                      |
  890 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  891 | double CMarketAnalyzer::CalculateVolatilityRatio() {
  892 |     double currentATR = CalculateATR();
  893 |     
  894 |     if (m_HandleATR == INVALID_HANDLE || currentATR == 0) {
  895 |         return 1.0;
  896 |     }
  897 |     
  898 |     // Get historical ATR values
  899 |     double atrHistory[50];
  900 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleATR, 0, 1, 50, atrHistory) <= 0) {
  901 |         return 1.0;
  902 |     }
  903 |     
  904 |     // Calculate average ATR
  905 |     double avgATR = 0.0;
  906 |     for (int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
  907 |         avgATR += atrHistory[i];
  908 |     }
  909 |     avgATR /= 50.0;
  910 |     
  911 |     if (avgATR == 0) return 1.0;
  912 |     
  913 |     return currentATR / avgATR;
  914 | }
  915 | 
  916 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  917 | //| Calculate RSI                                                   |
  918 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  919 | double CMarketAnalyzer::CalculateRSI() {
  920 |     if (m_HandleRSI == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  921 |         return 50.0;
  922 |     }
  923 |     
  924 |     double rsi[1];
  925 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleRSI, 0, 0, 1, rsi) <= 0) {
  926 |         return 50.0;
  927 |     }
  928 |     
  929 |     return rsi[0];
  930 | }
  931 | 
  932 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  933 | //| Calculate MACD                                                  |
  934 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  935 | bool CMarketAnalyzer::CalculateMACD(double& macd, double& signal, double& histogram) {
  936 |     if (m_HandleMACD == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  937 |         macd = 0.0;
  938 |         signal = 0.0;
  939 |         histogram = 0.0;
  940 |         return false;
  941 |     }
  942 |     
  943 |     double macdMain[1], macdSignal[1];
  944 |     
  945 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleMACD, 0, 0, 1, macdMain) <= 0 ||
  946 |         CopyBuffer(m_HandleMACD, 1, 0, 1, macdSignal) <= 0) {
  947 |         macd = 0.0;
  948 |         signal = 0.0;
  949 |         histogram = 0.0;
  950 |         return false;
  951 |     }
  952 |     
  953 |     macd = macdMain[0];
  954 |     signal = macdSignal[0];
  955 |     histogram = macd - signal;
  956 |     
  957 |     return true;
  958 | }
  959 | 
  960 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  961 | //| Calculate Stochastic                                            |

  965 |         return 50.0;
  966 |     }
  967 |     
  968 |     double stoch[1];
  969 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleStochastic, 0, 0, 1, stoch) <= 0) {
  970 |         return 50.0;
  971 |     }
  972 |     
  973 |     return stoch[0];
  974 | }
  975 | 
  976 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  980 |     if (m_HandleWilliams == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  981 |         return -50.0;
  982 |     }
  983 |     
  984 |     double williams[1];
  985 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_HandleWilliams, 0, 0, 1, williams) <= 0) {
  986 |         return -50.0;
  987 |     }
  988 |     
  989 |     return williams[0];
  990 | }

 1094 | bool CMarketAnalyzer::ValidateAnalysis(const SMarketAnalysis& analysis) {
 1095 |     // Basic validation
 1096 |     if (analysis.AnalysisTime <= 0) return false;
 1097 |     if (analysis.AnalysisConfidence < 0 || analysis.AnalysisConfidence > 1) return false;

 1103 | ENUM_VOLATILITY_LEVEL CMarketAnalyzer::ClassifyVolatility(const double volatility) {
 1104 |     if (volatility < 0.5) return VOLATILITY_VERY_LOW;
 1105 |     else if (volatility < 0.8) return VOLATILITY_LOW;
 1106 |     else if (volatility < 1.2) return VOLATILITY_NORMAL;
 1107 |     else if (volatility < 1.8) return VOLATILITY_HIGH;
 1108 |     else return VOLATILITY_VERY_HIGH;
 1109 | }

 1111 | string CMarketAnalyzer::GenerateAnalysisReport() {
 1112 |     string report = "=== MARKET ANALYSIS REPORT ===\n";
 1113 |     report += "Time: " + TimeToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisTime) + "\n";
 1114 |     report += "Condition: " + EnumToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.Condition) + "\n";
 1115 |     report += "Strength: " + EnumToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.Strength) + "\n";
 1116 |     report += "Volatility: " + EnumToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.Volatility) + "\n";
 1117 |     report += "Trend Direction: " + DoubleToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendDirection, 2) + "\n";
 1118 |     report += "Trend Strength: " + DoubleToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.TrendStrength, 2) + "\n";
 1119 |     report += "RSI: " + DoubleToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.RSI, 1) + "\n";
 1120 |     report += "ATR: " + DoubleToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.ATR, 5) + "\n";
 1121 |     report += "Confidence: " + DoubleToString(m_CurrentAnalysis.AnalysisConfidence * 100, 1) + "%\n";
 1122 |     
 1123 |     return report;
 1124 | }

  258 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  259 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  260 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  261 | CStrategyOptimizer::CStrategyOptimizer() {
  262 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  263 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  264 |     m_bRunning = false;
  265 |     m_bTerminated = false;
  266 |     m_CurrentIteration = 0;
  267 |     m_LastBestValue = 0.0;
  268 |     m_StagnantCount = 0;
  269 |     
  270 |     // Initialize configuration with defaults
  271 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  272 |     m_Config.Method = OPT_METHOD_GENETIC_ALGORITHM;
  273 |     m_Config.Objective = OPT_OBJECTIVE_SHARPE_RATIO;
  274 |     m_Config.MaxIterations = 1000;
  275 |     m_Config.PopulationSize = 50;
  276 |     m_Config.ConvergenceThreshold = 0.001;
  277 |     m_Config.MaxStagnantIterations = 100;
  278 |     m_Config.UseParallelProcessing = false;
  279 |     m_Config.SaveIntermediateResults = true;
  280 |     m_Config.ResultsPath = "Optimization_Results";
  281 |     
  282 |     // Initialize GA parameters
  283 |     ZeroMemory(m_GAParams);
  284 |     m_GAParams.MutationRate = 0.1;
  285 |     m_GAParams.CrossoverRate = 0.8;
  286 |     m_GAParams.ElitismRate = 0.1;
  287 |     m_GAParams.TournamentSize = 3;
  288 |     m_GAParams.UseAdaptiveMutation = true;
  289 |     
  290 |     // Initialize PSO parameters
  291 |     ZeroMemory(m_PSParams);
  292 |     m_PSParams.InertiaWeight = 0.9;
  293 |     m_PSParams.CognitiveWeight = 2.0;
  294 |     m_PSParams.SocialWeight = 2.0;
  295 |     m_PSParams.MaxVelocity = 0.1;
  296 |     m_PSParams.UseAdaptiveWeights = true;
  297 |     
  298 |     // Initialize statistics
  299 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  300 |     ZeroMemory(m_BestResult);
  301 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentResult);
  302 | }
  303 | 
  304 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  306 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  307 | CStrategyOptimizer::~CStrategyOptimizer() {
  308 |     Deinitialize();
  309 | }
  310 |

  314 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  315 |     if (context == NULL) {
  316 |         Print("[STRATEGY OPTIMIZER ERROR] Context is NULL");
  317 |         return false;
  318 |     }
  319 |     
  320 |     m_pContext = context;
  321 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  322 |     
  323 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Strategy Optimizer initialized successfully");
  324 |     
  325 |     return true;
  326 | }

  332 |     if (m_bRunning) {
  333 |         StopOptimization();
  334 |     }
  335 |     
  336 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  337 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Strategy Optimizer deinitialized");
  338 |     }
  339 |     
  340 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  341 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  342 | }

  367 | 
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | //| Add optimization parameter                                     |
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::AddParameter(const string name, const ENUM_PARAMETER_TYPE type,
  372 |                                      const double minValue, const double maxValue, const double step,
  373 |                                      const int priority = 5) {
  374 |     if (name == "") {
  375 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Cannot add parameter with empty name", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  376 |         return false;
  377 |     }
  378 |     
  379 |     if (minValue >= maxValue) {
  380 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Invalid parameter range: " + name, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  381 |         return false;
  382 |     }
  383 |     
  384 |     // Check if parameter already exists
  385 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Parameters); i++) {
  386 |         if (m_Parameters[i].Name == name) {
  387 |             LogOptimizationEvent("Parameter already exists: " + name, LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  388 |             return false;
  389 |         }
  390 |     }
  391 |     
  392 |     // Add new parameter
  393 |     int size = ArraySize(m_Parameters);
  394 |     ArrayResize(m_Parameters, size + 1);
  395 |     
  396 |     m_Parameters[size].Name = name;
  397 |     m_Parameters[size].Type = type;
  398 |     m_Parameters[size].MinValue = minValue;
  399 |     m_Parameters[size].MaxValue = maxValue;
  400 |     m_Parameters[size].Step = step;
  401 |     m_Parameters[size].CurrentValue = minValue;
  402 |     m_Parameters[size].BestValue = minValue;
  403 |     m_Parameters[size].IsActive = true;
  404 |     m_Parameters[size].Priority = MathMax(1, MathMin(10, priority));
  405 |     
  406 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Parameter added: " + name);
  407 |     
  408 |     return true;
  409 | }
  410 | 
  411 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  412 | //| Remove optimization parameter                                  |
  413 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  414 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::RemoveParameter(const string name) {
  415 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Parameters); i++) {
  416 |         if (m_Parameters[i].Name == name) {
  417 |             // Shift remaining parameters
  418 |             for (int j = i; j < ArraySize(m_Parameters) - 1; j++) {
  419 |                 m_Parameters[j] = m_Parameters[j + 1];
  420 |             }
  421 |             ArrayResize(m_Parameters, ArraySize(m_Parameters) - 1);
  422 |             
  423 |             LogOptimizationEvent("Parameter removed: " + name);
  424 |             return true;
  425 |         }
  426 |     }
  427 |     
  428 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Parameter not found: " + name, LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  429 |     return false;
  430 | }
  431 | 
  432 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  433 | //| Clear all parameters                                           |
  434 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  435 | void CStrategyOptimizer::ClearParameters() {
  436 |     ArrayResize(m_Parameters, 0);
  437 |     LogOptimizationEvent("All parameters cleared");
  438 | }
  439 | 
  440 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  441 | //| Get parameter by index                                         |
  442 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  443 | SOptimizationParameter CStrategyOptimizer::GetParameter(const int index) const {
  444 |     SOptimizationParameter empty;
  445 |     ZeroMemory(empty);
  446 |     
  447 |     if (index < 0 || index >= ArraySize(m_Parameters)) {
  448 |         return empty;
  449 |     }
  450 |     
  451 |     return m_Parameters[index];
  452 | }
  453 | 
  454 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  455 | //| Set parameter value                                            |
  456 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::SetParameterValue(const string name, const double value) {
  458 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Parameters); i++) {
  459 |         if (m_Parameters[i].Name == name) {
  460 |             if (value >= m_Parameters[i].MinValue && value <= m_Parameters[i].MaxValue) {
  461 |                 m_Parameters[i].CurrentValue = value;
  462 |                 return true;
  463 |             } else {
  464 |                 LogOptimizationEvent("Parameter value out of range: " + name, LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  465 |                 return false;
  466 |             }
  467 |         }
  468 |     }
  469 |     
  470 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Parameter not found: " + name, LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  471 |     return false;
  472 | }
  473 | 
  474 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 | //| Get parameter value                                            |
  476 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 | double CStrategyOptimizer::GetParameterValue(const string name) const {
  478 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Parameters); i++) {
  479 |         if (m_Parameters[i].Name == name) {
  480 |             return m_Parameters[i].CurrentValue;
  481 |         }
  482 |     }
  483 |     
  484 |     return 0.0;
  485 | }
  486 | 
  487 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 | //| Start optimization                                             |
  489 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::StartOptimization() {
  491 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  492 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Optimizer not initialized", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  493 |         return false;
  494 |     }
  495 |     
  496 |     if (m_bRunning) {
  497 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Optimization already running", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  498 |         return false;
  499 |     }
  500 |     
  501 |     if (ArraySize(m_Parameters) == 0) {
  502 |         LogOptimizationEvent("No parameters defined for optimization", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  503 |         return false;
  504 |     }
  505 |     
  506 |     // Initialize optimization
  507 |     m_bRunning = true;
  508 |     m_bTerminated = false;
  509 |     m_CurrentIteration = 0;
  510 |     m_StagnantCount = 0;
  511 |     m_LastBestValue = 0.0;
  512 |     
  513 |     // Initialize statistics
  514 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  515 |     m_Stats.StartTime = TimeCurrent();
  516 |     
  517 |     // Clear previous results
  518 |     ArrayResize(m_Results, 0);
  519 |     ZeroMemory(m_BestResult);
  520 |     
  521 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Optimization started using " + EnumToString(m_Config.Method));
  522 |     
  523 |     // Run optimization based on selected method
  524 |     switch(m_Config.Method) {
  525 |     case OPT_METHOD_GENETIC_ALGORITHM:
  526 |         RunGeneticAlgorithm();
  527 |         break;
  528 |     case OPT_METHOD_PARTICLE_SWARM:
  529 |         RunParticleSwarm();
  530 |         break;
  531 |     case OPT_METHOD_SIMULATED_ANNEALING:
  532 |         RunSimulatedAnnealing();
  533 |         break;
  534 |     case OPT_METHOD_GRID_SEARCH:
  535 |         RunGridSearch();
  536 |         break;
  537 |     case OPT_METHOD_RANDOM_SEARCH:
  538 |         RunRandomSearch();
  539 |         break;
  540 |     case OPT_METHOD_BAYESIAN:
  541 |         RunBayesianOptimization();
  542 |         break;
  543 |     default:
  544 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Unknown optimization method", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  545 |         m_bRunning = false;
  546 |         return false;
  547 |     }
  548 |     
  549 |     return true;
  550 | }
  551 | 
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | //| Stop optimization                                              |
  554 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  555 | void CStrategyOptimizer::StopOptimization() {
  556 |     if (m_bRunning) {
  557 |         m_bTerminated = true;
  558 |         m_bRunning = false;
  559 |         
  560 |         m_Stats.EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  561 |         m_Stats.ElapsedSeconds = (double)(m_Stats.EndTime - m_Stats.StartTime);
  562 |         m_Stats.WasTerminated = true;
  563 |         
  564 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Optimization stopped by user", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  565 |     }
  566 | }
  567 | 
  568 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  569 | //| Update optimization (called periodically)                     |
  570 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  571 | void CStrategyOptimizer::UpdateOptimization() {
  572 |     if (!m_bRunning) return;
  573 |     
  574 |     // Check for termination conditions
  575 |     if (CheckConvergence()) {
  576 |         m_bRunning = false;
  577 |         m_Stats.IsCompleted = true;
  578 |         m_Stats.EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  579 |         m_Stats.ElapsedSeconds = (double)(m_Stats.EndTime - m_Stats.StartTime);
  580 |         
  581 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Optimization completed - convergence achieved");
  582 |     }
  583 |     
  584 |     UpdateProgress();
  585 | }
  586 | 
  587 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  588 | //| Run Genetic Algorithm                                          |
  589 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  590 | void CStrategyOptimizer::RunGeneticAlgorithm() {
  591 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Starting Genetic Algorithm optimization");
  592 |     
  593 |     // Initialize population
  594 |     InitializePopulation();
  595 |     
  596 |     // Main evolution loop
  597 |     for (m_CurrentIteration = 0; m_CurrentIteration < m_Config.MaxIterations && !m_bTerminated; m_CurrentIteration++) {
  598 |         // Evaluate population
  599 |         EvaluatePopulation();
  600 |         
  601 |         // Check for improvement
  602 |         UpdateProgress();
  603 |         
  604 |         // Create new generation
  605 |         SOptimizationResult newPopulation[];
  606 |         ArrayResize(newPopulation, m_Config.PopulationSize);
  607 |         
  608 |         // Elitism - keep best individuals
  609 |         int eliteCount = (int)(m_Config.PopulationSize * m_GAParams.ElitismRate);
  610 |         for (int i = 0; i < eliteCount; i++) {
  611 |             newPopulation[i] = m_Population[i];
  612 |         }
  613 |         
  614 |         // Generate offspring
  615 |         for (int i = eliteCount; i < m_Config.PopulationSize; i++) {
  616 |             int parent1, parent2;
  617 |             SelectParents(parent1, parent2);
  618 |             
  619 |             if (GenerateRandomValue(0, 1) < m_GAParams.CrossoverRate) {
  620 |                 newPopulation[i] = Crossover(m_Population[parent1], m_Population[parent2]);
  621 |             } else {
  622 |                 newPopulation[i] = m_Population[parent1];
  623 |             }
  624 |             
  625 |             if (GenerateRandomValue(0, 1) < m_GAParams.MutationRate) {
  626 |                 Mutate(newPopulation[i]);
  627 |             }
  628 |         }
  629 |         
  630 |         // Replace population
  631 |         ArrayCopy(m_Population, newPopulation);
  632 |         
  633 |         // Check convergence
  634 |         if (CheckConvergence()) break;
  635 |     }
  636 |     
  637 |     m_bRunning = false;
  638 |     m_Stats.IsCompleted = true;
  639 |     m_Stats.EndTime = TimeCurrent();
  640 |     m_Stats.ElapsedSeconds = (double)(m_Stats.EndTime - m_Stats.StartTime);
  641 |     
  642 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Genetic Algorithm optimization completed");
  643 | }
  644 | 
  645 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  646 | //| Initialize population for GA                                   |
  647 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  648 | void CStrategyOptimizer::InitializePopulation() {
  649 |     ArrayResize(m_Population, m_Config.PopulationSize);
  650 |     
  651 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_Config.PopulationSize; i++) {
  652 |         m_Population[i] = CreateRandomSolution();
  653 |     }
  654 |     
  655 |     LogOptimizationEvent(StringFormat("Population initialized with %d individuals", m_Config.PopulationSize));
  656 | }
  657 | 
  658 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  659 | //| Evaluate population                                            |
  660 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  661 | void CStrategyOptimizer::EvaluatePopulation() {
  662 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Population); i++) {
  663 |         if (!m_Population[i].IsValid) {
  664 |             m_Population[i] = EvaluateSolution(m_Population[i].Parameters);
  665 |         }
  666 |     }
  667 |     
  668 |     // Sort population by objective value (descending)
  669 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Population) - 1; i++) {
  670 |         for (int j = i + 1; j < ArraySize(m_Population); j++) {
  671 |             if (m_Population[j].ObjectiveValue > m_Population[i].ObjectiveValue) {
  672 |                 SOptimizationResult temp = m_Population[i];
  673 |                 m_Population[i] = m_Population[j];
  674 |                 m_Population[j] = temp;
  675 |             }
  676 |         }
  677 |     }
  678 |     
  679 |     // Update best result
  680 |     if (ArraySize(m_Population) > 0 && m_Population[0].ObjectiveValue > m_BestResult.ObjectiveValue) {
  681 |         m_BestResult = m_Population[0];
  682 |     }
  683 | }
  684 | 
  685 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  686 | //| Create random solution                                         |
  687 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  688 | SOptimizationResult CStrategyOptimizer::CreateRandomSolution() {
  689 |     SOptimizationResult solution;
  690 |     ZeroMemory(solution);
  691 |     
  692 |     ArrayResize(solution.Parameters, ArraySize(m_Parameters));
  693 |     
  694 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Parameters); i++) {
  695 |         solution.Parameters[i] = m_Parameters[i];
  696 |         
  697 |         // Generate random value within parameter range
  698 |         double randomValue = GenerateRandomValue(m_Parameters[i].MinValue, m_Parameters[i].MaxValue);
  699 |         
  700 |         // Apply step if specified
  701 |         if (m_Parameters[i].Step > 0) {
  702 |             randomValue = MathRound(randomValue / m_Parameters[i].Step) * m_Parameters[i].Step;
  703 |         }
  704 |         
  705 |         solution.Parameters[i].CurrentValue = randomValue;
  706 |     }
  707 |     
  708 |     solution.IsValid = false; // Will be evaluated later
  709 |     
  710 |     return solution;
  711 | }
  712 | 
  713 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  714 | //| Generate random value                                          |
  715 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  716 | double CStrategyOptimizer::GenerateRandomValue(const double min, const double max) {
  717 |     return min + (max - min) * ((double)MathRand() / 32767.0);
  718 | }
  719 | 
  720 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  721 | //| Generate random integer                                        |
  722 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  723 | int CStrategyOptimizer::GenerateRandomInt(const int min, const int max) {
  724 |     return min + (MathRand() % (max - min + 1));
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  728 | //| Check convergence                                              |
  729 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  730 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::CheckConvergence() {
  731 |     if (m_CurrentIteration >= m_Config.MaxIterations) {
  732 |         return true;
  733 |     }
  734 |     
  735 |     if (m_StagnantCount >= m_Config.MaxStagnantIterations) {
  736 |         LogOptimizationEvent("Convergence achieved - no improvement for " + IntegerToString(m_StagnantCount) + " iterations");
  737 |         return true;
  738 |     }
  739 |     
  740 |     return false;
  741 | }
  742 | 
  743 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  744 | //| Update progress                                                |
  745 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  746 | void CStrategyOptimizer::UpdateProgress() {
  747 |     if (m_BestResult.ObjectiveValue > m_LastBestValue + m_Config.ConvergenceThreshold) {
  748 |         m_LastBestValue = m_BestResult.ObjectiveValue;
  749 |         m_StagnantCount = 0;
  750 |         LogOptimizationEvent(StringFormat("New best result: %.6f", m_BestResult.ObjectiveValue));
  751 |     } else {
  752 |         m_StagnantCount++;
  753 |     }
  754 |     
  755 |     m_Stats.TotalIterations = m_CurrentIteration;
  756 |     m_Stats.BestObjectiveValue = m_BestResult.ObjectiveValue;
  757 |     m_Stats.StagnantIterations = m_StagnantCount;
  758 | }
  759 | 
  760 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  761 | //| Placeholder methods for other optimization algorithms          |
  762 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  763 | void CStrategyOptimizer::RunParticleSwarm() {
  764 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Particle Swarm Optimization not yet implemented", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  765 |     m_bRunning = false;
  766 | }
  767 | 
  768 | void CStrategyOptimizer::RunSimulatedAnnealing() {
  769 |     LogOptimizationEvent("Simulated Annealing not yet implemented", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);

  782 |

  786 | }
  787 | 
  788 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  789 | //| Placeholder methods for GA operations                          |
  790 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  791 | void CStrategyOptimizer::SelectParents(int& parent1, int& parent2) {
  792 |     // Tournament selection
  793 |     parent1 = GenerateRandomInt(0, MathMin(m_GAParams.TournamentSize, ArraySize(m_Population)) - 1);
  794 |     parent2 = GenerateRandomInt(0, MathMin(m_GAParams.TournamentSize, ArraySize(m_Population)) - 1);
  795 | }
  796 | 
  797 | SOptimizationResult CStrategyOptimizer::Crossover(const SOptimizationResult& parent1, const SOptimizationResult& parent2) {
  798 |     // Simple uniform crossover
  799 |     SOptimizationResult offspring = parent1;
  800 |     
  801 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(offspring.Parameters); i++) {
  802 |         if (GenerateRandomValue(0, 1) < 0.5) {
  803 |             offspring.Parameters[i].CurrentValue = parent2.Parameters[i].CurrentValue;
  804 |         }
  805 |     }
  806 |     
  807 |     offspring.IsValid = false;
  808 |     return offspring;
  809 | }
  810 | 
  811 | void CStrategyOptimizer::Mutate(SOptimizationResult& individual) {
  812 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(individual.Parameters); i++) {
  813 |         if (GenerateRandomValue(0, 1) < 0.1) { // 10% chance per parameter
  814 |             double range = individual.Parameters[i].MaxValue - individual.Parameters[i].MinValue;
  815 |             double mutation = GenerateRandomValue(-range * 0.1, range * 0.1);
  816 |             individual.Parameters[i].CurrentValue = MathMax(individual.Parameters[i].MinValue,
  817 |                                                            MathMin(individual.Parameters[i].MaxValue,
  818 |                                                                   individual.Parameters[i].CurrentValue + mutation));
  819 |         }
  820 |     }
  821 |     individual.IsValid = false;
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  825 | //| Evaluate solution (placeholder)                                |
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | SOptimizationResult CStrategyOptimizer::EvaluateSolution(const SOptimizationParameter& params[]) {
  828 |     SOptimizationResult result;
  829 |     ZeroMemory(result);
  830 |     
  831 |     // Copy parameters
  832 |     ArrayResize(result.Parameters, ArraySize(params));
  833 |     ArrayCopy(result.Parameters, params);
  834 |     
  835 |     // Apply parameters to EA
  836 |     ApplyParameters(params);
  837 |     
  838 |     // Run backtest or get current performance metrics
  839 |     // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would run strategy evaluation
  840 |     result.Profit = GenerateRandomValue(-1000, 5000);
  841 |     result.MaxDrawdown = GenerateRandomValue(100, 2000);
  842 |     result.SharpeRatio = GenerateRandomValue(-2, 3);
  843 |     result.WinRate = GenerateRandomValue(30, 80);
  844 |     result.ProfitFactor = GenerateRandomValue(0.5, 3.0);
  845 |     result.TotalTrades = GenerateRandomInt(10, 1000);
  846 |     
  847 |     // Calculate objective value
  848 |     result.ObjectiveValue = CalculateObjectiveValue(result);
  849 |     result.IsValid = ValidateResult(result);
  850 |     
  851 |     // Add to results history
  852 |     int size = ArraySize(m_Results);
  853 |     ArrayResize(m_Results, size + 1);
  854 |     m_Results[size] = result;
  855 |     
  856 |     if (result.IsValid) {
  857 |         m_Stats.ValidResults++;
  858 |     } else {
  859 |         m_Stats.InvalidResults++;
  860 |     }
  861 |     
  862 |     return result;
  863 | }
  864 | 
  865 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  866 | //| Apply parameters to EA                                         |
  867 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  868 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::ApplyParameters(const SOptimizationParameter& params[]) {
  869 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) return false;
  870 |     
  871 |     // Apply parameters to EA context
  872 |     // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would set EA parameters
  873 |     
  874 |     return true;
  875 | }
  876 | 
  877 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  878 | //| Calculate objective value                                      |
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | double CStrategyOptimizer::CalculateObjectiveValue(const SOptimizationResult& result) {
  881 |     switch(m_Config.Objective) {
  882 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_PROFIT:
  883 |         return result.Profit;
  884 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_SHARPE_RATIO:
  885 |         return result.SharpeRatio;
  886 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_SORTINO_RATIO:
  887 |         return result.SortinoRatio;
  888 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_CALMAR_RATIO:
  889 |         return result.CalmarRatio;
  890 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_MAX_DRAWDOWN:
  891 |         return -result.MaxDrawdown; // Minimize drawdown
  892 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_WIN_RATE:
  893 |         return result.WinRate;
  894 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_PROFIT_FACTOR:
  895 |         return result.ProfitFactor;
  896 |     case OPT_OBJECTIVE_CUSTOM:
  897 |         // Custom objective function
  898 |         return result.Profit / MathMax(1.0, result.MaxDrawdown) * result.SharpeRatio;
  899 |     default:
  900 |         return result.Profit;
  901 |     }
  902 | }
  903 | 
  904 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  905 | //| Validate result                                                |
  906 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  907 | bool CStrategyOptimizer::ValidateResult(const SOptimizationResult& result) {
  908 |     // Basic validation
  909 |     if (result.TotalTrades < 10) return false;
  910 |     if (result.MaxDrawdown > result.Profit * 2) return false;
  911 |     if (result.WinRate < 20 || result.WinRate > 90) return false;
  912 |     
  913 |     return true;
  914 | }
  915 | 
  916 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  917 | //| Get optimization report                                        |
  918 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  919 | string CStrategyOptimizer::GetOptimizationReport() const {
  920 |     string report = "\n=== APEX EA Strategy Optimization Report ===\n";
  921 |     
  922 |     report += StringFormat("Method: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Config.Objective));
  923 |     report += StringFormat("Objective: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Config.Objective));
  924 |     report += StringFormat("Total Iterations: %d\n", m_Stats.TotalIterations);
  925 |     report += StringFormat("Valid Results: %d\n", m_Stats.ValidResults);
  926 |     report += StringFormat("Invalid Results: %d\n", m_Stats.InvalidResults);
  927 |     report += StringFormat("Elapsed Time: %.2f seconds\n", m_Stats.ElapsedSeconds);
  928 |     
  929 |     if (m_BestResult.IsValid) {
  930 |         report += "\n=== Best Result ===\n";
  931 |         report += StringFormat("Objective Value: %.6f\n", m_BestResult.ObjectiveValue);
  932 |         report += StringFormat("Profit: %.2f\n", m_BestResult.Profit);
  933 |         report += StringFormat("Max Drawdown: %.2f\n", m_BestResult.MaxDrawdown);
  934 |         report += StringFormat("Sharpe Ratio: %.3f\n", m_BestResult.SharpeRatio);
  935 |         report += StringFormat("Win Rate: %.2f%%\n", m_BestResult.WinRate);
  936 |         report += StringFormat("Profit Factor: %.3f\n", m_BestResult.ProfitFactor);
  937 |         report += StringFormat("Total Trades: %d\n", m_BestResult.TotalTrades);
  938 |         
  939 |         report += "\n=== Best Parameters ===\n";
  940 |         for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_BestResult.Parameters); i++) {
  941 |             report += StringFormat("%s: %.6f\n", m_BestResult.Parameters[i].Name, m_BestResult.Parameters[i].CurrentValue);
  942 |         }
  943 |     }
  944 |     
  945 |     return report;
  946 | }
  947 | 
  948 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  949 | //| Log optimization event                                         |
  950 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  951 | void CStrategyOptimizer::LogOptimizationEvent(const string event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  952 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  953 |         switch(level) {
  954 |         case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  955 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  956 |             break;
  957 |         case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  958 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  959 |             break;
  960 |         default:
  961 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  962 |             break;
  963 |         }
  964 |     }
  965 | }

  433 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  434 | //| Constructor                                                     |
  435 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  436 | CPerformanceAnalyzer::CPerformanceAnalyzer() {
  437 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  438 |     m_ReportCount = 0;
  439 |     m_EquityCount = 0;
  440 |     m_TradeCount = 0;
  441 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  442 |     m_LastUpdate = 0;
  443 |     
  444 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  445 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  446 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentReport);
  447 |     
  448 |     // Set default configuration
  449 |     m_Config.StartDate = TimeCurrent() - 365 * 24 * 3600; // 1 year ago
  450 |     m_Config.EndDate = TimeCurrent();
  451 |     m_Config.Period = ANALYSIS_PERIOD_DAILY;
  452 |     m_Config.IncludeOpenPositions = true;
  453 |     m_Config.AdjustForDividends = false;
  454 |     m_Config.AdjustForSplits = false;
  455 |     
  456 |     m_Config.BenchmarkType = BENCHMARK_NONE;
  457 |     m_Config.BenchmarkSymbol = "";
  458 |     m_Config.RiskFreeRate = 0.02; // 2% annual
  459 |     
  460 |     m_Config.ConfidenceLevel = 0.95; // 95%
  461 |     m_Config.VaRPeriod = 252; // 1 year
  462 |     m_Config.UseModifiedVaR = false;
  463 |     
  464 |     m_Config.RollingWindow = 252; // 1 year
  465 |     m_Config.RollingStep = 21; // 1 month
  466 |     m_Config.EnableRollingAnalysis = false;
  467 |     
  468 |     m_Config.ReportFormat = REPORT_FORMAT_HTML;
  469 |     m_Config.GenerateCharts = true;
  470 |     m_Config.IncludeTradeDetails = true;
  471 |     m_Config.IncludeBenchmarkComparison = false;
  472 |     m_Config.OutputPath = "";
  473 |     
  474 |     m_Config.EnableMonteCarloAnalysis = false;
  475 |     m_Config.MonteCarloRuns = 1000;
  476 |     m_Config.EnableStressTest = false;
  477 | }
  478 | 
  479 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  480 | //| Destructor                                                      |
  481 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  482 | CPerformanceAnalyzer::~CPerformanceAnalyzer() {
  483 |     Deinitialize();
  484 | }

  486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  487 | //| Initialize performance analyzer                                |
  488 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  489 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  490 |     if (context == NULL) {
  491 |         LogError("Invalid context provided");
  492 |         return false;
  493 |     }
  494 |     
  495 |     m_pContext = context;
  496 |     
  497 |     // Initialize arrays
  498 |     ArrayResize(m_Reports, 20);         // Support 20 reports
  499 |     ArrayResize(m_EquityValues, 10000); // Support 10k equity points
  500 |     ArrayResize(m_EquityTimes, 10000);
  501 |     ArrayResize(m_TradeReturns, 5000);  // Support 5k trades
  502 |     ArrayResize(m_TradeTimes, 5000);
  503 |     
  504 |     m_ReportCount = 0;
  505 |     m_EquityCount = 0;
  506 |     m_TradeCount = 0;
  507 |     
  508 |     // Initialize statistics
  509 |     m_Statistics.TotalReports = 0;
  510 |     m_Statistics.SuccessfulReports = 0;
  511 |     m_Statistics.FailedReports = 0;
  512 |     m_Statistics.LastErrorTime = 0;
  513 |     m_Statistics.BestSharpeRatio = -DBL_MAX;
  514 |     m_Statistics.BestCalmarRatio = -DBL_MAX;
  515 |     m_Statistics.BestReturn = -DBL_MAX;
  516 |     m_Statistics.LowestDrawdown = DBL_MAX;
  517 |     
  518 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  519 |     m_LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  520 |     
  521 |     LogActivity("Performance analyzer initialized successfully");
  522 |     return true;
  523 | }
  524 | 
  525 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  526 | //| Deinitialize performance analyzer                              |
  527 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  528 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::Deinitialize() {
  529 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  530 |         // Clear arrays
  531 |         ArrayFree(m_Reports);
  532 |         ArrayFree(m_EquityValues);
  533 |         ArrayFree(m_EquityTimes);
  534 |         ArrayFree(m_TradeReturns);
  535 |         ArrayFree(m_TradeTimes);
  536 |         
  537 |         m_ReportCount = 0;
  538 |         m_EquityCount = 0;
  539 |         m_TradeCount = 0;
  540 |         
  541 |         m_bInitialized = false;
  542 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  543 |         
  544 |         LogActivity("Performance analyzer deinitialized");
  545 |     }
  546 |     
  547 |     return true;
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | //| Configure performance analyzer                                 |
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::Configure(const SPerformanceConfig& config) {
  554 |     m_Config = config;
  555 |     
  556 |     // Validate configuration
  557 |     if (m_Config.StartDate >= m_Config.EndDate) {
  558 |         LogError("Invalid date range: start date must be before end date");
  559 |         return false;
  560 |     }
  561 |     
  562 |     if (m_Config.ConfidenceLevel <= 0 || m_Config.ConfidenceLevel >= 1) {
  563 |         LogError("Invalid confidence level: must be between 0 and 1");
  564 |         return false;
  565 |     }
  566 |     
  567 |     if (m_Config.RiskFreeRate < 0) {
  568 |         LogError("Invalid risk-free rate: must be non-negative");
  569 |         return false;
  570 |     }
  571 |     
  572 |     LogActivity("Performance analyzer configured successfully");
  573 |     return true;
  574 | }
  575 | 
  576 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  577 | //| Generate performance report                                    |
  578 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  579 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::GenerateReport() {
  580 |     return GenerateReport(m_Config.StartDate, m_Config.EndDate);
  581 | }
  582 | 
  583 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::GenerateReport(datetime startDate, datetime endDate) {
  584 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  585 |         LogError("Performance analyzer not initialized");
  586 |         return false;
  587 |     }
  588 |     
  589 |     LogActivity("Generating performance report");
  590 |     
  591 |     // Initialize current report
  592 |     ZeroMemory(m_CurrentReport);
  593 |     m_CurrentReport.ReportId = StringFormat("PERF_%d_%d", GetTickCount(), MathRand());
  594 |     m_CurrentReport.GenerationTime = TimeCurrent();
  595 |     m_CurrentReport.StartDate = startDate;
  596 |     m_CurrentReport.EndDate = endDate;
  597 |     m_CurrentReport.Symbol = Symbol();
  598 |     m_CurrentReport.Timeframe = Period();
  599 |     
  600 |     m_Statistics.TotalReports++;
  601 |     
  602 |     // Load trade history
  603 |     if (!LoadTradeHistory()) {
  604 |         LogError("Failed to load trade history");
  605 |         m_Statistics.FailedReports++;
  606 |         return false;
  607 |     }
  608 |     
  609 |     // Validate data
  610 |     if (!ValidateData()) {
  611 |         LogError("Data validation failed");
  612 |         m_Statistics.FailedReports++;
  613 |         return false;
  614 |     }
  615 |     
  616 |     // Calculate metrics
  617 |     bool success = true;
  618 |     success &= CalculateBasicMetrics();
  619 |     success &= CalculateRiskMetrics();
  620 |     success &= CalculateAdvancedMetrics();
  621 |     
  622 |     if (m_Config.IncludeBenchmarkComparison && m_Config.BenchmarkType != BENCHMARK_NONE) {
  623 |         success &= CalculateBenchmarkMetrics();
  624 |     }
  625 |     
  626 |     if (m_Config.EnableRollingAnalysis) {
  627 |         success &= PerformRollingAnalysis();
  628 |     }
  629 |     
  630 |     if (m_Config.GenerateCharts) {
  631 |         success &= GenerateCharts();
  632 |     }
  633 |     
  634 |     if (success) {
  635 |         m_CurrentReport.IsStatisticallySignificant = (m_TradeCount >= 30); // Minimum sample size
  636 |         m_CurrentReport.DataQuality = 1.0; // Placeholder
  637 |         m_CurrentReport.ReportConfidence = (m_TradeCount >= 100) ? 0.95 : 0.8;
  638 |         
  639 |         // Store report
  640 |         if (m_ReportCount < ArraySize(m_Reports)) {
  641 |             m_Reports[m_ReportCount] = m_CurrentReport;
  642 |             m_ReportCount++;
  643 |         }
  644 |         
  645 |         // Update statistics
  646 |         m_Statistics.SuccessfulReports++;
  647 |         if (m_CurrentReport.SharpeRatio > m_Statistics.BestSharpeRatio) {
  648 |             m_Statistics.BestSharpeRatio = m_CurrentReport.SharpeRatio;
  649 |         }
  650 |         if (m_CurrentReport.CalmarRatio > m_Statistics.BestCalmarRatio) {
  651 |             m_Statistics.BestCalmarRatio = m_CurrentReport.CalmarRatio;
  652 |         }
  653 |         
  654 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Performance report generated successfully. Return: %.2f%%, Sharpe: %.2f", 
  655 |                                 m_CurrentReport.TotalReturn, m_CurrentReport.SharpeRatio));
  656 |     } else {
  657 |         m_Statistics.FailedReports++;
  658 |         LogError("Failed to generate performance report");
  659 |     }
  660 |     
  661 |     m_LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  662 |     return success;
  663 | }
  664 | 
  665 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  666 | //| Load trade history                                             |
  667 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  668 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::LoadTradeHistory() {
  669 |     // Placeholder implementation
  670 |     // In real implementation, this would load actual trade history
  671 |     
  672 |     m_TradeCount = 0;
  673 |     m_EquityCount = 0;
  674 |     
  675 |     // Simulate some trade data
  676 |     int totalDays = (int)((m_Config.EndDate - m_Config.StartDate) / (24 * 3600));
  677 |     
  678 |     // Generate equity curve
  679 |     double equity = 10000.0; // Starting equity
  680 |     datetime currentTime = m_Config.StartDate;
  681 |     
  682 |     for (int i = 0; i < totalDays && m_EquityCount < ArraySize(m_EquityValues); i++) {
  683 |         // Simulate daily return
  684 |         double dailyReturn = (MathRandom() - 0.5) * 0.04; // -2% to +2% daily
  685 |         equity *= (1.0 + dailyReturn);
  686 |         
  687 |         m_EquityValues[m_EquityCount] = equity;
  688 |         m_EquityTimes[m_EquityCount] = currentTime;
  689 |         m_EquityCount++;
  690 |         
  691 |         // Simulate trades (not every day)
  692 |         if (MathRandom() < 0.3 && m_TradeCount < ArraySize(m_TradeReturns)) { // 30% chance of trade
  693 |             m_TradeReturns[m_TradeCount] = dailyReturn;
  694 |             m_TradeTimes[m_TradeCount] = currentTime;
  695 |             m_TradeCount++;
  696 |         }
  697 |         
  698 |         currentTime += 24 * 3600; // Next day
  699 |     }
  700 |     
  701 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Loaded %d equity points and %d trades", m_EquityCount, m_TradeCount));
  702 |     return (m_EquityCount > 0);
  703 | }
  704 | 
  705 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  706 | //| Calculate basic metrics                                        |
  707 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  708 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::CalculateBasicMetrics() {
  709 |     if (m_EquityCount < 2) {
  710 |         LogError("Insufficient data for basic metrics calculation");
  711 |         return false;
  712 |     }
  713 |     
  714 |     // Calculate total return
  715 |     double startEquity = m_EquityValues[0];
  716 |     double endEquity = m_EquityValues[m_EquityCount - 1];
  717 |     m_CurrentReport.TotalReturn = (endEquity - startEquity) / startEquity * 100.0;
  718 |     
  719 |     // Calculate annualized return
  720 |     double years = (double)(m_Config.EndDate - m_Config.StartDate) / (365.25 * 24 * 3600);
  721 |     if (years > 0) {
  722 |         m_CurrentReport.AnnualizedReturn = (MathPow(endEquity / startEquity, 1.0 / years) - 1.0) * 100.0;
  723 |     }
  724 |     
  725 |     // Calculate volatility
  726 |     if (m_TradeCount > 1) {
  727 |         m_CurrentReport.Volatility = CalculateStandardDeviation(m_TradeReturns, m_TradeCount) * MathSqrt(252) * 100.0;
  728 |     }
  729 |     
  730 |     // Calculate Sharpe ratio
  731 |     if (m_TradeCount > 1) {
  732 |         m_CurrentReport.SharpeRatio = CalculateSharpeRatio(m_TradeReturns, m_TradeCount, m_Config.RiskFreeRate);
  733 |     }
  734 |     
  735 |     // Calculate maximum drawdown
  736 |     m_CurrentReport.MaxDrawdown = CalculateMaxDrawdown(m_EquityValues, m_EquityCount);
  737 |     
  738 |     // Calculate Calmar ratio
  739 |     if (m_CurrentReport.MaxDrawdown > 0) {
  740 |         m_CurrentReport.CalmarRatio = m_CurrentReport.AnnualizedReturn / m_CurrentReport.MaxDrawdown;
  741 |     }
  742 |     
  743 |     // Trade statistics
  744 |     m_CurrentReport.TotalTrades = m_TradeCount;
  745 |     m_CurrentReport.WinningTrades = 0;
  746 |     m_CurrentReport.LosingTrades = 0;
  747 |     
  748 |     double totalWins = 0;
  749 |     double totalLosses = 0;
  750 |     
  751 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_TradeCount; i++) {
  752 |         if (m_TradeReturns[i] > 0) {
  753 |             m_CurrentReport.WinningTrades++;
  754 |             totalWins += m_TradeReturns[i];
  755 |         } else if (m_TradeReturns[i] < 0) {
  756 |             m_CurrentReport.LosingTrades++;
  757 |             totalLosses += MathAbs(m_TradeReturns[i]);
  758 |         }
  759 |     }
  760 |     
  761 |     if (m_CurrentReport.TotalTrades > 0) {
  762 |         m_CurrentReport.WinRate = (double)m_CurrentReport.WinningTrades / m_CurrentReport.TotalTrades * 100.0;
  763 |     }
  764 |     
  765 |     if (m_CurrentReport.WinningTrades > 0) {
  766 |         m_CurrentReport.AverageWin = totalWins / m_CurrentReport.WinningTrades * 100.0;
  767 |     }
  768 |     
  769 |     if (m_CurrentReport.LosingTrades > 0) {
  770 |         m_CurrentReport.AverageLoss = totalLosses / m_CurrentReport.LosingTrades * 100.0;
  771 |     }
  772 |     
  773 |     if (totalLosses > 0) {
  774 |         m_CurrentReport.ProfitFactor = totalWins / totalLosses;
  775 |     }
  776 |     
  777 |     return true;
  778 | }
  779 | 
  780 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  781 | //| Calculate risk metrics                                         |
  782 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  783 | bool CPerformanceAnalyzer::CalculateRiskMetrics() {
  784 |     if (m_TradeCount < 10) {
  785 |         LogActivity("Insufficient trades for reliable risk metrics");
  786 |         return true; // Not an error, just limited data
  787 |     }
  788 |     
  789 |     // Calculate VaR and CVaR
  790 |     m_CurrentReport.VaR95 = CalculateVaR(m_TradeReturns, m_TradeCount, m_Config.ConfidenceLevel) * 100.0;
  791 |     m_CurrentReport.CVaR95 = CalculateCVaR(m_TradeReturns, m_TradeCount, m_Config.ConfidenceLevel) * 100.0;
  792 |     
  793 |     // Calculate Ulcer Index
  794 |     m_CurrentReport.UlcerIndex = CalculateUlcerIndex(m_EquityValues, m_EquityCount);
  795 |     
  796 |     // Calculate Kelly Criterion
  797 |     m_CurrentReport.KellyCriterion = CalculateKellyCriterion(m_TradeReturns, m_TradeCount);
  798 |     
  799 |     return true;
  800 | }
  801 |

  806 |     // Placeholder for advanced metrics
  807 |     m_CurrentReport.PainIndex = 0.0;
  808 |     m_CurrentReport.GainToPainRatio = 0.0;
  809 |     m_CurrentReport.LakeRatio = 0.0;
  810 |     m_CurrentReport.OptimalF = 0.0;
  811 |     
  812 |     return true;
  813 | }

  821 |     m_CurrentReport.BenchmarkName = m_Config.BenchmarkSymbol;

  824 |     m_CurrentReport.TrackingErrorToBenchmark = 0.0;

  826 |     m_CurrentReport.AlphaToMarket = 0.0;
  827 |     m_CurrentReport.InformationRatio = 0.0;
