 1010 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1011 | //| Generate recommendations                                        |
 1012 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1013 | string CReportGenerator::GenerateRecommendations(const SReportData& data) {
 1014 |     string recommendations = "";
 1015 |     
 1016 |     recommendations += "<ul>\n";
 1017 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(data.Recommendations); i++) {
 1018 |         recommendations += "<li>" + EscapeHTML(data.Recommendations[i]) + "</li>\n";
 1019 |     }
 1020 |     recommendations += "</ul>\n";
 1021 |     
 1022 |     return recommendations;
 1023 | }
 1024 | 
 1025 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1026 | //| Generate CSV report                                            |
 1027 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1028 | bool CReportGenerator::GenerateCSV(const SReportData& data, const string filePath) {
 1029 |     int fileHandle = FileOpen(filePath, FILE_WRITE | FILE_CSV);
 1030 |     if (fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1031 |         LogError("Failed to create CSV file: " + filePath);
 1032 |         return false;
 1033 |     }
 1034 |     
 1035 |     // Write header
 1036 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Metric", "Value");
 1037 |     
 1038 |     // Write performance metrics
 1039 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Total Return (%)", data.TotalReturn);
 1040 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Annualized Return (%)", data.AnnualizedReturn);
 1041 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Volatility (%)", data.Volatility);
 1042 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Sharpe Ratio", data.SharpeRatio);
 1043 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Maximum Drawdown (%)", data.MaxDrawdown);
 1044 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Calmar Ratio", data.CalmarRatio);
 1045 |     
 1046 |     // Write trade metrics
 1047 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Total Trades", data.TotalTrades);
 1048 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Winning Trades", data.WinningTrades);
 1049 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Losing Trades", data.LosingTrades);
 1050 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Win Rate (%)", data.WinRate);
 1051 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Profit Factor", data.ProfitFactor);
 1052 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Average Win (%)", data.AverageWin);
 1053 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Average Loss (%)", data.AverageLoss);
 1054 |     
 1055 |     // Write risk metrics
 1056 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "VaR 95% (%)", data.VaR95);
 1057 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "CVaR 95% (%)", data.CVaR95);
 1058 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Beta to Market", data.BetaToMarket);
 1059 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Alpha to Market (%)", data.AlphaToMarket);
 1060 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, "Tracking Error (%)", data.TrackingError);
 1061 |     
 1062 |     FileClose(fileHandle);
 1063 |     
 1064 |     LogActivity("CSV report generated: " + filePath);
 1065 |     return true;
 1066 | }
 1067 | 
 1068 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1069 | //| Generate JSON report                                           |
 1070 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1071 | bool CReportGenerator::GenerateJSON(const SReportData& data, string& output) {
 1072 |     output = "{\n";
 1073 |     output += "  \"report\": {\n";
 1074 |     output += "    \"title\": \"" + m_Config.Title + "\",\n";
 1075 |     output += "    \"generated\": \"" + FormatDate(TimeCurrent()) + "\",\n";
 1076 |     output += "    \"author\": \"" + m_Config.Author + "\",\n";
 1077 |     
 1078 |     output += "    \"performance\": {\n";
 1079 |     output += "      \"totalReturn\": " + DoubleToString(data.TotalReturn, 2) + ",\n";
 1080 |     output += "      \"annualizedReturn\": " + DoubleToString(data.AnnualizedReturn, 2) + ",\n";
 1081 |     output += "      \"volatility\": " + DoubleToString(data.Volatility, 2) + ",\n";
 1082 |     output += "      \"sharpeRatio\": " + DoubleToString(data.SharpeRatio, 2) + ",\n";
 1083 |     output += "      \"maxDrawdown\": " + DoubleToString(data.MaxDrawdown, 2) + ",\n";
 1084 |     output += "      \"calmarRatio\": " + DoubleToString(data.CalmarRatio, 2) + "\n";
 1085 |     output += "    },\n";
 1086 |     
 1087 |     output += "    \"trades\": {\n";
 1088 |     output += "      \"totalTrades\": " + IntegerToString(data.TotalTrades) + ",\n";
 1089 |     output += "      \"winningTrades\": " + IntegerToString(data.WinningTrades) + ",\n";
 1090 |     output += "      \"losingTrades\": " + IntegerToString(data.LosingTrades) + ",\n";
 1091 |     output += "      \"winRate\": " + DoubleToString(data.WinRate, 2) + ",\n";
 1092 |     output += "      \"profitFactor\": " + DoubleToString(data.ProfitFactor, 2) + ",\n";
 1093 |     output += "      \"averageWin\": " + DoubleToString(data.AverageWin, 2) + ",\n";
 1094 |     output += "      \"averageLoss\": " + DoubleToString(data.AverageLoss, 2) + "\n";
 1095 |     output += "    },\n";
 1096 |     
 1097 |     output += "    \"risk\": {\n";
 1098 |     output += "      \"var95\": " + DoubleToString(data.VaR95, 2) + ",\n";
 1099 |     output += "      \"cvar95\": " + DoubleToString(data.CVaR95, 2) + ",\n";
 1100 |     output += "      \"betaToMarket\": " + DoubleToString(data.BetaToMarket, 2) + ",\n";
 1101 |     output += "      \"alphaToMarket\": " + DoubleToString(data.AlphaToMarket, 2) + ",\n";
 1102 |     output += "      \"trackingError\": " + DoubleToString(data.TrackingError, 2) + "\n";
 1103 |     output += "    }\n";
 1104 |     
 1105 |     output += "  }\n";
 1106 |     output += "}\n";
 1107 |     
 1108 |     return true;
 1109 | }
 1110 | 
 1111 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1112 | //| Validate configuration                                         |
 1113 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1114 | bool CReportGenerator::ValidateConfiguration() {
 1115 |     if (m_Config.Title == "") {
 1116 |         LogError("Report title cannot be empty");
 1117 |         return false;
 1118 |     }
 1119 |     
 1120 |     if (m_Config.OutputPath == "") {
 1121 |         LogError("Output path cannot be empty");
 1122 |         return false;
 1123 |     }
 1124 |     
 1125 |     if (m_Config.ChartWidth <= 0 || m_Config.ChartHeight <= 0) {
 1126 |         LogError("Invalid chart dimensions");
 1127 |         return false;
 1128 |     }
 1129 |     
 1130 |     return true;
 1131 | }
 1132 | 
 1133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1134 | //| Validate report data                                           |
 1135 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1136 | bool CReportGenerator::ValidateReportData(const SReportData& data) {
 1137 |     if (data.TotalTrades < 0) {
 1138 |         LogError("Invalid total trades count");
 1139 |         return false;
 1140 |     }
 1141 |     
 1142 |     if (data.WinningTrades + data.LosingTrades > data.TotalTrades) {
 1143 |         LogError("Inconsistent trade counts");
 1144 |         return false;
 1145 |     }
 1146 |     
 1147 |     return true;
 1148 | }

 1171 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

 1173 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1174 | string CReportGenerator::EscapeHTML(const string text) {
 1175 |     string result = text;
 1176 |     StringReplace(result, "&", "&amp;");
 1177 |     StringReplace(result, "<", "&lt;");
 1178 |     StringReplace(result, ">", "&gt;");
 1179 |     StringReplace(result, "\"", "&quot;");
 1180 |     StringReplace(result, "'", "&#39;");
 1181 |     return result;
 1182 | }

  150 |     string SummaryTemplate;
  151 |     string PerformanceTemplate;
  152 |     string RiskTemplate;
  153 |     string TradesTemplate;
  154 |     string StatisticsTemplate;
  155 |     string FooterTemplate;
  156 |     string StyleSheet;
  157 |     string[] CustomTemplates;
  158 | };
  159 |

  176 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  177 | //| Report Generator Class                                        |
  178 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  179 | class CReportGenerator {

  181 |     EAContext* m_pContext;
  182 |     SReportConfig m_Config;
  183 |     SReportData m_Data;
  184 |     SReportTemplate m_Templates[];
  185 |     SReportStats m_Stats;
  186 |

  189 |     bool m_bGenerating;
  190 |     
  191 |     // File handling
  192 |     int m_FileHandle;
  193 |     string m_CurrentOutputPath;
  194 |     
  195 |     // Template cache
  196 |     string m_CachedTemplates[];
  197 |     
  198 | public:

  215 |     string[] GetAvailableTemplates() const;

  227 |     bool GenerateCustomReport(const SReportConfig& config);
  228 |     bool GenerateScheduledReports();
  229 |

  232 |     bool GenerateCSVReport();
  233 |     bool GenerateJSONReport();
  234 |     bool GenerateXMLReport();
  235 |     bool GeneratePDFReport();
  236 |     bool GenerateTextReport();

  242 |     string GenerateRiskSection();

  246 |     string GenerateFooter();
  247 |

  249 |     bool ExportToFile(const string content, const string filePath);
  250 |     bool SendReportByEmail(const string filePath, const string recipient);
  251 |     bool UploadToCloud(const string filePath, const string cloudPath);
  252 |     
  253 |     // Statistics
  254 |     SReportStats GetStatistics() const { return m_Stats; }
  255 |     void UpdateStatistics();
  256 |     void ResetStatistics();
  257 |     
  258 |     // Auto-generation
  259 |     bool EnableAutoGeneration(const ENUM_REPORT_TYPE type, const int intervalHours);
  260 |     bool DisableAutoGeneration();
  261 |     bool IsAutoGenerationEnabled() const { return m_Stats.AutoGenerationEnabled; }
  262 |     
  263 | private:

  267 |

  269 |     double CalculateSharpeRatio(const double returns[], const int count);
  270 |     double CalculateSortinoRatio(const double returns[], const int count);
  271 |     double CalculateCalmarRatio(const double totalReturn, const double maxDrawdown);
  272 |     double CalculateVaR(const double returns[], const int count, const double confidence);
  273 |     double CalculateCVaR(const double returns[], const int count, const double confidence);
  274 |     double CalculateVolatility(const double returns[], const int count);
  275 |

  277 |     string ProcessTemplate(const string template, const SReportData& data);
  278 |     string ReplaceVariables(const string text, const SReportData& data);
  279 |     string FormatNumber(const double value, const int digits = 2);
  280 |     string FormatCurrency(const double value);
  281 |     string FormatPercent(const double value);

  304 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  306 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  307 | CReportGenerator::CReportGenerator() {
  308 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  309 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  310 |     m_bGenerating = false;
  311 |     m_FileHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  312 |     m_CurrentOutputPath = "";
  313 |     
  314 |     // Initialize default configuration
  315 |     InitializeDefaultConfig();
  316 |     
  317 |     // Initialize statistics
  318 |     ZeroMemory(m_Stats);
  319 |     m_Stats.AutoGenerationEnabled = false;
  320 | }
  321 | 
  322 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  324 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  325 | CReportGenerator::~CReportGenerator() {
  326 |     Deinitialize();
  327 | }
  328 | 
  329 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  330 | //| Initialize Report Generator                                    |
  331 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  332 | bool CReportGenerator::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  333 |     if (context == NULL) {
  334 |         Print("[REPORT GENERATOR ERROR] Context is NULL");
  335 |         return false;
  336 |     }
  337 |     
  338 |     m_pContext = context;
  339 |     
  340 |     // Initialize templates
  341 |     InitializeTemplates();
  342 |     
  343 |     // Create output directory
  344 |     string outputDir = "Reports";
  345 |     if (!CreateOutputDirectory(outputDir)) {
  346 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to create output directory: " + outputDir, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  347 |         return false;
  348 |     }
  349 |     
  350 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  351 |     LogReportEvent("Report Generator initialized successfully");
  352 |     
  353 |     return true;
  354 | }
  355 | 
  356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 | //| Deinitialize Report Generator                                 |
  358 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  359 | void CReportGenerator::Deinitialize() {
  360 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  361 |         // Close any open files
  362 |         if (m_FileHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  363 |             FileClose(m_FileHandle);
  364 |             m_FileHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  365 |         }
  366 |         
  367 |         LogReportEvent("Report Generator deinitialized");
  368 |     }
  369 |     
  370 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  371 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  372 | }
  373 |

  378 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  379 |     
  380 |     m_Config.Type = REPORT_TYPE_SUMMARY;
  381 |     m_Config.Format = REPORT_FORMAT_HTML;
  382 |     m_Config.Title = "APEX EA Performance Report";
  383 |     m_Config.Description = "Automated trading performance analysis";
  384 |     m_Config.StartDate = 0;
  385 |     m_Config.EndDate = TimeCurrent();
  386 |     m_Config.OutputPath = "Reports";
  387 |     m_Config.TemplatePath = "Templates";
  388 |     m_Config.IncludeCharts = true;
  389 |     m_Config.IncludeStatistics = true;
  390 |     m_Config.IncludeTradeDetails = true;
  391 |     m_Config.IncludeRiskAnalysis = true;
  392 |     m_Config.IncludePerformanceMetrics = true;
  393 |     m_Config.Author = "APEX Trading Systems";
  394 |     m_Config.Company = "APEX";
  395 |     m_Config.Version = "5.0";
  396 | }

  398 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  401 | void CReportGenerator::InitializeTemplates() {
  402 |     // Initialize default HTML template
  403 |     SReportTemplate htmlTemplate;
  404 |     ZeroMemory(htmlTemplate);
  405 |     
  406 |     htmlTemplate.Name = "Default HTML";
  407 |     htmlTemplate.Description = "Standard HTML report template";
  408 |     htmlTemplate.Format = REPORT_FORMAT_HTML;

  419 |         "        .section { margin: 20px 0; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ddd; }\n"

  421 |         "        .positive { color: #27ae60; }\n"
  422 |         "        .negative { color: #e74c3c; }\n"
  423 |         "        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }\n"
  424 |         "        th, td { padding: 8px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; }\n"
  425 |         "        th { background-color: #f2f2f2; }\n"
  426 |         "    </style>\n"
  427 |         "</head>\n"
  428 |         "<body>\n"
  429 |         "    <div class='header'>\n"
  430 |         "        <h1>{TITLE}</h1>\n"
  431 |         "        <p>{DESCRIPTION}</p>\n"
  432 |         "        <p>Generated: {GENERATION_TIME}</p>\n"
  433 |         "    </div>\n";
  434 |     
  435 |     htmlTemplate.SummaryTemplate = 
  436 |         "    <div class='section'>\n"
  437 |         "        <h2>Executive Summary</h2>\n"

  440 |         "        </div>\n"
  441 |         "        <div class='metric'>\n"
  442 |         "            <strong>Total Trades:</strong> {TOTAL_TRADES}\n"
  443 |         "        </div>\n"
  444 |         "        <div class='metric'>\n"
  445 |         "            <strong>Win Rate:</strong> {WIN_RATE}%\n"
  446 |         "        </div>\n"
  447 |         "        <div class='metric'>\n"
  448 |         "            <strong>Profit Factor:</strong> {PROFIT_FACTOR}\n"
  449 |         "        </div>\n"

  452 |         "        </div>\n"

  454 |         "            <strong>Sharpe Ratio:</strong> {SHARPE_RATIO}\n"
  455 |         "        </div>\n"

  457 |

  459 |         "    <div class='section'>\n"
  460 |         "        <p><small>Report generated by APEX Pullback EA v5.0 on {GENERATION_TIME}</small></p>\n"
  461 |         "        <p><small>© {COMPANY} - {AUTHOR}</small></p>\n"
  462 |         "    </div>\n"
  463 |         "</body>\n"
  464 |         "</html>\n";
  465 |     
  466 |     // Add template to array
  467 |     int size = ArraySize(m_Templates);
  468 |     ArrayResize(m_Templates, size + 1);
  469 |     m_Templates[size] = htmlTemplate;
  470 | }
  471 | 
  472 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  473 | //| Collect all data for report                                   |
  474 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 | bool CReportGenerator::CollectData(const datetime startDate, const datetime endDate) {
  476 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  477 |         LogReportEvent("Report Generator not initialized", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  478 |         return false;
  479 |     }
  480 |     
  481 |     LogReportEvent("Collecting report data...");
  482 |     
  483 |     // Initialize data structure
  484 |     ZeroMemory(m_Data);
  485 |     m_Data.ReportGenerationTime = TimeCurrent();
  486 |     m_Data.ReportPeriod = TimeToString(startDate) + " - " + TimeToString(endDate);
  487 |     
  488 |     // Collect different types of data
  489 |     if (!CollectAccountData()) {
  490 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to collect account data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  491 |         return false;
  492 |     }
  493 |     
  494 |     if (!CollectPerformanceData()) {
  495 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to collect performance data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  496 |         return false;
  497 |     }
  498 |     
  499 |     if (!CollectTradeData()) {
  500 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to collect trade data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  501 |         return false;
  502 |     }
  503 |     
  504 |     if (!CollectRiskData()) {
  505 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to collect risk data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  506 |         return false;
  507 |     }
  508 |     
  509 |     if (!CollectTimeBasedData()) {
  510 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to collect time-based data", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  511 |         return false;
  512 |     }
  513 |     
  514 |     LogReportEvent("Data collection completed successfully");
  515 |     return true;
  516 | }
  517 | 
  518 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  519 | //| Collect account data                                           |
  520 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  521 | bool CReportGenerator::CollectAccountData() {
  522 |     m_Data.AccountNumber = AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_LOGIN);
  523 |     m_Data.AccountName = AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_NAME);
  524 |     m_Data.AccountServer = AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_SERVER);
  525 |     m_Data.AccountCurrency = AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_CURRENCY);
  526 |     m_Data.FinalBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  527 |     m_Data.FinalEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  528 |     
  529 |     // Initial balance would need to be stored separately
  530 |     m_Data.InitialBalance = m_Data.FinalBalance; // Placeholder
  531 |     m_Data.InitialEquity = m_Data.FinalEquity;   // Placeholder
  532 |     
  533 |     return true;
  534 | }
  535 | 
  536 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  537 | //| Collect performance data                                       |
  538 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 | bool CReportGenerator::CollectPerformanceData() {
  540 |     // Calculate basic performance metrics
  541 |     m_Data.TotalProfit = 0;
  542 |     m_Data.TotalLoss = 0;
  543 |     
  544 |     // This would typically come from trade history analysis
  545 |     // For now, using placeholder calculations
  546 |     
  547 |     if (HistorySelect(0, TimeCurrent())) {
  548 |         int totalDeals = HistoryDealsTotal();
  549 |         
  550 |         for (int i = 0; i < totalDeals; i++) {
  551 |             ulong ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  552 |             if (ticket > 0) {
  553 |                 double profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  554 |                 if (profit > 0) {
  555 |                     m_Data.TotalProfit += profit;
  556 |                 } else {
  557 |                     m_Data.TotalLoss += MathAbs(profit);
  558 |                 }
  559 |             }
  560 |         }
  561 |     }
  562 |     
  563 |     m_Data.NetProfit = m_Data.TotalProfit - m_Data.TotalLoss;
  564 |     m_Data.ProfitFactor = m_Data.TotalLoss > 0 ? m_Data.TotalProfit / m_Data.TotalLoss : 0;
  565 |     
  566 |     // Placeholder values for advanced metrics
  567 |     m_Data.SharpeRatio = 1.25;
  568 |     m_Data.SortinoRatio = 1.85;
  569 |     m_Data.CalmarRatio = 0.95;
  570 |     m_Data.MaxDrawdown = 1500.0;
  571 |     m_Data.MaxDrawdownPercent = 8.5;
  572 |     m_Data.RecoveryFactor = 2.1;
  573 |     m_Data.ExpectedPayoff = 25.50;
  574 |     
  575 |     return true;
  576 | }
  577 | 
  578 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  579 | //| Collect trade data                                             |
  580 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  581 | bool CReportGenerator::CollectTradeData() {
  582 |     m_Data.TotalTrades = 0;
  583 |     m_Data.WinningTrades = 0;
  584 |     m_Data.LosingTrades = 0;
  585 |     m_Data.AverageWin = 0;
  586 |     m_Data.AverageLoss = 0;
  587 |     m_Data.LargestWin = 0;
  588 |     m_Data.LargestLoss = 0;
  589 |     
  590 |     double totalWinProfit = 0;
  591 |     double totalLossProfit = 0;
  592 |     
  593 |     if (HistorySelect(0, TimeCurrent())) {
  594 |         int totalDeals = HistoryDealsTotal();
  595 |         
  596 |         for (int i = 0; i < totalDeals; i++) {
  597 |             ulong ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  598 |             if (ticket > 0) {
  599 |                 double profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  600 |                 
  601 |                 if (profit != 0) {
  602 |                     m_Data.TotalTrades++;
  603 |                     
  604 |                     if (profit > 0) {
  605 |                         m_Data.WinningTrades++;
  606 |                         totalWinProfit += profit;
  607 |                         if (profit > m_Data.LargestWin) {
  608 |                             m_Data.LargestWin = profit;
  609 |                         }
  610 |                     } else {
  611 |                         m_Data.LosingTrades++;
  612 |                         totalLossProfit += MathAbs(profit);
  613 |                         if (MathAbs(profit) > m_Data.LargestLoss) {
  614 |                             m_Data.LargestLoss = MathAbs(profit);
  615 |                         }
  616 |                     }
  617 |                 }
  618 |             }
  619 |         }
  620 |     }
  621 |     
  622 |     // Calculate averages
  623 |     m_Data.WinRate = m_Data.TotalTrades > 0 ? (double)m_Data.WinningTrades / m_Data.TotalTrades * 100 : 0;
  624 |     m_Data.AverageWin = m_Data.WinningTrades > 0 ? totalWinProfit / m_Data.WinningTrades : 0;
  625 |     m_Data.AverageLoss = m_Data.LosingTrades > 0 ? totalLossProfit / m_Data.LosingTrades : 0;
  626 |     
  627 |     // Placeholder for average trade length
  628 |     m_Data.AverageTradeLength = 4.5; // hours
  629 |     
  630 |     return true;
  631 | }
  632 | 
  633 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  634 | //| Collect risk data                                              |
  635 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  636 | bool CReportGenerator::CollectRiskData() {
  637 |     // Placeholder values for risk metrics
  638 |     // In a real implementation, these would be calculated from historical returns
  639 |     
  640 |     m_Data.VaR95 = 250.0;
  641 |     m_Data.VaR99 = 450.0;
  642 |     m_Data.CVaR95 = 380.0;
  643 |     m_Data.CVaR99 = 650.0;
  644 |     m_Data.VolatilityDaily = 1.2;
  645 |     m_Data.VolatilityAnnualized = 18.5;
  646 |     m_Data.BetaToMarket = 0.85;
  647 |     m_Data.CorrelationToMarket = 0.65;
  648 |     
  649 |     return true;
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  653 | //| Collect time-based data                                        |
  654 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  655 | bool CReportGenerator::CollectTimeBasedData() {
  656 |     // Initialize arrays
  657 |     ArrayInitialize(m_Data.ProfitByHour, 0);
  658 |     ArrayInitialize(m_Data.ProfitByDay, 0);
  659 |     ArrayInitialize(m_Data.ProfitByMonth, 0);
  660 |     ArrayInitialize(m_Data.TradesByHour, 0);
  661 |     ArrayInitialize(m_Data.TradesByDay, 0);
  662 |     ArrayInitialize(m_Data.TradesByMonth, 0);
  663 |     
  664 |     // Analyze historical trades by time
  665 |     if (HistorySelect(0, TimeCurrent())) {
  666 |         int totalDeals = HistoryDealsTotal();
  667 |         
  668 |         for (int i = 0; i < totalDeals; i++) {
  669 |             ulong ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  670 |             if (ticket > 0) {
  671 |                 datetime dealTime = (datetime)HistoryDealGetInteger(ticket, DEAL_TIME);
  672 |                 double profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  673 |                 
  674 |                 if (profit != 0) {
  675 |                     MqlDateTime dt;
  676 |                     TimeToStruct(dealTime, dt);
  677 |                     
  678 |                     // Accumulate by hour
  679 |                     if (dt.hour >= 0 && dt.hour < 24) {
  680 |                         m_Data.ProfitByHour[dt.hour] += profit;
  681 |                         m_Data.TradesByHour[dt.hour]++;
  682 |                     }
  683 |                     
  684 |                     // Accumulate by day of week
  685 |                     if (dt.day_of_week >= 0 && dt.day_of_week < 7) {
  686 |                         m_Data.ProfitByDay[dt.day_of_week] += profit;
  687 |                         m_Data.TradesByDay[dt.day_of_week]++;
  688 |                     }
  689 |                     
  690 |                     // Accumulate by month
  691 |                     if (dt.mon >= 1 && dt.mon <= 12) {
  692 |                         m_Data.ProfitByMonth[dt.mon - 1] += profit;
  693 |                         m_Data.TradesByMonth[dt.mon - 1]++;
  694 |                     }
  695 |                 }
  696 |             }
  697 |         }
  698 |     }
  699 |     
  700 |     // Calculate additional metrics
  701 |     m_Data.TradingDays = 30; // Placeholder
  702 |     m_Data.AverageTradesPerDay = m_Data.TotalTrades / m_Data.TradingDays;
  703 |     m_Data.MaxConsecutiveWins = 5; // Placeholder
  704 |     m_Data.MaxConsecutiveLosses = 3; // Placeholder
  705 |     
  706 |     return true;
  707 | }
  708 | 
  709 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  710 | //| Generate HTML report                                           |
  711 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  712 | bool CReportGenerator::GenerateHTMLReport() {
  713 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return false;
  714 |     
  715 |     LogReportEvent("Generating HTML report...");
  716 |     
  717 |     // Find HTML template
  718 |     SReportTemplate template;
  719 |     bool templateFound = false;
  720 |     
  721 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_Templates); i++) {
  722 |         if (m_Templates[i].Format == REPORT_FORMAT_HTML) {
  723 |             template = m_Templates[i];
  724 |             templateFound = true;
  725 |             break;
  726 |         }
  727 |     }
  728 |     
  729 |     if (!templateFound) {
  730 |         LogReportEvent("HTML template not found", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  731 |         return false;
  732 |     }
  733 |     
  734 |     // Generate report content
  735 |     string content = "";
  736 |     content += ProcessTemplate(template.HeaderTemplate, m_Data);
  737 |     content += ProcessTemplate(template.SummaryTemplate, m_Data);
  738 |     
  739 |     if (m_Config.IncludePerformanceMetrics) {
  740 |         content += GeneratePerformanceSection();
  741 |     }
  742 |     
  743 |     if (m_Config.IncludeRiskAnalysis) {
  744 |         content += GenerateRiskSection();
  745 |     }
  746 |     
  747 |     if (m_Config.IncludeTradeDetails) {
  748 |         content += GenerateTradesSection();
  749 |     }
  750 |     
  751 |     if (m_Config.IncludeStatistics) {
  752 |         content += GenerateStatisticsSection();
  753 |     }
  754 |     
  755 |     content += ProcessTemplate(template.FooterTemplate, m_Data);
  756 |     
  757 |     // Generate output file path
  758 |     string fileName = StringFormat("APEX_Report_%s.html", 
  759 |                                   TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE | TIME_SECONDS));
  760 |     fileName = StringReplace(fileName, ":", "-");
  761 |     fileName = StringReplace(fileName, " ", "_");
  762 |     
  763 |     string filePath = m_Config.OutputPath + "\\" + fileName;
  764 |     
  765 |     // Export to file
  766 |     if (!ExportToFile(content, filePath)) {
  767 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to export HTML report", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  768 |         return false;
  769 |     }
  770 |     
  771 |     LogReportEvent("HTML report generated successfully: " + filePath);
  772 |     return true;
  773 | }
  774 | 
  775 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  776 | //| Process template with data                                     |
  777 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  778 | string CReportGenerator::ProcessTemplate(const string template, const SReportData& data) {
  779 |     string result = template;
  780 |     
  781 |     // Replace common variables
  782 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{TITLE}", m_Config.Title);
  783 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{DESCRIPTION}", m_Config.Description);
  784 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{GENERATION_TIME}", TimeToString(data.ReportGenerationTime));
  785 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{COMPANY}", m_Config.Company);
  786 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{AUTHOR}", m_Config.Author);
  787 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{VERSION}", m_Config.Version);
  788 |     
  789 |     // Replace performance variables
  790 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{NET_PROFIT}", FormatCurrency(data.NetProfit));
  791 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{TOTAL_TRADES}", IntegerToString(data.TotalTrades));
  792 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{WIN_RATE}", FormatNumber(data.WinRate, 1));
  793 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{PROFIT_FACTOR}", FormatNumber(data.ProfitFactor, 2));
  794 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{MAX_DRAWDOWN}", FormatNumber(data.MaxDrawdownPercent, 1));
  795 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{SHARPE_RATIO}", FormatNumber(data.SharpeRatio, 2));
  796 |     
  797 |     // Set profit class for styling
  798 |     string profitClass = data.NetProfit >= 0 ? "positive" : "negative";
  799 |     result = StringReplace(result, "{PROFIT_CLASS}", profitClass);
  800 |     
  801 |     return result;
  802 | }
  803 |

  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | //| Generate statistics section                                    |
  881 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  882 | string CReportGenerator::GenerateStatisticsSection() {
  883 |     string section = 
  884 |         "    <div class='section'>\n"
  885 |         "        <h2>Additional Statistics</h2>\n"
  886 |         "        <h3>Profit by Hour of Day</h3>\n"
  887 |         "        <table>\n"
  888 |         "            <tr><th>Hour</th><th>Profit</th><th>Trades</th></tr>\n";
  889 |     
  890 |     for (int i = 0; i < 24; i++) {
  891 |         section += "            <tr><td>" + IntegerToString(i) + ":00</td>"
  892 |                  + "<td class='" + (m_Data.ProfitByHour[i] >= 0 ? "positive" : "negative") + "'>" + FormatCurrency(m_Data.ProfitByHour[i]) + "</td>"
  893 |                  + "<td>" + IntegerToString(m_Data.TradesByHour[i]) + "</td></tr>\n";
  894 |     }
  895 |     
  896 |     section += "        </table>\n"
  897 |                "    </div>\n";
  898 |     
  899 |     return section;
  900 | }
  901 | 
  902 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  903 | //| Export content to file                                         |
  904 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  905 | bool CReportGenerator::ExportToFile(const string content, const string filePath) {
  906 |     // Create directory if it doesn't exist
  907 |     string directory = "";
  908 |     int lastSlash = StringFindRev(filePath, "\\");
  909 |     if (lastSlash >= 0) {
  910 |         directory = StringSubstr(filePath, 0, lastSlash);
  911 |         CreateOutputDirectory(directory);
  912 |     }
  913 |     
  914 |     // Open file for writing
  915 |     m_FileHandle = FileOpen(filePath, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_ANSI);
  916 |     if (m_FileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  917 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to create file: " + filePath, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  918 |         return false;
  919 |     }
  920 |     
  921 |     // Write content
  922 |     if (FileWriteString(m_FileHandle, content) == 0) {
  923 |         LogReportEvent("Failed to write to file: " + filePath, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  924 |         FileClose(m_FileHandle);
  925 |         m_FileHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  926 |         return false;
  927 |     }
  928 |     
  929 |     // Close file
  930 |     FileClose(m_FileHandle);
  931 |     m_FileHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  932 |     
  933 |     return true;
  934 | }
  935 | 
  936 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  937 | //| Create output directory                                        |
  938 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  939 | bool CReportGenerator::CreateOutputDirectory(const string path) {
  940 |     if (!FolderCreate(path, FILE_COMMON)) {
  941 |         int error = GetLastError();
  942 |         if (error != ERR_FILE_ALREADY_EXISTS) {
  943 |             LogReportEvent("Failed to create directory: " + path + ", Error: " + IntegerToString(error), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  944 |             return false;
  945 |         }
  946 |     }
  947 |     return true;
  948 | }
  949 | 
  950 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  951 | //| Generate report                                                |
  952 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  953 | bool CReportGenerator::GenerateReport(const ENUM_REPORT_TYPE type, const ENUM_REPORT_FORMAT format) {
  954 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  955 |         LogReportEvent("Report Generator not initialized", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  956 |         return false;
  957 |     }
  958 |     
  959 |     m_bGenerating = true;
  960 |     
  961 |     // Set report type and format
  962 |     m_Config.Type = type;
  963 |     m_Config.Format = format;
  964 |     
  965 |     // Collect data
  966 |     datetime startDate = m_Config.StartDate > 0 ? m_Config.StartDate : TimeCurrent() - 30 * 24 * 3600; // Last 30 days
  967 |     datetime endDate = m_Config.EndDate > 0 ? m_Config.EndDate : TimeCurrent();
  968 |     
  969 |     if (!CollectData(startDate, endDate)) {
  970 |         m_bGenerating = false;
  971 |         return false;
  972 |     }
  973 |     
  974 |     // Generate report based on format
  975 |     bool result = false;
  976 |     switch(format) {
  977 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_HTML:
  978 |         result = GenerateHTMLReport();
  979 |         break;
  980 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_CSV:
  981 |         result = GenerateCSVReport();
  982 |         break;
  983 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_JSON:
  984 |         result = GenerateJSONReport();
  985 |         break;
  986 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_XML:
  987 |         result = GenerateXMLReport();
  988 |         break;
  989 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_TXT:
  990 |         result = GenerateTextReport();
  991 |         break;
  992 |     default:
  993 |         LogReportEvent("Unsupported report format: " + IntegerToString(format), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  994 |         break;
  995 |     }
  996 |     
  997 |     if (result) {
  998 |         UpdateStatistics();
  999 |         LogReportEvent("Report generated successfully");
 1000 |     }
 1001 |     
 1002 |     m_bGenerating = false;
 1003 |     return result;
 1004 | }

 1039 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1040 | //| Update statistics                                              |
 1041 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1042 | void CReportGenerator::UpdateStatistics() {
 1043 |     m_Stats.TotalReportsGenerated++;
 1044 |     m_Stats.ReportsGeneratedToday++;
 1045 |     m_Stats.ReportsGeneratedThisWeek++;
 1046 |     m_Stats.ReportsGeneratedThisMonth++;
 1047 |     m_Stats.LastReportGenerated = TimeCurrent();
 1048 |     
 1049 |     // Update most used format
 1050 |     switch(m_Config.Format) {
 1051 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_HTML:
 1052 |         m_Stats.MostUsedFormat = "HTML";
 1053 |         break;
 1054 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_CSV:
 1055 |         m_Stats.MostUsedFormat = "CSV";
 1056 |         break;
 1057 |     case REPORT_FORMAT_JSON:
 1058 |         m_Stats.MostUsedFormat = "JSON";
 1059 |         break;
 1060 |     default:
 1061 |         m_Stats.MostUsedFormat = "Unknown";
 1062 |         break;
 1063 |     }
 1064 | }

 1087 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1088 | //| Log report event                                               |
 1089 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1090 | void CReportGenerator::LogReportEvent(const string event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
 1091 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1092 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("[REPORT] " + event);
 1093 |     } else {
 1094 |         Print("[REPORT] " + event);
 1095 |     }
 1096 | }

  177 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  178 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  179 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  180 | CRiskAnalyzer::CRiskAnalyzer() {
  181 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  182 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  183 |     m_bRealTimeMonitoring = true;
  184 |     m_iEventCount = 0;
  185 |     m_iHistoryCount = 0;
  186 |     
  187 |     // Default risk parameters
  188 |     m_dMaxPortfolioRisk = 20.0; // 20% max portfolio risk
  189 |     m_dMaxTradeRisk = 2.0;      // 2% max risk per trade
  190 |     m_dVaRConfidence95 = 0.95;
  191 |     m_dVaRConfidence99 = 0.99;
  192 |     m_iLookbackPeriod = 252;    // 1 year of trading days
  193 |     
  194 |     // Initialize metrics
  195 |     ZeroMemory(m_Metrics);
  196 |     m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel = RISK_LEVEL_LOW;
  197 |     m_Metrics.LastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  198 |     
  199 |     m_dLastEquity = 0.0;
  200 |     m_dEquityPeak = 0.0;
  201 |     m_DrawdownStartTime = 0;
  202 |     m_bInDrawdown = false;
  203 | }
  204 | 
  205 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  206 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  207 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  208 | CRiskAnalyzer::~CRiskAnalyzer() {
  209 |     Deinitialize();
  210 | }
  211 | 
  212 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  213 | //| Initialize risk analyzer                                        |
  214 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  215 | bool CRiskAnalyzer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  216 |     if (context == NULL) {
  217 |         Print("[RISK ANALYZER ERROR] Context is NULL");
  218 |         return false;
  219 |     }
  220 |     
  221 |     m_pContext = context;
  222 |     
  223 |     // Set report path
  224 |     m_sReportPath = "Reports\\Risk\\";
  225 |     
  226 |     // Initialize arrays
  227 |     ArrayResize(m_RiskEvents, 1000);
  228 |     ArrayResize(m_dEquityHistory, m_iLookbackPeriod);
  229 |     ArrayResize(m_dReturnsHistory, m_iLookbackPeriod);
  230 |     ArrayResize(m_EquityTimes, m_iLookbackPeriod);
  231 |     ArrayResize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings, 10);
  232 |     
  233 |     // Get initial equity
  234 |     m_dLastEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  235 |     m_dEquityPeak = m_dLastEquity;
  236 |     
  237 |     // Reset metrics
  238 |     Reset();
  239 |     
  240 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  241 |     
  242 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  243 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("RiskAnalyzer initialized successfully", __FUNCTION__);
  244 |     }
  245 |     
  246 |     return true;
  247 | }
  248 | 
  249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  250 | //| Deinitialize risk analyzer                                      |
  251 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  252 | void CRiskAnalyzer::Deinitialize() {
  253 |     if (m_bInitialized && m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  254 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(GetRiskReport(), __FUNCTION__);
  255 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("RiskAnalyzer deinitialized", __FUNCTION__);
  256 |     }
  257 |     
  258 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  259 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  260 | }
  261 | 
  262 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  263 | //| Reset all risk metrics                                         |
  264 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  265 | void CRiskAnalyzer::Reset() {
  266 |     ZeroMemory(m_Metrics);
  267 |     m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel = RISK_LEVEL_LOW;
  268 |     m_Metrics.LastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  269 |     
  270 |     m_iEventCount = 0;
  271 |     m_iHistoryCount = 0;
  272 |     
  273 |     ArrayResize(m_RiskEvents, 0);
  274 |     ArrayResize(m_dEquityHistory, 0);
  275 |     ArrayResize(m_dReturnsHistory, 0);
  276 |     ArrayResize(m_EquityTimes, 0);
  277 |     ArrayResize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings, 0);
  278 |     
  279 |     m_dLastEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  280 |     m_dEquityPeak = m_dLastEquity;
  281 |     m_DrawdownStartTime = 0;
  282 |     m_bInDrawdown = false;
  283 |     
  284 |     if (m_bInitialized && m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  285 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("RiskAnalyzer reset completed", __FUNCTION__);
  286 |     }
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | //| Update risk metrics                                            |
  291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  292 | void CRiskAnalyzer::UpdateRiskMetrics(const double currentEquity) {
  293 |     if (!m_bInitialized) return;
  294 |     
  295 |     // Update equity history
  296 |     UpdateEquityHistory(currentEquity);
  297 |     
  298 |     // Monitor drawdown
  299 |     MonitorDrawdown(currentEquity);
  300 |     
  301 |     // Calculate risk metrics
  302 |     CalculateBasicRiskMetrics();
  303 |     CalculateAdvancedRiskMetrics();
  304 |     CalculateRiskRatios();
  305 |     
  306 |     // Assess risk level
  307 |     m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel = AssessRiskLevel();
  308 |     
  309 |     // Update warnings
  310 |     UpdateRiskWarnings();
  311 |     
  312 |     // Check risk limits
  313 |     CheckRiskLimits();
  314 |     
  315 |     m_Metrics.LastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  316 |     m_dLastEquity = currentEquity;
  317 | }
  318 | 
  319 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  320 | //| Monitor drawdown                                               |
  321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 | void CRiskAnalyzer::MonitorDrawdown(const double currentEquity) {
  323 |     // Update equity peak
  324 |     if (currentEquity > m_dEquityPeak) {
  325 |         m_dEquityPeak = currentEquity;
  326 |         
  327 |         // End drawdown period if we were in one
  328 |         if (m_bInDrawdown) {
  329 |             m_bInDrawdown = false;
  330 |             double durationHours = (double)(TimeCurrent() - m_DrawdownStartTime) / 3600.0;
  331 |             LogRiskAnalysisEvent(StringFormat("Drawdown recovery completed. Duration: %.1f hours", durationHours));
  332 |         }
  333 |     }
  334 |     
  335 |     // Calculate current drawdown
  336 |     m_Metrics.CurrentDrawdown = m_dEquityPeak - currentEquity;
  337 |     
  338 |     // Check if entering drawdown
  339 |     if (!m_bInDrawdown && m_Metrics.CurrentDrawdown > 0) {
  340 |         m_bInDrawdown = true;
  341 |         m_DrawdownStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  342 |         LogRiskAnalysisEvent("Drawdown period started", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  343 |     }
  344 |     
  345 |     // Update max drawdown
  346 |     if (m_Metrics.CurrentDrawdown > m_Metrics.MaxDrawdown) {
  347 |         m_Metrics.MaxDrawdown = m_Metrics.CurrentDrawdown;
  348 |         if (m_dEquityPeak > 0) {
  349 |             m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent = (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdown / m_dEquityPeak) * 100.0;
  350 |         }
  351 |         
  352 |         // Log significant drawdown
  353 |         if (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 10.0) {
  354 |             LogRiskEvent(RISK_LEVEL_HIGH, "Significant drawdown detected", 
  355 |                         m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent, 10.0, "Monitor closely");
  356 |         }
  357 |     }
  358 |     
  359 |     // Update drawdown duration
  360 |     if (m_bInDrawdown) {
  361 |         m_Metrics.DrawdownDuration = (double)(TimeCurrent() - m_DrawdownStartTime) / 3600.0; // in hours
  362 |     }
  363 | }
  364 | 
  365 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  366 | //| Calculate basic risk metrics                                   |
  367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  368 | void CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateBasicRiskMetrics() {
  369 |     if (m_iHistoryCount < 2) return;
  370 |     
  371 |     // Calculate returns
  372 |     CalculateReturns();
  373 |     
  374 |     // Portfolio risk (current drawdown as % of peak)
  375 |     m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk = (m_dEquityPeak > 0) ? 
  376 |                              (m_Metrics.CurrentDrawdown / m_dEquityPeak) * 100.0 : 0.0;
  377 |     
  378 |     // Update max portfolio risk
  379 |     if (m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk > m_Metrics.MaxPortfolioRisk) {
  380 |         m_Metrics.MaxPortfolioRisk = m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk;
  381 |     }
  382 |     
  383 |     // Equity volatility
  384 |     m_Metrics.EquityVolatility = CalculateStandardDeviation(m_dEquityHistory, m_iHistoryCount);
  385 |     
  386 |     // Returns volatility
  387 |     if (ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory) > 1) {
  388 |         m_Metrics.ReturnsVolatility = CalculateStandardDeviation(m_dReturnsHistory, ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory));
  389 |     }
  390 |     
  391 |     // VaR calculations
  392 |     m_Metrics.VaR95 = CalculateVaR(m_dVaRConfidence95);
  393 |     m_Metrics.VaR99 = CalculateVaR(m_dVaRConfidence99);
  394 |     
  395 |     // CVaR calculations
  396 |     m_Metrics.CVaR95 = CalculateCVaR(m_dVaRConfidence95);
  397 |     m_Metrics.CVaR99 = CalculateCVaR(m_dVaRConfidence99);
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  401 | //| Calculate Value at Risk                                        |
  402 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  403 | double CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateVaR(const double confidence) {
  404 |     if (ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory) < 10) return 0.0;
  405 |     
  406 |     // Sort returns for percentile calculation
  407 |     double sortedReturns[];
  408 |     ArrayCopy(sortedReturns, m_dReturnsHistory);
  409 |     ArraySort(sortedReturns);
  410 |     
  411 |     int size = ArraySize(sortedReturns);
  412 |     int index = (int)((1.0 - confidence) * size);
  413 |     
  414 |     if (index >= 0 && index < size) {
  415 |         return MathAbs(sortedReturns[index]);
  416 |     }
  417 |     
  418 |     return 0.0;
  419 | }
  420 | 
  421 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  422 | //| Calculate Conditional Value at Risk                            |
  423 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  424 | double CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateCVaR(const double confidence) {
  425 |     if (ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory) < 10) return 0.0;
  426 |     
  427 |     // Sort returns for percentile calculation
  428 |     double sortedReturns[];
  429 |     ArrayCopy(sortedReturns, m_dReturnsHistory);
  430 |     ArraySort(sortedReturns);
  431 |     
  432 |     int size = ArraySize(sortedReturns);
  433 |     int cutoffIndex = (int)((1.0 - confidence) * size);
  434 |     
  435 |     if (cutoffIndex <= 0) return 0.0;
  436 |     
  437 |     // Calculate average of worst returns
  438 |     double sum = 0.0;
  439 |     for (int i = 0; i < cutoffIndex; i++) {
  440 |         sum += sortedReturns[i];
  441 |     }
  442 |     
  443 |     return MathAbs(sum / cutoffIndex);
  444 | }
  445 | 
  446 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  447 | //| Calculate risk ratios                                          |
  448 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  449 | void CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateRiskRatios() {
  450 |     if (m_iHistoryCount < 10) return;
  451 |     
  452 |     // Sharpe Ratio
  453 |     m_Metrics.SharpeRatio = CalculateSharpeRatio();
  454 |     
  455 |     // Sortino Ratio
  456 |     m_Metrics.SortinoRatio = CalculateSortinoRatio();
  457 |     
  458 |     // Calmar Ratio
  459 |     if (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdown > 0) {
  460 |         double annualReturn = 0.0; // Calculate from equity history
  461 |         if (m_iHistoryCount > 1) {
  462 |             double totalReturn = (m_dEquityHistory[m_iHistoryCount-1] / m_dEquityHistory[0]) - 1.0;
  463 |             annualReturn = totalReturn * 252.0 / m_iHistoryCount; // Annualized
  464 |         }
  465 |         m_Metrics.CalmarRatio = annualReturn / (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdown / m_dEquityHistory[0] * 100.0);
  466 |     }
  467 | }
  468 | 
  469 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  470 | //| Calculate Sharpe ratio                                         |
  471 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  472 | double CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateSharpeRatio() {
  473 |     if (ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory) < 2) return 0.0;
  474 |     
  475 |     // Calculate average return
  476 |     double avgReturn = 0.0;
  477 |     int count = ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory);
  478 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  479 |         avgReturn += m_dReturnsHistory[i];
  480 |     }
  481 |     avgReturn /= count;
  482 |     
  483 |     // Calculate standard deviation
  484 |     double stdDev = CalculateStandardDeviation(m_dReturnsHistory, count);
  485 |     
  486 |     // Sharpe ratio (assuming risk-free rate = 0)
  487 |     return (stdDev > 0) ? (avgReturn / stdDev) : 0.0;
  488 | }
  489 | 
  490 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  491 | //| Calculate Sortino ratio                                        |
  492 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  493 | double CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateSortinoRatio() {
  494 |     if (ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory) < 2) return 0.0;
  495 |     
  496 |     // Calculate average return
  497 |     double avgReturn = 0.0;
  498 |     int count = ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory);
  499 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  500 |         avgReturn += m_dReturnsHistory[i];
  501 |     }
  502 |     avgReturn /= count;
  503 |     
  504 |     // Calculate downside deviation
  505 |     double downsideDev = CalculateDownsideDeviation();
  506 |     
  507 |     // Sortino ratio
  508 |     return (downsideDev > 0) ? (avgReturn / downsideDev) : 0.0;
  509 | }
  510 | 
  511 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  512 | //| Calculate downside deviation                                   |
  513 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  514 | double CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateDownsideDeviation() const {
  515 |     if (ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory) < 2) return 0.0;
  516 |     
  517 |     double sumSquaredDownsideDeviations = 0.0;
  518 |     int downsideCount = 0;
  519 |     
  520 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_dReturnsHistory); i++) {
  521 |         if (m_dReturnsHistory[i] < 0) {
  522 |             sumSquaredDownsideDeviations += m_dReturnsHistory[i] * m_dReturnsHistory[i];
  523 |             downsideCount++;
  524 |         }
  525 |     }
  526 |     
  527 |     return (downsideCount > 0) ? MathSqrt(sumSquaredDownsideDeviations / downsideCount) : 0.0;
  528 | }
  529 | 
  530 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  531 | //| Update equity history                                          |
  532 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  533 | void CRiskAnalyzer::UpdateEquityHistory(const double equity) {
  534 |     // Resize arrays if needed
  535 |     if (m_iHistoryCount >= ArraySize(m_dEquityHistory)) {
  536 |         // Shift array left to make room
  537 |         for (int i = 1; i < ArraySize(m_dEquityHistory); i++) {
  538 |             m_dEquityHistory[i-1] = m_dEquityHistory[i];
  539 |             m_EquityTimes[i-1] = m_EquityTimes[i];
  540 |         }
  541 |         m_iHistoryCount = ArraySize(m_dEquityHistory) - 1;
  542 |     }
  543 |     
  544 |     // Add new equity point
  545 |     m_dEquityHistory[m_iHistoryCount] = equity;
  546 |     m_EquityTimes[m_iHistoryCount] = TimeCurrent();
  547 |     m_iHistoryCount++;
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  551 | //| Calculate returns from equity history                          |
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | void CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateReturns() {
  554 |     if (m_iHistoryCount < 2) return;
  555 |     
  556 |     ArrayResize(m_dReturnsHistory, m_iHistoryCount - 1);
  557 |     
  558 |     for (int i = 1; i < m_iHistoryCount; i++) {
  559 |         if (m_dEquityHistory[i-1] > 0) {
  560 |             m_dReturnsHistory[i-1] = (m_dEquityHistory[i] / m_dEquityHistory[i-1]) - 1.0;
  561 |         } else {
  562 |             m_dReturnsHistory[i-1] = 0.0;
  563 |         }
  564 |     }
  565 | }
  566 | 
  567 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  568 | //| Calculate standard deviation                                    |
  569 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  570 | double CRiskAnalyzer::CalculateStandardDeviation(const double &data[], const int count) const {
  571 |     if (count < 2) return 0.0;
  572 |     
  573 |     // Calculate mean
  574 |     double mean = 0.0;
  575 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  576 |         mean += data[i];
  577 |     }
  578 |     mean /= count;
  579 |     
  580 |     // Calculate variance
  581 |     double variance = 0.0;
  582 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  583 |         double diff = data[i] - mean;
  584 |         variance += diff * diff;
  585 |     }
  586 |     variance /= (count - 1);
  587 |     
  588 |     return MathSqrt(variance);
  589 | }
  590 | 
  591 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  592 | //| Assess current risk level                                      |
  593 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  594 | ENUM_RISK_LEVEL CRiskAnalyzer::AssessRiskLevel() const {
  595 |     double riskScore = 0.0;
  596 |     
  597 |     // Drawdown component
  598 |     if (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 20.0) riskScore += 40;
  599 |     else if (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 10.0) riskScore += 20;
  600 |     else if (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 5.0) riskScore += 10;
  601 |     
  602 |     // VaR component
  603 |     if (m_Metrics.VaR95 > 5.0) riskScore += 30;
  604 |     else if (m_Metrics.VaR95 > 3.0) riskScore += 15;
  605 |     else if (m_Metrics.VaR95 > 1.0) riskScore += 5;
  606 |     
  607 |     // Volatility component
  608 |     if (m_Metrics.ReturnsVolatility > 0.05) riskScore += 20;
  609 |     else if (m_Metrics.ReturnsVolatility > 0.03) riskScore += 10;
  610 |     else if (m_Metrics.ReturnsVolatility > 0.01) riskScore += 5;
  611 |     
  612 |     // Sharpe ratio component (inverted)
  613 |     if (m_Metrics.SharpeRatio < 0) riskScore += 10;
  614 |     else if (m_Metrics.SharpeRatio < 0.5) riskScore += 5;
  615 |     
  616 |     // Determine risk level
  617 |     if (riskScore >= 70) return RISK_LEVEL_CRITICAL;
  618 |     if (riskScore >= 50) return RISK_LEVEL_HIGH;
  619 |     if (riskScore >= 30) return RISK_LEVEL_MEDIUM;
  620 |     if (riskScore >= 10) return RISK_LEVEL_LOW;
  621 |     
  622 |     return RISK_LEVEL_VERY_LOW;
  623 | }
  624 | 
  625 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  626 | //| Check risk limits                                              |
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | void CRiskAnalyzer::CheckRiskLimits() {
  629 |     m_Metrics.RiskLimitBreached = false;
  630 |     
  631 |     // Check portfolio risk limit
  632 |     if (m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk > m_dMaxPortfolioRisk) {
  633 |         m_Metrics.RiskLimitBreached = true;
  634 |         LogRiskEvent(RISK_LEVEL_CRITICAL, "Portfolio risk limit breached", 
  635 |                     m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk, m_dMaxPortfolioRisk, "Reduce position sizes");
  636 |     }
  637 |     
  638 |     // Check drawdown limit
  639 |     if (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 15.0) {
  640 |         LogRiskEvent(RISK_LEVEL_HIGH, "Excessive drawdown detected", 
  641 |                     m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent, 15.0, "Review strategy");
  642 |     }
  643 |     
  644 |     // Check VaR limit
  645 |     if (m_Metrics.VaR95 > 3.0) {
  646 |         LogRiskEvent(RISK_LEVEL_MEDIUM, "High VaR detected", 
  647 |                     m_Metrics.VaR95, 3.0, "Monitor positions");
  648 |     }
  649 | }
  650 | 
  651 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  652 | //| Log risk event                                                 |
  653 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  654 | void CRiskAnalyzer::LogRiskEvent(const ENUM_RISK_LEVEL level, const string description, 
  655 |                                 const double value, const double threshold, const string action = "") {
  656 |     // Resize array if needed
  657 |     if (m_iEventCount >= ArraySize(m_RiskEvents)) {
  658 |         ArrayResize(m_RiskEvents, ArraySize(m_RiskEvents) + 100);
  659 |     }
  660 |     
  661 |     // Create risk event
  662 |     SRiskEvent event;
  663 |     event.Time = TimeCurrent();
  664 |     event.Level = level;
  665 |     event.Description = description;
  666 |     event.Value = value;
  667 |     event.Threshold = threshold;
  668 |     event.Action = action;
  669 |     
  670 |     m_RiskEvents[m_iEventCount] = event;
  671 |     m_iEventCount++;
  672 |     
  673 |     // Update counters
  674 |     m_Metrics.RiskEvents++;
  675 |     if (level >= RISK_LEVEL_HIGH) {
  676 |         m_Metrics.CriticalRiskEvents++;
  677 |     }
  678 |     m_Metrics.LastRiskEvent = TimeCurrent();
  679 |     
  680 |     // Log to system
  681 |     ENUM_LOG_LEVEL logLevel = LOG_LEVEL_INFO;
  682 |     if (level >= RISK_LEVEL_HIGH) logLevel = LOG_LEVEL_ERROR;
  683 |     else if (level >= RISK_LEVEL_MEDIUM) logLevel = LOG_LEVEL_WARNING;
  684 |     
  685 |     string logMessage = StringFormat("RISK EVENT [%s]: %s (Value: %.2f, Threshold: %.2f)", 
  686 |                                     EnumToString(level), description, value, threshold);
  687 |     if (action != "") {
  688 |         logMessage += " - Action: " + action;
  689 |     }
  690 |     
  691 |     LogRiskAnalysisEvent(logMessage, logLevel);
  692 | }
  693 | 
  694 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  695 | //| Get risk report                                                |
  696 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  697 | string CRiskAnalyzer::GetRiskReport() const {
  698 |     string report = "\n=== RISK ANALYSIS REPORT ===\n";
  699 |     report += StringFormat("Risk Level: %s\n", EnumToString(m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel));
  700 |     report += StringFormat("Portfolio Risk: %.2f%% (Max: %.2f%%)\n", 
  701 |                           m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk, m_Metrics.MaxPortfolioRisk);
  702 |     report += StringFormat("Current Drawdown: %s (%.2f%%)\n", 
  703 |                           FormatRiskValue(m_Metrics.CurrentDrawdown), 
  704 |                           (m_dEquityPeak > 0) ? (m_Metrics.CurrentDrawdown / m_dEquityPeak * 100.0) : 0.0);
  705 |     report += StringFormat("Max Drawdown: %s (%.2f%%)\n", 
  706 |                           FormatRiskValue(m_Metrics.MaxDrawdown), m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent);
  707 |     report += StringFormat("VaR (95%%): %.2f%%\n", m_Metrics.VaR95);
  708 |     report += StringFormat("VaR (99%%): %.2f%%\n", m_Metrics.VaR99);
  709 |     report += StringFormat("Sharpe Ratio: %.2f\n", m_Metrics.SharpeRatio);
  710 |     report += StringFormat("Sortino Ratio: %.2f\n", m_Metrics.SortinoRatio);
  711 |     report += StringFormat("Risk Events: %d (Critical: %d)\n", 
  712 |                           m_Metrics.RiskEvents, m_Metrics.CriticalRiskEvents);
  713 |     
  714 |     if (m_Metrics.RiskLimitBreached) {
  715 |         report += "\n*** RISK LIMIT BREACHED ***\n";
  716 |     }
  717 |     
  718 |     report += "===========================\n";
  719 |     
  720 |     return report;
  721 | }
  722 | 
  723 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  724 | //| Get risk recommendations                                       |
  725 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  726 | string CRiskAnalyzer::GetRiskRecommendations() const {
  727 |     string recommendations = "";
  728 |     
  729 |     switch(m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel) {
  730 |     case RISK_LEVEL_CRITICAL:
  731 |         recommendations = "CRITICAL: Stop trading immediately. Review all positions. Reduce leverage significantly.";
  732 |         break;
  733 |     case RISK_LEVEL_HIGH:
  734 |         recommendations = "HIGH RISK: Reduce position sizes by 50%. Close losing positions. Avoid new trades.";
  735 |         break;
  736 |     case RISK_LEVEL_MEDIUM:
  737 |         recommendations = "MEDIUM RISK: Reduce position sizes by 25%. Monitor closely. Consider tighter stops.";
  738 |         break;
  739 |     case RISK_LEVEL_LOW:
  740 |         recommendations = "LOW RISK: Normal trading. Monitor risk metrics regularly.";
  741 |         break;
  742 |     default:
  743 |         recommendations = "VERY LOW RISK: Normal trading conditions. Consider increasing position sizes if appropriate.";
  744 |         break;
  745 |     }
  746 |     
  747 |     return recommendations;
  748 | }
  749 | 
  750 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  751 | //| Should reduce risk                                             |
  752 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  753 | bool CRiskAnalyzer::ShouldReduceRisk() const {
  754 |     return (m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel >= RISK_LEVEL_MEDIUM || 
  755 |             m_Metrics.RiskLimitBreached ||
  756 |             m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 10.0);
  757 | }
  758 | 
  759 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  760 | //| Should stop trading                                            |
  761 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  762 | bool CRiskAnalyzer::ShouldStopTrading() const {
  763 |     return (m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel >= RISK_LEVEL_CRITICAL || 
  764 |             m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 20.0 ||
  765 |             m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk > m_dMaxPortfolioRisk);
  766 | }
  767 | 
  768 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  769 | //| Format risk value                                              |
  770 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  771 | string CRiskAnalyzer::FormatRiskValue(const double value) const {
  772 |     return StringFormat("%.2f %s", value, AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_CURRENCY));
  773 | }
  774 | 
  775 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  776 | //| Format percentage value                                        |
  777 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  778 | string CRiskAnalyzer::FormatPercentage(const double value) const {
  779 |     return StringFormat("%.2f%%", value);
  780 | }
  781 | 
  782 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  783 | //| Log risk analysis event                                        |
  784 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  785 | void CRiskAnalyzer::LogRiskAnalysisEvent(const string event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
  786 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
  787 |         switch(level) {
  788 |         case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:
  789 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(event, __FUNCTION__);
  790 |             break;
  791 |         case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING:
  792 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(event, __FUNCTION__);
  793 |             break;
  794 |         default:
  795 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(event, __FUNCTION__);
  796 |             break;
  797 |         }
  798 |     }
  799 | }
  800 | 
  801 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  802 | //| Update risk warnings                                           |
  803 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  804 | void CRiskAnalyzer::UpdateRiskWarnings() {
  805 |     ArrayResize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings, 0);
  806 |     
  807 |     if (m_Metrics.MaxDrawdownPercent > 15.0) {
  808 |         ArrayResize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings, ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) + 1);
  809 |         m_Metrics.RiskWarnings[ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) - 1] = "Excessive drawdown detected";
  810 |     }
  811 |     
  812 |     if (m_Metrics.VaR95 > 3.0) {
  813 |         ArrayResize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings, ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) + 1);
  814 |         m_Metrics.RiskWarnings[ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) - 1] = "High Value at Risk";
  815 |     }
  816 |     
  817 |     if (m_Metrics.SharpeRatio < 0) {
  818 |         ArrayResize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings, ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) + 1);
  819 |         m_Metrics.RiskWarnings[ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) - 1] = "Negative risk-adjusted returns";
  820 |     }
  821 |     
  822 |     if (m_Metrics.PortfolioRisk > m_dMaxPortfolioRisk * 0.8) {
  823 |         ArrayResize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings, ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) + 1);
  824 |         m_Metrics.RiskWarnings[ArraySize(m_Metrics.RiskWarnings) - 1] = "Approaching portfolio risk limit";
  825 |     }
  826 | }
  827 | 
  828 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  829 | //| Get recommended position size                                  |
  830 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  831 | double CRiskAnalyzer::GetRecommendedPositionSize(const double stopLoss) const {
  832 |     if (stopLoss <= 0 || m_dLastEquity <= 0) return 0.0;
  833 |     
  834 |     // Base risk per trade
  835 |     double baseRiskPercent = m_dMaxTradeRisk;
  836 |     
  837 |     // Adjust based on current risk level
  838 |     switch(m_Metrics.CurrentRiskLevel) {
  839 |     case RISK_LEVEL_CRITICAL:
  840 |         return 0.0; // No new positions
  841 |     case RISK_LEVEL_HIGH:
  842 |         baseRiskPercent *= 0.25; // 25% of normal
  843 |         break;
  844 |     case RISK_LEVEL_MEDIUM:
  845 |         baseRiskPercent *= 0.5; // 50% of normal
  846 |         break;
  847 |     case RISK_LEVEL_LOW:
  848 |         baseRiskPercent *= 0.75; // 75% of normal
  849 |         break;
  850 |     default:
  851 |         // Normal risk
  852 |         break;
  853 |     }
  854 |     
  855 |     // Calculate position size
  856 |     double riskAmount = m_dLastEquity * (baseRiskPercent / 100.0);
  857 |     double positionSize = riskAmount / stopLoss;
  858 |     
  859 |     return positionSize;
  860 | }
================================================================================

  350 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  351 | //| Initialize UI Manager                                          |
  352 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  353 | bool CUIManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  354 |     if (context == NULL) {
  355 |         Print("[UI MANAGER ERROR] Context is NULL");
  356 |         return false;
  357 |     }
  358 |     
  359 |     m_pContext = context;
  360 |     
  361 |     // Initialize theme
  362 |     InitializeTheme();
  363 |     
  364 |     // Create main dialog
  365 |     m_pMainDialog = new CAppDialog();
  366 |     if (m_pMainDialog == NULL) {
  367 |         LogUIEvent("Failed to create main dialog", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  368 |         return false;
  369 |     }
  370 |     
  371 |     // Create default layout
  372 |     CreateDefaultLayout();
  373 |     
  374 |     // Initialize event queue
  375 |     ArrayResize(m_EventQueue, 0);
  376 |     
  377 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  378 |     LogUIEvent("UI Manager initialized successfully");
  379 |     
  380 |     return true;
  381 | }
  382 | 
  383 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  384 | //| Deinitialize UI Manager                                       |
  385 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  386 | void CUIManager::Deinitialize() {
  387 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  388 |         Hide();
  389 |         
  390 |         // Clean up controls
  391 |         for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_pPanels); i++) {
  392 |             if (m_pPanels[i] != NULL) {
  393 |                 delete m_pPanels[i];
  394 |                 m_pPanels[i] = NULL;
  395 |             }
  396 |         }
  397 |         
  398 |         for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_pLabels); i++) {
  399 |             if (m_pLabels[i] != NULL) {
  400 |                 delete m_pLabels[i];
  401 |                 m_pLabels[i] = NULL;
  402 |             }
  403 |         }
  404 |         
  405 |         for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_pButtons); i++) {
  406 |             if (m_pButtons[i] != NULL) {
  407 |                 delete m_pButtons[i];
  408 |                 m_pButtons[i] = NULL;
  409 |             }
  410 |         }
  411 |         
  412 |         // Clean up main dialog
  413 |         if (m_pMainDialog != NULL) {
  414 |             delete m_pMainDialog;
  415 |             m_pMainDialog = NULL;
  416 |         }
  417 |         
  418 |         LogUIEvent("UI Manager deinitialized");
  419 |     }
  420 |     
  421 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  422 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  423 | }
  424 | 
  425 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  426 | //| Initialize color scheme                                        |
  427 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  428 | void CUIManager::InitializeColorScheme() {
  429 |     // Dark theme colors
  430 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BackgroundColor = C'30,30,30';
  431 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.PanelColor = C'45,45,45';
  432 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BorderColor = C'70,70,70';
  433 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.TextColor = C'220,220,220';
  434 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ButtonColor = C'60,60,60';
  435 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ButtonHoverColor = C'80,80,80';
  436 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ButtonActiveColor = C'100,100,100';
  437 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.SuccessColor = C'0,150,0';
  438 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.WarningColor = C'255,165,0';
  439 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ErrorColor = C'220,20,20';
  440 |     m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.InfoColor = C'70,130,180';
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  444 | //| Initialize theme                                               |
  445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  446 | void CUIManager::InitializeTheme() {
  447 |     switch(m_LayoutConfig.Theme) {
  448 |     case UI_THEME_LIGHT:
  449 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BackgroundColor = C'240,240,240';
  450 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.PanelColor = C'255,255,255';
  451 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BorderColor = C'200,200,200';
  452 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.TextColor = C'50,50,50';
  453 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ButtonColor = C'230,230,230';
  454 |         break;
  455 |     case UI_THEME_BLUE:
  456 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BackgroundColor = C'25,25,50';
  457 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.PanelColor = C'40,40,80';
  458 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BorderColor = C'70,70,120';
  459 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.TextColor = C'200,200,255';
  460 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ButtonColor = C'60,60,120';
  461 |         break;
  462 |     case UI_THEME_GREEN:
  463 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BackgroundColor = C'25,50,25';
  464 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.PanelColor = C'40,80,40';
  465 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BorderColor = C'70,120,70';
  466 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.TextColor = C'200,255,200';
  467 |         m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ButtonColor = C'60,120,60';
  468 |         break;
  469 |     default: // UI_THEME_DARK
  470 |         InitializeColorScheme();
  471 |         break;
  472 |     }
  473 | }
  474 | 
  475 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  476 | //| Create default layout                                          |
  477 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  478 | void CUIManager::CreateDefaultLayout() {
  479 |     // Create main panels
  480 |     CreateMainPanel();
  481 |     CreateTradingPanel();
  482 |     CreateRiskPanel();
  483 |     CreateAnalyticsPanel();
  484 |     CreateSettingsPanel();
  485 |     CreateLogsPanel();
  486 |     CreateAlertsPanel();
  487 | }

  489 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 | //| Create main panel                                              |
  491 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  492 | bool CUIManager::CreateMainPanel() {
  493 |     SUIPanelConfig config;
  494 |     ZeroMemory(config);
  495 |     
  496 |     config.Name = "MainPanel";
  497 |     config.Type = UI_PANEL_MAIN;
  498 |     config.X = 10;
  499 |     config.Y = 30;
  500 |     config.Width = 300;
  501 |     config.Height = 200;
  502 |     config.Title = "APEX EA Control Panel";
  503 |     config.Visible = true;
  504 |     config.Resizable = true;
  505 |     config.Movable = true;
  506 |     config.Minimizable = true;
  507 |     
  508 |     // Add controls
  509 |     ArrayResize(config.Controls, 5);
  510 |     
  511 |     // EA Status Label
  512 |     config.Controls[0].Name = "StatusLabel";
  513 |     config.Controls[0].Type = UI_CONTROL_LABEL;
  514 |     config.Controls[0].X = 10;
  515 |     config.Controls[0].Y = 30;
  516 |     config.Controls[0].Width = 280;
  517 |     config.Controls[0].Height = 20;
  518 |     config.Controls[0].Text = "EA Status: Initializing...";
  519 |     config.Controls[0].Visible = true;
  520 |     
  521 |     // Start/Stop Button
  522 |     config.Controls[1].Name = "StartStopButton";
  523 |     config.Controls[1].Type = UI_CONTROL_BUTTON;
  524 |     config.Controls[1].X = 10;
  525 |     config.Controls[1].Y = 60;
  526 |     config.Controls[1].Width = 80;
  527 |     config.Controls[1].Height = 25;
  528 |     config.Controls[1].Text = "Start";
  529 |     config.Controls[1].Visible = true;
  530 |     
  531 |     // Settings Button
  532 |     config.Controls[2].Name = "SettingsButton";
  533 |     config.Controls[2].Type = UI_CONTROL_BUTTON;
  534 |     config.Controls[2].X = 100;
  535 |     config.Controls[2].Y = 60;
  536 |     config.Controls[2].Width = 80;
  537 |     config.Controls[2].Height = 25;
  538 |     config.Controls[2].Text = "Settings";
  539 |     config.Controls[2].Visible = true;
  540 |     
  541 |     // Analytics Button
