  982 | 
  983 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  984 | //| Create panel                                                   |
  985 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  986 | bool CUIManager::CreatePanel(const SUIPanelConfig& config) {
  987 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  988 |         LogUIEvent("UI Manager not initialized", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  989 |         return false;
  990 |     }
  991 |     
  992 |     // Create panel
  993 |     CPanel* panel = new CPanel();
  994 |     if (panel == NULL) {
  995 |         LogUIEvent("Failed to create panel: " + config.Name, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
  996 |         return false;
  997 |     }
  998 |     
  999 |     // Configure panel
 1000 |     if (!panel.Create(0, config.Name, 0, config.X, config.Y, config.X + config.Width, config.Y + config.Height)) {
 1001 |         LogUIEvent("Failed to configure panel: " + config.Name, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1002 |         delete panel;
 1003 |         return false;
 1004 |     }
 1005 |     
 1006 |     // Set panel properties
 1007 |     panel.ColorBackground(m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.PanelColor);
 1008 |     panel.ColorBorder(m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.BorderColor);
 1009 |     
 1010 |     // Add to panels array
 1011 |     int size = ArraySize(m_pPanels);
 1012 |     ArrayResize(m_pPanels, size + 1);
 1013 |     m_pPanels[size] = panel;
 1014 |     
 1015 |     // Create controls for this panel
 1016 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(config.Controls); i++) {
 1017 |         CreateControl(config.Name, config.Controls[i]);
 1018 |     }
 1019 |     
 1020 |     LogUIEvent("Panel created: " + config.Name);
 1021 |     return true;
 1022 | }
 1023 | 
 1024 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1025 | //| Create control                                                 |
 1026 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1027 | bool CUIManager::CreateControl(const string panelName, const SUIControlConfig& config) {
 1028 |     // Find parent panel
 1029 |     CPanel* parentPanel = FindPanel(panelName);
 1030 |     if (parentPanel == NULL) {
 1031 |         LogUIEvent("Parent panel not found: " + panelName, LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1032 |         return false;
 1033 |     }
 1034 |     
 1035 |     // Create control based on type
 1036 |     switch(config.Type) {
 1037 |     case UI_CONTROL_LABEL:
 1038 |         return CreateLabel(config) != NULL;
 1039 |     case UI_CONTROL_BUTTON:
 1040 |         return CreateButton(config) != NULL;
 1041 |     case UI_CONTROL_EDIT:
 1042 |         return CreateEdit(config) != NULL;
 1043 |     case UI_CONTROL_COMBO:
 1044 |         return CreateComboBox(config) != NULL;
 1045 |     case UI_CONTROL_CHECK:
 1046 |         return CreateCheckBox(config) != NULL;
 1047 |     case UI_CONTROL_RADIO:
 1048 |         return CreateRadioGroup(config) != NULL;
 1049 |     case UI_CONTROL_LIST:
 1050 |         return CreateListView(config) != NULL;
 1051 |     case UI_CONTROL_PICTURE:
 1052 |         return CreatePicture(config) != NULL;
 1053 |     case UI_CONTROL_PANEL:
 1054 |         return CreatePanelControl(config) != NULL;
 1055 |     default:
 1056 |         LogUIEvent("Unknown control type: " + IntegerToString(config.Type), LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1057 |         return false;
 1058 |     }
 1059 | }
 1060 | 
 1061 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

 1067 |     
 1068 |     if (!label.Create(0, config.Name, 0, config.X, config.Y, config.X + config.Width, config.Y + config.Height)) {
 1069 |         delete label;
 1070 |         return NULL;
 1071 |     }
 1072 |     
 1073 |     label.Text(config.Text);
 1074 |     label.Color(config.TextColor != 0 ? config.TextColor : m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.TextColor);
 1075 |     label.FontSize(config.FontSize > 0 ? config.FontSize : m_LayoutConfig.DefaultFontSize);
 1076 |     
 1077 |     // Add to labels array
 1078 |     int size = ArraySize(m_pLabels);
 1079 |     ArrayResize(m_pLabels, size + 1);
 1080 |     m_pLabels[size] = label;
 1081 |     
 1082 |     return label;
 1083 | }

 1196 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1197 | //| Update UI                                                      |
 1198 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1199 | void CUIManager::Update() {
 1200 |     if (!m_bInitialized || !m_bVisible) return;
 1201 |     
 1202 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
 1203 |     if (currentTime - m_LastUpdate < m_UpdateInterval / 1000) return;
 1204 |     
 1205 |     // Update all panels
 1206 |     UpdateAccountInfo();
 1207 |     UpdateTradingInfo();
 1208 |     UpdateRiskInfo();
 1209 |     UpdatePerformanceInfo();
 1210 |     UpdateSystemStatus();
 1211 |     UpdateMarketInfo();
 1212 |     
 1213 |     // Process events
 1214 |     ProcessEvents();
 1215 |     
 1216 |     // Update statistics
 1217 |     UpdateStatistics();
 1218 |     
 1219 |     m_LastUpdate = currentTime;
 1220 | }

 1222 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1223 | //| Update account information                                     |
 1224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1225 | void CUIManager::UpdateAccountInfo() {
 1226 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) return;
 1227 |     
 1228 |     string accountText = StringFormat("Account: %d\nBalance: %.2f\nEquity: %.2f\nMargin: %.2f",
 1229 |                                      AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_LOGIN),
 1230 |                                      AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE),
 1231 |                                      AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY),
 1232 |                                      AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_LEVEL));
 1233 |

 1235 | }

 1237 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1238 | //| Update trading information                                     |
 1239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1240 | void CUIManager::UpdateTradingInfo() {
 1241 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) return;
 1242 |     
 1243 |     // Update trading panel controls
 1244 |     SetControlText("TradingPanel", "PositionsLabel", "Open Positions: " + IntegerToString(PositionsTotal()));
 1245 |     
 1246 |     // Calculate total profit
 1247 |     double totalProfit = 0;
 1248 |     for (int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
 1249 |         if (PositionSelectByIndex(i)) {
 1250 |             totalProfit += PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PROFIT);
 1251 |         }
 1252 |     }
 1253 |     SetControlText("TradingPanel", "ProfitLabel", "Total Profit: $" + FormatCurrency(totalProfit));
 1254 | }
 1255 | 
 1256 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1257 | //| Update risk information                                        |
 1258 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1259 | void CUIManager::UpdateRiskInfo() {
 1260 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) return;
 1261 |     
 1262 |     // Calculate current drawdown
 1263 |     double equity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
 1264 |     double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 1265 |     double drawdown = balance > 0 ? (balance - equity) / balance * 100 : 0;
 1266 |     
 1267 |     SetControlText("RiskPanel", "DrawdownLabel", "Current Drawdown: " + FormatPercent(drawdown));
 1268 |     
 1269 |     // Update margin level
 1270 |     double marginLevel = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_LEVEL);
 1271 |     SetControlText("RiskPanel", "MarginLabel", "Margin Level: " + FormatPercent(marginLevel));
 1272 |     
 1273 |     // Determine risk level
 1274 |     string riskLevel = "Low";
 1275 |     color riskColor = m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.SuccessColor;
 1276 |     
 1277 |     if (drawdown > 10) {
 1278 |         riskLevel = "High";
 1279 |         riskColor = m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.ErrorColor;
 1280 |     } else if (drawdown > 5) {
 1281 |         riskLevel = "Medium";
 1282 |         riskColor = m_LayoutConfig.ColorScheme.WarningColor;
 1283 |     }
 1284 |     
 1285 |     SetControlText("RiskPanel", "RiskLevelLabel", "Risk Level: " + riskLevel);
 1286 |     SetControlColor("RiskPanel", "RiskLevelLabel", riskColor);
 1287 | }
 1288 |

 1295 |     SetControlText("AnalyticsPanel", "ProfitFactorLabel", "Profit Factor: 1.85");
 1296 |     SetControlText("AnalyticsPanel", "MaxDrawdownLabel", "Max Drawdown: 8.5%");

 1324 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1325 | //| Process UI events                                              |
 1326 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1327 | void CUIManager::ProcessEvents() {
 1328 |     // Process pending events
 1329 |     while (HasPendingEvents()) {
 1330 |         SUIEvent event = GetNextEvent();
 1331 |         
 1332 |         // Handle different event types
 1333 |         switch(event.ControlType) {
 1334 |         case UI_CONTROL_BUTTON:
 1335 |             OnButtonClick(event.ControlName);
 1336 |             break;
 1337 |         case UI_CONTROL_EDIT:
 1338 |             OnEditChange(event.ControlName);
 1339 |             break;
 1340 |         case UI_CONTROL_COMBO:
 1341 |             OnComboChange(event.ControlName);
 1342 |             break;
 1343 |         case UI_CONTROL_CHECK:
 1344 |             OnCheckBoxChange(event.ControlName);
 1345 |             break;
 1346 |         case UI_CONTROL_RADIO:
 1347 |             OnRadioChange(event.ControlName);
 1348 |             break;
 1349 |         case UI_CONTROL_LIST:
 1350 |             OnListSelect(event.ControlName);
 1351 |             break;
 1352 |         }
 1353 |     }
 1354 | }
 1355 | 
 1356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1357 | //| Handle button click events                                     |
 1358 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1359 | void CUIManager::OnButtonClick(const string buttonName) {
 1360 |     if (buttonName == "StartStopButton") {
 1361 |         // Toggle EA state
 1362 |         LogUIEvent("Start/Stop button clicked");
 1363 |     } else if (buttonName == "SettingsButton") {
 1364 |         // Show/hide settings panel
 1365 |         ShowPanel("SettingsPanel", !FindPanel("SettingsPanel"));
 1366 |     } else if (buttonName == "AnalyticsButton") {
 1367 |         // Show/hide analytics panel
 1368 |         ShowPanel("AnalyticsPanel", !FindPanel("AnalyticsPanel"));
 1369 |     } else if (buttonName == "CloseAllButton") {
 1370 |         // Close all positions
 1371 |         LogUIEvent("Close All button clicked", LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
 1372 |     } else if (buttonName == "EmergencyStopButton") {
 1373 |         // Emergency stop
 1374 |         LogUIEvent("Emergency Stop button clicked", LOG_LEVEL_ERROR);
 1375 |     }
 1376 | }
 1377 |

 1421 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1422 | CPanel* CUIManager::FindPanel(const string name) {
 1423 |     // Simplified implementation

 1434 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1435 | bool CUIManager::ShowPanel(const string name, const bool show) {
 1436 |     CPanel* panel = FindPanel(name);
 1437 |     if (panel == NULL) return false;
 1438 |     
 1439 |     panel.Show(show);
 1440 |     return true;
 1441 | }
 1442 | 
 1443 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1444 | //| Get next event from queue                                      |
 1445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1446 | SUIEvent CUIManager::GetNextEvent() {
 1447 |     SUIEvent event;
 1448 |     ZeroMemory(event);
 1449 |     
 1450 |     if (ArraySize(m_EventQueue) > 0) {
 1451 |         event = m_EventQueue[0];
 1452 |         
 1453 |         // Remove from queue
 1454 |         for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_EventQueue) - 1; i++) {
 1455 |             m_EventQueue[i] = m_EventQueue[i + 1];
 1456 |         }
 1457 |         ArrayResize(m_EventQueue, ArraySize(m_EventQueue) - 1);
 1458 |     }
 1459 |     
 1460 |     return event;
 1461 | }
 1462 | 
 1463 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1464 | //| Update statistics                                              |
 1465 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1466 | void CUIManager::UpdateStatistics() {
 1467 |     m_Stats.TotalControls = ArraySize(m_pLabels) + ArraySize(m_pButtons) + ArraySize(m_pEdits);
 1468 |     m_Stats.TotalPanels = ArraySize(m_pPanels);
 1469 |     m_Stats.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
 1470 |     m_Stats.IsResponsive = true;
 1471 | }
 1472 |

 1478 | }

 1491 |     return DoubleToString(value, 2) + "%";
 1492 | }
 1493 | 
 1494 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1495 | //| Log UI event                                                   |
 1496 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1497 | void CUIManager::LogUIEvent(const string event, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
 1498 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1499 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("[UI] " + event);
 1500 |     } else {
 1501 |         Print("[UI] " + event);
 1502 |     }

    2 | //|                                         NotificationCenter.mqh |

    4 | //|      Description: Notification management system (stub)         |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | 
    7 | #ifndef NOTIFICATION_CENTER_MQH
    8 | #define NOTIFICATION_CENTER_MQH
    9 | 
   10 | #include "..\..\00_Core\Common\CommonStructs.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| Notification type enumeration                                   |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | enum ENUM_NOTIFICATION_TYPE {
   16 |     NOTIFICATION_TYPE_INFO,
   17 |     NOTIFICATION_TYPE_WARNING,
   18 |     NOTIFICATION_TYPE_ERROR,
   19 |     NOTIFICATION_TYPE_CRITICAL,

  370 |     bool SetParameterValidation(const string parameterName, const string validationPattern, const string validationMessage, const ENUM_CONFIG_VALIDATION validationLevel = CONFIG_VALIDATION_BASIC, const string profileName = "");
  371 |     bool SetParameterDependencies(const string parameterName, const string dependentParameters[], const int dependentCount, const string conditionalExpression = "", const string profileName = "");
  372 |     
  373 |     // Parameter queries
  374 |     string[] GetParameterNames(const string profileName = "") const;
  375 |     string[] GetParametersByCategory(const string category, const string profileName = "") const;
  376 |     string[] GetParametersByType(const string dataType, const string profileName = "") const;
  377 |     SConfigParameter GetParameterInfo(const string parameterName, const string profileName = "") const;
  378 |     
  379 |     // Template management
  380 |     bool CreateTemplate(const string name, const string description, const ENUM_CONFIG_TYPE type, const string category = "");
  381 |     bool LoadTemplate(const string templateName, const string profileName);
  382 |     bool SaveTemplate(const string templateName, const string profileName);
  383 |     bool DeleteTemplate(const string templateName);
  384 |     string[] GetTemplateNames() const;
  385 |     string[] GetTemplatesByType(const ENUM_CONFIG_TYPE type) const;
  386 |     SConfigTemplate GetTemplate(const string templateName) const;

  403 |     bool RestoreProfile(const string profileName, const datetime backupDate);

  405 |     bool CleanupBackups(const int maxBackups = 10);

  407 |     // Change tracking

  409 |     SConfigChange[] GetChanges(const string profileName = "", const datetime fromDate = 0, const datetime toDate = 0) const;
  410 |     SConfigChange[] GetParameterChanges(const string parameterName, const string profileName = "") const;
  411 |     bool UndoLastChange(const string profileName = "");
  412 |     bool RedoLastUndo(const string profileName = "");

  416 |     string[] GetDifferentParameters(const string profile1, const string profile2) const;
  417 |     bool MergeProfiles(const string sourceProfile, const string targetProfile, const bool overwriteExisting = false);

  421 |     bool ImportFromINI(const string filePath, const string profileName);
  422 |     bool ExportToJSON(const string profileName, const string filePath);
  423 |     bool ImportFromJSON(const string filePath, const string profileName);
  424 |     bool ExportToXML(const string profileName, const string filePath);
  425 |     bool ImportFromXML(const string filePath, const string profileName);

  429 |     bool ResetParametersToDefault(const string parameterNames[], const int count, const string profileName = "");
  430 |     bool ResetProfileToDefault(const string profileName = "");

  442 |     bool IsMonitoring() const;

  447 |     void EnableAutoBackup(const bool enable = true, const int intervalSeconds = 3600);
  448 |     bool IsAutoSaveEnabled() const { return m_bAutoSave; }
  449 |     bool IsAutoBackupEnabled() const { return m_bAutoBackup; }

  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  554 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  555 | CConfigManager::CConfigManager() {
  556 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  557 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  558 |     m_bAutoSave = false;
  559 |     m_bAutoBackup = false;
  560 |     
  561 |     m_ProfileCount = 0;
  562 |     m_TemplateCount = 0;
  563 |     m_ChangeCount = 0;
  564 |     
  565 |     m_CurrentProfile = "";
  566 |     
  567 |     m_CachedProfileCount = 0;
  568 |     
  569 |     m_bValidationEnabled = true;
  570 |     m_DefaultValidationLevel = CONFIG_VALIDATION_BASIC;
  571 |     
  572 |     m_ConfigDirectory = "Config";
  573 |     m_BackupDirectory = "Config\\Backup";
  574 |     m_TemplateDirectory = "Config\\Templates";
  575 |     
  576 |     m_LastError = "";
  577 |     m_ErrorCount = 0;
  578 |     
  579 |     // Initialize arrays
  580 |     ArrayInitialize(m_CachedProfileNames, "");
  581 |     
  582 |     // Initialize statistics
  583 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  584 | }

  586 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  587 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  588 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  589 | CConfigManager::~CConfigManager() {
  590 |     Deinitialize();
  591 | }
  592 | 
  593 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  594 | //| Initialize Configuration Manager                                |
  595 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  596 | bool CConfigManager::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  597 |     if (context == NULL) {
  598 |         Print("[CONFIG MANAGER ERROR] Context is NULL");
  599 |         return false;
  600 |     }
  601 |     
  602 |     m_pContext = context;
  603 |     
  604 |     // Create directories if they don't exist
  605 |     CreateDirectory(m_ConfigDirectory);
  606 |     CreateDirectory(m_BackupDirectory);
  607 |     CreateDirectory(m_TemplateDirectory);
  608 |     
  609 |     // Create built-in templates
  610 |     CreateDefaultTradingTemplate();
  611 |     CreateDefaultRiskTemplate();
  612 |     CreateDefaultUITemplate();
  613 |     CreateDefaultAlertTemplate();
  614 |     CreateDefaultLoggingTemplate();
  615 |     
  616 |     // Update cache
  617 |     UpdateCache();
  618 |     
  619 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  620 |     LogConfigActivity("Configuration Manager initialized successfully");
  621 |     
  622 |     return true;
  623 | }
  624 | 
  625 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  626 | //| Deinitialize Configuration Manager                              |
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | void CConfigManager::Deinitialize() {
  629 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  630 |         // Auto-save current profile if enabled
  631 |         if (m_bAutoSave && m_CurrentProfile != "") {
  632 |             SaveProfile();
  633 |         }
  634 |         
  635 |         LogConfigActivity("Configuration Manager deinitialized");
  636 |     }
  637 |     
  638 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  639 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  640 | }
  641 | 
  642 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  643 | //| Update method                                                   |
  644 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  645 | void CConfigManager::Update() {
  646 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
  647 |         return;
  648 |     }
  649 |     
  650 |     // Update statistics
  651 |     UpdateStatistics();
  652 |     
  653 |     // Check for auto-save
  654 |     if (m_bAutoSave) {
  655 |         // Auto-save logic would go here
  656 |     }
  657 |     
  658 |     // Check for auto-backup
  659 |     if (m_bAutoBackup) {
  660 |         // Auto-backup logic would go here
  661 |     }
  662 | }
  663 | 
  664 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  665 | //| Create profile                                                  |
  666 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  667 | bool CConfigManager::CreateProfile(const string name, const ENUM_CONFIG_TYPE type, const ENUM_CONFIG_SCOPE scope) {
  668 |     if (name == "" || ProfileExists(name)) {
  669 |         SetError("Profile name is empty or already exists: " + name);
  670 |         return false;
  671 |     }
  672 |     
  673 |     if (m_ProfileCount >= ArraySize(m_Profiles)) {
  674 |         SetError("Maximum number of profiles reached");
  675 |         return false;
  676 |     }
  677 |     
  678 |     SConfigProfile profile;
  679 |     ZeroMemory(profile);
  680 |     
  681 |     profile.Name = name;
  682 |     profile.Description = "Configuration profile: " + name;
  683 |     profile.Author = "ConfigManager";
  684 |     profile.Version = "1.0";
  685 |     profile.CreatedDate = TimeCurrent();
  686 |     profile.ModifiedDate = TimeCurrent();
  687 |     
  688 |     profile.Type = type;
  689 |     profile.Scope = scope;
  690 |     profile.Status = CONFIG_STATUS_LOADED;
  691 |     
  692 |     profile.ParameterCount = 0;
  693 |     
  694 |     profile.FilePath = m_ConfigDirectory + "\\" + name + ".ini";
  695 |     profile.Format = CONFIG_FORMAT_INI;
  696 |     profile.Checksum = "";
  697 |     
  698 |     profile.TagCount = 0;
  699 |     profile.Category = GetConfigTypeString(type);
  700 |     profile.Priority = 0;
  701 |     
  702 |     profile.IsValid = true;
  703 |     profile.ValidationErrorCount = 0;
  704 |     
  705 |     profile.BackupPath = m_BackupDirectory + "\\" + name;
  706 |     profile.LastBackup = 0;
  707 |     profile.AutoBackup = m_bAutoBackup;
  708 |     
  709 |     profile.IsLocked = false;
  710 |     profile.LockedBy = "";
  711 |     profile.LockTime = 0;
  712 |     
  713 |     profile.LoadCount = 0;
  714 |     profile.SaveCount = 0;
  715 |     profile.LastAccessed = TimeCurrent();
  716 |     profile.AverageLoadTime = 0;
  717 |     
  718 |     if (!AddProfile(profile)) {
  719 |         SetError("Failed to add profile: " + name);
  720 |         return false;
  721 |     }
  722 |     
  723 |     LogConfigActivity("Profile created: " + name);
  724 |     return true;
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  728 | //| Load profile                                                    |
  729 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  730 | bool CConfigManager::LoadProfile(const string name) {
  731 |     if (name == "") {
  732 |         SetError("Profile name is empty");
  733 |         return false;
  734 |     }
  735 |     
  736 |     int index = FindProfileIndex(name);
  737 |     if (index < 0) {
  738 |         SetError("Profile not found: " + name);
  739 |         return false;
  740 |     }
  741 |     
  742 |     SConfigProfile& profile = m_Profiles[index];
  743 |     
  744 |     // Check if profile is locked
  745 |     if (profile.IsLocked) {
  746 |         SetError("Profile is locked: " + name);
  747 |         return false;
  748 |     }
  749 |     
  750 |     datetime startTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  751 |     
  752 |     // Load from file if exists
  753 |     if (FileExists(profile.FilePath)) {
  754 |         if (!LoadProfileFromFile(profile.FilePath, profile)) {
  755 |             SetError("Failed to load profile from file: " + profile.FilePath);
  756 |             return false;
  757 |         }
  758 |     }
  759 |     
  760 |     // Update statistics
  761 |     profile.LoadCount++;
  762 |     profile.LastAccessed = TimeCurrent();
  763 |     
  764 |     datetime endTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  765 |     double loadTime = (double)(endTime - startTime) / 1000.0;
  766 |     profile.AverageLoadTime = (profile.AverageLoadTime * (profile.LoadCount - 1) + loadTime) / profile.LoadCount;
  767 |     
  768 |     UpdateLoadStatistics(loadTime);
  769 |     
  770 |     m_CurrentProfile = name;
  771 |     
  772 |     LogConfigActivity("Profile loaded: " + name + " in " + DoubleToString(loadTime, 2) + "ms");
  773 |     return true;
  774 | }
  775 | 
  776 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  777 | //| Save profile                                                    |
  778 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  779 | bool CConfigManager::SaveProfile(const string name = "") {
  780 |     string profileName = (name == "") ? m_CurrentProfile : name;
  781 |     
  782 |     if (profileName == "") {
  783 |         SetError("No profile specified for saving");
  784 |         return false;
  785 |     }
  786 |     
  787 |     int index = FindProfileIndex(profileName);
  788 |     if (index < 0) {
  789 |         SetError("Profile not found: " + profileName);
  790 |         return false;
  791 |     }
  792 |     
  793 |     SConfigProfile& profile = m_Profiles[index];
  794 |     
  795 |     // Check if profile is read-only
  796 |     if (profile.Status == CONFIG_STATUS_READONLY) {
  797 |         SetError("Profile is read-only: " + profileName);
  798 |         return false;
  799 |     }
  800 |     
  801 |     datetime startTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  802 |     
  803 |     // Save to file
  804 |     if (!SaveProfileToFile(profile, profile.FilePath)) {
  805 |         SetError("Failed to save profile to file: " + profile.FilePath);
  806 |         return false;
  807 |     }
  808 |     
  809 |     // Update profile metadata
  810 |     profile.ModifiedDate = TimeCurrent();
  811 |     profile.Status = CONFIG_STATUS_SAVED;
  812 |     profile.SaveCount++;
  813 |     profile.Checksum = GenerateChecksum(profile);
  814 |     
  815 |     datetime endTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  816 |     double saveTime = (double)(endTime - startTime) / 1000.0;
  817 |     
  818 |     UpdateSaveStatistics(saveTime);
  819 |     
  820 |     LogConfigActivity("Profile saved: " + profileName + " in " + DoubleToString(saveTime, 2) + "ms");
  821 |     return true;
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  825 | //| Set parameter                                                   |
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | bool CConfigManager::SetParameter(const string parameterName, const string value, const string profileName = "") {
  828 |     string targetProfile = (profileName == "") ? m_CurrentProfile : profileName;
  829 |     
  830 |     if (targetProfile == "") {
  831 |         SetError("No profile specified");
  832 |         return false;
  833 |     }
  834 |     
  835 |     int profileIndex = FindProfileIndex(targetProfile);
  836 |     if (profileIndex < 0) {
  837 |         SetError("Profile not found: " + targetProfile);
  838 |         return false;
  839 |     }
  840 |     
  841 |     SConfigProfile& profile = m_Profiles[profileIndex];
  842 |     
  843 |     int paramIndex = FindParameterIndex(parameterName, targetProfile);
  844 |     if (paramIndex < 0) {
  845 |         // Parameter doesn't exist, create it
  846 |         if (!DefineParameter(parameterName, "string", value, "", "", targetProfile)) {
  847 |             return false;
  848 |         }
  849 |         paramIndex = FindParameterIndex(parameterName, targetProfile);
  850 |     }
  851 |     
  852 |     if (paramIndex < 0) {
  853 |         SetError("Failed to create parameter: " + parameterName);
  854 |         return false;
  855 |     }
  856 |     
  857 |     SConfigParameter& parameter = profile.Parameters[paramIndex];
  858 |     
  859 |     // Check if parameter is read-only
  860 |     if (parameter.IsReadOnly) {
  861 |         SetError("Parameter is read-only: " + parameterName);
  862 |         return false;
  863 |     }
  864 |     
  865 |     // Validate value
  866 |     if (m_bValidationEnabled && !ValidateParameterValue(parameter, value)) {
  867 |         SetError("Invalid parameter value: " + parameterName + " = " + value);
  868 |         return false;
  869 |     }
  870 |     
  871 |     // Record change
  872 |     string oldValue = parameter.StringValue;
  873 |     
  874 |     // Set new value
  875 |     parameter.StringValue = value;
  876 |     parameter.LastModified = TimeCurrent();
  877 |     parameter.ModifiedBy = "ConfigManager";
  878 |     
  879 |     // Convert to appropriate data type
  880 |     ConvertStringToValue(parameter, value);
  881 |     
  882 |     // Update profile status
  883 |     profile.Status = CONFIG_STATUS_MODIFIED;
  884 |     profile.ModifiedDate = TimeCurrent();
  885 |     
  886 |     // Record change
  887 |     RecordChange(parameterName, oldValue, value, "Parameter updated", targetProfile);
  888 |     
  889 |     LogConfigActivity("Parameter set: " + parameterName + " = " + value + " in profile " + targetProfile);
  890 |     return true;
  891 | }
  892 | 
  893 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  894 | //| Get parameter                                                   |
  895 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  896 | string CConfigManager::GetParameter(const string parameterName, const string profileName = "") const {
  897 |     string targetProfile = (profileName == "") ? m_CurrentProfile : profileName;
  898 |     
  899 |     if (targetProfile == "") {
  900 |         return "";
  901 |     }
  902 |     
  903 |     int paramIndex = FindParameterIndex(parameterName, targetProfile);
  904 |     if (paramIndex < 0) {
  905 |         return "";
  906 |     }
  907 |     
  908 |     int profileIndex = FindProfileIndex(targetProfile);
  909 |     if (profileIndex < 0) {
  910 |         return "";
  911 |     }
  912 |     
  913 |     const SConfigParameter& parameter = m_Profiles[profileIndex].Parameters[paramIndex];
  914 |     return parameter.StringValue;
  915 | }
  916 | 
  917 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  918 | //| Define parameter                                                |
  919 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  920 | bool CConfigManager::DefineParameter(const string name, const string dataType, const string defaultValue, const string description = "", const string category = "", const string profileName = "") {
  921 |     string targetProfile = (profileName == "") ? m_CurrentProfile : profileName;
  922 |     
  923 |     if (targetProfile == "" || name == "") {
  924 |         SetError("Profile name or parameter name is empty");
  925 |         return false;
  926 |     }
  927 |     
  928 |     int profileIndex = FindProfileIndex(targetProfile);
  929 |     if (profileIndex < 0) {
  930 |         SetError("Profile not found: " + targetProfile);
  931 |         return false;
  932 |     }
  933 |     
  934 |     SConfigProfile& profile = m_Profiles[profileIndex];
  935 |     
  936 |     // Check if parameter already exists
  937 |     if (FindParameterIndex(name, targetProfile) >= 0) {
  938 |         SetError("Parameter already exists: " + name);
  939 |         return false;
  940 |     }
  941 |     
  942 |     // Check if we have space for more parameters
  943 |     if (profile.ParameterCount >= ArraySize(profile.Parameters)) {
  944 |         SetError("Maximum number of parameters reached for profile: " + targetProfile);
  945 |         return false;
  946 |     }
  947 |     
  948 |     // Validate data type
  949 |     if (!IsValidDataType(dataType)) {
  950 |         SetError("Invalid data type: " + dataType);
  951 |         return false;
  952 |     }
  953 |     
  954 |     SConfigParameter parameter;
  955 |     ZeroMemory(parameter);
  956 |     
  957 |     parameter.Name = name;
  958 |     parameter.Description = description;
  959 |     parameter.Category = category;
  960 |     parameter.Section = "General";
  961 |     
  962 |     parameter.StringValue = defaultValue;
  963 |     parameter.DataType = dataType;
  964 |     
  965 |     parameter.MinValue = 0;
  966 |     parameter.MaxValue = 0;
  967 |     parameter.AllowedValueCount = 0;
  968 |     
  969 |     parameter.IsRequired = false;
  970 |     parameter.IsReadOnly = false;
  971 |     parameter.IsHidden = false;
  972 |     parameter.IsAdvanced = false;
  973 |     parameter.RequiresRestart = false;
  974 |     
  975 |     parameter.DefaultStringValue = defaultValue;
  976 |     
  977 |     parameter.ValidationPattern = "";
  978 |     parameter.ValidationMessage = "";
  979 |     parameter.ValidationLevel = m_DefaultValidationLevel;
  980 |     
  981 |     parameter.UIControl = "textbox";
  982 |     parameter.UIGroup = category;
  983 |     parameter.UIOrder = profile.ParameterCount;
  984 |     parameter.UITooltip = description;
  985 |     
  986 |     parameter.LastModified = TimeCurrent();
  987 |     parameter.ModifiedBy = "ConfigManager";
  988 |     parameter.ChangeReason = "Parameter defined";
  989 |     
  990 |     parameter.DependentParameterCount = 0;
  991 |     parameter.ConditionalExpression = "";
  992 |     
  993 |     // Convert default value to appropriate data type
  994 |     ConvertStringToValue(parameter, defaultValue);
  995 |     
  996 |     // Set default values
  997 |     SetDefaultValue(parameter);
  998 |     
  999 |     // Add parameter to profile
 1000 |     profile.Parameters[profile.ParameterCount] = parameter;
 1001 |     profile.ParameterCount++;
 1002 |     
 1003 |     // Update profile status
 1004 |     profile.Status = CONFIG_STATUS_MODIFIED;
 1005 |     profile.ModifiedDate = TimeCurrent();
 1006 |     
 1007 |     LogConfigActivity("Parameter defined: " + name + " in profile " + targetProfile);
 1008 |     return true;
 1009 | }

 1325 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1326 | //| Helper methods                                                  |
 1327 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1328 | int CConfigManager::FindProfileIndex(const string name) const {
 1329 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ProfileCount; i++) {
 1330 |         if (m_Profiles[i].Name == name) {
 1331 |             return i;
 1332 |         }
 1333 |     }
 1334 |     return -1;
 1335 | }
 1336 | 
 1337 | int CConfigManager::FindParameterIndex(const string parameterName, const string profileName) const {
 1338 |     int profileIndex = FindProfileIndex(profileName);
 1339 |     if (profileIndex < 0) {
 1340 |         return -1;
 1341 |     }
 1342 |     
 1343 |     const SConfigProfile& profile = m_Profiles[profileIndex];
 1344 |     for (int i = 0; i < profile.ParameterCount; i++) {
 1345 |         if (profile.Parameters[i].Name == parameterName) {
 1346 |             return i;
 1347 |         }
 1348 |     }
 1349 |     return -1;
 1350 | }
 1351 | 
 1352 | int CConfigManager::FindTemplateIndex(const string templateName) const {
 1353 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_TemplateCount; i++) {
 1354 |         if (m_Templates[i].Name == templateName) {
 1355 |             return i;
 1356 |         }
 1357 |     }
 1358 |     return -1;
 1359 | }
 1360 | 
 1361 | bool CConfigManager::AddProfile(const SConfigProfile& profile) {
 1362 |     if (m_ProfileCount >= ArraySize(m_Profiles)) {
 1363 |         return false;
 1364 |     }
 1365 |     
 1366 |     m_Profiles[m_ProfileCount] = profile;
 1367 |     m_ProfileCount++;
 1368 |     return true;
 1369 | }
 1370 | 
 1371 | bool CConfigManager::AddTemplate(const SConfigTemplate& template) {
 1372 |     if (m_TemplateCount >= ArraySize(m_Templates)) {
 1373 |         return false;
 1374 |     }
 1375 |     
 1376 |     m_Templates[m_TemplateCount] = template;
 1377 |     m_TemplateCount++;
 1378 |     return true;
 1379 | }
 1380 | 
 1381 | bool CConfigManager::ProfileExists(const string name) const {
 1382 |     return FindProfileIndex(name) >= 0;
 1383 | }
 1384 | 
 1385 | bool CConfigManager::IsValidDataType(const string dataType) const {
 1386 |     return (dataType == "string" || dataType == "double" || dataType == "int" || 
 1387 |             dataType == "bool" || dataType == "datetime" || dataType == "color");
 1388 | }
 1389 | 
 1390 | bool CConfigManager::ValidateParameterValue(const SConfigParameter& parameter, const string value) const {
 1391 |     // Basic validation based on data type
 1392 |     if (parameter.DataType == "double") {
 1393 |         double doubleValue = StringToDouble(value);
 1394 |         if (parameter.MinValue != 0 || parameter.MaxValue != 0) {
 1395 |             return (doubleValue >= parameter.MinValue && doubleValue <= parameter.MaxValue);
 1396 |         }
 1397 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "int") {
 1398 |         int intValue = (int)StringToInteger(value);
 1399 |         if (parameter.MinValue != 0 || parameter.MaxValue != 0) {
 1400 |             return (intValue >= parameter.MinValue && intValue <= parameter.MaxValue);
 1401 |         }
 1402 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "bool") {
 1403 |         return (value == "true" || value == "false" || value == "1" || value == "0");
 1404 |     }
 1405 |     
 1406 |     // Check allowed values
 1407 |     if (parameter.AllowedValueCount > 0) {
 1408 |         for (int i = 0; i < parameter.AllowedValueCount; i++) {
 1409 |             if (parameter.AllowedValues[i] == value) {
 1410 |                 return true;
 1411 |             }
 1412 |         }
 1413 |         return false;
 1414 |     }
 1415 |     
 1416 |     return true;
 1417 | }
 1418 | 
 1419 | bool CConfigManager::ConvertStringToValue(SConfigParameter& parameter, const string value) const {
 1420 |     if (parameter.DataType == "double") {
 1421 |         parameter.DoubleValue = StringToDouble(value);
 1422 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "int") {
 1423 |         parameter.IntValue = (int)StringToInteger(value);
 1424 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "bool") {
 1425 |         parameter.BoolValue = (value == "true" || value == "1");
 1426 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "datetime") {
 1427 |         parameter.DateTimeValue = StringToTime(value);
 1428 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "color") {
 1429 |         parameter.ColorValue = (color)StringToInteger(value);
 1430 |     }
 1431 |     
 1432 |     return true;
 1433 | }
 1434 | 
 1435 | void CConfigManager::SetDefaultValue(SConfigParameter& parameter) const {
 1436 |     if (parameter.DataType == "double") {
 1437 |         parameter.DefaultDoubleValue = parameter.DoubleValue;
 1438 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "int") {
 1439 |         parameter.DefaultIntValue = parameter.IntValue;
 1440 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "bool") {
 1441 |         parameter.DefaultBoolValue = parameter.BoolValue;
 1442 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "datetime") {
 1443 |         parameter.DefaultDateTimeValue = parameter.DateTimeValue;
 1444 |     } else if (parameter.DataType == "color") {
 1445 |         parameter.DefaultColorValue = parameter.ColorValue;
 1446 |     }
 1447 | }
 1448 | 
 1449 | void CConfigManager::RecordChange(const string parameterName, const string oldValue, const string newValue, const string reason, const string profileName) {
 1450 |     if (m_ChangeCount >= ArraySize(m_Changes)) {
 1451 |         // Remove oldest change to make room
 1452 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_ChangeCount - 1; i++) {
 1453 |             m_Changes[i] = m_Changes[i + 1];
 1454 |         }
 1455 |         m_ChangeCount--;
 1456 |     }
 1457 |     
 1458 |     SConfigChange change;
 1459 |     change.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
 1460 |     change.ParameterName = parameterName;
 1461 |     change.OldValue = oldValue;
 1462 |     change.NewValue = newValue;
 1463 |     change.ChangedBy = "ConfigManager";
 1464 |     change.Reason = reason;
 1465 |     change.ProfileName = profileName;
 1466 |     change.ConfigType = CONFIG_TYPE_CUSTOM; // Would need to determine actual type
 1467 |     
 1468 |     m_Changes[m_ChangeCount] = change;
 1469 |     m_ChangeCount++;
 1470 | }
 1471 | 
 1472 | void CConfigManager::UpdateStatistics() {
 1473 |     m_Statistics.TotalProfiles = m_ProfileCount;
 1474 |     
 1475 |     // Count profiles by status
 1476 |     int loaded = 0, modified = 0, error = 0;
 1477 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ProfileCount; i++) {
 1478 |         switch(m_Profiles[i].Status) {
 1479 |         case CONFIG_STATUS_LOADED:
 1480 |             loaded++;
 1481 |             break;
 1482 |         case CONFIG_STATUS_MODIFIED:
 1483 |             modified++;
 1484 |             break;
 1485 |         case CONFIG_STATUS_ERROR:
 1486 |             error++;
 1487 |             break;
 1488 |         }
 1489 |     }
 1490 |     
 1491 |     m_Statistics.LoadedProfiles = loaded;
 1492 |     m_Statistics.ModifiedProfiles = modified;
 1493 |     m_Statistics.ErrorProfiles = error;
 1494 |     
 1495 |     // Count total parameters
 1496 |     int totalParams = 0;
 1497 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ProfileCount; i++) {
 1498 |         totalParams += m_Profiles[i].ParameterCount;
 1499 |     }
 1500 |     m_Statistics.TotalParameters = totalParams;
 1501 |     
 1502 |     m_Statistics.TotalChanges = m_ChangeCount;
 1503 |     if (m_ChangeCount > 0) {
 1504 |         m_Statistics.LastChange = m_Changes[m_ChangeCount - 1].Timestamp;
 1505 |     }
 1506 | }
 1507 | 
 1508 | string CConfigManager::GetConfigTypeString(const ENUM_CONFIG_TYPE type) const {
 1509 |     switch(type) {
 1510 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_TRADING: return "Trading";
 1511 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_RISK: return "Risk";
 1512 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_UI: return "UI";
 1513 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_ALERTS: return "Alerts";
 1514 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_LOGGING: return "Logging";
 1515 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_PERFORMANCE: return "Performance";
 1516 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_ANALYTICS: return "Analytics";
 1517 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_SYSTEM: return "System";
 1518 |     case CONFIG_TYPE_CUSTOM: return "Custom";
 1519 |     default: return "Unknown";
 1520 |     }
 1521 | }
 1522 | 
 1523 | string CConfigManager::GetConfigScopeString(const ENUM_CONFIG_SCOPE scope) const {
 1524 |     switch(scope) {
 1525 |     case CONFIG_SCOPE_GLOBAL: return "Global";
 1526 |     case CONFIG_SCOPE_SYMBOL: return "Symbol";
 1527 |     case CONFIG_SCOPE_TIMEFRAME: return "Timeframe";
 1528 |     case CONFIG_SCOPE_SESSION: return "Session";
 1529 |     case CONFIG_SCOPE_USER: return "User";
 1530 |     case CONFIG_SCOPE_TEMPORARY: return "Temporary";
 1531 |     default: return "Unknown";
 1532 |     }
 1533 | }
 1534 | 
 1535 | string CConfigManager::GetConfigStatusString(const ENUM_CONFIG_STATUS status) const {
 1536 |     switch(status) {
 1537 |     case CONFIG_STATUS_LOADED: return "Loaded";
 1538 |     case CONFIG_STATUS_MODIFIED: return "Modified";
 1539 |     case CONFIG_STATUS_SAVED: return "Saved";
 1540 |     case CONFIG_STATUS_ERROR: return "Error";
 1541 |     case CONFIG_STATUS_LOCKED: return "Locked";
 1542 |     case CONFIG_STATUS_READONLY: return "ReadOnly";
 1543 |     default: return "Unknown";
 1544 |     }
 1545 | }

 1564 | bool CConfigManager::FileExists(const string filePath) const {
 1565 |     // Check if file exists
 1566 |     int handle = FileOpen(filePath, FILE_READ | FILE_BIN);
 1567 |     if (handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1568 |         FileClose(handle);
 1569 |         return true;
 1570 |     }
 1571 |     return false;
 1572 | }
 1573 | 
 1574 | bool CConfigManager::CreateDirectory(const string directory) const {
 1575 |     // Create directory if it doesn't exist
 1576 |     return FolderCreate(directory, 0);
 1577 | }
 1578 | 
 1579 | string CConfigManager::GenerateChecksum(const SConfigProfile& profile) const {
 1580 |     // Generate a simple checksum based on profile content
 1581 |     string content = profile.Name + profile.Description + IntegerToString(profile.ParameterCount);
 1582 |     return IntegerToString(StringLen(content));
 1583 | }
 1584 | 
 1585 | void CConfigManager::UpdateLoadStatistics(const double loadTime) {
 1586 |     m_Statistics.LoadOperations++;
 1587 |     m_Statistics.AverageLoadTime = (m_Statistics.AverageLoadTime * (m_Statistics.LoadOperations - 1) + loadTime) / m_Statistics.LoadOperations;
 1588 |     m_Statistics.LastLoad = TimeCurrent();
 1589 | }
 1590 | 
 1591 | void CConfigManager::UpdateSaveStatistics(const double saveTime) {
 1592 |     m_Statistics.SaveOperations++;
 1593 |     m_Statistics.AverageSaveTime = (m_Statistics.AverageSaveTime * (m_Statistics.SaveOperations - 1) + saveTime) / m_Statistics.SaveOperations;
 1594 |     m_Statistics.LastSave = TimeCurrent();
 1595 | }
 1596 | 
 1597 | void CConfigManager::UpdateValidationStatistics(const double validationTime) {
 1598 |     m_Statistics.ValidationOperations++;
 1599 |     m_Statistics.AverageValidationTime = (m_Statistics.AverageValidationTime * (m_Statistics.ValidationOperations - 1) + validationTime) / m_Statistics.ValidationOperations;
 1600 |     m_Statistics.LastValidation = TimeCurrent();
 1601 | }
 1602 | 
 1603 | void CConfigManager::UpdateErrorStatistics() {
 1604 |     m_Statistics.ErrorOperations++;
 1605 |     m_ErrorCount++;
 1606 | }
 1607 | 
 1608 | void CConfigManager::SetError(const string error) {
 1609 |     m_LastError = error;
 1610 |     UpdateErrorStatistics();
 1611 |     LogError(error);
 1612 | }
 1613 | 
 1614 | void CConfigManager::LogError(const string error, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_ERROR) {
 1615 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1616 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogMessage(level, "[CONFIG MANAGER] " + error);
 1617 |     } else {
 1618 |         Print("[CONFIG MANAGER ERROR] " + error);
 1619 |     }
 1620 | }
 1621 | 
 1622 | void CConfigManager::LogConfigActivity(const string activity, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO) {
 1623 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext.pLogger != NULL) {
 1624 |         m_pContext.pLogger.LogMessage(level, "[CONFIG MANAGER] " + activity);
 1625 |     } else {
 1626 |         Print("[CONFIG MANAGER] " + activity);
 1627 |     }
 1628 | }
 1629 | 
 1630 | void CConfigManager::UpdateCache() {
 1631 |     m_CachedProfileCount = 0;
 1632 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ProfileCount && i < ArraySize(m_CachedProfileNames); i++) {
 1633 |         m_CachedProfileNames[i] = m_Profiles[i].Name;
 1634 |         m_CachedProfileCount++;
 1635 |     }
 1636 | }
 1637 | 
 1638 | void CConfigManager::ClearCache() {
 1639 |     ArrayInitialize(m_CachedProfileNames, "");
 1640 |     m_CachedProfileCount = 0;
 1641 | }
 1642 | 
 1643 | bool CConfigManager::IsCached(const string profileName) const {
 1644 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CachedProfileCount; i++) {
 1645 |         if (m_CachedProfileNames[i] == profileName) {
 1646 |             return true;
 1647 |         }
 1648 |     }
 1649 |     return false;
 1650 | }
 1651 | 
 1652 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  567 |     string FormatControlValue(const SSettingsControl& control) const;
  568 |     bool ParseControlValue(SSettingsControl& control, const string value) const;
  569 |     color GetThemeColor(const string colorName) const;
  570 |     string GetLocalizedText(const string key) const;
  571 | };
  572 | 
  573 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  574 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  575 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  576 | CSettingsPanel::CSettingsPanel() {
  577 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  578 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  579 |     m_bVisible = false;
  580 |     m_bModified = false;
  581 |     
  582 |     m_CategoryCount = 0;
  583 |     m_CurrentCategory = 0;
  584 |     m_CurrentProfile = "";
  585 |     
  586 |     m_TabButtonCount = 0;
  587 |     
  588 |     // Initialize UI controls
  589 |     m_pMainPanel = NULL;
  590 |     m_pTabPanel = NULL;
  591 |     m_pContentPanel = NULL;
  592 |     m_pButtonPanel = NULL;
  593 |     
  594 |     m_pOKButton = NULL;
  595 |     m_pCancelButton = NULL;
  596 |     m_pApplyButton = NULL;
  597 |     m_pResetButton = NULL;
  598 |     m_pDefaultsButton = NULL;
  599 |     
  600 |     m_pProfileLabel = NULL;
  601 |     m_pProfileComboBox = NULL;
  602 |     m_pSaveProfileButton = NULL;
  603 |     m_pLoadProfileButton = NULL;
  604 |     m_pDeleteProfileButton = NULL;
  605 |     
  606 |     m_pStatusLabel = NULL;
  607 |     m_pHelpPanel = NULL;
  608 |     m_pHelpLabel = NULL;
  609 |     
  610 |     // Initialize arrays
  611 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_pTabButtons); i++) {
  612 |         m_pTabButtons[i] = NULL;
  613 |     }
  614 |     
  615 |     // Initialize validation
  616 |     m_bValidationEnabled = true;
  617 |     m_ValidationErrorCount = 0;
  618 |     
  619 |     // Initialize change tracking
  620 |     m_bChangeTrackingEnabled = true;
  621 |     m_ChangedControlCount = 0;
  622 |     
  623 |     // Initialize help
  624 |     m_bHelpEnabled = false;
  625 |     
  626 |     // Initialize statistics
  627 |     ZeroMemory(m_Statistics);
  628 |     
  629 |     // Set default configuration
  630 |     ZeroMemory(m_Config);
  631 |     m_Config.Title = "Settings";
  632 |     m_Config.Width = 800;
  633 |     m_Config.Height = 600;
  634 |     m_Config.IsResizable = true;
  635 |     m_Config.IsMovable = true;
  636 |     m_Config.IsModal = false;
  637 |     m_Config.AutoSave = false;
  638 |     m_Config.AutoValidate = true;
  639 |     m_Config.ShowTooltips = true;
  640 |     m_Config.ShowHelpText = true;
  641 |     m_Config.ConfirmChanges = true;
  642 |     m_Config.BackgroundColor = clrWhite;
  643 |     m_Config.BorderColor = clrGray;
  644 |     m_Config.TextColor = clrBlack;
  645 |     m_Config.HighlightColor = clrBlue;
  646 |     m_Config.FontName = "Arial";
  647 |     m_Config.FontSize = 9;
  648 | }
  649 | 
  650 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  651 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  652 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  653 | CSettingsPanel::~CSettingsPanel() {
  654 |     Deinitialize();
  655 | }
  656 | 
  657 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  658 | //| Initialize settings panel                                       |
  659 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 | bool CSettingsPanel::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  661 |     if (context == NULL) {
  662 |         Print("[SETTINGS PANEL ERROR] Context is NULL");
  663 |         return false;
  664 |     }
  665 |     
  666 |     m_pContext = context;
  667 |     
  668 |     // Initialize statistics
  669 |     m_Statistics.LastOpened = TimeCurrent();
  670 |     m_Statistics.OpenCount++;
  671 |     
  672 |     m_bInitialized = true;
  673 |     LogActivity("Settings Panel initialized successfully");
  674 |     
  675 |     return true;
  676 | }
  677 | 
  678 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  679 | //| Deinitialize settings panel                                     |
  680 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  681 | void CSettingsPanel::Deinitialize() {
  682 |     if (m_bInitialized) {
  683 |         // Auto-save if enabled
  684 |         if (m_Config.AutoSave && m_bModified) {
  685 |             ApplyChanges();
  686 |         }
  687 |         
  688 |         // Update statistics
  689 |         m_Statistics.LastClosed = TimeCurrent();
  690 |         
  691 |         // Destroy UI
  692 |         Destroy();
  693 |         
  694 |         LogActivity("Settings Panel deinitialized");
  695 |     }
  696 |     
  697 |     m_bInitialized = false;
  698 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  699 | }
  700 | 
  701 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  702 | //| Create settings panel                                           |
  703 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  704 | bool CSettingsPanel::Create(const long chart_id, const string name, const int subwin, const int x1, const int y1, const int x2, const int y2) {
  705 |     if (!CAppDialog::Create(chart_id, name, subwin, x1, y1, x2, y2)) {
  706 |         LogError("Failed to create settings panel dialog");
  707 |         return false;
  708 |     }
  709 |     
  710 |     // Create main components
  711 |     if (!CreateMainPanel()) {
  712 |         LogError("Failed to create main panel");
  713 |         return false;
  714 |     }
  715 |     
  716 |     if (!CreateTabPanel()) {
  717 |         LogError("Failed to create tab panel");
  718 |         return false;
  719 |     }
  720 |     
  721 |     if (!CreateContentPanel()) {
  722 |         LogError("Failed to create content panel");
  723 |         return false;
  724 |     }
  725 |     
  726 |     if (!CreateButtonPanel()) {
  727 |         LogError("Failed to create button panel");
  728 |         return false;
  729 |     }
  730 |     
  731 |     if (!CreateProfileControls()) {
  732 |         LogError("Failed to create profile controls");
  733 |         return false;
  734 |     }
  735 |     
  736 |     if (!CreateStatusControls()) {
  737 |         LogError("Failed to create status controls");
  738 |         return false;
  739 |     }
  740 |     
  741 |     if (m_bHelpEnabled && !CreateHelpPanel()) {
  742 |         LogError("Failed to create help panel");
  743 |         return false;
  744 |     }
  745 |     
  746 |     // Create tab buttons
  747 |     if (!CreateTabButtons()) {
  748 |         LogError("Failed to create tab buttons");
  749 |         return false;
  750 |     }
  751 |     
  752 |     // Create category UIs
  753 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CategoryCount; i++) {
  754 |         if (!CreateCategoryUI(i)) {
  755 |             LogError(StringFormat("Failed to create UI for category %s", m_Categories[i].Name));
  756 |             return false;
  757 |         }
  758 |     }
  759 |     
  760 |     // Update layout
  761 |     UpdateLayout();
  762 |     
  763 |     // Select first tab
  764 |     if (m_CategoryCount > 0) {
  765 |         SelectTab(0);
  766 |     }
  767 |     
  768 |     LogActivity("Settings Panel created successfully");
  769 |     return true;
  770 | }
  771 | 
  772 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  773 | //| Destroy settings panel                                          |
  774 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  775 | void CSettingsPanel::Destroy() {
  776 |     // Clean up UI controls
  777 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_TabButtonCount; i++) {
  778 |         if (m_pTabButtons[i] != NULL) {
  779 |             delete m_pTabButtons[i];
  780 |             m_pTabButtons[i] = NULL;
  781 |         }
  782 |     }
  783 |     
  784 |     // Clean up category controls
  785 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CategoryCount; i++) {
  786 |         for (int j = 0; j < m_Categories[i].GroupCount; j++) {
  787 |             for (int k = 0; k < m_Categories[i].Groups[j].ControlCount; k++) {
  788 |                 if (m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k].pControl != NULL) {
  789 |                     delete m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k].pControl;
  790 |                     m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k].pControl = NULL;
  791 |                 }
  792 |                 if (m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k].pLabel != NULL) {
  793 |                     delete m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k].pLabel;
  794 |                     m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k].pLabel = NULL;
  795 |                 }
  796 |             }
  797 |             if (m_Categories[i].Groups[j].pPanel != NULL) {
  798 |                 delete m_Categories[i].Groups[j].pPanel;
  799 |                 m_Categories[i].Groups[j].pPanel = NULL;
  800 |             }
  801 |         }
  802 |         if (m_Categories[i].pPanel != NULL) {
  803 |             delete m_Categories[i].pPanel;
  804 |             m_Categories[i].pPanel = NULL;
  805 |         }
  806 |     }
  807 |     
  808 |     // Clean up main panels
  809 |     if (m_pHelpPanel != NULL) {
  810 |         delete m_pHelpPanel;
  811 |         m_pHelpPanel = NULL;
  812 |     }
  813 |     
  814 |     if (m_pButtonPanel != NULL) {
  815 |         delete m_pButtonPanel;
  816 |         m_pButtonPanel = NULL;
  817 |     }
  818 |     
  819 |     if (m_pContentPanel != NULL) {
  820 |         delete m_pContentPanel;
  821 |         m_pContentPanel = NULL;
  822 |     }
  823 |     
  824 |     if (m_pTabPanel != NULL) {
  825 |         delete m_pTabPanel;
  826 |         m_pTabPanel = NULL;
  827 |     }
  828 |     
  829 |     if (m_pMainPanel != NULL) {
  830 |         delete m_pMainPanel;
  831 |         m_pMainPanel = NULL;
  832 |     }
  833 |     
  834 |     CAppDialog::Destroy();
  835 | }
  836 | 
  837 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  838 | //| Add category                                                     |
  839 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  840 | bool CSettingsPanel::AddCategory(const string name, const string title, const string description = "", const string icon = "") {
  841 |     if (m_CategoryCount >= ArraySize(m_Categories)) {
  842 |         LogError("Maximum number of categories reached");
  843 |         return false;
  844 |     }
  845 |     
  846 |     // Check if category already exists
  847 |     if (FindCategoryIndex(name) >= 0) {
  848 |         LogError(StringFormat("Category %s already exists", name));
  849 |         return false;
  850 |     }
  851 |     
  852 |     // Initialize category
  853 |     SSettingsCategory category;
  854 |     ZeroMemory(category);
  855 |     category.Name = name;
  856 |     category.Title = title;
  857 |     category.Description = description;
  858 |     category.Icon = icon;
  859 |     category.IsVisible = true;
  860 |     category.IsEnabled = true;
  861 |     category.IsAdvanced = false;
  862 |     category.Order = m_CategoryCount;
  863 |     
  864 |     m_Categories[m_CategoryCount] = category;
  865 |     m_CategoryCount++;
  866 |     
  867 |     m_Statistics.TotalCategories++;
  868 |     m_Statistics.VisibleCategories++;
  869 |     
  870 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Category %s added successfully", name));
  871 |     return true;
  872 | }
  873 | 
  874 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  875 | //| Add group to category                                           |
  876 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  877 | bool CSettingsPanel::AddGroup(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string title, const string description = "") {
  878 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
  879 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) {
  880 |         LogError(StringFormat("Category %s not found", categoryName));
  881 |         return false;
  882 |     }
  883 |     
  884 |     if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount >= ArraySize(m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups)) {
  885 |         LogError("Maximum number of groups reached for category");
  886 |         return false;
  887 |     }
  888 |     
  889 |     // Check if group already exists
  890 |     if (FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName) >= 0) {
  891 |         LogError(StringFormat("Group %s already exists in category %s", groupName, categoryName));
  892 |         return false;
  893 |     }
  894 |     
  895 |     // Initialize group
  896 |     SSettingsGroup group;
  897 |     ZeroMemory(group);
  898 |     group.Name = groupName;
  899 |     group.Title = title;
  900 |     group.Description = description;
  901 |     group.Category = categoryName;
  902 |     group.IsCollapsible = true;
  903 |     group.IsCollapsed = false;
  904 |     group.IsVisible = true;
  905 |     group.IsEnabled = true;
  906 |     group.Order = m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount;
  907 |     
  908 |     m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount] = group;
  909 |     m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount++;
  910 |     
  911 |     m_Statistics.TotalGroups++;
  912 |     m_Statistics.VisibleGroups++;
  913 |     
  914 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Group %s added to category %s successfully", groupName, categoryName));
  915 |     return true;
  916 | }
  917 | 
  918 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  919 | //| Add control to group                                            |
  920 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  921 | bool CSettingsPanel::AddControl(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const SSettingsControl& control) {
  922 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
  923 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) {
  924 |         LogError(StringFormat("Category %s not found", categoryName));
  925 |         return false;
  926 |     }
  927 |     
  928 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
  929 |     if (groupIndex < 0) {
  930 |         LogError(StringFormat("Group %s not found in category %s", groupName, categoryName));
  931 |         return false;
  932 |     }
  933 |     
  934 |     if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].ControlCount >= ArraySize(m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls)) {
  935 |         LogError("Maximum number of controls reached for group");
  936 |         return false;
  937 |     }
  938 |     
  939 |     // Check if control already exists
  940 |     if (FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, control.Name) >= 0) {
  941 |         LogError(StringFormat("Control %s already exists in group %s", control.Name, groupName));
  942 |         return false;
  943 |     }
  944 |     
  945 |     // Add control
  946 |     SSettingsControl newControl = control;
  947 |     newControl.Category = categoryName;
  948 |     newControl.Group = groupName;
  949 |     newControl.IsCreated = false;
  950 |     newControl.IsModified = false;
  951 |     newControl.IsValid = true;
  952 |     newControl.pControl = NULL;
  953 |     newControl.pLabel = NULL;
  954 |     
  955 |     m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].ControlCount] = newControl;
  956 |     m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].ControlCount++;
  957 |     
  958 |     m_Statistics.TotalControls++;
  959 |     m_Statistics.VisibleControls++;
  960 |     
  961 |     if (newControl.IsRequired) {
  962 |         m_Statistics.RequiredControls++;
  963 |     }
  964 |     
  965 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Control %s added to group %s successfully", control.Name, groupName));
  966 |     return true;
  967 | }
  968 | 
  969 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  970 | //| Set control value (string)                                      |
  971 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  972 | bool CSettingsPanel::SetControlValue(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName, const string value) {
  973 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
  974 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) return false;
  975 |     
  976 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
  977 |     if (groupIndex < 0) return false;
  978 |     
  979 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
  980 |     if (controlIndex < 0) return false;
  981 |     
  982 |     SSettingsControl& control = m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex];
  983 |     
  984 |     // Store old value for change tracking
  985 |     string oldValue = control.StringValue;
  986 |     
  987 |     // Set new value
  988 |     control.StringValue = value;
  989 |     control.IsModified = true;
  990 |     
  991 |     // Update UI control if created
  992 |     if (control.pControl != NULL) {
  993 |         // Update based on control type
  994 |         switch (control.Type) {
  995 |             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_EDIT:
  996 |                 if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
  997 |                     CEdit* pEdit = (CEdit*)control.pControl;
  998 |                     pEdit.Text(value);
  999 |                 }
 1000 |                 break;
 1001 |                 
 1002 |             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COMBOBOX:
 1003 |                 if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 1004 |                     CComboBox* pCombo = (CComboBox*)control.pControl;
 1005 |                     pCombo.Select(value);
 1006 |                 }
 1007 |                 break;
 1008 |         }
 1009 |     }
 1010 |     
 1011 |     // Record change
 1012 |     if (m_bChangeTrackingEnabled && oldValue != value) {
 1013 |         RecordChange(categoryName, groupName, controlName);
 1014 |         m_bModified = true;
 1015 |     }
 1016 |     
 1017 |     // Validate if enabled
 1018 |     if (m_bValidationEnabled) {
 1019 |         ValidateControl(categoryName, groupName, controlName);
 1020 |     }
 1021 |     
 1022 |     return true;
 1023 | }
 1024 | 
 1025 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1026 | //| Get control value (string)                                      |
 1027 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1028 | string CSettingsPanel::GetControlValue(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName) const {
 1029 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1030 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) return "";
 1031 |     
 1032 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1033 |     if (groupIndex < 0) return "";
 1034 |     
 1035 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
 1036 |     if (controlIndex < 0) return "";
 1037 |     
 1038 |     return m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].StringValue;
 1039 | }
 1040 | 
 1041 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1042 | //| Add text box control                                            |
 1043 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1044 | bool CSettingsPanel::AddTextBox(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string name, const string label, const string defaultValue = "", const string description = "") {
 1045 |     SSettingsControl control;
 1046 |     ZeroMemory(control);
 1047 |     
 1048 |     control.Name = name;
 1049 |     control.Label = label;
 1050 |     control.Description = description;
 1051 |     control.Type = SETTINGS_CONTROL_EDIT;
 1052 |     control.DataType = "string";
 1053 |     control.StringValue = defaultValue;
 1054 |     control.DefaultStringValue = defaultValue;
 1055 |     control.IsVisible = true;
 1056 |     control.IsEnabled = true;
 1057 |     control.HasLabel = true;
 1058 |     control.LabelText = label;
 1059 |     control.Width = 200;
 1060 |     control.Height = 20;
 1061 |     
 1062 |     return AddControl(categoryName, groupName, control);
 1063 | }
 1064 | 
 1065 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1066 | //| Add number box control                                          |
 1067 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1068 | bool CSettingsPanel::AddNumberBox(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string name, const string label, const double defaultValue = 0, const double minValue = 0, const double maxValue = 0, const string description = "") {
 1069 |     SSettingsControl control;
 1070 |     ZeroMemory(control);
 1071 |     
 1072 |     control.Name = name;
 1073 |     control.Label = label;
 1074 |     control.Description = description;
 1075 |     control.Type = SETTINGS_CONTROL_SPINEDIT;
 1076 |     control.DataType = "double";
 1077 |     control.DoubleValue = defaultValue;
 1078 |     control.DefaultDoubleValue = defaultValue;
 1079 |     control.MinValue = minValue;
 1080 |     control.MaxValue = maxValue;
 1081 |     control.DecimalPlaces = 2;
 1082 |     control.IsVisible = true;
 1083 |     control.IsEnabled = true;
 1084 |     control.HasLabel = true;
 1085 |     control.LabelText = label;
 1086 |     control.Width = 100;
 1087 |     control.Height = 20;
 1088 |     
 1089 |     if (minValue != 0 || maxValue != 0) {
 1090 |         control.ValidationType = SETTINGS_VALIDATION_RANGE;
 1091 |     }
 1092 |     
 1093 |     return AddControl(categoryName, groupName, control);
 1094 | }

 1096 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1097 | //| Add checkbox control                                            |
 1098 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1099 | bool CSettingsPanel::AddCheckBox(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string name, const string label, const bool defaultValue = false, const string description = "") {
 1100 |     SSettingsControl control;
 1101 |     ZeroMemory(control);
 1102 |     
 1103 |     control.Name = name;
 1104 |     control.Label = label;
 1105 |     control.Description = description;
 1106 |     control.Type = SETTINGS_CONTROL_CHECKBOX;
 1107 |     control.DataType = "bool";
 1108 |     control.BoolValue = defaultValue;
 1109 |     control.DefaultBoolValue = defaultValue;
 1110 |     control.IsVisible = true;
 1111 |     control.IsEnabled = true;
 1112 |     control.HasLabel = true;
 1113 |     control.LabelText = label;
 1114 |     control.Width = 150;
 1115 |     control.Height = 20;
 1116 |     
 1117 |     return AddControl(categoryName, groupName, control);
 1118 | }
 1119 | 
 1120 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1121 | //| Validate all controls                                           |
 1122 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1123 | bool CSettingsPanel::ValidateAll() {
 1124 |     m_ValidationErrorCount = 0;
 1125 |     bool isValid = true;
 1126 |     
 1127 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CategoryCount; i++) {
 1128 |         for (int j = 0; j < m_Categories[i].GroupCount; j++) {
 1129 |             for (int k = 0; k < m_Categories[i].Groups[j].ControlCount; k++) {
 1130 |                 if (!ValidateControlValue(m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k])) {
 1131 |                     isValid = false;
 1132 |                     if (m_ValidationErrorCount < ArraySize(m_ValidationErrors)) {
 1133 |                         m_ValidationErrors[m_ValidationErrorCount] = GetValidationError(m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k]);
 1134 |                         m_ValidationErrorCount++;
 1135 |                     }
 1136 |                 }
 1137 |             }
 1138 |         }
 1139 |     }
 1140 |     
 1141 |     m_Statistics.ValidationCount++;
 1142 |     if (!isValid) {
 1143 |         m_Statistics.ValidationErrorCount++;
 1144 |     }
 1145 |     
 1146 |     return isValid;
 1147 | }
 1148 | 
 1149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1150 | //| Apply changes                                                   |
 1151 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1152 | bool CSettingsPanel::ApplyChanges() {
 1153 |     if (!m_bModified) {
 1154 |         return true;
 1155 |     }
 1156 |     
 1157 |     // Validate first if enabled
 1158 |     if (m_bValidationEnabled && !ValidateAll()) {
 1159 |         LogError("Validation failed, cannot apply changes");
 1160 |         return false;
 1161 |     }
 1162 |     
 1163 |     // Apply changes through context
 1164 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pConfigManager != NULL) {
 1165 |         // Save current values to configuration
 1166 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_CategoryCount; i++) {
 1167 |             for (int j = 0; j < m_Categories[i].GroupCount; j++) {
 1168 |                 for (int k = 0; k < m_Categories[i].Groups[j].ControlCount; k++) {
 1169 |                     SSettingsControl& control = m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k];
 1170 |                     if (control.IsModified) {
 1171 |                         string paramName = control.Category + "." + control.Group + "." + control.Name;
 1172 |                         
 1173 |                         switch (control.Type) {
 1174 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_EDIT:
 1175 |                                 // Apply string value
 1176 |                                 break;
 1177 |                                 
 1178 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_SPINEDIT:
 1179 |                                 // Apply numeric value
 1180 |                                 break;
 1181 |                                 
 1182 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_CHECKBOX:
 1183 |                                 // Apply boolean value
 1184 |                                 break;
 1185 |                                 
 1186 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COMBOBOX:
 1187 |                                 // Apply selection value
 1188 |                                 break;
 1189 |                                 
 1190 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COLORBUTTON:
 1191 |                                 // Apply color value
 1192 |                                 break;
 1193 |                         }
 1194 |                         
 1195 |                         control.IsModified = false;
 1196 |                     }
 1197 |                 }
 1198 |             }
 1199 |         }
 1200 |     }
 1201 |     
 1202 |     m_bModified = false;
 1203 |     m_Statistics.SaveCount++;
 1204 |     m_Statistics.LastSaved = TimeCurrent();
 1205 |     
 1206 |     LogActivity("Settings changes applied successfully");
 1207 |     return true;
 1208 | }
 1209 | 
 1210 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1211 | //| Show settings panel                                             |
 1212 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1213 | bool CSettingsPanel::Show() {
 1214 |     if (!m_bInitialized) {
 1215 |         LogError("Settings panel not initialized");
 1216 |         return false;
 1217 |     }
 1218 |     
 1219 |     CAppDialog::Show();
 1220 |     m_bVisible = true;
 1221 |     
 1222 |     UpdateOpenStatistics();
 1223 |     LogActivity("Settings panel shown");
 1224 |     
 1225 |     return true;
 1226 | }

 1236 |     LogActivity("Settings panel hidden");
