 1241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1242 | //| Find category index                                             |
 1243 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1244 | int CSettingsPanel::FindCategoryIndex(const string name) const {
 1245 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CategoryCount; i++) {
 1246 |         if (m_Categories[i].Name == name) {
 1247 |             return i;
 1248 |         }
 1249 |     }
 1250 |     return -1;
 1251 | }
 1252 | 
 1253 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1254 | //| Find group index                                                |
 1255 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1256 | int CSettingsPanel::FindGroupIndex(const int categoryIndex, const string name) const {
 1257 |     if (categoryIndex < 0 || categoryIndex >= m_CategoryCount) {
 1258 |         return -1;
 1259 |     }
 1260 |     
 1261 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount; i++) {
 1262 |         if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[i].Name == name) {
 1263 |             return i;
 1264 |         }
 1265 |     }
 1266 |     return -1;
 1267 | }
 1268 | 
 1269 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1270 | //| Find control index                                              |
 1271 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1272 | int CSettingsPanel::FindControlIndex(const int categoryIndex, const int groupIndex, const string name) const {
 1273 |     if (categoryIndex < 0 || categoryIndex >= m_CategoryCount) {
 1274 |         return -1;
 1275 |     }
 1276 |     
 1277 |     if (groupIndex < 0 || groupIndex >= m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount) {
 1278 |         return -1;
 1279 |     }
 1280 |     
 1281 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].ControlCount; i++) {
 1282 |         if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[i].Name == name) {
 1283 |             return i;
 1284 |         }
 1285 |     }
 1286 |     return -1;
 1287 | }
 1288 | 
 1289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1290 | //| Validate control value                                          |
 1291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1292 | bool CSettingsPanel::ValidateControlValue(const SSettingsControl& control) const {
 1293 |     if (control.ValidationType == SETTINGS_VALIDATION_NONE) {
 1294 |         return true;
 1295 |     }
 1296 |     
 1297 |     // Required validation
 1298 |     if (control.IsRequired) {
 1299 |         if (control.DataType == "string" && control.StringValue == "") {
 1300 |             return false;
 1301 |         }
 1302 |     }
 1303 |     
 1304 |     // Numeric validation
 1305 |     if (control.ValidationType == SETTINGS_VALIDATION_NUMERIC || control.ValidationType == SETTINGS_VALIDATION_RANGE) {
 1306 |         if (control.DataType == "double" || control.DataType == "int") {
 1307 |             if (control.ValidationType == SETTINGS_VALIDATION_RANGE) {
 1308 |                 if (control.DoubleValue < control.MinValue || control.DoubleValue > control.MaxValue) {
 1309 |                     return false;
 1310 |                 }
 1311 |             }
 1312 |         }
 1313 |     }
 1314 |     
 1315 |     return true;
 1316 | }
 1317 | 
 1318 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1319 | //| Record change                                                   |
 1320 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1321 | void CSettingsPanel::RecordChange(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName) {
 1322 |     if (m_ChangedControlCount >= ArraySize(m_ChangedControls)) {
 1323 |         return;
 1324 |     }
 1325 |     
 1326 |     string changeKey = categoryName + "." + groupName + "." + controlName;
 1327 |     
 1328 |     // Check if already recorded
 1329 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ChangedControlCount; i++) {
 1330 |         if (m_ChangedControls[i] == changeKey) {
 1331 |             return;
 1332 |         }
 1333 |     }
 1334 |     
 1335 |     m_ChangedControls[m_ChangedControlCount] = changeKey;
 1336 |     m_ChangedControlCount++;
 1337 |     m_Statistics.ChangeCount++;
 1338 | }
 1339 | 
 1340 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1341 | //| Update open statistics                                          |
 1342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1343 | void CSettingsPanel::UpdateOpenStatistics() {
 1344 |     m_Statistics.LastOpened = TimeCurrent();
 1345 |     m_Statistics.OpenCount++;
 1346 | }
 1347 | 
 1348 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1349 | //| Update close statistics                                         |
 1350 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1351 | void CSettingsPanel::UpdateCloseStatistics() {
 1352 |     m_Statistics.LastClosed = TimeCurrent();
 1353 |     
 1354 |     if (m_Statistics.LastOpened > 0) {
 1355 |         double sessionTime = (double)(TimeCurrent() - m_Statistics.LastOpened);
 1356 |         m_Statistics.AverageOpenTime = (m_Statistics.AverageOpenTime * (m_Statistics.OpenCount - 1) + sessionTime) / m_Statistics.OpenCount;
 1357 |     }
 1358 | }

 1363 | void CSettingsPanel::LogError(const string error, const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level = LOG_LEVEL_ERROR) {
 1364 |     if (m_pContext != NULL && m_pContext->pLogger != NULL) {
 1365 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("[SETTINGS PANEL] " + error);
 1366 |     } else {
 1367 |         Print("[SETTINGS PANEL ERROR] " + error);
 1368 |     }
 1369 |     m_Statistics.ErrorCount++;
 1370 | }

 1470 | 
 1471 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1472 | //| Get validation error                                            |
 1473 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1474 | string CSettingsPanel::GetValidationError(const SSettingsControl& control) const {
 1475 |     if (control.IsRequired && control.StringValue == "") {
 1476 |         return StringFormat("Field '%s' is required", control.Label);
 1477 |     }
 1478 |     
 1479 |     if (control.ValidationType == SETTINGS_VALIDATION_RANGE) {
 1480 |         if (control.DoubleValue < control.MinValue || control.DoubleValue > control.MaxValue) {
 1481 |             return StringFormat("Value for '%s' must be between %.2f and %.2f", control.Label, control.MinValue, control.MaxValue);
 1482 |         }
 1483 |     }
 1484 |     
 1485 |     return "";
 1486 | }
 1487 | 
 1488 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1489 | //| Validate control                                                |
 1490 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1491 | bool CSettingsPanel::ValidateControl(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName) {
 1492 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1493 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) return false;
 1494 |     
 1495 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1496 |     if (groupIndex < 0) return false;
 1497 |     
 1498 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
 1499 |     if (controlIndex < 0) return false;
 1500 |     
 1501 |     SSettingsControl& control = m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex];
 1502 |     bool isValid = ValidateControlValue(control);
 1503 |     
 1504 |     control.IsValid = isValid;
 1505 |     
 1506 |     if (!isValid) {
 1507 |         string error = GetValidationError(control);
 1508 |         LogError(StringFormat("Validation failed for control %s: %s", controlName, error));
 1509 |     }
 1510 |     
 1511 |     return isValid;
 1512 | }
 1513 | 
 1514 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1515 | //| Set control value (double)                                      |
 1516 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1517 | bool CSettingsPanel::SetControlValue(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName, const double value) {
 1518 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1519 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) return false;
 1520 |     
 1521 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1522 |     if (groupIndex < 0) return false;
 1523 |     
 1524 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
 1525 |     if (controlIndex < 0) return false;
 1526 |     
 1527 |     SSettingsControl& control = m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex];
 1528 |     
 1529 |     // Store old value for change tracking
 1530 |     double oldValue = control.DoubleValue;
 1531 |     
 1532 |     // Set new value
 1533 |     control.DoubleValue = value;
 1534 |     control.IsModified = true;
 1535 |     
 1536 |     // Update UI control if created
 1537 |     if (control.pControl != NULL && control.Type == SETTINGS_CONTROL_SPINEDIT) {
 1538 |         if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 1539 |             CSpinEdit* pSpin = (CSpinEdit*)control.pControl;
 1540 |             pSpin.Value((long)value);
 1541 |         }
 1542 |     }
 1543 |     
 1544 |     // Record change
 1545 |     if (m_bChangeTrackingEnabled && oldValue != value) {
 1546 |         RecordChange(categoryName, groupName, controlName);
 1547 |         m_bModified = true;
 1548 |     }
 1549 |     
 1550 |     // Validate if enabled
 1551 |     if (m_bValidationEnabled) {
 1552 |         ValidateControl(categoryName, groupName, controlName);
 1553 |     }
 1554 |     
 1555 |     return true;
 1556 | }
 1557 | 
 1558 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1559 | //| Set control value (bool)                                        |
 1560 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1561 | bool CSettingsPanel::SetControlValue(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName, const bool value) {
 1562 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1563 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) return false;
 1564 |     
 1565 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1566 |     if (groupIndex < 0) return false;
 1567 |     
 1568 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
 1569 |     if (controlIndex < 0) return false;
 1570 |     
 1571 |     SSettingsControl& control = m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex];
 1572 |     
 1573 |     // Store old value for change tracking
 1574 |     bool oldValue = control.BoolValue;
 1575 |     
 1576 |     // Set new value
 1577 |     control.BoolValue = value;
 1578 |     control.IsModified = true;
 1579 |     
 1580 |     // Update UI control if created
 1581 |     if (control.pControl != NULL && control.Type == SETTINGS_CONTROL_CHECKBOX) {
 1582 |         if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 1583 |             CCheckBox* pCheck = (CCheckBox*)control.pControl;
 1584 |             pCheck.Checked(value);
 1585 |         }
 1586 |     }
 1587 |     
 1588 |     // Record change
 1589 |     if (m_bChangeTrackingEnabled && oldValue != value) {
 1590 |         RecordChange(categoryName, groupName, controlName);
 1591 |         m_bModified = true;
 1592 |     }
 1593 |     
 1594 |     return true;
 1595 | }
 1596 | 
 1597 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1598 | //| Get control value (double)                                      |
 1599 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1600 | double CSettingsPanel::GetControlValueDouble(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName) const {
 1601 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1602 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) return 0.0;
 1603 |     
 1604 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1605 |     if (groupIndex < 0) return 0.0;
 1606 |     
 1607 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
 1608 |     if (controlIndex < 0) return 0.0;
 1609 |     
 1610 |     return m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].DoubleValue;
 1611 | }

 1614 | //| Get control value (bool)                                        |
 1615 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1616 | bool CSettingsPanel::GetControlValueBool(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName) const {
 1617 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1618 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) return false;
 1619 |     
 1620 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1621 |     if (groupIndex < 0) return false;
 1622 |     
 1623 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
 1624 |     if (controlIndex < 0) return false;

 1629 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1630 | //| Add combo box control                                           |
 1631 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1632 | bool CSettingsPanel::AddComboBox(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string name, const string label, const string items[], const string defaultValue = "", const string description = "") {
 1633 |     SSettingsControl control;
 1634 |     ZeroMemory(control);
 1635 |     
 1636 |     control.Name = name;
 1637 |     control.Label = label;
 1638 |     control.Description = description;
 1639 |     control.Type = SETTINGS_CONTROL_COMBOBOX;
 1640 |     control.DataType = "string";
 1641 |     control.StringValue = defaultValue;
 1642 |     control.DefaultStringValue = defaultValue;
 1643 |     control.IsVisible = true;
 1644 |     control.IsEnabled = true;
 1645 |     control.HasLabel = true;
 1646 |     control.LabelText = label;
 1647 |     control.Width = 150;
 1648 |     control.Height = 20;
 1649 |     
 1650 |     // Store combo items
 1651 |     int itemCount = ArraySize(items);
 1652 |     if (itemCount > 0 && itemCount <= ArraySize(control.ComboItems)) {
 1653 |         for (int i = 0; i < itemCount; i++) {
 1654 |             control.ComboItems[i] = items[i];
 1655 |         }
 1656 |         control.ComboItemCount = itemCount;
 1657 |     }
 1658 |     
 1659 |     return AddControl(categoryName, groupName, control);
 1660 | }

 1709 | 
 1710 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1711 | //| Remove category                                                 |
 1712 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1713 | bool CSettingsPanel::RemoveCategory(const string name) {
 1714 |     int index = FindCategoryIndex(name);
 1715 |     if (index < 0) {
 1716 |         LogError(StringFormat("Category %s not found", name));
 1717 |         return false;
 1718 |     }
 1719 |     
 1720 |     // Clean up category UI
 1721 |     if (m_Categories[index].pPanel != NULL) {
 1722 |         delete m_Categories[index].pPanel;
 1723 |         m_Categories[index].pPanel = NULL;
 1724 |     }
 1725 |     
 1726 |     // Clean up groups
 1727 |     for (int j = 0; j < m_Categories[index].GroupCount; j++) {
 1728 |         for (int k = 0; k < m_Categories[index].Groups[j].ControlCount; k++) {
 1729 |             if (m_Categories[index].Groups[j].Controls[k].pControl != NULL) {
 1730 |                 delete m_Categories[index].Groups[j].Controls[k].pControl;
 1731 |                 m_Categories[index].Groups[j].Controls[k].pControl = NULL;
 1732 |             }
 1733 |             if (m_Categories[index].Groups[j].Controls[k].pLabel != NULL) {
 1734 |                 delete m_Categories[index].Groups[j].Controls[k].pLabel;
 1735 |                 m_Categories[index].Groups[j].Controls[k].pLabel = NULL;
 1736 |             }
 1737 |         }
 1738 |         if (m_Categories[index].Groups[j].pPanel != NULL) {
 1739 |             delete m_Categories[index].Groups[j].pPanel;
 1740 |             m_Categories[index].Groups[j].pPanel = NULL;
 1741 |         }
 1742 |     }
 1743 |     
 1744 |     // Shift remaining categories
 1745 |     for (int i = index; i < m_CategoryCount - 1; i++) {
 1746 |         m_Categories[i] = m_Categories[i + 1];
 1747 |     }
 1748 |     
 1749 |     m_CategoryCount--;
 1750 |     m_Statistics.TotalCategories--;
 1751 |     
 1752 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Category %s removed successfully", name));
 1753 |     return true;
 1754 | }
 1755 | 
 1756 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1757 | //| Remove group                                                    |
 1758 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1759 | bool CSettingsPanel::RemoveGroup(const string categoryName, const string groupName) {
 1760 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1761 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) {
 1762 |         LogError(StringFormat("Category %s not found", categoryName));
 1763 |         return false;
 1764 |     }
 1765 |     
 1766 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1767 |     if (groupIndex < 0) {
 1768 |         LogError(StringFormat("Group %s not found in category %s", groupName, categoryName));
 1769 |         return false;
 1770 |     }
 1771 |     
 1772 |     // Clean up group controls
 1773 |     for (int k = 0; k < m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].ControlCount; k++) {
 1774 |         if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[k].pControl != NULL) {
 1775 |             delete m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[k].pControl;
 1776 |             m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[k].pControl = NULL;
 1777 |         }
 1778 |         if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[k].pLabel != NULL) {
 1779 |             delete m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[k].pLabel;
 1780 |             m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[k].pLabel = NULL;
 1781 |         }
 1782 |     }
 1783 |     
 1784 |     // Clean up group panel
 1785 |     if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].pPanel != NULL) {
 1786 |         delete m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].pPanel;
 1787 |         m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].pPanel = NULL;
 1788 |     }
 1789 |     
 1790 |     // Shift remaining groups
 1791 |     for (int i = groupIndex; i < m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount - 1; i++) {
 1792 |         m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[i] = m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[i + 1];
 1793 |     }
 1794 |     
 1795 |     m_Categories[categoryIndex].GroupCount--;
 1796 |     m_Statistics.TotalGroups--;
 1797 |     
 1798 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Group %s removed from category %s successfully", groupName, categoryName));
 1799 |     return true;
 1800 | }
 1801 | 
 1802 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1803 | //| Remove control                                                  |
 1804 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1805 | bool CSettingsPanel::RemoveControl(const string categoryName, const string groupName, const string controlName) {
 1806 |     int categoryIndex = FindCategoryIndex(categoryName);
 1807 |     if (categoryIndex < 0) {
 1808 |         LogError(StringFormat("Category %s not found", categoryName));
 1809 |         return false;
 1810 |     }
 1811 |     
 1812 |     int groupIndex = FindGroupIndex(categoryIndex, groupName);
 1813 |     if (groupIndex < 0) {
 1814 |         LogError(StringFormat("Group %s not found in category %s", groupName, categoryName));
 1815 |         return false;
 1816 |     }
 1817 |     
 1818 |     int controlIndex = FindControlIndex(categoryIndex, groupIndex, controlName);
 1819 |     if (controlIndex < 0) {
 1820 |         LogError(StringFormat("Control %s not found in group %s", controlName, groupName));
 1821 |         return false;
 1822 |     }
 1823 |     
 1824 |     // Clean up control
 1825 |     if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].pControl != NULL) {
 1826 |         delete m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].pControl;
 1827 |         m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].pControl = NULL;
 1828 |     }
 1829 |     if (m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].pLabel != NULL) {
 1830 |         delete m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].pLabel;
 1831 |         m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[controlIndex].pLabel = NULL;
 1832 |     }
 1833 |     
 1834 |     // Shift remaining controls
 1835 |     for (int i = controlIndex; i < m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].ControlCount - 1; i++) {
 1836 |         m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[i] = m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].Controls[i + 1];
 1837 |     }
 1838 |     
 1839 |     m_Categories[categoryIndex].Groups[groupIndex].ControlCount--;
 1840 |     m_Statistics.TotalControls--;
 1841 |     
 1842 |     LogActivity(StringFormat("Control %s removed from group %s successfully", controlName, groupName));
 1843 |     return true;
 1844 | }
 1845 | 
 1846 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1847 | //| Show category                                                   |
 1848 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1849 | bool CSettingsPanel::ShowCategory(const string name) {
 1850 |     int index = FindCategoryIndex(name);
 1851 |     if (index < 0) return false;
 1852 |     
 1853 |     if (!m_Categories[index].IsVisible) {
 1854 |         m_Categories[index].IsVisible = true;
 1855 |         m_Statistics.VisibleCategories++;
 1856 |         
 1857 |         if (m_Categories[index].pPanel != NULL) {
 1858 |             m_Categories[index].pPanel.Show();
 1859 |         }
 1860 |         
 1861 |         LogActivity(StringFormat("Category %s shown", name));
 1862 |     }
 1863 |     
 1864 |     return true;
 1865 | }
 1866 |

 1873 |

 1875 |         m_Categories[index].IsVisible = false;

 1938 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1939 | //| Revert changes                                                  |
 1940 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1941 | bool CSettingsPanel::RevertChanges() {
 1942 |     if (!m_bModified) {
 1943 |         return true;
 1944 |     }
 1945 |     
 1946 |     // Revert all modified controls to their original values
 1947 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CategoryCount; i++) {
 1948 |         for (int j = 0; j < m_Categories[i].GroupCount; j++) {
 1949 |             for (int k = 0; k < m_Categories[i].Groups[j].ControlCount; k++) {
 1950 |                 SSettingsControl& control = m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k];
 1951 |                 if (control.IsModified) {
 1952 |                     // Restore default values
 1953 |                     switch (control.Type) {
 1954 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_EDIT:
 1955 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COMBOBOX:
 1956 |                             control.StringValue = control.DefaultStringValue;
 1957 |                             break;
 1958 |                             
 1959 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_SPINEDIT:
 1960 |                             control.DoubleValue = control.DefaultDoubleValue;
 1961 |                             break;
 1962 |                             
 1963 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_CHECKBOX:
 1964 |                             control.BoolValue = control.DefaultBoolValue;
 1965 |                             break;
 1966 |                             
 1967 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COLORBUTTON:
 1968 |                             control.ColorValue = control.DefaultColorValue;
 1969 |                             break;
 1970 |                             
 1971 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_DATEPICKER:
 1972 |                             control.DateTimeValue = control.DefaultDateTimeValue;
 1973 |                             break;
 1974 |                     }
 1975 |                     
 1976 |                     control.IsModified = false;
 1977 |                     
 1978 |                     // Update UI control if created
 1979 |                     if (control.pControl != NULL) {
 1980 |                         // Update based on control type
 1981 |                         switch (control.Type) {
 1982 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_EDIT:
 1983 |                                 if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 1984 |                                     CEdit* pEdit = (CEdit*)control.pControl;
 1985 |                                     pEdit.Text(control.StringValue);
 1986 |                                 }
 1987 |                                 break;
 1988 |                                 
 1989 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_SPINEDIT:
 1990 |                                 if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 1991 |                                     CSpinEdit* pSpin = (CSpinEdit*)control.pControl;
 1992 |                                     pSpin.Value((long)control.DoubleValue);
 1993 |                                 }
 1994 |                                 break;
 1995 |                                 
 1996 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_CHECKBOX:
 1997 |                                 if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 1998 |                                     CCheckBox* pCheck = (CCheckBox*)control.pControl;
 1999 |                                     pCheck.Checked(control.BoolValue);
 2000 |                                 }
 2001 |                                 break;
 2002 |                                 
 2003 |                             case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COMBOBOX:
 2004 |                                 if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 2005 |                                     CComboBox* pCombo = (CComboBox*)control.pControl;
 2006 |                                     pCombo.Select(control.StringValue);
 2007 |                                 }
 2008 |                                 break;
 2009 |                         }
 2010 |                     }
 2011 |                 }
 2012 |             }
 2013 |         }
 2014 |     }
 2015 |     
 2016 |     // Clear change tracking
 2017 |     m_ChangedControlCount = 0;
 2018 |     m_bModified = false;
 2019 |     
 2020 |     LogActivity("Settings changes reverted successfully");
 2021 |     return true;
 2022 | }
 2023 | 
 2024 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2025 | //| Reset to defaults                                               |
 2026 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2027 | bool CSettingsPanel::ResetToDefaults() {
 2028 |     // Reset all controls to their default values
 2029 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_CategoryCount; i++) {
 2030 |         for (int j = 0; j < m_Categories[i].GroupCount; j++) {
 2031 |             for (int k = 0; k < m_Categories[i].Groups[j].ControlCount; k++) {
 2032 |                 SSettingsControl& control = m_Categories[i].Groups[j].Controls[k];
 2033 |                 
 2034 |                 // Set to default values
 2035 |                 switch (control.Type) {
 2036 |                     case SETTINGS_CONTROL_EDIT:
 2037 |                     case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COMBOBOX:
 2038 |                         control.StringValue = control.DefaultStringValue;
 2039 |                         break;
 2040 |                         
 2041 |                     case SETTINGS_CONTROL_SPINEDIT:
 2042 |                         control.DoubleValue = control.DefaultDoubleValue;
 2043 |                         break;
 2044 |                         
 2045 |                     case SETTINGS_CONTROL_CHECKBOX:
 2046 |                         control.BoolValue = control.DefaultBoolValue;
 2047 |                         break;
 2048 |                         
 2049 |                     case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COLORBUTTON:
 2050 |                         control.ColorValue = control.DefaultColorValue;
 2051 |                         break;
 2052 |                         
 2053 |                     case SETTINGS_CONTROL_DATEPICKER:
 2054 |                         control.DateTimeValue = control.DefaultDateTimeValue;
 2055 |                         break;
 2056 |                 }
 2057 |                 
 2058 |                 control.IsModified = true;
 2059 |                 
 2060 |                 // Update UI control if created
 2061 |                 if (control.pControl != NULL) {
 2062 |                     // Update based on control type
 2063 |                     switch (control.Type) {
 2064 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_EDIT:
 2065 |                             if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 2066 |                                 CEdit* pEdit = (CEdit*)control.pControl;
 2067 |                                 pEdit.Text(control.StringValue);
 2068 |                             }
 2069 |                             break;
 2070 |                             
 2071 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_SPINEDIT:
 2072 |                             if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 2073 |                                 CSpinEdit* pSpin = (CSpinEdit*)control.pControl;
 2074 |                                 pSpin.Value((long)control.DoubleValue);
 2075 |                             }
 2076 |                             break;
 2077 |                             
 2078 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_CHECKBOX:
 2079 |                             if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 2080 |                                 CCheckBox* pCheck = (CCheckBox*)control.pControl;
 2081 |                                 pCheck.Checked(control.BoolValue);
 2082 |                             }
 2083 |                             break;
 2084 |                             
 2085 |                         case SETTINGS_CONTROL_COMBOBOX:
 2086 |                             if (CheckPointer(control.pControl) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 2087 |                                 CComboBox* pCombo = (CComboBox*)control.pControl;
 2088 |                                 pCombo.Select(control.StringValue);
 2089 |                             }
 2090 |                             break;
 2091 |                     }
 2092 |                 }
 2093 |             }
 2094 |         }
 2095 |     }
 2096 |     
 2097 |     m_bModified = true;
 2098 |     m_Statistics.ResetCount++;
 2099 |     
 2100 |     LogActivity("Settings reset to defaults successfully");
 2101 |     return true;
 2102 | }

  142 |

  144 |     EventSetTimer(30); // 30-second intervals for system monitoring
  145 |     
  146 |     g_bSystemReady = true;
  147 |     
  148 |     // 6. Log successful initialization
  149 |     EAContext* pContext = g_pCore->GetContext();
  150 |     if(pContext && pContext->pLogger) {
  151 |         pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("=== APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL Successfully Started ===", __FUNCTION__);
  152 |         pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Magic Number: " + IntegerToString(inputParams.MagicNumber), __FUNCTION__);
  153 |         pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Trading Symbol: " + _Symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  154 |         pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Account Type: " + (AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_MODE) == ACCOUNT_TRADE_MODE_DEMO ? "DEMO" : "LIVE"), __FUNCTION__);
  155 |         pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("AssetDNA Enabled: " + (inputParams.UseAssetDNA ? "YES" : "NO"), __FUNCTION__);
  156 |         pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Broker Health Monitoring: " + (inputParams.EnableBrokerHealthMonitoring ? "YES" : "NO"), __FUNCTION__);
  157 |     }
  158 |     
  159 |     Print("=== APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL Ready for Trading ===");
  160 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
  161 | }
  162 | 
  163 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  164 | //| Expert deinitialization function - Enhanced cleanup             |
  165 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  166 | void OnDeinit(const int reason) {
  167 |     Print("================================================================");
  168 |     Print("    APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL (Enhanced) - Shutting Down...");
  169 |     Print("================================================================");
  170 |     
  171 |     // Stop timer
  172 |     EventKillTimer();
  173 |     
  174 |     // Calculate runtime
  175 |     if(g_startTime > 0) {
  176 |         long runtimeSeconds = TimeCurrent() - g_startTime;
  177 |         Print("Total Runtime: " + TimeToString(runtimeSeconds, TIME_MINUTES | TIME_SECONDS));
  178 |     }
  179 |     
  180 |     // Log shutdown reason
  181 |     string reasonStr = "";
  182 |     switch(reason) {
  183 |         case REASON_PROGRAM:    reasonStr = "Program terminated"; break;
  184 |         case REASON_REMOVE:     reasonStr = "Expert removed"; break;
  185 |         case REASON_RECOMPILE:  reasonStr = "Expert recompiled"; break;
  186 |         case REASON_CHARTCHANGE:reasonStr = "Chart changed"; break;
  187 |         case REASON_CHARTCLOSE: reasonStr = "Chart closed"; break;
  188 |         case REASON_PARAMETERS: reasonStr = "Parameters changed"; break;
  189 |         case REASON_ACCOUNT:    reasonStr = "Account changed"; break;
  190 |         case REASON_TEMPLATE:   reasonStr = "Template changed"; break;
  191 |         case REASON_INITFAILED: reasonStr = "Initialization failed"; break;
  192 |         case REASON_CLOSE:      reasonStr = "Terminal closed"; break;
  193 |         default:                reasonStr = "Unknown reason (" + IntegerToString(reason) + ")"; break;
  194 |     }
  195 |     
  196 |     // Log final statistics if available
  197 |     if(g_pCore && g_bSystemReady) {
  198 |         EAContext* pContext = g_pCore->GetContext();
  199 |         if(pContext && pContext->pLogger) {
  200 |             pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("EA Shutdown Initiated: " + reasonStr, __FUNCTION__);
  201 |             pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Final System Health: " + DoubleToString(g_pCore->GetSystemHealthScore(), 2), __FUNCTION__);
  202 |             
  203 |             // Log performance summary
  204 |             if(pContext->Performance.TotalTrades > 0) {
  205 |                 pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Performance Summary - Trades: %d, Win Rate: %.2f%%, Profit Factor: %.2f", 
  206 |                                           pContext->Performance.TotalTrades,
  207 |                                           pContext->Performance.WinRate,
  208 |                                           pContext->Performance.ProfitFactor), __FUNCTION__);
  209 |             }
  210 |         }
  211 |     }
  212 |     
  213 |     // Enhanced cleanup
  214 |     g_bSystemReady = false;
  215 |     
  216 |     if(g_pCore) {
  217 |         g_pCore->Deinitialize();
  218 |         delete g_pCore;
  219 |         g_pCore = NULL;
  220 |     }
  221 |     
  222 |     Print("[EA] APEX Pullback EA v5 FINAL shutdown completed. Reason: " + reasonStr);
  223 |     Print("================================================================");
  224 | }
  225 | 
  226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 | //| Expert tick function - Enhanced event processing                |
  228 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  229 | void OnTick() {
  230 |     // Enhanced safety checks
  231 |     if(!g_bSystemReady || !g_pCore || !g_pCore->IsInitialized()) {
  232 |         return;
  233 |     }
  234 |     
  235 |     // System health monitoring
  236 |     if(!g_pCore->IsHealthy()) {
  237 |         static datetime lastHealthWarning = 0;
  238 |         if(TimeCurrent() - lastHealthWarning > 300) { // Every 5 minutes
  239 |             Print("WARNING: System health degraded - Score: " + DoubleToString(g_pCore->GetSystemHealthScore(), 2));
  240 |             lastHealthWarning = TimeCurrent();
  241 |         }
  242 |     }
  243 |     
  244 |     // Delegate to enhanced core system
  245 |     g_pCore->OnTick();
  246 | }
  247 | 
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | //| Timer function - Enhanced system monitoring                     |
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | void OnTimer() {
  252 |     if(!g_bSystemReady || !g_pCore) return;
  253 |     
  254 |     // Enhanced system monitoring and maintenance
  255 |     static int timerCount = 0;
  256 |     timerCount++;
  257 |     
  258 |     // Delegate to core
  259 |     g_pCore->OnTimer();
  260 |     
  261 |     // Periodic system health reporting (every 10 minutes)
  262 |     if(timerCount % 20 == 0) { // 20 * 30 seconds = 10 minutes
  263 |         EAContext* pContext = g_pCore->GetContext();
  264 |         if(pContext && pContext->pLogger && pContext->InputParams.EnableMethodLogging) {
  265 |             double healthScore = g_pCore->GetSystemHealthScore();
  266 |             pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("System Health Check - Score: %.2f, Status: %s", 
  267 |                                       healthScore, g_pCore->GetSystemStatus()), __FUNCTION__);
  268 |         }
  269 |     }
  270 | }
  271 |

  371 | // Get current EA status with enhanced information
  372 | string GetEnhancedEAStatus() {
  373 |     if(!g_bSystemReady || !g_pCore) return "SYSTEM_NOT_READY";
  374 |     if(!g_pCore->IsInitialized()) return "NOT_INITIALIZED";
  375 |     if(!g_pCore->IsHealthy()) return "UNHEALTHY";
  376 |     return g_pCore->GetSystemStatus();
  377 | }
  378 | 
  379 | // Get comprehensive system report
  380 | string GetEnhancedSystemReport() {
  381 |     if(!g_bSystemReady || !g_pCore) return "System not ready";
  382 |     
  383 |     string report = "=== APEX PULLBACK EA v5 FINAL SYSTEM REPORT ===\n";
  384 |     report += "Version: " + GetEAVersion() + "\n";
  385 |     report += "Status: " + GetEnhancedEAStatus() + "\n";
  386 |     report += "Health Score: " + DoubleToString(g_pCore->GetSystemHealthScore(), 2) + "\n";
  387 |     
  388 |     EAContext* pContext = g_pCore->GetContext();
  389 |     if(pContext) {
  390 |         report += "Trades: " + IntegerToString(pContext->Performance.TotalTrades) + "\n";
  391 |         report += "Win Rate: " + DoubleToString(pContext->Performance.WinRate, 2) + "%\n";
  392 |         report += "Profit Factor: " + DoubleToString(pContext->Performance.ProfitFactor, 2) + "\n";
  393 |     }
  394 |     
  395 |     report += "===============================================";
  396 |     return report;
  397 | }

  399 | // Emergency system restart (for manual intervention)
  400 | bool RestartEnhancedSystem() {
  401 |     Print("=== EMERGENCY SYSTEM RESTART INITIATED ===");
  402 |     
  403 |     if(g_pCore) {
  404 |         EAInputParams currentParams;
  405 |         if(g_pCore->GetContext()) {
  406 |             currentParams = g_pCore->GetContext()->InputParams;
  407 |         }
  408 |         
  409 |         g_pCore->Deinitialize();
  410 |         delete g_pCore;
  411 |         g_pCore = NULL;
  412 |         
  413 |         g_pCore = new CCore();
  414 |         if(!g_pCore || !g_pCore->Initialize(currentParams)) {
  415 |             Print("CRITICAL: Emergency restart failed");
  416 |             return false;
  417 |         }
  418 |     }
  419 |     
  420 |     Print("=== EMERGENCY SYSTEM RESTART COMPLETED ===");
  421 |     return true;
  422 | }
